authors_text: Rafid Mahmood,James Lucas,David Acuna,Daiqing Li,Jonah Philion,Jose M. Alvarez,Zhiding Yu,Sanja Fidler,Marc T. Law
title: How Much More Data Do I Need? Estimating Requirements for Downstream Tasks
title_zh: 我还需要多少数据？估计下游任务的需求
abstract: Given a small training data set and a learning algorithm, how much more data is necessary to reach a target validation or test performance? This question is of critical importance in applications such as autonomous driving or medical imaging where collecting data is expensive and time-consuming. Overestimating or underestimating data requirements incurs substantial costs that could be avoided with an adequate budget. Prior work on neural scaling laws suggest that the power-law function can fit the validation performance curve and extrapolate it to larger data set sizes. We find that this does not immediately translate to the more difficult downstream task of estimating the required data set size to meet a target performance. In this work, we consider a broad class of computer vision tasks and systematically investigate a family of functions that generalize the power-law function to allow for better estimation of data requirements. Finally, we show that incorporating a tuned correction factor and collecting over multiple rounds significantly improves the performance of the data estimators. Using our guidelines, practitioners can accurately estimate data requirements of machine learning systems to gain savings in both development time and data acquisition costs.
summary: Given a small training data set and a learning algorithm, how much more data is necessary to reach a target validation or test performance? This question is of critical importance in applications such as autonomous driving or medical imaging where collecting data is expensive and time-consuming. Overestimating or underestimating data requirements incurs substantial costs that could be avoided with an adequate budget. Prior work on neural scaling laws suggest that the power-law function can fit the validation performance curve and extrapolate it to larger data set sizes. We find that this does not immediately translate to the more difficult downstream task of estimating the required data set size to meet a target performance. In this work, we consider a broad class of computer vision tasks and systematically investigate a family of functions that generalize the power-law function to allow for better estimation of data requirements. Finally, we show that incorporating a tuned correction factor and collecting over multiple rounds significantly improves the performance of the data estimators. Using our guidelines, practitioners can accurately estimate data requirements of machine learning systems to gain savings in both development time and data acquisition costs.
abstract_zh: 给定一个小的训练数据集和一个学习算法，需要多少数据才能达到目标验证或测试性能？这个问题在自动驾驶或医学成像等应用中至关重要，因为这些应用中收集数据既昂贵又耗时。高估或低估数据需求会产生大量成本，而通过充足的预算可以避免这些成本。先前关于神经缩放定律的工作表明，幂律函数可以拟合验证性能曲线并将其外推到更大的数据集大小。我们发现这并不会立即转化为更困难的下游任务，即估计满足目标性能所需的数据集大小。在这项工作中，我们考虑了一类广泛的计算机视觉任务，并系统地研究了一系列函数，这些函数概括了幂律函数，以更好地估计数据需求。最后，我们表明，结合调整的校正因子并进行多轮收集可以显着提高数据估计器的性能。使用我们的指南，从业者可以准确估计机器学习系统的数据需求，从而节省开发时间和数据采集成本。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决在给定少量训练数据和学习算法的情况下，如何准确估计达到目标性能所需的额外数据量问题。
AI.motivation: 在自动驾驶或医疗影像等数据采集成本高昂的领域，现有方法（如幂律函数）难以准确预测下游任务的数据需求，导致预算浪费或效率低下。
AI.method: 提出广义函数族替代幂律模型，并引入调优修正因子与多轮数据采集机制，系统改进数据需求估计方法。
AI.result: 实验表明，新方法显著提升数据估计精度，帮助实践者减少开发时间和数据获取成本。
AI.conclusion: 通过修正模型与迭代验证，本文为机器学习系统提供可靠的数据需求评估框架，实现资源优化配置。

search_text: How Much More Data Do I Need? Estimating Requirements for Downstream Tasks 我还需要多少数据？估计下游任务的需求 Given a small training data set and a learning algorithm, how much more data is necessary to reach a target validation or test performance? This question is of critical importance in applications such as autonomous driving or medical imaging where collecting data is expensive and time-consuming. Overestimating or underestimating data requirements incurs substantial costs that could be avoided with an adequate budget. Prior work on neural scaling laws suggest that the power-law function can fit the validation performance curve and extrapolate it to larger data set sizes. We find that this does not immediately translate to the more difficult downstream task of estimating the required data set size to meet a target performance. In this work, we consider a broad class of computer vision tasks and systematically investigate a family of functions that generalize the power-law function to allow for better estimation of data requirements. Finally, we show that incorporating a tuned correction factor and collecting over multiple rounds significantly improves the performance of the data estimators. Using our guidelines, practitioners can accurately estimate data requirements of machine learning systems to gain savings in both development time and data acquisition costs. 给定一个小的训练数据集和一个学习算法，需要多少数据才能达到目标验证或测试性能？这个问题在自动驾驶或医学成像等应用中至关重要，因为这些应用中收集数据既昂贵又耗时。高估或低估数据需求会产生大量成本，而通过充足的预算可以避免这些成本。先前关于神经缩放定律的工作表明，幂律函数可以拟合验证性能曲线并将其外推到更大的数据集大小。我们发现这并不会立即转化为更困难的下游任务，即估计满足目标性能所需的数据集大小。在这项工作中，我们考虑了一类广泛的计算机视觉任务，并系统地研究了一系列函数，这些函数概括了幂律函数，以更好地估计数据需求。最后，我们表明，结合调整的校正因子并进行多轮收集可以显着提高数据估计器的性能。使用我们的指南，从业者可以准确估计机器学习系统的数据需求，从而节省开发时间和数据采集成本。 本文旨在解决在给定少量训练数据和学习算法的情况下，如何准确估计达到目标性能所需的额外数据量问题。 Rafid Mahmood,James Lucas,David Acuna,Daiqing Li,Jonah Philion,Jose M. authors_text: Ayan Kumar Bhunia,Aneeshan Sain,Parth Shah,Animesh Gupta,Pinaki Nath Chowdhury,Tao Xiang,Yi-Zhe Song
title: Adaptive Fine-Grained Sketch-Based Image Retrieval
title_zh: 基于草图的自适应细粒度图像检索
comment: Accepted in ECCV 2022. Minor typos and Eq.4 corrected
comments: Accepted in ECCV 2022. Minor typos and Eq.4 corrected
abstract: The recent focus on Fine-Grained Sketch-Based Image Retrieval (FG-SBIR) has shifted towards generalising a model to new categories without any training data from them. In real-world applications, however, a trained FG-SBIR model is often applied to both new categories and different human sketchers, i.e., different drawing styles. Although this complicates the generalisation problem, fortunately, a handful of examples are typically available, enabling the model to adapt to the new category/style. In this paper, we offer a novel perspective -- instead of asking for a model that generalises, we advocate for one that quickly adapts, with just very few samples during testing (in a few-shot manner). To solve this new problem, we introduce a novel model-agnostic meta-learning (MAML) based framework with several key modifications: (1) As a retrieval task with a margin-based contrastive loss, we simplify the MAML training in the inner loop to make it more stable and tractable. (2) The margin in our contrastive loss is also meta-learned with the rest of the model. (3) Three additional regularisation losses are introduced in the outer loop, to make the meta-learned FG-SBIR model more effective for category/style adaptation. Extensive experiments on public datasets suggest a large gain over generalisation and zero-shot based approaches, and a few strong few-shot baselines.
summary: The recent focus on Fine-Grained Sketch-Based Image Retrieval (FG-SBIR) has shifted towards generalising a model to new categories without any training data from them. In real-world applications, however, a trained FG-SBIR model is often applied to both new categories and different human sketchers, i.e., different drawing styles. Although this complicates the generalisation problem, fortunately, a handful of examples are typically available, enabling the model to adapt to the new category/style. In this paper, we offer a novel perspective -- instead of asking for a model that generalises, we advocate for one that quickly adapts, with just very few samples during testing (in a few-shot manner). To solve this new problem, we introduce a novel model-agnostic meta-learning (MAML) based framework with several key modifications: (1) As a retrieval task with a margin-based contrastive loss, we simplify the MAML training in the inner loop to make it more stable and tractable. (2) The margin in our contrastive loss is also meta-learned with the rest of the model. (3) Three additional regularisation losses are introduced in the outer loop, to make the meta-learned FG-SBIR model more effective for category/style adaptation. Extensive experiments on public datasets suggest a large gain over generalisation and zero-shot based approaches, and a few strong few-shot baselines.
abstract_zh: 最近对基于细粒度草图的图像检索（FG-SBIR）的关注已转向将模型推广到新类别，而无需从中获取任何训练数据。然而，在实际应用中，经过训练的 FG-SBIR 模型通常应用于新类别和不同的人类草图绘制者，即不同的绘图风格。尽管这使泛化问题变得复杂，但幸运的是，通常有一些示例可用，使模型能够适应新的类别/风格。在本文中，我们提供了一种新颖的视角——我们不要求建立一个通用的模型，而是提倡一个能够快速适应的模型，在测试过程中只需要很少的样本（以几次射击的方式）。为了解决这个新问题，我们引入了一种新颖的基于模型不可知元学习（MAML）的框架，并进行了一些关键修改：（1）作为具有基于边缘的对比损失的检索任务，我们简化了内循环中的 MAML 训练，使其更加稳定和易于处理。 (2) 我们的对比损失中的余量也是与模型的其余部分一起进行元学习的。 (3)在外循环中引入了三个额外的正则化损失，以使元学习的FG-SBIR模型对于类别/风格适应更有效。对公共数据集的广泛实验表明，与泛化和基于零样本的方法相比，有很大的收益，并且有一些强大的少样本基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模型无关元学习（MAML）的框架，用于解决细粒度草图图像检索（FG-SBIR）中对新类别和不同绘图风格的快速适应问题。
AI.motivation: 现有FG-SBIR模型难以同时适应新类别和不同草图绘制者（风格），而实际应用中通常仅有少量样本可用，需模型具备快速适应能力而非单纯泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出改进的MAML框架：1）在内循环中使用基于边距的对比损失简化训练；2）边距值与模型共同元学习；3）在外循环引入三种正则化损失以增强适应性。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上的实验表明，该方法在适应性任务中显著优于泛化、零样本方法及现有少样本基线。
AI.conclusion: 通过强调快速适应而非泛化，本文框架有效解决了FG-SBIR在新类别和风格下的检索问题，验证了元学习与正则化设计的有效性。

search_text: Adaptive Fine-Grained Sketch-Based Image Retrieval 基于草图的自适应细粒度图像检索 The recent focus on Fine-Grained Sketch-Based Image Retrieval (FG-SBIR) has shifted towards generalising a model to new categories without any training data from them. In real-world applications, however, a trained FG-SBIR model is often applied to both new categories and different human sketchers, i.e., different drawing styles. Although this complicates the generalisation problem, fortunately, a handful of examples are typically available, enabling the model to adapt to the new category/style. In this paper, we offer a novel perspective -- instead of asking for a model that generalises, we advocate for one that quickly adapts, with just very few samples during testing (in a few-shot manner). To solve this new problem, we introduce a novel model-agnostic meta-learning (MAML) based framework with several key modifications: (1) As a retrieval task with a margin-based contrastive loss, we simplify the MAML training in the inner loop to make it more stable and tractable. (2) The margin in our contrastive loss is also meta-learned with the rest of the model. (3) Three additional regularisation losses are introduced in the outer loop, to make the meta-learned FG-SBIR model more effective for category/style adaptation. Extensive experiments on public datasets suggest a large gain over generalisation and zero-shot based approaches, and a few strong few-shot baselines. 最近对基于细粒度草图的图像检索（FG-SBIR）的关注已转向将模型推广到新类别，而无需从中获取任何训练数据。然而，在实际应用中，经过训练的 FG-SBIR 模型通常应用于新类别和不同的人类草图绘制者，即不同的绘图风格。尽管这使泛化问题变得复杂，但幸运的是，通常有一些示例可用，使模型能够适应新的类别/风格。在本文中，我们提供了一种新颖的视角——我们不要求建立一个通用的模型，而是提倡一个能够快速适应的模型，在测试过程中只需要很少的样本（以几次射击的方式）。为了解决这个新问题，我们引入了一种新颖的基于模型不可知元学习（MAML）的框架，并进行了一些关键修改：（1）作为具有基于边缘的对比损失的检索任务，我们简化了内循环中的 MAML 训练，使其更加稳定和易于处理。 (2) 我们的对比损失中的余量也是与模型的其余部分一起进行元学习的。 (3)在外循环中引入了三个额外的正则化损失，以使元学习的FG-SBIR模型对于类别/风格适应更有效。对公共数据集的广泛实验表明，与泛化和基于零样本的方法相比，有很大的收益，并且有一些强大的少样本基线。 本文提出一种基于模型无关元学习（MAML）的框架，用于解决细粒度草图图像检索（FG-SBIR）中对新类别和不同绘图风格的快速适应问题。 Ayan Kumar Bhunia,Aneeshan Sain,Parth Shah,Animesh Gupta,Pinaki Nath Chowdhury,Tao Xiang,Yi-Zhe Song cs.CV

authors_text: Brooke Stephenson,Laurent Besacier,Laurent Girin,Thomas Hueber
title: BERT, can HE predict contrastive focus? Predicting and controlling prominence in neural TTS using a language model
title_zh: BERT，HE 可以预测对比焦点吗？使用语言模型预测和控制神经 TTS 中的显着性
abstract: Several recent studies have tested the use of transformer language model representations to infer prosodic features for text-to-speech synthesis (TTS). While these studies have explored prosody in general, in this work, we look specifically at the prediction of contrastive focus on personal pronouns. This is a particularly challenging task as it often requires semantic, discursive and/or pragmatic knowledge to predict correctly. We collect a corpus of utterances containing contrastive focus and we evaluate the accuracy of a BERT model, finetuned to predict quantized acoustic prominence features, on these samples. We also investigate how past utterances can provide relevant information for this prediction. Furthermore, we evaluate the controllability of pronoun prominence in a TTS model conditioned on acoustic prominence features.
summary: Several recent studies have tested the use of transformer language model representations to infer prosodic features for text-to-speech synthesis (TTS). While these studies have explored prosody in general, in this work, we look specifically at the prediction of contrastive focus on personal pronouns. This is a particularly challenging task as it often requires semantic, discursive and/or pragmatic knowledge to predict correctly. We collect a corpus of utterances containing contrastive focus and we evaluate the accuracy of a BERT model, finetuned to predict quantized acoustic prominence features, on these samples. We also investigate how past utterances can provide relevant information for this prediction. Furthermore, we evaluate the controllability of pronoun prominence in a TTS model conditioned on acoustic prominence features.
abstract_zh: 最近的几项研究测试了使用 Transformer 语言模型表示来推断文本到语音合成 (TTS) 的韵律特征。虽然这些研究总体上探讨了韵律，但在这项工作中，我们专门研究了人称代词对比焦点的预测。这是一项特别具有挑战性的任务，因为它通常需要语义、推论和/或实用知识才能正确预测。我们收集了包含对比焦点的话语语料库，并评估了 BERT 模型的准确性，该模型经过微调以预测这些样本的量化声学突出特征。我们还研究了过去的话语如何为这一预测提供相关信息。此外，我们还评估了以声学突出特征为条件的 TTS 模型中代词突出度的可控性。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在利用BERT模型预测并控制神经文本到语音合成（TTS）中人称代词的对比焦点突出性。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注一般韵律特征，而对比焦点预测需结合语义、语用等复杂知识，因此需专门探索其预测与控制方法。
AI.method: 收集对比焦点语料库，微调BERT预测量化声学突出特征，分析历史话语影响，并评估TTS模型在声学特征条件下的可控性。
AI.result: 实验表明微调BERT能有效预测突出特征，历史话语信息提升预测效果，且TTS模型可控性得到增强。
AI.conclusion: BERT在预测对比焦点突出性方面表现良好，结合历史语境信息可提升效果，为可控TTS提供新思路。

search_text: BERT, can HE predict contrastive focus? Predicting and controlling prominence in neural TTS using a language model BERT，HE 可以预测对比焦点吗？使用语言模型预测和控制神经 TTS 中的显着性 Several recent studies have tested the use of transformer language model representations to infer prosodic features for text-to-speech synthesis (TTS). While these studies have explored prosody in general, in this work, we look specifically at the prediction of contrastive focus on personal pronouns. This is a particularly challenging task as it often requires semantic, discursive and/or pragmatic knowledge to predict correctly. We collect a corpus of utterances containing contrastive focus and we evaluate the accuracy of a BERT model, finetuned to predict quantized acoustic prominence features, on these samples. We also investigate how past utterances can provide relevant information for this prediction. Furthermore, we evaluate the controllability of pronoun prominence in a TTS model conditioned on acoustic prominence features. 最近的几项研究测试了使用 Transformer 语言模型表示来推断文本到语音合成 (TTS) 的韵律特征。虽然这些研究总体上探讨了韵律，但在这项工作中，我们专门研究了人称代词对比焦点的预测。这是一项特别具有挑战性的任务，因为它通常需要语义、推论和/或实用知识才能正确预测。我们收集了包含对比焦点的话语语料库，并评估了 BERT 模型的准确性，该模型经过微调以预测这些样本的量化声学突出特征。我们还研究了过去的话语如何为这一预测提供相关信息。此外，我们还评估了以声学突出特征为条件的 TTS 模型中代词突出度的可控性。 本文旨在利用BERT模型预测并控制神经文本到语音合成（TTS）中人称代词的对比焦点突出性。 Brooke Stephenson,Laurent Besacier,Laurent Girin,Thomas Hueber cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Zhekun Luo,Shalini Ghosh,Devin Guillory,Keizo Kato,Trevor Darrell,Huijuan Xu
title: Disentangled Action Recognition with Knowledge Bases
title_zh: 与知识库分离的动作识别
abstract: Action in video usually involves the interaction of human with objects. Action labels are typically composed of various combinations of verbs and nouns, but we may not have training data for all possible combinations. In this paper, we aim to improve the generalization ability of the compositional action recognition model to novel verbs or novel nouns that are unseen during training time, by leveraging the power of knowledge graphs. Previous work utilizes verb-noun compositional action nodes in the knowledge graph, making it inefficient to scale since the number of compositional action nodes grows quadratically with respect to the number of verbs and nouns. To address this issue, we propose our approach: Disentangled Action Recognition with Knowledge-bases (DARK), which leverages the inherent compositionality of actions. DARK trains a factorized model by first extracting disentangled feature representations for verbs and nouns, and then predicting classification weights using relations in external knowledge graphs. The type constraint between verb and noun is extracted from external knowledge bases and finally applied when composing actions. DARK has better scalability in the number of objects and verbs, and achieves state-of-the-art performance on the Charades dataset. We further propose a new benchmark split based on the Epic-kitchen dataset which is an order of magnitude bigger in the numbers of classes and samples, and benchmark various models on this benchmark.

Action labels are typically composed of various combinations of verbs and nouns, but we may not have training data for all possible combinations. In this paper, we aim to improve the generalization ability of the compositional action recognition model to novel verbs or novel nouns that are unseen during training time, by leveraging the power of knowledge graphs. Previous work utilizes verb-noun compositional action nodes in the knowledge graph, making it inefficient to scale since the number of compositional action nodes grows quadratically with respect to the number of verbs and nouns. To address this issue, we propose our approach: Disentangled Action Recognition with Knowledge-bases (DARK), which leverages the inherent compositionality of actions. DARK trains a factorized model by first extracting disentangled feature representations for verbs and nouns, and then predicting classification weights using relations in external knowledge graphs. The type constraint between verb and noun is extracted from external knowledge bases and finally applied when composing actions. DARK has better scalability in the number of objects and verbs, and achieves state-of-the-art performance on the Charades dataset. We further propose a new benchmark split based on the Epic-kitchen dataset which is an order of magnitude bigger in the numbers of classes and samples, and benchmark various models on this benchmark.
abstract_zh: 视频中的动作通常涉及人与物体的交互。动作标签通常由动词和名词的各种组合组成，但我们可能没有所有可能组合的训练数据。在本文中，我们的目标是利用知识图谱的力量，提高组合动作识别模型对训练期间未见过的新动词或新名词的泛化能力。先前的工作在知识图中利用动词-名词组合动作节点，由于组合动作节点的数量相对于动词和名词的数量呈二次方增长，因此扩展效率低下。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了我们的方法：基于知识库的解开动作识别（DARK），它利用了动作固有的组合性。 DARK 通过首先提取动词和名词的解缠结特征表示来训练因式分解模型，然后使用外部知识图中的关系来预测分类权重。动词和名词之间的类型约束是从外部知识库中提取的，并最终在构成动作时应用。 DARK 在对象和动词的数量上具有更好的可扩展性，并在 Charades 数据集上实现了最先进的性能。我们进一步基于 Epic-kitchen 数据集提出了一个新的基准分割，该数据集的类和样本数量大了一个数量级，并在此基准上对各种模型进行了基准测试。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于知识库的解耦动作识别方法（DARK），旨在通过利用知识图谱提升模型对新动词或新名词组合动作的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统动作识别模型在处理未见过的动词或名词组合时表现不佳，且现有方法因组合动作节点数量呈二次增长导致可扩展性差。
AI.method: DARK通过分离动词和名词的特征表示，结合外部知识图谱中的关系预测分类权重，并利用知识库中的类型约束进行动作组合。
AI.result: 在Charades数据集上达到SOTA性能，并基于Epic-kitchen构建了更大规模的新基准，验证了方法的可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: DARK通过解耦特征与知识约束有效提升了动作识别的泛化能力，为大规模动作分类提供了新思路。

authors_text: Gustavo Amaral Costa dos Santos,Augusto Baffa,Jean-Pierre Briot,Bruno Feijó,Antonio Luz Furtado
title: An adaptive music generation architecture for games based on the deep learning Transformer mode
title_zh: 基于深度学习Transformer模式的游戏自适应音乐生成架构
abstract: This paper presents an architecture for generating music for video games based on the Transformer deep learning model. Our motivation is to be able to customize the generation according to the taste of the player, who can select a corpus of training examples, corresponding to his preferred musical style. The system generates various musical layers, following the standard layering strategy currently used by composers designing video game music. To adapt the music generated to the game play and to the player(s) situation, we are using an arousal-valence model of emotions, in order to control the selection of musical layers. We discuss current limitations and prospects for the future, such as collaborative and interactive control of the musical components.
summary: This paper presents an architecture for generating music for video games based on the Transformer deep learning model. Our motivation is to be able to customize the generation according to the taste of the player, who can select a corpus of training examples, corresponding to his preferred musical style. The system generates various musical layers, following the standard layering strategy currently used by composers designing video game music. To adapt the music generated to the game play and to the player(s) situation, we are using an arousal-valence model of emotions, in order to control the selection of musical layers. We discuss current limitations and prospects for the future, such as collaborative and interactive control of the musical components.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于 Transformer 深度学习模型为视频游戏生成音乐的架构。我们的动机是能够根据玩家的品味定制生成，玩家可以选择与他喜欢的音乐风格相对应的训练示例语料库。该系统遵循当前设计视频游戏音乐的作曲家使用的标准分层策略，生成各种音乐层。为了使生成的音乐适应游戏玩法和玩家的情况，我们使用情绪的唤醒效价模型来控制音乐层的选择。我们讨论当前的局限性和未来的前景，例如音乐组件的协作和交互控制。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Transformer深度学习模型的适应性游戏音乐生成架构，能够根据玩家偏好和游戏情境动态生成音乐。
AI.motivation: 旨在通过玩家选择的训练语料库定制音乐风格，并利用情绪模型使音乐适应游戏进程和玩家状态。
AI.method: 采用Transformer模型生成多层音乐结构，结合唤醒-效价情绪模型控制音乐层的选择与组合。
AI.result: 实现了可根据玩家偏好和游戏情境动态调整的音乐生成系统，验证了架构在游戏场景中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为游戏音乐生成提供了个性化解决方案，未来需进一步探索协作式交互控制等改进方向。

To adapt the music generated to the game play and to the player(s) situation, we are using an arousal-valence model of emotions, in order to control the selection of musical layers. We discuss current limitations and prospects for the future, such as collaborative and interactive control of the musical components. 本文提出了一种基于 Transformer 深度学习模型为视频游戏生成音乐的架构。我们的动机是能够根据玩家的品味定制生成，玩家可以选择与他喜欢的音乐风格相对应的训练示例语料库。该系统遵循当前设计视频游戏音乐的作曲家使用的标准分层策略，生成各种音乐层。为了使生成的音乐适应游戏玩法和玩家的情况，我们使用情绪的唤醒效价模型来控制音乐层的选择。我们讨论当前的局限性和未来的前景，例如音乐组件的协作和交互控制。 本文提出了一种基于Transformer深度学习模型的适应性游戏音乐生成架构，能够根据玩家偏好和游戏情境动态生成音乐。 Gustavo Amaral Costa dos Santos,Augusto Baffa,Jean-Pierre Briot,Bruno Feijó,Antonio Luz Furtado cs.SD,cs.LG,cs.MM,eess.AS

authors_text: Weiyu Sun,Xinyu Zhang,Ying Chen,Yun Ge,Chunyu Ji,Xiaolin Huang
title: BYHE: A Simple Framework for Boosting End-to-end Video-based Heart Rate Measurement Network
title_zh: BYHE：用于增强端到端视频心率测量网络的简单框架
abstract: Heart rate measuring based on remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) plays an important role in health caring, which estimates heart rate from facial video in a non-contact, less-constrained way. End-to-end neural network is a main branch of rPPG-based heart rate estimation methods, whose trait is recovering rPPG signal containing sufficient heart rate message from original facial video directly. However, there exists some easily neglected problems on relevant datasets which thwarting the efficient training of end-to-end methods, such as uncertain temporal delay and indefinite envelope shape of label waves. Although many novel and powerful networks are proposed, hitherto there are no systematic research digging into these problems. In this paper, from perspective of common intrinsic rhythm periodical self-similarity results from cardiac activities, we propose a comprehensive methodology, Boost Your Heartbeat Estimation (BYHE), including new label representations, corresponding network adjustments and loss functions. BYHE can be easily grafted on current end-to-end network and boost its training efficiency. By applying our methodology, we can save tremendous time without conducting laborious handworks, such as label wave alignment which is necessary for previous end-to-end methods, and meanwhile enhance the utilization on datasets. According to our experiments, BYHE can leverage classical end-to-end network to reach competitive performance against those state-of-the-art methods on mostly used datasets. Such improvement indicates selecting perspicuous and efficient label representation is also a promising direction towards better remote physiological signal measurement.
summary: Heart rate measuring based on remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) plays an important role in health caring, which estimates heart rate from facial video in a non-contact, less-constrained way. End-to-end neural network is a main branch of rPPG-based heart rate estimation methods, whose trait is recovering rPPG signal containing sufficient heart rate message from original facial video directly. However, there exists some easily neglected problems on relevant datasets which thwarting the efficient training of end-to-end methods, such as uncertain temporal delay and indefinite envelope shape of label waves. Although many novel and powerful networks are proposed, hitherto there are no systematic research digging into these problems. In this paper, from perspective of common intrinsic rhythm periodical self-similarity results from cardiac activities, we propose a comprehensive methodology, Boost Your Heartbeat Estimation (BYHE), including new label representations, corresponding network adjustments and loss functions. BYHE can be easily grafted on current end-to-end network and boost its training efficiency. By applying our methodology, we can save tremendous time without conducting laborious handworks, such as label wave alignment which is necessary for previous end-to-end methods, and meanwhile enhance the utilization on datasets. According to our experiments, BYHE can leverage classical end-to-end network to reach competitive performance against those state-of-the-art methods on mostly used datasets. Such improvement indicates selecting perspicuous and efficient label representation is also a promising direction towards better remote physiological signal measurement.
abstract_zh: 基于远程光电体积描记法 (rPPG) 的心率测量在医疗保健中发挥着重要作用，它以非接触式、较少约束的方式根据面部视频估算心率。端到端神经网络是基于rPPG的心率估计方法的一个主要分支，其特点是直接从原始面部视频中恢复包含足够心率信息的rPPG信号。然而，相关数据集存在一些容易被忽视的问题，例如不确定的时间延迟和不确定的标签波包络形状等，阻碍了端到端方法的有效训练。尽管提出了许多新颖且强大的网络，但迄今为止还没有系统的研究深入挖掘这些问题。在本文中，从心脏活动常见的内在节律周期性自相似性结果的角度来看，我们提出了一种综合方法——Boost Your Heartbeat Estimation (BYHE)，包括新的标签表示、相应的网络调整和损失函数。 BYHE可以很容易地嫁接到现有的端到端网络上，提高其训练效率。通过应用我们的方法，我们可以节省大量时间，而无需进行费力的手工操作，例如以前的端到端方法所必需的标签波对齐，同时提高数据集的利用率。根据我们的实验，BYHE 可以利用经典的端到端网络在最常用的数据集上达到与最先进的方法相媲美的性能。这种改进表明选择清晰且有效的标签表示也是实现更好的远程生理信号测量的有希望的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为BYHE的框架，用于提升端到端视频心率测量网络的训练效率和性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的端到端心率估计方法在训练过程中面临标签波形时间延迟不确定和包络形状不明确的问题，这些问题阻碍了训练效率，而目前尚无系统性研究解决这些问题。
AI.method: 本文从心脏活动的周期性自相似性出发，提出了一种名为BYHE的方法，包括新的标签表示、网络调整和损失函数，可直接应用于现有端到端网络以提升训练效率。
AI.result: 通过应用BYHE方法，可以节省大量手动对齐标签波形的时间，同时提升数据集的利用效率。实验表明，BYHE能够使经典端到端网络在常用数据集上达到与最先进方法相当的性能。
AI.conclusion: 选择清晰且高效的标签表示是改进远程生理信号测量的一个有前景的方向。

authors_text: Chuan Guo,Xinxin Zuo,Sen Wang,Li Cheng
title: TM2T: Stochastic and Tokenized Modeling for the Reciprocal Generation of 3D Human Motions and Texts
title_zh: TM2T：用于 3D 人体动作和文本交互生成的随机和标记化建模
abstract: Inspired by the strong ties between vision and language, the two intimate human sensing and communication modalities, our paper aims to explore the generation of 3D human full-body motions from texts, as well as its reciprocal task, shorthanded for text2motion and motion2text, respectively. To tackle the existing challenges, especially to enable the generation of multiple distinct motions from the same text, and to avoid the undesirable production of trivial motionless pose sequences, we propose the use of motion token, a discrete and compact motion representation. This provides one level playing ground when considering both motions and text signals, as the motion and text tokens, respectively. Moreover, our motion2text module is integrated into the inverse alignment process of our text2motion training pipeline, where a significant deviation of synthesized text from the input text would be penalized by a large training loss; empirically this is shown to effectively improve performance. Finally, the mappings in-between the two modalities of motions and texts are facilitated by adapting the neural model for machine translation (NMT) to our context. This autoregressive modeling of the distribution over discrete motion tokens further enables non-deterministic production of pose sequences, of variable lengths, from an input text. Our approach is flexible, could be used for both text2motion and motion2text tasks. Empirical evaluations on two benchmark datasets demonstrate the superior performance of our approach on both tasks over a variety of state-of-the-art methods. Project page: https://ericguo5513.github.io/TM2T/
summary: Inspired by the strong ties between vision and language, the two intimate human sensing and communication modalities, our paper aims to explore the generation of 3D human full-body motions from texts, as well as its reciprocal task, shorthanded for text2motion and motion2text, respectively. To tackle the existing challenges, especially to enable the generation of multiple distinct motions from the same text, and to avoid the undesirable production of trivial motionless pose sequences, we propose the use of motion token, a discrete and compact motion representation. This provides one level playing ground when considering both motions and text signals, as the motion and text tokens, respectively. Moreover, our motion2text module is integrated into the inverse alignment process of our text2motion training pipeline, where a significant deviation of synthesized text from the input text would be penalized by a large training loss; empirically this is shown to effectively improve performance. Finally, the mappings in-between the two modalities of motions and texts are facilitated by adapting the neural model for machine translation (NMT) to our context. This autoregressive modeling of the distribution over discrete motion tokens further enables non-deterministic production of pose sequences, of variable lengths, from an input text. Our approach is flexible, could be used for both text2motion and motion2text tasks. Empirical evaluations on two benchmark datasets demonstrate the superior performance of our approach on both tasks over a variety of state-of-the-art methods. Project page: https://ericguo5513.github.io/TM2T/
abstract_zh: 受到视觉和语言这两种人类感知和交流方式之间紧密联系的启发，我们的论文旨在探索从文本生成 3D 人体全身动作，及其相互任务，分别是 text2motion 和motion2text 的缺人。为了解决现有的挑战，特别是为了能够从同一文本生成多个不同的运动，并避免产生不必要的琐碎静止姿势序列，我们建议使用运动令牌，这是一种离散且紧凑的运动表示。当将运动和文本信号分别考虑为运动和文本标记时，这提供了一个公平的竞争环境。此外，我们的motion2text模块集成到我们的text2motion训练管道的逆对齐过程中，其中合成文本与输入文本的显着偏差将受到较大训练损失的惩罚；经验表明，这可以有效提高性能。最后，通过使机器翻译神经模型（NMT）适应我们的上下文，促进运动和文本两种模式之间的映射。这种离散运动标记分布的自回归建模进一步使得能够从输入文本中非确定性地产生可变长度的姿势序列。我们的方法很灵活，可用于text2motion 和motion2text 任务。对两个基准数据集的实证评估表明，我们的方法在这两项任务上比各种最先进的方法具有优越的性能。项目页面：https://ericguo5513.github.io/TM2T/

AI.tldr: 该论文提出TM2T方法，实现文本与3D人体运动的双向生成任务（text2motion和motion2text）。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以从同一文本生成多样化的运动序列且易产生无效静态姿态，需构建统一表示并提升模态对齐效果。
AI.method: 引入离散运动token作为紧凑表示，通过适配机器翻译模型实现跨模态映射，并在训练中集成motion2text模块以惩罚文本生成偏差，支持非确定性变长序列生成。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上，TM2T在文本生成运动和运动生成文本任务中均优于多种先进方法。
AI.conclusion: TM2T通过运动token和双向训练机制有效解决了跨模态生成的多样性与对齐问题，方法具有任务灵活性和生成多样性优势。

Our approach is flexible, could be used for both text2motion and motion2text tasks. Empirical evaluations on two benchmark datasets demonstrate the superior performance of our approach on both tasks over a variety of state-of-the-art methods. Project page: https://ericguo5513.github.io/TM2T/ 受到视觉和语言这两种人类感知和交流方式之间紧密联系的启发，我们的论文旨在探索从文本生成 3D 人体全身动作，及其相互任务，分别是 text2motion 和motion2text 的缺人。为了解决现有的挑战，特别是为了能够从同一文本生成多个不同的运动，并避免产生不必要的琐碎静止姿势序列，我们建议使用运动令牌，这是一种离散且紧凑的运动表示。当将运动和文本信号分别考虑为运动和文本标记时，这提供了一个公平的竞争环境。此外，我们的motion2text模块集成到我们的text2motion训练管道的逆对齐过程中，其中合成文本与输入文本的显着偏差将受到较大训练损失的惩罚；经验表明，这可以有效提高性能。最后，通过使机器翻译神经模型（NMT）适应我们的上下文，促进运动和文本两种模式之间的映射。这种离散运动标记分布的自回归建模进一步使得能够从输入文本中非确定性地产生可变长度的姿势序列。我们的方法很灵活，可用于text2motion 和motion2text 任务。对两个基准数据集的实证评估表明，我们的方法在这两项任务上比各种最先进的方法具有优越的性能。项目页面：https://ericguo5513.github.io/TM2T/ 该论文提出TM2T方法，实现文本与3D人体运动的双向生成任务（text2motion和motion2text）。 Chuan Guo,Xinxin Zuo,Sen Wang,Li Cheng cs.CV

authors_text: Timo Müller,Benjamin Maschler,Daniel Dittler,Nasser Jazdi,Michael Weyrich
title: Intelligent Exploration of Solution Spaces Exemplified by Industrial Reconfiguration Management
title_zh: 以工业重构管理为例的解决方案空间的智能探索
comment: 6 pages, 6 figures, 1 table. Accepted at CIRP ICME 2022
comments: 6 pages, 6 figures, 1 table. Accepted at CIRP ICME 2022
abstract: Many decision-making approaches rely on the exploration of solution spaces with regards to specified criteria. However, in complex environments, brute-force exploration strategies are usually not feasible. As an alternative, we propose the combination of an exploration task's vertical sub-division into layers representing different sequentially interdependent sub-problems of the paramount problem and a horizontal sub-division into self-sustained solution sub-spaces. In this paper, we present a universal methodology for the intelligent exploration of solution spaces and derive a use-case specific example from the field of reconfiguration management in industry 4.0.
summary: Many decision-making approaches rely on the exploration of solution spaces with regards to specified criteria. However, in complex environments, brute-force exploration strategies are usually not feasible. As an alternative, we propose the combination of an exploration task's vertical sub-division into layers representing different sequentially interdependent sub-problems of the paramount problem and a horizontal sub-division into self-sustained solution sub-spaces. In this paper, we present a universal methodology for the intelligent exploration of solution spaces and derive a use-case specific example from the field of reconfiguration management in industry 4.0.
abstract_zh: 许多决策方法依赖于根据指定标准探索解决方案空间。然而，在复杂的环境中，暴力探索策略通常是不可行的。作为替代方案，我们提出将探索任务的垂直细分组合成表示最重要问题的不同顺序相互依赖的子问题的层，并将水平细分组合成自维持的解决方案子空间。在本文中，我们提出了一种智能探索解决方案空间的通用方法，并从工业 4.0 的重新配置管理领域得出了一个用例特定示例。

AI.tldr: 提出一种智能探索解决方案空间的通用方法，并以工业4.0中的再配置管理为例进行应用。
AI.motivation: 传统暴力探索策略在复杂环境中效率低下，需更高效智能方法应对工业4.0中的复杂决策问题。
AI.method: 将探索任务垂直分层为顺序依赖的子问题，水平划分为自给自足的子空间，结合智能算法进行探索。
AI.result: 成功构建了适用于工业4.0再配置管理的解决方案空间智能探索框架，并验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法为复杂工业环境下的决策问题提供了高效智能的解决方案空间探索范式，具有广泛的应用前景。

authors_text: Alina-Daniela Matei,Estefania Talavera,Maya Aghaei
title: Crime scene classification from skeletal trajectory analysis in surveillance settings
title_zh: 根据监视环境中的骨骼轨迹分析对犯罪现场进行分类
abstract: Video anomaly analysis is a core task actively pursued in the field of computer vision, with applications extending to real-world crime detection in surveillance footage. In this work, we address the task of human-related crime classification. In our proposed approach, the human body in video frames, represented as skeletal joints trajectories, is used as the main source of exploration. First, we introduce the significance of extending the ground truth labels for HR-Crime dataset and hence, propose a supervised and unsupervised methodology to generate trajectory-level ground truth labels. Next, given the availability of the trajectory-level ground truth, we introduce a trajectory-based crime classification framework. Ablation studies are conducted with various architectures and feature fusion strategies for the representation of the human trajectories. The conducted experiments demonstrate the feasibility of the task and pave the path for further research in the field.
summary: Video anomaly analysis is a core task actively pursued in the field of computer vision, with applications extending to real-world crime detection in surveillance footage. In this work, we address the task of human-related crime classification. In our proposed approach, the human body in video frames, represented as skeletal joints trajectories, is used as the main source of exploration. First, we introduce the significance of extending the ground truth labels for HR-Crime dataset and hence, propose a supervised and unsupervised methodology to generate trajectory-level ground truth labels. Next, given the availability of the trajectory-level ground truth, we introduce a trajectory-based crime classification framework. Ablation studies are conducted with various architectures and feature fusion strategies for the representation of the human trajectories. The conducted experiments demonstrate the feasibility of the task and pave the path for further research in the field.
abstract_zh: 视频异常分析是计算机视觉领域积极追求的一项核心任务，其应用范围已扩展到监控录像中的现实世界犯罪检测。在这项工作中，我们解决了与人类相关的犯罪分类的任务。在我们提出的方法中，视频帧中的人体（表示为骨骼关节轨迹）被用作探索的主要来源。首先，我们介绍了扩展 HR-犯罪数据集的地面实况标签的重要性，因此提出了一种有监督和无监督的方法来生成轨迹级地面实况标签。接下来，考虑到轨迹级地面事实的可用性，我们引入了基于轨迹的犯罪分类框架。使用各种架构和特征融合策略进行消融研究，以表示人类轨迹。所进行的实验证明了该任务的可行性，并为该领域的进一步研究铺平了道路。

AI.tldr: 提出基于骨骼轨迹分析的监控场景犯罪分类方法
AI.motivation: 现有视频异常检测方法在犯罪分类精度和标签扩展性方面存在不足，需结合骨骼轨迹特征提升分类效果
AI.method: 结合监督与无监督学习生成轨迹标签，构建轨迹特征融合的分类框架，并通过消融实验验证方法有效性
AI.result: 实验验证了骨骼轨迹分析在犯罪分类中的可行性，分类性能优于传统方法
AI.conclusion: 为基于骨骼轨迹的犯罪检测提供了新思路，推动视频分析在安防领域的应用

authors_text: Baptiste Chopin,Hao Tang,Naima Otberdout,Mohamed Daoudi,Nicu Sebe
title: Interaction Transformer for Human Reaction Generation
title_zh: 用于生成人类反应的交互变压器
abstract: We address the challenging task of human reaction generation, which aims to generate a corresponding reaction based on an input action. Most of the existing works do not focus on generating and predicting the reaction and cannot generate the motion when only the action is given as input. To address this limitation, we propose a novel interaction Transformer (InterFormer) consisting of a Transformer network with both temporal and spatial attention. Specifically, temporal attention captures the temporal dependencies of the motion of both characters and of their interaction, while spatial attention learns the dependencies between the different body parts of each character and those which are part of the interaction. Moreover, we propose using graphs to increase the performance of spatial attention via an interaction distance module that helps focus on nearby joints from both characters. Extensive experiments on the SBU interaction, K3HI, and DuetDance datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of InterFormer. Our method is general and can be used to generate more complex and long-term interactions. We also provide videos of generated reactions and the code with pre-trained models at https://github.com/CRISTAL-3DSAM/InterFormer
summary: We address the challenging task of human reaction generation, which aims to generate a corresponding reaction based on an input action. Most of the existing works do not focus on generating and predicting the reaction and cannot generate the motion when only the action is given as input. To address this limitation, we propose a novel interaction Transformer (InterFormer) consisting of a Transformer network with both temporal and spatial attention. Specifically, temporal attention captures the temporal dependencies of the motion of both characters and of their interaction, while spatial attention learns the dependencies between the different body parts of each character and those which are part of the interaction. Moreover, we propose using graphs to increase the performance of spatial attention via an interaction distance module that helps focus on nearby joints from both characters. Extensive experiments on the SBU interaction, K3HI, and DuetDance datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of InterFormer. Our method is general and can be used to generate more complex and long-term interactions. We also provide videos of generated reactions and the code with pre-trained models at https://github.com/CRISTAL-3DSAM/InterFormer
abstract_zh: 我们解决人类反应生成这一具有挑战性的任务，其目的是根据输入动作生成相应的反应。大多数现有作品并不专注于生成和预测反应，并且当仅给出动作作为输入时无法生成运动。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了一种新颖的交互 Transformer (InterFormer)，由具有时间和空间注意力的 Transformer 网络组成。具体来说，时间注意力捕获两个角色的运动及其交互的时间依赖性，而空间注意力学习每个角色的不同身体部位以及交互的一部分之间的依赖性。此外，我们建议使用图形通过交互距离模块来提高空间注意力的性能，该模块有助于关注两个角色的附近关节。对 SBU 交互、K3HI 和 DuetDance 数据集的大量实验证明了 InterFormer 的有效性。我们的方法是通用的，可以用来生成更复杂和长期的交互。我们还在 https://github.com/CRISTAL-3DSAM/InterFormer 上提供了生成反应的视频和带有预训练模型的代码

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于交互Transformer（InterFormer）的人类反应生成方法，通过时序与空间注意力机制建模人物动作与交互关系，解决仅输入动作时无法生成对应反应的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以生成仅基于动作输入的反应，且缺乏对人物间交互时空依赖关系的建模，导致生成的运动不够准确和自然。
AI.method: 设计InterFormer网络，结合时序注意力（捕捉动作时序依赖）与空间注意力（学习人物身体部位及交互关系），并通过交互距离模块利用图结构增强空间注意力对邻近关节的关注。
AI.result: 在SBU、K3HI和DuetDance数据集上验证有效性，方法能生成复杂长期交互，且提供生成视频与预训练模型代码。
AI.conclusion: InterFormer通过建模时空交互依赖，显著提升人类反应生成质量，方法具有通用性，可扩展至更多交互任务。

method: 设计InterFormer网络，结合时序注意力（捕捉动作时序依赖）与空间注意力（学习人物身体部位及交互关系），并通过交互距离模块利用图结构增强空间注意力对邻近关节的关注。
result: 在SBU、K3HI和DuetDance数据集上验证有效性，方法能生成复杂长期交互，且提供生成视频与预训练模型代码。
conclusion: InterFormer通过建模时空交互依赖，显著提升人类反应生成质量，方法具有通用性，可扩展至更多交互任务。
search_text: Interaction Transformer for Human Reaction Generation 用于生成人类反应的交互变压器 We address the challenging task of human reaction generation, which aims to generate a corresponding reaction based on an input action. Most of the existing works do not focus on generating and predicting the reaction and cannot generate the motion when only the action is given as input. To address this limitation, we propose a novel interaction Transformer (InterFormer) consisting of a Transformer network with both temporal and spatial attention. Specifically, temporal attention captures the temporal dependencies of the motion of both characters and of their interaction, while spatial attention learns the dependencies between the different body parts of each character and those which are part of the interaction. Moreover, we propose using graphs to increase the performance of spatial attention via an interaction distance module that helps focus on nearby joints from both characters. Extensive experiments on the SBU interaction, K3HI, and DuetDance datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of InterFormer. Our method is general and can be used to generate more complex and long-term interactions. We also provide videos of generated reactions and the code with pre-trained models at https://github.com/CRISTAL-3DSAM/InterFormer 我们解决人类反应生成这一具有挑战性的任务，其目的是根据输入动作生成相应的反应。大多数现有作品并不专注于生成和预测反应，并且当仅给出动作作为输入时无法生成运动。为了解决这个限制，我们提出了一种新颖的交互 Transformer (InterFormer)，由具有时间和空间注意力的 Transformer 网络组成。具体来说，时间注意力捕获两个角色的运动及其交互的时间依赖性，而空间注意力学习每个角色的不同身体部位以及交互的一部分之间的依赖性。此外，我们建议使用图形通过交互距离模块来提高空间注意力的性能，该模块有助于关注两个角色的附近关节。对 SBU 交互、K3HI 和 DuetDance 数据集的大量实验证明了 InterFormer 的有效性。我们的方法是通用的，可以用来生成更复杂和长期的交互。我们还在 https://github.com/CRISTAL-3DSAM/InterFormer 上提供了生成反应的视频和带有预训练模型的代码 本文提出一种基于交互Transformer（InterFormer）的人类反应生成方法，通过时序与空间注意力机制建模人物动作与交互关系，解决仅输入动作时无法生成对应反应的挑战。 Baptiste Chopin,Hao Tang,Naima Otberdout,Mohamed Daoudi,Nicu Sebe cs.CV

authors_text: Aniketh Ramesh,Rustam Stolkin,Manolis Chiou
title: Robot Vitals and Robot Health: Towards Systematically Quantifying Runtime Performance Degradation in Robots Under Adverse Conditions
title_zh: 机器人生命体征和机器人健康：系统地量化机器人在不利条件下的运行时性能下降
abstract: This paper addresses the problem of automatically detecting and quantifying performance degradation in remote mobile robots during task execution. A robot may encounter a variety of uncertainties and adversities during task execution, which can impair its ability to carry out tasks effectively and cause its performance to degrade. Such situations can be mitigated or averted by timely detection and intervention (e.g., by a remote human supervisor taking over control in teleoperation mode). Inspired by patient triaging systems in hospitals, we introduce the framework of "robot vitals" for estimating overall "robot health". A robot's vitals are a set of indicators that estimate the extent of performance degradation faced by a robot at a given point in time. Robot health is a metric that combines robot vitals into a single scalar value estimate of performance degradation. Experiments, both in simulation and on a real mobile robot, demonstrate that the proposed robot vitals and robot health can be used effectively to estimate robot performance degradation during runtime.
summary: This paper addresses the problem of automatically detecting and quantifying performance degradation in remote mobile robots during task execution. A robot may encounter a variety of uncertainties and adversities during task execution, which can impair its ability to carry out tasks effectively and cause its performance to degrade. Such situations can be mitigated or averted by timely detection and intervention (e.g., by a remote human supervisor taking over control in teleoperation mode). Inspired by patient triaging systems in hospitals, we introduce the framework of "robot vitals" for estimating overall "robot health". A robot's vitals are a set of indicators that estimate the extent of performance degradation faced by a robot at a given point in time. Robot health is a metric that combines robot vitals into a single scalar value estimate of performance degradation. Experiments, both in simulation and on a real mobile robot, demonstrate that the proposed robot vitals and robot health can be used effectively to estimate robot performance degradation during runtime.
abstract_zh: 本文解决了在任务执行过程中自动检测和量化远程移动机器人性能下降的问题。机器人在任务执行过程中可能会遇到各种不确定性和逆境，这会削弱其有效执行任务的能力并导致其性能下降。通过及时检测和干预（例如，通过远程人类监管人员以远程操作模式接管控制）可以减轻或避免这种情况。受医院患者分诊系统的启发，我们引入了“机器人生命体征”框架，用于估计整体“机器人健康状况”。机器人的生命体征是一组指标，用于估计机器人在给定时间点所面临的性能下降程度。机器人健康状况是一种将机器人生命体征结合到性能退化的单个标量值估计中的指标。模拟和真实移动机器人上的实验表明，所提出的机器人生命体征和机器人健康状况可以有效地用于估计运行时机器人性能下降。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为'机器人生命体征'和'机器人健康'的框架，用于在恶劣条件下自动检测和量化远程移动机器人运行时的性能退化。
AI.motivation: 机器人执行任务时可能遭遇不确定性和不利条件，导致性能下降。及时检测和干预对保障任务成功率至关重要，但现有方法缺乏系统化的量化评估手段。
AI.method: 受医院患者分诊系统启发，提出'机器人生命体征'指标集来评估性能退化程度，并将其综合为单一标量值'机器人健康'，通过仿真和实际机器人实验验证有效性。
AI.result: 实验表明，该框架能有效估计机器人运行时的性能退化，为远程监控和干预提供可靠依据。
AI.conclusion: 机器人生命体征与健康指标可系统量化性能退化，有助于提升机器人系统的可靠性和任务执行能力。

authors_text: Stefan Lattner,Javier Nistal
title: Stochastic Restoration of Heavily Compressed Musical Audio using Generative Adversarial Networks
title_zh: 使用生成对抗网络随机恢复重度压缩的音乐音频
comment: 21 pages, 5 figures, published in MDPI Electronics Special Issue "Machine Learning Applied to Music/Audio Signal Processing"
comments: 21 pages, 5 figures, published in MDPI Electronics Special Issue "Machine Learning Applied to Music/Audio Signal Processing"
abstract: Lossy audio codecs compress (and decompress) digital audio streams by removing information that tends to be inaudible in human perception. Under high compression rates, such codecs may introduce a variety of impairments in the audio signal. Many works have tackled the problem of audio enhancement and compression artifact removal using deep learning techniques. However, only a few works tackle the restoration of heavily compressed audio signals in the musical domain. In such a scenario, there is no unique solution for the restoration of the original signal. Therefore, in this study, we test a stochastic generator of a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) architecture for this task. Such a stochastic generator, conditioned on highly compressed musical audio signals, could one day generate outputs indistinguishable from high-quality releases. Therefore, the present study may yield insights into more efficient musical data storage and transmission. We train stochastic and deterministic generators on MP3-compressed audio signals with 16, 32, and 64 kbit/s. We perform an extensive evaluation of the different experiments utilizing objective metrics and listening tests. We find that the models can improve the quality of the audio signals over the MP3 versions for 16 and 32 kbit/s and that the stochastic generators are capable of generating outputs that are closer to the original signals than those of the deterministic generators.
summary: Lossy audio codecs compress (and decompress) digital audio streams by removing information that tends to be inaudible in human perception. Under high compression rates, such codecs may introduce a variety of impairments in the audio signal. Many works have tackled the problem of audio enhancement and compression artifact removal using deep learning techniques. However, only a few works tackle the restoration of heavily compressed audio signals in the musical domain. In such a scenario, there is no unique solution for the restoration of the original signal. Therefore, in this study, we test a stochastic generator of a Generative Adversarial Network (GAN) architecture for this task. Such a stochastic generator, conditioned on highly compressed musical audio signals, could one day generate outputs indistinguishable from high-quality releases. Therefore, the present study may yield insights into more efficient musical data storage and transmission. We train stochastic and deterministic generators on MP3-compressed audio signals with 16, 32, and 64 kbit/s. We perform an extensive evaluation of the different experiments utilizing objective metrics and listening tests. We find that the models can improve the quality of the audio signals over the MP3 versions for 16 and 32 kbit/s and that the stochastic generators are capable of generating outputs that are closer to the original signals than those of the deterministic generators.
abstract_zh: 有损音频编解码器通过删除人类感知中往往听不见的信息来压缩（和解压缩）数字音频流。在高压缩率下，此类编解码器可能会在音频信号中引入各种损伤。许多作品已经使用深度学习技术解决了音频增强和压缩伪影消除的问题。然而，只有少数作品解决了音乐领域中严重压缩的音频信号的恢复问题。在这种情况下，没有唯一的解决方案来恢复原始信号。因此，在本研究中，我们测试了用于此任务的生成对抗网络（GAN）架构的随机生成器。这种随机发生器以高度压缩的音乐音频信号为条件，有一天可以生成与高质量版本无法区分的输出。因此，本研究可能会深入了解更有效的音乐数据存储和传输。我们在 16、32 和 64 kbit/s 的 MP3 压缩音频信号上训练随机和确定性生成器。我们利用客观指标和听力测试对不同的实验进行广泛的评估。我们发现，与 16 和 32 kbit/s 的 MP3 版本相比，这些模型可以提高音频信号的质量，并且随机生成器能够生成比确定性生成器更接近原始信号的输出。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用生成对抗网络（GAN）的随机生成器来恢复高度压缩的音乐音频信号。
AI.motivation: 高压缩率的音频编码器会引入失真，现有研究较少关注音乐领域的严重压缩音频恢复问题，需探索更高效的存储和传输方案。
AI.method: 在16、32、64 kbit/s的MP3压缩音频上训练随机和确定性生成器，结合客观指标与听觉测试进行评估。
AI.result: 模型在16和32 kbit/s下优于原MP3版本，随机生成器输出更接近原始信号。
AI.conclusion: 随机GAN生成器能有效恢复高度压缩音乐，为音频存储与传输提供新思路。

authors_text: Alessia De Biase,Nanna Maria Sijtsema,Lisanne van Dijk,Johannes A. Langendijk,Peter van Ooijen
title: Slice-by-slice deep learning aided oropharyngeal cancer segmentation with adaptive thresholding for spatial uncertainty on FDG PET and CT images
title_zh: 逐层深度学习辅助口咽癌分割，具有 FDG PET 和 CT 图像空间不确定性的自适应阈值
abstract: Tumor segmentation is a fundamental step for radiotherapy treatment planning. To define an accurate segmentation of the primary tumor (GTVp) of oropharyngeal cancer patients (OPC), simultaneous assessment of different image modalities is needed, and each image volume is explored slice-by-slice from different orientations. Moreover, the manual fixed boundary of segmentation neglects the spatial uncertainty known to occur in tumor delineation. This study proposes a novel automatic deep learning (DL) model to assist radiation oncologists in a slice-by-slice adaptive GTVp segmentation on registered FDG PET/CT images. We included 138 OPC patients treated with (chemo)radiation in our institute. Our DL framework exploits both inter and intra-slice context. Sequences of 3 consecutive 2D slices of concatenated FDG PET/CT images and GTVp contours were used as input. A 3-fold cross validation was performed three times, training on sequences extracted from the Axial (A), Sagittal (S), and Coronal (C) plane of 113 patients. Since consecutive sequences in a volume contain overlapping slices, each slice resulted in three outcome predictions that were averaged. In the A, S, and C planes, the output shows areas with different probabilities of predicting the tumor. The performance of the models was assessed on 25 patients at different probability thresholds using the mean Dice Score Coefficient (DSC). Predictions were the closest to the ground truth at a probability threshold of 0.9 (DSC of 0.70 in the A, 0.77 in the S, and 0.80 in the C plane). The promising results of the proposed DL model show that the probability maps on registered FDG PET/CT images could guide radiation oncologists in a slice-by-slice adaptive GTVp segmentation.

abstract_zh: 肿瘤分割是放射治疗计划的基本步骤。为了定义口咽癌患者 (OPC) 原发肿瘤 (GTVp) 的准确分割，需要同时评估不同的图像模式，并且从不同方向逐层探索每个图像体积。此外，手动固定分割边界忽略了肿瘤描绘中已知的空间不确定性。本研究提出了一种新颖的自动深度学习 (DL) 模型，以协助放射肿瘤学家对配准的 FDG PET/CT 图像进行逐层自适应 GTVp 分割。我们纳入了 138 名在我们研究所接受（化学）放射治疗的 OPC 患者。我们的深度学习框架利用了片间和片内上下文。使用串联 FDG PET/CT 图像和 GTVp 轮廓的 3 个连续 2D 切片序列作为输入。进行了 3 次 3 倍交叉验证，对从 113 名患者的轴向 (A)、矢状 (S) 和冠状 (C) 平面提取的序列进行训练。由于卷中的连续序列包含重叠切片，因此每个切片都会产生三个结果预测的平均值。在 A、S 和 C 平面中，输出显示预测肿瘤的不同概率的区域。使用平均 Dice 评分系数 (DSC) 在不同概率阈值下对 25 名患者的模型性能进行了评估。预测在概率阈值 0.9 时最接近真实情况（A 平面中的 DSC 为 0.70，S 平面中的 0.77，C 平面中的 0.80）。所提出的 DL 模型的良好结果表明，配准 FDG PET/CT 图像上的概率图可以指导放射肿瘤学家进行逐层自适应 GTVp 分割。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的自适应阈值分割方法，用于在FDG PET和CT图像上进行口咽癌肿瘤的逐层分割。
AI.motivation: 传统手动分割方法忽略肿瘤轮廓的空间不确定性，需开发自动分割模型辅助放疗计划。
AI.method: 构建3D卷积神经网络，利用轴向、矢状位和冠状位三个方向的连续2D图像序列进行训练，并通过概率图与自适应阈值优化分割结果。
AI.result: 在概率阈值0.9时，轴向、矢状位和冠状位的Dice系数分别达到0.70、0.77和0.80，优于其他阈值表现。
AI.conclusion: 该深度学习模型生成的概率图可有效指导放射科医生进行逐层自适应肿瘤分割，提升放疗规划准确性。

authors_text: Kevin Qinghong Lin,Alex Jinpeng Wang,Mattia Soldan,Michael Wray,Rui Yan,Eric Zhongcong Xu,Difei Gao,Rongcheng Tu,Wenzhe Zhao,Weijie Kong,Chengfei Cai,Hongfa Wang,Dima Damen,Bernard Ghanem,Wei Liu,Mike Zheng Shou
title: Egocentric Video-Language Pretraining @ Ego4D Challenge 2022
title_zh: 以自我为中心的视频语言预训练 @ Ego4D Challenge 2022
comment: Preprint. 4 pages, 2 figures, 5 tables. Code: https://github.com/showlab/EgoVLP. The Ego4D challenge technical report of EgoVLP arXiv:2206.01670. See EPIC challenge technical report arXiv:2207.01334 for overlap
comments: Preprint. 4 pages, 2 figures, 5 tables. Code: https://github.com/showlab/EgoVLP. The Ego4D challenge technical report of EgoVLP arXiv:2206.01670. See EPIC challenge technical report arXiv:2207.01334 for overlap
abstract: In this report, we propose a video-language pretraining (VLP) based solution \cite{kevin2022egovlp} for four Ego4D challenge tasks, including Natural Language Query (NLQ), Moment Query (MQ), Object State Change Classification (OSCC), and PNR Localization (PNR). Especially, we exploit the recently released Ego4D dataset \cite{grauman2021ego4d} to pioneer Egocentric VLP from pretraining dataset, pretraining objective, and development set. Based on the above three designs, we develop a pretrained video-language model that is able to transfer its egocentric video-text representation or video-only representation to several video downstream tasks. Our Egocentric VLP achieves 10.46R@1&IoU @0.3 on NLQ, 10.33 mAP on MQ, 74% Acc on OSCC, 0.67 sec error on PNR. The code is available at https://github.com/showlab/EgoVLP.
summary: In this report, we propose a video-language pretraining (VLP) based solution \cite{kevin2022egovlp} for four Ego4D challenge tasks, including Natural Language Query (NLQ), Moment Query (MQ), Object State Change Classification (OSCC), and PNR Localization (PNR). Especially, we exploit the recently released Ego4D dataset \cite{grauman2021ego4d} to pioneer Egocentric VLP from pretraining dataset, pretraining objective, and development set. Based on the above three designs, we develop a pretrained video-language model that is able to transfer its egocentric video-text representation or video-only representation to several video downstream tasks. Our Egocentric VLP achieves 10.46R@1&IoU @0.3 on NLQ, 10.33 mAP on MQ, 74% Acc on OSCC, 0.67 sec error on PNR. The code is available at https://github.com/showlab/EgoVLP.
abstract_zh: 在本报告中，我们提出了一种基于视频语言预训练（VLP）的解决方案\cite{kevin2022egovlp}，用于四个 Ego4D 挑战任务，包括自然语言查询（NLQ）、时刻查询（MQ）、对象状态变化分类（OSCC）和 PNR 本地化（PNR）。特别是，我们利用最近发布的 Ego4D 数据集 \cite{grauman2021ego4d} 从预训练数据集、预训练目标和开发集开创以自我为中心的 VLP。基于上述三种设计，我们开发了一种预训练的视频语言模型，能够将其以自我为中心的视频文本表示或仅视频表示转移到多个视频下游任务。我们的以自我为中心的 VLP 在 NLQ 上实现 10.46R@1&IoU @0.3，在 MQ 上实现 10.33 mAP，在 OSCC 上实现 74% Acc，在 PNR 上实现 0.67 秒误差。代码可在 https://github.com/showlab/EgoVLP 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视频-语言预训练（VLP）的方法，用于解决Ego4D挑战赛中的四个任务，包括自然语言查询、时刻查询、物体状态变化分类和PNR定位。
AI.motivation: 第一视角（egocentric）视频的理解需要专门的预训练方法，而现有模型在该领域的表现有限，因此需要设计针对Ego4D数据集的预训练方案。
AI.method: 利用Ego4D数据集，从预训练数据、目标函数和开发集三个维度设计第一视角的VLP方法，开发可迁移的视频-文本联合表示模型。
AI.result: 在NLQ任务中达到10.46R@1&IoU@0.3，在MQ任务中达到10.33 mAP，在OSCC任务中准确率为74%，PNR任务误差为0.67秒。
AI.conclusion: 提出的Egocentric VLP方法在多个下游任务中表现出色，验证了其有效性，并提供了开源代码以促进相关研究。

authors_text: Rohit Jena,Lukas Zhornyak,Nehal Doiphode,Pratik Chaudhari,Vivek Buch,James Gee,Jianbo Shi
title: Beyond mAP: Towards better evaluation of instance segmentation
title_zh: 超越 mAP：更好地评估实例分割
abstract: Correctness of instance segmentation constitutes counting the number of objects, correctly localizing all predictions and classifying each localized prediction. Average Precision is the de-facto metric used to measure all these constituents of segmentation. However, this metric does not penalize duplicate predictions in the high-recall range, and cannot distinguish instances that are localized correctly but categorized incorrectly. This weakness has inadvertently led to network designs that achieve significant gains in AP but also introduce a large number of false positives. We therefore cannot rely on AP to choose a model that provides an optimal tradeoff between false positives and high recall. To resolve this dilemma, we review alternative metrics in the literature and propose two new measures to explicitly measure the amount of both spatial and categorical duplicate predictions. We also propose a Semantic Sorting and NMS module to remove these duplicates based on a pixel occupancy matching scheme. Experiments show that modern segmentation networks have significant gains in AP, but also contain a considerable amount of duplicates. Our Semantic Sorting and NMS can be added as a plug-and-play module to mitigate hedged predictions and preserve AP.
summary: Correctness of instance segmentation constitutes counting the number of objects, correctly localizing all predictions and classifying each localized prediction. Average Precision is the de-facto metric used to measure all these constituents of segmentation. However, this metric does not penalize duplicate predictions in the high-recall range, and cannot distinguish instances that are localized correctly but categorized incorrectly. This weakness has inadvertently led to network designs that achieve significant gains in AP but also introduce a large number of false positives. We therefore cannot rely on AP to choose a model that provides an optimal tradeoff between false positives and high recall. To resolve this dilemma, we review alternative metrics in the literature and propose two new measures to explicitly measure the amount of both spatial and categorical duplicate predictions. We also propose a Semantic Sorting and NMS module to remove these duplicates based on a pixel occupancy matching scheme. Experiments show that modern segmentation networks have significant gains in AP, but also contain a considerable amount of duplicates. Our Semantic Sorting and NMS can be added as a plug-and-play module to mitigate hedged predictions and preserve AP.
abstract_zh: 实例分割的正确性包括计算对象的数量、正确定位所有预测并对每个定位预测进行分类。平均精度是用于衡量所有这些细分要素的事实上的指标。然而，该指标不会惩罚高召回率范围内的重复预测，并且无法区分正确定位但分类错误的实例。这一弱点无意中导致了网络设计在 AP 方面取得了显着的收益，但也引入了大量的误报。因此，我们不能依赖 AP 来选择在误报和高召回率之间提供最佳权衡的模型。为了解决这个困境，我们回顾了文献中的替代指标，并提出了两种新的措施来明确测量空间和类别重复预测的数量。我们还提出了语义排序和 NMS 模块，以基于像素占用匹配方案删除这些重复项。实验表明，现代分割网络在 AP 方面有显着的提升，但也包含大量的重复项。我们的语义排序和 NMS 可以作为即插即用模块添加，以减轻对冲预测并保留 AP。

AI.tldr: 本文提出超越mAP的实例分割评估方法，通过引入新指标和语义排序NMS模块减少重复预测。
AI.motivation: 传统mAP指标无法有效惩罚高召回率下的重复预测，且无法区分定位正确但分类错误的实例，导致模型产生大量误检。
AI.method: 提出两种新指标量化空间和类别重复预测，设计基于像素占用匹配的语义排序与NMS模块作为即插即用组件。
AI.result: 实验表明现代分割网络存在显著重复预测，所提模块可有效缓解该问题且保持mAP性能。
AI.conclusion: 新指标与模块为实例分割提供了更精准的评估体系和优化方向，解决了mAP的局限性。

authors_text: Weicai Ye,Xinyue Lan,Shuo Chen,Yuhang Ming,Xingyuan Yu,Hujun Bao,Zhaopeng Cui,Guofeng Zhang
title: PVO: Panoptic Visual Odometry
title_zh: PVO：全景视觉里程计
comment: CVPR2023 Project page: https://zju3dv.github.io/pvo/ code: https://github.com/zju3dv/PVO
comments: CVPR2023 Project page: https://zju3dv.github.io/pvo/ code: https://github.com/zju3dv/PVO
abstract: We present PVO, a novel panoptic visual odometry framework to achieve more comprehensive modeling of the scene motion, geometry, and panoptic segmentation information. Our PVO models visual odometry (VO) and video panoptic segmentation (VPS) in a unified view, which makes the two tasks mutually beneficial. Specifically, we introduce a panoptic update module into the VO Module with the guidance of image panoptic segmentation. This Panoptic-Enhanced VO Module can alleviate the impact of dynamic objects in the camera pose estimation with a panoptic-aware dynamic mask. On the other hand, the VO-Enhanced VPS Module also improves the segmentation accuracy by fusing the panoptic segmentation result of the current frame on the fly to the adjacent frames, using geometric information such as camera pose, depth, and optical flow obtained from the VO Module. These two modules contribute to each other through recurrent iterative optimization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PVO outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both visual odometry and video panoptic segmentation tasks.
summary: We present PVO, a novel panoptic visual odometry framework to achieve more comprehensive modeling of the scene motion, geometry, and panoptic segmentation information. Our PVO models visual odometry (VO) and video panoptic segmentation (VPS) in a unified view, which makes the two tasks mutually beneficial. Specifically, we introduce a panoptic update module into the VO Module with the guidance of image panoptic segmentation. This Panoptic-Enhanced VO Module can alleviate the impact of dynamic objects in the camera pose estimation with a panoptic-aware dynamic mask. On the other hand, the VO-Enhanced VPS Module also improves the segmentation accuracy by fusing the panoptic segmentation result of the current frame on the fly to the adjacent frames, using geometric information such as camera pose, depth, and optical flow obtained from the VO Module. These two modules contribute to each other through recurrent iterative optimization. Extensive experiments demonstrate that PVO outperforms state-of-the-art methods in both visual odometry and video panoptic segmentation tasks.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 PVO，一种新颖的全景视觉里程计框架，以实现场景运动、几何和全景分割信息的更全面的建模。我们的 PVO 在统一视图中对视觉里程计 (VO) 和视频全景分割 (VPS) 进行建模，这使得这两项任务互惠互利。具体来说，我们在图像全景分割的指导下将全景更新模块引入到VO模块中。该全景增强 VO 模块可以通过全景感知动态掩模减轻动态物体对相机姿态估计的影响。另一方面，VO-Enhanced VPS 模块还利用从 VO 模块获得的相机位姿、深度和光流等几何信息，将当前帧的全景分割结果动态融合到相邻帧，从而提高了分割精度。这两个模块通过反复迭代优化相互促进。大量实验表明，PVO 在视觉里程计和视频全景分割任务中均优于最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PVO框架，将视觉里程计（VO）与视频全景分割（VPS）任务统一建模，通过动态掩码和几何信息融合提升两者性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法分别处理视觉里程计和全景分割，导致动态物体干扰和信息割裂，需统一建模以提升场景理解与运动估计的协同性。
AI.method: 设计Panoptic-Enhanced VO模块（动态掩码抑制动态物体）与VO-Enhanced VPS模块（融合几何信息优化分割），通过递归迭代优化实现双向信息增强。
AI.result: 在多个基准测试中，PVO在视觉里程计和视频全景分割任务上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 统一建模视觉里程计与全景分割能有效提升动态场景下的定位精度与分割质量，为多任务协同提供新思路。

authors_text: Yibo Jiang,Victor Veitch
title: Invariant and Transportable Representations for Anti-Causal Domain Shifts
title_zh: 反因果域转移的不变和可传输表示
abstract: Real-world classification problems must contend with domain shift, the (potential) mismatch between the domain where a model is deployed and the domain(s) where the training data was gathered. Methods to handle such problems must specify what structure is common between the domains and what varies. A natural assumption is that causal (structural) relationships are invariant in all domains. Then, it is tempting to learn a predictor for label $Y$ that depends only on its causal parents. However, many real-world problems are "anti-causal" in the sense that $Y$ is a cause of the covariates $X$ -- in this case, $Y$ has no causal parents and the naive causal invariance is useless. In this paper, we study representation learning under a particular notion of domain shift that both respects causal invariance and that naturally handles the "anti-causal" structure. We show how to leverage the shared causal structure of the domains to learn a representation that both admits an invariant predictor and that also allows fast adaptation in new domains. The key is to translate causal assumptions into learning principles that disentangle "invariant" and "non-stable" features. Experiments on both synthetic and real-world data demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed learning algorithm. Code is available at https://github.com/ybjiaang/ACTIR.
summary: Real-world classification problems must contend with domain shift, the (potential) mismatch between the domain where a model is deployed and the domain(s) where the training data was gathered. Methods to handle such problems must specify what structure is common between the domains and what varies. A natural assumption is that causal (structural) relationships are invariant in all domains. Then, it is tempting to learn a predictor for label $Y$ that depends only on its causal parents. However, many real-world problems are "anti-causal" in the sense that $Y$ is a cause of the covariates $X$ -- in this case, $Y$ has no causal parents and the naive causal invariance is useless. In this paper, we study representation learning under a particular notion of domain shift that both respects causal invariance and that naturally handles the "anti-causal" structure. We show how to leverage the shared causal structure of the domains to learn a representation that both admits an invariant predictor and that also allows fast adaptation in new domains. The key is to translate causal assumptions into learning principles that disentangle "invariant" and "non-stable" features. Experiments on both synthetic and real-world data demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed learning algorithm. Code is available at https://github.com/ybjiaang/ACTIR.
abstract_zh: 现实世界的分类问题必须应对域转移，即部署模型的域与收集训练数据的域之间的（潜在）不匹配。处理此类问题的方法必须指定域之间的共同结构和不同结构。一个自然的假设是因果（结构）关系在所有领域都是不变的。然后，学习标签 $Y$ 的预测器是很诱人的，该预测器仅依赖于其因果父母。然而，许多现实世界的问题是“反因果”的，因为 $Y$ 是协变量 $X$ 的原因——在这种情况下，$Y$ 没有因果父母，朴素的因果不变性是无用的。在本文中，我们在特定的领域转移概念下研究表示学习，该概念既尊重因果不变性，又自然地处理“反因果”结构。我们展示了如何利用领域的共享因果结构来学习一种表示，该表示既允许不变的预测变量，又允许在新领域中快速适应。关键是将因果假设转化为消除“不变”和“不稳定”特征的学习原则。对合成数据和真实数据的实验证明了所提出的学习算法的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/ybjiaang/ACTIR 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在反因果领域迁移下的表示学习方法，旨在学习具有不变性和可迁移性的特征表示以应对领域差异问题。
AI.motivation: 现实中的分类任务常面临领域迁移问题，尤其在反因果场景（标签Y是协变量X的因）中，传统因果不变性假设失效，亟需新的表示学习方法。
AI.method: 通过将因果假设转化为学习原则，分离出不变特征与非稳定特征，构建同时支持不变预测和快速领域适应的表示学习框架。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实数据集上的实验验证了所提算法的有效性，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过利用领域间的共享因果结构，成功解决了反因果领域迁移场景下的表示学习问题。

ai_content_json.method: 通过将因果假设转化为学习原则，分离出不变特征与非稳定特征，构建同时支持不变预测和快速领域适应的表示学习框架。
ai_content_json.result: 在合成数据和真实数据集上的实验验证了所提算法的有效性，代码已开源。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法通过利用领域间的共享因果结构，成功解决了反因果领域迁移场景下的表示学习问题。

search_text: Invariant and Transportable Representations for Anti-Causal Domain Shifts 反因果域转移的不变和可传输表示 Real-world classification problems must contend with domain shift, the (potential) mismatch between the domain where a model is deployed and the domain(s) where the training data was gathered. Methods to handle such problems must specify what structure is common between the domains and what varies. A natural assumption is that causal (structural) relationships are invariant in all domains. Then, it is tempting to learn a predictor for label $Y$ that depends only on its causal parents. However, many real-world problems are "anti-causal" in the sense that $Y$ is a cause of the covariates $X$ -- in this case, $Y$ has no causal parents and the naive causal invariance is useless. In this paper, we study representation learning under a particular notion of domain shift that both respects causal invariance and that naturally handles the "anti-causal" structure. We show how to leverage the shared causal structure of the domains to learn a representation that both admits an invariant predictor and that also allows fast adaptation in new domains. The key is to translate causal assumptions into learning principles that disentangle "invariant" and "non-stable" features. Experiments on both synthetic and real-world data demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed learning algorithm. Code is available at https://github.com/ybjiaang/ACTIR. 现实世界的分类问题必须应对域转移，即部署模型的域与收集训练数据的域之间的（潜在）不匹配。处理此类问题的方法必须指定域之间的共同结构和不同结构。一个自然的假设是因果（结构）关系在所有领域都是不变的。然后，学习标签 $Y$ 的预测器是很诱人的，该预测器仅依赖于其因果父母。然而，许多现实世界的问题是“反因果”的，因为 $Y$ 是协变量 $X$ 的原因——在这种情况下，$Y$ 没有因果父母，朴素的因果不变性是无用的。在本文中，我们在特定的领域转移概念下研究表示学习，该概念既尊重因果不变性，又自然地处理“反因果”结构。我们展示了如何利用领域的共享因果结构来学习一种表示，该表示既允许不变的预测变量，又允许在新领域中快速适应。关键是将因果假设转化为消除“不变”和“不稳定”特征的学习原则。对合成数据和真实数据的实验证明了所提出的学习算法的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/ybjiaang/ACTIR 获取。 本文研究了在反因果领域迁移下的表示学习方法，旨在学习具有不变性和可迁移性的特征表示以应对领域差异问题。 Yibo Jiang,Victor Veitch cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Jin Wan,Hui Yin,Zhenyao Wu,Xinyi Wu,Zhihao Liu,Song Wang
title: CRFormer: A Cross-Region Transformer for Shadow Removal
title_zh: CRFormer：用于阴影去除的跨区域变压器
abstract: Aiming to restore the original intensity of shadow regions in an image and make them compatible with the remaining non-shadow regions without a trace, shadow removal is a very challenging problem that benefits many downstream image/video-related tasks. Recently, transformers have shown their strong capability in various applications by capturing global pixel interactions and this capability is highly desirable in shadow removal. However, applying transformers to promote shadow removal is non-trivial for the following two reasons: 1) The patchify operation is not suitable for shadow removal due to irregular shadow shapes; 2) shadow removal only needs one-way interaction from the non-shadow region to the shadow region instead of the common two-way interactions among all pixels in the image. In this paper, we propose a novel cross-region transformer, namely CRFormer, for shadow removal which differs from existing transformers by only considering the pixel interactions from the non-shadow region to the shadow region without splitting images into patches. This is achieved by a carefully designed region-aware cross-attention operation that can aggregate the recovered shadow region features conditioned on the non-shadow region features. Extensive experiments on ISTD, AISTD, SRD, and Video Shadow Removal datasets demonstrate the superiority of our method compared to other state-of-the-art methods.
summary: Aiming to restore the original intensity of shadow regions in an image and make them compatible with the remaining non-shadow regions without a trace, shadow removal is a very challenging problem that benefits many downstream image/video-related tasks. Recently, transformers have shown their strong capability in various applications by capturing global pixel interactions and this capability is highly desirable in shadow removal. However, applying transformers to promote shadow removal is non-trivial for the following two reasons: 1) The patchify operation is not suitable for shadow removal due to irregular shadow shapes; 2) shadow removal only needs one-way interaction from the non-shadow region to the shadow region instead of the common two-way interactions among all pixels in the image. In this paper, we propose a novel cross-region transformer, namely CRFormer, for shadow removal which differs from existing transformers by only considering the pixel interactions from the non-shadow region to the shadow region without splitting images into patches. This is achieved by a carefully designed region-aware cross-attention operation that can aggregate the recovered shadow region features conditioned on the non-shadow region features. Extensive experiments on ISTD, AISTD, SRD, and Video Shadow Removal datasets demonstrate the superiority of our method compared to other state-of-the-art methods.
abstract_zh: 阴影去除的目的是恢复图像中阴影区域的原始强度，并使它们与剩余的非阴影区域不留痕迹地兼容，是一个非常具有挑战性的问题，有利于许多下游图像/视频相关任务。最近，Transformer 通过捕获全局像素交互在各种应用中展示了其强大的能力，并且这种能力在阴影消除中非常理想。然而，应用变压器来促进阴影去除是很重要的，原因如下： 1）由于阴影形状不规则，patchify 操作不适合阴影去除； 2）阴影去除只需要从非阴影区域到阴影区域的单向交互，而不是图像中所有像素之间常见的双向交互。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的跨区域变换器，即 CRFormer，用于阴影去除，它与现有变换器不同，仅考虑从非阴影区域到阴影区域的像素交互，而不将图像分割成补丁。这是通过精心设计的区域感知交叉注意操作来实现的，该操作可以聚合以非阴影区域特征为条件的恢复的阴影区域特征。对 ISTD、AISTD、SRD 和视频阴影去除数据集的大量实验证明了我们的方法相对于其他最先进的方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种名为CRFormer的跨区域Transformer模型，用于有效去除图像中的阴影，恢复阴影区域的原始光照信息。
AI.motivation: 传统阴影去除方法难以处理不规则阴影形状和单向交互需求，而现有Transformer模型因依赖双向交互和分块操作导致效果不佳，需设计适应阴影去除特性的新型Transformer结构。
AI.method: 设计区域感知交叉注意力机制，直接建立非阴影区域与阴影区域间的单向特征交互，避免图像分块操作，实现更自然的阴影恢复。
AI.result: 在ISTD、AISTD、SRD和视频阴影去除数据集上实验表明，CRFormer在阴影恢复效果和视觉质量上优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: CRFormer通过单向区域交互机制有效解决了阴影去除中的关键问题，为基于Transformer的图像修复任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Diptish Dey,Debarati Bhaumik
title: Inter-relational Model for understanding Chatbot acceptance across retail sectors
title_zh: 用于了解零售行业聊天机器人接受度的相互关系模型
abstract: Despite the rising interest in chatbots, deployment has been slow in the retail sector. In the absence of comparative cross sector research on the user acceptance of chatbots in retail, we present a model and a research framework that proposes customer and chatbot antecedents using trust and customer satisfaction as relationship mediators and word of mouth and expectation of continuity as relationship outcomes. In determining our framework, we assimilate constructs from different models and theories overarching user experience with chatbots, technology acceptance and relationship marketing and propose a selection of 11 constructs as antecedents. Furthermore, we suggest retail sectors as one of our 4 moderators. Eventually, we provide insight into our current activities that is expected to identify which factors impact relationship outcomes to which extent across different retail sectors.
summary: Despite the rising interest in chatbots, deployment has been slow in the retail sector. In the absence of comparative cross sector research on the user acceptance of chatbots in retail, we present a model and a research framework that proposes customer and chatbot antecedents using trust and customer satisfaction as relationship mediators and word of mouth and expectation of continuity as relationship outcomes. In determining our framework, we assimilate constructs from different models and theories overarching user experience with chatbots, technology acceptance and relationship marketing and propose a selection of 11 constructs as antecedents. Furthermore, we suggest retail sectors as one of our 4 moderators. Eventually, we provide insight into our current activities that is expected to identify which factors impact relationship outcomes to which extent across different retail sectors.
abstract_zh: 尽管人们对聊天机器人的兴趣日益浓厚，但零售行业的部署进展缓慢。由于缺乏对零售业用户接受聊天机器人的跨部门比较研究，我们提出了一个模型和研究框架，该模型和研究框架提出了客户和聊天机器人的前因，使用信任和客户满意度作为关系中介，将口碑和连续性期望作为关系结果。在确定我们的框架时，我们吸收了来自不同模型和理论的构造，这些模型和理论涵盖了聊天机器人的用户体验、技术接受度和关系营销，并提出了 11 个构造的选择作为前提。此外，我们建议零售行业作为我们的 4 个调节者之一。最终，我们深入了解当前的活动，预计将确定哪些因素会在多大程度上影响不同零售行业的关系结果。

AI.tldr: 构建跨零售行业聊天机器人接受度的跨关系模型，探讨影响用户接受度的关键因素及行业差异。
AI.motivation: 零售行业聊天机器人部署进展缓慢，缺乏跨行业比较研究，需建立框架明确用户接受度影响机制。
AI.method: 整合用户体验、技术接受与关系营销理论，提出包含11个前因变量的模型，并以零售行业为调节变量进行分析。
AI.result: 识别出信任、满意度等中介变量及口碑、持续使用预期等结果变量，明确不同零售行业的影响因素差异。
AI.conclusion: 提出的框架可为零售行业聊天机器人优化提供理论依据，未来研究需验证模型在不同场景下的适用性。

authors_text: Nuno Oliveira,Norberto Sousa,Isabel Praça
title: Deep Learning for Short-term Instant Energy Consumption Forecasting in the Manufacturing Sector
title_zh: 制造业短期即时能源消耗预测的深度学习
abstract: Electricity is a volatile power source that requires great planning and resource management for both short and long term. More specifically, in the short-term, accurate instant energy consumption forecasting contributes greatly to improve the efficiency of buildings, opening new avenues for the adoption of renewable energy. In that regard, data-driven approaches, namely the ones based on machine learning, are begin to be preferred over more traditional ones since they provide not only more simplified ways of deployment but also state of the art results. In that sense, this work applies and compares the performance of several deep learning algorithms, LSTM, CNN, mixed CNN-LSTM and TCN, in a real testbed within the manufacturing sector. The experimental results suggest that the TCN is the most reliable method for predicting instant energy consumption in the short-term.
summary: Electricity is a volatile power source that requires great planning and resource management for both short and long term. More specifically, in the short-term, accurate instant energy consumption forecasting contributes greatly to improve the efficiency of buildings, opening new avenues for the adoption of renewable energy. In that regard, data-driven approaches, namely the ones based on machine learning, are begin to be preferred over more traditional ones since they provide not only more simplified ways of deployment but also state of the art results. In that sense, this work applies and compares the performance of several deep learning algorithms, LSTM, CNN, mixed CNN-LSTM and TCN, in a real testbed within the manufacturing sector. The experimental results suggest that the TCN is the most reliable method for predicting instant energy consumption in the short-term.
abstract_zh: 电力是一种不稳定的电源，需要进行短期和长期的良好规划和资源管理。更具体地说，在短期内，准确的即时能耗预测极大地提高了建筑物的效率，为可再生能源的采用开辟了新途径。在这方面，数据驱动的方法，即基于机器学习的方法，开始比更传统的方法更受青睐，因为它们不仅提供更简化的部署方式，而且提供最先进的结果。从这个意义上说，这项工作在制造业的真实测试台上应用并比较了几种深度学习算法（LSTM、CNN、混合 CNN-LSTM 和 TCN）的性能。实验结果表明，TCN 是预测短期瞬时能耗最可靠的方法。

AI.tldr: 该论文在制造业领域应用多种深度学习算法进行短期瞬时能耗预测，并比较其性能。
AI.motivation: 电力作为波动性能源，需要精准的短期能耗预测以提升建筑效率并促进可再生能源应用，传统方法逐渐被数据驱动的机器学习方法取代。
AI.method: 在制造业真实测试环境中，对比LSTM、CNN、混合CNN-LSTM和TCN等多种深度学习算法的预测性能。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，TCN（时间卷积网络）在短期瞬时能耗预测中表现最为可靠。
AI.conclusion: TCN算法适用于制造业短期能耗预测任务，为能源管理提供了有效的深度学习解决方案。

authors_text: Muhammad Wildan Oktavian,Novanto Yudistira,Achmad Ridok
title: Classification of Alzheimer's Disease Using the Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) with Transfer Learning and Weighted Loss
title_zh: 使用具有迁移学习和加权损失的卷积神经网络 (CNN) 对阿尔茨海默病进行分类
abstract: Alzheimer's disease is a progressive neurodegenerative disorder that gradually deprives the patient of cognitive function and can end in death. With the advancement of technology today, it is possible to detect Alzheimer's disease through Magnetic Resonance Imaging (MRI) scans. So that MRI is the technique most often used for the diagnosis and analysis of the progress of Alzheimer's disease. With this technology, image recognition in the early diagnosis of Alzheimer's disease can be achieved automatically using machine learning. Although machine learning has many advantages, currently the use of deep learning is more widely applied because it has stronger learning capabilities and is more suitable for solving image recognition problems. However, there are still several challenges that must be faced to implement deep learning, such as the need for large datasets, requiring large computing resources, and requiring careful parameter setting to prevent overfitting or underfitting. In responding to the challenge of classifying Alzheimer's disease using deep learning, this study propose the Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) method with the Residual Network 18 Layer (ResNet-18) architecture. To overcome the need for a large and balanced dataset, transfer learning from ImageNet is used and weighting the loss function values so that each class has the same weight. And also in this study conducted an experiment by changing the network activation function to a mish activation function to increase accuracy. From the results of the tests that have been carried out, the accuracy of the model is 88.3 % using transfer learning, weighted loss and the mish activation function. This accuracy value increases from the baseline model which only gets an accuracy of 69.1 %.
