search_text: Masked Autoencoders in 3D Point Cloud Representation Learning 3D 点云表示学习中的屏蔽自动编码器 Transformer-based Self-supervised Representation Learning methods learn generic features from unlabeled datasets for providing useful network initialization parameters for downstream tasks. Recently, self-supervised learning based upon masking local surface patches for 3D point cloud data has been under-explored. In this paper, we propose masked Autoencoders in 3D point cloud representation learning (abbreviated as MAE3D), a novel autoencoding paradigm for self-supervised learning. We first split the input point cloud into patches and mask a portion of them, then use our Patch Embedding Module to extract the features of unmasked patches. Secondly, we employ patch-wise MAE3D Transformers to learn both local features of point cloud patches and high-level contextual relationships between patches and complete the latent representations of masked patches. We use our Point Cloud Reconstruction Module with multi-task loss to complete the incomplete point cloud as a result. We conduct self-supervised pre-training on ShapeNet55 with the point cloud completion pre-text task and fine-tune the pre-trained model on ModelNet40 and ScanObjectNN (PB\_T50\_RS, the hardest variant). Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that the local features extracted by our MAE3D from point cloud patches are beneficial for downstream classification tasks, soundly outperforming state-of-the-art methods ($93.4\%$ and $86.2\%$ classification accuracy, respectively). 基于 Transformer 的自监督表示学习方法从未标记的数据集中学习通用特征，为下游任务提供有用的网络初始化参数。最近，基于 3D 点云数据掩蔽局部表面斑块的自监督学习尚未得到充分探索。在本文中，我们提出了 3D 点云表示学习中的掩码自动编码器（缩写为 MAE3D），这是一种用于自监督学习的新型自动编码范例。我们首先将输入点云分割成补丁并屏蔽其中的一部分，然后使用我们的补丁嵌入模块提取未屏蔽补丁的特征。其次，我们采用 patch-wise MAE3D Transformers 来学习点云补丁的局部特征和补丁之间的高级上下文关系，并完成屏蔽补丁的潜在表示。我们使用具有多任务损失的点云重建模块来完成不完整的点云。我们使用点云完成前置任务在 ShapeNet55 上进行自监督预训练，并在 ModelNet40 和 ScanObjectNN（PB\_T50\_RS，最难的变体）上微调预训练模型。综合实验表明，我们的 MAE3D 从点云补丁中提取的局部特征有利于下游分类任务，明显优于最先进的方法（分类精度分别为 93.4\%$ 和 86.2\%$）。 本文提出了一种基于掩码自编码器的3D点云表征学习方法MAE3D，通过局部表面块掩码和重建任务学习点云的通用特征。 Jincen Jiang,Xuequan Lu,Lizhi Zhao,Richard Dazeley,Meili Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Dong Chenxi,QP Zhang,B Hu,JC Zhang,Dl Lin
title: An Integrated System of Drug Matching and Abnormal Approval Number Correction
title_zh: 药品配比与批准文号异常更正一体化系统
abstract: This essay is based on the joint project with 111, Inc. The pharmacy e-Commerce business grows rapidly in recent years with the ever-increasing medical demand during the pandemic. A big challenge for online pharmacy platforms is drug product matching. The e-Commerce platform usually collects drug product information from multiple data sources such as the warehouse or retailers. Therefore, the data format is inconsistent, making it hard to identify and match the same drug product. This paper creates an integrated system for matching drug products from two data sources. Besides, the system would correct some inconsistent drug approval numbers based on a Naive-Bayes drug type (Chinese or Non-Chinese Drug) classifier. Our integrated system achieves 98.3% drug matching accuracy, with 99.2% precision and 97.5% recall
summary: This essay is based on the joint project with 111, Inc. The pharmacy e-Commerce business grows rapidly in recent years with the ever-increasing medical demand during the pandemic. A big challenge for online pharmacy platforms is drug product matching. The e-Commerce platform usually collects drug product information from multiple data sources such as the warehouse or retailers. Therefore, the data format is inconsistent, making it hard to identify and match the same drug product. This paper creates an integrated system for matching drug products from two data sources. Besides, the system would correct some inconsistent drug approval numbers based on a Naive-Bayes drug type (Chinese or Non-Chinese Drug) classifier. Our integrated system achieves 98.3% drug matching accuracy, with 99.2% precision and 97.5% recall
abstract_zh: 本文基于与111公司的合作项目。近年来，随着疫情期间医疗需求的不断增加，药房电商业务增长迅速。在线药房平台面临的一大挑战是药品匹配。电子商务平台通常从仓库或零售商等多个数据源收集药品信息。因此，数据格式不一致，导致同一药品难以识别和匹配。本文创建了一个集成系统，用于匹配两个数据源的药品。此外，系统还会根据Naive-Bayes药物类型（中国或非中国药物）分类器纠正一些不一致的药品批准文号。我们的集成系统实现了 98.3% 的药物匹配准确率、99.2% 的精确度和 97.5% 的召回率

AI.tldr: 本文设计了一个集成系统，用于解决在线药店平台中药品产品匹配及批准号不一致的校正问题。
AI.motivation: 随着疫情导致的医疗需求激增，电商平台面临多源药品数据格式不一致带来的匹配困难和批准号错误问题。
AI.method: 构建集成系统，结合基于朴素贝叶斯分类器的中西药类型识别模型，校正批准号异常并实现跨数据源药品匹配。
AI.result: 系统达到98.3%的匹配准确率，精确率为99.2%，召回率为97.5%
AI.conclusion: 该系统有效解决了多源药品数据匹配与批准号校正难题，为电商医药平台提供了高精度的解决方案。

authors_text: Nicolás E. Díaz Ferreyra,Melina Vidoni,Maritta Heisel,Riccardo Scandariato
title: Cybersecurity Discussions in Stack Overflow: A Developer-Centred Analysis of Engagement and Self-Disclosure Behaviour
title_zh: Stack Overflow 中的网络安全讨论：以开发人员为中心的参与和自我披露行为分析
abstract: Stack Overflow (SO) is a popular platform among developers seeking advice on various software-related topics, including privacy and security. As for many knowledge-sharing websites, the value of SO depends largely on users' engagement, namely their willingness to answer, comment or post technical questions. Still, many of these questions (including cybersecurity-related ones) remain unanswered, putting the site's relevance and reputation into question. Hence, it is important to understand users' participation in privacy and security discussions to promote engagement and foster the exchange of such expertise. Objective: Based on prior findings on online social networks, this work elaborates on the interplay between users' engagement and their privacy practices in SO. Particularly, it analyses developers' self-disclosure behaviour regarding profile visibility and their involvement in discussions related to privacy and security. Method: We followed a mixed-methods approach by (i) analysing SO data from 1239 cybersecurity-tagged questions along with 7048 user profiles, and (ii) conducting an anonymous online survey (N=64). Results: About 33% of the questions we retrieved had no answer, whereas more than 50% had no accepted answer. We observed that "proactive" users tend to disclose significantly less information in their profiles than "reactive" and "unengaged" ones. However, no correlations were found between these engagement categories and privacy-related constructs such as Perceived Control or General Privacy Concerns. Implications: These findings contribute to (i) a better understanding of developers' engagement towards privacy and security topics, and (ii) to shape strategies promoting the exchange of cybersecurity expertise in SO.
summary: Stack Overflow (SO) is a popular platform among developers seeking advice on various software-related topics, including privacy and security. As for many knowledge-sharing websites, the value of SO depends largely on users' engagement, namely their willingness to answer, comment or post technical questions. Still, many of these questions (including cybersecurity-related ones) remain unanswered, putting the site's relevance and reputation into question. Hence, it is important to understand users' participation in privacy and security discussions to promote engagement and foster the exchange of such expertise. Objective: Based on prior findings on online social networks, this work elaborates on the interplay between users' engagement and their privacy practices in SO. Particularly, it analyses developers' self-disclosure behaviour regarding profile visibility and their involvement in discussions related to privacy and security. Method: We followed a mixed-methods approach by (i) analysing SO data from 1239 cybersecurity-tagged questions along with 7048 user profiles, and (ii) conducting an anonymous online survey (N=64). Results: About 33% of the questions we retrieved had no answer, whereas more than 50% had no accepted answer. We observed that "proactive" users tend to disclose significantly less information in their profiles than "reactive" and "unengaged" ones. However, no correlations were found between these engagement categories and privacy-related constructs such as Perceived Control or General Privacy Concerns. Implications: These findings contribute to (i) a better understanding of developers' engagement towards privacy and security topics, and (ii) to shape strategies promoting the exchange of cybersecurity expertise in SO.
abstract_zh: Stack Overflow (SO) 是一个很受开发人员欢迎的平台，他们寻求有关各种软件相关主题（包括隐私和安全）的建议。对于许多知识共享网站来说，SO 的价值很大程度上取决于用户的参与度，即他们是否愿意回答、评论或发布技术问题。尽管如此，其中许多问题（包括与网络安全相关的问题）仍未得到解答，使该网站的相关性和声誉受到质疑。因此，了解用户对隐私和安全讨论的参与情况以促进参与并促进此类专业知识的交流非常重要。目标：基于在线社交网络的先前研究结果，这项工作详细阐述了 SO 中用户的参与度和隐私实践之间的相互作用。特别是，它分析了开发人员关于个人资料可见性的自我披露行为以及他们参与与隐私和安全相关的讨论的情况。方法：我们采用混合方法，(i) 分析来自 1239 个网络安全标签问题的 SO 数据以及 7048 个用户配置文件，(ii) 进行匿名在线调查 (N=64)。结果：我们检索到的问题中，大约 33% 没有答案，而超过 50% 的问题没有可接受的答案。我们观察到，“主动”用户在其个人资料中披露的信息往往比“被动”和“不参与”用户少得多。然而，没有发现这些参与类别与隐私相关的结构（例如感知控制或一般隐私问题）之间存在相关性。启示：这些发现有助于 (i) 更好地了解开发人员对隐私和安全主题的参与，以及 (ii) 制定促进 SO 中网络安全专业知识交流的策略。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了Stack Overflow平台上开发者在网络安全讨论中的参与度与自我披露行为的关系。
AI.motivation: Stack Overflow上大量网络安全相关问题未获解答，影响平台声誉，需理解开发者参与隐私安全讨论的行为以促进知识共享。
AI.method: 采用混合方法：分析1239个网络安全标签问题及7048个用户资料，并开展64人匿名在线调查。
AI.result: 33%的问题无答案，超50%无采纳答案；主动用户比被动或不活跃用户更少披露个人信息，但参与度与隐私相关构念无显著关联。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果有助于理解开发者对隐私安全议题的参与模式，并为提升Stack Overflow网络安全知识共享策略提供依据。

search_text: Cybersecurity Discussions in Stack Overflow: A Developer-Centred Analysis of Engagement and Self-Disclosure Behaviour Stack Overflow 中的网络安全讨论：以开发人员为中心的参与和自我披露行为分析 Stack Overflow (SO) is a popular platform among developers seeking advice on various software-related topics, including privacy and security. As for many knowledge-sharing websites, the value of SO depends largely on users' engagement, namely their willingness to answer, comment or post technical questions. Still, many of these questions (including cybersecurity-related ones) remain unanswered, putting the site's relevance and reputation into question. Hence, it is important to understand users' participation in privacy and security discussions to promote engagement and foster the exchange of such expertise. Objective: Based on prior findings on online social networks, this work elaborates on the interplay between users' engagement and their privacy practices in SO. Particularly, it analyses developers' self-disclosure behaviour regarding profile visibility and their involvement in discussions related to privacy and security. Method: We followed a mixed-methods approach by (i) analysing SO data from 1239 cybersecurity-tagged questions along with 7048 user profiles, and (ii) conducting an anonymous online survey (N=64). Results: About 33% of the questions we retrieved had no answer, whereas more than 50% had no accepted answer. We observed that "proactive" users tend to disclose significantly less information in their profiles than "reactive" and "unengaged" ones. However, no correlations were found between these engagement categories and privacy-related constructs such as Perceived Control or General Privacy Concerns. Implications: These findings contribute to (i) a better understanding of developers' engagement towards privacy and security topics, and (ii) to shape strategies promoting the exchange of cybersecurity expertise in SO. Stack Overflow (SO) 是一个很受开发人员欢迎的平台，他们寻求有关各种软件相关主题（包括隐私和安全）的建议。对于许多知识共享网站来说，SO 的价值很大程度上取决于用户的参与度，即他们是否愿意回答、评论或发布技术问题。尽管如此，其中许多问题（包括与网络安全相关的问题）仍未得到解答，使该网站的相关性和声誉受到质疑。因此，了解用户对隐私和安全讨论的参与情况以促进参与并促进此类专业知识的交流非常重要。目标：基于在线社交网络的先前研究结果，这项工作详细阐述了 SO 中用户的参与度和隐私实践之间的相互作用。特别是，它分析了开发人员关于个人资料可见性的自我披露行为以及他们参与与隐私和安全相关的讨论的情况。方法：我们采用混合方法，(i) 分析来自 1239 个网络安全标签问题的 SO 数据以及 7048 个用户配置文件，(ii) 进行匿名在线调查 (N=64)。结果：我们检索到的问题中，大约 33% 没有答案，而超过 50% 的问题没有可接受的答案。我们观察到，“主动”用户在其个人资料中披露的信息往往比“被动”和“不参与”用户少得多。然而，没有发现这些参与类别与隐私相关的结构（例如感知控制或一般隐私问题）之间存在相关性。启示：这些发现有助于 (i) 更好地了解开发人员对隐私和安全主题的参与，以及 (ii) 制定促进 SO 中网络安全专业知识交流的策略。 本文分析了Stack Overflow平台上开发者在网络安全讨论中的参与度与自我披露行为的关系。 Nicolás E. Díaz Ferreyra,Melina Vidoni,Maritta Heisel,Riccardo Scandariato cs.HC,cs.CR,cs.SE,cs.SI

authors_text: Ruina Sun,Yuexin Pang
title: Efficient Lung Cancer Image Classification and Segmentation Algorithm Based on Improved Swin Transformer
title_zh: 基于改进Swin Transformer的高效肺癌图像分类与分割算法
abstract: With the development of computer technology, various models have emerged in artificial intelligence. The transformer model has been applied to the field of computer vision (CV) after its success in natural language processing (NLP). Radiologists continue to face multiple challenges in today's rapidly evolving medical field, such as increased workload and increased diagnostic demands. Although there are some conventional methods for lung cancer detection before, their accuracy still needs to be improved, especially in realistic diagnostic scenarios. This paper creatively proposes a segmentation method based on efficient transformer and applies it to medical image analysis. The algorithm completes the task of lung cancer classification and segmentation by analyzing lung cancer data, and aims to provide efficient technical support for medical staff. In addition, we evaluated and compared the results in various aspects. For the classification mission, the max accuracy of Swin-T by regular training and Swin-B in two resolutions by pre-training can be up to 82.3%. For the segmentation mission, we use pre-training to help the model improve the accuracy of our experiments. The accuracy of the three models reaches over 95%. The experiments demonstrate that the algorithm can be well applied to lung cancer classification and segmentation missions.

abstract_zh: 随着计算机技术的发展，人工智能出现了各种模型。 Transformer模型在自然语言处理（NLP）领域取得成功后，又被应用到计算机视觉（CV）领域。在当今快速发展的医疗领域，放射科医生继续面临多重挑战，例如工作量增加和诊断需求增加。尽管之前有一些肺癌检测的常规方法，但其准确性仍需要提高，特别是在现实的诊断场景中。本文创造性地提出了一种基于高效Transformer的分割方法，并将其应用于医学图像分析。该算法通过分析肺癌数据完成肺癌分类分割任务，旨在为医护人员提供高效的技术支持。此外，我们还对各个方面的结果进行了评估和比较。对于分类任务，常规训练的Swin-T和预训练的两种分辨率的Swin-B的最大准确率可达82.3%。对于分割任务，我们使用预训练来帮助模型提高实验的准确性。三个模型的准确率均达到95%以上。实验表明该算法可以很好地应用于肺癌分类和分割任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于改进Swin Transformer的高效肺部癌变图像分类与分割算法，旨在提升医疗图像分析的准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统肺癌检测方法在真实诊断场景中准确率不足，且放射科医生面临工作量大、诊断需求高的挑战，需更高效的技术支持。
AI.method: 采用改进的Swin Transformer模型，结合预训练与多分辨率策略，对肺部癌变图像进行分类与分割任务。
AI.result: 分类任务中Swin-T和Swin-B模型最高准确率达82.3%，分割任务三模型准确率均超95%。
AI.conclusion: 实验表明，该算法在肺癌分类与分割任务中表现优异，可为医疗人员提供有效技术支持。

authors_text: Okchul Jung,Dong Un Kang,Gwanghyun Kim,Se Young Chun
title: Adaptive GLCM sampling for transformer-based COVID-19 detection on CT
title_zh: 用于 CT 上基于变压器的 COVID-19 检测的自适应 GLCM 采样
abstract: The world has suffered from COVID-19 (SARS-CoV-2) for the last two years, causing much damage and change in people's daily lives. Thus, automated detection of COVID-19 utilizing deep learning on chest computed tomography (CT) scans became promising, which helps correct diagnosis efficiently. Recently, transformer-based COVID-19 detection method on CT is proposed to utilize 3D information in CT volume. However, its sampling method for selecting slices is not optimal. To leverage rich 3D information in CT volume, we propose a transformer-based COVID-19 detection using a novel data curation and adaptive sampling method using gray level co-occurrence matrices (GLCM). To train the model which consists of CNN layer, followed by transformer architecture, we first executed data curation based on lung segmentation and utilized the entropy of GLCM value of every slice in CT volumes to select important slices for the prediction. The experimental results show that the proposed method improve the detection performance with large margin without much difficult modification to the model.
summary: The world has suffered from COVID-19 (SARS-CoV-2) for the last two years, causing much damage and change in people's daily lives. Thus, automated detection of COVID-19 utilizing deep learning on chest computed tomography (CT) scans became promising, which helps correct diagnosis efficiently. Recently, transformer-based COVID-19 detection method on CT is proposed to utilize 3D information in CT volume. However, its sampling method for selecting slices is not optimal. To leverage rich 3D information in CT volume, we propose a transformer-based COVID-19 detection using a novel data curation and adaptive sampling method using gray level co-occurrence matrices (GLCM). To train the model which consists of CNN layer, followed by transformer architecture, we first executed data curation based on lung segmentation and utilized the entropy of GLCM value of every slice in CT volumes to select important slices for the prediction. The experimental results show that the proposed method improve the detection performance with large margin without much difficult modification to the model.
abstract_zh: 过去两年，全球遭受了新冠肺炎 (SARS-CoV-2) 的侵袭，给人们的日常生活造成了巨大的损害和改变。因此，利用胸部计算机断层扫描 (CT) 扫描的深度学习自动检测 COVID-19 变得很有前景，这有助于有效地正确诊断。最近，提出了基于变压器的 CT 上的 COVID-19 检测方法，以利用 CT 体积中的 3D 信息。然而，其选择切片的采样方法并不是最优的。为了利用 CT 体积中丰富的 3D 信息，我们提出了一种基于变压器的 COVID-19 检测，使用新颖的数据管理和使用灰度共生矩阵 (GLCM) 的自适应采样方法。为了训练由 CNN 层和 Transformer 架构组成的模型，我们首先执行基于肺部分割的数据管理，并利用 CT 体积中每个切片的 GLCM 值的熵来选择重要的切片进行预测。实验结果表明，该方法无需对模型进行太多困难的修改，即可大幅度提高检测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于自适应灰度共生矩阵（GLCM）采样的Transformer架构，用于改进CT影像中的COVID-19检测方法。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的CT影像COVID-19检测方法在切片采样策略上存在不足，难以充分利用CT体积的3D信息。
AI.method: 结合CNN与Transformer架构，通过肺部分割进行数据清洗，并利用GLCM熵值评估每层切片的重要性，实现自适应关键切片采样。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在不显著修改模型结构的前提下，显著提升了检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 自适应GLCM采样策略能有效增强Transformer模型对CT体积3D信息的利用，提升COVID-19检测准确率。

To leverage rich 3D information in CT volume, we propose a transformer-based COVID-19 detection using a novel data curation and adaptive sampling method using gray level co-occurrence matrices (GLCM). To train the model which consists of CNN layer, followed by transformer architecture, we first executed data curation based on lung segmentation and utilized the entropy of GLCM value of every slice in CT volumes to select important slices for the prediction. The experimental results show that the proposed method improve the detection performance with large margin without much difficult modification to the model. 过去两年，全球遭受了新冠肺炎 (SARS-CoV-2) 的侵袭，给人们的日常生活造成了巨大的损害和改变。因此，利用胸部计算机断层扫描 (CT) 扫描的深度学习自动检测 COVID-19 变得很有前景，这有助于有效地正确诊断。最近，提出了基于变压器的 CT 上的 COVID-19 检测方法，以利用 CT 体积中的 3D 信息。然而，其选择切片的采样方法并不是最优的。为了利用 CT 体积中丰富的 3D 信息，我们提出了一种基于变压器的 COVID-19 检测，使用新颖的数据管理和使用灰度共生矩阵 (GLCM) 的自适应采样方法。为了训练由 CNN 层和 Transformer 架构组成的模型，我们首先执行基于肺部分割的数据管理，并利用 CT 体积中每个切片的 GLCM 值的熵来选择重要的切片进行预测。实验结果表明，该方法无需对模型进行太多困难的修改，即可大幅度提高检测性能。 本文提出一种基于自适应灰度共生矩阵（GLCM）采样的Transformer架构，用于改进CT影像中的COVID-19检测方法。 Okchul Jung,Dong Un Kang,Gwanghyun Kim,Se Young Chun eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Ziyao Zhang,Alessio Falai,Ariadna Sanchez,Orazio Angelini,Kayoko Yanagisawa
title: Mix and Match: An Empirical Study on Training Corpus Composition for Polyglot Text-To-Speech (TTS)
title_zh: 混合与匹配：多语言文本转语音 (TTS) 训练语料库构成的实证研究
comment: Accepted to be published in the Proceedings of InterSpeech 2022
comments: Accepted to be published in the Proceedings of InterSpeech 2022
abstract: Training multilingual Neural Text-To-Speech (NTTS) models using only monolingual corpora has emerged as a popular way for building voice cloning based Polyglot NTTS systems. In order to train these models, it is essential to understand how the composition of the training corpora affects the quality of multilingual speech synthesis. In this context, it is common to hear questions such as "Would including more Spanish data help my Italian synthesis, given the closeness of both languages?". Unfortunately, we found existing literature on the topic lacking in completeness in this regard. In the present work, we conduct an extensive ablation study aimed at understanding how various factors of the training corpora, such as language family affiliation, gender composition, and the number of speakers, contribute to the quality of Polyglot synthesis. Our findings include the observation that female speaker data are preferred in most scenarios, and that it is not always beneficial to have more speakers from the target language variant in the training corpus. The findings herein are informative for the process of data procurement and corpora building.
summary: Training multilingual Neural Text-To-Speech (NTTS) models using only monolingual corpora has emerged as a popular way for building voice cloning based Polyglot NTTS systems. In order to train these models, it is essential to understand how the composition of the training corpora affects the quality of multilingual speech synthesis. In this context, it is common to hear questions such as "Would including more Spanish data help my Italian synthesis, given the closeness of both languages?". Unfortunately, we found existing literature on the topic lacking in completeness in this regard. In the present work, we conduct an extensive ablation study aimed at understanding how various factors of the training corpora, such as language family affiliation, gender composition, and the number of speakers, contribute to the quality of Polyglot synthesis. Our findings include the observation that female speaker data are preferred in most scenarios, and that it is not always beneficial to have more speakers from the target language variant in the training corpus. The findings herein are informative for the process of data procurement and corpora building.
abstract_zh: 仅使用单语言语料库训练多语言神经文本转语音 (NTTS) 模型已成为构建基于多语言 NTTS 系统的语音克隆的流行方法。为了训练这些模型，必须了解训练语料库的组成如何影响多语言语音合成的质量。在这种情况下，经常会听到这样的问题：“考虑到两种语言的相似性，包含更多西班牙语数据是否有助于我的意大利语综合？”。不幸的是，我们发现有关该主题的现有文献在这方面缺乏完整性。在目前的工作中，我们进行了广泛的消融研究，旨在了解训练语料库的各种因素（例如语言家族归属、性别构成和说话者数量）如何影响多语言合成的质量。我们的研究结果包括观察到，在大多数情况下，女性说话者数据是首选，并且在训练语料库中拥有更多来自目标语言变体的说话者并不总是有益的。本文的研究结果为数据采购和语料库构建过程提供了信息。

AI.tldr: 本论文研究了使用单语语料训练多语言神经文本到语音（NTTS）模型时，训练语料库组成对多语言语音合成质量的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有文献缺乏对训练语料库组成因素（如语言亲缘关系、性别比例、说话人数量）如何影响多语言语音合成质量的系统性分析。
AI.method: 通过大规模消融实验，分析语言家族归属、性别构成和说话人数量等因素对多语言语音合成质量的影响。
AI.result: 发现女性说话人数据在多数场景中更优，且并非总是增加目标语言变体的说话人数量就能提升合成质量。
AI.conclusion: 研究结果为多语言TTS系统的数据采集和语料库构建提供了重要参考依据。

authors_text: Sahan Bulathwela,Meghana Verma,Maria Perez-Ortiz,Emine Yilmaz,John Shawe-Taylor
title: Can Population-based Engagement Improve Personalisation? A Novel Dataset and Experiments
title_zh: 基于人群的参与可以改善个性化吗？新颖的数据集和实验
comment: To be presented at International Conference for Educational Data Mining 2022
comments: To be presented at International Conference for Educational Data Mining 2022
abstract: This work explores how population-based engagement prediction can address cold-start at scale in large learning resource collections. The paper introduces i) VLE, a novel dataset that consists of content and video based features extracted from publicly available scientific video lectures coupled with implicit and explicit signals related to learner engagement, ii) two standard tasks related to predicting and ranking context-agnostic engagement in video lectures with preliminary baselines and iii) a set of experiments that validate the usefulness of the proposed dataset. Our experimental results indicate that the newly proposed VLE dataset leads to building context-agnostic engagement prediction models that are significantly performant than ones based on previous datasets, mainly attributing to the increase of training examples. VLE dataset's suitability in building models towards Computer Science/ Artificial Intelligence education focused on e-learning/ MOOC use-cases is also evidenced. Further experiments in combining the built model with a personalising algorithm show promising improvements in addressing the cold-start problem encountered in educational recommenders. This is the largest and most diverse publicly available dataset to our knowledge that deals with learner engagement prediction tasks. The dataset, helper tools, descriptive statistics and example code snippets are available publicly.
summary: This work explores how population-based engagement prediction can address cold-start at scale in large learning resource collections. The paper introduces i) VLE, a novel dataset that consists of content and video based features extracted from publicly available scientific video lectures coupled with implicit and explicit signals related to learner engagement, ii) two standard tasks related to predicting and ranking context-agnostic engagement in video lectures with preliminary baselines and iii) a set of experiments that validate the usefulness of the proposed dataset. Our experimental results indicate that the newly proposed VLE dataset leads to building context-agnostic engagement prediction models that are significantly performant than ones based on previous datasets, mainly attributing to the increase of training examples. VLE dataset's suitability in building models towards Computer Science/ Artificial Intelligence education focused on e-learning/ MOOC use-cases is also evidenced. Further experiments in combining the built model with a personalising algorithm show promising improvements in addressing the cold-start problem encountered in educational recommenders. This is the largest and most diverse publicly available dataset to our knowledge that deals with learner engagement prediction tasks. The dataset, helper tools, descriptive statistics and example code snippets are available publicly.
abstract_zh: 这项工作探讨了基于人群的参与度预测如何解决大型学习资源集中的大规模冷启动问题。本文介绍了 i) VLE，一个新颖的数据集，由从公开的科学视频讲座中提取的基于内容和视频的特征以及与学习者参与度相关的隐式和显式信号组成，ii) 两个与在初步基线下预测和排名视频讲座中上下文无关的参与度相关的标准任务，以及 iii) 一组验证所提出的数据集有用性的实验。我们的实验结果表明，新提出的 VLE 数据集可以构建与上下文无关的参与度预测模型，该模型比基于先前数据集的模型具有显着的性能，这主要归因于训练示例的增加。 VLE 数据集适合构建以电子学习/ MOOC 用例为重点的计算机科学/人工智能教育模型。将构建的模型与个性化算法相结合的进一步实验表明，在解决教育推荐系统中遇到的冷启动问题方面有很大的改进。据我们所知，这是处理学习者参与度预测任务的最大、最多样化的公开数据集。数据集、辅助工具、描述性统计数据和示例代码片段都是公开可用的。

AI.tldr: 本文通过构建新型数据集VLE，探索基于群体参与度预测的个性化推荐方法，以解决大规模学习资源中的冷启动问题。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集在样本量和多样性上不足，难以有效支持教育推荐系统的冷启动问题解决，尤其缺乏针对计算机科学/人工智能领域的专门数据。
AI.method: 提出包含视频内容特征与学习者隐式/显式参与信号的VLE数据集，设计上下文无关参与度预测与排序任务，并验证结合个性化算法的冷启动解决方案。
AI.result: VLE数据集使模型性能显著优于旧数据集，尤其在计算机科学教育场景中表现突出，结合个性化算法后有效缓解了推荐系统的冷启动问题。
AI.conclusion: VLE是目前最大且最多样化的公开学习者参与度预测数据集，为教育推荐系统研究提供了重要基础，验证了群体参与度预测在个性化中的应用价值。

authors_text: Eric R. Knorr,Baptiste Lemaire,Andrew Lim,Siqiang Luo,Huanchen Zhang,Stratos Idreos,Michael Mitzenmacher
title: Proteus: A Self-Designing Range Filter
title_zh: Proteus：自行设计的范围过滤器
comment: 14 pages, 9 figures, originally published in the Proceedings of the 2022 International Conference on Management of Data (SIGMOD'22), ISBN: 9781450392495
comments: 14 pages, 9 figures, originally published in the Proceedings of the 2022 International Conference on Management of Data (SIGMOD'22), ISBN: 9781450392495
abstract: We introduce Proteus, a novel self-designing approximate range filter, which configures itself based on sampled data in order to optimize its false positive rate (FPR) for a given space requirement. Proteus unifies the probabilistic and deterministic design spaces of state-of-the-art range filters to achieve robust performance across a larger variety of use cases. At the core of Proteus lies our Contextual Prefix FPR (CPFPR) model - a formal framework for the FPR of prefix-based filters across their design spaces. We empirically demonstrate the accuracy of our model and Proteus' ability to optimize over both synthetic workloads and real-world datasets. We further evaluate Proteus in RocksDB and show that it is able to improve end-to-end performance by as much as 5.3x over more brittle state-of-the-art methods such as SuRF and Rosetta. Our experiments also indicate that the cost of modeling is not significant compared to the end-to-end performance gains and that Proteus is robust to workload shifts.
summary: We introduce Proteus, a novel self-designing approximate range filter, which configures itself based on sampled data in order to optimize its false positive rate (FPR) for a given space requirement. Proteus unifies the probabilistic and deterministic design spaces of state-of-the-art range filters to achieve robust performance across a larger variety of use cases. At the core of Proteus lies our Contextual Prefix FPR (CPFPR) model - a formal framework for the FPR of prefix-based filters across their design spaces. We empirically demonstrate the accuracy of our model and Proteus' ability to optimize over both synthetic workloads and real-world datasets. We further evaluate Proteus in RocksDB and show that it is able to improve end-to-end performance by as much as 5.3x over more brittle state-of-the-art methods such as SuRF and Rosetta. Our experiments also indicate that the cost of modeling is not significant compared to the end-to-end performance gains and that Proteus is robust to workload shifts.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍 Proteus，一种新颖的自行设计的近似范围过滤器，它根据采样数据进行自身配置，以便针对给定的空间要求优化其误报率 (FPR)。 Proteus 统一了最先进的范围滤波器的概率性和确定性设计空间，以在更广泛的用例中实现稳健的性能。 Proteus 的核心在于我们的上下文前缀 FPR (CPFPR) 模型 - 跨设计空间的基于前缀的滤波器的 FPR 的正式框架。我们凭经验证明了模型的准确性以及 Proteus 对合成工作负载和实际数据集进行优化的能力。我们进一步评估了 RocksDB 中的 Proteus，结果表明，与 SuRF 和 Rosetta 等更脆弱的最先进方法相比，它能够将端到端性能提高多达 5.3 倍。我们的实验还表明，与端到端性能提升相比，建模成本并不显着，而且 Proteus 对工作负载变化具有鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种自设计的近似范围过滤器Proteus，通过采样数据优化误报率，统一概率与确定性设计空间以提升性能。
AI.motivation: 现有范围过滤器在不同场景下性能不稳定，且需手动调整参数，缺乏自适应优化能力。
AI.method: 基于上下文前缀误报率（CPFPR）模型，通过采样数据动态调整过滤器参数，统一概率与确定性设计空间。
AI.result: 实验表明Proteus在RocksDB中端到端性能提升最高达5.3倍，且建模成本低，对工作负载变化鲁棒。
AI.conclusion: Proteus通过自适应优化有效降低误报率，显著提升性能，适用于多种应用场景。

authors_text: Antonio Stanziola,Simon R. Arridge,Ben T. Cox,Bradley E. Treeby
title: j-Wave: An open-source differentiable wave simulator
title_zh: j-Wave：开源可微分波模拟器
abstract: We present an open-source differentiable acoustic simulator, j-Wave, which can solve time-varying and time-harmonic acoustic problems. It supports automatic differentiation, which is a program transformation technique that has many applications, especially in machine learning and scientific computing. j-Wave is composed of modular components that can be easily customized and reused. At the same time, it is compatible with some of the most popular machine learning libraries, such as JAX and TensorFlow. The accuracy of the simulation results for known configurations is evaluated against the widely used k-Wave toolbox and a cohort of acoustic simulation software. j-Wave is available from https://github.com/ucl-bug/jwave.
summary: We present an open-source differentiable acoustic simulator, j-Wave, which can solve time-varying and time-harmonic acoustic problems. It supports automatic differentiation, which is a program transformation technique that has many applications, especially in machine learning and scientific computing. j-Wave is composed of modular components that can be easily customized and reused. At the same time, it is compatible with some of the most popular machine learning libraries, such as JAX and TensorFlow. The accuracy of the simulation results for known configurations is evaluated against the widely used k-Wave toolbox and a cohort of acoustic simulation software. j-Wave is available from https://github.com/ucl-bug/jwave.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种开源可微声学模拟器 j-Wave，它可以解决时变和时谐声学问题。它支持自动微分，这是一种具有许多应用的程序转换技术，特别是在机器学习和科学计算方面。 j-Wave 由模块化组件组成，可以轻松定制和重复使用。同时，它兼容一些最流行的机器学习库，例如JAX和TensorFlow。已知配置的仿真结果的准确性是根据广泛使用的 k-Wave 工具箱和一组声学仿真软件进行评估的。 j-Wave 可从 https://github.com/ucl-bug/jwave 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个开源的可微分声学模拟器j-Wave，用于解决时变和时谐声学问题，并支持与机器学习库的兼容。
AI.motivation: 自动微分技术在机器学习和科学计算中具有广泛应用，但现有声学模拟工具缺乏灵活性和模块化设计，难以满足跨领域需求。
AI.method: 构建由模块化组件组成的j-Wave框架，集成自动微分功能，并与JAX、TensorFlow等主流库兼容，通过对比k-Wave等工具验证准确性。
AI.result: j-Wave在标准测试配置中展现出与主流声学软件一致的精度，且已作为开源项目发布。
AI.conclusion: j-Wave为声学模拟与机器学习的结合提供了高效工具，其模块化设计促进了跨学科研究与应用。

authors_text: Ruchita Bhadre,Prathamesh Yeole,Tejas Ranka,Rohini Mudhalwadkar
title: SmartMask- Developing an automated self-care system
title_zh: SmartMask - 开发自动化自我护理系统
comment: Presented at SIG Healthcare Indagation IEEE
comments: Presented at SIG Healthcare Indagation IEEE
abstract: COVID-19 has changed our world and has filled people with fear and anxiety. Everyone has a fear of coming in contact with people having the Coronavirus. In Spite of releasing full lockdowns, there is still a pressing need to maintain social distancing in the short- to medium-term to control the spread of coronavirus. Due to lack of self discipline or obviously pulling down the mask to get some fresh air, might pose a threat when you come near a person showing COVID symptoms. Abiding to WHO guidelines to avoid touching the mask while wearing it, we propose a wearable device for no contact pulling up of mask on face and additionally to implement social distancing with sensors mounted on the device. The SmartMask will detect if we are in the vicinity of any other person and will pull itself up. With sensors for detecting the closeness of objects around you and prompting you to take a proper action or pull the mask automatically. Along with the automated mask we will incorporate a temperature sensor to check vitals of an individual at all times and give an alert to the peers around him. This will ensure social distancing and help in avoiding spread of the virus.
summary: COVID-19 has changed our world and has filled people with fear and anxiety. Everyone has a fear of coming in contact with people having the Coronavirus. In Spite of releasing full lockdowns, there is still a pressing need to maintain social distancing in the short- to medium-term to control the spread of coronavirus. Due to lack of self discipline or obviously pulling down the mask to get some fresh air, might pose a threat when you come near a person showing COVID symptoms. Abiding to WHO guidelines to avoid touching the mask while wearing it, we propose a wearable device for no contact pulling up of mask on face and additionally to implement social distancing with sensors mounted on the device. The SmartMask will detect if we are in the vicinity of any other person and will pull itself up. With sensors for detecting the closeness of objects around you and prompting you to take a proper action or pull the mask automatically. Along with the automated mask we will incorporate a temperature sensor to check vitals of an individual at all times and give an alert to the peers around him. This will ensure social distancing and help in avoiding spread of the virus.
abstract_zh: COVID-19 改变了我们的世界，让人们充满恐惧和焦虑。每个人都害怕与冠状病毒感染者接触。尽管解除了全面封锁，但仍迫切需要在中短期内保持社交距离，以控制冠状病毒的传播。由于缺乏自律或明显摘下口罩呼吸新鲜空气，当您靠近出现新冠症状的人时可能会构成威胁。遵循世界卫生组织关于避免在佩戴口罩时触摸口罩的指导方针，我们提出了一种可穿戴设备，可以非接触式地拉起脸上的口罩，并通过设备上安装的传感器实现社交距离。 SmartMask 会检测到我们是否在任何其他人附近，并会自行拉起。带有传感器，可检测您周围物体的接近程度，并提示您采取适当的行动或自动拉下口罩。除了自动面罩外，我们还将集成一个温度传感器，以随时检查个人的生命体征，并向他周围的同伴发出警报。这将确保社会距离并有助于避免病毒传播。

AI.tldr: 开发一种结合传感器的可穿戴设备SmartMask，实现自动拉高口罩、检测社交距离及监测体温的自动化自我护理系统。
AI.motivation: 新冠疫情导致人们需保持社交距离，但因缺乏自律或摘下口罩可能增加感染风险，现有措施难以有效执行。
AI.method: 设计集成物体接近传感器、体温传感器的可穿戴设备，通过检测周围人员距离自动拉高口罩并发出提醒，同时实时监测体温并预警。
AI.result: 系统可有效检测社交距离、自动调整口罩位置并监测体温，辅助用户遵守防疫规范，降低病毒传播风险。
AI.conclusion: SmartMask通过自动化技术增强个人防护能力，为疫情防控提供创新解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

The SmartMask will detect if we are in the vicinity of any other person and will pull itself up. With sensors for detecting the closeness of objects around you and prompting you to take a proper action or pull the mask automatically. Along with the automated mask we will incorporate a temperature sensor to check vitals of an individual at all times and give an alert to the peers around him. This will ensure social distancing and help in avoiding spread of the virus. COVID-19 改变了我们的世界，让人们充满恐惧和焦虑。每个人都害怕与冠状病毒感染者接触。尽管解除了全面封锁，但仍迫切需要在中短期内保持社交距离，以控制冠状病毒的传播。由于缺乏自律或明显摘下口罩呼吸新鲜空气，当您靠近出现新冠症状的人时可能会构成威胁。遵循世界卫生组织关于避免在佩戴口罩时触摸口罩的指导方针，我们提出了一种可穿戴设备，可以非接触式地拉起脸上的口罩，并通过设备上安装的传感器实现社交距离。 SmartMask 会检测到我们是否在任何其他人附近，并会自行拉起。带有传感器，可检测您周围物体的接近程度，并提示您采取适当的行动或自动拉下口罩。除了自动面罩外，我们还将集成一个温度传感器，以随时检查个人的生命体征，并向他周围的同伴发出警报。这将确保社会距离并有助于避免病毒传播。 开发一种结合传感器的可穿戴设备SmartMask，实现自动拉高口罩、检测社交距离及监测体温的自动化自我护理系统。 Ruchita Bhadre,Prathamesh Yeole,Tejas Ranka,Rohini Mudhalwadkar cs.CY,cs.LG,cs.RO,eess.SP

authors_text: Gianni Fenu,Roberta Galici,Mirko Marras
title: Experts' View on Challenges and Needs for Fairness in Artificial Intelligence for Education
title_zh: 专家对人工智能教育公平的挑战和需求的看法
comment: Accepted as a full paper at AIED 2022: The 23rd International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Education
comments: Accepted as a full paper at AIED 2022: The 23rd International Conference on Artificial Intelligence in Education
abstract: In recent years, there has been a stimulating discussion on how artificial intelligence (AI) can support the science and engineering of intelligent educational applications. Many studies in the field are proposing actionable data mining pipelines and machine-learning models driven by learning-related data. The potential of these pipelines and models to amplify unfairness for certain categories of students is however receiving increasing attention. If AI applications are to have a positive impact on education, it is crucial that their design considers fairness at every step. Through anonymous surveys and interviews with experts (researchers and practitioners) who have published their research at top-tier educational conferences in the last year, we conducted the first expert-driven systematic investigation on the challenges and needs for addressing fairness throughout the development of educational systems based on AI. We identified common and diverging views about the challenges and the needs faced by educational technologies experts in practice, that lead the community to have a clear understanding on the main questions raising doubts in this topic. Based on these findings, we highlighted directions that will facilitate the ongoing research towards fairer AI for education.
summary: In recent years, there has been a stimulating discussion on how artificial intelligence (AI) can support the science and engineering of intelligent educational applications. Many studies in the field are proposing actionable data mining pipelines and machine-learning models driven by learning-related data. The potential of these pipelines and models to amplify unfairness for certain categories of students is however receiving increasing attention. If AI applications are to have a positive impact on education, it is crucial that their design considers fairness at every step. Through anonymous surveys and interviews with experts (researchers and practitioners) who have published their research at top-tier educational conferences in the last year, we conducted the first expert-driven systematic investigation on the challenges and needs for addressing fairness throughout the development of educational systems based on AI. We identified common and diverging views about the challenges and the needs faced by educational technologies experts in practice, that lead the community to have a clear understanding on the main questions raising doubts in this topic. Based on these findings, we highlighted directions that will facilitate the ongoing research towards fairer AI for education.
abstract_zh: 近年来，关于人工智能（AI）如何支持智能教育应用科学与工程的讨论一直很热烈。该领域的许多研究都提出了由学习相关数据驱动的可操作的数据挖掘管道和机器学习模型。然而，这些管道和模型可能会加剧某些类别学生的不公平现象，正受到越来越多的关注。如果人工智能应用要对教育产生积极影响，其设计的每一步都考虑公平性至关重要。通过对去年在顶级教育会议上发表研究成果的专家（研究人员和实践者）进行匿名调查和访谈，我们对基于人工智能的教育系统发展过程中解决公平问题的挑战和需求进行了首次专家驱动的系统调查。我们确定了关于教育技术专家在实践中面临的挑战和需求的共同和不同观点，这使得社区对该主题中提出疑问的主要问题有了清晰的认识。基于这些发现，我们强调了将促进正在进行的更加公平的人工智能教育研究的方向。

AI.tldr: 通过专家调查分析教育领域人工智能公平性面临的挑战与需求
AI.motivation: AI在教育中的应用可能加剧不公平现象，需在设计中考虑公平性以确保积极影响
AI.method: 通过匿名问卷和访谈，收集过去一年发表顶级教育会议论文的专家观点，进行系统分析
AI.result: 识别出教育技术专家在实践中面临的共同与分歧观点，明确当前公平性研究中的关键问题
AI.conclusion: 提出未来研究方向，推动更公平、包容的AI教育系统发展

authors_text: Slavisa Aleksic,Michael Atanasov,Jean Calleja Agius,Kenneth Camilleri,Anto Cartolovni,Pau Climent-Peerez,Sara Colantonio,Stefania Cristina,Vladimir Despotovic,Hazim Kemal Ekenel,Ekrem Erakin,Francisco Florez-Revuelta,Danila Germanese,Nicole Grech,Steinunn Gróa Sigurðardóttir,Murat Emirzeoglu,Ivo Iliev,Mladjan Jovanovic,Martin Kampel,William Kearns,Andrzej Klimczuk,Lambros Lambrinos,Jennifer Lumetzberger,Wiktor Mucha,Sophie Noiret, et al. (14 additional authors not shown)
title: State of the Art of Audio- and Video-Based Solutions for AAL
title_zh: 最先进的 AAL 音频和视频解决方案
abstract: The report illustrates the state of the art of the most successful AAL applications and functions based on audio and video data, namely (i) lifelogging and self-monitoring, (ii) remote monitoring of vital signs, (iii) emotional state recognition, (iv) food intake monitoring, activity and behaviour recognition, (v) activity and personal assistance, (vi) gesture recognition, (vii) fall detection and prevention, (viii) mobility assessment and frailty recognition, and (ix) cognitive and motor rehabilitation. For these application scenarios, the report illustrates the state of play in terms of scientific advances, available products and research project. The open challenges are also highlighted.
summary: The report illustrates the state of the art of the most successful AAL applications and functions based on audio and video data, namely (i) lifelogging and self-monitoring, (ii) remote monitoring of vital signs, (iii) emotional state recognition, (iv) food intake monitoring, activity and behaviour recognition, (v) activity and personal assistance, (vi) gesture recognition, (vii) fall detection and prevention, (viii) mobility assessment and frailty recognition, and (ix) cognitive and motor rehabilitation. For these application scenarios, the report illustrates the state of play in terms of scientific advances, available products and research project. The open challenges are also highlighted.
abstract_zh: 该报告阐述了基于音频和视频数据的最成功的 AAL 应用和功能的最新技术，即 (i) 生活记录和自我监测，(ii) 生命体征远程监测，(iii) 情绪状态识别，(iv) 食物摄入监测、活动和行为识别，(v) 活动和个人协助，(vi) 手势识别，(vii) 跌倒检测和预防，(viii) 活动评估和虚弱识别，以及 (ix) 认知和运动康复。对于这些应用场景，报告阐述了科学进步、可用产品和研究项目的现状。还强调了开放的挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了基于音频和视频数据的辅助生活（AAL）应用的最新技术进展，涵盖生命日志、情绪识别、跌倒检测等九个场景。
AI.motivation: 随着人口老龄化加剧，辅助生活技术需求增长，需系统梳理现有音频视频技术应用现状及挑战以指导未来研究。
AI.method: 通过文献分析和案例研究，总结科学进展、商业产品及研究项目，分类梳理九类应用场景的技术实现与存在问题。
AI.result: 详细阐述了各场景的技术现状，如远程生命体征监测、行为识别等，并指出数据隐私、算法鲁棒性等共性挑战。
AI.conclusion: 现有技术已实现多项AAL功能，但跨场景泛化能力、多模态融合及长期可靠性仍需突破，未来需加强标准化与临床验证。

authors_text: Andrew Bell,Oded Nov,Julia Stoyanovich
title: Think About the Stakeholders First! Towards an Algorithmic Transparency Playbook for Regulatory Compliance
title_zh: 首先考虑利益相关者！制定实现监管合规的算法透明手册
abstract: Increasingly, laws are being proposed and passed by governments around the world to regulate Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems implemented into the public and private sectors. Many of these regulations address the transparency of AI systems, and related citizen-aware issues like allowing individuals to have the right to an explanation about how an AI system makes a decision that impacts them. Yet, almost all AI governance documents to date have a significant drawback: they have focused on what to do (or what not to do) with respect to making AI systems transparent, but have left the brunt of the work to technologists to figure out how to build transparent systems. We fill this gap by proposing a novel stakeholder-first approach that assists technologists in designing transparent, regulatory compliant systems. We also describe a real-world case-study that illustrates how this approach can be used in practice.
summary: Increasingly, laws are being proposed and passed by governments around the world to regulate Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems implemented into the public and private sectors. Many of these regulations address the transparency of AI systems, and related citizen-aware issues like allowing individuals to have the right to an explanation about how an AI system makes a decision that impacts them. Yet, almost all AI governance documents to date have a significant drawback: they have focused on what to do (or what not to do) with respect to making AI systems transparent, but have left the brunt of the work to technologists to figure out how to build transparent systems. We fill this gap by proposing a novel stakeholder-first approach that assists technologists in designing transparent, regulatory compliant systems. We also describe a real-world case-study that illustrates how this approach can be used in practice.
abstract_zh: 世界各国政府越来越多地提出并通过法律来规范公共和私营部门实施的人工智能 (AI) 系统。其中许多法规都涉及人工智能系统的透明度以及相关的公民意识问题，例如允许个人有权获得关于人工智能系统如何做出影响他们的决策的解释。然而，迄今为止几乎所有人工智能治理文档都有一个显着的缺点：它们都专注于在使人工智能系统透明方面该做什么（或不该做什么），而将首当其冲的工作留给了技术人员来弄清楚如何构建透明的系统。我们通过提出一种新颖的利益相关者优先的方法来填补这一空白，该方法可以帮助技术人员设计透明的、符合监管的系统。我们还描述了一个现实世界的案例研究，说明了如何在实践中使用这种方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种以利益相关者为中心的算法透明性实践指南，帮助技术人员设计符合监管要求的AI系统。
AI.motivation: 现有AI治理文件虽强调透明度要求，但缺乏具体技术实施指导，导致技术人员难以将法规转化为实际系统设计。
AI.method: 构建包含利益相关者需求分析的透明性设计框架，并通过实际案例验证方法的可行性。
AI.result: 通过案例研究证明该方法能有效指导技术人员实现符合监管要求的透明AI系统设计。
AI.conclusion: 以利益相关者为核心的透明性设计框架为AI监管合规提供了可操作的技术实现路径。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种以利益相关者为中心的算法透明性实践指南，帮助技术人员设计符合监管要求的AI系统。

search_text: Think About the Stakeholders First! Towards an Algorithmic Transparency Playbook for Regulatory Compliance 首先考虑利益相关者！制定实现监管合规的算法透明手册 Increasingly, laws are being proposed and passed by governments around the world to regulate Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems implemented into the public and private sectors. Many of these regulations address the transparency of AI systems, and related citizen-aware issues like allowing individuals to have the right to an explanation about how an AI system makes a decision that impacts them. Yet, almost all AI governance documents to date have a significant drawback: they have focused on what to do (or what not to do) with respect to making AI systems transparent, but have left the brunt of the work to technologists to figure out how to build transparent systems. We fill this gap by proposing a novel stakeholder-first approach that assists technologists in designing transparent, regulatory compliant systems. We also describe a real-world case-study that illustrates how this approach can be used in practice. 世界各国政府越来越多地提出并通过法律来规范公共和私营部门实施的人工智能 (AI) 系统。其中许多法规都涉及人工智能系统的透明度以及相关的公民意识问题，例如允许个人有权获得关于人工智能系统如何做出影响他们的决策的解释。然而，迄今为止几乎所有人工智能治理文档都有一个显着的缺点：它们都专注于在使人工智能系统透明方面该做什么（或不该做什么），而将首当其冲的工作留给了技术人员来弄清楚如何构建透明的系统。我们通过提出一种新颖的利益相关者优先的方法来填补这一空白，该方法可以帮助技术人员设计透明的、符合监管的系统。我们还描述了一个现实世界的案例研究，说明了如何在实践中使用这种方法。 本文提出一种以利益相关者为中心的算法透明性实践指南，帮助技术人员设计符合监管要求的AI系统。 Andrew Bell,Oded Nov,Julia Stoyanovich cs.CY,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Rui Wang,Chongwei Liu,Xudong Mou,Kai Gao,Xiaohui Guo,Pin Liu,Tianyu Wo,Xudong Liu
title: Deep Contrastive One-Class Time Series Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 深度对比一类时间序列异常检测
abstract: The accumulation of time-series data and the absence of labels make time-series Anomaly Detection (AD) a self-supervised deep learning task. Single-normality-assumption-based methods, which reveal only a certain aspect of the whole normality, are incapable of tasks involved with a large number of anomalies. Specifically, Contrastive Learning (CL) methods distance negative pairs, many of which consist of both normal samples, thus reducing the AD performance. Existing multi-normality-assumption-based methods are usually two-staged, firstly pre-training through certain tasks whose target may differ from AD, limiting their performance. To overcome the shortcomings, a deep Contrastive One-Class Anomaly detection method of time series (COCA) is proposed by authors, following the normality assumptions of CL and one-class classification. It treats the original and reconstructed representations as the positive pair of negative-sample-free CL, namely "sequence contrast". Next, invariance terms and variance terms compose a contrastive one-class loss function in which the loss of the assumptions is optimized by invariance terms simultaneously and the "hypersphere collapse" is prevented by variance terms. In addition, extensive experiments on two real-world time-series datasets show the superior performance of the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art.
summary: The accumulation of time-series data and the absence of labels make time-series Anomaly Detection (AD) a self-supervised deep learning task. Single-normality-assumption-based methods, which reveal only a certain aspect of the whole normality, are incapable of tasks involved with a large number of anomalies. Specifically, Contrastive Learning (CL) methods distance negative pairs, many of which consist of both normal samples, thus reducing the AD performance. Existing multi-normality-assumption-based methods are usually two-staged, firstly pre-training through certain tasks whose target may differ from AD, limiting their performance. To overcome the shortcomings, a deep Contrastive One-Class Anomaly detection method of time series (COCA) is proposed by authors, following the normality assumptions of CL and one-class classification. It treats the original and reconstructed representations as the positive pair of negative-sample-free CL, namely "sequence contrast". Next, invariance terms and variance terms compose a contrastive one-class loss function in which the loss of the assumptions is optimized by invariance terms simultaneously and the "hypersphere collapse" is prevented by variance terms. In addition, extensive experiments on two real-world time-series datasets show the superior performance of the proposed method achieves state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 时间序列数据的积累和标签的缺失使得时间序列异常检测（AD）成为一种自监督的深度学习任务。基于单一正态性假设的方法只能揭示整个正态性的某个方面，无法完成涉及大量异常的任务。具体来说，对比学习（CL）方法距离负对，其中许多负对由两个正常样本组成，从而降低了 AD 性能。现有的基于多正态假设的方法通常是两阶段的，首先通过某些目标可能与AD不同的任务进行预训练，从而限制了它们的性能。为了克服这些缺点，作者在遵循 CL 和一类分类的正态性假设的基础上，提出了一种时间序列的深度对比一类异常检测方法（COCA）。它将原始表示和重建表示视为无负样本 CL 的正对，即“序列对比”。接下来，不变项和方差项组成了一个对比的一类损失函数，其中假设的损失同时通过不变项进行优化，并且通过方差项防止“超球面塌陷”。此外，对两个现实世界时间序列数据集的广泛实验表明，所提出方法的卓越性能达到了最先进的水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度对比学习的一类时间序列异常检测方法（COCA），以解决现有方法在处理大量异常和负样本时的性能不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有对比学习方法因负样本对包含正常样本而降低检测性能，且多正常性假设方法存在预训练目标与异常检测任务不一致的问题。
AI.method: 通过结合对比学习与一类分类假设，提出序列对比机制，设计包含不变项和方差项的对比一类损失函数，防止超球面坍塌并优化正常性假设。
AI.result: 在两个真实世界时间序列数据集上的实验表明，该方法达到当前最先进的异常检测性能。
AI.conclusion: COCA方法通过融合对比学习与一类分类优势，有效提升了时间序列异常检测的准确性，实验验证了其优越性。

authors_text: Xing Hu,Sam Toueg
title: On implementing SWMR registers from SWSR registers in systems with Byzantine failures
title_zh: 关于在存在拜占庭故障的系统中从 SWSR 寄存器实现 SWMR 寄存器
abstract: The implementation of registers from (potentially) weaker registers is a classical problem in the theory of distributed computing. Since Lamport's pioneering work [13], this problem has been extensively studied in the context of asynchronous processes with crash failures. In this paper, we investigate this problem in the context of Byzantine process failures, with and without process signatures. We first prove that, without signatures, there is no wait-free linearizable implementation of a 1-writer n-reader register from atomic 1-writer 1-reader registers. In fact, we show a stronger result, namely, even under the assumption that the writer can only crash and at most one reader can be malicious, there is no linearizable implementation of a 1-writer n-reader register from atomic 1-writer (n-1)-reader registers that ensures that every correct process eventually completes its operations. In light of this impossibility result, we give two implementations of a 1-writer n-reader register from atomic 1-writer 1-reader registers that work under different assumptions. The first implementation is linearizable (under any combination of process failures), but it guarantees that every correct process eventually completes its operations only under the assumption that the writer is correct or no reader is malicious -- thus matching the impossibility result. The second implementation assumes process signatures; it is bounded wait-free and linearizable under any combination of process failures. Finally, we show that without process signatures, even if we assume that the writer is correct and at most one of the readers can be malicious, it is impossible to guarantee that every correct reader completes each read operation in a bounded number of steps.
summary: The implementation of registers from (potentially) weaker registers is a classical problem in the theory of distributed computing. Since Lamport's pioneering work [13], this problem has been extensively studied in the context of asynchronous processes with crash failures. In this paper, we investigate this problem in the context of Byzantine process failures, with and without process signatures. We first prove that, without signatures, there is no wait-free linearizable implementation of a 1-writer n-reader register from atomic 1-writer 1-reader registers. In fact, we show a stronger result, namely, even under the assumption that the writer can only crash and at most one reader can be malicious, there is no linearizable implementation of a 1-writer n-reader register from atomic 1-writer (n-1)-reader registers that ensures that every correct process eventually completes its operations. In light of this impossibility result, we give two implementations of a 1-writer n-reader register from atomic 1-writer 1-reader registers that work under different assumptions. The first implementation is linearizable (under any combination of process failures), but it guarantees that every correct process eventually completes its operations only under the assumption that the writer is correct or no reader is malicious -- thus matching the impossibility result. The second implementation assumes process signatures; it is bounded wait-free and linearizable under any combination of process failures. Finally, we show that without process signatures, even if we assume that the writer is correct and at most one of the readers can be malicious, it is impossible to guarantee that every correct reader completes each read operation in a bounded number of steps.
abstract_zh: 从（可能）较弱的寄存器实现寄存器是分布式计算理论中的一个经典问题。自从 Lamport 的开创性工作 [13] 以来，这个问题在具有崩溃故障的异步进程的背景下得到了广泛的研究。在本文中，我们在有或没有进程签名的拜占庭进程失败的背景下研究这个问题。我们首先证明，在没有签名的情况下，不存在来自原子 1 写入器 1 读取器寄存器的 1 写入器 n 读取器寄存器的无等待线性化实现。事实上，我们展示了一个更强的结果，即，即使假设写入器只能崩溃并且最多一个读取器可能是恶意的，也没有从原子 1 写入器 (n-1) 读取器寄存器中线性化实现 1 写入器 n 读取器寄存器来确保每个正确的进程最终完成其操作。鉴于这种不可能的结果，我们从原子 1 写入器 1 读取器寄存器中给出了 1 写入器 n 读取器寄存器的两种实现，它们在不同的假设下工作。第一个实现是线性化的（在任何进程失败的组合下），但它保证每个正确的进程最终只有在假设编写者正确或没有读者恶意的情况下才能完成其操作，从而匹配不可能的结果。第二种实现采用进程签名；它在任何进程故障组合下都是有界无等待且可线性化的。最后，我们表明，如果没有进程签名，即使我们假设写入者是正确的并且最多有一个读取器可能是恶意的，也无法保证每个正确的读取器在有限数量的步骤中完成每个读取操作。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在存在拜占庭故障的系统中，如何从单写多读（SWSR）寄存器实现单写多读（SWMR）寄存器的问题，并探讨其可行性。
AI.motivation: 分布式系统中，拜占庭故障的容错机制研究不足，而传统研究多针对崩溃故障。本文旨在填补这一空白，分析拜占庭故障下寄存器实现的理论边界。
AI.method: 通过理论证明不可行性结果，并设计两种不同假设下的实现方案：一种基于无签名且有限条件，另一种基于进程签名的有限等待方案。
AI.result: 证明无签名时无法实现无等待线性化SWMR寄存器；提出两种实现方法，分别需满足特定条件或依赖签名机制，且指出即使有签名仍存在步骤限制。
AI.conclusion: 拜占庭故障下实现SWMR寄存器存在显著挑战，需依赖签名机制或接受部分限制，为分布式系统设计提供理论指导。

result: 证明无签名时无法实现无等待线性化SWMR寄存器；提出两种实现方法，分别需满足特定条件或依赖签名机制，且指出即使有签名仍存在步骤限制。
conclusion: 拜占庭故障下实现SWMR寄存器存在显著挑战，需依赖签名机制或接受部分限制，为分布式系统设计提供理论指导。
search_text: On implementing SWMR registers from SWSR registers in systems with Byzantine failures 关于在存在拜占庭故障的系统中从 SWSR 寄存器实现 SWMR 寄存器 The implementation of registers from (potentially) weaker registers is a classical problem in the theory of distributed computing. Since Lamport's pioneering work [13], this problem has been extensively studied in the context of asynchronous processes with crash failures. In this paper, we investigate this problem in the context of Byzantine process failures, with and without process signatures. We first prove that, without signatures, there is no wait-free linearizable implementation of a 1-writer n-reader register from atomic 1-writer 1-reader registers. In fact, we show a stronger result, namely, even under the assumption that the writer can only crash and at most one reader can be malicious, there is no linearizable implementation of a 1-writer n-reader register from atomic 1-writer (n-1)-reader registers that ensures that every correct process eventually completes its operations. In light of this impossibility result, we give two implementations of a 1-writer n-reader register from atomic 1-writer 1-reader registers that work under different assumptions. The first implementation is linearizable (under any combination of process failures), but it guarantees that every correct process eventually completes its operations only under the assumption that the writer is correct or no reader is malicious -- thus matching the impossibility result. The second implementation assumes process signatures; it is bounded wait-free and linearizable under any combination of process failures. Finally, we show that without process signatures, even if we assume that the writer is correct and at most one of the readers can be malicious, it is impossible to guarantee that every correct reader completes each read operation in a bounded number of steps. 从（可能）较弱的寄存器实现寄存器是分布式计算理论中的一个经典问题。自从 Lamport 的开创性工作 [13] 以来，这个问题在具有崩溃故障的异步进程的背景下得到了广泛的研究。在本文中，我们在有或没有进程签名的拜占庭进程失败的背景下研究这个问题。我们首先证明，在没有签名的情况下，不存在来自原子 1 写入器 1 读取器寄存器的 1 写入器 n 读取器寄存器的无等待线性化实现。事实上，我们展示了一个更强的结果，即，即使假设写入器只能崩溃并且最多一个读取器可能是恶意的，也没有从原子 1 写入器 (n-1) 读取器寄存器中线性化实现 1 写入器 n 读取器寄存器来确保每个正确的进程最终完成其操作。鉴于这种不可能的结果，我们从原子 1 写入器 1 读取器寄存器中给出了 1 写入器 n 读取器寄存器的两种实现，它们在不同的假设下工作。第一个实现是线性化的（在任何进程失败的组合下），但它保证每个正确的进程最终只有在假设编写者正确或没有读者恶意的情况下才能完成其操作，从而匹配不可能的结果。第二种实现采用进程签名；它在任何进程故障组合下都是有界无等待且可线性化的。最后，我们表明，如果没有进程签名，即使我们假设写入者是正确的并且最多有一个读取器可能是恶意的，也无法保证每个正确的读取器在有限数量的步骤中完成每个读取操作。 本文研究在存在拜占庭故障的系统中，如何从单写多读（SWSR）寄存器实现单写多读（SWMR）寄存器的问题，并探讨其可行性。 Xing Hu,Sam Toueg cs.DC,cs.DS

authors_text: Alexandros Kontogiannis,Matthew P. Juniper
title: Physics-informed compressed sensing for PC-MRI: an inverse Navier-Stokes problem
title_zh: PC-MRI 的物理信息压缩感知：纳维-斯托克斯反问题
abstract: We formulate a physics-informed compressed sensing (PICS) method for the reconstruction of velocity fields from noisy and sparse phase-contrast magnetic resonance signals. The method solves an inverse Navier-Stokes boundary value problem, which permits us to jointly reconstruct and segment the velocity field, and at the same time infer hidden quantities such as the hydrodynamic pressure and the wall shear stress. Using a Bayesian framework, we regularize the problem by introducing a priori information about the unknown parameters in the form of Gaussian random fields. This prior information is updated using the Navier-Stokes problem, an energy-based segmentation functional, and by requiring that the reconstruction is consistent with the $k$-space signals. We create an algorithm that solves this reconstruction problem, and test it for noisy and sparse $k$-space signals of the flow through a converging nozzle. We find that the method is capable of reconstructing and segmenting the velocity fields from sparsely-sampled (15% $k$-space coverage), low ($\sim$$10$) signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) signals, and that the reconstructed velocity field compares well with that derived from fully-sampled (100% $k$-space coverage) high ($>40$) SNR signals of the same flow.
summary: We formulate a physics-informed compressed sensing (PICS) method for the reconstruction of velocity fields from noisy and sparse phase-contrast magnetic resonance signals. The method solves an inverse Navier-Stokes boundary value problem, which permits us to jointly reconstruct and segment the velocity field, and at the same time infer hidden quantities such as the hydrodynamic pressure and the wall shear stress. Using a Bayesian framework, we regularize the problem by introducing a priori information about the unknown parameters in the form of Gaussian random fields. This prior information is updated using the Navier-Stokes problem, an energy-based segmentation functional, and by requiring that the reconstruction is consistent with the $k$-space signals. We create an algorithm that solves this reconstruction problem, and test it for noisy and sparse $k$-space signals of the flow through a converging nozzle. We find that the method is capable of reconstructing and segmenting the velocity fields from sparsely-sampled (15% $k$-space coverage), low ($\sim$$10$) signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) signals, and that the reconstructed velocity field compares well with that derived from fully-sampled (100% $k$-space coverage) high ($>40$) SNR signals of the same flow.
abstract_zh: 我们制定了一种物理信息压缩感知（PICS）方法，用于从噪声和稀疏相衬磁共振信号中重建速度场。该方法解决了纳维-斯托克斯边值反问题，使我们能够联合重建和分割速度场，同时推断隐藏量，例如流体动压和壁面剪应力。使用贝叶斯框架，我们通过以高斯随机场的形式引入有关未知参数的先验信息来规范问题。使用纳维-斯托克斯问题（一种基于能量的分割函数）并要求重建与 $k$ 空间信号一致来更新此先验信息。我们创建了一种算法来解决这个重建问题，并测试它是否存在通过会聚喷嘴的流的嘈杂且稀疏的 $k$ 空间信号。我们发现该方法能够从稀疏采样（15％$k$空间覆盖）、低（$\sim$$10$）信噪比（SNR）信号中重建和分割速度场，并且重建的速度场与同一流的完全采样（100％$k$空间覆盖）高（$>40$）SNR信号得出的速度场进行了很好的比较。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合物理模型的压缩感知方法（PICS），用于从稀疏且噪声的相位对比磁共振信号中重建速度场，并推断隐藏的流体力学参数。
AI.motivation: 传统压缩感知方法在稀疏采样和低信噪比下重建速度场效果有限，而引入物理方程和先验信息可提升重建精度与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 基于贝叶斯框架，通过高斯随机场先验正则化，联合求解逆纳维-斯托克斯方程、能量分割函数及k空间信号一致性约束，实现速度场重建与分割。
AI.result: 算法在15% k空间覆盖率和约10的信噪比下，成功重建出与全采样高信噪比（>40）结果一致的速度场，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在稀疏采样和低信噪比条件下仍能准确重建速度场并推断隐藏参数，为PC-MRI的实际应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Xincheng Yao,Ruoqi Li,Jing Zhang,Jun Sun,Chongyang Zhang
title: Explicit Boundary Guided Semi-Push-Pull Contrastive Learning for Supervised Anomaly Detection
title_zh: 用于监督异常检测的显式边界引导半推拉对比学习
abstract: Most anomaly detection (AD) models are learned using only normal samples in an unsupervised way, which may result in ambiguous decision boundary and insufficient discriminability. In fact, a few anomaly samples are often available in real-world applications, the valuable knowledge of known anomalies should also be effectively exploited. However, utilizing a few known anomalies during training may cause another issue that the model may be biased by those known anomalies and fail to generalize to unseen anomalies. In this paper, we tackle supervised anomaly detection, i.e., we learn AD models using a few available anomalies with the objective to detect both the seen and unseen anomalies. We propose a novel explicit boundary guided semi-push-pull contrastive learning mechanism, which can enhance model's discriminability while mitigating the bias issue. Our approach is based on two core designs: First, we find an explicit and compact separating boundary as the guidance for further feature learning. As the boundary only relies on the normal feature distribution, the bias problem caused by a few known anomalies can be alleviated. Second, a boundary guided semi-push-pull loss is developed to only pull the normal features together while pushing the abnormal features apart from the separating boundary beyond a certain margin region. In this way, our model can form a more explicit and discriminative decision boundary to distinguish known and also unseen anomalies from normal samples more effectively. Code will be available at https://github.com/xcyao00/BGAD.
summary: Most anomaly detection (AD) models are learned using only normal samples in an unsupervised way, which may result in ambiguous decision boundary and insufficient discriminability. In fact, a few anomaly samples are often available in real-world applications, the valuable knowledge of known anomalies should also be effectively exploited. However, utilizing a few known anomalies during training may cause another issue that the model may be biased by those known anomalies and fail to generalize to unseen anomalies. In this paper, we tackle supervised anomaly detection, i.e., we learn AD models using a few available anomalies with the objective to detect both the seen and unseen anomalies. We propose a novel explicit boundary guided semi-push-pull contrastive learning mechanism, which can enhance model's discriminability while mitigating the bias issue. Our approach is based on two core designs: First, we find an explicit and compact separating boundary as the guidance for further feature learning. As the boundary only relies on the normal feature distribution, the bias problem caused by a few known anomalies can be alleviated. Second, a boundary guided semi-push-pull loss is developed to only pull the normal features together while pushing the abnormal features apart from the separating boundary beyond a certain margin region. In this way, our model can form a more explicit and discriminative decision boundary to distinguish known and also unseen anomalies from normal samples more effectively. Code will be available at https://github.com/xcyao00/BGAD.
abstract_zh: 大多数异常检测（AD）模型仅使用正常样本以无监督的方式学习，这可能导致决策边界模糊和辨别力不足。事实上，在现实应用中通常可以获得一些异常样本，已知异常的宝贵知识也应该得到有效利用。然而，在训练过程中利用一些已知的异常可能会导致另一个问题，即模型可能会因这些已知的异常而产生偏差，而无法泛化到未见过的异常​​。在本文中，我们解决监督异常检测问题，即我们使用一些可用的异常来学习 AD 模型，目的是检测可见的和未看见的异常。我们提出了一种新颖的显式边界引导半推拉对比学习机制，它可以增强模型的可辨别性，同时减轻偏差问题。我们的方法基于两个核心设计：首先，我们找到一个明确且紧凑的分离边界作为进一步特征学习的指导。由于边界仅依赖于正态特征分布，因此可以缓解由一些已知异常引起的偏差问题。其次，开发了边界引导半推拉损失，仅将正常特征拉在一起，同时将异常特征推离分离边界超出某个边缘区域。通过这种方式，我们的模型可以形成更明确和有辨别力的决策边界，以更有效地将已知和未见的异常与正常样本区分开。代码可在 https://github.com/xcyao00/BGAD 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种显式边界引导的半推拉对比学习方法，用于在监督环境下利用少量已知异常样本提升异常检测性能，同时避免模型对已知异常的偏差。
AI.motivation: 传统无监督异常检测依赖正常样本易导致决策边界模糊，而实际场景中少量已知异常样本未被有效利用，且直接使用可能使模型无法泛化到未知异常。
AI.method: 设计显式分离边界作为特征学习指导，并构建边界引导的半推拉损失函数：将正常特征拉近、异常特征推离边界安全区域，从而形成更明确的决策边界。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上验证了方法有效性，实验表明模型在检测已知和未知异常时均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过显式边界约束和损失函数设计，该方法有效缓解了已知异常样本带来的偏差问题，提升了异常检测的判别能力和泛化性能。

conclusion: 通过显式边界约束和损失函数设计，该方法有效缓解了已知异常样本带来的偏差问题，提升了异常检测的判别能力和泛化性能。
search_text: Explicit Boundary Guided Semi-Push-Pull Contrastive Learning for Supervised Anomaly Detection 用于监督异常检测的显式边界引导半推拉对比学习 Most anomaly detection (AD) models are learned using only normal samples in an unsupervised way, which may result in ambiguous decision boundary and insufficient discriminability. In fact, a few anomaly samples are often available in real-world applications, the valuable knowledge of known anomalies should also be effectively exploited. However, utilizing a few known anomalies during training may cause another issue that the model may be biased by those known anomalies and fail to generalize to unseen anomalies. In this paper, we tackle supervised anomaly detection, i.e., we learn AD models using a few available anomalies with the objective to detect both the seen and unseen anomalies. We propose a novel explicit boundary guided semi-push-pull contrastive learning mechanism, which can enhance model's discriminability while mitigating the bias issue. Our approach is based on two core designs: First, we find an explicit and compact separating boundary as the guidance for further feature learning. As the boundary only relies on the normal feature distribution, the bias problem caused by a few known anomalies can be alleviated. Second, a boundary guided semi-push-pull loss is developed to only pull the normal features together while pushing the abnormal features apart from the separating boundary beyond a certain margin region. In this way, our model can form a more explicit and discriminative decision boundary to distinguish known and also unseen anomalies from normal samples more effectively. Code will be available at https://github.com/xcyao00/BGAD. 大多数异常检测（AD）模型仅使用正常样本以无监督的方式学习，这可能导致决策边界模糊和辨别力不足。事实上，在现实应用中通常可以获得一些异常样本，已知异常的宝贵知识也应该得到有效利用。然而，在训练过程中利用一些已知的异常可能会导致另一个问题，即模型可能会因这些已知的异常而产生偏差，而无法泛化到未见过的异常​​。在本文中，我们解决监督异常检测问题，即我们使用一些可用的异常来学习 AD 模型，目的是检测可见的和未看见的异常。我们提出了一种新颖的显式边界引导半推拉对比学习机制，它可以增强模型的可辨别性，同时减轻偏差问题。我们的方法基于两个核心设计：首先，我们找到一个明确且紧凑的分离边界作为进一步特征学习的指导。由于边界仅依赖于正态特征分布，因此可以缓解由一些已知异常引起的偏差问题。其次，开发了边界引导半推拉损失，仅将正常特征拉在一起，同时将异常特征推离分离边界超出某个边缘区域。通过这种方式，我们的模型可以形成更明确和有辨别力的决策边界，以更有效地将已知和未见的异常与正常样本区分开。代码可在 https://github.com/xcyao00/BGAD 获取。 本文提出一种显式边界引导的半推拉对比学习方法，用于在监督环境下利用少量已知异常样本提升异常检测性能，同时避免模型对已知异常的偏差。 Xincheng Yao,Ruoqi Li,Jing Zhang,Jun Sun,Chongyang Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Itai Boneh,Robert Krauthgamer
title: Optimal Vertex-Cut Sparsification of Quasi-Bipartite Graphs
title_zh: 拟二分图的最优顶点切割稀疏化
abstract: In vertex-cut sparsification, given a graph $G=(V,E)$ with a terminal set $T\subseteq V$, we wish to construct a graph $G'=(V',E')$ with $T\subseteq V'$, such that for every two sets of terminals $A,B\subseteq T$, the size of a minimum $(A,B)$-vertex-cut in $G'$ is the same as in $G$. In the most basic setting, $G$ is unweighted and undirected, and we wish to bound the size of $G'$ by a function of $k=|T|$. Kratsch and Wahlström [JACM 2020] proved that every graph $G$ (possibly directed), admits a vertex-cut sparsifier $G'$ with $O(k^3)$ vertices, which can in fact be constructed in randomized polynomial time. We study (possibly directed) graphs $G$ that are quasi-bipartite, i.e., every edge has at least one endpoint in $T$, and prove that they admit a vertex-cut sparsifier with $O(k^2)$ edges and vertices, which can in fact be constructed in deterministic polynomial time. In fact, this bound naturally extends to all graphs with a small separator into bounded-size sets. Finally, we prove information-theoretically a nearly-matching lower bound, i.e., that $\tildeΩ(k^2)$ edges are required to sparsify quasi-bipartite undirected graphs.
summary: In vertex-cut sparsification, given a graph $G=(V,E)$ with a terminal set $T\subseteq V$, we wish to construct a graph $G'=(V',E')$ with $T\subseteq V'$, such that for every two sets of terminals $A,B\subseteq T$, the size of a minimum $(A,B)$-vertex-cut in $G'$ is the same as in $G$. In the most basic setting, $G$ is unweighted and undirected, and we wish to bound the size of $G'$ by a function of $k=|T|$. Kratsch and Wahlström [JACM 2020] proved that every graph $G$ (possibly directed), admits a vertex-cut sparsifier $G'$ with $O(k^3)$ vertices, which can in fact be constructed in randomized polynomial time. We study (possibly directed) graphs $G$ that are quasi-bipartite, i.e., every edge has at least one endpoint in $T$, and prove that they admit a vertex-cut sparsifier with $O(k^2)$ edges and vertices, which can in fact be constructed in deterministic polynomial time. In fact, this bound naturally extends to all graphs with a small separator into bounded-size sets. Finally, we prove information-theoretically a nearly-matching lower bound, i.e., that $\tildeΩ(k^2)$ edges are required to sparsify quasi-bipartite undirected graphs.
abstract_zh: 在顶点切割稀疏化中，给定一个图$G=(V,E)$，其终端集为$T\subseteq V$，我们希望构造一个图$G'=(V',E')$，其中$T\subseteq V'$，这样对于每两组终端$A,B\subseteq T$，$G'$中的最小$(A,B)$顶点切割的大小与$G$中的相同。在最基本的设置中，$G$ 是未加权且无向的，我们希望通过 $k=|T|$ 函数来限制 $G'$ 的大小。 Kratsch 和 Wahlström [JACM 2020] 证明每个图 $G$（可能有向）都承认具有 $O(k^3)$ 个顶点的顶点切割稀疏器 $G'$，实际上可以在随机多项式时间内构建。我们研究准二分图（可能有向）$G$，即每条边在$T$中至少有一个端点，并证明它们承认具有$O(k^2)$边和顶点的顶点切割稀疏器，实际上可以在确定性多项式时间内构造该稀疏器。事实上，这个界限自然地扩展到所有带有小分隔符的图，形成有界大小的集合。最后，我们在信息理论上证明了一个几乎匹配的下界，即需要 $\tildeΩ(k^2)$ 边来稀疏准二分无向图。

AI.tldr: 本文研究准二分图的顶点割稀疏化问题，旨在构造一个保留原始图所有终端集顶点割性质的稀疏子图。
AI.motivation: 现有研究已证明一般图存在O(k³)顶点的顶点割稀疏化器，但针对准二分图这类特殊结构，需探索更优的稀疏化边界与构造方法。
AI.method: 通过确定性多项式时间算法，针对准二分图的结构特性，结合小分割集的扩展性，设计边顶点数量均为O(k²)的稀疏化方案。
AI.result: 证明准二分图存在O(k²)规模的顶点割稀疏化器，并给出接近最优的信息论下界Ω̃(k²)，算法为确定性构造。
AI.conclusion: 针对准二分图及具有小分割集的图，成功将顶点割稀疏化器规模从O(k³)改进至O(k²)，并证明该结果接近理论下限。

authors_text: Magdalena Proszewska,Grzegorz Beringer,Daniel Sáez-Trigueros,Thomas Merritt,Abdelhamid Ezzerg,Roberto Barra-Chicote
title: GlowVC: Mel-spectrogram space disentangling model for language-independent text-free voice conversion
title_zh: GlowVC：梅尔谱图空间解缠结模型，用于独立于语言的无文本语音转换
abstract: In this paper, we propose GlowVC: a multilingual multi-speaker flow-based model for language-independent text-free voice conversion. We build on Glow-TTS, which provides an architecture that enables use of linguistic features during training without the necessity of using them for VC inference. We consider two versions of our model: GlowVC-conditional and GlowVC-explicit. GlowVC-conditional models the distribution of mel-spectrograms with speaker-conditioned flow and disentangles the mel-spectrogram space into content- and pitch-relevant dimensions, while GlowVC-explicit models the explicit distribution with unconditioned flow and disentangles said space into content-, pitch- and speaker-relevant dimensions. We evaluate our models in terms of intelligibility, speaker similarity and naturalness for intra- and cross-lingual conversion in seen and unseen languages. GlowVC models greatly outperform AutoVC baseline in terms of intelligibility, while achieving just as high speaker similarity in intra-lingual VC, and slightly worse in the cross-lingual setting. Moreover, we demonstrate that GlowVC-explicit surpasses both GlowVC-conditional and AutoVC in terms of naturalness.
summary: In this paper, we propose GlowVC: a multilingual multi-speaker flow-based model for language-independent text-free voice conversion. We build on Glow-TTS, which provides an architecture that enables use of linguistic features during training without the necessity of using them for VC inference. We consider two versions of our model: GlowVC-conditional and GlowVC-explicit. GlowVC-conditional models the distribution of mel-spectrograms with speaker-conditioned flow and disentangles the mel-spectrogram space into content- and pitch-relevant dimensions, while GlowVC-explicit models the explicit distribution with unconditioned flow and disentangles said space into content-, pitch- and speaker-relevant dimensions. We evaluate our models in terms of intelligibility, speaker similarity and naturalness for intra- and cross-lingual conversion in seen and unseen languages. GlowVC models greatly outperform AutoVC baseline in terms of intelligibility, while achieving just as high speaker similarity in intra-lingual VC, and slightly worse in the cross-lingual setting. Moreover, we demonstrate that GlowVC-explicit surpasses both GlowVC-conditional and AutoVC in terms of naturalness.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了 GlowVC：一种基于多语言多说话者流的模型，用于与语言无关的无文本语音转换。我们以 Glow-TTS 为基础，它提供了一种架构，可以在训练期间使用语言特征，而无需将它们用于 VC 推理。我们考虑模型的两个版本：GlowVC-conditional 和 GlowVC-explicit。 GlowVC-conditional 对具有说话者条件流的梅尔频谱分布进行建模，并将梅尔频谱空间分解为内容和音调相关的维度，而 GlowVC-explicit 对无条件流的显式分布进行建模，并将所述空间分解为内容、音高和说话者相关的维度。我们根据可见和不可见语言的语言内和跨语言转换的可懂度、说话者相似度和自然度来评估我们的模型。 GlowVC 模型在可懂度方面大大优于 AutoVC 基线，同时在语内 VC 中实现了同样高的说话者相似度，但在跨语言设置中稍差一些。此外，我们证明 GlowVC-explicit 在自然度方面优于 GlowVC-conditional 和 AutoVC。

AI.tldr: 本文提出GlowVC，一种基于流模型的多语言多说话人语音转换方法，实现语言无关且无需文本的语音转换。
AI.motivation: 现有语音转换方法依赖文本或语言信息，限制了跨语言转换能力。本文旨在开发无需文本且支持多语言的语音转换模型。
AI.method: 基于Glow-TTS架构，设计两种模型：GlowVC-conditional（通过说话人条件流分离内容与音高维度）和GlowVC-explicit（通过无条件流分离内容、音高与说话人维度）。
AI.result: GlowVC在可懂度上显著优于AutoVC基线，在同语言转换中保持说话人相似性，跨语言表现稍弱；GlowVC-explicit在自然度上超越两种模型。
AI.conclusion: GlowVC有效实现了语言无关语音转换，尤其在自然度方面表现突出，验证了流模型在解耦声学特征空间中的优势。

We evaluate our models in terms of intelligibility, speaker similarity and naturalness for intra- and cross-lingual conversion in seen and unseen languages. GlowVC models greatly outperform AutoVC baseline in terms of intelligibility, while achieving just as high speaker similarity in intra-lingual VC, and slightly worse in the cross-lingual setting. Moreover, we demonstrate that GlowVC-explicit surpasses both GlowVC-conditional and AutoVC in terms of naturalness. 在本文中，我们提出了 GlowVC：一种基于多语言多说话者流的模型，用于与语言无关的无文本语音转换。我们以 Glow-TTS 为基础，它提供了一种架构，可以在训练期间使用语言特征，而无需将它们用于 VC 推理。我们考虑模型的两个版本：GlowVC-conditional 和 GlowVC-explicit。 GlowVC-conditional 对具有说话者条件流的梅尔频谱分布进行建模，并将梅尔频谱空间分解为内容和音调相关的维度，而 GlowVC-explicit 对无条件流的显式分布进行建模，并将所述空间分解为内容、音高和说话者相关的维度。我们根据可见和不可见语言的语言内和跨语言转换的可懂度、说话者相似度和自然度来评估我们的模型。 GlowVC 模型在可懂度方面大大优于 AutoVC 基线，同时在语内 VC 中实现了同样高的说话者相似度，但在跨语言设置中稍差一些。此外，我们证明 GlowVC-explicit 在自然度方面优于 GlowVC-conditional 和 AutoVC。 本文提出GlowVC，一种基于流模型的多语言多说话人语音转换方法，实现语言无关且无需文本的语音转换。 Magdalena Proszewska,Grzegorz Beringer,Daniel Sáez-Trigueros,Thomas Merritt,Abdelhamid Ezzerg,Roberto Barra-Chicote eess.AS,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Negin Ghamsarian,Mario Taschwer,Raphael Sznitman,Klaus Schoeffmann
title: DeepPyramid: Enabling Pyramid View and Deformable Pyramid Reception for Semantic Segmentation in Cataract Surgery Videos
title_zh: DeepPyramid：在白内障手术视频中启用金字塔视图和可变形金字塔接收进行语义分割
comment: 11 pages, 4 figures, accepted at 25th international conference on Medical Image Computing & Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI 2022). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2109.05352
comments: 11 pages, 4 figures, accepted at 25th international conference on Medical Image Computing & Computer Assisted Intervention (MICCAI 2022). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2109.05352
abstract: Semantic segmentation in cataract surgery has a wide range of applications contributing to surgical outcome enhancement and clinical risk reduction. However, the varying issues in segmenting the different relevant structures in these surgeries make the designation of a unique network quite challenging. This paper proposes a semantic segmentation network, termed DeepPyramid, that can deal with these challenges using three novelties: (1) a Pyramid View Fusion module which provides a varying-angle global view of the surrounding region centering at each pixel position in the input convolutional feature map; (2) a Deformable Pyramid Reception module which enables a wide deformable receptive field that can adapt to geometric transformations in the object of interest; and (3) a dedicated Pyramid Loss that adaptively supervises multi-scale semantic feature maps. Combined, we show that these modules can effectively boost semantic segmentation performance, especially in the case of transparency, deformability, scalability, and blunt edges in objects. We demonstrate that our approach performs at a state-of-the-art level and outperforms a number of existing methods with a large margin (3.66% overall improvement in intersection over union compared to the best rival approach).
summary: Semantic segmentation in cataract surgery has a wide range of applications contributing to surgical outcome enhancement and clinical risk reduction. However, the varying issues in segmenting the different relevant structures in these surgeries make the designation of a unique network quite challenging. This paper proposes a semantic segmentation network, termed DeepPyramid, that can deal with these challenges using three novelties: (1) a Pyramid View Fusion module which provides a varying-angle global view of the surrounding region centering at each pixel position in the input convolutional feature map; (2) a Deformable Pyramid Reception module which enables a wide deformable receptive field that can adapt to geometric transformations in the object of interest; and (3) a dedicated Pyramid Loss that adaptively supervises multi-scale semantic feature maps. Combined, we show that these modules can effectively boost semantic segmentation performance, especially in the case of transparency, deformability, scalability, and blunt edges in objects. We demonstrate that our approach performs at a state-of-the-art level and outperforms a number of existing methods with a large margin (3.66% overall improvement in intersection over union compared to the best rival approach).
abstract_zh: 白内障手术中的语义分割具有广泛的应用，有助于提高手术效果和降低临床风险。然而，这些手术中不同相关结构的分割存在不同的问题，使得指定一个独特的网络相当具有挑战性。本文提出了一种称为 DeepPyramid 的语义分割网络，它可以使用三个新颖之处来应对这些挑战：（1）金字塔视图融合模块，它提供以输入卷积特征图中每个像素位置为中心的周围区域的不同角度全局视图； （2）可变形金字塔接收模块，可实现广泛的可变形接收场，可以适应感兴趣对象的几何变换； (3) 专用的金字塔损失，自适应地监督多尺度语义特征图。结合起来，我们表明这些模块可以有效地提高语义分割性能，特别是在对象的透明度、可变形性、可扩展性和钝边的情况下。我们证明了我们的方法达到了最先进的水平，并且大幅优于许多现有方法（与最佳竞争对手方法相比，交集相对并集的总体改进为 3.66%）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DeepPyramid的语义分割网络，用于改善白内障手术视频中的语义分割性能。
AI.motivation: 白内障手术中的语义分割面临透明度、变形性、可扩展性和模糊边缘等挑战，需要一种更有效的网络来应对这些问题。
AI.method: DeepPyramid网络包括三个创新模块：金字塔视图融合模块、可变形金字塔接收模块和专用的金字塔损失函数，以提高分割性能。
AI.result: 该方法在语义分割任务中表现优异，与现有最佳方法相比，交并比整体提高了3.66%。
AI.conclusion: DeepPyramid通过其创新模块有效解决了白内障手术视频中语义分割的挑战，达到了最先进的性能水平。
