authors_text: Jun Cen,Peng Yun,Shiwei Zhang,Junhao Cai,Di Luan,Michael Yu Wang,Ming Liu,Mingqian Tang
title: Open-world Semantic Segmentation for LIDAR Point Clouds
title_zh: LIDAR 点云的开放世界语义分割
comment: Accepted by ECCV 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2011.10033, arXiv:2109.05441 by other authors
comments: Accepted by ECCV 2022. arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2011.10033, arXiv:2109.05441 by other authors
abstract: Current methods for LIDAR semantic segmentation are not robust enough for real-world applications, e.g., autonomous driving, since it is closed-set and static. The closed-set assumption makes the network only able to output labels of trained classes, even for objects never seen before, while a static network cannot update its knowledge base according to what it has seen. Therefore, in this work, we propose the open-world semantic segmentation task for LIDAR point clouds, which aims to 1) identify both old and novel classes using open-set semantic segmentation, and 2) gradually incorporate novel objects into the existing knowledge base using incremental learning without forgetting old classes. For this purpose, we propose a REdundAncy cLassifier (REAL) framework to provide a general architecture for both the open-set semantic segmentation and incremental learning problems. The experimental results show that REAL can simultaneously achieves state-of-the-art performance in the open-set semantic segmentation task on the SemanticKITTI and nuScenes datasets, and alleviate the catastrophic forgetting problem with a large margin during incremental learning.
summary: Current methods for LIDAR semantic segmentation are not robust enough for real-world applications, e.g., autonomous driving, since it is closed-set and static. The closed-set assumption makes the network only able to output labels of trained classes, even for objects never seen before, while a static network cannot update its knowledge base according to what it has seen. Therefore, in this work, we propose the open-world semantic segmentation task for LIDAR point clouds, which aims to 1) identify both old and novel classes using open-set semantic segmentation, and 2) gradually incorporate novel objects into the existing knowledge base using incremental learning without forgetting old classes. For this purpose, we propose a REdundAncy cLassifier (REAL) framework to provide a general architecture for both the open-set semantic segmentation and incremental learning problems. The experimental results show that REAL can simultaneously achieves state-of-the-art performance in the open-set semantic segmentation task on the SemanticKITTI and nuScenes datasets, and alleviate the catastrophic forgetting problem with a large margin during incremental learning.
abstract_zh: 当前的 LIDAR 语义分割方法对于现实世界的应用（例如自动驾驶）而言不够稳健，因为它是封闭集和静态的。闭集假设使得网络只能输出经过训练的类的标签，即使对于以前从未见过的对象也是如此，而静态网络无法根据它所看到的来更新其知识库。因此，在这项工作中，我们提出了激光雷达点云的开放世界语义分割任务，其目的是1）使用开放集语义分割识别旧类和新类，2）使用增量学习逐渐将新对象纳入现有知识库而不忘记旧类。为此，我们提出了 REdundAncy 分类器（REAL）框架，为开放集语义分割和增量学习问题提供通用架构。实验结果表明，REAL可以在SemanticKITTI和nuScenes数据集上的开放集语义分割任务中同时实现state-of-the-art的性能，并大幅缓解增量学习过程中的灾难性遗忘问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出针对LIDAR点云的开放世界语义分割方法，解决现有封闭集模型无法识别新类别及更新知识库的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有LIDAR语义分割方法基于封闭集假设，无法处理未见过的新型物体，且静态模型无法动态更新知识库，限制了在自动驾驶等真实场景中的应用。
AI.method: 提出REAL框架，结合冗余分类器设计，同时实现开放集语义分割与增量学习，避免灾难性遗忘。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI和nuScenes数据集上达到开放集分割SOTA性能，并显著缓解增量学习中的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.conclusion: 通过开放世界任务定义与REAL框架，有效解决了LIDAR点云语义分割中动态增量学习与未知类别识别的挑战。

authors_text: Maximilian Brunner,Weixuan Zhang,Ahmad Roumie,Marco Tognon,Roland Siegwart
title: MPC with Learned Residual Dynamics with Application on Omnidirectional MAVs
title_zh: 具有习得残余动力学的 MPC 及其在全向 MAV 上的应用
abstract: The growing field of aerial manipulation often relies on fully actuated or omnidirectional micro aerial vehicles (OMAVs) which can apply arbitrary forces and torques while in contact with the environment. Control methods are usually based on model-free approaches, separating a high-level wrench controller from an actuator allocation. If necessary, disturbances are rejected by online disturbance observers. However, while being general, this approach often produces sub-optimal control commands and cannot incorporate constraints given by the platform design. We present two model-based approaches to control OMAVs for the task of trajectory tracking while rejecting disturbances. The first one optimizes wrench commands and compensates model errors by a model learned from experimental data. The second one optimizes low-level actuator commands, allowing to exploit an allocation nullspace and to consider constraints given by the actuator hardware. The efficacy and real-time feasibility of both approaches is shown and evaluated in real-world experiments.
summary: The growing field of aerial manipulation often relies on fully actuated or omnidirectional micro aerial vehicles (OMAVs) which can apply arbitrary forces and torques while in contact with the environment. Control methods are usually based on model-free approaches, separating a high-level wrench controller from an actuator allocation. If necessary, disturbances are rejected by online disturbance observers. However, while being general, this approach often produces sub-optimal control commands and cannot incorporate constraints given by the platform design. We present two model-based approaches to control OMAVs for the task of trajectory tracking while rejecting disturbances. The first one optimizes wrench commands and compensates model errors by a model learned from experimental data. The second one optimizes low-level actuator commands, allowing to exploit an allocation nullspace and to consider constraints given by the actuator hardware. The efficacy and real-time feasibility of both approaches is shown and evaluated in real-world experiments.
abstract_zh: 不断发展的空中操纵领域通常依赖于全驱动或全向微型飞行器 (OMAV)，它们可以在与环境接触时施加任意力和扭矩。控制方法通常基于无模型方法，将高级扳手控制器与执行器分配分开。如有必要，在线干扰观测器会拒绝干扰。然而，虽然很通用，但这种方法通常会产生次优的控制命令，并且无法纳入平台设计给出的约束。我们提出了两种基于模型的方法来控制 OMAV，以完成轨迹跟踪同时抑制干扰的任务。第一个优化扳手命令并通过从实验数据中学习的模型来补偿模型误差。第二个优化低级执行器命令，允许利用分配零空间并考虑执行器硬件给出的约束。这两种方法的有效性和实时可行性都在现实世界的实验中得到了展示和评估。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种基于模型的控制方法，用于全方位微型飞行器（OMAVs）的轨迹跟踪与抗干扰控制。
AI.motivation: 现有无模型控制方法存在控制命令次优且无法考虑平台设计约束的问题，需更高效的模型驱动方案。
AI.method: 第一种方法通过优化力矩指令并结合实验数据学习的模型补偿误差；第二种方法优化底层执行器指令，利用分配零空间并考虑硬件约束。
AI.result: 两种方法在真实实验中均验证了其有效性和实时可行性，优于传统无模型控制策略。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在轨迹跟踪与抗干扰任务中表现优异，可有效结合模型预测控制与硬件约束，适用于OMAVs实际应用。

search_text: MPC with Learned Residual Dynamics with Application on Omnidirectional MAVs 具有习得残余动力学的 MPC 及其在全向 MAV 上的应用 The growing field of aerial manipulation often relies on fully actuated or omnidirectional micro aerial vehicles (OMAVs) which can apply arbitrary forces and torques while in contact with the environment. Control methods are usually based on model-free approaches, separating a high-level wrench controller from an actuator allocation. If necessary, disturbances are rejected by online disturbance observers. However, while being general, this approach often produces sub-optimal control commands and cannot incorporate constraints given by the platform design. We present two model-based approaches to control OMAVs for the task of trajectory tracking while rejecting disturbances. The first one optimizes wrench commands and compensates model errors by a model learned from experimental data. The second one optimizes low-level actuator commands, allowing to exploit an allocation nullspace and to consider constraints given by the actuator hardware. The efficacy and real-time feasibility of both approaches is shown and evaluated in real-world experiments. 不断发展的空中操纵领域通常依赖于全驱动或全向微型飞行器 (OMAV)，它们可以在与环境接触时施加任意力和扭矩。控制方法通常基于无模型方法，将高级扳手控制器与执行器分配分开。如有必要，在线干扰观测器会拒绝干扰。然而，虽然很通用，但这种方法通常会产生次优的控制命令，并且无法纳入平台设计给出的约束。我们提出了两种基于模型的方法来控制 OMAV，以完成轨迹跟踪同时抑制干扰的任务。第一个优化扳手命令并通过从实验数据中学习的模型来补偿模型误差。第二个优化低级执行器命令，允许利用分配零空间并考虑执行器硬件给出的约束。这两种方法的有效性和实时可行性都在现实世界的实验中得到了展示和评估。 本文提出两种基于模型的控制方法，用于全方位微型飞行器（OMAVs）的轨迹跟踪与抗干扰控制。 Maximilian Brunner,Weixuan Zhang,Ahmad Roumie,Marco Tognon,Roland Siegwart cs.RO

authors_text: Yinya Huang,Lemao Liu,Kun Xu,Meng Fang,Liang Lin,Xiaodan Liang
title: Discourse-Aware Graph Networks for Textual Logical Reasoning
title_zh: 用于文本逻辑推理的话语感知图网络
abstract: Textual logical reasoning, especially question-answering (QA) tasks with logical reasoning, requires awareness of particular logical structures. The passage-level logical relations represent entailment or contradiction between propositional units (e.g., a concluding sentence). However, such structures are unexplored as current QA systems focus on entity-based relations. In this work, we propose logic structural-constraint modeling to solve the logical reasoning QA and introduce discourse-aware graph networks (DAGNs). The networks first construct logic graphs leveraging in-line discourse connectives and generic logic theories, then learn logic representations by end-to-end evolving the logic relations with an edge-reasoning mechanism and updating the graph features. This pipeline is applied to a general encoder, whose fundamental features are joined with the high-level logic features for answer prediction. Experiments on three textual logical reasoning datasets demonstrate the reasonability of the logical structures built in DAGNs and the effectiveness of the learned logic features. Moreover, zero-shot transfer results show the features' generality to unseen logical texts.
summary: Textual logical reasoning, especially question-answering (QA) tasks with logical reasoning, requires awareness of particular logical structures. The passage-level logical relations represent entailment or contradiction between propositional units (e.g., a concluding sentence). However, such structures are unexplored as current QA systems focus on entity-based relations. In this work, we propose logic structural-constraint modeling to solve the logical reasoning QA and introduce discourse-aware graph networks (DAGNs). The networks first construct logic graphs leveraging in-line discourse connectives and generic logic theories, then learn logic representations by end-to-end evolving the logic relations with an edge-reasoning mechanism and updating the graph features. This pipeline is applied to a general encoder, whose fundamental features are joined with the high-level logic features for answer prediction. Experiments on three textual logical reasoning datasets demonstrate the reasonability of the logical structures built in DAGNs and the effectiveness of the learned logic features. Moreover, zero-shot transfer results show the features' generality to unseen logical texts.
abstract_zh: 文本逻辑推理，尤其是具有逻辑推理的问答（QA）任务，需要了解特定的逻辑结构。段落级逻辑关系表示命题单元（例如结论句）之间的蕴含或矛盾。然而，由于当前的 QA 系统侧重于基于实体的关系，因此这种结构尚未被探索。在这项工作中，我们提出逻辑结构约束建模来解决逻辑推理 QA 并引入话语感知图网络（DAGN）。网络首先利用内联话语连接词和通用逻辑理论构建逻辑图，然后通过边缘推理机制端到端地演化逻辑关系并更新图特征来学习逻辑表示。该管道应用于通用编码器，其基本特征与用于答案预测的高级逻辑特征相结合。对三个文本逻辑推理数据集的实验证明了 DAGN 中构建的逻辑结构的合理性以及所学习的逻辑特征的有效性。此外，零样本传输结果显示了该特征对未见过的逻辑文本的通用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于话语感知图网络（DAGNs）的文本逻辑推理方法，通过建模文本中的逻辑结构来提升问答任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有问答系统主要关注实体间的关系，而忽视了文本中命题单元间的逻辑结构（如蕴含或矛盾关系），导致逻辑推理能力不足。
AI.method: 构建逻辑图以捕捉文本中的话语连接词和通用逻辑理论，通过端到端的边推理机制演化逻辑关系，并结合编码器特征进行答案预测。
AI.result: 在三个文本逻辑推理数据集上验证了逻辑结构的有效性，且零样本迁移实验表明模型能泛化到未见过的逻辑文本。
AI.conclusion: DAGNs通过显式建模逻辑结构，显著提升了文本逻辑推理能力，并展现出良好的特征泛化性。

authors_text: Adam Gaier,James Stoddart,Lorenzo Villaggi,Peter J Bentley
title: T-DominO: Exploring Multiple Criteria with Quality-Diversity and the Tournament Dominance Objective
title_zh: T-DominO：探索质量多样性和锦标赛主导目标的多重标准
comment: Originally published in: Parallel Problem Solving from Nature (PPSN)
comments: Originally published in: Parallel Problem Solving from Nature (PPSN)
abstract: Real-world design problems are a messy combination of constraints, objectives, and features. Exploring these problem spaces can be defined as a Multi-Criteria Exploration (MCX) problem, whose goals are to produce a set of diverse solutions with high performance across many objectives, while avoiding low performance across any objectives. Quality-Diversity algorithms produce the needed design variation, but typically consider only a single objective. We present a new ranking, T-DominO, specifically designed to handle multiple objectives in MCX problems. T-DominO ranks individuals relative to other solutions in the archive, favoring individuals with balanced performance over those which excel at a few objectives at the cost of the others. Keeping only a single balanced solution in each MAP-Elites bin maintains the visual accessibility of the archive -- a strong asset for design exploration. We illustrate our approach on a set of easily understood benchmarks, and showcase its potential in a many-objective real-world architecture case study.
summary: Real-world design problems are a messy combination of constraints, objectives, and features. Exploring these problem spaces can be defined as a Multi-Criteria Exploration (MCX) problem, whose goals are to produce a set of diverse solutions with high performance across many objectives, while avoiding low performance across any objectives. Quality-Diversity algorithms produce the needed design variation, but typically consider only a single objective. We present a new ranking, T-DominO, specifically designed to handle multiple objectives in MCX problems. T-DominO ranks individuals relative to other solutions in the archive, favoring individuals with balanced performance over those which excel at a few objectives at the cost of the others. Keeping only a single balanced solution in each MAP-Elites bin maintains the visual accessibility of the archive -- a strong asset for design exploration. We illustrate our approach on a set of easily understood benchmarks, and showcase its potential in a many-objective real-world architecture case study.
abstract_zh: 现实世界的设计问题是约束、目标和特征的混乱组合。探索这些问题空间可以定义为多标准探索（MCX）问题，其目标是生成一组跨多个目标具有高性能的多样化解决方案，同时避免跨任何目标的低性能。质量多样性算法产生所需的设计变化，但通常只考虑单个目标。我们提出了一个新的排名 T-DominO，专门用于处理 MCX 问题中的多个目标。 T-DominO 相对于档案中的其他解决方案对个体进行排名，优先考虑性能平衡的个体，而不是那些在某些目标上表现出色而牺牲其他目标的个体。在每个 MAP-Elites 箱中仅保留一个平衡的解决方案可以保持存档的视觉可访问性——这是设计探索的强大资产。我们通过一组易于理解的基准来说明我们的方法，并展示其在多目标现实世界架构案例研究中的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为T-DominO的新排名机制，旨在解决多准则探索（MCX）问题，通过平衡多个目标的性能来生成多样化的高质量解决方案。
AI.motivation: 现实世界的设计问题涉及多个约束和目标，传统质量多样性算法仅考虑单一目标，难以满足多目标平衡需求，需改进以应对复杂设计空间。
AI.method: 设计T-DominO排名机制，通过比较档案中的个体，优先选择多目标表现均衡的解，并结合MAP-Elites方法保持档案的可视化可访问性。
AI.result: 在基准测试和实际建筑案例中验证了T-DominO的有效性，展示了其在多目标优化中生成均衡解的能力。
AI.conclusion: T-DominO通过平衡多目标性能与档案管理，提升了多准则探索的效率与实用性，为复杂设计问题提供了新思路。

method: 设计T-DominO排名机制，通过比较档案中的个体，优先选择多目标表现均衡的解，并结合MAP-Elites方法保持档案的可视化可访问性。
result: 在基准测试和实际建筑案例中验证了T-DominO的有效性，展示了其在多目标优化中生成均衡解的能力。
conclusion: T-DominO通过平衡多目标性能与档案管理，提升了多准则探索的效率与实用性，为复杂设计问题提供了新思路。
search_text: T-DominO: Exploring Multiple Criteria with Quality-Diversity and the Tournament Dominance Objective T-DominO：探索质量多样性和锦标赛主导目标的多重标准 Real-world design problems are a messy combination of constraints, objectives, and features. Exploring these problem spaces can be defined as a Multi-Criteria Exploration (MCX) problem, whose goals are to produce a set of diverse solutions with high performance across many objectives, while avoiding low performance across any objectives. Quality-Diversity algorithms produce the needed design variation, but typically consider only a single objective. We present a new ranking, T-DominO, specifically designed to handle multiple objectives in MCX problems. T-DominO ranks individuals relative to other solutions in the archive, favoring individuals with balanced performance over those which excel at a few objectives at the cost of the others. Keeping only a single balanced solution in each MAP-Elites bin maintains the visual accessibility of the archive -- a strong asset for design exploration. We illustrate our approach on a set of easily understood benchmarks, and showcase its potential in a many-objective real-world architecture case study. 现实世界的设计问题是约束、目标和特征的混乱组合。探索这些问题空间可以定义为多标准探索（MCX）问题，其目标是生成一组跨多个目标具有高性能的多样化解决方案，同时避免跨任何目标的低性能。质量多样性算法产生所需的设计变化，但通常只考虑单个目标。我们提出了一个新的排名 T-DominO，专门用于处理 MCX 问题中的多个目标。 T-DominO 相对于档案中的其他解决方案对个体进行排名，优先考虑性能平衡的个体，而不是那些在某些目标上表现出色而牺牲其他目标的个体。在每个 MAP-Elites 箱中仅保留一个平衡的解决方案可以保持存档的视觉可访问性——这是设计探索的强大资产。我们通过一组易于理解的基准来说明我们的方法，并展示其在多目标现实世界架构案例研究中的潜力。 本文提出了一种名为T-DominO的新排名机制，旨在解决多准则探索（MCX）问题，通过平衡多个目标的性能来生成多样化的高质量解决方案。 Adam Gaier,James Stoddart,Lorenzo Villaggi,Peter J Bentley cs.NE

authors_text: Abel Díaz Berenguer,Tanmoy Mukherjee,Matias Bossa,Nikos Deligiannis,Hichem Sahli
title: Representation Learning with Information Theory for COVID-19 Detection
title_zh: 用于 COVID-19 检测的信息论表示学习
abstract: Successful data representation is a fundamental factor in machine learning based medical imaging analysis. Deep Learning (DL) has taken an essential role in robust representation learning. However, the inability of deep models to generalize to unseen data can quickly overfit intricate patterns. Thereby, we can conveniently implement strategies to aid deep models in discovering useful priors from data to learn their intrinsic properties. Our model, which we call a dual role network (DRN), uses a dependency maximization approach based on Least Squared Mutual Information (LSMI). The LSMI leverages dependency measures to ensure representation invariance and local smoothness. While prior works have used information theory measures like mutual information, known to be computationally expensive due to a density estimation step, our LSMI formulation alleviates the issues of intractable mutual information estimation and can be used to approximate it. Experiments on CT based COVID-19 Detection and COVID-19 Severity Detection benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our method.
summary: Successful data representation is a fundamental factor in machine learning based medical imaging analysis. Deep Learning (DL) has taken an essential role in robust representation learning. However, the inability of deep models to generalize to unseen data can quickly overfit intricate patterns. Thereby, we can conveniently implement strategies to aid deep models in discovering useful priors from data to learn their intrinsic properties. Our model, which we call a dual role network (DRN), uses a dependency maximization approach based on Least Squared Mutual Information (LSMI). The LSMI leverages dependency measures to ensure representation invariance and local smoothness. While prior works have used information theory measures like mutual information, known to be computationally expensive due to a density estimation step, our LSMI formulation alleviates the issues of intractable mutual information estimation and can be used to approximate it. Experiments on CT based COVID-19 Detection and COVID-19 Severity Detection benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness of our method.
abstract_zh: 成功的数据表示是基于机器学习的医学成像分析的基本因素。深度学习 (DL) 在鲁棒表示学习中发挥着重要作用。然而，深度模型无法泛化到未见过的数据，可能很快就会过度拟合复杂的模式。因此，我们可以方便地实施策略来帮助深度模型从数据中发现有用的先验，以了解其内在属性。我们的模型称为双角色网络 (DRN)，使用基于最小二乘互信息 (LSMI) 的依赖性最大化方法。 LSMI 利用依赖度量来确保表示不变性和局部平滑性。虽然之前的工作使用了诸如互信息之类的信息论度量，但由于密度估计步骤而导致计算成本高昂，我们的 LSMI 公式缓解了棘手的互信息估计问题，并且可用于对其进行近似。基于 CT 的 COVID-19 检测和 COVID-19 严重性检测基准的实验证明了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于信息论的表示学习方法，用于改进COVID-19检测的深度学习模型。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在医学影像分析中易过拟合且泛化能力不足，需通过信息论方法挖掘数据先验知识以提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.method: 设计双角色网络（DRN），采用最小二乘互信息（LSMI）最大化依赖性，通过密度估计替代传统互信息计算，实现表示不变性与局部平滑性。
AI.result: 在CT影像的COVID-19检测及严重程度评估基准测试中验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: LSMI-based表示学习有效解决了深度模型泛化问题，在医学影像分析中具有应用价值。

authors_text: Yue Qin,Xiaojing Liao
title: Cybersecurity Entity Alignment via Masked Graph Attention Networks
title_zh: 通过屏蔽图注意力网络进行网络安全实体对齐
abstract: Cybersecurity vulnerability information is often recorded by multiple channels, including government vulnerability repositories, individual-maintained vulnerability-gathering platforms, or vulnerability-disclosure email lists and forums. Integrating vulnerability information from different channels enables comprehensive threat assessment and quick deployment to various security mechanisms. Efforts to automatically gather such information, however, are impeded by the limitations of today's entity alignment techniques. In our study, we annotate the first cybersecurity-domain entity alignment dataset and reveal the unique characteristics of security entities. Based on these observations, we propose the first cybersecurity entity alignment model, CEAM, which equips GNN-based entity alignment with two mechanisms: asymmetric masked aggregation and partitioned attention. Experimental results on cybersecurity-domain entity alignment datasets demonstrate that CEAM significantly outperforms state-of-the-art entity alignment methods.
summary: Cybersecurity vulnerability information is often recorded by multiple channels, including government vulnerability repositories, individual-maintained vulnerability-gathering platforms, or vulnerability-disclosure email lists and forums. Integrating vulnerability information from different channels enables comprehensive threat assessment and quick deployment to various security mechanisms. Efforts to automatically gather such information, however, are impeded by the limitations of today's entity alignment techniques. In our study, we annotate the first cybersecurity-domain entity alignment dataset and reveal the unique characteristics of security entities. Based on these observations, we propose the first cybersecurity entity alignment model, CEAM, which equips GNN-based entity alignment with two mechanisms: asymmetric masked aggregation and partitioned attention. Experimental results on cybersecurity-domain entity alignment datasets demonstrate that CEAM significantly outperforms state-of-the-art entity alignment methods.
abstract_zh: 网络安全漏洞信息通常通过多种渠道记录，包括政府漏洞库、个人维护的漏洞收集平台或漏洞披露电子邮件列表和论坛。整合不同渠道的漏洞信息，实现全面的威胁评估并快速部署到各种安全机制。然而，自动收集此类信息的努力受到当今实体对齐技术的限制的阻碍。在我们的研究中，我们注释了第一个网络安全域实体对齐数据集并揭示了安全实体的独特特征。基于这些观察，我们提出了第一个网络安全实体对齐模型 CEAM，它为基于 GNN 的实体对齐配备了两种机制：非对称屏蔽聚合和分区注意力。网络安全领域实体对齐数据集的实验结果表明，CEAM 显着优于最先进的实体对齐方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于掩码图注意力网络的网络安全实体对齐方法，解决多源漏洞信息整合难题。
AI.motivation: 现有实体对齐技术难以有效整合政府库、论坛、邮件列表等多渠道记录的网络安全漏洞信息，阻碍了自动化威胁评估。
AI.method: 构建首个网络安全实体对齐数据集，设计融合非对称掩码聚合与分区注意力机制的CEAM模型，基于图神经网络实现跨渠道实体对齐。
AI.result: 实验表明CEAM在网络安全领域实体对齐任务中显著优于现有最先进的对齐方法。
AI.conclusion: CEAM通过创新机制有效解决了网络安全实体对齐的挑战，为多源异构安全信息整合提供了新思路。

authors_text: Benjamin Post,Cosmin Badea,Aldo Faisal,Stephen J. Brett
title: Breaking Bad News in the Era of Artificial Intelligence and Algorithmic Medicine: An Exploration of Disclosure and its Ethical Justification using the Hedonic Calculus
title_zh: 人工智能和算法医学时代的突发坏消息：利用享乐演算探索信息披露及其伦理合理性
abstract: An appropriate ethical framework around the use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in healthcare has become a key desirable with the increasingly widespread deployment of this technology. Advances in AI hold the promise of improving the precision of outcome prediction at the level of the individual. However, the addition of these technologies to patient-clinician interactions, as with any complex human interaction, has potential pitfalls. While physicians have always had to carefully consider the ethical background and implications of their actions, detailed deliberations around fast-moving technological progress may not have kept up. We use a common but key challenge in healthcare interactions, the disclosure of bad news (likely imminent death), to illustrate how the philosophical framework of the 'Felicific Calculus' developed in the 18th century by Jeremy Bentham, may have a timely quasi-quantitative application in the age of AI. We show how this ethical algorithm can be used to assess, across seven mutually exclusive and exhaustive domains, whether an AI-supported action can be morally justified.
summary: An appropriate ethical framework around the use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in healthcare has become a key desirable with the increasingly widespread deployment of this technology. Advances in AI hold the promise of improving the precision of outcome prediction at the level of the individual. However, the addition of these technologies to patient-clinician interactions, as with any complex human interaction, has potential pitfalls. While physicians have always had to carefully consider the ethical background and implications of their actions, detailed deliberations around fast-moving technological progress may not have kept up. We use a common but key challenge in healthcare interactions, the disclosure of bad news (likely imminent death), to illustrate how the philosophical framework of the 'Felicific Calculus' developed in the 18th century by Jeremy Bentham, may have a timely quasi-quantitative application in the age of AI. We show how this ethical algorithm can be used to assess, across seven mutually exclusive and exhaustive domains, whether an AI-supported action can be morally justified.
abstract_zh: 随着人工智能 (AI) 技术的日益广泛部署，围绕在医疗保健中使用人工智能 (AI) 的适当道德框架已成为一个关键需求。人工智能的进步有望提高个人水平结果预测的准确性。然而，与任何复杂的人际互动一样，将这些技术添加到患者与临床医生的互动中也存在潜在的缺陷。虽然医生总是必须仔细考虑其行为的伦理背景和影响，但围绕快速发展的技术进步的详细审议可能没有跟上。我们利用医疗保健互动中常见但关键的挑战，即坏消息（可能即将死亡）的披露，来说明杰里米·边沁 (Jeremy Bentham) 在 18 世纪开发的“幸福演算”的哲学框架如何在人工智能时代得到及时的准定量应用。我们展示了如何使用这种道德算法在七个相互排斥和详尽的领域中评估人工智能支持的行动在道德上是否合理。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨在人工智能和算法医学时代，如何运用享乐计算法评估AI辅助医疗决策中披露坏消息的伦理正当性。
AI.motivation: 随着AI在医疗领域广泛应用，传统伦理框架难以应对技术带来的新型伦理挑战，尤其在AI辅助披露坏消息时需明确道德评估标准。
AI.method: 采用18世纪边沁提出的享乐计算法，通过七个互斥且全面的维度构建伦理评估模型，分析AI支持的医疗行为是否符合道德准则。
AI.result: 展示了该伦理算法可系统评估AI辅助医疗决策的道德合理性，为AI在敏感医疗场景的应用提供量化伦理分析工具。
AI.conclusion: 享乐计算法为AI医疗应用提供了可操作的伦理评估框架，有助于平衡技术进步与患者福祉间的伦理矛盾。

search_text: Breaking Bad News in the Era of Artificial Intelligence and Algorithmic Medicine: An Exploration of Disclosure and its Ethical Justification using the Hedonic Calculus 人工智能和算法医学时代的突发坏消息：利用享乐演算探索信息披露及其伦理合理性 An appropriate ethical framework around the use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) in healthcare has become a key desirable with the increasingly widespread deployment of this technology. Advances in AI hold the promise of improving the precision of outcome prediction at the level of the individual. However, the addition of these technologies to patient-clinician interactions, as with any complex human interaction, has potential pitfalls. While physicians have always had to carefully consider the ethical background and implications of their actions, detailed deliberations around fast-moving technological progress may not have kept up. We use a common but key challenge in healthcare interactions, the disclosure of bad news (likely imminent death), to illustrate how the philosophical framework of the 'Felicific Calculus' developed in the 18th century by Jeremy Bentham, may have a timely quasi-quantitative application in the age of AI. We show how this ethical algorithm can be used to assess, across seven mutually exclusive and exhaustive domains, whether an AI-supported action can be morally justified. 随着人工智能 (AI) 技术的日益广泛部署，围绕在医疗保健中使用人工智能 (AI) 的适当道德框架已成为一个关键需求。人工智能的进步有望提高个人水平结果预测的准确性。然而，与任何复杂的人际互动一样，将这些技术添加到患者与临床医生的互动中也存在潜在的缺陷。虽然医生总是必须仔细考虑其行为的伦理背景和影响，但围绕快速发展的技术进步的详细审议可能没有跟上。我们利用医疗保健互动中常见但关键的挑战，即坏消息（可能即将死亡）的披露，来说明杰里米·边沁 (Jeremy Bentham) 在 18 世纪开发的“幸福演算”的哲学框架如何在人工智能时代得到及时的准定量应用。我们展示了如何使用这种道德算法在七个相互排斥和详尽的领域中评估人工智能支持的行动在道德上是否合理。 本文探讨在人工智能和算法医学时代，如何运用享乐计算法评估AI辅助医疗决策中披露坏消息的伦理正当性。 Benjamin Post,Cosmin Badea,Aldo Faisal,Stephen J. Brett cs.CY,cs.AI,cs.LO

authors_text: Jun Rao,Liang Ding,Shuhan Qi,Meng Fang,Yang Liu,Li Shen,Dacheng Tao
title: Dynamic Contrastive Distillation for Image-Text Retrieval
title_zh: 图文检索的动态对比蒸馏
abstract: Although the vision-and-language pretraining (VLP) equipped cross-modal image-text retrieval (ITR) has achieved remarkable progress in the past two years, it suffers from a major drawback: the ever-increasing size of VLP models restricts its deployment to real-world search scenarios (where the high latency is unacceptable). To alleviate this problem, we present a novel plug-in dynamic contrastive distillation (DCD) framework to compress the large VLP models for the ITR task. Technically, we face the following two challenges: 1) the typical uni-modal metric learning approach is difficult to directly apply to the cross-modal tasks, due to the limited GPU memory to optimize too many negative samples during handling cross-modal fusion features. 2) it is inefficient to static optimize the student network from different hard samples, which have different effects on distillation learning and student network optimization. We try to overcome these challenges from two points. First, to achieve multi-modal contrastive learning, and balance the training costs and effects, we propose to use a teacher network to estimate the difficult samples for students, making the students absorb the powerful knowledge from pre-trained teachers, and master the knowledge from hard samples. Second, to dynamic learn from hard sample pairs, we propose dynamic distillation to dynamically learn samples of different difficulties, from the perspective of better balancing the difficulty of knowledge and students' self-learning ability. We successfully apply our proposed DCD strategy to two state-of-the-art vision-language pretrained models, i.e. ViLT and METER. Extensive experiments on MS-COCO and Flickr30K benchmarks show the effectiveness and efficiency of our DCD framework. Encouragingly, we can speed up the inference at least 129$\times$ compared to the existing ITR models.
summary: Although the vision-and-language pretraining (VLP) equipped cross-modal image-text retrieval (ITR) has achieved remarkable progress in the past two years, it suffers from a major drawback: the ever-increasing size of VLP models restricts its deployment to real-world search scenarios (where the high latency is unacceptable). To alleviate this problem, we present a novel plug-in dynamic contrastive distillation (DCD) framework to compress the large VLP models for the ITR task. Technically, we face the following two challenges: 1) the typical uni-modal metric learning approach is difficult to directly apply to the cross-modal tasks, due to the limited GPU memory to optimize too many negative samples during handling cross-modal fusion features. 2) it is inefficient to static optimize the student network from different hard samples, which have different effects on distillation learning and student network optimization. We try to overcome these challenges from two points. First, to achieve multi-modal contrastive learning, and balance the training costs and effects, we propose to use a teacher network to estimate the difficult samples for students, making the students absorb the powerful knowledge from pre-trained teachers, and master the knowledge from hard samples. Second, to dynamic learn from hard sample pairs, we propose dynamic distillation to dynamically learn samples of different difficulties, from the perspective of better balancing the difficulty of knowledge and students' self-learning ability. We successfully apply our proposed DCD strategy to two state-of-the-art vision-language pretrained models, i.e. ViLT and METER. Extensive experiments on MS-COCO and Flickr30K benchmarks show the effectiveness and efficiency of our DCD framework. Encouragingly, we can speed up the inference at least 129$\times$ compared to the existing ITR models.
abstract_zh: 尽管配备视觉和语言预训练（VLP）的跨模态图像文本检索（ITR）在过去两年中取得了显着的进展，但它存在一个主要缺点：VLP模型的规模不断增加限制了其在现实世界搜索场景中的部署（其中高延迟是不可接受的）。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种新颖的插件动态对比蒸馏（DCD）框架来压缩 ITR 任务的大型 VLP 模型。从技术上讲，我们面临以下两个挑战：1）典型的单模态度量学习方法很难直接应用于跨模态任务，因为在处理跨模态融合特征时，GPU内存有限，无法优化太多负样本。 2）从不同的硬样本中静态优化学生网络效率低下，这对蒸馏学习和学生网络优化有不同的影响。我们试图从两点来克服这些挑战。首先，为了实现多模态对比学习，平衡训练成本和效果，我们建议使用教师网络来估计学生的困难样本，使学生从预先训练的教师那里吸收强大的知识，并从困难样本中掌握知识。其次，为了从困难样本对中动态学习，从更好地平衡知识难度和学生自学能力的角度，我们提出动态蒸馏来动态学习不同难度的样本。我们成功地将我们提出的 DCD 策略应用于两个最先进的视觉语言预训练模型，即 ViLT 和 METER。在 MS-COCO 和 Flickr30K 基准测试上进行的大量实验表明了我们的 DCD 框架的有效性和效率。令人鼓舞的是，与现有 ITR 模型相比，我们可以将推理速度提高至少 129$\times$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态对比蒸馏（DCD）框架，用于压缩视觉-语言预训练（VLP）模型以提升图像-文本检索（ITR）任务的效率。
AI.motivation: 现有VLP模型体积过大，导致推理延迟高，难以部署于实际场景，需通过模型压缩技术解决效率问题。
AI.method: 设计DCD框架，通过教师网络筛选困难样本指导学生网络学习，并动态调整样本难度平衡知识蒸馏与自学习过程。
AI.result: 在MS-COCO和Flickr30K基准测试中，DCD框架使推理速度提升至少129倍，保持较高检索性能。
AI.conclusion: DCD方法有效压缩了VLP模型，在保持性能的同时显著提升ITR任务的推理效率，为实际部署提供可行方案。

authors_text: Gianluigi Lopardo,Damien Garreau
title: Comparing Feature Importance and Rule Extraction for Interpretability on Text Data
title_zh: 比较特征重要性和规则提取以提高文本数据的可解释性
comment: Accepted to XAIE ICPR 2022, the 2-nd Workshop on Explainable and Ethical AI, ICPR 2022
comments: Accepted to XAIE ICPR 2022, the 2-nd Workshop on Explainable and Ethical AI, ICPR 2022
abstract: Complex machine learning algorithms are used more and more often in critical tasks involving text data, leading to the development of interpretability methods. Among local methods, two families have emerged: those computing importance scores for each feature and those extracting simple logical rules. In this paper we show that using different methods can lead to unexpectedly different explanations, even when applied to simple models for which we would expect qualitative coincidence. To quantify this effect, we propose a new approach to compare explanations produced by different methods.
summary: Complex machine learning algorithms are used more and more often in critical tasks involving text data, leading to the development of interpretability methods. Among local methods, two families have emerged: those computing importance scores for each feature and those extracting simple logical rules. In this paper we show that using different methods can lead to unexpectedly different explanations, even when applied to simple models for which we would expect qualitative coincidence. To quantify this effect, we propose a new approach to compare explanations produced by different methods.
abstract_zh: 复杂的机器学习算法越来越多地用于涉及文本数据的关键任务，从而导致了可解释性方法的发展。在本地方法中，出现了两个系列：计算每个特征的重要性分数的方法和提取简单逻辑规则的方法。在本文中，我们表明，使用不同的方法可能会导致意想不到的不同解释，即使应用于我们期望定性重合的简单模型也是如此。为了量化这种效应，我们提出了一种新方法来比较不同方法产生的解释。

AI.tldr: 比较文本数据中特征重要性分析与规则提取方法的可解释性效果
AI.motivation: 复杂模型在文本任务中广泛应用，但不同解释方法可能产生矛盾结果，需量化比较以提升可信度
AI.method: 提出量化比较不同解释方法效果的新框架，分析特征重要性与规则提取的差异
AI.result: 实验显示不同方法在简单模型上解释差异显著，新方法有效量化了这种差异
AI.conclusion: 不同解释方法存在本质差异，应结合多种方法以获得更全面的模型解释

search_text: Comparing Feature Importance and Rule Extraction for Interpretability on Text Data 比较特征重要性和规则提取以提高文本数据的可解释性 Complex machine learning algorithms are used more and more often in critical tasks involving text data, leading to the development of interpretability methods. Among local methods, two families have emerged: those computing importance scores for each feature and those extracting simple logical rules. In this paper we show that using different methods can lead to unexpectedly different explanations, even when applied to simple models for which we would expect qualitative coincidence. To quantify this effect, we propose a new approach to compare explanations produced by different methods. 复杂的机器学习算法越来越多地用于涉及文本数据的关键任务，从而导致了可解释性方法的发展。在本地方法中，出现了两个系列：计算每个特征的重要性分数的方法和提取简单逻辑规则的方法。在本文中，我们表明，使用不同的方法可能会导致意想不到的不同解释，即使应用于我们期望定性重合的简单模型也是如此。为了量化这种效应，我们提出了一种新方法来比较不同方法产生的解释。 比较文本数据中特征重要性分析与规则提取方法的可解释性效果 Gianluigi Lopardo,Damien Garreau cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CL,stat.ML

authors_text: Yuqi Wang,Zhiqiang He,Shenghui Huang,Huabin Du
title: A Robust Ensemble Model for Patasitic Egg Detection and Classification
title_zh: 用于病虫卵检测和分类的鲁棒集成模型
abstract: Intestinal parasitic infections, as a leading causes of morbidity worldwide, still lacks time-saving, high-sensitivity and user-friendly examination method. The development of deep learning technique reveals its broad application potential in biological image. In this paper, we apply several object detectors such as YOLOv5 and variant cascadeRCNNs to automatically discriminate parasitic eggs in microscope images. Through specially-designed optimization including raw data augmentation, model ensemble, transfer learning and test time augmentation, our model achieves excellent performance on challenge dataset. In addition, our model trained with added noise gains a high robustness against polluted input, which further broaden its applicability in practice.
summary: Intestinal parasitic infections, as a leading causes of morbidity worldwide, still lacks time-saving, high-sensitivity and user-friendly examination method. The development of deep learning technique reveals its broad application potential in biological image. In this paper, we apply several object detectors such as YOLOv5 and variant cascadeRCNNs to automatically discriminate parasitic eggs in microscope images. Through specially-designed optimization including raw data augmentation, model ensemble, transfer learning and test time augmentation, our model achieves excellent performance on challenge dataset. In addition, our model trained with added noise gains a high robustness against polluted input, which further broaden its applicability in practice.
abstract_zh: 肠道寄生虫感染作为全球发病的主要原因，目前仍缺乏省时、高灵敏度、人性化的检查方法。深度学习技术的发展揭示了其在生物图像方面的广阔应用潜力。在本文中，我们应用几种目标检测器（例如 YOLOv5 和变体级联 RCNN）来自动区分显微镜图像中的寄生虫卵。通过专门设计的优化，包括原始数据增强、模型集成、迁移学习和测试时间增强，我们的模型在挑战数据集上取得了优异的性能。此外，我们的模型经过添加噪声训练，对污染输入具有很高的鲁棒性，这进一步拓宽了其在实践中的适用性。

AI.tldr: 开发一种鲁棒的集成模型用于寄生虫卵的检测与分类。
AI.motivation: 肠寄生虫感染是全球主要健康问题，但现有检测方法效率低且不够敏感，需利用深度学习技术提升检测性能。
AI.method: 采用YOLOv5和cascadeRCNN等目标检测模型，结合数据增强、模型集成、迁移学习及测试时增强技术优化模型。
AI.result: 模型在挑战数据集上表现优异，且对污染输入具有高鲁棒性，显著提升检测准确性与实用性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的集成模型有效解决了寄生虫卵检测的难题，为实际医疗应用提供了可靠的技术支持。

authors_text: Yuki Shirai,Xuan Lin,Alexander Schperberg,Yusuke Tanaka,Hayato Kato,Varit Vichathorn,Dennis Hong
title: Simultaneous Contact-Rich Grasping and Locomotion via Distributed Optimization Enabling Free-Climbing for Multi-Limbed Robots
title_zh: 通过分布式优化同时进行丰富接触的抓取和运动，实现多肢机器人的自由攀爬
comment: Accepted for the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022). Hardware implementation videos: https://youtu.be/QLH1shghqQ0
comments: Accepted for the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022). Hardware implementation videos: https://youtu.be/QLH1shghqQ0
abstract: While motion planning of locomotion for legged robots has shown great success, motion planning for legged robots with dexterous multi-finger grasping is not mature yet. We present an efficient motion planning framework for simultaneously solving locomotion (e.g., centroidal dynamics), grasping (e.g., patch contact), and contact (e.g., gait) problems. To accelerate the planning process, we propose distributed optimization frameworks based on Alternating Direction Methods of Multipliers (ADMM) to solve the original large-scale Mixed-Integer NonLinear Programming (MINLP). The resulting frameworks use Mixed-Integer Quadratic Programming (MIQP) to solve contact and NonLinear Programming (NLP) to solve nonlinear dynamics, which are more computationally tractable and less sensitive to parameters. Also, we explicitly enforce patch contact constraints from limit surfaces with micro-spine grippers. We demonstrate our proposed framework in the hardware experiments, showing that the multi-limbed robot is able to realize various motions including free-climbing at a slope angle 45° with a much shorter planning time.
summary: While motion planning of locomotion for legged robots has shown great success, motion planning for legged robots with dexterous multi-finger grasping is not mature yet. We present an efficient motion planning framework for simultaneously solving locomotion (e.g., centroidal dynamics), grasping (e.g., patch contact), and contact (e.g., gait) problems. To accelerate the planning process, we propose distributed optimization frameworks based on Alternating Direction Methods of Multipliers (ADMM) to solve the original large-scale Mixed-Integer NonLinear Programming (MINLP). The resulting frameworks use Mixed-Integer Quadratic Programming (MIQP) to solve contact and NonLinear Programming (NLP) to solve nonlinear dynamics, which are more computationally tractable and less sensitive to parameters. Also, we explicitly enforce patch contact constraints from limit surfaces with micro-spine grippers. We demonstrate our proposed framework in the hardware experiments, showing that the multi-limbed robot is able to realize various motions including free-climbing at a slope angle 45° with a much shorter planning time.
abstract_zh: 虽然腿式机器人的运动规划已经取得了巨大的成功，但灵巧多指抓取的腿式机器人的运动规划尚不成熟。我们提出了一个有效的运动规划框架，用于同时解决运动（例如质心动力学）、抓取（例如贴片接触）和接触（例如步态）问题。为了加速规划过程，我们提出了基于交替方向乘子法（ADMM）的分布式优化框架来解决原始的大规模混合整数非线性规划（MINLP）。由此产生的框架使用混合整数二次规划（MIQP）来解决接触问题，并使用非线性规划（NLP）来解决非线性动力学问题，这些在计算上更容易处理并且对参数不太敏感。此外，我们还使用微脊柱夹具从限制表面明确实施补丁接触约束。我们在硬件实验中展示了我们提出的框架，表明多肢机器人能够以更短的规划时间实现各种运动，包括以 45° 倾斜角度自由攀爬。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种分布式优化框架，使多肢机器人能够同时解决抓取和移动问题，实现自由攀爬。
AI.motivation: 现有腿部机器人运动规划在抓取和移动协同方面尚未成熟，需开发高效框架以实现复杂环境下的自由攀爬。
AI.method: 基于ADMM的分布式优化方法，将大规模MINLP问题分解为MIQP（处理接触）和NLP（处理动力学），并结合微刺夹爪的接触约束。
AI.result: 硬件实验验证了多肢机器人可在45°斜坡上实现自由攀爬，规划时间显著缩短。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过分布式优化有效结合抓取与移动规划，为复杂地形下的机器人操作提供了新方法。

authors_text: Jing Wang,Jiangyun Li,Wei Li,Lingfei Xuan,Tianxiang Zhang,Wenxuan Wang
title: Positive-Negative Equal Contrastive Loss for Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: 语义分割的正负等对比损失
abstract: The contextual information is critical for various computer vision tasks, previous works commonly design plug-and-play modules and structural losses to effectively extract and aggregate the global context. These methods utilize fine-label to optimize the model but ignore that fine-trained features are also precious training resources, which can introduce preferable distribution to hard pixels (i.e., misclassified pixels). Inspired by contrastive learning in unsupervised paradigm, we apply the contrastive loss in a supervised manner and re-design the loss function to cast off the stereotype of unsupervised learning (e.g., imbalance of positives and negatives, confusion of anchors computing). To this end, we propose Positive-Negative Equal contrastive loss (PNE loss), which increases the latent impact of positive embedding on the anchor and treats the positive as well as negative sample pairs equally. The PNE loss can be directly plugged right into existing semantic segmentation frameworks and leads to excellent performance with neglectable extra computational costs. We utilize a number of classic segmentation methods (e.g., DeepLabV3, HRNetV2, OCRNet, UperNet) and backbone (e.g., ResNet, HRNet, Swin Transformer) to conduct comprehensive experiments and achieve state-of-the-art performance on three benchmark datasets (e.g., Cityscapes, COCO-Stuff and ADE20K). Our code will be publicly available soon.
summary: The contextual information is critical for various computer vision tasks, previous works commonly design plug-and-play modules and structural losses to effectively extract and aggregate the global context. These methods utilize fine-label to optimize the model but ignore that fine-trained features are also precious training resources, which can introduce preferable distribution to hard pixels (i.e., misclassified pixels). Inspired by contrastive learning in unsupervised paradigm, we apply the contrastive loss in a supervised manner and re-design the loss function to cast off the stereotype of unsupervised learning (e.g., imbalance of positives and negatives, confusion of anchors computing). To this end, we propose Positive-Negative Equal contrastive loss (PNE loss), which increases the latent impact of positive embedding on the anchor and treats the positive as well as negative sample pairs equally. The PNE loss can be directly plugged right into existing semantic segmentation frameworks and leads to excellent performance with neglectable extra computational costs. We utilize a number of classic segmentation methods (e.g., DeepLabV3, HRNetV2, OCRNet, UperNet) and backbone (e.g., ResNet, HRNet, Swin Transformer) to conduct comprehensive experiments and achieve state-of-the-art performance on three benchmark datasets (e.g., Cityscapes, COCO-Stuff and ADE20K). Our code will be publicly available soon.
abstract_zh: 上下文信息对于各种计算机视觉任务至关重要，以前的工作通常设计即插即用模块和结构损失来有效提取和聚合全局上下文。这些方法利用精细标签来优化模型，但忽略了精细训练的特征也是宝贵的训练资源，这可以为硬像素（即错误分类的像素）引入更好的分布。受无监督范式中对比学习的启发，我们以监督的方式应用对比损失，并重新设计损失函数，以摆脱无监督学习的刻板印象（例如正负不平衡、锚点计算混乱）。为此，我们提出正负相等对比损失（PNE loss），它增加了正嵌入对锚点的潜在影响，并平等地对待正负样本对。 PNE 损失可以直接插入到现有的语义分割框架中，并以可忽略的额外计算成本带来出色的性能。我们利用许多经典的分割方法（例如 DeepLabV3、HRNetV2、OCRNet、UperNet）和主干网络（例如 ResNet、HRNet、Swin Transformer）进行全面的实验，并在三个基准数据集（例如 Cityscapes、COCO-Stuff 和 A​​DE20K）上实现了最先进的性能。我们的代码很快就会公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的对比损失函数PNE Loss，用于改进语义分割任务中的上下文信息利用。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖精细标注优化模型，但忽视了精细训练特征对困难像素（误分类区域）的分布引导价值，且传统对比学习存在正负样本不平衡等问题。
AI.method: 设计正负样本对等的对比损失函数（PNE Loss），通过增强正样本嵌入对锚点的影响，消除无监督学习的固有缺陷，并直接集成到主流分割框架中。
AI.result: 在Cityscapes、COCO-Stuff和ADE20K三个基准数据集上达到SOTA性能，且计算成本可忽略。
AI.conclusion: PNE Loss通过显式建模正负样本关系，有效提升了语义分割的特征学习效率，具有通用性和实用性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种新的对比损失函数PNE Loss，用于改进语义分割任务中的上下文信息利用。
ai_content.motivation: 现有方法依赖精细标注优化模型，但忽视了精细训练特征对困难像素（误分类区域）的分布引导价值，且传统对比学习存在正负样本不平衡等问题。

search_text: Positive-Negative Equal Contrastive Loss for Semantic Segmentation 语义分割的正负等对比损失 The contextual information is critical for various computer vision tasks, previous works commonly design plug-and-play modules and structural losses to effectively extract and aggregate the global context. These methods utilize fine-label to optimize the model but ignore that fine-trained features are also precious training resources, which can introduce preferable distribution to hard pixels (i.e., misclassified pixels). Inspired by contrastive learning in unsupervised paradigm, we apply the contrastive loss in a supervised manner and re-design the loss function to cast off the stereotype of unsupervised learning (e.g., imbalance of positives and negatives, confusion of anchors computing). To this end, we propose Positive-Negative Equal contrastive loss (PNE loss), which increases the latent impact of positive embedding on the anchor and treats the positive as well as negative sample pairs equally. The PNE loss can be directly plugged right into existing semantic segmentation frameworks and leads to excellent performance with neglectable extra computational costs. We utilize a number of classic segmentation methods (e.g., DeepLabV3, HRNetV2, OCRNet, UperNet) and backbone (e.g., ResNet, HRNet, Swin Transformer) to conduct comprehensive experiments and achieve state-of-the-art performance on three benchmark datasets (e.g., Cityscapes, COCO-Stuff and ADE20K). Our code will be publicly available soon. 上下文信息对于各种计算机视觉任务至关重要，以前的工作通常设计即插即用模块和结构损失来有效提取和聚合全局上下文。这些方法利用精细标签来优化模型，但忽略了精细训练的特征也是宝贵的训练资源，这可以为硬像素（即错误分类的像素）引入更好的分布。受无监督范式中对比学习的启发，我们以监督的方式应用对比损失，并重新设计损失函数，以摆脱无监督学习的刻板印象（例如正负不平衡、锚点计算混乱）。为此，我们提出正负相等对比损失（PNE loss），它增加了正嵌入对锚点的潜在影响，并平等地对待正负样本对。 PNE 损失可以直接插入到现有的语义分割框架中，并以可忽略的额外计算成本带来出色的性能。我们利用许多经典的分割方法（例如 DeepLabV3、HRNetV2、OCRNet、UperNet）和主干网络（例如 ResNet、HRNet、Swin Transformer）进行全面的实验，并在三个基准数据集（例如 Cityscapes、COCO-Stuff 和 A​​DE20K）上实现了最先进的性能。我们的代码很快就会公开。 本文提出一种新的对比损失函数PNE Loss，用于改进语义分割任务中的上下文信息利用。 Jing Wang,Jiangyun Li,Wei Li,Lingfei Xuan,Tianxiang Zhang,Wenxuan Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Kai Ploeger,Jan Peters
title: Controlling the Cascade: Kinematic Planning for N-ball Toss Juggling
title_zh: 控制级联：N 球投掷杂耍的运动学规划
abstract: Dynamic movements are ubiquitous in human motor behavior as they tend to be more efficient and can solve a broader range of skill domains than their quasi-static counterparts. For decades, robotic juggling tasks have been among the most frequently studied dynamic manipulation problems since the required dynamic dexterity can be scaled to arbitrarily high difficulty. However, successful approaches have been limited to basic juggling skills, indicating a lack of understanding of the required constraints for dexterous toss juggling. We present a detailed analysis of the toss juggling task, identifying the key challenges and formalizing it as a trajectory optimization problem. Building on our state-of-the-art, real-world toss juggling platform, we reach the theoretical limits of toss juggling in simulation, evaluate a resulting real-time controller in environments of varying difficulty and achieve robust toss juggling of up to 17 balls on two anthropomorphic manipulators.
summary: Dynamic movements are ubiquitous in human motor behavior as they tend to be more efficient and can solve a broader range of skill domains than their quasi-static counterparts. For decades, robotic juggling tasks have been among the most frequently studied dynamic manipulation problems since the required dynamic dexterity can be scaled to arbitrarily high difficulty. However, successful approaches have been limited to basic juggling skills, indicating a lack of understanding of the required constraints for dexterous toss juggling. We present a detailed analysis of the toss juggling task, identifying the key challenges and formalizing it as a trajectory optimization problem. Building on our state-of-the-art, real-world toss juggling platform, we reach the theoretical limits of toss juggling in simulation, evaluate a resulting real-time controller in environments of varying difficulty and achieve robust toss juggling of up to 17 balls on two anthropomorphic manipulators.
abstract_zh: 动态运动在人类运动行为中无处不在，因为它们往往比准静态运动更高效，并且可以解决更广泛的技能领域。几十年来，机器人杂耍任务一直是最常研究的动态操纵问题之一，因为所需的动态灵活性可以扩展到任意高的难度。然而，成功的方法仅限于基本的杂耍技巧，这表明人们对灵巧的抛掷杂耍所需的限制缺乏了解。我们对抛掷杂耍任务进行了详细分析，确定了关键挑战并将其形式化为轨迹优化问题。基于我们最先进的现实世界抛掷杂耍平台，我们在模拟中达到了抛掷杂耍的理论极限，在不同难度的环境中评估最终的实时控制器，并在两个拟人化操纵器上实现了多达 17 个球的稳健抛掷杂耍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对多球抛接杂技的运动学规划方法，通过轨迹优化实现复杂动态控制。
AI.motivation: 动态运动在人类动作中更高效且适用性更广，但现有机器人抛接任务仅限于基础技能，缺乏对高难度杂技控制约束的深入理解。
AI.method: 基于现实抛接平台，将任务形式化为轨迹优化问题，并设计实时控制器应对不同难度环境。
AI.result: 在模拟中达到抛接17球的理论极限，并在双机械臂上实现稳定多球杂技控制。
AI.conclusion: 该方法揭示了动态杂技任务的核心约束，为高难度机器人动态操作提供了新思路。

authors_text: Erik Härkönen,Miika Aittala,Tuomas Kynkäänniemi,Samuli Laine,Timo Aila,Jaakko Lehtinen
title: Disentangling Random and Cyclic Effects in Time-Lapse Sequences
title_zh: 解开延时序列中的随机效应和循环效应
abstract: Time-lapse image sequences offer visually compelling insights into dynamic processes that are too slow to observe in real time. However, playing a long time-lapse sequence back as a video often results in distracting flicker due to random effects, such as weather, as well as cyclic effects, such as the day-night cycle. We introduce the problem of disentangling time-lapse sequences in a way that allows separate, after-the-fact control of overall trends, cyclic effects, and random effects in the images, and describe a technique based on data-driven generative models that achieves this goal. This enables us to "re-render" the sequences in ways that would not be possible with the input images alone. For example, we can stabilize a long sequence to focus on plant growth over many months, under selectable, consistent weather. Our approach is based on Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN) that are conditioned with the time coordinate of the time-lapse sequence. Our architecture and training procedure are designed so that the networks learn to model random variations, such as weather, using the GAN's latent space, and to disentangle overall trends and cyclic variations by feeding the conditioning time label to the model using Fourier features with specific frequencies. We show that our models are robust to defects in the training data, enabling us to amend some of the practical difficulties in capturing long time-lapse sequences, such as temporary occlusions, uneven frame spacing, and missing frames.
summary: Time-lapse image sequences offer visually compelling insights into dynamic processes that are too slow to observe in real time. However, playing a long time-lapse sequence back as a video often results in distracting flicker due to random effects, such as weather, as well as cyclic effects, such as the day-night cycle. We introduce the problem of disentangling time-lapse sequences in a way that allows separate, after-the-fact control of overall trends, cyclic effects, and random effects in the images, and describe a technique based on data-driven generative models that achieves this goal. This enables us to "re-render" the sequences in ways that would not be possible with the input images alone. For example, we can stabilize a long sequence to focus on plant growth over many months, under selectable, consistent weather. Our approach is based on Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN) that are conditioned with the time coordinate of the time-lapse sequence. Our architecture and training procedure are designed so that the networks learn to model random variations, such as weather, using the GAN's latent space, and to disentangle overall trends and cyclic variations by feeding the conditioning time label to the model using Fourier features with specific frequencies. We show that our models are robust to defects in the training data, enabling us to amend some of the practical difficulties in capturing long time-lapse sequences, such as temporary occlusions, uneven frame spacing, and missing frames.
abstract_zh: 延时图像序列为动态过程提供了视觉上令人信服的见解，而动态过程太慢而无法实时观察。然而，由于随机效应（例如天气）以及循环效应（例如昼夜循环），将长时间延时序列作为视频播放通常会导致分散注意力的闪烁。我们介绍了以一种允许对图像中的总体趋势、循环效应和随机效应进行单独的事后控制的方式解开延时序列的问题，并描述了一种基于数据驱动的生成模型来实现这一目标的技术。这使我们能够以单独使用输入图像无法实现的方式“重新渲染”序列。例如，我们可以稳定一个长序列，以在多个月内、在可选择的、一致的天气下关注植物的生长。我们的方法基于生成对抗网络（GAN），该网络以延时序列的时间坐标为条件。我们的架构和训练程序经过专门设计，以便网络能够学习使用 GAN 的潜在空间对随机变化（例如天气）进行建模，并通过使用具有特定频率的傅里叶特征将调节时间标签馈送到模型中来理清总体趋势和循环变化。我们表明，我们的模型对训练数据中的缺陷具有鲁棒性，使我们能够解决捕获长延时序列的一些实际困难，例如临时遮挡、帧间距不均匀和帧丢失。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的方法，用于分离时间序列图像中的随机效应（如天气）和周期性效应（如昼夜循环），实现对时间序列的后期控制与重渲染。
AI.motivation: 长时间延时摄影序列在回放时因随机和周期性效应导致画面闪烁，影响对长期趋势的观察。需通过分离这些效应以实现稳定、可控的序列重生成。
AI.method: 采用条件GAN，通过时间坐标条件和傅里叶特征分离周期性效应，利用潜在空间建模随机效应。训练过程针对数据缺陷（如缺失帧）进行鲁棒性优化。
AI.result: 模型可有效分离并控制随机与周期性效应，例如生成无天气干扰的植物生长序列，且对训练数据缺陷具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过GAN与傅里叶特征结合，成功实现了时间序列中多类效应的解耦，为延时摄影的后期处理提供了新思路。

Our approach is based on Generative Adversarial Networks (GAN) that are conditioned with the time coordinate of the time-lapse sequence. Our architecture and training procedure are designed so that the networks learn to model random variations, such as weather, using the GAN's latent space, and to disentangle overall trends and cyclic variations by feeding the conditioning time label to the model using Fourier features with specific frequencies. We show that our models are robust to defects in the training data, enabling us to amend some of the practical difficulties in capturing long time-lapse sequences, such as temporary occlusions, uneven frame spacing, and missing frames. 延时图像序列为动态过程提供了视觉上令人信服的见解，而动态过程太慢而无法实时观察。然而，由于随机效应（例如天气）以及循环效应（例如昼夜循环），将长时间延时序列作为视频播放通常会导致分散注意力的闪烁。我们介绍了以一种允许对图像中的总体趋势、循环效应和随机效应进行单独的事后控制的方式解开延时序列的问题，并描述了一种基于数据驱动的生成模型来实现这一目标的技术。这使我们能够以单独使用输入图像无法实现的方式“重新渲染”序列。例如，我们可以稳定一个长序列，以在多个月内、在可选择的、一致的天气下关注植物的生长。我们的方法基于生成对抗网络（GAN），该网络以延时序列的时间坐标为条件。我们的架构和训练程序经过专门设计，以便网络能够学习使用 GAN 的潜在空间对随机变化（例如天气）进行建模，并通过使用具有特定频率的傅里叶特征将调节时间标签馈送到模型中来理清总体趋势和循环变化。我们表明，我们的模型对训练数据中的缺陷具有鲁棒性，使我们能够解决捕获长延时序列的一些实际困难，例如临时遮挡、帧间距不均匀和帧丢失。 本文提出一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的方法，用于分离时间序列图像中的随机效应（如天气）和周期性效应（如昼夜循环），实现对时间序列的后期控制与重渲染。 Erik Härkönen,Miika Aittala,Tuomas Kynkäänniemi,Samuli Laine,Timo Aila,Jaakko Lehtinen cs.CV,cs.GR

authors_text: Zhongxiang Chang,Zhongbao Zhou
title: Satellite image data downlink scheduling problem with family attribute: Model &Algorithm
title_zh: 具有族属性的卫星图像数据下行调度问题：模型与算法
abstract: The asynchronous development between the observation capability and the transition capability results in that an original image data (OID) formed by one-time observation cannot be completely transmitted in one transmit chance between the EOS and GS (named as a visible time window, VTW). It needs to segment the OID to several segmented image data (SID) and then transmits them in several VTWs, which enriches the extension of satellite image data downlink scheduling problem (SIDSP). We define the novel SIDSP as satellite image data downlink scheduling problem with family attribute (SIDSPWFA), in which some big OID is segmented by a fast segmentation operator first, and all SID and other no-segmented OID is transmitted in the second step. Two optimization objectives, the image data transmission failure rate (FR) and the segmentation times (ST), are then designed to formalize SIDSPWFA as a bi-objective discrete optimization model. Furthermore, a bi-stage differential evolutionary algorithm(DE+NSGA-II) is developed holding several bi-stage operators. Extensive simulation instances show the efficiency of models, strategies, algorithms and operators is analyzed in detail.
summary: The asynchronous development between the observation capability and the transition capability results in that an original image data (OID) formed by one-time observation cannot be completely transmitted in one transmit chance between the EOS and GS (named as a visible time window, VTW). It needs to segment the OID to several segmented image data (SID) and then transmits them in several VTWs, which enriches the extension of satellite image data downlink scheduling problem (SIDSP). We define the novel SIDSP as satellite image data downlink scheduling problem with family attribute (SIDSPWFA), in which some big OID is segmented by a fast segmentation operator first, and all SID and other no-segmented OID is transmitted in the second step. Two optimization objectives, the image data transmission failure rate (FR) and the segmentation times (ST), are then designed to formalize SIDSPWFA as a bi-objective discrete optimization model. Furthermore, a bi-stage differential evolutionary algorithm(DE+NSGA-II) is developed holding several bi-stage operators. Extensive simulation instances show the efficiency of models, strategies, algorithms and operators is analyzed in detail.
abstract_zh: 观察能力和转换能力的异步发展导致一次性观察形成的原始图像数据(OID)无法在EOS和GS之间的一次传输机会(称为可见时间窗口，VTW)中完全传输。它需要将OID分割成多个分段图像数据（SID），然后将它们在多个VTW中传输，这丰富了卫星图像数据下行链路调度问题（SIDSP）的扩展。我们将新颖的SIDSP定义为具有族属性的卫星图像数据下行调度问题（SIDSPWFA），其中一些大的OID首先由快速分割算子分割，然后在第二步中传输所有SID和其他未分割的OID。然后设计两个优化目标，图像数据传输失败率（FR）和分割时间（ST），将SIDSPWFA形式化为双目标离散优化模型。此外，还开发了一种包含多个双阶段算子的双阶段差分进化算法（DE+NSGA-II）。大量的仿真实例展示了模型、策略、算法和算子的效率，并进行了详细分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种具有家庭属性的卫星图像数据下传调度问题（SIDSPWFA）模型与算法，解决因观测与传输能力不匹配导致的图像数据分割传输调度难题。
AI.motivation: 卫星观测能力与地面传输能力发展不均衡，导致单次观测数据无法在单个传输窗口内完整下传，需分割传输并优化调度策略以降低传输失败率和分割次数。
AI.method: 构建双目标离散优化模型（最小化传输失败率和分割次数），设计双阶段差分进化算法（DE+NSGA-II）并开发多阶段操作符解决SIDSPWFA问题。
AI.result: 通过大量仿真验证，模型和算法在传输效率、分割次数优化及调度策略有效性方面表现优异，显著提升卫星数据下传性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的SIDSPWFA模型与双阶段算法有效平衡了传输可靠性与分割成本，为复杂场景下的卫星数据调度提供新方法。

authors_text: Rubén Izquierdo,Álvaro Quintanar,David Fernández Llorca,Iván García Daza,Noelia Hernández,Ignacio Parra,Miguel Ángel Sotelo
title: Vehicle Trajectory Prediction on Highways Using Bird Eye View Representations and Deep Learning
title_zh: 使用鸟瞰图表示和深度学习来预测高速公路上的车辆轨迹
comment: This work has been accepted for publication at Applied Intelligence
comments: This work has been accepted for publication at Applied Intelligence
abstract: This work presents a novel method for predicting vehicle trajectories in highway scenarios using efficient bird's eye view representations and convolutional neural networks. Vehicle positions, motion histories, road configuration, and vehicle interactions are easily included in the prediction model using basic visual representations. The U-net model has been selected as the prediction kernel to generate future visual representations of the scene using an image-to-image regression approach. A method has been implemented to extract vehicle positions from the generated graphical representations to achieve subpixel resolution. The method has been trained and evaluated using the PREVENTION dataset, an on-board sensor dataset. Different network configurations and scene representations have been evaluated. This study found that U-net with 6 depth levels using a linear terminal layer and a Gaussian representation of the vehicles is the best performing configuration. The use of lane markings was found to produce no improvement in prediction performance. The average prediction error is 0.47 and 0.38 meters and the final prediction error is 0.76 and 0.53 meters for longitudinal and lateral coordinates, respectively, for a predicted trajectory length of 2.0 seconds. The prediction error is up to 50% lower compared to the baseline method.
summary: This work presents a novel method for predicting vehicle trajectories in highway scenarios using efficient bird's eye view representations and convolutional neural networks. Vehicle positions, motion histories, road configuration, and vehicle interactions are easily included in the prediction model using basic visual representations. The U-net model has been selected as the prediction kernel to generate future visual representations of the scene using an image-to-image regression approach. A method has been implemented to extract vehicle positions from the generated graphical representations to achieve subpixel resolution. The method has been trained and evaluated using the PREVENTION dataset, an on-board sensor dataset. Different network configurations and scene representations have been evaluated. This study found that U-net with 6 depth levels using a linear terminal layer and a Gaussian representation of the vehicles is the best performing configuration. The use of lane markings was found to produce no improvement in prediction performance. The average prediction error is 0.47 and 0.38 meters and the final prediction error is 0.76 and 0.53 meters for longitudinal and lateral coordinates, respectively, for a predicted trajectory length of 2.0 seconds. The prediction error is up to 50% lower compared to the baseline method.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种使用高效鸟瞰图表示和卷积神经网络来预测高速公路场景中车辆轨迹的新颖方法。使用基本的视觉表示，可以轻松地将车辆位置、运动历史、道路配置和车辆交互包含在预测模型中。 U-net 模型被选为预测内核，以使用图像到图像回归方法生成场景的未来视觉表示。已经实施了一种方法来从生成的图形表示中提取车辆位置以实现亚像素分辨率。该方法已使用机载传感器数据集 PREVENTION 数据集进行了训练和评估。已经评估了不同的网络配置和场景表示。这项研究发现，使用线性终端层和车辆高斯表示的 6 个深度级别的 U 网是性能最佳的配置。研究发现，使用车道标记并不会提高预测性能。对于预测轨迹长度为2.0秒，纵向和横向坐标的平均预测误差为0.47和0.38米，最终预测误差分别为0.76和0.53米。与基线方法相比，预测误差降低了 50%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于鸟瞰图表示和卷积神经网络的高速公路车辆轨迹预测方法。
AI.motivation: 为提升自动驾驶场景中车辆轨迹预测精度，需融合车辆位置、运动历史及道路交互信息。
AI.method: 采用U-Net模型作为预测核心，通过图像到图像回归生成场景视觉表示，并提取亚像素级车辆位置；使用PREVENTION数据集进行训练与评估。
AI.result: 纵向和横向坐标预测误差分别为0.47/0.76米和0.38/0.53米，较基线方法误差降低50%；车道线信息未提升预测性能。
AI.conclusion: 6层深度U-Net搭配线性终端层和高斯车辆表示为最优配置，证明了鸟瞰图表示与深度学习结合在轨迹预测中的有效性。

authors_text: Björn Lindqvist,Sina Sharif Mansouri,Jakub Haluška,George Nikolakopoulos
title: Reactive Navigation of an Unmanned Aerial Vehicle with Perception-based Obstacle Avoidance Constraints
title_zh: 具有基于感知的避障约束的无人机反应导航
abstract: In this article we propose a reactive constrained navigation scheme, with embedded obstacles avoidance for an Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV), for enabling navigation in obstacle-dense environments. The proposed navigation architecture is based on Nonlinear Model Predictive Control (NMPC), and utilizes an on-board 2D LiDAR to detect obstacles and translate online the key geometric information of the environment into parametric constraints for the NMPC that constrain the available position-space for the UAV. This article focuses also on the real-world implementation and experimental validation of the proposed reactive navigation scheme, and it is applied in multiple challenging laboratory experiments, where we also conduct comparisons with relevant methods of reactive obstacle avoidance. The solver utilized in the proposed approach is the Optimization Engine (OpEn) and the Proximal Averaged Newton for Optimal Control (PANOC) algorithm, where a penalty method is applied to properly consider obstacles and input constraints during the navigation task. The proposed novel scheme allows for fast solutions, while using limited on-board computational power, that is a required feature for the overall closed loop performance of an UAV and is applied in multiple real-time scenarios. The combination of built-in obstacle avoidance and real-time applicability makes the proposed reactive constrained navigation scheme an elegant framework for UAVs that is able to perform fast nonlinear control, local path-planning and obstacle avoidance, all embedded in the control layer.

The proposed navigation architecture is based on Nonlinear Model Predictive Control (NMPC), and utilizes an on-board 2D LiDAR to detect obstacles and translate online the key geometric information of the environment into parametric constraints for the NMPC that constrain the available position-space for the UAV. This article focuses also on the real-world implementation and experimental validation of the proposed reactive navigation scheme, and it is applied in multiple challenging laboratory experiments, where we also conduct comparisons with relevant methods of reactive obstacle avoidance. The solver utilized in the proposed approach is the Optimization Engine (OpEn) and the Proximal Averaged Newton for Optimal Control (PANOC) algorithm, where a penalty method is applied to properly consider obstacles and input constraints during the navigation task. The proposed novel scheme allows for fast solutions, while using limited on-board computational power, that is a required feature for the overall closed loop performance of an UAV and is applied in multiple real-time scenarios. The combination of built-in obstacle avoidance and real-time applicability makes the proposed reactive constrained navigation scheme an elegant framework for UAVs that is able to perform fast nonlinear control, local path-planning and obstacle avoidance, all embedded in the control layer.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种反应式约束导航方案，具有嵌入式避障功能，适用于无人机 (UAV)，可在障碍物密集的环境中实现导航。所提出的导航架构基于非线性模型预测控制（NMPC），利用机载 2D LiDAR 来检测障碍物，并将环境的关键几何信息在线转换为 NMPC 的参数约束，从而限制无人机的可用位置空间。本文还重点介绍了所提出的反应式导航方案的实际实现和实验验证，并将其应用于多个具有挑战性的实验室实验，同时我们还与反应式避障的相关方法进行了比较。该方法中使用的求解器是优化引擎（OpEn）和近端平均牛顿最优控制（PANOC）算法，其中应用惩罚方法来正确考虑导航任务期间的障碍物和输入约束。所提出的新颖方案允许快速解决方案，同时使用有限的机载计算能力，这是无人机整体闭环性能所需的功能，并应用于多种实时场景。内置避障和实时适用性的结合使得所提出的反应约束导航方案成为无人机的优雅框架，能够执行快速非线性控制、局部路径规划和避障，所有这些都嵌入在控制层中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于感知的避障约束反应式导航方案，使无人机能够在障碍密集环境中实现实时导航。
AI.motivation: 传统导航方法在动态障碍密集环境中难以满足实时性和避障需求，需开发高效嵌入式解决方案。
AI.method: 采用非线性模型预测控制（NMPC）框架，结合机载2D LiDAR感知数据生成环境约束，并通过OpEn优化引擎与PANOC算法实现快速求解。
AI.result: 在多个实验室实验中验证了方案有效性，相比现有方法展现出更优的实时避障性能与计算效率。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过整合避障约束与实时控制，为无人机提供了适用于复杂环境的嵌入式导航解决方案。

search_text: Reactive Navigation of an Unmanned Aerial Vehicle with Perception-based Obstacle Avoidance Constraints 具有基于感知的避障约束的无人机反应导航 In this article we propose a reactive constrained navigation scheme, with embedded obstacles avoidance for an Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV), for enabling navigation in obstacle-dense environments. The proposed navigation architecture is based on Nonlinear Model Predictive Control (NMPC), and utilizes an on-board 2D LiDAR to detect obstacles and translate online the key geometric information of the environment into parametric constraints for the NMPC that constrain the available position-space for the UAV. This article focuses also on the real-world implementation and experimental validation of the proposed reactive navigation scheme, and it is applied in multiple challenging laboratory experiments, where we also conduct comparisons with relevant methods of reactive obstacle avoidance. The solver utilized in the proposed approach is the Optimization Engine (OpEn) and the Proximal Averaged Newton for Optimal Control (PANOC) algorithm, where a penalty method is applied to properly consider obstacles and input constraints during the navigation task. The proposed novel scheme allows for fast solutions, while using limited on-board computational power, that is a required feature for the overall closed loop performance of an UAV and is applied in multiple real-time scenarios. The combination of built-in obstacle avoidance and real-time applicability makes the proposed reactive constrained navigation scheme an elegant framework for UAVs that is able to perform fast nonlinear control, local path-planning and obstacle avoidance, all embedded in the control layer. 在本文中，我们提出了一种反应式约束导航方案，具有嵌入式避障功能，适用于无人机 (UAV)，可在障碍物密集的环境中实现导航。所提出的导航架构基于非线性模型预测控制（NMPC），利用机载 2D LiDAR 来检测障碍物，并将环境的关键几何信息在线转换为 NMPC 的参数约束，从而限制无人机的可用位置空间。本文还重点介绍了所提出的反应式导航方案的实际实现和实验验证，并将其应用于多个具有挑战性的实验室实验，同时我们还与反应式避障的相关方法进行了比较。该方法中使用的求解器是优化引擎（OpEn）和近端平均牛顿最优控制（PANOC）算法，其中应用惩罚方法来正确考虑导航任务期间的障碍物和输入约束。所提出的新颖方案允许快速解决方案，同时使用有限的机载计算能力，这是无人机整体闭环性能所需的功能，并应用于多种实时场景。内置避障和实时适用性的结合使得所提出的反应约束导航方案成为无人机的优雅框架，能够执行快速非线性控制、局部路径规划和避障，所有这些都嵌入在控制层中。 本文提出一种基于感知的避障约束反应式导航方案，使无人机能够在障碍密集环境中实现实时导航。 Björn Lindqvist,Sina Sharif Mansouri,Jakub Haluška,George Nikolakopoulos cs.RO

authors_text: Zhikai Li,Qingyi Gu
title: I-ViT: Integer-only Quantization for Efficient Vision Transformer Inference
title_zh: I-ViT：用于高效视觉变压器推理的纯整数量化
abstract: Vision Transformers (ViTs) have achieved state-of-the-art performance on various computer vision applications. However, these models have considerable storage and computational overheads, making their deployment and efficient inference on edge devices challenging. Quantization is a promising approach to reducing model complexity, and the dyadic arithmetic pipeline can allow the quantized models to perform efficient integer-only inference. Unfortunately, dyadic arithmetic is based on the homogeneity condition in convolutional neural networks, which is not applicable to the non-linear components in ViTs, making integer-only inference of ViTs an open issue. In this paper, we propose I-ViT, an integer-only quantization scheme for ViTs, to enable ViTs to perform the entire computational graph of inference with integer arithmetic and bit-shifting, and without any floating-point arithmetic. In I-ViT, linear operations (e.g., MatMul and Dense) follow the integer-only pipeline with dyadic arithmetic, and non-linear operations (e.g., Softmax, GELU, and LayerNorm) are approximated by the proposed light-weight integer-only arithmetic methods. More specifically, I-ViT applies the proposed Shiftmax and ShiftGELU, which are designed to use integer bit-shifting to approximate the corresponding floating-point operations. We evaluate I-ViT on various benchmark models and the results show that integer-only INT8 quantization achieves comparable (or even slightly higher) accuracy to the full-precision (FP) baseline. Furthermore, we utilize TVM for practical hardware deployment on the GPU's integer arithmetic units, achieving 3.72$\sim$4.11$\times$ inference speedup compared to the FP model. Code of both Pytorch and TVM is released at https://github.com/zkkli/I-ViT.
summary: Vision Transformers (ViTs) have achieved state-of-the-art performance on various computer vision applications. However, these models have considerable storage and computational overheads, making their deployment and efficient inference on edge devices challenging. Quantization is a promising approach to reducing model complexity, and the dyadic arithmetic pipeline can allow the quantized models to perform efficient integer-only inference. Unfortunately, dyadic arithmetic is based on the homogeneity condition in convolutional neural networks, which is not applicable to the non-linear components in ViTs, making integer-only inference of ViTs an open issue. In this paper, we propose I-ViT, an integer-only quantization scheme for ViTs, to enable ViTs to perform the entire computational graph of inference with integer arithmetic and bit-shifting, and without any floating-point arithmetic. In I-ViT, linear operations (e.g., MatMul and Dense) follow the integer-only pipeline with dyadic arithmetic, and non-linear operations (e.g., Softmax, GELU, and LayerNorm) are approximated by the proposed light-weight integer-only arithmetic methods. More specifically, I-ViT applies the proposed Shiftmax and ShiftGELU, which are designed to use integer bit-shifting to approximate the corresponding floating-point operations. We evaluate I-ViT on various benchmark models and the results show that integer-only INT8 quantization achieves comparable (or even slightly higher) accuracy to the full-precision (FP) baseline. Furthermore, we utilize TVM for practical hardware deployment on the GPU's integer arithmetic units, achieving 3.72$\sim$4.11$\times$ inference speedup compared to the FP model. Code of both Pytorch and TVM is released at https://github.com/zkkli/I-ViT.
abstract_zh: Vision Transformers (ViTs) 在各种计算机视觉应用中实现了最先进的性能。然而，这些模型具有相当大的存储和计算开销，使得它们在边缘设备上的部署和高效推理具有挑战性。量化是降低模型复杂性的一种有前景的方法，二元算术管道可以允许量化模型执行高效的纯整数推理。不幸的是，二进运算基于卷积神经网络中的同质性条件，不适用于 ViT 中的非线性分量，使得 ViT 的纯整数推理成为一个悬而未决的问题。在本文中，我们提出了 I-ViT，一种 ViT 的纯整数量化方案，使 ViT 能够通过整数运算和位移来执行整个推理计算图，而不需要任何浮点运算。在 I-ViT 中，线性运算（例如，MatMul 和 Dense）遵循二元算术的纯整数管道，而非线性运算（例如，Softmax、GELU 和 LayerNorm）则通过所提出的轻量级纯整数算术方法来近似。更具体地说，I-ViT 应用了所提出的 Shiftmax 和 ShiftGELU，它们被设计为使用整数位移来近似相应的浮点运算。我们在各种基准模型上评估 I-ViT，结果表明纯整数 INT8 量化实现了与全精度 (FP) 基线相当（甚至稍高）的精度。此外，我们利用 TVM 在 GPU 的整数运算单元上进行实际硬件部署，与 FP 模型相比，实现了 3.72$\sim$4.11$\times$ 推理加速。 Pytorch 和 TVM 的代码均在 https://github.com/zkkli/I-ViT 上发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出I-ViT方法，通过整型量化实现视觉Transformer（ViT）在边缘设备上的高效推理。
AI.motivation: ViT模型虽性能优异，但存在存储和计算开销大、难以部署到边缘设备的问题，而现有量化方法无法有效处理ViT的非线性组件。
AI.method: 设计整型量化方案I-ViT，对线性操作采用dyadic arithmetic，对非线性操作（如Softmax、GELU）提出Shiftmax和ShiftGELU等轻量整型近似方法，并通过TVM实现硬件部署。
AI.result: INT8量化在多个基准模型上达到与全精度模型相当或更高的精度，GPU部署后推理速度提升3.72~4.11倍。
AI.conclusion: I-ViT有效解决了ViT整型推理难题，在保持精度的同时显著提升推理效率，适用于边缘设备部署。

authors_text: Ling Gao,Yuxuan Liang,Jiaqi Yang,Shaoxun Wu,Chenyu Wang,Jiaben Chen,Laurent Kneip
title: VECtor: A Versatile Event-Centric Benchmark for Multi-Sensor SLAM
title_zh: VECtor：多传感器 SLAM 的多功能、以事件为中心的基准
abstract: Event cameras have recently gained in popularity as they hold strong potential to complement regular cameras in situations of high dynamics or challenging illumination. An important problem that may benefit from the addition of an event camera is given by Simultaneous Localization And Mapping (SLAM). However, in order to ensure progress on event-inclusive multi-sensor SLAM, novel benchmark sequences are needed. Our contribution is the first complete set of benchmark datasets captured with a multi-sensor setup containing an event-based stereo camera, a regular stereo camera, multiple depth sensors, and an inertial measurement unit. The setup is fully hardware-synchronized and underwent accurate extrinsic calibration. All sequences come with ground truth data captured by highly accurate external reference devices such as a motion capture system. Individual sequences include both small and large-scale environments, and cover the specific challenges targeted by dynamic vision sensors.
summary: Event cameras have recently gained in popularity as they hold strong potential to complement regular cameras in situations of high dynamics or challenging illumination. An important problem that may benefit from the addition of an event camera is given by Simultaneous Localization And Mapping (SLAM). However, in order to ensure progress on event-inclusive multi-sensor SLAM, novel benchmark sequences are needed. Our contribution is the first complete set of benchmark datasets captured with a multi-sensor setup containing an event-based stereo camera, a regular stereo camera, multiple depth sensors, and an inertial measurement unit. The setup is fully hardware-synchronized and underwent accurate extrinsic calibration. All sequences come with ground truth data captured by highly accurate external reference devices such as a motion capture system. Individual sequences include both small and large-scale environments, and cover the specific challenges targeted by dynamic vision sensors.
abstract_zh: 事件摄像机最近越来越受欢迎，因为它们在高动态或具有挑战性的照明情况下具有补充常规摄像机的强大潜力。同时定位和建图 (SLAM) 给出了一个可能受益于添加事件摄像机的重要问题。然而，为了确保包含事件的多传感器 SLAM 取得进展，需要新颖的基准序列。我们的贡献是使用多传感器设置捕获的第一套完整的基准数据集，其中包含基于事件的立体相机、常规立体相机、多个深度传感器和惯性测量单元。该设置完全硬件同步，并经过精确的外部校准。所有序列都带有由高精度外部参考设备（例如运动捕捉系统）捕获的地面实况数据。各个序列包括小型和大型环境，并涵盖动态视觉传感器针对的特定挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VECtor基准数据集，用于多传感器SLAM研究，包含事件相机、常规相机、深度传感器和IMU的同步数据。
AI.motivation: 事件相机在动态场景和复杂光照下表现优异，但缺乏针对多传感器SLAM的基准数据集，阻碍了相关算法的发展。
AI.method: 构建多传感器硬件系统，包含事件相机、常规相机、深度传感器和IMU，并通过精确外参标定与运动捕捉系统获取真实轨迹数据，覆盖多种规模场景。
AI.result: 发布首个完整多传感器SLAM基准数据集，包含小规模和大规模环境数据，涵盖动态视觉传感器的关键挑战。
AI.conclusion: VECtor基准为事件相机融合多传感器的SLAM算法研究提供了标准化测试平台，推动该领域技术进步。
