search_text: VECtor: A Versatile Event-Centric Benchmark for Multi-Sensor SLAM VECtor：多传感器 SLAM 的多功能、以事件为中心的基准 Event cameras have recently gained in popularity as they hold strong potential to complement regular cameras in situations of high dynamics or challenging illumination. An important problem that may benefit from the addition of an event camera is given by Simultaneous Localization And Mapping (SLAM). However, in order to ensure progress on event-inclusive multi-sensor SLAM, novel benchmark sequences are needed. Our contribution is the first complete set of benchmark datasets captured with a multi-sensor setup containing an event-based stereo camera, a regular stereo camera, multiple depth sensors, and an inertial measurement unit. The setup is fully hardware-synchronized and underwent accurate extrinsic calibration. All sequences come with ground truth data captured by highly accurate external reference devices such as a motion capture system. Individual sequences include both small and large-scale environments, and cover the specific challenges targeted by dynamic vision sensors. 事件摄像机最近越来越受欢迎，因为它们在高动态或具有挑战性的照明情况下具有补充常规摄像机的强大潜力。同时定位和建图 (SLAM) 给出了一个可能受益于添加事件摄像机的重要问题。然而，为了确保包含事件的多传感器 SLAM 取得进展，需要新颖的基准序列。我们的贡献是使用多传感器设置捕获的第一套完整的基准数据集，其中包含基于事件的立体相机、常规立体相机、多个深度传感器和惯性测量单元。该设置完全硬件同步，并经过精确的外部校准。所有序列都带有由高精度外部参考设备（例如运动捕捉系统）捕获的地面实况数据。各个序列包括小型和大型环境，并涵盖动态视觉传感器针对的特定挑战。 本文提出VECtor基准数据集，用于多传感器SLAM研究，包含事件相机、常规相机、深度传感器和IMU的同步数据。 Ling Gao,Yuxuan Liang,Jiaqi Yang,Shaoxun Wu,Chenyu Wang,Jiaben Chen,Laurent Kneip cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Madeline Chantry Schiappa,Naman Biyani,Prudvi Kamtam,Shruti Vyas,Hamid Palangi,Vibhav Vineet,Yogesh Rawat
title: Large-scale Robustness Analysis of Video Action Recognition Models
title_zh: 视频动作识别模型的大规模鲁棒性分析
comment: Accepted in 2023 Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR)
comments: Accepted in 2023 Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR)
abstract: We have seen a great progress in video action recognition in recent years. There are several models based on convolutional neural network (CNN) and some recent transformer based approaches which provide top performance on existing benchmarks. In this work, we perform a large-scale robustness analysis of these existing models for video action recognition. We focus on robustness against real-world distribution shift perturbations instead of adversarial perturbations. We propose four different benchmark datasets, HMDB51-P, UCF101-P, Kinetics400-P, and SSv2-P to perform this analysis. We study robustness of six state-of-the-art action recognition models against 90 different perturbations. The study reveals some interesting findings, 1) transformer based models are consistently more robust compared to CNN based models, 2) Pretraining improves robustness for Transformer based models more than CNN based models, and 3) All of the studied models are robust to temporal perturbations for all datasets but SSv2; suggesting the importance of temporal information for action recognition varies based on the dataset and activities. Next, we study the role of augmentations in model robustness and present a real-world dataset, UCF101-DS, which contains realistic distribution shifts, to further validate some of these findings. We believe this study will serve as a benchmark for future research in robust video action recognition.
summary: We have seen a great progress in video action recognition in recent years. There are several models based on convolutional neural network (CNN) and some recent transformer based approaches which provide top performance on existing benchmarks. In this work, we perform a large-scale robustness analysis of these existing models for video action recognition. We focus on robustness against real-world distribution shift perturbations instead of adversarial perturbations. We propose four different benchmark datasets, HMDB51-P, UCF101-P, Kinetics400-P, and SSv2-P to perform this analysis. We study robustness of six state-of-the-art action recognition models against 90 different perturbations. The study reveals some interesting findings, 1) transformer based models are consistently more robust compared to CNN based models, 2) Pretraining improves robustness for Transformer based models more than CNN based models, and 3) All of the studied models are robust to temporal perturbations for all datasets but SSv2; suggesting the importance of temporal information for action recognition varies based on the dataset and activities. Next, we study the role of augmentations in model robustness and present a real-world dataset, UCF101-DS, which contains realistic distribution shifts, to further validate some of these findings. We believe this study will serve as a benchmark for future research in robust video action recognition.
abstract_zh: 近年来，我们看到视频动作识别方面取得了巨大进步。有几种基于卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的模型和一些最近基于 Transformer 的方法，它们在现有基准上提供了最佳性能。在这项工作中，我们对这些现有的视频动作识别模型进行了大规模的鲁棒性分析。我们专注于对抗现实世界分布变化扰动的鲁棒性，而不是对抗性扰动。我们提出了四种不同的基准数据集：HMDB51-P、UCF101-P、Kinetics400-P 和 SSv2-P 来执行此分析。我们研究了六种最先进的动作识别模型针对 90 种不同扰动的鲁棒性。该研究揭示了一些有趣的发现，1）基于 Transformer 的模型始终比基于 CNN 的模型更稳健，2）预训练比基于 CNN 的模型更能提高基于 Transformer 的模型的鲁棒性，3）所有研究的模型对于除 SSv2 之外的所有数据集都对时间扰动具有鲁棒性；表明时间信息对于动作识别的重要性根据数据集和活动而变化。接下来，我们研究增强在模型鲁棒性中的作用，并提出一个真实世界的数据集 UCF101-DS，其中包含现实的分布变化，以进一步验证其中的一些发现。我们相信这项研究将成为未来鲁棒视频动作识别研究的基准。

AI.tldr: 该论文对视频动作识别模型在真实世界分布偏移下的鲁棒性进行了大规模分析，提出了四个基准数据集并评估了六种先进模型的表现。
AI.motivation: 尽管视频动作识别模型在基准测试中表现优异，但其在真实世界分布偏移下的鲁棒性尚未被充分研究，需探索不同模型架构和预训练策略的影响。
AI.method: 构建了四个包含现实分布偏移的数据集（HMDB51-P、UCF101-P等），测试六种模型在90种扰动下的鲁棒性，并引入UCF101-DS数据集验证增强方法的作用。
AI.result: Transformer模型比CNN更鲁棒，预训练对Transformer的提升更大；所有模型在时间扰动上对大部分数据集鲁棒，但SSv2例外；增强方法对模型鲁棒性有显著影响。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为未来鲁棒视频动作识别提供了基准，揭示了模型架构、预训练和时间信息的重要性，强调了现实分布偏移分析的必要性。

Next, we study the role of augmentations in model robustness and present a real-world dataset, UCF101-DS, which contains realistic distribution shifts, to further validate some of these findings. authors_text: Yaguan Qian,Yuqi Wang,Bin Wang,Zhaoquan Gu,Yuhan Guo,Wassim Swaileh
title: Hessian-Free Second-Order Adversarial Examples for Adversarial Learning
title_zh: 用于对抗性学习的无 Hessian 二阶对抗性示例
abstract: Recent studies show deep neural networks (DNNs) are extremely vulnerable to the elaborately designed adversarial examples. Adversarial learning with those adversarial examples has been proved as one of the most effective methods to defend against such an attack. At present, most existing adversarial examples generation methods are based on first-order gradients, which can hardly further improve models' robustness, especially when facing second-order adversarial attacks. Compared with first-order gradients, second-order gradients provide a more accurate approximation of the loss landscape with respect to natural examples. Inspired by this, our work crafts second-order adversarial examples and uses them to train DNNs. Nevertheless, second-order optimization involves time-consuming calculation for Hessian-inverse. We propose an approximation method through transforming the problem into an optimization in the Krylov subspace, which remarkably reduce the computational complexity to speed up the training procedure. Extensive experiments conducted on the MINIST and CIFAR-10 datasets show that our adversarial learning with second-order adversarial examples outperforms other fisrt-order methods, which can improve the model robustness against a wide range of attacks.
summary: Recent studies show deep neural networks (DNNs) are extremely vulnerable to the elaborately designed adversarial examples. Adversarial learning with those adversarial examples has been proved as one of the most effective methods to defend against such an attack. At present, most existing adversarial examples generation methods are based on first-order gradients, which can hardly further improve models' robustness, especially when facing second-order adversarial attacks. Compared with first-order gradients, second-order gradients provide a more accurate approximation of the loss landscape with respect to natural examples. Inspired by this, our work crafts second-order adversarial examples and uses them to train DNNs. Nevertheless, second-order optimization involves time-consuming calculation for Hessian-inverse. We propose an approximation method through transforming the problem into an optimization in the Krylov subspace, which remarkably reduce the computational complexity to speed up the training procedure. Extensive experiments conducted on the MINIST and CIFAR-10 datasets show that our adversarial learning with second-order adversarial examples outperforms other fisrt-order methods, which can improve the model robustness against a wide range of attacks.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，深度神经网络（DNN）极易受到精心设计的对抗性示例的影响。使用这些对抗性示例进行对抗性学习已被证明是防御此类攻击的最有效方法之一。目前，现有的对抗样本生成方法大多基于一阶梯度，很难进一步提高模型的鲁棒性，特别是在面对二阶对抗攻击时。与一阶梯度相比，二阶梯度提供了关于自然示例的损失景观的更准确的近似。受此启发，我们的工作制作了二阶对抗性示例，并用它们来训练 DNN。然而，二阶优化涉及 Hessian 逆的耗时计算。我们提出了一种通过将问题转化为 Krylov 子空间中的优化问题的近似方法，这显着降低了计算复杂度，从而加快了训练过程。在 MINIST 和 CIFAR-10 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，我们使用二阶对抗示例的对抗学习优于其他一阶方法，这可以提高模型针对各种攻击的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于二阶逆Hessian近似的对抗样本生成方法，用于提升深度神经网络的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有对抗训练方法依赖一阶梯度，难以有效防御二阶对抗攻击，而二阶梯度能更精确刻画损失函数曲面。
AI.method: 通过将问题转化为Krylov子空间优化，提出Hessian-free近似方法降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 在MNIST和CIFAR-10数据集上，该方法在对抗训练中优于一阶方法，显著提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 二阶对抗样本生成方法能有效增强模型对多种攻击的防御能力。

search_text: Hessian-Free Second-Order Adversarial Examples for Adversarial Learning 用于对抗性学习的无 Hessian 二阶对抗性示例 Recent studies show deep neural networks (DNNs) are extremely vulnerable to the elaborately designed adversarial examples. Adversarial learning with those adversarial examples has been proved as one of the most effective methods to defend against such an attack. At present, most existing adversarial examples generation methods are based on first-order gradients, which can hardly further improve models' robustness, especially when facing second-order adversarial attacks. Compared with first-order gradients, second-order gradients provide a more accurate approximation of the loss landscape with respect to natural examples. Inspired by this, our work crafts second-order adversarial examples and uses them to train DNNs. Nevertheless, second-order optimization involves time-consuming calculation for Hessian-inverse. We propose an approximation method through transforming the problem into an optimization in the Krylov subspace, which remarkably reduce the computational complexity to speed up the training procedure. Extensive experiments conducted on the MINIST and CIFAR-10 datasets show that our adversarial learning with second-order adversarial examples outperforms other fisrt-order methods, which can improve the model robustness against a wide range of attacks. 最近的研究表明，深度神经网络（DNN）极易受到精心设计的对抗性示例的影响。使用这些对抗性示例进行对抗性学习已被证明是防御此类攻击的最有效方法之一。目前，现有的对抗样本生成方法大多基于一阶梯度，很难进一步提高模型的鲁棒性，特别是在面对二阶对抗攻击时。与一阶梯度相比，二阶梯度提供了关于自然示例的损失景观的更准确的近似。受此启发，我们的工作制作了二阶对抗性示例，并用它们来训练 DNN。然而，二阶优化涉及 Hessian 逆的耗时计算。我们提出了一种通过将问题转化为 Krylov 子空间中的优化问题的近似方法，这显着降低了计算复杂度，从而加快了训练过程。在 MINIST 和 CIFAR-10 数据集上进行的大量实验表明，我们使用二阶对抗示例的对抗学习优于其他一阶方法，这可以提高模型针对各种攻击的鲁棒性。 本文提出一种基于二阶逆Hessian近似的对抗样本生成方法，用于提升深度神经网络的鲁棒性。 Yaguan Qian,Yuqi Wang,Bin Wang,Zhaoquan Gu,Yuhan Guo,Wassim Swaileh cs.LG,cs.CR,cs.CV

authors_text: Namwoo Lee,Hyunsu Kim,Gayoung Lee,Sungjoo Yoo,Yunjey Choi
title: Memory Efficient Patch-based Training for INR-based GANs
title_zh: 基于 INR 的 GAN 的基于内存高效补丁的训练
abstract: Recent studies have shown remarkable progress in GANs based on implicit neural representation (INR) - an MLP that produces an RGB value given its (x, y) coordinate. They represent an image as a continuous version of the underlying 2D signal instead of a 2D array of pixels, which opens new horizons for GAN applications (e.g., zero-shot super-resolution, image outpainting). However, training existing approaches require a heavy computational cost proportional to the image resolution, since they compute an MLP operation for every (x, y) coordinate. To alleviate this issue, we propose a multi-stage patch-based training, a novel and scalable approach that can train INR-based GANs with a flexible computational cost regardless of the image resolution. Specifically, our method allows to generate and discriminate by patch to learn the local details of the image and learn global structural information by a novel reconstruction loss to enable efficient GAN training. We conduct experiments on several benchmark datasets to demonstrate that our approach enhances baseline models in GPU memory while maintaining FIDs at a reasonable level.
summary: Recent studies have shown remarkable progress in GANs based on implicit neural representation (INR) - an MLP that produces an RGB value given its (x, y) coordinate. They represent an image as a continuous version of the underlying 2D signal instead of a 2D array of pixels, which opens new horizons for GAN applications (e.g., zero-shot super-resolution, image outpainting). However, training existing approaches require a heavy computational cost proportional to the image resolution, since they compute an MLP operation for every (x, y) coordinate. To alleviate this issue, we propose a multi-stage patch-based training, a novel and scalable approach that can train INR-based GANs with a flexible computational cost regardless of the image resolution. Specifically, our method allows to generate and discriminate by patch to learn the local details of the image and learn global structural information by a novel reconstruction loss to enable efficient GAN training. We conduct experiments on several benchmark datasets to demonstrate that our approach enhances baseline models in GPU memory while maintaining FIDs at a reasonable level.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，基于隐式神经表示 (INR) 的 GAN 取得了显着进展，INR 是一种在给定 (x, y) 坐标的情况下生成 RGB 值的 MLP。它们将图像表示为底层 2D 信号的连续版本，而不是 2D 像素阵列，这为 GAN 应用开辟了新的视野（例如，零样本超分辨率、图像绘制）。然而，训练现有方法需要与图像分辨率成正比的大量计算成本，因为它们为每个 (x, y) 坐标计算 MLP 操作。为了缓解这个问题，我们提出了一种基于补丁的多阶段训练，这是一种新颖且可扩展的方法，无论图像分辨率如何，都可以以灵活的计算成本训练基于 INR 的 GAN。具体来说，我们的方法允许通过 patch 进行生成和区分，以学习图像的局部细节，并通过新颖的重建损失学习全局结构信息，从而实现高效的 GAN 训练。我们对几个基准数据集进行了实验，以证明我们的方法增强了 GPU 内存中的基线模型，同时将 FID 保持在合理的水平。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于块的多阶段训练方法，以提高基于隐式神经表示（INR）的生成对抗网络（GAN）的内存效率。
AI.motivation: 现有INR-GAN方法在训练时需为每个坐标计算MLP操作，导致计算成本与图像分辨率成正比，难以高效处理高分辨率图像。
AI.method: 通过分块生成与判别学习局部细节，并引入新型重建损失以捕捉全局结构信息，实现计算成本灵活可控的多阶段训练框架。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多个基准数据集上提升了GPU内存效率，同时保持了合理的FID分数。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效缓解了INR-GAN训练的内存瓶颈问题，在保证图像质量的前提下实现了更高效的训练过程。

authors_text: Geon Park,Jaehong Yoon,Haiyang Zhang,Xing Zhang,Sung Ju Hwang,Yonina C. Eldar
title: BiTAT: Neural Network Binarization with Task-dependent Aggregated Transformation
title_zh: BiTAT：具有任务相关聚合变换的神经网络二值化
abstract: Neural network quantization aims to transform high-precision weights and activations of a given neural network into low-precision weights/activations for reduced memory usage and computation, while preserving the performance of the original model. However, extreme quantization (1-bit weight/1-bit activations) of compactly-designed backbone architectures (e.g., MobileNets) often used for edge-device deployments results in severe performance degeneration. This paper proposes a novel Quantization-Aware Training (QAT) method that can effectively alleviate performance degeneration even with extreme quantization by focusing on the inter-weight dependencies, between the weights within each layer and across consecutive layers. To minimize the quantization impact of each weight on others, we perform an orthonormal transformation of the weights at each layer by training an input-dependent correlation matrix and importance vector, such that each weight is disentangled from the others. Then, we quantize the weights based on their importance to minimize the loss of the information from the original weights/activations. We further perform progressive layer-wise quantization from the bottom layer to the top, so that quantization at each layer reflects the quantized distributions of weights and activations at previous layers. We validate the effectiveness of our method on various benchmark datasets against strong neural quantization baselines, demonstrating that it alleviates the performance degeneration on ImageNet and successfully preserves the full-precision model performance on CIFAR-100 with compact backbone networks.
summary: Neural network quantization aims to transform high-precision weights and activations of a given neural network into low-precision weights/activations for reduced memory usage and computation, while preserving the performance of the original model. However, extreme quantization (1-bit weight/1-bit activations) of compactly-designed backbone architectures (e.g., MobileNets) often used for edge-device deployments results in severe performance degeneration. This paper proposes a novel Quantization-Aware Training (QAT) method that can effectively alleviate performance degeneration even with extreme quantization by focusing on the inter-weight dependencies, between the weights within each layer and across consecutive layers. To minimize the quantization impact of each weight on others, we perform an orthonormal transformation of the weights at each layer by training an input-dependent correlation matrix and importance vector, such that each weight is disentangled from the others. Then, we quantize the weights based on their importance to minimize the loss of the information from the original weights/activations. We further perform progressive layer-wise quantization from the bottom layer to the top, so that quantization at each layer reflects the quantized distributions of weights and activations at previous layers. We validate the effectiveness of our method on various benchmark datasets against strong neural quantization baselines, demonstrating that it alleviates the performance degeneration on ImageNet and successfully preserves the full-precision model performance on CIFAR-100 with compact backbone networks.
abstract_zh: 神经网络量化旨在将给定神经网络的高精度权重和激活转换为低精度权重/激活，以减少内存使用和计算，同时保留原始模型的性能。然而，通常用于边缘设备部署的紧凑设计的骨干架构（例如 MobileNet）的极端量化（1 位权重/1 位激活）会导致严重的性能下降。本文提出了一种新颖的量化感知训练（QAT）方法，通过关注每层内权重之间以及跨连续层的权重之间的权重依赖性，即使在极端量化的情况下也可以有效减轻性能退化。为了最小化每个权重对其他权重的量化影响，我们通过训练依赖于输入的相关矩阵和重要性向量对每一层的权重进行正交归一变换，使得每个权重与其他权重分离。然后，我们根据权重的重要性对其进行量化，以最大程度地减少原始权重/激活中的信息损失。我们进一步从底层到顶层进行逐层量化，以便每一层的量化反映前一层权重和激活的量化分布。我们根据强神经量化基线在各种基准数据集上验证了我们的方法的有效性，证明它减轻了 ImageNet 上的性能退化，并成功地保留了具有紧凑骨干网络的 CIFAR-100 上的全精度模型性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为BiTAT的新型量化感知训练方法，通过解耦权重依赖关系和逐层渐进量化策略，有效缓解极端量化导致的性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有极端量化方法在紧凑型神经网络（如MobileNet）上会导致严重性能退化，尤其在边缘设备部署场景中亟需解决这一问题。
AI.method: 通过训练输入相关联的相关矩阵和重要性向量，对每层权重进行正交变换实现解耦；基于权重重要性进行量化，并采用自底向上的逐层渐进量化策略。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上显著缓解性能退化，在CIFAR-100数据集上成功保持全精度模型性能，优于现有量化基准方法。
AI.conclusion: BiTAT方法通过任务相关变换和层次化量化策略，有效解决了极端量化中的性能保持问题，为边缘设备部署提供了可行方案。

Then, we quantize the weights based on their importance to minimize the loss of the information from the original weights/activations. We further perform progressive layer-wise quantization from the bottom layer to the top, so that quantization at each layer reflects the quantized distributions of weights and activations at previous layers. We validate the effectiveness of our method on various benchmark datasets against strong neural quantization baselines, demonstrating that it alleviates the performance degeneration on ImageNet and successfully preserves the full-precision model performance on CIFAR-100 with compact backbone networks. 神经网络量化旨在将给定神经网络的高精度权重和激活转换为低精度权重/激活，以减少内存使用和计算，同时保留原始模型的性能。然而，通常用于边缘设备部署的紧凑设计的骨干架构（例如 MobileNet）的极端量化（1 位权重/1 位激活）会导致严重的性能下降。本文提出了一种新颖的量化感知训练（QAT）方法，通过关注每层内权重之间以及跨连续层的权重之间的权重依赖性，即使在极端量化的情况下也可以有效减轻性能退化。为了最小化每个权重对其他权重的量化影响，我们通过训练依赖于输入的相关矩阵和重要性向量对每一层的权重进行正交归一变换，使得每个权重与其他权重分离。然后，我们根据权重的重要性对其进行量化，以最大程度地减少原始权重/激活中的信息损失。我们进一步从底层到顶层进行逐层量化，以便每一层的量化反映前一层权重和激活的量化分布。我们根据强神经量化基线在各种基准数据集上验证了我们的方法的有效性，证明它减轻了 ImageNet 上的性能退化，并成功地保留了具有紧凑骨干网络的 CIFAR-100 上的全精度模型性能。 本文提出一种名为BiTAT的新型量化感知训练方法，通过解耦权重依赖关系和逐层渐进量化策略，有效缓解极端量化导致的性能下降问题。 Geon Park,Jaehong Yoon,Haiyang Zhang,Xing Zhang,Sung Ju Hwang,Yonina C. Eldar cs.CV,stat.ML

authors_text: André Ferreira,Jianning Li,Kelsey L. Pomykala,Jens Kleesiek,Victor Alves,Jan Egger
title: FakeNews: GAN-based generation of realistic 3D volumetric data -- A systematic review and taxonomy
title_zh: FakeNews：基于 GAN 的真实 3D 体积数据生成——系统回顾和分类
abstract: With the massive proliferation of data-driven algorithms, such as deep learning-based approaches, the availability of high-quality data is of great interest. Volumetric data is very important in medicine, as it ranges from disease diagnoses to therapy monitoring. When the dataset is sufficient, models can be trained to help doctors with these tasks. Unfortunately, there are scenarios where large amounts of data is unavailable. For example, rare diseases and privacy issues can lead to restricted data availability. In non-medical fields, the high cost of obtaining enough high-quality data can also be a concern. A solution to these problems can be the generation of realistic synthetic data using Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs). The existence of these mechanisms is a good asset, especially in healthcare, as the data must be of good quality, realistic, and without privacy issues. Therefore, most of the publications on volumetric GANs are within the medical domain. In this review, we provide a summary of works that generate realistic volumetric synthetic data using GANs. We therefore outline GAN-based methods in these areas with common architectures, loss functions and evaluation metrics, including their advantages and disadvantages. We present a novel taxonomy, evaluations, challenges, and research opportunities to provide a holistic overview of the current state of volumetric GANs.
summary: With the massive proliferation of data-driven algorithms, such as deep learning-based approaches, the availability of high-quality data is of great interest. Therefore, most of the publications on volumetric GANs are within the medical domain. In this review, we provide a summary of works that generate realistic volumetric synthetic data using GANs. We therefore outline GAN-based methods in these areas with common architectures, loss functions and evaluation metrics, including their advantages and disadvantages. We present a novel taxonomy, evaluations, challenges, and research opportunities to provide a holistic overview of the current state of volumetric GANs.
abstract_zh: 随着数据驱动算法（例如基于深度学习的方法）的大量涌现，高质量数据的可用性引起了人们的极大兴趣。体积数据在医学中非常重要，因为它的范围从疾病诊断到治疗监测。当数据集足够时，可以训练模型来帮助医生完成这些任务。不幸的是，在某些情况下无法获得大量数据。例如，罕见疾病和隐私问题可能导致数据可用性受到限制。在非医学领域，获取足够高质量数据的高成本也可能是一个问题。这些问题的解决方案可以是使用生成对抗网络（GAN）生成真实的合成数据。这些机制的存在是一笔很好的资产，尤其是在医疗保健领域，因为数据必须具有良好的质量、真实且没有隐私问题。因此，大多数关于体积 GAN 的出版物都属于医学领域。在这篇综述中，我们总结了使用 GAN 生成真实体积合成数据的工作。因此，我们概述了这些领域中基于 GAN 的方法，包括通用架构、损失函数和评估指标，包括它们的优点和缺点。我们提出了一种新颖的分类法、评估、挑战和研究机会，以全面概述体积 GAN 的现状。

AI.tldr: 本文对基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的3D体积数据生成方法进行系统综述，并提出新的分类体系。
AI.motivation: 高质量3D体积数据在医学等领域至关重要，但面临数据稀缺、隐私限制及获取成本高等问题，需通过GAN生成合成数据解决。
AI.method: 系统梳理GAN生成3D体积数据的主流架构、损失函数与评估指标，分析其优缺点，并构建新型分类体系与研究挑战框架。
AI.result: 总结现有方法的技术路线，提出分类标准，归纳评估指标，揭示当前技术瓶颈与未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: GAN在生成高质量3D数据方面潜力显著，但需进一步优化生成质量与计算效率，分类体系为后续研究提供参考框架。

authors_text: Chunzhi Gu,Jun Yu,Chao Zhang
title: Learning Disentangled Representations for Controllable Human Motion Prediction
title_zh: 学习用于可控人体运动预测的解缠结表示
abstract: Generative model-based motion prediction techniques have recently realized predicting controlled human motions, such as predicting multiple upper human body motions with similar lower-body motions. However, to achieve this, the state-of-the-art methods require either subsequently learning mapping functions to seek similar motions or training the model repetitively to enable control over the desired portion of body. In this paper, we propose a novel framework to learn disentangled representations for controllable human motion prediction. Our network involves a conditional variational auto-encoder (CVAE) architecture to model full-body human motion, and an extra CVAE path to learn only the corresponding partial-body (e.g., lower-body) motion. Specifically, the inductive bias imposed by the extra CVAE path encourages two latent variables in two paths to respectively govern separate representations for each partial-body motion. With a single training, our model is able to provide two types of controls for the generated human motions: (i) strictly controlling one portion of human body and (ii) adaptively controlling the other portion, by sampling from a pair of latent spaces. Additionally, we extend and adapt a sampling strategy to our trained model to diversify the controllable predictions. Our framework also potentially allows new forms of control by flexibly customizing the input for the extra CVAE path. Extensive experimental results and ablation studies demonstrate that our approach is capable of predicting state-of-the-art controllable human motions both qualitatively and quantitatively.
summary: Generative model-based motion prediction techniques have recently realized predicting controlled human motions, such as predicting multiple upper human body motions with similar lower-body motions. However, to achieve this, the state-of-the-art methods require either subsequently learning mapping functions to seek similar motions or training the model repetitively to enable control over the desired portion of body. In this paper, we propose a novel framework to learn disentangled representations for controllable human motion prediction. Our network involves a conditional variational auto-encoder (CVAE) architecture to model full-body human motion, and an extra CVAE path to learn only the corresponding partial-body (e.g., lower-body) motion. Specifically, the inductive bias imposed by the extra CVAE path encourages two latent variables in two paths to respectively govern separate representations for each partial-body motion. With a single training, our model is able to provide two types of controls for the generated human motions: (i) strictly controlling one portion of human body and (ii) adaptively controlling the other portion, by sampling from a pair of latent spaces. Additionally, we extend and adapt a sampling strategy to our trained model to diversify the controllable predictions. Our framework also potentially allows new forms of control by flexibly customizing the input for the extra CVAE path. Extensive experimental results and ablation studies demonstrate that our approach is capable of predicting state-of-the-art controllable human motions both qualitatively and quantitatively.
abstract_zh: 基于生成模型的运动预测技术最近已经实现了预测受控人体运动，例如预测具有类似下半身运动的多个上半身运动。然而，为了实现这一目标，最先进的方法需要随后学习映射函数来寻找类似的运动，或者重复训练模型以实现对身体所需部分的控制。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的框架来学习用于可控人体运动预测的解缠结表示。我们的网络涉及一个条件变分自动编码器（CVAE）架构来模拟全身人体运动，以及一个额外的 CVAE 路径来仅学习相应的部分身体（例如下半身）运动。具体来说，额外的 CVAE 路径施加的归纳偏差鼓励两条路径中的两个潜在变量分别控制每个部分身体运动的单独表示。通过一次训练，我们的模型能够为生成的人体运动提供两种类型的控制：（i）严格控制人体的一部分；（ii）通过从一对潜在空间采样来自适应控制另一部分。此外，我们将采样策略扩展并适应我们训练的模型，以使可控预测多样化。我们的框架还可能通过灵活定制额外 CVAE 路径的输入来允许新的控制形式。大量的实验结果和消融研究表明，我们的方法能够定性和定量地预测最先进的可控人体运动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种学习解耦表示的新框架，用于实现可控的人体运动预测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法需多次训练或学习映射函数以实现身体部分控制，效率低下且复杂。
AI.method: 采用条件变分自编码器（CVAE）建模全身运动，额外CVAE路径学习部分身体运动，通过两个潜在变量分别控制不同身体部分，单次训练实现两种控制方式。
AI.result: 实验和消融研究证明，该方法在定性和定量指标上均达到最先进的可控人体运动预测效果。
AI.conclusion: 框架有效实现灵活控制，为可定制化人体运动生成提供新思路。

authors_text: Youngeun Kim,Yuhang Li,Hyoungseob Park,Yeshwanth Venkatesha,Ruokai Yin,Priyadarshini Panda
title: Exploring Lottery Ticket Hypothesis in Spiking Neural Networks
title_zh: 探索尖峰神经网络中的彩票假设
comment: Accepted to European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2022
comments: Accepted to European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV) 2022
abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) have recently emerged as a new generation of low-power deep neural networks, which is suitable to be implemented on low-power mobile/edge devices. As such devices have limited memory storage, neural pruning on SNNs has been widely explored in recent years. Most existing SNN pruning works focus on shallow SNNs (2~6 layers), however, deeper SNNs (>16 layers) are proposed by state-of-the-art SNN works, which is difficult to be compatible with the current SNN pruning work. To scale up a pruning technique towards deep SNNs, we investigate Lottery Ticket Hypothesis (LTH) which states that dense networks contain smaller subnetworks (i.e., winning tickets) that achieve comparable performance to the dense networks. Our studies on LTH reveal that the winning tickets consistently exist in deep SNNs across various datasets and architectures, providing up to 97% sparsity without huge performance degradation. However, the iterative searching process of LTH brings a huge training computational cost when combined with the multiple timesteps of SNNs. To alleviate such heavy searching cost, we propose Early-Time (ET) ticket where we find the important weight connectivity from a smaller number of timesteps. The proposed ET ticket can be seamlessly combined with a common pruning techniques for finding winning tickets, such as Iterative Magnitude Pruning (IMP) and Early-Bird (EB) tickets. Our experiment results show that the proposed ET ticket reduces search time by up to 38% compared to IMP or EB methods. Code is available at Github.
summary: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) have recently emerged as a new generation of low-power deep neural networks, which is suitable to be implemented on low-power mobile/edge devices. As such devices have limited memory storage, neural pruning on SNNs has been widely explored in recent years. Most existing SNN pruning works focus on shallow SNNs (2~6 layers), however, deeper SNNs (>16 layers) are proposed by state-of-the-art SNN works, which is difficult to be compatible with the current SNN pruning work. To scale up a pruning technique towards deep SNNs, we investigate Lottery Ticket Hypothesis (LTH) which states that dense networks contain smaller subnetworks (i.e., winning tickets) that achieve comparable performance to the dense networks. Our studies on LTH reveal that the winning tickets consistently exist in deep SNNs across various datasets and architectures, providing up to 97% sparsity without huge performance degradation. However, the iterative searching process of LTH brings a huge training computational cost when combined with the multiple timesteps of SNNs. To alleviate such heavy searching cost, we propose Early-Time (ET) ticket where we find the important weight connectivity from a smaller number of timesteps. The proposed ET ticket can be seamlessly combined with a common pruning techniques for finding winning tickets, such as Iterative Magnitude Pruning (IMP) and Early-Bird (EB) tickets. Our experiment results show that the proposed ET ticket reduces search time by up to 38% compared to IMP or EB methods. Code is available at Github.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络（SNN）是最近出现的新一代低功耗深度神经网络，适合在低功耗移动/边缘设备上实现。由于此类设备的内存存储有限，近年来 SNN 上的神经剪枝得到了广泛的探索。大多数现有的SNN剪枝工作都集中在浅层SNN（2~6层），然而，最先进的SNN工作提出了更深的SNN（>16层），这很难与当前的SNN剪枝工作兼容。为了将剪枝技术扩展到深度 SNN，我们研究了彩票假设 (LTH)，该假设指出密集网络包含较小的子网络（即中奖彩票），这些子网络可实现与密集网络相当的性能。我们对 LTH 的研究表明，中奖彩票始终存在于各种数据集和架构的深度 SNN 中，提供高达 97% 的稀疏性，而不会出现巨大的性能下降。然而，当与 SNN 的多个时间步长结合时，LTH 的迭代搜索过程会带来巨大的训练计算成本。为了减轻如此繁重的搜索成本，我们提出了早期（ET）票证，我们可以从较少数量的时间步中找到重要的权重连接。所提出的 ET 彩票可以与寻找中奖彩票的常见修剪技术无缝结合，例如迭代幅度修剪（IMP）和早鸟（EB）彩票。我们的实验结果表明，与 IMP 或 EB 方法相比，所提出的 ET 票证将搜索时间减少了 38%。代码可在 Github 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在深度脉冲神经网络（SNN）中应用彩票票假设（LTH）进行神经网络剪枝的方法，以解决现有剪枝技术难以适配深层SNN的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有SNN剪枝方法主要针对浅层网络（2~6层），而最新研究提出的深层SNN（>16层）缺乏有效的剪枝方案，且传统LTH方法在SNN中的多时间步训练导致计算成本过高。
AI.method: 提出Early-Time（ET）票机制，通过少量时间步筛选关键权重连接，并与迭代幅度剪枝（IMP）和早鸟票（EB）等方法结合，降低搜索计算成本。
AI.result: 实验表明，ET票在多个数据集和架构中实现高达97%的稀疏性且性能损失极小，搜索时间较IMP/EB方法减少38%。
AI.conclusion: ET票为深层SNN提供了高效剪枝方案，在保持性能的同时显著降低计算开销，验证了LTH在SNN中的有效性。

authors_text: Shuwen Deng,Paul Prasse,David R. Reich,Sabine Dziemian,Maja Stegenwallner-Schütz,Daniel Krakowczyk,Silvia Makowski,Nicolas Langer,Tobias Scheffer,Lena A. Jäger
title: Detection of ADHD based on Eye Movements during Natural Viewing
title_zh: 基于自然观看期间眼球运动的 ADHD 检测
comment: Pre-print for Proceedings of the European Conference on Machine Learning, 2022
comments: Pre-print for Proceedings of the European Conference on Machine Learning, 2022
abstract: Attention-deficit/hyperactivity disorder (ADHD) is a neurodevelopmental disorder that is highly prevalent and requires clinical specialists to diagnose. It is known that an individual's viewing behavior, reflected in their eye movements, is directly related to attentional mechanisms and higher-order cognitive processes. We therefore explore whether ADHD can be detected based on recorded eye movements together with information about the video stimulus in a free-viewing task. To this end, we develop an end-to-end deep learning-based sequence model which we pre-train on a related task for which more data are available. We find that the method is in fact able to detect ADHD and outperforms relevant baselines. We investigate the relevance of the input features in an ablation study. Interestingly, we find that the model's performance is closely related to the content of the video, which provides insights for future experimental designs.
summary: Attention-deficit/hyperactivity disorder (ADHD) is a neurodevelopmental disorder that is highly prevalent and requires clinical specialists to diagnose. It is known that an individual's viewing behavior, reflected in their eye movements, is directly related to attentional mechanisms and higher-order cognitive processes. We therefore explore whether ADHD can be detected based on recorded eye movements together with information about the video stimulus in a free-viewing task. To this end, we develop an end-to-end deep learning-based sequence model which we pre-train on a related task for which more data are available. We find that the method is in fact able to detect ADHD and outperforms relevant baselines. We investigate the relevance of the input features in an ablation study. Interestingly, we find that the model's performance is closely related to the content of the video, which provides insights for future experimental designs.
abstract_zh: 注意力缺陷/多动障碍 (ADHD) 是一种非常普遍的神经发育障碍，需要临床专家进行诊断。众所周知，反映在眼球运动中的个人观看行为与注意力机制和高阶认知过程直接相关。因此，我们探索是否可以根据记录的眼球运动以及自由观看任务中的视频刺激信息来检测 ADHD。为此，我们开发了一个基于端到端深度学习的序列模型，我们对相关任务进行预训练，以获得更多数据。我们发现该方法实际上能够检测 ADHD 并且优于相关基线。我们研究消融研究中输入特征的相关性。有趣的是，我们发现模型的性能与视频内容密切相关，这为未来的实验设计提供了见解。

AI.tldr: 基于自然观看时的眼动数据检测注意力缺陷多动障碍（ADHD）。
AI.motivation: ADHD诊断依赖临床专家，而眼动行为与注意力机制密切相关，因此探索眼动数据作为客观检测手段。
AI.method: 开发端到端深度学习序列模型，通过预训练相关任务优化模型，并结合视频内容信息进行特征分析。
AI.result: 模型成功检测ADHD且优于基线方法，消融实验证实视频内容显著影响模型性能。
AI.conclusion: 眼动数据结合视频内容可有效辅助ADHD检测，未来实验需关注刺激材料对模型表现的影响。

authors_text: SuBeen Lee,WonJun Moon,Jae-Pil Heo
title: Task Discrepancy Maximization for Fine-grained Few-Shot Classification
title_zh: 细粒度少样本分类的任务差异最大化
comment: Accepted to CVPR 2022 as an oral presentation. Code is available at https://github.com/leesb7426/CVPR2022-Task-Discrepancy-Maximization-for-Fine-grained-Few-Shot-Classification
comments: Accepted to CVPR 2022 as an oral presentation. Code is available at https://github.com/leesb7426/CVPR2022-Task-Discrepancy-Maximization-for-Fine-grained-Few-Shot-Classification
abstract: Recognizing discriminative details such as eyes and beaks is important for distinguishing fine-grained classes since they have similar overall appearances. In this regard, we introduce Task Discrepancy Maximization (TDM), a simple module for fine-grained few-shot classification. Our objective is to localize the class-wise discriminative regions by highlighting channels encoding distinct information of the class. Specifically, TDM learns task-specific channel weights based on two novel components: Support Attention Module (SAM) and Query Attention Module (QAM). SAM produces a support weight to represent channel-wise discriminative power for each class. Still, since the SAM is basically only based on the labeled support sets, it can be vulnerable to bias toward such support set. Therefore, we propose QAM which complements SAM by yielding a query weight that grants more weight to object-relevant channels for a given query image. By combining these two weights, a class-wise task-specific channel weight is defined. The weights are then applied to produce task-adaptive feature maps more focusing on the discriminative details. Our experiments validate the effectiveness of TDM and its complementary benefits with prior methods in fine-grained few-shot classification.
summary: Recognizing discriminative details such as eyes and beaks is important for distinguishing fine-grained classes since they have similar overall appearances. In this regard, we introduce Task Discrepancy Maximization (TDM), a simple module for fine-grained few-shot classification. Our objective is to localize the class-wise discriminative regions by highlighting channels encoding distinct information of the class. Specifically, TDM learns task-specific channel weights based on two novel components: Support Attention Module (SAM) and Query Attention Module (QAM). SAM produces a support weight to represent channel-wise discriminative power for each class. Still, since the SAM is basically only based on the labeled support sets, it can be vulnerable to bias toward such support set. Therefore, we propose QAM which complements SAM by yielding a query weight that grants more weight to object-relevant channels for a given query image. By combining these two weights, a class-wise task-specific channel weight is defined. The weights are then applied to produce task-adaptive feature maps more focusing on the discriminative details. Our experiments validate the effectiveness of TDM and its complementary benefits with prior methods in fine-grained few-shot classification.
abstract_zh: 识别眼睛和喙等有区别的细节对于区分细粒度类别很重要，因为它们具有相似的整体外观。在这方面，我们引入了任务差异最大化（TDM），这是一个用于细粒度少样本分类的简单模块。我们的目标是通过突出显示编码类别不同信息的通道来定位类别区分区域。具体来说，TDM 基于两个新颖的组件来学习特定于任务的通道权重：支持注意力模块（SAM）和查询注意力模块（QAM）。 SAM 生成一个支持权重来表示每个类别的通道区分能力。尽管如此，由于 SAM 基本上仅基于标记的支持集，因此它可能容易受到此类支持集的偏见。因此，我们提出 QAM，它通过生成查询权重来补充 SAM，该查询权重为给定查询图像的对象相关通道授予更多权重。通过组合这两个权重，定义了按类别的特定于任务的通道权重。然后应用权重来生成任务自适应特征图，更加关注判别性细节。我们的实验验证了 TDM 的有效性及其与细粒度少样本分类中现有方法的互补优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出任务差异最大化（TDM）模块，用于细粒度少样本分类，通过定位类别的判别区域提升分类效果。
AI.motivation: 细粒度类别外观相似，需关注关键细节（如眼睛、喙）以区分。现有方法难以有效突出这些判别性区域，导致分类性能受限。
AI.method: 设计TDM模块，包含支持注意力模块（SAM）和查询注意力模块（QAM）。SAM基于支持集计算通道判别权重，QAM通过查询图像调整权重，结合二者生成任务特定通道权重以增强判别特征。
AI.result: 实验验证了TDM的有效性，其与先前方法结合可提升细粒度少样本分类性能。
AI.conclusion: TDM通过任务特定通道加权机制，有效聚焦判别细节，为细粒度少样本分类提供了新思路。

search_text: Task Discrepancy Maximization for Fine-grained Few-Shot Classification 细粒度少样本分类的任务差异最大化 Recognizing discriminative details such as eyes and beaks is important for distinguishing fine-grained classes since they have similar overall appearances. In this regard, we introduce Task Discrepancy Maximization (TDM), a simple module for fine-grained few-shot classification. Our objective is to localize the class-wise discriminative regions by highlighting channels encoding distinct information of the class. Specifically, TDM learns task-specific channel weights based on two novel components: Support Attention Module (SAM) and Query Attention Module (QAM). SAM produces a support weight to represent channel-wise discriminative power for each class. Still, since the SAM is basically only based on the labeled support sets, it can be vulnerable to bias toward such support set. Therefore, we propose QAM which complements SAM by yielding a query weight that grants more weight to object-relevant channels for a given query image. By combining these two weights, a class-wise task-specific channel weight is defined. The weights are then applied to produce task-adaptive feature maps more focusing on the discriminative details. Our experiments validate the effectiveness of TDM and its complementary benefits with prior methods in fine-grained few-shot classification. 识别眼睛和喙等有区别的细节对于区分细粒度类别很重要，因为它们具有相似的整体外观。在这方面，我们引入了任务差异最大化（TDM），这是一个用于细粒度少样本分类的简单模块。我们的目标是通过突出显示编码类别不同信息的通道来定位类别区分区域。具体来说，TDM 基于两个新颖的组件来学习特定于任务的通道权重：支持注意力模块（SAM）和查询注意力模块（QAM）。 SAM 生成一个支持权重来表示每个类别的通道区分能力。尽管如此，由于 SAM 基本上仅基于标记的支持集，因此它可能容易受到此类支持集的偏见。因此，我们提出 QAM，它通过生成查询权重来补充 SAM，该查询权重为给定查询图像的对象相关通道授予更多权重。通过组合这两个权重，定义了按类别的特定于任务的通道权重。然后应用权重来生成任务自适应特征图，更加关注判别性细节。我们的实验验证了 TDM 的有效性及其与细粒度少样本分类中现有方法的互补优势。 本文提出任务差异最大化（TDM）模块，用于细粒度少样本分类，通过定位类别的判别区域提升分类效果。 SuBeen Lee,WonJun Moon,Jae-Pil Heo cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Eitan Kosman,Dotan Di Castro
title: GraphVid: It Only Takes a Few Nodes to Understand a Video
title_zh: GraphVid：只需要几个节点就能理​​解视频
abstract: We propose a concise representation of videos that encode perceptually meaningful features into graphs. With this representation, we aim to leverage the large amount of redundancies in videos and save computations. First, we construct superpixel-based graph representations of videos by considering superpixels as graph nodes and create spatial and temporal connections between adjacent superpixels. Then, we leverage Graph Convolutional Networks to process this representation and predict the desired output. As a result, we are able to train models with much fewer parameters, which translates into short training periods and a reduction in computation resource requirements. A comprehensive experimental study on the publicly available datasets Kinetics-400 and Charades shows that the proposed method is highly cost-effective and uses limited commodity hardware during training and inference. It reduces the computational requirements 10-fold while achieving results that are comparable to state-of-the-art methods. We believe that the proposed approach is a promising direction that could open the door to solving video understanding more efficiently and enable more resource limited users to thrive in this research field.
summary: We propose a concise representation of videos that encode perceptually meaningful features into graphs. With this representation, we aim to leverage the large amount of redundancies in videos and save computations. First, we construct superpixel-based graph representations of videos by considering superpixels as graph nodes and create spatial and temporal connections between adjacent superpixels. Then, we leverage Graph Convolutional Networks to process this representation and predict the desired output. As a result, we are able to train models with much fewer parameters, which translates into short training periods and a reduction in computation resource requirements. A comprehensive experimental study on the publicly available datasets Kinetics-400 and Charades shows that the proposed method is highly cost-effective and uses limited commodity hardware during training and inference. It reduces the computational requirements 10-fold while achieving results that are comparable to state-of-the-art methods. We believe that the proposed approach is a promising direction that could open the door to solving video understanding more efficiently and enable more resource limited users to thrive in this research field.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种简明的视频表示，将感知上有意义的特征编码到图中。通过这种表示，我们的目标是利用视频中的大量冗余并节省计算量。首先，我们通过将超像素视为图节点来构建基于超像素的视频图表示，并在相邻超像素之间创建空间和时间连接。然后，我们利用图卷积网络来处理这种表示并预测所需的输出。因此，我们能够使用更少的参数来训练模型，这意味着训练周期更短并减少了计算资源需求。对公开数据集 Kinetics-400 和 Charades 的综合实验研究表明，所提出的方法具有很高的成本效益，并且在训练和推理过程中使用有限的商用硬件。它将计算要求降低了 10 倍，同时获得了与最先进方法相当的结果。我们相信所提出的方法是一个有前途的方向，可以为更有效地解决视频理解问题打开大门，并使更多资源有限的用户能够在这个研究领域蓬勃发展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图结构的视频表示方法，通过少量节点高效理解视频内容。
AI.motivation: 视频处理计算资源消耗大，现有方法冗余度高，需降低计算成本并提升资源受限设备的适用性。
AI.method: 以超像素为图节点构建时空连接，利用图卷积网络处理该表示，减少参数量及计算需求。
AI.result: 在Kinetics-400和Charades数据集上，计算需求降低10倍且效果与最先进方法相当。
AI.conclusion: 该方法成本效益显著，为资源受限场景下的视频理解提供了高效解决方案。

authors_text: Xiaogang Xu,Yitong Yu,Nianjuan Jiang,Jiangbo Lu,Bei Yu,Jiaya Jia
title: Towards Real-World Video Denosing: A Practical Video Denosing Dataset and Network
title_zh: 走向现实世界的视频去噪：实用的视频去噪数据集和网络
abstract: To facilitate video denoising research, we construct a compelling dataset, namely, "Practical Video Denoising Dataset" (PVDD), containing 200 noisy-clean dynamic video pairs in both sRGB and RAW format. Compared with existing datasets consisting of limited motion information, PVDD covers dynamic scenes with varying and natural motion. Different from datasets using primarily Gaussian or Poisson distributions to synthesize noise in the sRGB domain, PVDD synthesizes realistic noise from the RAW domain with a physically meaningful sensor noise model followed by ISP processing. Moreover, we also propose a new video denoising framework, called Recurrent Video Denoising Transformer (RVDT), which can achieve SOTA performance on PVDD and other current video denoising benchmarks. RVDT consists of both spatial and temporal transformer blocks to conduct denoising with long-range operations on the spatial dimension and long-term propagation on the temporal dimension. Especially, RVDT exploits the attention mechanism to implement the bi-directional feature propagation with both implicit and explicit temporal modeling. Extensive experiments demonstrate that 1) models trained on PVDD achieve superior denoising performance on many challenging real-world videos than on models trained on other existing datasets; 2) trained on the same dataset, our proposed RVDT can have better denoising performance than other types of networks.
summary: To facilitate video denoising research, we construct a compelling dataset, namely, "Practical Video Denoising Dataset" (PVDD), containing 200 noisy-clean dynamic video pairs in both sRGB and RAW format. Compared with existing datasets consisting of limited motion information, PVDD covers dynamic scenes with varying and natural motion. Different from datasets using primarily Gaussian or Poisson distributions to synthesize noise in the sRGB domain, PVDD synthesizes realistic noise from the RAW domain with a physically meaningful sensor noise model followed by ISP processing. Moreover, we also propose a new video denoising framework, called Recurrent Video Denoising Transformer (RVDT), which can achieve SOTA performance on PVDD and other current video denoising benchmarks. RVDT consists of both spatial and temporal transformer blocks to conduct denoising with long-range operations on the spatial dimension and long-term propagation on the temporal dimension. Especially, RVDT exploits the attention mechanism to implement the bi-directional feature propagation with both implicit and explicit temporal modeling. Extensive experiments demonstrate that 1) models trained on PVDD achieve superior denoising performance on many challenging real-world videos than on models trained on other existing datasets; 2) trained on the same dataset, our proposed RVDT can have better denoising performance than other types of networks.
abstract_zh: 为了促进视频去噪研究，我们构建了一个引人注目的数据集，即“实用视频去噪数据集”(PVDD)，其中包含 200 个 sRGB 和 RAW 格式的噪声-干净动态视频对。与包含有限运动信息的现有数据集相比，PVDD 涵盖了具有变化且自然运动的动态场景。与主要使用高斯或泊松分布来合成 sRGB 域中的噪声的数据集不同，PVDD 使用物理上有意义的传感器噪声模型合成来自 RAW 域的真实噪声，然后进行 ISP 处理。此外，我们还提出了一种新的视频去噪框架，称为循环视频去噪变压器（RVDT），它可以在 PVDD 和其他当前视频去噪基准上实现 SOTA 性能。 RVDT由空间和时间变换器块组成，通过空间维度上的远程操作和时间维度上的长期传播来进行去噪。特别是，RVDT 利用注意力机制通过隐式和显式时间建模来实现双向特征传播。大量实验表明：1）在 PVDD 上训练的模型在许多具有挑战性的现实世界视频上比在其他现有数据集上训练的模型实现了更出色的去噪性能； 2）在相同的数据集上进行训练，我们提出的RVDT可以比其他类型的网络具有更好的去噪性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为PVDD的实用视频去噪数据集和一种名为RVDT的视频去噪框架，以提升真实场景下的视频去噪效果。
AI.motivation: 现有视频去噪数据集运动信息有限且噪声合成不真实，难以满足实际应用需求，因此需要更贴近真实场景的数据集和更有效的去噪方法。
AI.method: 构建包含200对sRGB和RAW格式动态视频的PVDD数据集，采用物理传感器噪声模型生成真实噪声；提出结合空间与时间Transformer块的RVDT框架，通过双向注意力机制实现时空特征传播。
AI.result: 在PVDD及其他基准数据集上，基于PVDD训练的模型优于其他数据集训练的模型，且RVDT在相同数据集下性能优于其他网络结构。
AI.conclusion: PVDD数据集和RVDT框架为真实场景视频去噪提供了更有效的研究基础和解决方案。

Moreover, we also propose a new video denoising framework, called Recurrent Video Denoising Transformer (RVDT), which can achieve SOTA performance on PVDD and other current video denoising benchmarks. RVDT consists of both spatial and temporal transformer blocks to conduct denoising with long-range operations on the spatial dimension and long-term propagation on the temporal dimension. Especially, RVDT exploits the attention mechanism to implement the bi-directional feature propagation with both implicit and explicit temporal modeling. Extensive experiments demonstrate that 1) models trained on PVDD achieve superior denoising performance on many challenging real-world videos than on models trained on other existing datasets; 2) trained on the same dataset, our proposed RVDT can have better denoising performance than other types of networks. 为了促进视频去噪研究，我们构建了一个引人注目的数据集，即“实用视频去噪数据集”(PVDD)，其中包含 200 个 sRGB 和 RAW 格式的噪声-干净动态视频对。与包含有限运动信息的现有数据集相比，PVDD 涵盖了具有变化且自然运动的动态场景。与主要使用高斯或泊松分布来合成 sRGB 域中的噪声的数据集不同，PVDD 使用物理上有意义的传感器噪声模型合成来自 RAW 域的真实噪声，然后进行 ISP 处理。此外，我们还提出了一种新的视频去噪框架，称为循环视频去噪变压器（RVDT），它可以在 PVDD 和其他当前视频去噪基准上实现 SOTA 性能。 RVDT由空间和时间变换器块组成，通过空间维度上的远程操作和时间维度上的长期传播来进行去噪。特别是，RVDT 利用注意力机制通过隐式和显式时间建模来实现双向特征传播。大量实验表明：1）在 PVDD 上训练的模型在许多具有挑战性的现实世界视频上比在其他现有数据集上训练的模型实现了更出色的去噪性能； 2）在相同的数据集上进行训练，我们提出的RVDT可以比其他类型的网络具有更好的去噪性能。 本文提出一个名为PVDD的实用视频去噪数据集和一种名为RVDT的视频去噪框架，以提升真实场景下的视频去噪效果。 Xiaogang Xu,Yitong Yu,Nianjuan Jiang,Jiangbo Lu,Bei Yu,Jiaya Jia cs.CV

authors_text: Luca Ballotta,Giacomo Como,Jeff S. Shamma,Luca Schenato
title: Can Competition Outperform Collaboration? The Role of Misbehaving Agents
title_zh: 竞争能否胜过合作？行为不当的代理人的作用
comment: Accepted in IEEE TAC; 17 pages, 44 figures
comments: Accepted in IEEE TAC; 17 pages, 44 figures
abstract: We investigate a novel approach to resilient distributed optimization with quadratic costs in a multi-agent system prone to unexpected events that make some agents misbehave. In contrast to commonly adopted filtering strategies, we draw inspiration from phenomena modeled through the Friedkin-Johnsen dynamics and argue that adding competition to the mix can improve resilience in the presence of misbehaving agents. Our intuition is corroborated by analytical and numerical results showing that (i) there exists a nontrivial trade-off between full collaboration and full competition and (ii) our competition-based approach can outperform state-of-the-art algorithms based on Weighted Mean Subsequence Reduced. We also study impact of communication topology and connectivity on resilience, pointing out insights to robust network design.
summary: We investigate a novel approach to resilient distributed optimization with quadratic costs in a multi-agent system prone to unexpected events that make some agents misbehave. In contrast to commonly adopted filtering strategies, we draw inspiration from phenomena modeled through the Friedkin-Johnsen dynamics and argue that adding competition to the mix can improve resilience in the presence of misbehaving agents. Our intuition is corroborated by analytical and numerical results showing that (i) there exists a nontrivial trade-off between full collaboration and full competition and (ii) our competition-based approach can outperform state-of-the-art algorithms based on Weighted Mean Subsequence Reduced. We also study impact of communication topology and connectivity on resilience, pointing out insights to robust network design.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了一种在多智能体系统中以二次成本进行弹性分布式优化的新方法，该系统容易发生导致某些智能体行为不当的意外事件。与普遍采用的过滤策略相反，我们从通过 Friedkin-Johnsen 动力学建模的现象中汲取灵感，并认为在混合中添加竞争可以提高在存在行为不当代理时的弹性。分析和数值结果证实了我们的直觉，表明（i）充分协作和充分竞争之间存在着重要的权衡，（ii）我们基于竞争的方法可以胜过基于加权平均子序列缩减的最先进算法。我们还研究了通信拓扑和连接对弹性的影响，提出了对稳健网络设计的见解。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在存在不良代理的多智能体系统中，竞争机制是否能比协作更有效提升分布式优化的弹性。
AI.motivation: 传统过滤策略难以应对多智能体系统中突发的不良行为，作者受Friedkin-Johnsen动力学启发，探索竞争机制对系统鲁棒性的提升潜力。
AI.method: 结合Friedkin-Johnsen动力学模型，设计引入竞争的分布式优化方法，通过理论分析与数值实验验证效果，并研究通信拓扑对弹性的影响。
AI.result: 发现协作与竞争存在非平凡权衡，竞争方法在性能上优于现有算法；通信拓扑的连通性显著影响系统弹性，为鲁棒网络设计提供依据。
AI.conclusion: 竞争机制能有效增强多智能体系统在不良代理下的弹性，需平衡协作与竞争比例，通信拓扑设计应注重连通性以提升鲁棒性。

authors_text: Hongyan Xu,Dadong Wang,Arcot Sowmya
title: Multi-scale alignment and Spatial ROI Module for COVID-19 Diagnosis
title_zh: 用于 COVID-19 诊断的多尺度对齐和空间 ROI 模块
comment: 9 pages, 7 figures, this paper has been accepted by WCCI 2022
comments: 9 pages, 7 figures, this paper has been accepted by WCCI 2022
abstract: Coronavirus Disease 2019 (COVID-19) has spread globally and become a health crisis faced by humanity since first reported. Radiology imaging technologies such as computer tomography (CT) and chest X-ray imaging (CXR) are effective tools for diagnosing COVID-19. However, in CT and CXR images, the infected area occupies only a small part of the image. Some common deep learning methods that integrate large-scale receptive fields may cause the loss of image detail, resulting in the omission of the region of interest (ROI) in COVID-19 images and are therefore not suitable for further processing. To this end, we propose a deep spatial pyramid pooling (D-SPP) module to integrate contextual information over different resolutions, aiming to extract information under different scales of COVID-19 images effectively. Besides, we propose a COVID-19 infection detection (CID) module to draw attention to the lesion area and remove interference from irrelevant information. Extensive experiments on four CT and CXR datasets have shown that our method produces higher accuracy of detecting COVID-19 lesions in CT and CXR images. It can be used as a computer-aided diagnosis tool to help doctors effectively diagnose and screen for COVID-19.
summary: Coronavirus Disease 2019 (COVID-19) has spread globally and become a health crisis faced by humanity since first reported. Radiology imaging technologies such as computer tomography (CT) and chest X-ray imaging (CXR) are effective tools for diagnosing COVID-19. However, in CT and CXR images, the infected area occupies only a small part of the image. Some common deep learning methods that integrate large-scale receptive fields may cause the loss of image detail, resulting in the omission of the region of interest (ROI) in COVID-19 images and are therefore not suitable for further processing. To this end, we propose a deep spatial pyramid pooling (D-SPP) module to integrate contextual information over different resolutions, aiming to extract information under different scales of COVID-19 images effectively. Besides, we propose a COVID-19 infection detection (CID) module to draw attention to the lesion area and remove interference from irrelevant information. Extensive experiments on four CT and CXR datasets have shown that our method produces higher accuracy of detecting COVID-19 lesions in CT and CXR images. It can be used as a computer-aided diagnosis tool to help doctors effectively diagnose and screen for COVID-19.
abstract_zh: 自首次报道以来，2019 年冠状病毒病（COVID-19）已在全球蔓延，并成为人类面临的健康危机。计算机断层扫描 (CT) 和胸部 X 射线成像 (CXR) 等放射成像技术是诊断 COVID-19 的有效工具。然而，在CT和CXR图像中，感染区域仅占图像的一小部分。一些常见的集成大规模感受野的深度学习方法可能会导致图像细节的丢失，导致COVID-19图像中感兴趣区域（ROI）的遗漏，因此不适合进一步处理。为此，我们提出了一种深度空间金字塔池化（D-SPP）模块来整合不同分辨率下的上下文信息，旨在有效地提取不同尺度下的COVID-19图像信息。此外，我们提出了一个COVID-19感染检测（CID）模块来引起对病变区域的注意并消除不相关信息的干扰。对四个 CT 和 CXR 数据集的广泛实验表明，我们的方法在检测 CT 和 CXR 图像中的 COVID-19 病变方面具有更高的准确性。它可以作为计算机辅助诊断工具，帮助医生有效诊断和筛查COVID-19。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多尺度对齐与空间ROI模块，用于改进COVID-19的CT和X光影像诊断方法。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习方法在处理CT和X光影像时易丢失细节，导致COVID-19感染区域（ROI）被遗漏，需开发更有效的特征提取模块。
AI.method: 设计深度空间金字塔池化（D-SPP）模块实现多尺度上下文信息整合，并提出COVID-19感染检测（CID）模块聚焦病灶区域以消除干扰。
AI.result: 在四个CT和X光数据集上实验表明，该方法在检测COVID-19病灶方面准确率优于现有方法，可作为辅助诊断工具。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过多尺度特征融合与病灶区域增强，有效提升了COVID-19影像诊断的准确性与实用性。

authors_text: Yuzhong Zhao,Yuanqiang Cai,Weijia Wu,Weiqiang Wang
title: Explore Faster Localization Learning For Scene Text Detection
title_zh: 探索场景文本检测的更快本地化学习
abstract: Generally pre-training and long-time training computation are necessary for obtaining a good-performance text detector based on deep networks. In this paper, we present a new scene text detection network (called FANet) with a Fast convergence speed and Accurate text localization. The proposed FANet is an end-to-end text detector based on transformer feature learning and normalized Fourier descriptor modeling, where the Fourier Descriptor Proposal Network and Iterative Text Decoding Network are designed to efficiently and accurately identify text proposals. Additionally, a Dense Matching Strategy and a well-designed loss function are also proposed for optimizing the network performance. Extensive experiments are carried out to demonstrate that the proposed FANet can achieve the SOTA performance with fewer training epochs and no pre-training. When we introduce additional data for pre-training, the proposed FANet can achieve SOTA performance on MSRATD500, CTW1500 and TotalText. The ablation experiments also verify the effectiveness of our contributions.
summary: Generally pre-training and long-time training computation are necessary for obtaining a good-performance text detector based on deep networks. In this paper, we present a new scene text detection network (called FANet) with a Fast convergence speed and Accurate text localization. The proposed FANet is an end-to-end text detector based on transformer feature learning and normalized Fourier descriptor modeling, where the Fourier Descriptor Proposal Network and Iterative Text Decoding Network are designed to efficiently and accurately identify text proposals. Additionally, a Dense Matching Strategy and a well-designed loss function are also proposed for optimizing the network performance. Extensive experiments are carried out to demonstrate that the proposed FANet can achieve the SOTA performance with fewer training epochs and no pre-training. When we introduce additional data for pre-training, the proposed FANet can achieve SOTA performance on MSRATD500, CTW1500 and TotalText. The ablation experiments also verify the effectiveness of our contributions.
abstract_zh: 通常，为了获得基于深度网络的良好性能文本检测器，预训练和长时间的训练计算是必要的。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的场景文本检测网络（称为 FANet），具有快速收敛速度和准确的文本定位。所提出的 FANet 是一种基于变换器特征学习和归一化傅里叶描述符建模的端到端文本检测器，其中傅里叶描述符提议网络和迭代文本解码网络旨在高效、准确地识别文本提议。此外，还提出了密集匹配策略和精心设计的损失函数来优化网络性能。进行了大量的实验来证明所提出的 FANet 可以通过更少的训练周期且无需预训练来实现 SOTA 性能。当我们引入额外的数据进行预训练时，所提出的 FANet 可以在 MSRATD500、CTW1500 和 TotalText 上实现 SOTA 性能。消融实验也验证了我们贡献的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FANet的场景文本检测网络，通过快速收敛和精确的文本定位方法提升检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统文本检测方法依赖预训练和长时间训练，而本文旨在减少训练时间并消除对预训练的依赖。
AI.method: 基于Transformer特征学习和归一化傅里叶描述符建模，设计傅里叶描述符提议网络、迭代文本解码网络、密集匹配策略及定制损失函数。
AI.result: FANet在MSRA-TD500、CTW1500和TotalText数据集上达到SOTA性能，且无需预训练即可在更少训练周期内实现。
AI.conclusion: FANet通过创新模块和优化策略有效提升了文本检测效率，实验验证了各组件的有效性。

search_text: Explore Faster Localization Learning For Scene Text Detection 探索场景文本检测的更快本地化学习 Generally pre-training and long-time training computation are necessary for obtaining a good-performance text detector based on deep networks. In this paper, we present a new scene text detection network (called FANet) with a Fast convergence speed and Accurate text localization. The proposed FANet is an end-to-end text detector based on transformer feature learning and normalized Fourier descriptor modeling, where the Fourier Descriptor Proposal Network and Iterative Text Decoding Network are designed to efficiently and accurately identify text proposals. Additionally, a Dense Matching Strategy and a well-designed loss function are also proposed for optimizing the network performance. Extensive experiments are carried out to demonstrate that the proposed FANet can achieve the SOTA performance with fewer training epochs and no pre-training. When we introduce additional data for pre-training, the proposed FANet can achieve SOTA performance on MSRATD500, CTW1500 and TotalText. The ablation experiments also verify the effectiveness of our contributions. 通常，为了获得基于深度网络的良好性能文本检测器，预训练和长时间的训练计算是必要的。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的场景文本检测网络（称为 FANet），具有快速收敛速度和准确的文本定位。所提出的 FANet 是一种基于变换器特征学习和归一化傅里叶描述符建模的端到端文本检测器，其中傅里叶描述符提议网络和迭代文本解码网络旨在高效、准确地识别文本提议。此外，还提出了密集匹配策略和精心设计的损失函数来优化网络性能。进行了大量的实验来证明所提出的 FANet 可以通过更少的训练周期且无需预训练来实现 SOTA 性能。当我们引入额外的数据进行预训练时，所提出的 FANet 可以在 MSRATD500、CTW1500 和 TotalText 上实现 SOTA 性能。消融实验也验证了我们贡献的有效性。 本文提出一种名为FANet的场景文本检测网络，通过快速收敛和精确的文本定位方法提升检测性能。 Yuzhong Zhao,Yuanqiang Cai,Weijia Wu,Weiqiang Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Jiaxin Wei,Lan Hu,Chenyu Wang,Laurent Kneip
title: Accurate Instance-Level CAD Model Retrieval in a Large-Scale Database
title_zh: 大型数据库中准确的实例级 CAD 模型检索
abstract: We present a new solution to the fine-grained retrieval of clean CAD models from a large-scale database in order to recover detailed object shape geometries for RGBD scans. Unlike previous work simply indexing into a moderately small database using an object shape descriptor and accepting the top retrieval result, we argue that in the case of a large-scale database a more accurate model may be found within a neighborhood of the descriptor. More importantly, we propose that the distinctiveness deficiency of shape descriptors at the instance level can be compensated by a geometry-based re-ranking of its neighborhood. Our approach first leverages the discriminative power of learned representations to distinguish between different categories of models and then uses a novel robust point set distance metric to re-rank the CAD neighborhood, enabling fine-grained retrieval in a large shape database. Evaluation on a real-world dataset shows that our geometry-based re-ranking is a conceptually simple but highly effective method that can lead to a significant improvement in retrieval accuracy compared to the state-of-the-art.
summary: We present a new solution to the fine-grained retrieval of clean CAD models from a large-scale database in order to recover detailed object shape geometries for RGBD scans. Unlike previous work simply indexing into a moderately small database using an object shape descriptor and accepting the top retrieval result, we argue that in the case of a large-scale database a more accurate model may be found within a neighborhood of the descriptor. More importantly, we propose that the distinctiveness deficiency of shape descriptors at the instance level can be compensated by a geometry-based re-ranking of its neighborhood. Our approach first leverages the discriminative power of learned representations to distinguish between different categories of models and then uses a novel robust point set distance metric to re-rank the CAD neighborhood, enabling fine-grained retrieval in a large shape database. Evaluation on a real-world dataset shows that our geometry-based re-ranking is a conceptually simple but highly effective method that can lead to a significant improvement in retrieval accuracy compared to the state-of-the-art.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的解决方案，可以从大型数据库中细粒度检索干净的 CAD 模型，以便恢复 RGBD 扫描的详细对象形状几何形状。与之前的工作简单地使用对象形状描述符索引到中等规模的数据库并接受顶部检索结果不同，我们认为，在大型数据库的情况下，可以在描述符的邻域内找到更准确的模型。更重要的是，我们建议实例级别的形状描述符的独特性缺陷可以通过基于几何的邻域重新排序来补偿。我们的方法首先利用学习表示的判别力来区分不同类别的模型，然后使用新颖的稳健点集距离度量对 CAD 邻域进行重新排序，从而在大型形状数据库中实现细粒度检索。对现实世界数据集的评估表明，我们基于几何的重新排序是一种概念上简单但非常有效的方法，与最先进的技术相比，可以显着提高检索精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种从大规模数据库中精确检索清洁CAD模型的方法，以恢复RGBD扫描的详细物体形状几何结构。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在中等规模数据库中使用形状描述符进行检索并接受最顶部结果，但在大规模数据库中可能遗漏更精确的模型，且形状描述符在实例级别存在区分度不足的问题。
AI.method: 首先利用学习表示区分模型类别，再通过新颖的鲁棒点集距离度量对描述符邻域进行几何重排序，实现细粒度检索。
AI.result: 在真实数据集上的评估表明，基于几何的重排序方法相比现有技术显著提升了检索准确性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法概念简单但高度有效，为大规模形状数据库中的细粒度CAD模型检索提供了新思路。

authors_text: Sebastian Curi,Armin Lederer,Sandra Hirche,Andreas Krause
title: Safe Reinforcement Learning via Confidence-Based Filters
title_zh: 通过基于置信度的过滤器进行安全强化学习
abstract: Ensuring safety is a crucial challenge when deploying reinforcement learning (RL) to real-world systems. We develop confidence-based safety filters, a control-theoretic approach for certifying state safety constraints for nominal policies learned via standard RL techniques, based on probabilistic dynamics models. Our approach is based on a reformulation of state constraints in terms of cost functions, reducing safety verification to a standard RL task. By exploiting the concept of hallucinating inputs, we extend this formulation to determine a "backup" policy that is safe for the unknown system with high probability. Finally, the nominal policy is minimally adjusted at every time step during a roll-out towards the backup policy, such that safe recovery can be guaranteed afterwards. We provide formal safety guarantees, and empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach.
summary: Ensuring safety is a crucial challenge when deploying reinforcement learning (RL) to real-world systems. We develop confidence-based safety filters, a control-theoretic approach for certifying state safety constraints for nominal policies learned via standard RL techniques, based on probabilistic dynamics models. Our approach is based on a reformulation of state constraints in terms of cost functions, reducing safety verification to a standard RL task. By exploiting the concept of hallucinating inputs, we extend this formulation to determine a "backup" policy that is safe for the unknown system with high probability. Finally, the nominal policy is minimally adjusted at every time step during a roll-out towards the backup policy, such that safe recovery can be guaranteed afterwards. We provide formal safety guarantees, and empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach.
abstract_zh: 将强化学习 (RL) 部署到现实系统时，确保安全是一项至关重要的挑战。我们开发基于置信度的安全过滤器，这是一种基于概率动力学模型的控制理论方法，用于验证通过标准强化学习技术学习的名义策略的状态安全约束。我们的方法基于成本函数方面对状态约束的重新表述，将安全验证简化为标准强化学习任务。通过利用幻觉输入的概念，我们扩展了这个公式来确定对未知系统高概率安全的“备份”策略。最后，在推出备份策略期间，在每个时间步骤对名义策略进行最低限度的调整，从而可以保证之后的安全恢复。我们提供正式的安全保证，并凭经验证明我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于置信度的过滤器方法，通过概率动态模型和备用策略确保强化学习在现实系统的安全部署。
AI.motivation: 现实系统中部署强化学习时，确保安全约束是关键挑战，传统方法难以提供可靠的安全保证。
AI.method: 将状态约束转化为成本函数，利用幻觉输入生成高概率安全的备用策略，并在运行时动态调整主策略以实现安全恢复。
AI.result: 提供了形式化安全保证，并通过实验验证了方法在多个场景中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为强化学习的安全验证提供了理论保障和实用框架，能够有效应对未知系统的安全风险。

By exploiting the concept of hallucinating inputs, we extend this formulation to determine a "backup" policy that is safe for the unknown system with high probability. Finally, the nominal policy is minimally adjusted at every time step during a roll-out towards the backup policy, such that safe recovery can be guaranteed afterwards. We provide formal safety guarantees, and empirically demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. 将强化学习 (RL) 部署到现实系统时，确保安全是一项至关重要的挑战。我们开发基于置信度的安全过滤器，这是一种基于概率动力学模型的控制理论方法，用于验证通过标准强化学习技术学习的名义策略的状态安全约束。我们的方法基于成本函数方面对状态约束的重新表述，将安全验证简化为标准强化学习任务。通过利用幻觉输入的概念，我们扩展了这个公式来确定对未知系统高概率安全的“备份”策略。最后，在推出备份策略期间，在每个时间步骤对名义策略进行最低限度的调整，从而可以保证之后的安全恢复。我们提供正式的安全保证，并凭经验证明我们方法的有效性。 本文提出基于置信度的过滤器方法，通过概率动态模型和备用策略确保强化学习在现实系统的安全部署。 Sebastian Curi,Armin Lederer,Sandra Hirche,Andreas Krause cs.LG,cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Kevin Qinghong Lin,Alex Jinpeng Wang,Rui Yan,Eric Zhongcong Xu,Rongcheng Tu,Yanru Zhu,Wenzhe Zhao,Weijie Kong,Chengfei Cai,Hongfa Wang,Wei Liu,Mike Zheng Shou
title: Egocentric Video-Language Pretraining @ EPIC-KITCHENS-100 Multi-Instance Retrieval Challenge 2022
title_zh: 以自我为中心的视频语言预训练 @ EPIC-KITCHENS-100 多实例检索挑战赛 2022
comment: To appeared in CVPRW22. 5 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables. Code: https://github.com/showlab/EgoVLP. The EPIC challenge technical report of EgoVLP arXiv:2206.01670. See Ego4D challenge technical report arXiv:2207.01622
comments: To appeared in CVPRW22. 5 pages, 2 figures, 2 tables. Code: https://github.com/showlab/EgoVLP. The EPIC challenge technical report of EgoVLP arXiv:2206.01670. See Ego4D challenge technical report arXiv:2207.01622
abstract: In this report, we propose a video-language pretraining (VLP) based solution \cite{kevin2022egovlp} for the EPIC-KITCHENS-100 Multi-Instance Retrieval (MIR) challenge. Especially, we exploit the recently released Ego4D dataset \cite{grauman2021ego4d} to pioneer Egocentric VLP from pretraining dataset, pretraining objective, and development set. Based on the above three designs, we develop a pretrained video-language model that is able to transfer its egocentric video-text representation to MIR benchmark. Furthermore, we devise an adaptive multi-instance max-margin loss to effectively fine-tune the model and equip the dual-softmax technique for reliable inference. Our best single model obtains strong performance on the challenge test set with 47.39% mAP and 61.44% nDCG. The code is available at https://github.com/showlab/EgoVLP.
summary: In this report, we propose a video-language pretraining (VLP) based solution \cite{kevin2022egovlp} for the EPIC-KITCHENS-100 Multi-Instance Retrieval (MIR) challenge. Especially, we exploit the recently released Ego4D dataset \cite{grauman2021ego4d} to pioneer Egocentric VLP from pretraining dataset, pretraining objective, and development set. Based on the above three designs, we develop a pretrained video-language model that is able to transfer its egocentric video-text representation to MIR benchmark. Furthermore, we devise an adaptive multi-instance max-margin loss to effectively fine-tune the model and equip the dual-softmax technique for reliable inference. Our best single model obtains strong performance on the challenge test set with 47.39% mAP and 61.44% nDCG. The code is available at https://github.com/showlab/EgoVLP.
abstract_zh: 在本报告中，我们针对 EPIC-KITCHENS-100 多实例检索 (MIR) 挑战提出了一种基于视频语言预训练 (VLP) 的解决方案 \cite{kevin2022egovlp}。特别是，我们利用最近发布的 Ego4D 数据集 \cite{grauman2021ego4d} 从预训练数据集、预训练目标和开发集开创以自我为中心的 VLP。基于上述三种设计，我们开发了一种预训练的视频语言模型，能够将其以自我为中心的视频文本表示转移到 MIR 基准。此外，我们设计了一种自适应多实例最大裕度损失来有效地微调模型并配备双 softmax 技术以实现可靠的推理。我们最好的单一模型在挑战测试集上获得了强劲的性能，mAP 为 47.39%，nDCG 为 61.44%。代码可在 https://github.com/showlab/EgoVLP 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于视频-语言预训练（VLP）的解决方案，用于EPIC-KITCHENS-100多实例检索挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在第一视角视频与文本的联合表示学习上存在不足，需通过大规模数据集和针对性预训练提升性能。
AI.method: 利用Ego4D数据集设计预训练数据集、目标函数和开发集，构建预训练模型，并采用自适应多实例最大边距损失与双softmax技术优化模型。
AI.result: 最佳单模型在测试集上达到47.39% mAP和61.44% nDCG，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在挑战中表现优异，验证了第一视角VLP的有效性，且具备良好的可扩展性。

authors_text: Alexander Meulemans,Nicolas Zucchet,Seijin Kobayashi,Johannes von Oswald,João Sacramento
title: The least-control principle for local learning at equilibrium
title_zh: 平衡局部学习的最小控制原则
abstract: Equilibrium systems are a powerful way to express neural computations. As special cases, they include models of great current interest in both neuroscience and machine learning, such as deep neural networks, equilibrium recurrent neural networks, deep equilibrium models, or meta-learning. Here, we present a new principle for learning such systems with a temporally- and spatially-local rule. Our principle casts learning as a least-control problem, where we first introduce an optimal controller to lead the system towards a solution state, and then define learning as reducing the amount of control needed to reach such a state. We show that incorporating learning signals within a dynamics as an optimal control enables transmitting activity-dependent credit assignment information, avoids storing intermediate states in memory, and does not rely on infinitesimal learning signals. In practice, our principle leads to strong performance matching that of leading gradient-based learning methods when applied to an array of problems involving recurrent neural networks and meta-learning. Our results shed light on how the brain might learn and offer new ways of approaching a broad class of machine learning problems.
summary: Equilibrium systems are a powerful way to express neural computations. As special cases, they include models of great current interest in both neuroscience and machine learning, such as deep neural networks, equilibrium recurrent neural networks, deep equilibrium models, or meta-learning. Here, we present a new principle for learning such systems with a temporally- and spatially-local rule. Our principle casts learning as a least-control problem, where we first introduce an optimal controller to lead the system towards a solution state, and then define learning as reducing the amount of control needed to reach such a state. We show that incorporating learning signals within a dynamics as an optimal control enables transmitting activity-dependent credit assignment information, avoids storing intermediate states in memory, and does not rely on infinitesimal learning signals. In practice, our principle leads to strong performance matching that of leading gradient-based learning methods when applied to an array of problems involving recurrent neural networks and meta-learning. Our results shed light on how the brain might learn and offer new ways of approaching a broad class of machine learning problems.
abstract_zh: 平衡系统是表达神经计算的强大方式。作为特殊情况，它们包括当前神经科学和机器学习领域备受关注的模型，例如深度神经网络、平衡循环神经网络、深度平衡模型或元学习。在这里，我们提出了一种使用时间和空间局部规则来学习此类系统的新原理。我们的原则将学习视为一个最小控制问题，我们首先引入一个最优控制器来引导系统走向解决状态，然后将学习定义为减少达到这种状态所需的控制量。我们表明，将学习信号纳入动态中作为最优控制可以传输依赖于活动的信用分配信息，避免将中间状态存储在内存中，并且不依赖于无穷小的学习信号。在实践中，当应用于涉及循环神经网络和元学习的一系列问题时，我们的原理带来了与领先的基于梯度的学习方法相匹配的强大性能。我们的研究结果揭示了大脑如何学习，并提供了解决广泛的机器学习问题的新方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的局部学习原则——最小控制原则，用于平衡系统的神经计算学习，通过减少系统达到解状态所需的控制量来优化学习过程。
AI.motivation: 现有学习方法（如梯度下降）存在依赖存储中间状态或微小学习信号的局限性，而生物神经系统可能通过局部动态规则实现高效学习，需探索更符合生理机制的学习原理。
AI.method: 将学习建模为最优控制问题，引入控制器引导系统趋近目标状态，并定义学习目标为减少控制量。通过动态系统内嵌学习信号实现信用分配，无需显式存储中间状态或依赖微小梯度。
AI.result: 在递归神经网络和元学习任务中，该方法性能与主流梯度基方法相当，验证了其有效性，并为理解大脑学习机制提供了新视角。
AI.conclusion: 最小控制原则为平衡系统学习提供了新范式，既符合生物合理性，又拓展了机器学习方法，可能推动神经科学与AI的交叉研究。

authors_text: Wenyu Liu,Wentong Li,Jianke Zhu,Miaomiao Cui,Xuansong Xie,Lei Zhang
title: Improving Nighttime Driving-Scene Segmentation via Dual Image-adaptive Learnable Filters
title_zh: 通过双图像自适应可学习滤波器改善夜间驾驶场景分割
abstract: Semantic segmentation on driving-scene images is vital for autonomous driving. Although encouraging performance has been achieved on daytime images, the performance on nighttime images are less satisfactory due to the insufficient exposure and the lack of labeled data. To address these issues, we present an add-on module called dual image-adaptive learnable filters (DIAL-Filters) to improve the semantic segmentation in nighttime driving conditions, aiming at exploiting the intrinsic features of driving-scene images under different illuminations. DIAL-Filters consist of two parts, including an image-adaptive processing module (IAPM) and a learnable guided filter (LGF). With DIAL-Filters, we design both unsupervised and supervised frameworks for nighttime driving-scene segmentation, which can be trained in an end-to-end manner. Specifically, the IAPM module consists of a small convolutional neural network with a set of differentiable image filters, where each image can be adaptively enhanced for better segmentation with respect to the different illuminations. The LGF is employed to enhance the output of segmentation network to get the final segmentation result. The DIAL-Filters are light-weight and efficient and they can be readily applied for both daytime and nighttime images. Our experiments show that DAIL-Filters can significantly improve the supervised segmentation performance on ACDC_Night and NightCity datasets, while it demonstrates the state-of-the-art performance on unsupervised nighttime semantic segmentation on Dark Zurich and Nighttime Driving testbeds.
summary: Semantic segmentation on driving-scene images is vital for autonomous driving. Although encouraging performance has been achieved on daytime images, the performance on nighttime images are less satisfactory due to the insufficient exposure and the lack of labeled data. To address these issues, we present an add-on module called dual image-adaptive learnable filters (DIAL-Filters) to improve the semantic segmentation in nighttime driving conditions, aiming at exploiting the intrinsic features of driving-scene images under different illuminations. DIAL-Filters consist of two parts, including an image-adaptive processing module (IAPM) and a learnable guided filter (LGF). With DIAL-Filters, we design both unsupervised and supervised frameworks for nighttime driving-scene segmentation, which can be trained in an end-to-end manner. Specifically, the IAPM module consists of a small convolutional neural network with a set of differentiable image filters, where each image can be adaptively enhanced for better segmentation with respect to the different illuminations. The LGF is employed to enhance the output of segmentation network to get the final segmentation result. The DIAL-Filters are light-weight and efficient and they can be readily applied for both daytime and nighttime images. Our experiments show that DAIL-Filters can significantly improve the supervised segmentation performance on ACDC_Night and NightCity datasets, while it demonstrates the state-of-the-art performance on unsupervised nighttime semantic segmentation on Dark Zurich and Nighttime Driving testbeds.
abstract_zh: 驾驶场景图像的语义分割对于自动驾驶至关重要。尽管在白天图像上取得了令人鼓舞的性能，但由于曝光不足和缺乏标记数据，夜间图像的性能不太令人满意。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种称为双图像自适应可学习滤波器（DIAL-Filters）的附加模块，以改善夜间驾驶条件下的语义分割，旨在利用不同照明下驾驶场景图像的内在特征。 DIAL-Filters由两部分组成，包括图像自适应处理模块（IAPM）和可学习引导滤波器（LGF）。通过 DIAL-Filters，我们设计了用于夜间驾驶场景分割的无监督和监督框架，并且可以以端到端的方式进行训练。具体来说，IAPM 模块由一个小型卷积神经网络和一组可微图像滤波器组成，其中每个图像都可以自适应增强，以便针对不同照明进行更好的分割。采用LGF增强分割网络的输出，得到最终的分割结果。 DIAL 滤镜重量轻且高效，可轻松应用于白天和夜间图像。我们的实验表明，DAIL-Filters 可以显着提高 ACDC_Night 和 NightCity 数据集上的监督分割性能，同时在 Dark Zurich 和夜间驾驶测试平台上展示了​​无监督夜间语义分割的最先进性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为DIAL-Filters的模块，用于提升夜间驾驶场景语义分割性能。
AI.motivation: 夜间驾驶场景因曝光不足和标注数据缺乏导致语义分割效果不佳，亟需针对性解决方案。
AI.method: 设计包含图像自适应处理模块(IAPM)和可学习引导滤波器(LGF)的DIAL-Filters，通过端到端框架实现有监督和无监督分割。
AI.result: 在ACDC_Night和NightCity数据集上显著提升监督分割性能，在Dark Zurich等数据集达到无监督分割最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: DIAL-Filters轻量高效，可适配昼夜场景，有效解决夜间分割中的光照与数据不足问题。
