search_text: Improving Nighttime Driving-Scene Segmentation via Dual Image-adaptive Learnable Filters 通过双图像自适应可学习滤波器改善夜间驾驶场景分割 Semantic segmentation on driving-scene images is vital for autonomous driving. Although encouraging performance has been achieved on daytime images, the performance on nighttime images are less satisfactory due to the insufficient exposure and the lack of labeled data. To address these issues, we present an add-on module called dual image-adaptive learnable filters (DIAL-Filters) to improve the semantic segmentation in nighttime driving conditions, aiming at exploiting the intrinsic features of driving-scene images under different illuminations. DIAL-Filters consist of two parts, including an image-adaptive processing module (IAPM) and a learnable guided filter (LGF). With DIAL-Filters, we design both unsupervised and supervised frameworks for nighttime driving-scene segmentation, which can be trained in an end-to-end manner. Specifically, the IAPM module consists of a small convolutional neural network with a set of differentiable image filters, where each image can be adaptively enhanced for better segmentation with respect to the different illuminations. The LGF is employed to enhance the output of segmentation network to get the final segmentation result. The DIAL-Filters are light-weight and efficient and they can be readily applied for both daytime and nighttime images. Our experiments show that DAIL-Filters can significantly improve the supervised segmentation performance on ACDC_Night and NightCity datasets, while it demonstrates the state-of-the-art performance on unsupervised nighttime semantic segmentation on Dark Zurich and Nighttime Driving testbeds. 驾驶场景图像的语义分割对于自动驾驶至关重要。尽管在白天图像上取得了令人鼓舞的性能，但由于曝光不足和缺乏标记数据，夜间图像的性能不太令人满意。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种称为双图像自适应可学习滤波器（DIAL-Filters）的附加模块，以改善夜间驾驶条件下的语义分割，旨在利用不同照明下驾驶场景图像的内在特征。 DIAL-Filters由两部分组成，包括图像自适应处理模块（IAPM）和可学习引导滤波器（LGF）。通过 DIAL-Filters，我们设计了用于夜间驾驶场景分割的无监督和监督框架，并且可以以端到端的方式进行训练。具体来说，IAPM 模块由一个小型卷积神经网络和一组可微图像滤波器组成，其中每个图像都可以自适应增强，以便针对不同照明进行更好的分割。采用LGF增强分割网络的输出，得到最终的分割结果。 DIAL 滤镜重量轻且高效，可轻松应用于白天和夜间图像。我们的实验表明，DAIL-Filters 可以显着提高 ACDC_Night 和 NightCity 数据集上的监督分割性能，同时在 Dark Zurich 和夜间驾驶测试平台上展示了​​无监督夜间语义分割的最先进性能。 本文提出了一种名为DIAL-Filters的模块，用于提升夜间驾驶场景语义分割性能。 Wenyu Liu,Wentong Li,Jianke Zhu,Miaomiao Cui,Xuansong Xie,Lei Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Zhuo Chen,Yufeng Huang,Jiaoyan Chen,Yuxia Geng,Wen Zhang,Yin Fang,Jeff Z. Pan,Huajun Chen
title: DUET: Cross-modal Semantic Grounding for Contrastive Zero-shot Learning
title_zh: DUET：对比零样本学习的跨模态语义基础
abstract: Zero-shot learning (ZSL) aims to predict unseen classes whose samples have never appeared during training. One of the most effective and widely used semantic information for zero-shot image classification are attributes which are annotations for class-level visual characteristics. However, the current methods often fail to discriminate those subtle visual distinctions between images due to not only the shortage of fine-grained annotations, but also the attribute imbalance and co-occurrence. In this paper, we present a transformer-based end-to-end ZSL method named DUET, which integrates latent semantic knowledge from the pre-trained language models (PLMs) via a self-supervised multi-modal learning paradigm. Specifically, we (1) developed a cross-modal semantic grounding network to investigate the model's capability of disentangling semantic attributes from the images; (2) applied an attribute-level contrastive learning strategy to further enhance the model's discrimination on fine-grained visual characteristics against the attribute co-occurrence and imbalance; (3) proposed a multi-task learning policy for considering multi-model objectives. We find that our DUET can achieve state-of-the-art performance on three standard ZSL benchmarks and a knowledge graph equipped ZSL benchmark. Its components are effective and its predictions are interpretable.
summary: Zero-shot learning (ZSL) aims to predict unseen classes whose samples have never appeared during training. One of the most effective and widely used semantic information for zero-shot image classification are attributes which are annotations for class-level visual characteristics. However, the current methods often fail to discriminate those subtle visual distinctions between images due to not only the shortage of fine-grained annotations, but also the attribute imbalance and co-occurrence. In this paper, we present a transformer-based end-to-end ZSL method named DUET, which integrates latent semantic knowledge from the pre-trained language models (PLMs) via a self-supervised multi-modal learning paradigm. Specifically, we (1) developed a cross-modal semantic grounding network to investigate the model's capability of disentangling semantic attributes from the images; (2) applied an attribute-level contrastive learning strategy to further enhance the model's discrimination on fine-grained visual characteristics against the attribute co-occurrence and imbalance; (3) proposed a multi-task learning policy for considering multi-model objectives. We find that our DUET can achieve state-of-the-art performance on three standard ZSL benchmarks and a knowledge graph equipped ZSL benchmark. Its components are effective and its predictions are interpretable.
abstract_zh: 零样本学习（ZSL）旨在预测训练期间样本从未出现过的未见过的类。零样本图像分类最有效和最广泛使用的语义信息之一是属性，它们是类级视觉特征的注释。然而，当前的方法往往无法区分图像之间那些微妙的视觉差异，不仅因为缺乏细粒度的注释，而且还因为属性不平衡和共现。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 DUET 的基于 Transformer 的端到端 ZSL 方法，该方法通过自监督多模态学习范式集成了来自预训练语言模型（PLM）的潜在语义知识。具体来说，我们（1）开发了一个跨模态语义基础网络来研究模型从图像中分离语义属性的能力； （2）应用属性级对比学习策略，进一步增强模型对细粒度视觉特征对属性共现和不平衡的辨别能力； （3）提出了考虑多模型目标的多任务学习策略。我们发现我们的 DUET 可以在三个标准 ZSL 基准测试和配备 ZSL 基准测试的知识图上实现最先进的性能。它的组成部分是有效的，它的预测是可以解释的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于跨模态语义对齐的对比零样本学习方法DUET，通过整合预训练语言模型的语义知识提升零样本分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有零样本学习方法因细粒度标注不足、属性不平衡及共现问题，难以区分图像中细微视觉差异，亟需引入更有效的语义对齐机制。
AI.method: 构建跨模态语义 grounding 网络实现属性解耦，采用属性级对比学习策略增强细粒度判别能力，并设计多任务学习框架联合优化多模态目标。
AI.result: 在三个标准零样本基准和知识图谱增强基准上均达到SOTA性能，模型组件有效且预测结果可解释。
AI.conclusion: DUET 通过跨模态语义整合和对比学习有效解决了零样本学习中的语义鸿沟问题，为细粒度视觉语义对齐提供新思路。

authors_text: Xurxo Rigueira,Javier Martinez,Maria Araujo,Antonio Recaman
title: Computer vision application for improved product traceability in the granite manufacturing industry
title_zh: 计算机视觉应用可提高花岗岩制造行业的产品可追溯性
abstract: The traceability of granite blocks consists in identifying each block with a finite number of color bands which represent a numerical code. This code has to be read several times throughout the manufacturing process, but its accuracy is subject to human errors, leading to cause faults in the traceability system. A computer vision system is presented to address this problem through color detection and the decryption of the associated code. The system developed makes use of color space transformations, and several thresholds for the isolation of the colors. Computer vision methods are implemented, along with contour detection procedures for color identification. Lastly, the analysis of geometrical features is used to decrypt the color code captured. The proposed algorithm is trained on a set of 109 pictures taken in different environmental conditions and validated on a set of 21 images. The outcome shows promising results with an accuracy rate of 75.00% in the validation process. Therefore, the application presented can help employees reduce the number of mistakes on product tracking.
summary: The traceability of granite blocks consists in identifying each block with a finite number of color bands which represent a numerical code. This code has to be read several times throughout the manufacturing process, but its accuracy is subject to human errors, leading to cause faults in the traceability system. A computer vision system is presented to address this problem through color detection and the decryption of the associated code. The system developed makes use of color space transformations, and several thresholds for the isolation of the colors. Computer vision methods are implemented, along with contour detection procedures for color identification. Lastly, the analysis of geometrical features is used to decrypt the color code captured. The proposed algorithm is trained on a set of 109 pictures taken in different environmental conditions and validated on a set of 21 images. The outcome shows promising results with an accuracy rate of 75.00% in the validation process. Therefore, the application presented can help employees reduce the number of mistakes on product tracking.
abstract_zh: 花岗岩块的可追溯性在于用代表数字代码的有限数量的色带来识别每个块。该代码在整个制造过程中必须多次读取，但其准确性容易受到人为错误的影响，从而导致追溯系统出现故障。计算机视觉系统通过颜色检测和相关代码解密来解决这个问题。开发的系统利用色彩空间转换和多个颜色隔离阈值。实施计算机视觉方法以及用于颜色识别的轮廓检测程序。最后，利用几何特征分析来解密捕获的颜色代码。所提出的算法在不同环境条件下拍摄的一组 109 张照片上进行训练，并在一​​组 21 张图像上进行验证。结果表明，验证过程中的准确率为 75.00%，结果令人鼓舞。因此，所提供的应用程序可以帮助员工减少产品跟踪错误的数量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于计算机视觉的花岗岩产品追溯系统，通过颜色检测和解码提高追溯准确性。
AI.motivation: 花岗岩块的追溯依赖人工读取有限颜色带编码，易受人为错误影响，导致追溯系统故障。
AI.method: 采用颜色空间转换、阈值分割、轮廓检测及几何特征分析技术，结合109张不同环境图片训练算法。
AI.result: 在21张验证图片中实现75.00%的准确率，验证了算法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该系统可有效减少产品追溯过程中的人为错误，提升花岗岩制造业的追溯效率。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于计算机视觉的花岗岩产品追溯系统，通过颜色检测和解码提高追溯准确性。
ai_content.motivation: 花岗岩块的追溯依赖人工读取有限颜色带编码，易受人为错误影响，导致追溯系统故障。
ai_content.method: 采用颜色空间转换、阈值分割、轮廓检测及几何特征分析技术，结合109张不同环境图片训练算法。
ai_content.result: 在21张验证图片中实现75.00%的准确率，验证了算法的有效性。
ai_content.conclusion: 该系统可有效减少产品追溯过程中的人为错误，提升花岗岩制造业的追溯效率。

search_text: Computer vision application for improved product traceability in the granite manufacturing industry 计算机视觉应用可提高花岗岩制造行业的产品可追溯性 The traceability of granite blocks consists in identifying each block with a finite number of color bands which represent a numerical code. This code has to be read several times throughout the manufacturing process, but its accuracy is subject to human errors, leading to cause faults in the traceability system. A computer vision system is presented to address this problem through color detection and the decryption of the associated code. The system developed makes use of color space transformations, and several thresholds for the isolation of the colors. Computer vision methods are implemented, along with contour detection procedures for color identification. Lastly, the analysis of geometrical features is used to decrypt the color code captured. The proposed algorithm is trained on a set of 109 pictures taken in different environmental conditions and validated on a set of 21 images. The outcome shows promising results with an accuracy rate of 75.00% in the validation process. Therefore, the application presented can help employees reduce the number of mistakes on product tracking. 花岗岩块的可追溯性在于用代表数字代码的有限数量的色带来识别每个块。该代码在整个制造过程中必须多次读取，但其准确性容易受到人为错误的影响，从而导致追溯系统出现故障。计算机视觉系统通过颜色检测和相关代码解密来解决这个问题。开发的系统利用色彩空间转换和多个颜色隔离阈值。实施计算机视觉方法以及用于颜色识别的轮廓检测程序。最后，利用几何特征分析来解密捕获的颜色代码。所提出的算法在不同环境条件下拍摄的一组 109 张照片上进行训练，并在一​​组 21 张图像上进行验证。结果表明，验证过程中的准确率为 75.00%，结果令人鼓舞。因此，所提供的应用程序可以帮助员工减少产品跟踪错误的数量。 本文提出了一种基于计算机视觉的花岗岩产品追溯系统，通过颜色检测和解码提高追溯准确性。 Xurxo Rigueira,Javier Martinez,Maria Araujo,Antonio Recaman cs.CV

authors_text: Zhanghan Ke,Chunyi Sun,Lei Zhu,Ke Xu,Rynson W. H. Lau
title: Harmonizer: Learning to Perform White-Box Image and Video Harmonization
title_zh: Harmonizer：学习执行白盒图像和视频协调
abstract: Recent works on image harmonization solve the problem as a pixel-wise image translation task via large autoencoders. They have unsatisfactory performances and slow inference speeds when dealing with high-resolution images. In this work, we observe that adjusting the input arguments of basic image filters, e.g., brightness and contrast, is sufficient for humans to produce realistic images from the composite ones. Hence, we frame image harmonization as an image-level regression problem to learn the arguments of the filters that humans use for the task. We present a Harmonizer framework for image harmonization. Unlike prior methods that are based on black-box autoencoders, Harmonizer contains a neural network for filter argument prediction and several white-box filters (based on the predicted arguments) for image harmonization. We also introduce a cascade regressor and a dynamic loss strategy for Harmonizer to learn filter arguments more stably and precisely. Since our network only outputs image-level arguments and the filters we used are efficient, Harmonizer is much lighter and faster than existing methods. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that Harmonizer surpasses existing methods notably, especially with high-resolution inputs. Finally, we apply Harmonizer to video harmonization, which achieves consistent results across frames and 56 fps at 1080P resolution. Code and models are available at: https://github.com/ZHKKKe/Harmonizer.
summary: Recent works on image harmonization solve the problem as a pixel-wise image translation task via large autoencoders. They have unsatisfactory performances and slow inference speeds when dealing with high-resolution images. In this work, we observe that adjusting the input arguments of basic image filters, e.g., brightness and contrast, is sufficient for humans to produce realistic images from the composite ones. Hence, we frame image harmonization as an image-level regression problem to learn the arguments of the filters that humans use for the task. We present a Harmonizer framework for image harmonization. Unlike prior methods that are based on black-box autoencoders, Harmonizer contains a neural network for filter argument prediction and several white-box filters (based on the predicted arguments) for image harmonization. We also introduce a cascade regressor and a dynamic loss strategy for Harmonizer to learn filter arguments more stably and precisely. Since our network only outputs image-level arguments and the filters we used are efficient, Harmonizer is much lighter and faster than existing methods. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that Harmonizer surpasses existing methods notably, especially with high-resolution inputs. Finally, we apply Harmonizer to video harmonization, which achieves consistent results across frames and 56 fps at 1080P resolution. Code and models are available at: https://github.com/ZHKKKe/Harmonizer.
abstract_zh: 最近关于图像协调的工作通过大型自动编码器解决了像素级图像翻译任务的问题。在处理高分辨率图像时，它们的性能不佳且推理速度慢。在这项工作中，我们观察到调整基本图像滤波器的输入参数（例如亮度和对比度）足以让人类从合成图像中生成逼真的图像。因此，我们将图像协调构建为图像级回归问题，以学习人类用于该任务的滤波器的参数。我们提出了一个用于图像协调的 Harmonizer 框架。与基于黑盒自动编码器的现有方法不同，Harmonizer 包含一个用于滤波器参数预测的神经网络和几个用于图像协调的白盒滤波器（基于预测参数）。我们还为 Harmonizer 引入了级联回归器和动态损失策略，以更稳定、更精确地学习滤波器参数。由于我们的网络仅输出图像级参数，并且我们使用的滤波器非常高效，因此 Harmonizer 比现有方法更轻、更快。综合实验表明 Harmonizer 显着超越了现有方法，尤其是在高分辨率输入方面。最后，我们将 Harmonizer 应用于视频协调，从而在 1080P 分辨率下实现跨帧和 56 fps 的一致结果。代码和模型可在以下网址获取：https://github.com/ZHKKKe/Harmonizer。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Harmonizer的轻量级框架，通过学习图像滤镜参数实现高效的图像和视频谐和，解决高分辨率场景下传统方法性能不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于自编码器的图像谐和方法在高分辨率场景下存在推理速度慢、效果不佳的问题，而人类通过调整基础滤镜参数（如亮度、对比度）即可生成真实图像，因此需探索更高效的谐和方法。
AI.method: 构建包含滤镜参数预测网络和白盒滤镜的Harmonizer框架，采用级联回归器和动态损失策略稳定学习滤镜参数，利用高效滤镜操作实现轻量化与加速。
AI.result: Harmonizer在高分辨率图像上显著优于现有方法，视频谐和达到1080P下56fps的实时性，且模型参数量更少。
AI.conclusion: 通过学习人类使用的滤镜参数，Harmonizer实现了更高效、轻量的图像与视频谐和，为高分辨率场景提供了新解决方案。

authors_text: Matthew MacPherson,Keerthini Muthuswamy,Ashik Amlani,Charles Hutchinson,Vicky Goh,Giovanni Montana
title: Assessing the Performance of Automated Prediction and Ranking of Patient Age from Chest X-rays Against Clinicians
title_zh: 评估临床医生根据胸部 X 光片自动预测和排序患者年龄的性能
abstract: Understanding the internal physiological changes accompanying the aging process is an important aspect of medical image interpretation, with the expected changes acting as a baseline when reporting abnormal findings. Deep learning has recently been demonstrated to allow the accurate estimation of patient age from chest X-rays, and shows potential as a health indicator and mortality predictor. In this paper we present a novel comparative study of the relative performance of radiologists versus state-of-the-art deep learning models on two tasks: (a) patient age estimation from a single chest X-ray, and (b) ranking of two time-separated images of the same patient by age. We train our models with a heterogeneous database of 1.8M chest X-rays with ground truth patient ages and investigate the limitations on model accuracy imposed by limited training data and image resolution, and demonstrate generalisation performance on public data. To explore the large performance gap between the models and humans on these age-prediction tasks compared with other radiological reporting tasks seen in the literature, we incorporate our age prediction model into a conditional Generative Adversarial Network (cGAN) allowing visualisation of the semantic features identified by the prediction model as significant to age prediction, comparing the identified features with those relied on by clinicians.
summary: Understanding the internal physiological changes accompanying the aging process is an important aspect of medical image interpretation, with the expected changes acting as a baseline when reporting abnormal findings. Deep learning has recently been demonstrated to allow the accurate estimation of patient age from chest X-rays, and shows potential as a health indicator and mortality predictor. In this paper we present a novel comparative study of the relative performance of radiologists versus state-of-the-art deep learning models on two tasks: (a) patient age estimation from a single chest X-ray, and (b) ranking of two time-separated images of the same patient by age. We train our models with a heterogeneous database of 1.8M chest X-rays with ground truth patient ages and investigate the limitations on model accuracy imposed by limited training data and image resolution, and demonstrate generalisation performance on public data. To explore the large performance gap between the models and humans on these age-prediction tasks compared with other radiological reporting tasks seen in the literature, we incorporate our age prediction model into a conditional Generative Adversarial Network (cGAN) allowing visualisation of the semantic features identified by the prediction model as significant to age prediction, comparing the identified features with those relied on by clinicians.
abstract_zh: 了解伴随衰老过程的内部生理变化是医学图像解释的一个重要方面，在报告异常结果时，预期的变化可以作为基线。最近，深度学习已被证明可以通过胸部 X 光检查准确估计患者年龄，并显示出作为健康指标和死亡率预测指标的潜力。在本文中，我们提出了一项新颖的比较研究，比较放射科医生与最先进的深度学习模型在两项任务上的相对表现：(a) 根据单张胸部 X 光片估计患者年龄，以及 (b) 按年龄对同一患者的两张时间间隔图像进行排序。我们使用包含 180 万张胸部 X 光片和真实患者年龄的异构数据库来训练我们的模型，并研究有限的训练数据和图像分辨率对模型准确性的限制，并展示公共数据的泛化性能。为了探索模型和人类在这些年龄预测任务上与文献中看到的其他放射报告任务之间的巨大性能差距，我们将我们的年龄预测模型纳入条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）中，允许将预测模型识别出的对年龄预测重要的语义特征可视化，将识别出的特征与临床医生所依赖的特征进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了放射科医生与深度学习模型在胸部X光片中预测患者年龄及排序年龄差异任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 年龄估计是医学影像分析的重要基础，深度学习在此领域展现潜力，但需验证其与临床医生的性能差异及可靠性。
AI.method: 使用包含180万张带真实年龄标签的胸部X光片训练模型，通过单图像年龄预测和双图像年龄排序两项任务进行评估，并引入cGAN可视化模型与临床医生关注的语义特征差异。
AI.result: 深度学习模型在年龄预测任务中表现显著低于人类，且受限于训练数据量和图像分辨率；可视化分析显示模型与临床医生关注的影像特征存在明显差异。
AI.conclusion: 当前模型在年龄预测任务中难以超越人类专家，需进一步优化数据质量与特征理解机制以缩小性能差距。

motivation: 年龄估计是医学影像分析的重要基础，深度学习在此领域展现潜力，但需验证其与临床医生的性能差异及可靠性。

conclusion: 当前模型在年龄预测任务中难以超越人类专家，需进一步优化数据质量与特征理解机制以缩小性能差距。
search_text: Assessing the Performance of Automated Prediction and Ranking of Patient Age from Chest X-rays Against Clinicians 评估临床医生根据胸部 X 光片自动预测和排序患者年龄的性能 Understanding the internal physiological changes accompanying the aging process is an important aspect of medical image interpretation, with the expected changes acting as a baseline when reporting abnormal findings. Deep learning has recently been demonstrated to allow the accurate estimation of patient age from chest X-rays, and shows potential as a health indicator and mortality predictor. In this paper we present a novel comparative study of the relative performance of radiologists versus state-of-the-art deep learning models on two tasks: (a) patient age estimation from a single chest X-ray, and (b) ranking of two time-separated images of the same patient by age. We train our models with a heterogeneous database of 1.8M chest X-rays with ground truth patient ages and investigate the limitations on model accuracy imposed by limited training data and image resolution, and demonstrate generalisation performance on public data. To explore the large performance gap between the models and humans on these age-prediction tasks compared with other radiological reporting tasks seen in the literature, we incorporate our age prediction model into a conditional Generative Adversarial Network (cGAN) allowing visualisation of the semantic features identified by the prediction model as significant to age prediction, comparing the identified features with those relied on by clinicians. 了解伴随衰老过程的内部生理变化是医学图像解释的一个重要方面，在报告异常结果时，预期的变化可以作为基线。最近，深度学习已被证明可以通过胸部 X 光检查准确估计患者年龄，并显示出作为健康指标和死亡率预测指标的潜力。在本文中，我们提出了一项新颖的比较研究，比较放射科医生与最先进的深度学习模型在两项任务上的相对表现：(a) 根据单张胸部 X 光片估计患者年龄，以及 (b) 按年龄对同一患者的两张时间间隔图像进行排序。我们使用包含 180 万张胸部 X 光片和真实患者年龄的异构数据库来训练我们的模型，并研究有限的训练数据和图像分辨率对模型准确性的限制，并展示公共数据的泛化性能。为了探索模型和人类在这些年龄预测任务上与文献中看到的其他放射报告任务之间的巨大性能差距，我们将我们的年龄预测模型纳入条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）中，允许将预测模型识别出的对年龄预测重要的语义特征可视化，将识别出的特征与临床医生所依赖的特征进行比较。 本文比较了放射科医生与深度学习模型在胸部X光片中预测患者年龄及排序年龄差异任务中的性能。 Matthew MacPherson,Keerthini Muthuswamy,Ashik Amlani,Charles Hutchinson,Vicky Goh,Giovanni Montana eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Xueyan Yin,Feifan Li,Yanming Shen,Heng Qi,Baocai Yin
title: NodeTrans: A Graph Transfer Learning Approach for Traffic Prediction
title_zh: NodeTrans：一种用于流量预测的图迁移学习方法
abstract: Recently, deep learning methods have made great progress in traffic prediction, but their performance depends on a large amount of historical data. In reality, we may face the data scarcity issue. In this case, deep learning models fail to obtain satisfactory performance. Transfer learning is a promising approach to solve the data scarcity issue. However, existing transfer learning approaches in traffic prediction are mainly based on regular grid data, which is not suitable for the inherent graph data in the traffic network. Moreover, existing graph-based models can only capture shared traffic patterns in the road network, and how to learn node-specific patterns is also a challenge. In this paper, we propose a novel transfer learning approach to solve the traffic prediction with few data, which can transfer the knowledge learned from a data-rich source domain to a data-scarce target domain. First, a spatial-temporal graph neural network is proposed, which can capture the node-specific spatial-temporal traffic patterns of different road networks. Then, to improve the robustness of transfer, we design a pattern-based transfer strategy, where we leverage a clustering-based mechanism to distill common spatial-temporal patterns in the source domain, and use these knowledge to further improve the prediction performance of the target domain. Experiments on real-world datasets verify the effectiveness of our approach.
summary: Recently, deep learning methods have made great progress in traffic prediction, but their performance depends on a large amount of historical data. In reality, we may face the data scarcity issue. In this case, deep learning models fail to obtain satisfactory performance. Transfer learning is a promising approach to solve the data scarcity issue. However, existing transfer learning approaches in traffic prediction are mainly based on regular grid data, which is not suitable for the inherent graph data in the traffic network. Moreover, existing graph-based models can only capture shared traffic patterns in the road network, and how to learn node-specific patterns is also a challenge. In this paper, we propose a novel transfer learning approach to solve the traffic prediction with few data, which can transfer the knowledge learned from a data-rich source domain to a data-scarce target domain. First, a spatial-temporal graph neural network is proposed, which can capture the node-specific spatial-temporal traffic patterns of different road networks. Then, to improve the robustness of transfer, we design a pattern-based transfer strategy, where we leverage a clustering-based mechanism to distill common spatial-temporal patterns in the source domain, and use these knowledge to further improve the prediction performance of the target domain. Experiments on real-world datasets verify the effectiveness of our approach.
abstract_zh: 近年来，深度学习方法在流量预测方面取得了很大进展，但其性能依赖于大量历史数据。事实上，我们可能会面临数据稀缺的问题。在这种情况下，深度学习模型无法获得令人满意的性能。迁移学习是解决数据稀缺问题的一种有前景的方法。然而，现有的交通预测中的迁移学习方法主要基于规则的网格数据，不适合交通网络中固有的图数据。此外，现有的基于图的模型只能捕获路网中的共享交通模式，如何学习特定于节点的模式也是一个挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的迁移学习方法来解决用少量数据进行流量预测的问题，该方法可以将从数据丰富的源域学到的知识迁移到数据稀缺的目标域。首先，提出了时空图神经网络，它可以捕获不同道路网络的特定节点时空交通模式。然后，为了提高传输的鲁棒性，我们设计了一种基于模式的传输策略，利用基于聚类的机制来提取源域中常见的时空模式，并利用这些知识进一步提高目标域的预测性能。对现实世界数据集的实验验证了我们方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图迁移学习的交通预测方法NodeTrans，解决数据稀缺场景下的交通预测问题。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习方法依赖大量历史数据，而实际中常面临数据稀缺问题。现有迁移学习方法多基于规则网格数据，难以适应交通网络的图结构特性，且无法有效学习节点特定模式。
AI.method: 设计空间-时序图神经网络捕捉节点特定模式，并通过聚类机制提取源域共性时空模式，构建基于模式的迁移策略实现知识迁移。
AI.result: 在真实世界数据集上的实验验证了该方法在数据稀缺场景下的有效性，预测性能优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: NodeTrans通过图结构迁移学习有效解决了交通预测中的数据稀缺问题，为少样本场景下的交通预测提供了新思路。

authors_text: Wenhao Wu,Zhun Sun,Wanli Ouyang
title: Revisiting Classifier: Transferring Vision-Language Models for Video Recognition
title_zh: 重新审视分类器：传输视觉语言模型用于视频识别
comment: Accepted by AAAI-2023. Camera Ready Version
comments: Accepted by AAAI-2023. Camera Ready Version
abstract: Transferring knowledge from task-agnostic pre-trained deep models for downstream tasks is an important topic in computer vision research. Along with the growth of computational capacity, we now have open-source vision-language pre-trained models in large scales of the model architecture and amount of data. In this study, we focus on transferring knowledge for video classification tasks. Conventional methods randomly initialize the linear classifier head for vision classification, but they leave the usage of the text encoder for downstream visual recognition tasks undiscovered. In this paper, we revise the role of the linear classifier and replace the classifier with the different knowledge from pre-trained model. We utilize the well-pretrained language model to generate good semantic target for efficient transferring learning. The empirical study shows that our method improves both the performance and the training speed of video classification, with a negligible change in the model. Our simple yet effective tuning paradigm achieves state-of-the-art performance and efficient training on various video recognition scenarios, i.e., zero-shot, few-shot, general recognition. In particular, our paradigm achieves the state-of-the-art accuracy of 87.8% on Kinetics-400, and also surpasses previous methods by 20~50% absolute top-1 accuracy under zero-shot, few-shot settings on five popular video datasets. Code and models can be found at https://github.com/whwu95/Text4Vis .
summary: Transferring knowledge from task-agnostic pre-trained deep models for downstream tasks is an important topic in computer vision research. Along with the growth of computational capacity, we now have open-source vision-language pre-trained models in large scales of the model architecture and amount of data. In this study, we focus on transferring knowledge for video classification tasks. Conventional methods randomly initialize the linear classifier head for vision classification, but they leave the usage of the text encoder for downstream visual recognition tasks undiscovered. In this paper, we revise the role of the linear classifier and replace the classifier with the different knowledge from pre-trained model. We utilize the well-pretrained language model to generate good semantic target for efficient transferring learning. The empirical study shows that our method improves both the performance and the training speed of video classification, with a negligible change in the model. Our simple yet effective tuning paradigm achieves state-of-the-art performance and efficient training on various video recognition scenarios, i.e., zero-shot, few-shot, general recognition. In particular, our paradigm achieves the state-of-the-art accuracy of 87.8% on Kinetics-400, and also surpasses previous methods by 20~50% absolute top-1 accuracy under zero-shot, few-shot settings on five popular video datasets. Code and models can be found at https://github.com/whwu95/Text4Vis .
abstract_zh: 将与任务无关的预训练深度模型中的知识转移到下游任务是计算机视觉研究中的一个重要课题。随着计算能力的增长，我们现在拥有大规模模型架构和数据量的开源视觉语言预训练模型。在本研究中，我们专注于传输视频分类任务的知识。传统方法随机初始化线性分类器头以进行视觉分类，但它们并未发现文本编码器在下游视觉识别任务中的使用。在本文中，我们修改了线性分类器的作用，并用来自预训练模型的不同知识替换了分类器。我们利用预先训练好的语言模型来生成良好的语义目标，以实现高效的迁移学习。实证研究表明，我们的方法提高了视频分类的性能和训练速度，而模型的变化可以忽略不计。我们简单而有效的调整范例在各种视频识别场景（即零样本、少样本、一般识别）上实现了最先进的性能和高效的训练。特别是，我们的范例在 Kinetics-400 上实现了 87.8% 的最先进准确率，并且在五个流行视频数据集上的零样本、少样本设置下的绝对 top-1 准确率也超过了之前的方法 20~50%。代码和模型可以在 https://github.com/whwu95/Text4Vis 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过转移视觉-语言预训练模型知识来提升视频分类任务性能的方法。
AI.motivation: 传统视频分类方法随机初始化分类器且未有效利用预训练模型中的文本编码器知识，导致性能和训练效率不足。
AI.method: 用预训练语言模型生成的语义目标替换传统线性分类器，通过知识迁移实现高效的视频分类微调。
AI.result: 在Kinetics-400数据集上达到87.8%的SOTA准确率，在零样本和少样本场景下超越现有方法20-50%绝对准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过简单有效的微调范式，在多种视频识别场景中均取得领先性能，验证了视觉-语言模型知识迁移的有效性。

Along with the growth of computational capacity, we now have open-source vision-language pre-trained models in large scales of the model architecture and amount of data. In this study, we focus on transferring knowledge for video classification tasks. Conventional methods randomly initialize the linear classifier head for vision classification, but they leave the usage of the text encoder for downstream visual recognition tasks undiscovered. In this paper, we revise the role of the linear classifier and replace the classifier with the different knowledge from pre-trained model. We utilize the well-pretrained language model to generate good semantic target for efficient transferring learning. The empirical study shows that our method improves both the performance and the training speed of video classification, with a negligible change in the model. Our simple yet effective tuning paradigm achieves state-of-the-art performance and efficient training on various video recognition scenarios, i.e., zero-shot, few-shot, general recognition. In particular, our paradigm achieves the state-of-the-art accuracy of 87.8% on Kinetics-400, and also surpasses previous methods by 20~50% absolute top-1 accuracy under zero-shot, few-shot settings on five popular video datasets. Code and models can be found at https://github.com/whwu95/Text4Vis . 将与任务无关的预训练深度模型中的知识转移到下游任务是计算机视觉研究中的一个重要课题。随着计算能力的增长，我们现在拥有大规模模型架构和数据量的开源视觉语言预训练模型。在本研究中，我们专注于传输视频分类任务的知识。传统方法随机初始化线性分类器头以进行视觉分类，但它们并未发现文本编码器在下游视觉识别任务中的使用。在本文中，我们修改了线性分类器的作用，并用来自预训练模型的不同知识替换了分类器。我们利用预先训练好的语言模型来生成良好的语义目标，以实现高效的迁移学习。实证研究表明，我们的方法提高了视频分类的性能和训练速度，而模型的变化可以忽略不计。我们简单而有效的调整范例在各种视频识别场景（即零样本、少样本、一般识别）上实现了最先进的性能和高效的训练。特别是，我们的范例在 Kinetics-400 上实现了 87.8% 的最先进准确率，并且在五个流行视频数据集上的零样本、少样本设置下的绝对 top-1 准确率也超过了之前的方法 20~50%。代码和模型可以在 https://github.com/whwu95/Text4Vis 找到。 本文提出一种通过转移视觉-语言预训练模型知识来提升视频分类任务性能的方法。 Wenhao Wu,Zhun Sun,Wanli Ouyang cs.CV

authors_text: Ester Gonzalez-Sosa,Andrija Gajic,Diego Gonzalez-Morin,Guillermo Robledo,Pablo Perez,Alvaro Villegas
title: Real Time Egocentric Segmentation for Video-self Avatar in Mixed Reality
title_zh: 混合现实中视频自我头像的实时自我中心分割
abstract: In this work we present our real-time egocentric body segmentation algorithm. Our algorithm achieves a frame rate of 66 fps for an input resolution of 640x480, thanks to our shallow network inspired in Thundernet's architecture. Besides, we put a strong emphasis on the variability of the training data. More concretely, we describe the creation process of our Egocentric Bodies (EgoBodies) dataset, composed of almost 10,000 images from three datasets, created both from synthetic methods and real capturing. We conduct experiments to understand the contribution of the individual datasets; compare Thundernet model trained with EgoBodies with simpler and more complex previous approaches and discuss their corresponding performance in a real-life setup in terms of segmentation quality and inference times. The described trained semantic segmentation algorithm is already integrated in an end-to-end system for Mixed Reality (MR), making it possible for users to see his/her own body while being immersed in a MR scene.
summary: In this work we present our real-time egocentric body segmentation algorithm. Our algorithm achieves a frame rate of 66 fps for an input resolution of 640x480, thanks to our shallow network inspired in Thundernet's architecture. Besides, we put a strong emphasis on the variability of the training data. More concretely, we describe the creation process of our Egocentric Bodies (EgoBodies) dataset, composed of almost 10,000 images from three datasets, created both from synthetic methods and real capturing. We conduct experiments to understand the contribution of the individual datasets; compare Thundernet model trained with EgoBodies with simpler and more complex previous approaches and discuss their corresponding performance in a real-life setup in terms of segmentation quality and inference times. The described trained semantic segmentation algorithm is already integrated in an end-to-end system for Mixed Reality (MR), making it possible for users to see his/her own body while being immersed in a MR scene.
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了实时的以自我为中心的身体分割算法。得益于 Thundernet 架构的浅层网络，我们的算法在输入分辨率为 640x480 时实现了 66 fps 的帧速率。此外，我们非常重视训练数据的可变性。更具体地说，我们描述了自我中心身体 (EgoBodies) 数据集的创建过程，该数据集由来自三个数据集的近 10,000 张图像组成，通过合成方法和真实捕获创建。我们进行实验来了解各个数据集的贡献；将使用 EgoBodies 训练的 Thundernet 模型与之前更简单和更复杂的方法进行比较，并讨论它们在现实生活中在分割质量和推理时间方面的相应性能。所描述的经过训练的语义分割算法已经集成到混合现实（MR）的端到端系统中，使用户能够在沉浸在 MR 场景中时看到自己的身体。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于混合现实视频自化身的实时自我中心身体分割算法。
AI.motivation: 为了在混合现实环境中实现实时高质量的身体分割，需要处理不同数据来源的多样性，并提升分割算法的效率和准确性。
AI.method: 基于Thundernet架构设计浅层网络以提高处理速度，并构建包含合成与真实数据的EgoBodies数据集进行训练。
AI.result: 算法在640x480分辨率下实现66fps，分割质量优于先前方法，且在真实场景中表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 该分割算法成功集成到混合现实系统中，实现了用户在虚拟场景中的实时自我视觉反馈。

authors_text: Chintan Trivedi,Konstantinos Makantasis,Antonios Liapis,Georgios N. Yannakakis
title: Game State Learning via Game Scene Augmentation
title_zh: 通过游戏场景增强进行游戏状态学习
abstract: Having access to accurate game state information is of utmost importance for any artificial intelligence task including game-playing, testing, player modeling, and procedural content generation. Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) techniques have shown to be capable of inferring accurate game state information from the high-dimensional pixel input of game footage into compressed latent representations. Contrastive Learning is a popular SSL paradigm where the visual understanding of the game's images comes from contrasting dissimilar and similar game states defined by simple image augmentation methods. In this study, we introduce a new game scene augmentation technique -- named GameCLR -- that takes advantage of the game-engine to define and synthesize specific, highly-controlled renderings of different game states, thereby, boosting contrastive learning performance. We test our GameCLR technique on images of the CARLA driving simulator environment and compare it against the popular SimCLR baseline SSL method. Our results suggest that GameCLR can infer the game's state information from game footage more accurately compared to the baseline. Our proposed approach allows us to conduct game artificial intelligence research by directly utilizing screen pixels as input.
summary: Having access to accurate game state information is of utmost importance for any artificial intelligence task including game-playing, testing, player modeling, and procedural content generation. Self-Supervised Learning (SSL) techniques have shown to be capable of inferring accurate game state information from the high-dimensional pixel input of game footage into compressed latent representations. Contrastive Learning is a popular SSL paradigm where the visual understanding of the game's images comes from contrasting dissimilar and similar game states defined by simple image augmentation methods. In this study, we introduce a new game scene augmentation technique -- named GameCLR -- that takes advantage of the game-engine to define and synthesize specific, highly-controlled renderings of different game states, thereby, boosting contrastive learning performance. We test our GameCLR technique on images of the CARLA driving simulator environment and compare it against the popular SimCLR baseline SSL method. Our results suggest that GameCLR can infer the game's state information from game footage more accurately compared to the baseline. Our proposed approach allows us to conduct game artificial intelligence research by directly utilizing screen pixels as input.
abstract_zh: 访问准确的游戏状态信息对于任何人工智能任务（包括游戏、测试、玩家建模和程序内容生成）都至关重要。自监督学习 (SSL) 技术已被证明能够从游戏镜头的高维像素输入到压缩的潜在表示中推断出准确的游戏状态信息。对比学习是一种流行的 SSL 范例，其中对游戏图像的视觉理解来自于对比由简单图像增强方法定义的不同和相似的游戏状态。在这项研究中，我们引入了一种新的游戏场景增强技术——名为 GameCLR——它利用游戏引擎来定义和合成不同游戏状态的特定的、高度控制的渲染，从而提高对比学习性能。我们在 CARLA 驾驶模拟器环境的图像上测试我们的 GameCLR 技术，并将其与流行的 SimCLR 基线 SSL 方法进行比较。我们的结果表明，与基线相比，GameCLR 可以更准确地从游戏镜头中推断游戏的状态信息。我们提出的方法允许我们直接利用屏幕像素作为输入来进行游戏人工智能研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于游戏引擎的场景增强方法GameCLR，通过生成可控游戏状态渲染来提升对比学习在游戏状态推断中的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统对比学习依赖简单图像增强方法，难以准确捕捉游戏状态特征，而游戏引擎可生成精确可控的渲染数据以提升学习效果。
AI.method: 设计GameCLR框架，利用游戏引擎合成不同游戏状态的高保真渲染图像作为对比学习的数据增强策略，并在CARLA模拟器中验证。
AI.result: 实验表明GameCLR相比SimCLR基线方法能更准确地从游戏画面中推断出游戏状态信息。
AI.conclusion: 基于游戏引擎的场景增强方法可有效提升游戏AI研究中屏幕像素到状态信息的建模能力。

authors_text: Kai-Ni Wang,Yuting He,Shuaishuai Zhuang,Juzheng Miao,Xiaopu He,Ping Zhou,Guanyu Yang,Guang-Quan Zhou,Shuo Li
title: FFCNet: Fourier Transform-Based Frequency Learning and Complex Convolutional Network for Colon Disease Classification
title_zh: FFCNet：基于傅里叶变换的频率学习和复杂卷积网络用于结肠疾病分类
comment: Accepted for publication at the 25th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention - MICCAI 2022
comments: Accepted for publication at the 25th International Conference on Medical Image Computing and Computer Assisted Intervention - MICCAI 2022
abstract: Reliable automatic classification of colonoscopy images is of great significance in assessing the stage of colonic lesions and formulating appropriate treatment plans. However, it is challenging due to uneven brightness, location variability, inter-class similarity, and intra-class dissimilarity, affecting the classification accuracy. To address the above issues, we propose a Fourier-based Frequency Complex Network (FFCNet) for colon disease classification in this study. Specifically, FFCNet is a novel complex network that enables the combination of complex convolutional networks with frequency learning to overcome the loss of phase information caused by real convolution operations. Also, our Fourier transform transfers the average brightness of an image to a point in the spectrum (the DC component), alleviating the effects of uneven brightness by decoupling image content and brightness. Moreover, the image patch scrambling module in FFCNet generates random local spectral blocks, empowering the network to learn long-range and local diseasespecific features and improving the discriminative ability of hard samples. We evaluated the proposed FFCNet on an in-house dataset with 2568 colonoscopy images, showing our method achieves high performance outperforming previous state-of-the art methods with an accuracy of 86:35% and an accuracy of 4.46% higher than the backbone. The project page with code is available at https://github.com/soleilssss/FFCNet.
summary: Reliable automatic classification of colonoscopy images is of great significance in assessing the stage of colonic lesions and formulating appropriate treatment plans. However, it is challenging due to uneven brightness, location variability, inter-class similarity, and intra-class dissimilarity, affecting the classification accuracy. To address the above issues, we propose a Fourier-based Frequency Complex Network (FFCNet) for colon disease classification in this study. Specifically, FFCNet is a novel complex network that enables the combination of complex convolutional networks with frequency learning to overcome the loss of phase information caused by real convolution operations. Also, our Fourier transform transfers the average brightness of an image to a point in the spectrum (the DC component), alleviating the effects of uneven brightness by decoupling image content and brightness. Moreover, the image patch scrambling module in FFCNet generates random local spectral blocks, empowering the network to learn long-range and local diseasespecific features and improving the discriminative ability of hard samples. We evaluated the proposed FFCNet on an in-house dataset with 2568 colonoscopy images, showing our method achieves high performance outperforming previous state-of-the art methods with an accuracy of 86:35% and an accuracy of 4.46% higher than the backbone. The project page with code is available at https://github.com/soleilssss/FFCNet.
abstract_zh: 结肠镜图像的可靠自动分类对于评估结肠病变的阶段和制定适当的治疗计划具有重要意义。然而，由于亮度不均匀、位置可变性、类间相似性和类内相异性，影响分类精度，因此具有挑战性。为了解决上述问题，我们在本研究中提出了一种基于傅里叶的频率复杂网络（FFCNet）用于结肠疾病分类。具体来说，FFCNet是一种新颖的复杂网络，能够将复杂的卷积网络与频率学习相结合，克服真实卷积运算造成的相位信息丢失。此外，我们的傅立叶变换将图像的平均亮度转移到频谱中的一个点（DC 分量），通过解耦图像内容和亮度来减轻亮度不均匀的影响。此外，FFCNet中的图像块置乱模块生成随机的局部光谱块，使网络能够学习远程和局部疾病特定特征，并提高硬样本的判别能力。我们在包含 2568 个结肠镜检查图像的内部数据集上评估了所提出的 FFCNet，结果表明我们的方法的性能优于以前最先进的方法，准确率为 86:35%，比主干网的准确率高 4.46%。包含代码的项目页面可在 https://github.com/soleilssss/FFCNet 上找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于傅里叶变换的频率学习和复数卷积网络（FFCNet），用于解决结肠疾病分类中图像亮度不均、位置变化等导致的分类准确性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有结肠镜图像分类方法受亮度不均、位置变化、类间相似性及类内差异性影响，导致分类准确率不足，需改进特征提取与亮度解耦方法。
AI.method: FFCNet通过傅里叶变换将图像亮度转换为频谱DC分量以解耦内容与亮度，结合复数卷积保留相位信息，并引入图像块打乱模块生成随机频谱块，增强长距离与局部特征学习能力。
AI.result: 在2568张结肠镜图像的内部数据集上，FFCNet分类准确率达86.35%，较基线模型提升4.46%，优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: FFCNet通过频率域处理与复数卷积有效解决了结肠图像分类中的关键挑战，验证了其在复杂医学图像分析中的优越性。

search_text: FFCNet: Fourier Transform-Based Frequency Learning and Complex Convolutional Network for Colon Disease Classification FFCNet：基于傅里叶变换的频率学习和复杂卷积网络用于结肠疾病分类 Reliable automatic classification of colonoscopy images is of great significance in assessing the stage of colonic lesions and formulating appropriate treatment plans. However, it is challenging due to uneven brightness, location variability, inter-class similarity, and intra-class dissimilarity, affecting the classification accuracy. To address the above issues, we propose a Fourier-based Frequency Complex Network (FFCNet) for colon disease classification in this study. Specifically, FFCNet is a novel complex network that enables the combination of complex convolutional networks with frequency learning to overcome the loss of phase information caused by real convolution operations. Also, our Fourier transform transfers the average brightness of an image to a point in the spectrum (the DC component), alleviating the effects of uneven brightness by decoupling image content and brightness. Moreover, the image patch scrambling module in FFCNet generates random local spectral blocks, empowering the network to learn long-range and local diseasespecific features and improving the discriminative ability of hard samples. We evaluated the proposed FFCNet on an in-house dataset with 2568 colonoscopy images, showing our method achieves high performance outperforming previous state-of-the art methods with an accuracy of 86:35% and an accuracy of 4.46% higher than the backbone. The project page with code is available at https://github.com/soleilssss/FFCNet. 结肠镜图像的可靠自动分类对于评估结肠病变的阶段和制定适当的治疗计划具有重要意义。然而，由于亮度不均匀、位置可变性、类间相似性和类内相异性，影响分类精度，因此具有挑战性。为了解决上述问题，我们在本研究中提出了一种基于傅里叶的频率复杂网络（FFCNet）用于结肠疾病分类。具体来说，FFCNet是一种新颖的复杂网络，能够将复杂的卷积网络与频率学习相结合，克服真实卷积运算造成的相位信息丢失。此外，我们的傅立叶变换将图像的平均亮度转移到频谱中的一个点（DC 分量），通过解耦图像内容和亮度来减轻亮度不均匀的影响。此外，FFCNet中的图像块置乱模块生成随机的局部光谱块，使网络能够学习远程和局部疾病特定特征，并提高硬样本的判别能力。我们在包含 2568 个结肠镜检查图像的内部数据集上评估了所提出的 FFCNet，结果表明我们的方法的性能优于以前最先进的方法，准确率为 86:35%，比主干网的准确率高 4.46%。包含代码的项目页面可在 https://github.com/soleilssss/FFCNet 上找到。 本文提出基于傅里叶变换的频率学习和复数卷积网络（FFCNet），用于解决结肠疾病分类中图像亮度不均、位置变化等导致的分类准确性问题。 Kai-Ni Wang,Yuting He,Shuaishuai Zhuang,Juzheng Miao,Xiaopu He,Ping Zhou,Guanyu Yang,Guang-Quan Zhou,Shuo Li eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Javier Garcia,Michael Yannuzzi,Peter Kramer,Christian Rieck,Aaron T. Becker
title: Connected Reconfiguration of Polyominoes Amid Obstacles using RRT*
title_zh: 使用 RRT* 在障碍物中连接重新配置多骨牌
comment: Nine pages, nine figures. (Updated) full version of an extended abstract that is published in the proceedings of the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
comments: Nine pages, nine figures. (Updated) full version of an extended abstract that is published in the proceedings of the 2022 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2022)
abstract: This paper investigates the use of a sampling-based approach, the RRT*, to reconfigure a 2D set of connected tiles in complex environments, where multiple obstacles might be present. Since the target application is automated building of discrete, cellular structures using mobile robots, there are constraints that determine what tiles can be picked up and where they can be dropped off during reconfiguration. We compare our approach to two algorithms as global and local planners, and show that we are able to find more efficient build sequences using a reasonable number of samples, in environments with varying densities of obstacles.
summary: This paper investigates the use of a sampling-based approach, the RRT*, to reconfigure a 2D set of connected tiles in complex environments, where multiple obstacles might be present. Since the target application is automated building of discrete, cellular structures using mobile robots, there are constraints that determine what tiles can be picked up and where they can be dropped off during reconfiguration. We compare our approach to two algorithms as global and local planners, and show that we are able to find more efficient build sequences using a reasonable number of samples, in environments with varying densities of obstacles.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了使用基于采样的方法 RRT* 在可能存在多个障碍的复杂环境中重新配置一组二维连接图块。由于目标应用是使用移动机器人自动构建离散的蜂窝结构，因此在重新配置期间确定可以拾取哪些瓷砖以及可以将其扔到何处时存在一些限制。我们将我们的方法与作为全局和局部规划器的两种算法进行比较，并表明我们能够在障碍物密度不同的环境中使用合理数量的样本找到更有效的构建序列。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在复杂环境中使用RRT*算法对二维连接瓷砖进行再配置的方法，考虑了移动机器人构建离散结构时的约束条件。
AI.motivation: 在自动化构建离散细胞结构的应用场景中，需要解决存在障碍物时的瓷砖抓取与放置约束问题，传统算法可能无法高效处理此类复杂环境。
AI.method: 采用基于采样的RRT*算法，结合全局和局部规划器进行比较，通过合理数量的采样实现瓷砖再配置，并考虑障碍物密度变化的影响。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在不同障碍物密度的环境中能够找到更高效的构建序列，且采样数量合理。
AI.conclusion: RRT*算法在考虑移动机器人约束的复杂环境中，能有效实现瓷砖的再配置，为自动化构建提供了可行解决方案。

authors_text: Shivansh Beohar,Fabian Heinrich,Rahul Kala,Helge Ritter,Andrew Melnik
title: Solving Learn-to-Race Autonomous Racing Challenge by Planning in Latent Space
title_zh: 通过潜在空间规划解决学习比赛自主赛车挑战
abstract: Learn-to-Race Autonomous Racing Virtual Challenge hosted on www<dot>aicrowd<dot>com platform consisted of two tracks: Single and Multi Camera. Our UniTeam team was among the final winners in the Single Camera track. The agent is required to pass the previously unknown F1-style track in the minimum time with the least amount of off-road driving violations. In our approach, we used the U-Net architecture for road segmentation, variational autocoder for encoding a road binary mask, and a nearest-neighbor search strategy that selects the best action for a given state. Our agent achieved an average speed of 105 km/h on stage 1 (known track) and 73 km/h on stage 2 (unknown track) without any off-road driving violations. Here we present our solution and results.
summary: Learn-to-Race Autonomous Racing Virtual Challenge hosted on www<dot>aicrowd<dot>com platform consisted of two tracks: Single and Multi Camera. Our UniTeam team was among the final winners in the Single Camera track. The agent is required to pass the previously unknown F1-style track in the minimum time with the least amount of off-road driving violations. In our approach, we used the U-Net architecture for road segmentation, variational autocoder for encoding a road binary mask, and a nearest-neighbor search strategy that selects the best action for a given state. Our agent achieved an average speed of 105 km/h on stage 1 (known track) and 73 km/h on stage 2 (unknown track) without any off-road driving violations. Here we present our solution and results.
abstract_zh: 在 www<dot>aicrowd<dot>com 平台上举办的“Learn-to-Race”自主赛车虚拟挑战赛由两个赛道组成：单摄像头和多摄像头。我们的 UniTeam 团队是单摄像机项目的最终获胜者之一。要求特工在最短的时间内以最少的越野驾驶违规次数通过此前未知的F1式赛道。在我们的方法中，我们使用 U-Net 架构进行道路分割，使用变分自动编码器对道路二进制掩码进行编码，并使用最近邻搜索策略为给定状态选择最佳操作。我们的代理在第 1 赛段（已知赛道）上实现了 105 公里/小时的平均速度，在第 2 赛段（未知赛道）上实现了 73 公里/小时的平均速度，没有任何越野驾驶违规行为。在这里，我们展示我们的解决方案和结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自动驾驶赛车解决方案，通过潜在空间规划实现未知F1赛道的高速无违规行驶。
AI.motivation: 在自动驾驶赛车挑战中，需解决未知赛道的实时路径规划问题，同时最小化离线违规和完成时间。
AI.method: 采用U-Net进行道路分割，结合变分自编码器编码道路掩码，并使用最近邻搜索策略进行动作选择。
AI.result: 在已知赛道达到105 km/h平均速度，未知赛道达73 km/h，且全程无离线违规行为。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过视觉感知与规划结合，在复杂动态环境中实现了高效自动驾驶赛车控制。

result: 在已知赛道达到105 km/h平均速度，未知赛道达73 km/h，且全程无离线违规行为。
conclusion: 所提方法通过视觉感知与规划结合，在复杂动态环境中实现了高效自动驾驶赛车控制。
search_text: Solving Learn-to-Race Autonomous Racing Challenge by Planning in Latent Space 通过潜在空间规划解决学习比赛自主赛车挑战 Learn-to-Race Autonomous Racing Virtual Challenge hosted on www<dot>aicrowd<dot>com platform consisted of two tracks: Single and Multi Camera. Our UniTeam team was among the final winners in the Single Camera track. The agent is required to pass the previously unknown F1-style track in the minimum time with the least amount of off-road driving violations. In our approach, we used the U-Net architecture for road segmentation, variational autocoder for encoding a road binary mask, and a nearest-neighbor search strategy that selects the best action for a given state. Our agent achieved an average speed of 105 km/h on stage 1 (known track) and 73 km/h on stage 2 (unknown track) without any off-road driving violations. Here we present our solution and results. 在 www<dot>aicrowd<dot>com 平台上举办的“Learn-to-Race”自主赛车虚拟挑战赛由两个赛道组成：单摄像头和多摄像头。我们的 UniTeam 团队是单摄像机项目的最终获胜者之一。要求特工在最短的时间内以最少的越野驾驶违规次数通过此前未知的F1式赛道。在我们的方法中，我们使用 U-Net 架构进行道路分割，使用变分自动编码器对道路二进制掩码进行编码，并使用最近邻搜索策略为给定状态选择最佳操作。我们的代理在第 1 赛段（已知赛道）上实现了 105 公里/小时的平均速度，在第 2 赛段（未知赛道）上实现了 73 公里/小时的平均速度，没有任何越野驾驶违规行为。在这里，我们展示我们的解决方案和结果。 本文提出了一种自动驾驶赛车解决方案，通过潜在空间规划实现未知F1赛道的高速无违规行驶。 Shivansh Beohar,Fabian Heinrich,Rahul Kala,Helge Ritter,Andrew Melnik cs.AI

authors_text: Zhiwei Lin,Tingting Liang,Taihong Xiao,Yongtao Wang,Zhi Tang,Ming-Hsuan Yang
title: FlowNAS: Neural Architecture Search for Optical Flow Estimation
title_zh: FlowNAS：用于光流估计的神经架构搜索
abstract: Existing optical flow estimators usually employ the network architectures typically designed for image classification as the encoder to extract per-pixel features. However, due to the natural difference between the tasks, the architectures designed for image classification may be sub-optimal for flow estimation. To address this issue, we propose a neural architecture search method named FlowNAS to automatically find the better encoder architecture for flow estimation task. We first design a suitable search space including various convolutional operators and construct a weight-sharing super-network for efficiently evaluating the candidate architectures. Then, for better training the super-network, we propose Feature Alignment Distillation, which utilizes a well-trained flow estimator to guide the training of super-network. Finally, a resource-constrained evolutionary algorithm is exploited to find an optimal architecture (i.e., sub-network). Experimental results show that the discovered architecture with the weights inherited from the super-network achieves 4.67\% F1-all error on KITTI, an 8.4\% reduction of RAFT baseline, surpassing state-of-the-art handcrafted models GMA and AGFlow, while reducing the model complexity and latency. The source code and trained models will be released in https://github.com/VDIGPKU/FlowNAS.
summary: Existing optical flow estimators usually employ the network architectures typically designed for image classification as the encoder to extract per-pixel features. However, due to the natural difference between the tasks, the architectures designed for image classification may be sub-optimal for flow estimation. To address this issue, we propose a neural architecture search method named FlowNAS to automatically find the better encoder architecture for flow estimation task. We first design a suitable search space including various convolutional operators and construct a weight-sharing super-network for efficiently evaluating the candidate architectures. Then, for better training the super-network, we propose Feature Alignment Distillation, which utilizes a well-trained flow estimator to guide the training of super-network. Finally, a resource-constrained evolutionary algorithm is exploited to find an optimal architecture (i.e., sub-network). Experimental results show that the discovered architecture with the weights inherited from the super-network achieves 4.67\% F1-all error on KITTI, an 8.4\% reduction of RAFT baseline, surpassing state-of-the-art handcrafted models GMA and AGFlow, while reducing the model complexity and latency. The source code and trained models will be released in https://github.com/VDIGPKU/FlowNAS.
abstract_zh: 现有的光流估计器通常采用通常为图像分类设计的网络架构作为编码器来提取每像素特征。然而，由于任务之间的自然差异，为图像分类设计的架构对于流量估计可能不是最佳的。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种名为 FlowNAS 的神经架构搜索方法，可以自动为流量估计任务找到更好的编码器架构。我们首先设计一个合适的搜索空间，包括各种卷积算子，并构建一个权重共享超级网络，以有效评估候选架构。然后，为了更好地训练超级网络，我们提出了特征对齐蒸馏，它利用训练有素的流量估计器来指导超级网络的训练。最后，利用资源受限的进化算法来找到最佳架构（即子网络）。实验结果表明，所发现的具有继承自超级网络的权重的架构在 KITTI 上实现了 4.67% F1-all 误差，RAFT 基线降低了 8.4%，超越了最先进的手工模型 GMA 和 AGFlow，同时降低了模型复杂性和延迟。源代码和训练模型将在 https://github.com/VDIGPKU/FlowNAS 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FlowNAS方法，通过神经架构搜索自动寻找更适合光流估计任务的编码器架构。
AI.motivation: 现有光流估计方法多沿用图像分类任务设计的网络架构，但此类架构可能无法满足光流估计任务的需求，导致性能不足。
AI.method: 设计包含多种卷积操作的搜索空间并构建共享权重的超级网络，提出特征对齐蒸馏方法训练超级网络，最后通过资源受限进化算法搜索最优子网络。
AI.result: 在KITTI数据集上达到4.67% F1-all误差，较RAFT基线降低8.4%，优于GMA和AGFlow等先进模型，同时降低模型复杂度和延迟。
AI.conclusion: FlowNAS通过自动架构搜索有效提升了光流估计性能，验证了任务定制化网络设计的优势。

authors_text: Zhanheng Yang,Sining Sun,Jin Li,Xiaoming Zhang,Xiong Wang,Long Ma,Lei Xie
title: CaTT-KWS: A Multi-stage Customized Keyword Spotting Framework based on Cascaded Transducer-Transformer
title_zh: CaTT-KWS：基于级联 Transducer-Transformer 的多级定制关键词识别框架
abstract: Customized keyword spotting (KWS) has great potential to be deployed on edge devices to achieve hands-free user experience. However, in real applications, false alarm (FA) would be a serious problem for spotting dozens or even hundreds of keywords, which drastically affects user experience. To solve this problem, in this paper, we leverage the recent advances in transducer and transformer based acoustic models and propose a new multi-stage customized KWS framework named Cascaded Transducer-Transformer KWS (CaTT-KWS), which includes a transducer based keyword detector, a frame-level phone predictor based force alignment module and a transformer based decoder. Specifically, the streaming transducer module is used to spot keyword candidates in audio stream. Then force alignment is implemented using the phone posteriors predicted by the phone predictor to finish the first stage keyword verification and refine the time boundaries of keyword. Finally, the transformer decoder further verifies the triggered keyword. Our proposed CaTT-KWS framework reduces FA rate effectively without obviously hurting keyword recognition accuracy. Specifically, we can get impressively 0.13 FA per hour on a challenging dataset, with over 90% relative reduction on FA comparing to the transducer based detection model, while keyword recognition accuracy only drops less than 2%.
summary: Customized keyword spotting (KWS) has great potential to be deployed on edge devices to achieve hands-free user experience. However, in real applications, false alarm (FA) would be a serious problem for spotting dozens or even hundreds of keywords, which drastically affects user experience. To solve this problem, in this paper, we leverage the recent advances in transducer and transformer based acoustic models and propose a new multi-stage customized KWS framework named Cascaded Transducer-Transformer KWS (CaTT-KWS), which includes a transducer based keyword detector, a frame-level phone predictor based force alignment module and a transformer based decoder. Specifically, the streaming transducer module is used to spot keyword candidates in audio stream. Then force alignment is implemented using the phone posteriors predicted by the phone predictor to finish the first stage keyword verification and refine the time boundaries of keyword. Finally, the transformer decoder further verifies the triggered keyword. Our proposed CaTT-KWS framework reduces FA rate effectively without obviously hurting keyword recognition accuracy. Specifically, we can get impressively 0.13 FA per hour on a challenging dataset, with over 90% relative reduction on FA comparing to the transducer based detection model, while keyword recognition accuracy only drops less than 2%.
abstract_zh: 定制关键字识别 (KWS) 在边缘设备上部署以实现免提用户体验具有巨大潜力。然而，在实际应用中，当发现数十甚至数百个关键词时，误报（FA）将是一个严重的问题，这极大地影响了用户体验。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们利用基于换能器和变压器的声学模型的最新进展，提出了一种新的多级定制KWS框架，名为级联换能器-变压器KWS（CaTT-KWS），其中包括基于换能器的关键词检测器、基于帧级音素预测器的力对齐模块和基于变压器的解码器。具体来说，流转换器模块用于发现音频流中的候选关键字。然后利用音素预测器预测的音素后验实现强制对齐，完成第一阶段关键词验证并细化关键词的时间边界。最后，变压器解码器进一步验证触发的关键字。我们提出的CaTT-KWS框架有效地降低了FA率，而不会明显损害关键字识别的准确性。具体来说，我们可以在具有挑战性的数据集上每小时获得令人印象深刻的 0.13 FA，与基于传感器的检测模型相比，FA 相对减少超过 90%，而关键字识别准确度仅下降不到 2%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多阶段定制化关键词识别框架CaTT-KWS，结合Transducer和Transformer模型，旨在降低边缘设备上的误报率。
AI.motivation: 现有关键词识别系统在检测大量关键词时存在严重误报问题，影响用户体验，需在不显著降低识别准确率的前提下有效减少误报。
AI.method: 框架包含三阶段：基于Transducer的关键词检测模块、基于音素预测的帧级强制对齐模块和基于Transformer的解码器，通过多阶段验证逐步精确定位关键词并降低误报。
AI.result: 在挑战性数据集上实现每小时0.13次误报，相较Transducer模型误报率降低超90%，关键词识别准确率仅下降不足2%。
AI.conclusion: CaTT-KWS通过多阶段设计有效平衡了误报控制与识别准确率，为边缘设备部署定制化关键词识别提供了可行方案。

Then force alignment is implemented using the phone posteriors predicted by the phone predictor to finish the first stage keyword verification and refine the time boundaries of keyword. Finally, the transformer decoder further verifies the triggered keyword. Our proposed CaTT-KWS framework reduces FA rate effectively without obviously hurting keyword recognition accuracy. Specifically, we can get impressively 0.13 FA per hour on a challenging dataset, with over 90% relative reduction on FA comparing to the transducer based detection model, while keyword recognition accuracy only drops less than 2%. 定制关键字识别 (KWS) 在边缘设备上部署以实现免提用户体验具有巨大潜力。然而，在实际应用中，当发现数十甚至数百个关键词时，误报（FA）将是一个严重的问题，这极大地影响了用户体验。为了解决这个问题，在本文中，我们利用基于换能器和变压器的声学模型的最新进展，提出了一种新的多级定制KWS框架，名为级联换能器-变压器KWS（CaTT-KWS），其中包括基于换能器的关键词检测器、基于帧级音素预测器的力对齐模块和基于变压器的解码器。具体来说，流转换器模块用于发现音频流中的候选关键字。然后利用音素预测器预测的音素后验实现强制对齐，完成第一阶段关键词验证并细化关键词的时间边界。最后，变压器解码器进一步验证触发的关键字。我们提出的CaTT-KWS框架有效地降低了FA率，而不会明显损害关键字识别的准确性。具体来说，我们可以在具有挑战性的数据集上每小时获得令人印象深刻的 0.13 FA，与基于传感器的检测模型相比，FA 相对减少超过 90%，而关键字识别准确度仅下降不到 2%。 本文提出一种多阶段定制化关键词识别框架CaTT-KWS，结合Transducer和Transformer模型，旨在降低边缘设备上的误报率。 Zhanheng Yang,Sining Sun,Jin Li,Xiaoming Zhang,Xiong Wang,Long Ma,Lei Xie cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Zhanheng Yang,Hang Lv,Xiong Wang,Ao Zhang,Lei Xie
title: Minimizing Sequential Confusion Error in Speech Command Recognition
title_zh: 最小化语音命令识别中的顺序混淆错误
abstract: Speech command recognition (SCR) has been commonly used on resource constrained devices to achieve hands-free user experience. However, in real applications, confusion among commands with similar pronunciations often happens due to the limited capacity of small models deployed on edge devices, which drastically affects the user experience. In this paper, inspired by the advances of discriminative training in speech recognition, we propose a novel minimize sequential confusion error (MSCE) training criterion particularly for SCR, aiming to alleviate the command confusion problem. Specifically, we aim to improve the ability of discriminating the target command from other commands on the basis of MCE discriminative criteria. We define the likelihood of different commands through connectionist temporal classification (CTC). During training, we propose several strategies to use prior knowledge creating a confusing sequence set for similar-sounding command instead of creating the whole non-target command set, which can better save the training resources and effectively reduce command confusion errors. Specifically, we design and compare three different strategies for confusing set construction. By using our proposed method, we can relatively reduce the False Reject Rate~(FRR) by 33.7% at 0.01 False Alarm Rate~(FAR) and confusion errors by 18.28% on our collected speech command set.
summary: Speech command recognition (SCR) has been commonly used on resource constrained devices to achieve hands-free user experience. However, in real applications, confusion among commands with similar pronunciations often happens due to the limited capacity of small models deployed on edge devices, which drastically affects the user experience. In this paper, inspired by the advances of discriminative training in speech recognition, we propose a novel minimize sequential confusion error (MSCE) training criterion particularly for SCR, aiming to alleviate the command confusion problem. Specifically, we aim to improve the ability of discriminating the target command from other commands on the basis of MCE discriminative criteria. We define the likelihood of different commands through connectionist temporal classification (CTC). During training, we propose several strategies to use prior knowledge creating a confusing sequence set for similar-sounding command instead of creating the whole non-target command set, which can better save the training resources and effectively reduce command confusion errors. Specifically, we design and compare three different strategies for confusing set construction. By using our proposed method, we can relatively reduce the False Reject Rate~(FRR) by 33.7% at 0.01 False Alarm Rate~(FAR) and confusion errors by 18.28% on our collected speech command set.
abstract_zh: 语音命令识别 (SCR) 通常用于资源受限的设备，以实现免提用户体验。然而，在实际应用中，由于部署在边缘设备上的小模型容量有限，经常会出现发音相似的命令混淆的情况，这极大地影响了用户体验。在本文中，受语音识别判别训练进展的启发，我们提出了一种新的最小化顺序混淆错误（MSCE）训练标准，特别是针对 SCR，旨在缓解命令混淆问题。具体来说，我们的目标是提高基于 MCE 判别标准区分目标命令和其他命令的能力。我们通过联结时间分类（CTC）定义不同命令的可能性。在训练过程中，我们提出了几种策略，利用先验知识为相似的命令创建一个混淆序列集，而不是创建整个非目标命令集，这样可以更好地节省训练资源并有效减少命令混淆错误。具体来说，我们设计并比较了三种不同的混淆集构造策略。通过使用我们提出的方法，我们可以在 0.01 误报率 (FAR) 下相对降低误拒绝率 (FRR) 33.7%，并在我们收集的语音命令集上相对降低 18.28% 的混淆错误。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的训练准则MSCE，旨在减少语音指令识别中的命令混淆错误，提升边缘设备上的用户体验。
AI.motivation: 在资源受限的设备上，语音指令识别因模型容量限制易出现相似发音指令的混淆，严重影响用户使用体验。
AI.method: 基于CTC定义命令似然，并通过构建混淆序列集的策略，利用先验知识优化训练过程，减少资源消耗。
AI.result: 在自建数据集上，方法使0.01 FAR下的FRR降低33.7%，混淆错误减少18.28%。
AI.conclusion: MSCE准则有效缓解了指令混淆问题，为边缘设备的语音识别提供了更高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Zhongxiang Chang,Abraham P. Punnen,Zhongbao Zhou
title: Multi-strip observation scheduling problem for ac-tive-imaging agile earth observation satellites
title_zh: 主动成像敏捷对地观测卫星多带观测调度问题
abstract: Active-imaging agile earth observation satellite (AI-AEOS) is a new generation agile earth observation satellite (AEOS). With renewed capabilities in observation and active im-aging, AI-AEOS improves upon the observation capabilities of AEOS and provide additional ways to observe ground targets. This however makes the observation scheduling problem for these agile earth observation satellite more complex, especially when considering multi-strip ground targets. In this paper, we investigate the multi-strip observation scheduling problem for an active-image agile earth observation satellite (MOSP). A bi-objective optimization model is presented for MOSP along with an adaptive bi-objective memetic algorithm which integrates the combined power of an adaptive large neighborhood search algorithm (ALNS) and a nondominated sorting genetic algorithm II (NSGA-II). Results of extensive computa-tional experiments are presented which disclose that ALNS and NSGA-II when worked in unison produced superior outcomes. Our model is more versatile than existing models and provide enhanced capabilities in applied problem solving.
summary: Active-imaging agile earth observation satellite (AI-AEOS) is a new generation agile earth observation satellite (AEOS). With renewed capabilities in observation and active im-aging, AI-AEOS improves upon the observation capabilities of AEOS and provide additional ways to observe ground targets. This however makes the observation scheduling problem for these agile earth observation satellite more complex, especially when considering multi-strip ground targets. In this paper, we investigate the multi-strip observation scheduling problem for an active-image agile earth observation satellite (MOSP). A bi-objective optimization model is presented for MOSP along with an adaptive bi-objective memetic algorithm which integrates the combined power of an adaptive large neighborhood search algorithm (ALNS) and a nondominated sorting genetic algorithm II (NSGA-II). Results of extensive computa-tional experiments are presented which disclose that ALNS and NSGA-II when worked in unison produced superior outcomes. Our model is more versatile than existing models and provide enhanced capabilities in applied problem solving.
abstract_zh: 主动成像敏捷对地观测卫星（AI-AEOS）是新一代敏捷对地观测卫星（AEOS）。凭借更新的观测和主动成像能力，AI-AEOS 改进了 AEOS 的观测能力，并提供了观测地面目标的额外方法。然而，这使得这些敏捷地球观测卫星的观测调度问题变得更加复杂，特别是在考虑多带状地面目标时。在本文中，我们研究了主动图像敏捷地球观测卫星（MOSP）的多带观测调度问题。提出了 MOSP 的双目标优化模型以及自适应双目标模因算法，该算法集成了自适应大邻域搜索算法（ALNS）和非支配排序遗传算法 II（NSGA-II）的组合能力。广泛的计算实验结果表明，ALNS 和 NSGA-II 协同工作时会产生优异的结果。我们的模型比现有模型更通用，并提供增强的应用问题解决能力。

AI.tldr: 本文研究主动成像敏捷地球观测卫星的多条带观测调度问题，提出双目标优化模型与混合算法。
AI.motivation: 新一代主动成像敏捷卫星观测能力增强，但多条带目标调度复杂度提升，需更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 构建双目标优化模型，融合自适应大邻域搜索（ALNS）与非支配排序遗传算法（NSGA-II）的混合膜遗传算法。
AI.result: 实验表明ALNS与NSGA-II协同显著提升求解质量，模型较现有方法更具通用性与应用价值。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型与算法有效解决多条带观测调度难题，在复杂场景下展现更强的优化能力。

Punnen,Zhongbao Zhou cs.AI

authors_text: Ran Yu,Limock,Stefan Dietze
title: Still Haven't Found What You're Looking For -- Detecting the Intent of Web Search Missions from User Interaction Features
title_zh: 仍未找到您要找的东西——从用户交互特征检测网络搜索任务的意图
abstract: Web search is among the most frequent online activities. Whereas traditional information retrieval techniques focus on the information need behind a user query, previous work has shown that user behaviour and interaction can provide important signals for understanding the underlying intent of a search mission. An established taxonomy distinguishes between transactional, navigational and informational search missions, where in particular the latter involve a learning goal, i.e. the intent to acquire knowledge about a particular topic. We introduce a supervised approach for classifying online search missions into either of these categories by utilising a range of features obtained from the user interactions during an online search mission. Applying our model to a dataset of real-world query logs, we show that search missions can be categorised with an average F1 score of 63% and accuracy of 69%, while performance on informational and navigational missions is particularly promising (F1>75%). This suggests the potential to utilise such supervised classification during online search to better facilitate retrieval and ranking as well as to improve affiliated services, such as targeted online ads.
summary: Web search is among the most frequent online activities. Whereas traditional information retrieval techniques focus on the information need behind a user query, previous work has shown that user behaviour and interaction can provide important signals for understanding the underlying intent of a search mission. An established taxonomy distinguishes between transactional, navigational and informational search missions, where in particular the latter involve a learning goal, i.e. the intent to acquire knowledge about a particular topic. We introduce a supervised approach for classifying online search missions into either of these categories by utilising a range of features obtained from the user interactions during an online search mission. Applying our model to a dataset of real-world query logs, we show that search missions can be categorised with an average F1 score of 63% and accuracy of 69%, while performance on informational and navigational missions is particularly promising (F1>75%). This suggests the potential to utilise such supervised classification during online search to better facilitate retrieval and ranking as well as to improve affiliated services, such as targeted online ads.
abstract_zh: 网络搜索是最常见的在线活动之一。虽然传统的信息检索技术关注用户查询背后的信息需求，但之前的工作表明，用户行为和交互可以为理解搜索任务的潜在意图提供重要信号。既定的分类法区分了事务性、导航性和信息性搜索任务，特别是后者涉及学习目标，即获取有关特定主题的知识的意图。我们引入了一种监督方法，通过利用在线搜索任务期间从用户交互中获得的一系列特征，将在线搜索任务分类为这些类别。将我们的模型应用于现实世界查询日志的数据集，我们发现搜索任务可以以平均 F1 分数为 63% 和准确度为 69% 进行分类，而信息和导航任务的性能特别有前途（F1>75%）。这表明在在线搜索期间利用这种监督分类来更好地促进检索和排名以及改进附属服务（例如有针对性的在线广告）的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于用户交互特征的监督学习方法，用于分类网络搜索任务的意图（信息类、导航类或事务类）。
AI.motivation: 传统信息检索技术仅关注查询本身，而用户交互行为能提供更丰富的意图信号，有助于提升搜索结果和相关服务效果。
AI.method: 通过收集用户搜索过程中的交互特征（如点击模式、停留时间等），构建监督分类模型对搜索任务进行意图分类。
AI.result: 在真实查询日志数据集上实现平均F1分数63%、准确率69%，其中信息类和导航类任务F1分数超过75%。
AI.conclusion: 该分类方法可优化搜索结果排序、广告投放等场景，为个性化服务提供意图感知能力。

search_text: Still Haven't Found What You're Looking For -- Detecting the Intent of Web Search Missions from User Interaction Features 仍未找到您要找的东西——从用户交互特征检测网络搜索任务的意图 Web search is among the most frequent online activities. Whereas traditional information retrieval techniques focus on the information need behind a user query, previous work has shown that user behaviour and interaction can provide important signals for understanding the underlying intent of a search mission. An established taxonomy distinguishes between transactional, navigational and informational search missions, where in particular the latter involve a learning goal, i.e. the intent to acquire knowledge about a particular topic. We introduce a supervised approach for classifying online search missions into either of these categories by utilising a range of features obtained from the user interactions during an online search mission. Applying our model to a dataset of real-world query logs, we show that search missions can be categorised with an average F1 score of 63% and accuracy of 69%, while performance on informational and navigational missions is particularly promising (F1>75%). This suggests the potential to utilise such supervised classification during online search to better facilitate retrieval and ranking as well as to improve affiliated services, such as targeted online ads. 网络搜索是最常见的在线活动之一。虽然传统的信息检索技术关注用户查询背后的信息需求，但之前的工作表明，用户行为和交互可以为理解搜索任务的潜在意图提供重要信号。既定的分类法区分了事务性、导航性和信息性搜索任务，特别是后者涉及学习目标，即获取有关特定主题的知识的意图。我们引入了一种监督方法，通过利用在线搜索任务期间从用户交互中获得的一系列特征，将在线搜索任务分类为这些类别。将我们的模型应用于现实世界查询日志的数据集，我们发现搜索任务可以以平均 F1 分数为 63% 和准确度为 69% 进行分类，而信息和导航任务的性能特别有前途（F1>75%）。这表明在在线搜索期间利用这种监督分类来更好地促进检索和排名以及改进附属服务（例如有针对性的在线广告）的潜力。 本文提出一种基于用户交互特征的监督学习方法，用于分类网络搜索任务的意图（信息类、导航类或事务类）。 Ran Yu,Limock,Stefan Dietze cs.IR,cs.HC

authors_text: Yuansheng Guan,Guochen Yu,Andong Li,Chengshi Zheng,Jie Wang
title: TMGAN-PLC: Audio Packet Loss Concealment using Temporal Memory Generative Adversarial Network
title_zh: TMGAN-PLC：使用临时记忆生成对抗网络的音频丢包隐藏
abstract: Real-time communications in packet-switched networks have become widely used in daily communication, while they inevitably suffer from network delays and data losses in constrained real-time conditions. To solve these problems, audio packet loss concealment (PLC) algorithms have been developed to mitigate voice transmission failures by reconstructing the lost information. Limited by the transmission latency and device memory, it is still intractable for PLC to accomplish high-quality voice reconstruction using a relatively small packet buffer. In this paper, we propose a temporal memory generative adversarial network for audio PLC, dubbed TMGAN-PLC, which is comprised of a novel nested-UNet generator and the time-domain/frequency-domain discriminators. Specifically, a combination of the nested-UNet and temporal feature-wise linear modulation is elaborately devised in the generator to finely adjust the intra-frame information and establish inter-frame temporal dependencies. To complement the missing speech content caused by longer loss bursts, we employ multi-stage gated vector quantizers to capture the correct content and reconstruct the near-real smooth audio. Extensive experiments on the PLC Challenge dataset demonstrate that the proposed method yields promising performance in terms of speech quality, intelligibility, and PLCMOS.
summary: Real-time communications in packet-switched networks have become widely used in daily communication, while they inevitably suffer from network delays and data losses in constrained real-time conditions. To solve these problems, audio packet loss concealment (PLC) algorithms have been developed to mitigate voice transmission failures by reconstructing the lost information. Limited by the transmission latency and device memory, it is still intractable for PLC to accomplish high-quality voice reconstruction using a relatively small packet buffer. In this paper, we propose a temporal memory generative adversarial network for audio PLC, dubbed TMGAN-PLC, which is comprised of a novel nested-UNet generator and the time-domain/frequency-domain discriminators. Specifically, a combination of the nested-UNet and temporal feature-wise linear modulation is elaborately devised in the generator to finely adjust the intra-frame information and establish inter-frame temporal dependencies. To complement the missing speech content caused by longer loss bursts, we employ multi-stage gated vector quantizers to capture the correct content and reconstruct the near-real smooth audio. Extensive experiments on the PLC Challenge dataset demonstrate that the proposed method yields promising performance in terms of speech quality, intelligibility, and PLCMOS.
abstract_zh: 分组交换网络中的实时通信已广泛应用于日常通信中，但在实时条件受限的情况下，不可避免地会遇到网络延迟和数据丢失的问题。为了解决这些问题，开发了音频丢包隐藏 (PLC) 算法，通过重建丢失的信息来减轻语音传输故障。受传输延迟和设备内存的限制，PLC利用相对较小的数据包缓冲区完成高质量的语音重建仍然很困难。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于音频 PLC 的时间记忆生成对抗网络，称为 TMGAN-PLC，它由新型嵌套 UNet 生成器和时域/频域鉴别器组成。具体来说，在生成器中精心设计了嵌套 UNet 和时间特征线性调制的组合，以精细调整帧内信息并建立帧间时间依赖性。为了补充因较长的丢失突发而导致的丢失语音内容，我们采用多级门控矢量量化器来捕获正确的内容并重建近乎真实的平滑音频。对 PLC Challenge 数据集的大量实验表明，所提出的方法在语音质量、清晰度和 PLCMOS 方面具有良好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时间记忆生成对抗网络（TMGAN-PLC）的音频包丢失隐藏方法，旨在解决实时通信中因网络延迟和数据丢失导致的语音重建问题。
AI.motivation: 现有音频包丢失隐藏（PLC）算法受限于传输延迟和设备内存，难以在小包缓冲区下实现高质量语音重建，尤其在长丢失突发情况下效果不佳。
AI.method: 设计包含嵌套UNet生成器和时域/频域判别器的TMGAN-PLC框架，结合时间特征逐元素线性调制调整帧内信息，并通过多阶段门控向量量化器捕捉丢失内容以重建平滑音频。
AI.result: 在PLC Challenge数据集上的实验表明，该方法在语音质量、可懂度和PLCMOS指标上均优于现有方法，尤其在长丢失突发场景下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: TMGAN-PLC通过时序记忆建模和多阶段内容重建有效解决了小缓冲区下的音频包丢失问题，为实时通信中的语音质量保障提供了新思路。

authors_text: Emad Shihab,Stefan Wagner,Marco A. Gerosa,Mairieli Wessel,Jordi Cabot
title: The Present and Future of Bots in Software Engineering
title_zh: 软件工程中机器人的现状和未来
comment: 5 pages, to be published in IEEE Software
comments: 5 pages, to be published in IEEE Software
abstract: We are witnessing a massive adoption of software engineering bots, applications that react to events triggered by tools and messages posted by users and run automated tasks in response, in a variety of domains. This thematic issues describes experiences and challenges with these bots.
summary: We are witnessing a massive adoption of software engineering bots, applications that react to events triggered by tools and messages posted by users and run automated tasks in response, in a variety of domains. This thematic issues describes experiences and challenges with these bots.
abstract_zh: 我们正在见证软件工程机器人在各个领域的大规模采用，这些应用程序对工具触发的事件和用户发布的消息做出反应，并运行自动化任务作为响应。本专题描述了这些机器人的经验和挑战。

AI.tldr: 探讨软件工程领域中机器人（bots）的现状与未来发展趋势，并分析其应用中的经验与挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着软件工程中机器人应用的普及，需要总结其应用经验并探讨面临的挑战，以推动其进一步发展。
AI.method: 通过综述和分析当前软件工程机器人在不同领域的应用案例，总结其使用经验和存在的技术及管理挑战。
AI.result: 总结了软件工程机器人在自动化任务处理中的实际应用效果，并识别了在设计、集成和维护过程中遇到的关键挑战。
AI.conclusion: 软件工程机器人具有广阔的应用前景，但需要解决技术集成、用户交互和长期维护等方面的挑战以实现其潜力。
