conclusion: 软件工程机器人具有广阔的应用前景，但需要解决技术集成、用户交互和长期维护等方面的挑战以实现其潜力。
search_text: The Present and Future of Bots in Software Engineering 软件工程中机器人的现状和未来 We are witnessing a massive adoption of software engineering bots, applications that react to events triggered by tools and messages posted by users and run automated tasks in response, in a variety of domains. This thematic issues describes experiences and challenges with these bots. 我们正在见证软件工程机器人在各个领域的大规模采用，这些应用程序对工具触发的事件和用户发布的消息做出反应，并运行自动化任务作为响应。本专题描述了这些机器人的经验和挑战。 探讨软件工程领域中机器人（bots）的现状与未来发展趋势，并分析其应用中的经验与挑战。 Emad Shihab,Stefan Wagner,Marco A. Gerosa,Mairieli Wessel,Jordi Cabot cs.SE,cs.AI

authors_text: Zijian Hu,Xiaoguang Gao,Kaifang Wan,Qianglong Wang,Yiwei Zhai
title: Asynchronous Curriculum Experience Replay: A Deep Reinforcement Learning Approach for UAV Autonomous Motion Control in Unknown Dynamic Environments
title_zh: 异步课程体验回放：未知动态环境下无人机自主运动控制的深度强化学习方法
abstract: Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) have been widely used in military warfare. In this paper, we formulate the autonomous motion control (AMC) problem as a Markov decision process (MDP) and propose an advanced deep reinforcement learning (DRL) method that allows UAVs to execute complex tasks in large-scale dynamic three-dimensional (3D) environments. To overcome the limitations of the prioritized experience replay (PER) algorithm and improve performance, the proposed asynchronous curriculum experience replay (ACER) uses multithreads to asynchronously update the priorities, assigns the true priorities and applies a temporary experience pool to make available experiences of higher quality for learning. A first-in-useless-out (FIUO) experience pool is also introduced to ensure the higher use value of the stored experiences. In addition, combined with curriculum learning (CL), a more reasonable training paradigm of sampling experiences from simple to difficult is designed for training UAVs. By training in a complex unknown environment constructed based on the parameters of a real UAV, the proposed ACER improves the convergence speed by 24.66\% and the convergence result by 5.59\% compared to the state-of-the-art twin delayed deep deterministic policy gradient (TD3) algorithm. The testing experiments carried out in environments with different complexities demonstrate the strong robustness and generalization ability of the ACER agent.
summary: Unmanned aerial vehicles (UAVs) have been widely used in military warfare. In this paper, we formulate the autonomous motion control (AMC) problem as a Markov decision process (MDP) and propose an advanced deep reinforcement learning (DRL) method that allows UAVs to execute complex tasks in large-scale dynamic three-dimensional (3D) environments. To overcome the limitations of the prioritized experience replay (PER) algorithm and improve performance, the proposed asynchronous curriculum experience replay (ACER) uses multithreads to asynchronously update the priorities, assigns the true priorities and applies a temporary experience pool to make available experiences of higher quality for learning. A first-in-useless-out (FIUO) experience pool is also introduced to ensure the higher use value of the stored experiences. In addition, combined with curriculum learning (CL), a more reasonable training paradigm of sampling experiences from simple to difficult is designed for training UAVs. By training in a complex unknown environment constructed based on the parameters of a real UAV, the proposed ACER improves the convergence speed by 24.66\% and the convergence result by 5.59\% compared to the state-of-the-art twin delayed deep deterministic policy gradient (TD3) algorithm. The testing experiments carried out in environments with different complexities demonstrate the strong robustness and generalization ability of the ACER agent.
abstract_zh: 无人机（UAV）已广泛应用于军事战争中。在本文中，我们将自主运动控制（AMC）问题表述为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），并提出了一种先进的深度强化学习（DRL）方法，允许无人机在大规模动态三维（3D）环境中执行复杂的任务。为了克服优先经验重放（PER）算法的局限性并提高性能，所提出的异步课程经验重放（ACER）使用多线程异步更新优先级，分配真正的优先级并应用临时经验池，为学习提供更高质量的经验。还引入了先进先出（FIUO）经验池，以确保存储的经验具有更高的使用价值。此外，结合课程学习（CL），为无人机训练设计了更合理的由简到难采样经验的训练范式。通过在基于真实无人机参数构建的复杂未知环境中进行训练，与最先进的孪生延迟深度确定性策略梯度（TD3）算法相比，所提出的ACER将收敛速度提高了24.66%，收敛结果提高了5.59%。在不同复杂度的环境中进行的测试实验证明了ACER代理强大的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的异步课程经验回放（ACER）方法，用于解决无人机在未知动态环境中的自主运动控制问题。
AI.motivation: 传统优先经验回放（PER）算法存在局限性，难以有效提升无人机在复杂动态环境中的学习效率和鲁棒性，需改进经验回放机制与训练策略。
AI.method: 设计异步课程经验回放（ACER）方法，通过多线程异步更新优先级、引入FIUO经验池及结合课程学习（CL）的训练范式，优化经验利用率和学习效率。
AI.result: 相比TD3算法，ACER在复杂未知环境中收敛速度提升24.66%，收敛结果提升5.59%，并展现出强鲁棒性和泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: ACER方法有效解决了无人机在动态环境中的自主控制难题，为实际应用提供了高效可靠的强化学习框架。

authors_text: Zhongxiang Chang,Zhongbao Zhou
title: Three multi-objective memtic algorithms for observation scheduling problem of active-imaging AEOS
title_zh: 主动成像AEOS观测调度问题的三种多目标记忆算法
abstract: Observation scheduling problem for agile earth observation satellites (OSPFAS) plays a critical role in management of agile earth observation satellites (AEOSs). Active imaging enriches the extension of OSPFAS, we call the novel problem as observation scheduling problem for AEOS with variable image duration (OSWVID). A cumulative image quality and a detailed energy consumption is proposed to build OSWVID as a bi-objective optimization model. Three multi-objective memetic algorithms, PD+NSGA-II, LA+NSGA-II and ALNS+NSGA-II, are then designed to solve OSWVID. Considering the heuristic knowledge summarized in our previous research, several operators are designed for improving these three algorithms respectively. Based on existing instances, we analyze the critical parameters optimization, operators evolution, and efficiency of these three algorithms according to extensive simulation experiments.
summary: Observation scheduling problem for agile earth observation satellites (OSPFAS) plays a critical role in management of agile earth observation satellites (AEOSs). Active imaging enriches the extension of OSPFAS, we call the novel problem as observation scheduling problem for AEOS with variable image duration (OSWVID). A cumulative image quality and a detailed energy consumption is proposed to build OSWVID as a bi-objective optimization model. Three multi-objective memetic algorithms, PD+NSGA-II, LA+NSGA-II and ALNS+NSGA-II, are then designed to solve OSWVID. Considering the heuristic knowledge summarized in our previous research, several operators are designed for improving these three algorithms respectively. Based on existing instances, we analyze the critical parameters optimization, operators evolution, and efficiency of these three algorithms according to extensive simulation experiments.
abstract_zh: 敏捷对地观测卫星（OSPFAS）的观测调度问题在敏捷对地观测卫星（AEOS）的管理中起着至关重要的作用。主动成像丰富了OSPFAS的扩展，我们将这个新问题称为具有可变图像持续时间的AEOS观测调度问题（OSWVID）。提出了累积图像质量和详细能耗来构建 OSWVID 作为双目标优化模型。然后设计了三种多目标模因算法PD+NSGA-II、LA+NSGA-II和ALNS+NSGA-II来解决OSWVID。考虑到我们之前研究中总结的启发式知识，设计了几种算子分别用于改进这三种算法。基于现有实例，我们通过大量的仿真实验分析了这三种算法的关键参数优化、算子演化和效率。

AI.tldr: 本文针对主动成像敏捷地球观测卫星的观测调度问题，提出三种多目标记忆算法以解决可变图像持续时间的双目标优化模型。
AI.motivation: 敏捷卫星观测调度需考虑图像质量和能耗平衡，而主动成像引入的可变持续时间使问题更复杂，需设计高效优化算法。
AI.method: 构建包含累积图像质量与能耗的双目标模型，设计PD+NSGA-II、LA+NSGA-II和ALNS+NSGA-II三种算法，并结合启发式算子改进性能。
AI.result: 通过仿真实验分析参数优化、算子演化及算法效率，验证三种算法在解决OSWVID问题中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 三种多目标记忆算法能有效处理观测调度问题，不同算子对算法性能有显著影响，为实际应用提供优化方案。

authors_text: Bohan Yang,Bo Lu,Wei Chen,Fangxun Zhong,Yun-Hui Liu
title: Model-Free 3D Shape Control of Deformable Objects Using Novel Features Based on Modal Analysis
title_zh: 使用基于模态分析的新特征对可变形物体进行无模型 3D 形状控制
comment: Accepted by the IEEE Transactions on Robotics. The paper will appear in the IEEE Transactions on Robotics. IEEE copyright
comments: Accepted by the IEEE Transactions on Robotics. The paper will appear in the IEEE Transactions on Robotics. IEEE copyright
abstract: Shape control of deformable objects is a challenging and important robotic problem. This paper proposes a model-free controller using novel 3D global deformation features based on modal analysis. Unlike most existing controllers using geometric features, our controller employs a physically-based deformation feature by decoupling 3D global deformation into low-frequency mode shapes. Although modal analysis is widely adopted in computer vision and simulation, it has not been used in robotic deformation control. We develop a new model-free framework for modal-based deformation control under robot manipulation. Physical interpretation of mode shapes enables us to formulate an analytical deformation Jacobian matrix mapping the robot manipulation onto changes of the modal features. In the Jacobian matrix, unknown geometry and physical properties of the object are treated as low-dimensional modal parameters which can be used to linearly parameterize the closed-loop system. Thus, an adaptive controller with proven stability can be designed to deform the object while online estimating the modal parameters. Simulations and experiments are conducted using linear, planar, and solid objects under different settings. The results not only confirm the superior performance of our controller but also demonstrate its advantages over the baseline method.
summary: Shape control of deformable objects is a challenging and important robotic problem. This paper proposes a model-free controller using novel 3D global deformation features based on modal analysis. Unlike most existing controllers using geometric features, our controller employs a physically-based deformation feature by decoupling 3D global deformation into low-frequency mode shapes. Although modal analysis is widely adopted in computer vision and simulation, it has not been used in robotic deformation control. We develop a new model-free framework for modal-based deformation control under robot manipulation. Physical interpretation of mode shapes enables us to formulate an analytical deformation Jacobian matrix mapping the robot manipulation onto changes of the modal features. In the Jacobian matrix, unknown geometry and physical properties of the object are treated as low-dimensional modal parameters which can be used to linearly parameterize the closed-loop system. Thus, an adaptive controller with proven stability can be designed to deform the object while online estimating the modal parameters. Simulations and experiments are conducted using linear, planar, and solid objects under different settings. The results not only confirm the superior performance of our controller but also demonstrate its advantages over the baseline method.
abstract_zh: 可变形物体的形状控制是一个具有挑战性且重要的机器人问题。本文提出了一种使用基于模态分析的新型 3D 全局变形特征的无模型控制器。与大多数使用几何特征的现有控制器不同，我们的控制器通过将 3D 全局变形解耦为低频模式形状来采用基于物理的变形特征。尽管模态分析在计算机视觉和仿真中被广泛采用，但尚未用于机器人变形控制。我们开发了一种新的无模型框架，用于机器人操纵下基于模态的变形控制。模态振型的物理解释使我们能够制定分析变形雅可比矩阵，将机器人操作映射到模态特征的变化。在雅可比矩阵中，物体的未知几何形状和物理属性被视为低维模态参数，可用于线性参数化闭环系统。因此，可以设计具有经过验证的稳定性的自适应控制器来使物体变形，同时在线估计模态参数。使用不同设置下的线性、平面和实体对象进行模拟和实验。结果不仅证实了我们的控制器的优越性能，而且还证明了它相对于基线方法的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模态分析的新型3D全局变形特征的模型自由控制器，用于可变形物体的形状控制。
AI.motivation: 现有控制器多依赖几何特征，难以处理复杂变形。模态分析虽在计算机视觉和仿真中广泛应用，但尚未用于机器人变形控制，需探索物理意义的模态特征以提升控制性能。
AI.method: 通过模态分析将3D变形分解为低频模态形状，构建物理意义的变形雅可比矩阵，将未知几何和物理属性参数化为低维模态参数，设计自适应控制器并在线估计模态参数。
AI.result: 仿真和实验验证了控制器在不同物体（线性、平面、实体）下的优越性能，优于基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过模态特征实现了对可变形物体的高效控制，证明了模型自由框架在变形控制中的有效性。

search_text: Model-Free 3D Shape Control of Deformable Objects Using Novel Features Based on Modal Analysis 使用基于模态分析的新特征对可变形物体进行无模型 3D 形状控制 Shape control of deformable objects is a challenging and important robotic problem. This paper proposes a model-free controller using novel 3D global deformation features based on modal analysis. Unlike most existing controllers using geometric features, our controller employs a physically-based deformation feature by decoupling 3D global deformation into low-frequency mode shapes. Although modal analysis is widely adopted in computer vision and simulation, it has not been used in robotic deformation control. We develop a new model-free framework for modal-based deformation control under robot manipulation. Physical interpretation of mode shapes enables us to formulate an analytical deformation Jacobian matrix mapping the robot manipulation onto changes of the modal features. In the Jacobian matrix, unknown geometry and physical properties of the object are treated as low-dimensional modal parameters which can be used to linearly parameterize the closed-loop system. Thus, an adaptive controller with proven stability can be designed to deform the object while online estimating the modal parameters. Simulations and experiments are conducted using linear, planar, and solid objects under different settings. The results not only confirm the superior performance of our controller but also demonstrate its advantages over the baseline method. 可变形物体的形状控制是一个具有挑战性且重要的机器人问题。本文提出了一种使用基于模态分析的新型 3D 全局变形特征的无模型控制器。与大多数使用几何特征的现有控制器不同，我们的控制器通过将 3D 全局变形解耦为低频模式形状来采用基于物理的变形特征。尽管模态分析在计算机视觉和仿真中被广泛采用，但尚未用于机器人变形控制。我们开发了一种新的无模型框架，用于机器人操纵下基于模态的变形控制。模态振型的物理解释使我们能够制定分析变形雅可比矩阵，将机器人操作映射到模态特征的变化。在雅可比矩阵中，物体的未知几何形状和物理属性被视为低维模态参数，可用于线性参数化闭环系统。因此，可以设计具有经过验证的稳定性的自适应控制器来使物体变形，同时在线估计模态参数。使用不同设置下的线性、平面和实体对象进行模拟和实验。结果不仅证实了我们的控制器的优越性能，而且还证明了它相对于基线方法的优势。 本文提出一种基于模态分析的新型3D全局变形特征的模型自由控制器，用于可变形物体的形状控制。 Bohan Yang,Bo Lu,Wei Chen,Fangxun Zhong,Yun-Hui Liu cs.RO

authors_text: Ye Liu,Lingfeng Qiao,Di Yin,Zhuoxuan Jiang,Xinghua Jiang,Deqiang Jiang,Bo Ren
title: OS-MSL: One Stage Multimodal Sequential Link Framework for Scene Segmentation and Classification
title_zh: OS-MSL：用于场景分割和分类的一级多模态顺序链接框架
abstract: Scene segmentation and classification (SSC) serve as a critical step towards the field of video structuring analysis. Intuitively, jointly learning of these two tasks can promote each other by sharing common information. However, scene segmentation concerns more on the local difference between adjacent shots while classification needs the global representation of scene segments, which probably leads to the model dominated by one of the two tasks in the training phase. In this paper, from an alternate perspective to overcome the above challenges, we unite these two tasks into one task by a new form of predicting shots link: a link connects two adjacent shots, indicating that they belong to the same scene or category. To the end, we propose a general One Stage Multimodal Sequential Link Framework (OS-MSL) to both distinguish and leverage the two-fold semantics by reforming the two learning tasks into a unified one. Furthermore, we tailor a specific module called DiffCorrNet to explicitly extract the information of differences and correlations among shots. Extensive experiments on a brand-new large scale dataset collected from real-world applications, and MovieScenes are conducted. Both the results demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method against strong baselines.
summary: Scene segmentation and classification (SSC) serve as a critical step towards the field of video structuring analysis. Intuitively, jointly learning of these two tasks can promote each other by sharing common information. However, scene segmentation concerns more on the local difference between adjacent shots while classification needs the global representation of scene segments, which probably leads to the model dominated by one of the two tasks in the training phase. In this paper, from an alternate perspective to overcome the above challenges, we unite these two tasks into one task by a new form of predicting shots link: a link connects two adjacent shots, indicating that they belong to the same scene or category. To the end, we propose a general One Stage Multimodal Sequential Link Framework (OS-MSL) to both distinguish and leverage the two-fold semantics by reforming the two learning tasks into a unified one. Furthermore, we tailor a specific module called DiffCorrNet to explicitly extract the information of differences and correlations among shots. Extensive experiments on a brand-new large scale dataset collected from real-world applications, and MovieScenes are conducted. Both the results demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed method against strong baselines.
abstract_zh: 场景分割和分类（SSC）是迈向视频结构化分析领域的关键一步。直观上，这两个任务的联合学习可以通过共享共同信息来相互促进。然而，场景分割更多地关注相邻镜头之间的局部差异，而分类需要场景片段的全局表示，这可能导致模型在训练阶段由两个任务之一主导。在本文中，从另一个角度克服上述挑战，我们通过一种新形式的预测镜头链接将这两个任务合并为一个任务：链接连接两个相邻的镜头，表明它们属于同一场景或类别。最后，我们提出了一种通用的单阶段多模态顺序链接框架（OS-MSL），通过将两个学习任务重组为一个统一的任务来区分和利用双重语义。此外，我们定制了一个名为 DiffCorrNet 的特定模块来显式提取镜头之间的差异和相关性信息。对从现实世界应用程序收集的全新大规模数据集和电影场景进行了广泛的实验。这两个结果都证明了我们提出的方法在强基线上的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为OS-MSL的一阶段多模态序列链接框架，用于场景分割与分类任务，通过统一预测相邻镜头链接来联合学习两个任务。
AI.motivation: 场景分割关注相邻镜头的局部差异，而分类需要场景片段的全局表征，传统方法易导致模型被单一任务主导，难以兼顾两者。
AI.method: 设计OS-MSL框架将分割与分类统一为链接预测任务，并引入DiffCorrNet模块显式提取镜头间差异与相关性信息。
AI.result: 在自建大规模真实场景数据集和MovieScenes数据集上的实验表明，OS-MSL在多个指标上优于现有强基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合学习和DiffCorrNet模块的设计，OS-MSL有效解决了场景分割与分类任务的冲突，实现了性能提升。

authors_text: Zhongxiang Chang,Yuning Chen,Zhongbao Zhou
title: Satellite downlink scheduling under breakpoint resume mode
title_zh: 断点续传模式下的卫星下行调度
abstract: A novel problem called satellite downlink scheduling problem (SDSP) under breakpoint resume mode (SDSP-BRM) is studied in our paper. Compared to the traditional SDSP where an imaging data has to be completely downloaded at one time, SDSP-BRM allows the data of an imaging data be broken into a number of pieces which can be downloaded in different playback windows. By analyzing the characteristics of SDSP-BRM, we first propose a mixed integer programming model for its formulation and then prove the NP-hardness of SDSP-BRM. To solve the problem, we design a simple and effective heuristic algorithm (SEHA) where a number of problem-tailored move operators are proposed for local searching. Numerical results on a set of well-designed scenarios demonstrate the efficiency of the proposed algorithm in comparison to the general purpose CPLEX solver. We conduct additional experiments to shed light on the impact of the segmental strategy on the overall performance of the proposed SEHA.
summary: A novel problem called satellite downlink scheduling problem (SDSP) under breakpoint resume mode (SDSP-BRM) is studied in our paper. Compared to the traditional SDSP where an imaging data has to be completely downloaded at one time, SDSP-BRM allows the data of an imaging data be broken into a number of pieces which can be downloaded in different playback windows. By analyzing the characteristics of SDSP-BRM, we first propose a mixed integer programming model for its formulation and then prove the NP-hardness of SDSP-BRM. To solve the problem, we design a simple and effective heuristic algorithm (SEHA) where a number of problem-tailored move operators are proposed for local searching. Numerical results on a set of well-designed scenarios demonstrate the efficiency of the proposed algorithm in comparison to the general purpose CPLEX solver. We conduct additional experiments to shed light on the impact of the segmental strategy on the overall performance of the proposed SEHA.
abstract_zh: 本文研究了断点恢复模式下卫星下行链路调度问题（SDSP-BRM）的新问题。与传统SDSP必须一次完整下载影像数据相比，SDSP-BRM允许将影像数据分成多个片段，可以在不同的播放窗口中下载。通过分析SDSP-BRM的特点，我们首先提出了混合整数规划模型，并证明了SDSP-BRM的NP困难性。为了解决这个问题，我们设计了一种简单有效的启发式算法（SEHA），其中提出了许多针对问题定制的移动算子用于局部搜索。一组精心设计的场景的数值结果证明了所提出的算法与通用 CPLEX 求解器相比的效率。我们进行了额外的实验，以阐明分段策略对拟议 SEHA 整体性能的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了卫星下行链路调度问题在断点续传模式下的新模型SDSP-BRM，提出混合整数规划模型并设计启发式算法SEHA以解决该问题。
AI.motivation: 传统卫星下行调度需一次性传输完整数据，存在效率瓶颈。SDSP-BRM允许分段传输，能提升资源利用率和任务灵活性，但其复杂性尚未被充分研究。
AI.method: 建立SDSP-BRM的混合整数规划模型并证明其NP难性；设计定制化启发式算法SEHA，包含多类局部搜索移动算子以优化调度方案。
AI.result: 数值实验表明SEHA在多个场景下优于CPLEX求解器，且分段策略显著提升算法性能，验证了模型与方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: SDSP-BRM模型为卫星调度提供更灵活的解决方案，SEHA算法通过分段策略优化实现了高效求解，为相关领域研究提供新思路。

search_text: Satellite downlink scheduling under breakpoint resume mode 断点续传模式下的卫星下行调度 A novel problem called satellite downlink scheduling problem (SDSP) under breakpoint resume mode (SDSP-BRM) is studied in our paper. Compared to the traditional SDSP where an imaging data has to be completely downloaded at one time, SDSP-BRM allows the data of an imaging data be broken into a number of pieces which can be downloaded in different playback windows. By analyzing the characteristics of SDSP-BRM, we first propose a mixed integer programming model for its formulation and then prove the NP-hardness of SDSP-BRM. To solve the problem, we design a simple and effective heuristic algorithm (SEHA) where a number of problem-tailored move operators are proposed for local searching. Numerical results on a set of well-designed scenarios demonstrate the efficiency of the proposed algorithm in comparison to the general purpose CPLEX solver. We conduct additional experiments to shed light on the impact of the segmental strategy on the overall performance of the proposed SEHA. 本文研究了断点恢复模式下卫星下行链路调度问题（SDSP-BRM）的新问题。与传统SDSP必须一次完整下载影像数据相比，SDSP-BRM允许将影像数据分成多个片段，可以在不同的播放窗口中下载。通过分析SDSP-BRM的特点，我们首先提出了混合整数规划模型，并证明了SDSP-BRM的NP困难性。为了解决这个问题，我们设计了一种简单有效的启发式算法（SEHA），其中提出了许多针对问题定制的移动算子用于局部搜索。一组精心设计的场景的数值结果证明了所提出的算法与通用 CPLEX 求解器相比的效率。我们进行了额外的实验，以阐明分段策略对拟议 SEHA 整体性能的影响。 本文研究了卫星下行链路调度问题在断点续传模式下的新模型SDSP-BRM，提出混合整数规划模型并设计启发式算法SEHA以解决该问题。 Zhongxiang Chang,Yuning Chen,Zhongbao Zhou cs.AI

authors_text: Vishnu Raj,Tianyu Cui,Markus Heinonen,Pekka Marttinen
title: Incorporating functional summary information in Bayesian neural networks using a Dirichlet process likelihood approach
title_zh: 使用狄利克雷过程似然方法将功能摘要信息纳入贝叶斯神经网络
abstract: Bayesian neural networks (BNNs) can account for both aleatoric and epistemic uncertainty. However, in BNNs the priors are often specified over the weights which rarely reflects true prior knowledge in large and complex neural network architectures. We present a simple approach to incorporate prior knowledge in BNNs based on external summary information about the predicted classification probabilities for a given dataset. The available summary information is incorporated as augmented data and modeled with a Dirichlet process, and we derive the corresponding \emph{Summary Evidence Lower BOund}. The approach is founded on Bayesian principles, and all hyperparameters have a proper probabilistic interpretation. We show how the method can inform the model about task difficulty and class imbalance. Extensive experiments show that, with negligible computational overhead, our method parallels and in many cases outperforms popular alternatives in accuracy, uncertainty calibration, and robustness against corruptions with both balanced and imbalanced data.
summary: Bayesian neural networks (BNNs) can account for both aleatoric and epistemic uncertainty. However, in BNNs the priors are often specified over the weights which rarely reflects true prior knowledge in large and complex neural network architectures. We present a simple approach to incorporate prior knowledge in BNNs based on external summary information about the predicted classification probabilities for a given dataset. The available summary information is incorporated as augmented data and modeled with a Dirichlet process, and we derive the corresponding \emph{Summary Evidence Lower BOund}. The approach is founded on Bayesian principles, and all hyperparameters have a proper probabilistic interpretation. We show how the method can inform the model about task difficulty and class imbalance. Extensive experiments show that, with negligible computational overhead, our method parallels and in many cases outperforms popular alternatives in accuracy, uncertainty calibration, and robustness against corruptions with both balanced and imbalanced data.
abstract_zh: 贝叶斯神经网络 (BNN) 可以解释任意不确定性和认知不确定性。然而，在 BNN 中，先验通常是在权重上指定的，这很少反映大型复杂神经网络架构中真实的先验知识。我们提出了一种简单的方法，根据有关给定数据集的预测分类概率的外部摘要信息，将先验知识纳入 BNN 中。可用的摘要信息被合并为增强数据并使用狄利克雷过程进行建模，并且我们得出相应的\emph{摘要证据下界}。该方法基于贝叶斯原理，所有超参数都有适当的概率解释。我们展示了该方法如何告知模型有关任务难度和类别不平衡的信息。大量的实验表明，在计算开销可以忽略不计的情况下，我们的方法在准确性、不确定性校准以及平衡和不平衡数据的损坏鲁棒性方面与流行的替代方法相当，并且在许多情况下优于流行的替代方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Dirichlet过程似然方法，将外部功能摘要信息整合到贝叶斯神经网络中，以提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 传统贝叶斯神经网络的权重先验难以反映复杂架构的真实先验知识，且未充分利用外部分类概率摘要信息。
AI.method: 将外部摘要信息作为增强数据，通过Dirichlet过程建模，并推导出对应的Summary Evidence Lower Bound，基于贝叶斯原理进行参数估计。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在准确率、不确定性校准和对抗数据扰动的鲁棒性上优于现有方法，且计算开销极小。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效结合外部先验信息，为贝叶斯神经网络提供了更灵活的先验建模方式，尤其适用于不平衡数据场景。

authors_text: Canran Li,Dongnan Liu,Haoran Li,Zheng Zhang,Guangming Lu,Xiaojun Chang,Weidong Cai
title: Domain Adaptive Nuclei Instance Segmentation and Classification via Category-aware Feature Alignment and Pseudo-labelling
title_zh: 通过类别感知特征对齐和伪标签进行域自适应核实例分割和分类
abstract: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) methods have been broadly utilized to improve the models' adaptation ability in general computer vision. However, different from the natural images, there exist huge semantic gaps for the nuclei from different categories in histopathology images. It is still under-explored how could we build generalized UDA models for precise segmentation or classification of nuclei instances across different datasets. In this work, we propose a novel deep neural network, namely Category-Aware feature alignment and Pseudo-Labelling Network (CAPL-Net) for UDA nuclei instance segmentation and classification. Specifically, we first propose a category-level feature alignment module with dynamic learnable trade-off weights. Second, we propose to facilitate the model performance on the target data via self-supervised training with pseudo labels based on nuclei-level prototype features. Comprehensive experiments on cross-domain nuclei instance segmentation and classification tasks demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art UDA methods with a remarkable margin.
summary: Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) methods have been broadly utilized to improve the models' adaptation ability in general computer vision. However, different from the natural images, there exist huge semantic gaps for the nuclei from different categories in histopathology images. It is still under-explored how could we build generalized UDA models for precise segmentation or classification of nuclei instances across different datasets. In this work, we propose a novel deep neural network, namely Category-Aware feature alignment and Pseudo-Labelling Network (CAPL-Net) for UDA nuclei instance segmentation and classification. Specifically, we first propose a category-level feature alignment module with dynamic learnable trade-off weights. Second, we propose to facilitate the model performance on the target data via self-supervised training with pseudo labels based on nuclei-level prototype features. Comprehensive experiments on cross-domain nuclei instance segmentation and classification tasks demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art UDA methods with a remarkable margin.
abstract_zh: 无监督域适应（UDA）方法已被广泛用于提高通用计算机视觉中模型的适应能力。然而，与自然图像不同，组织病理学图像中不同类别的细胞核存在巨大的语义差距。我们仍然在探索如何构建通用 UDA 模型来精确分割或分类不同数据集的核实例。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的深度神经网络，即类别感知特征对齐和伪标签网络（CAPL-Net），用于 UDA 核实例分割和分类。具体来说，我们首先提出了一个具有动态可学习权衡权重的类别级特征对齐模块。其次，我们建议通过基于核级原型特征的伪标签的自监督训练来促进目标数据上的模型性能。对跨域核实例分割和分类任务的综合实验表明，我们的方法明显优于最先进的 UDA 方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CAPL-Net的深度神经网络，用于跨域核实例分割与分类的无监督域适应（UDA）任务。
AI.motivation: 现有UDA方法在处理病理图像中不同类别核之间的巨大语义差距时效果不佳，亟需构建能精确适应跨数据集核分割与分类的通用UDA模型。
AI.method: 设计了动态可学习权重的类别级特征对齐模块，并通过基于核级原型特征的伪标签自监督训练提升目标域模型性能。
AI.result: 在跨域核分割与分类任务的综合实验中，该方法显著优于现有最先进UDA方法。
AI.conclusion: CAPL-Net通过类别感知特征对齐与伪标签机制有效解决了跨域核实例任务的域适应难题。

authors_text: K. Ram Prabhakar,Susmit Agrawal,R. Venkatesh Babu
title: Segmentation Guided Deep HDR Deghosting
title_zh: 分段引导深度 HDR 去重影
abstract: We present a motion segmentation guided convolutional neural network (CNN) approach for high dynamic range (HDR) image deghosting. First, we segment the moving regions in the input sequence using a CNN. Then, we merge static and moving regions separately with different fusion networks and combine fused features to generate the final ghost-free HDR image. Our motion segmentation guided HDR fusion approach offers significant advantages over existing HDR deghosting methods. First, by segmenting the input sequence into static and moving regions, our proposed approach learns effective fusion rules for various challenging saturation and motion types. Second, we introduce a novel memory network that accumulates the necessary features required to generate plausible details in the saturated regions. The proposed method outperforms nine existing state-of-the-art methods on two publicly available datasets and generates visually pleasing ghost-free HDR results. We also present a large-scale motion segmentation dataset of 3683 varying exposure images to benefit the research community.
summary: We present a motion segmentation guided convolutional neural network (CNN) approach for high dynamic range (HDR) image deghosting. First, we segment the moving regions in the input sequence using a CNN. Then, we merge static and moving regions separately with different fusion networks and combine fused features to generate the final ghost-free HDR image. Our motion segmentation guided HDR fusion approach offers significant advantages over existing HDR deghosting methods. First, by segmenting the input sequence into static and moving regions, our proposed approach learns effective fusion rules for various challenging saturation and motion types. Second, we introduce a novel memory network that accumulates the necessary features required to generate plausible details in the saturated regions. The proposed method outperforms nine existing state-of-the-art methods on two publicly available datasets and generates visually pleasing ghost-free HDR results. We also present a large-scale motion segmentation dataset of 3683 varying exposure images to benefit the research community.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种运动分割引导的卷积神经网络（CNN）方法，用于高动态范围（HDR）图像去鬼影。首先，我们使用 CNN 分割输入序列中的移动区域。然后，我们使用不同的融合网络分别合并静态和移动区域，并结合融合特征来生成最终的无重影 HDR 图像。我们的运动分割引导 HDR 融合方法比现有的 HDR 去鬼影方法具有显着的优势。首先，通过将输入序列分割为静态和移动区域，我们提出的方法学习针对各种具有挑战性的饱和度和运动类型的有效融合规则。其次，我们引入了一种新颖的记忆网络，它积累了在饱和区域中生成合理细节所需的必要特征。所提出的方法在两个公开可用的数据集上优于九种现有的最先进方法，并生成视觉上令人愉悦的无重影 HDR 结果。我们还提供了包含 3683 个不同曝光图像的大规模运动分割数据集，以使研究社区受益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于运动分割引导的卷积神经网络方法，用于高动态范围（HDR）图像去鬼影。
AI.motivation: 现有HDR去鬼影方法在处理复杂运动和饱和区域时效果有限，需更有效的融合规则和特征学习机制。
AI.method: 首先使用CNN分割输入序列的运动区域，再通过不同融合网络分别处理静态和运动区域，结合特征生成最终图像，并引入记忆网络积累饱和区域细节特征。
AI.result: 在两个公开数据集上优于九种现有方法，生成视觉效果更佳的无鬼影HDR图像，并发布包含3683张多曝光图像的运动分割数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过运动分割与记忆网络有效处理复杂场景，为HDR去鬼影研究提供新思路和数据支持。

search_text: Segmentation Guided Deep HDR Deghosting 分段引导深度 HDR 去重影 We present a motion segmentation guided convolutional neural network (CNN) approach for high dynamic range (HDR) image deghosting. First, we segment the moving regions in the input sequence using a CNN. Then, we merge static and moving regions separately with different fusion networks and combine fused features to generate the final ghost-free HDR image. Our motion segmentation guided HDR fusion approach offers significant advantages over existing HDR deghosting methods. First, by segmenting the input sequence into static and moving regions, our proposed approach learns effective fusion rules for various challenging saturation and motion types. Second, we introduce a novel memory network that accumulates the necessary features required to generate plausible details in the saturated regions. The proposed method outperforms nine existing state-of-the-art methods on two publicly available datasets and generates visually pleasing ghost-free HDR results. We also present a large-scale motion segmentation dataset of 3683 varying exposure images to benefit the research community. 我们提出了一种运动分割引导的卷积神经网络（CNN）方法，用于高动态范围（HDR）图像去鬼影。首先，我们使用 CNN 分割输入序列中的移动区域。然后，我们使用不同的融合网络分别合并静态和移动区域，并结合融合特征来生成最终的无重影 HDR 图像。我们的运动分割引导 HDR 融合方法比现有的 HDR 去鬼影方法具有显着的优势。首先，通过将输入序列分割为静态和移动区域，我们提出的方法学习针对各种具有挑战性的饱和度和运动类型的有效融合规则。其次，我们引入了一种新颖的记忆网络，它积累了在饱和区域中生成合理细节所需的必要特征。所提出的方法在两个公开可用的数据集上优于九种现有的最先进方法，并生成视觉上令人愉悦的无重影 HDR 结果。我们还提供了包含 3683 个不同曝光图像的大规模运动分割数据集，以使研究社区受益。 本文提出一种基于运动分割引导的卷积神经网络方法，用于高动态范围（HDR）图像去鬼影。 K. authors_text: Wei Shen,Zelin Peng,Xuehui Wang,Huayu Wang,Jiazhong Cen,Dongsheng Jiang,Lingxi Xie,Xiaokang Yang,Qi Tian
title: A Survey on Label-efficient Deep Image Segmentation: Bridging the Gap between Weak Supervision and Dense Prediction
title_zh: 关于标签高效深度图像分割的调查：弥合弱监督和密集预测之间的差距
abstract: The rapid development of deep learning has made a great progress in image segmentation, one of the fundamental tasks of computer vision. However, the current segmentation algorithms mostly rely on the availability of pixel-level annotations, which are often expensive, tedious, and laborious. To alleviate this burden, the past years have witnessed an increasing attention in building label-efficient, deep-learning-based image segmentation algorithms. This paper offers a comprehensive review on label-efficient image segmentation methods. To this end, we first develop a taxonomy to organize these methods according to the supervision provided by different types of weak labels (including no supervision, inexact supervision, incomplete supervision and inaccurate supervision) and supplemented by the types of segmentation problems (including semantic segmentation, instance segmentation and panoptic segmentation). Next, we summarize the existing label-efficient image segmentation methods from a unified perspective that discusses an important question: how to bridge the gap between weak supervision and dense prediction -- the current methods are mostly based on heuristic priors, such as cross-pixel similarity, cross-label constraint, cross-view consistency, and cross-image relation. Finally, we share our opinions about the future research directions for label-efficient deep image segmentation.
summary: The rapid development of deep learning has made a great progress in image segmentation, one of the fundamental tasks of computer vision. However, the current segmentation algorithms mostly rely on the availability of pixel-level annotations, which are often expensive, tedious, and laborious. To alleviate this burden, the past years have witnessed an increasing attention in building label-efficient, deep-learning-based image segmentation algorithms. This paper offers a comprehensive review on label-efficient image segmentation methods. To this end, we first develop a taxonomy to organize these methods according to the supervision provided by different types of weak labels (including no supervision, inexact supervision, incomplete supervision and inaccurate supervision) and supplemented by the types of segmentation problems (including semantic segmentation, instance segmentation and panoptic segmentation). Next, we summarize the existing label-efficient image segmentation methods from a unified perspective that discusses an important question: how to bridge the gap between weak supervision and dense prediction -- the current methods are mostly based on heuristic priors, such as cross-pixel similarity, cross-label constraint, cross-view consistency, and cross-image relation. Finally, we share our opinions about the future research directions for label-efficient deep image segmentation.
abstract_zh: 深度学习的快速发展使得图像分割（计算机视觉的基本任务之一）取得了长足的进步。然而，当前的分割算法主要依赖于像素级注释的可用性，这通常是昂贵、乏味且费力的。为了减轻这一负担，过去几年人们越来越关注构建标签高效、基于深度学习的图像分割算法。本文对标签有效的图像分割方法进行了全面的回顾。为此，我们首先开发一个分类法，根据不同类型的弱标签提供的监督（包括无监督、不精确监督、不完全监督和不准确监督）来组织这些方法，并辅以分割问题的类型（包括语义分割、实例分割和全景分割）。接下来，我们从统一的角度总结了现有的标签高效图像分割方法，讨论了一个重要问题：如何弥合弱监督和密集预测之间的差距——当前的方法大多基于启发式先验，例如跨像素相似性、跨标签约束、跨视图一致性和跨图像关系。最后，我们分享了对标签高效深度图像分割的未来研究方向的看法。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了标签高效深度图像分割方法，旨在减少对像素级标注的依赖。
AI.motivation: 传统图像分割算法依赖昂贵的像素级标注，而标签高效方法可缓解这一问题。
AI.method: 通过弱标注类型（无监督、不精确监督等）和分割问题类型（语义分割等）构建分类体系，并总结现有方法如何弥合弱监督与密集预测的差距。
AI.result: 系统梳理了标签高效分割方法，分析了基于跨像素相似性、跨视图一致性等启发式先验的技术路径。
AI.conclusion: 未来需探索更有效的弱监督学习策略以提升分割性能。

authors_text: Oshri Naparstek,Ophir Azulai,Daniel Rotman,Yevgeny Burshtein,Peter Staar,Udi Barzelay
title: BusiNet -- a Light and Fast Text Detection Network for Business Documents
title_zh: BusiNet——用于商业文档的轻量且快速的文本检测网络
abstract: For digitizing or indexing physical documents, Optical Character Recognition (OCR), the process of extracting textual information from scanned documents, is a vital technology. When a document is visually damaged or contains non-textual elements, existing technologies can yield poor results, as erroneous detection results can greatly affect the quality of OCR. In this paper we present a detection network dubbed BusiNet aimed at OCR of business documents. Business documents often include sensitive information and as such they cannot be uploaded to a cloud service for OCR. BusiNet was designed to be fast and light so it could run locally preventing privacy issues. Furthermore, BusiNet is built to handle scanned document corruption and noise using a specialized synthetic dataset. The model is made robust to unseen noise by employing adversarial training strategies. We perform an evaluation on publicly available datasets demonstrating the usefulness and broad applicability of our model.
summary: For digitizing or indexing physical documents, Optical Character Recognition (OCR), the process of extracting textual information from scanned documents, is a vital technology. When a document is visually damaged or contains non-textual elements, existing technologies can yield poor results, as erroneous detection results can greatly affect the quality of OCR. In this paper we present a detection network dubbed BusiNet aimed at OCR of business documents. Business documents often include sensitive information and as such they cannot be uploaded to a cloud service for OCR. BusiNet was designed to be fast and light so it could run locally preventing privacy issues. Furthermore, BusiNet is built to handle scanned document corruption and noise using a specialized synthetic dataset. The model is made robust to unseen noise by employing adversarial training strategies. We perform an evaluation on publicly available datasets demonstrating the usefulness and broad applicability of our model.
abstract_zh: 对于物理文档的数字化或索引，光学字符识别 (OCR)（从扫描文档中提取文本信息的过程）是一项至关重要的技术。当文档出现视觉损坏或包含非文本元素时，现有技术可能会产生较差的结果，因为错误的检测结果会极大地影响 OCR 的质量。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 BusiNet 的检测网络，旨在对商业文档进行 OCR。商业文档通常包含敏感信息，因此无法上传到云服务进行 OCR。 BusiNet 的设计速度快、重量轻，因此可以在本地运行，防止隐私问题。此外，BusiNet 旨在使用专门的合成数据集来处理扫描文档损坏和噪音。通过采用对抗性训练策略，该模型对看不见的噪声具有鲁棒性。我们对公开可用的数据集进行评估，证明我们的模型的有用性和广泛的适用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BusiNet，一种用于商业文档的轻量快速文本检测网络，以解决现有OCR技术在处理损坏文档和隐私问题上的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有OCR技术在处理视觉损坏或含非文本元素的文档时效果差，且商业文档因包含敏感信息需本地处理以避免隐私泄露。
AI.method: 设计轻量级网络结构支持本地运行，结合合成数据集与对抗训练策略增强模型对噪声和损坏文档的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在公开数据集上验证了BusiNet的有效性，证明其在保持高速度的同时具备广泛适用性。
AI.conclusion: BusiNet为商业文档OCR提供了隐私保护与抗干扰能力兼备的解决方案，适用于敏感场景的本地化处理需求。

tldr: 本文提出BusiNet，一种用于商业文档的轻量快速文本检测网络，以解决现有OCR技术在处理损坏文档和隐私问题上的不足。
motivation: 现有OCR技术在处理视觉损坏或含非文本元素的文档时效果差，且商业文档因包含敏感信息需本地处理以避免隐私泄露。
method: 设计轻量级网络结构支持本地运行，结合合成数据集与对抗训练策略增强模型对噪声和损坏文档的鲁棒性。
result: 在公开数据集上验证了BusiNet的有效性，证明其在保持高速度的同时具备广泛适用性。
conclusion: BusiNet为商业文档OCR提供了隐私保护与抗干扰能力兼备的解决方案，适用于敏感场景的本地化处理需求。
search_text: BusiNet -- a Light and Fast Text Detection Network for Business Documents BusiNet——用于商业文档的轻量且快速的文本检测网络 For digitizing or indexing physical documents, Optical Character Recognition (OCR), the process of extracting textual information from scanned documents, is a vital technology. When a document is visually damaged or contains non-textual elements, existing technologies can yield poor results, as erroneous detection results can greatly affect the quality of OCR. In this paper we present a detection network dubbed BusiNet aimed at OCR of business documents. Business documents often include sensitive information and as such they cannot be uploaded to a cloud service for OCR. BusiNet was designed to be fast and light so it could run locally preventing privacy issues. Furthermore, BusiNet is built to handle scanned document corruption and noise using a specialized synthetic dataset. The model is made robust to unseen noise by employing adversarial training strategies. We perform an evaluation on publicly available datasets demonstrating the usefulness and broad applicability of our model. 对于物理文档的数字化或索引，光学字符识别 (OCR)（从扫描文档中提取文本信息的过程）是一项至关重要的技术。当文档出现视觉损坏或包含非文本元素时，现有技术可能会产生较差的结果，因为错误的检测结果会极大地影响 OCR 的质量。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 BusiNet 的检测网络，旨在对商业文档进行 OCR。商业文档通常包含敏感信息，因此无法上传到云服务进行 OCR。 BusiNet 的设计速度快、重量轻，因此可以在本地运行，防止隐私问题。此外，BusiNet 旨在使用专门的合成数据集来处理扫描文档损坏和噪音。通过采用对抗性训练策略，该模型对看不见的噪声具有鲁棒性。我们对公开可用的数据集进行评估，证明我们的模型的有用性和广泛的适用性。 本文提出BusiNet，一种用于商业文档的轻量快速文本检测网络，以解决现有OCR技术在处理损坏文档和隐私问题上的不足。 Oshri Naparstek,Ophir Azulai,Daniel Rotman,Yevgeny Burshtein,Peter Staar,Udi Barzelay cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Haoren Guo,Haiyue Zhu,Jiahui Wang,Vadakkepat Prahlad,Weng Khuen Ho,Tong Heng Lee
title: Masked Self-Supervision for Remaining Useful Lifetime Prediction in Machine Tools
title_zh: 用于机床剩余使用寿命预测的隐蔽自我监督
abstract: Prediction of Remaining Useful Lifetime(RUL) in the modern manufacturing and automation workplace for machines and tools is essential in Industry 4.0. This is clearly evident as continuous tool wear, or worse, sudden machine breakdown will lead to various manufacturing failures which would clearly cause economic loss. With the availability of deep learning approaches, the great potential and prospect of utilizing these for RUL prediction have resulted in several models which are designed driven by operation data of manufacturing machines. Current efforts in these which are based on fully-supervised models heavily rely on the data labeled with their RULs. However, the required RUL prediction data (i.e. the annotated and labeled data from faulty and/or degraded machines) can only be obtained after the machine breakdown occurs. The scarcity of broken machines in the modern manufacturing and automation workplace in real-world situations increases the difficulty of getting sufficient annotated and labeled data. In contrast, the data from healthy machines is much easier to be collected. Noting this challenge and the potential for improved effectiveness and applicability, we thus propose (and also fully develop) a method based on the idea of masked autoencoders which will utilize unlabeled data to do self-supervision. In thus the work here, a noteworthy masked self-supervised learning approach is developed and utilized. This is designed to seek to build a deep learning model for RUL prediction by utilizing unlabeled data. The experiments to verify the effectiveness of this development are implemented on the C-MAPSS datasets (which are collected from the data from the NASA turbofan engine). The results rather clearly show that our development and approach here perform better, in both accuracy and effectiveness, for RUL prediction when compared with approaches utilizing a fully-supervised model.
summary: Prediction of Remaining Useful Lifetime(RUL) in the modern manufacturing and automation workplace for machines and tools is essential in Industry 4.0. This is clearly evident as continuous tool wear, or worse, sudden machine breakdown will lead to various manufacturing failures which would clearly cause economic loss. With the availability of deep learning approaches, the great potential and prospect of utilizing these for RUL prediction have resulted in several models which are designed driven by operation data of manufacturing machines. Current efforts in these which are based on fully-supervised models heavily rely on the data labeled with their RULs. However, the required RUL prediction data (i.e. the annotated and labeled data from faulty and/or degraded machines) can only be obtained after the machine breakdown occurs. The scarcity of broken machines in the modern manufacturing and automation workplace in real-world situations increases the difficulty of getting sufficient annotated and labeled data. In contrast, the data from healthy machines is much easier to be collected. Noting this challenge and the potential for improved effectiveness and applicability, we thus propose (and also fully develop) a method based on the idea of masked autoencoders which will utilize unlabeled data to do self-supervision. In thus the work here, a noteworthy masked self-supervised learning approach is developed and utilized. This is designed to seek to build a deep learning model for RUL prediction by utilizing unlabeled data. The experiments to verify the effectiveness of this development are implemented on the C-MAPSS datasets (which are collected from the data from the NASA turbofan engine). The results rather clearly show that our development and approach here perform better, in both accuracy and effectiveness, for RUL prediction when compared with approaches utilizing a fully-supervised model.
abstract_zh: 在工业 4.0 中，预测现代制造和自动化工作场所中机器和工具的剩余使用寿命 (RUL) 至关重要。这是显而易见的，因为持续的工具磨损，或更糟糕的是，突然的机器故障将导致各种制造故障，这显然会造成经济损失。随着深度学习方法的出现，利用这些方法进行 RUL 预测的巨大潜力和前景催生了多种由制造机器的运行数据驱动设计的模型。当前基于完全监督模型的这些工作在很大程度上依赖于标有 RUL 的数据。然而，所需的 RUL 预测数据（即来自故障和/或降级机器的注释和标记数据）只能在机器故障发生后才能获得。在现实世界中，现代制造和自动化工作场所中损坏机器的稀缺增加了获取足够的注释和标签数据的难度。相比之下，来自健康机器的数据更容易收集。注意到这一挑战以及提高有效性和适用性的潜力，我们因此提出（并充分开发）一种基于屏蔽自动编码器思想的方法，该方法将利用未标记的数据进行自我监督。因此，在这里的工作中，开发和利用了一种值得注意的掩蔽自我监督学习方法。其目的是利用未标记的数据构建用于 RUL 预测的深度学习模型。验证这一开发有效性的实验是在 C-MAPSS 数据集（从 NASA 涡扇发动机的数据收集）上进行的。结果相当清楚地表明，与利用完全监督模型的方法相比，我们的开发和方法在 RUL 预测的准确性和有效性方面表现更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于掩码自监督学习的方法，用于预测机床的剩余使用寿命（RUL），以解决传统全监督模型依赖标注数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统RUL预测模型依赖标注的故障数据，但实际中故障数据稀缺且获取困难，而健康机器数据易得，需利用未标注数据提升模型性能。
AI.method: 采用掩码自编码器框架，通过自监督学习利用未标注的健康机器数据训练深度学习模型，无需依赖标注的故障数据。
AI.result: 在NASA C-MAPSS数据集上的实验表明，该方法在RUL预测的准确性和有效性上均优于全监督模型。
AI.conclusion: 掩码自监督学习方法能有效利用未标注数据，提升RUL预测性能，尤其适用于故障数据稀缺的实际工业场景。

authors_text: Jiahui Wang,Haiyue Zhu,Haoren Guo,Abdullah Al Mamun,Vadakkepat Prahlad,Tong Heng Lee
title: CAM/CAD Point Cloud Part Segmentation via Few-Shot Learning
title_zh: 通过少样本学习进行 CAM/CAD 点云零件分割
abstract: 3D part segmentation is an essential step in advanced CAM/CAD workflow. Precise 3D segmentation contributes to lower defective rate of work-pieces produced by the manufacturing equipment (such as computer controlled CNCs), thereby improving work efficiency and attaining the attendant economic benefits. A large class of existing works on 3D model segmentation are mostly based on fully-supervised learning, which trains the AI models with large, annotated datasets. However, the disadvantage is that the resulting models from the fully-supervised learning methodology are highly reliant on the completeness of the available dataset, and its generalization ability is relatively poor to new unknown segmentation types (i.e. further additional novel classes). In this work, we propose and develop a noteworthy few-shot learning-based approach for effective part segmentation in CAM/CAD; and this is designed to significantly enhance its generalization ability and flexibly adapt to new segmentation tasks by using only relatively rather few samples. As a result, it not only reduces the requirements for the usually unattainable and exhaustive completeness of supervision datasets, but also improves the flexibility for real-world applications. As further improvement and innovation, we additionally adopt the transform net and the center loss block in the network. These characteristics serve to improve the comprehension for 3D features of the various possible instances of the whole work-piece and ensure the close distribution of the same class in feature space.
summary: 3D part segmentation is an essential step in advanced CAM/CAD workflow. Precise 3D segmentation contributes to lower defective rate of work-pieces produced by the manufacturing equipment (such as computer controlled CNCs), thereby improving work efficiency and attaining the attendant economic benefits. A large class of existing works on 3D model segmentation are mostly based on fully-supervised learning, which trains the AI models with large, annotated datasets. However, the disadvantage is that the resulting models from the fully-supervised learning methodology are highly reliant on the completeness of the available dataset, and its generalization ability is relatively poor to new unknown segmentation types (i.e. further additional novel classes). In this work, we propose and develop a noteworthy few-shot learning-based approach for effective part segmentation in CAM/CAD; and this is designed to significantly enhance its generalization ability and flexibly adapt to new segmentation tasks by using only relatively rather few samples. As a result, it not only reduces the requirements for the usually unattainable and exhaustive completeness of supervision datasets, but also improves the flexibility for real-world applications. As further improvement and innovation, we additionally adopt the transform net and the center loss block in the network. These characteristics serve to improve the comprehension for 3D features of the various possible instances of the whole work-piece and ensure the close distribution of the same class in feature space.
abstract_zh: 3D 零件分割是高级 CAM/CAD 工作流程中的重要步骤。精确的3D分割有助于降低制造设备（例如计算机控制的CNC）生产的工件的缺陷率，从而提高工作效率并获得随之而来的经济效益。现有的一大批 3D 模型分割工作大多基于完全监督学习，即使用大型带注释数据集来训练 AI 模型。然而，缺点是完全监督学习方法所得到的模型高度依赖于可用数据集的完整性，并且其泛化能力对于新的未知分割类型（即进一步附加的新类别）相对较差。在这项工作中，我们提出并开发了一种值得注意的基于小样本学习的方法，用于 CAM/CAD 中的有效零件分割；这样做的目的是通过仅使用相对较少的样本来显着增强其泛化能力并灵活地适应新的分割任务。因此，它不仅降低了对监督数据集通常难以达到的详尽完整性的要求，而且提高了实际应用的灵活性。作为进一步的改进和创新，我们在网络中额外采用了变换网络和中心损失块。这些特征有助于提高对整个工件的各种可能实例的 3D 特征的理解，并确保同一类在特征空间中的紧密分布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于少样本学习的CAM/CAD点云部件分割方法，解决传统全监督方法依赖大量标注数据且泛化能力差的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统3D部件分割方法依赖大规模标注数据集，难以适应新类别且实际应用中数据获取困难，亟需提升模型泛化能力与灵活性。
AI.method: 设计少样本学习框架，结合转换网络（Transform Net）与中心损失模块（Center Loss Block），增强对3D特征的表征能力并优化同类特征分布。
AI.result: 显著降低对完整标注数据的依赖，提升模型在新型分割任务中的适应性与实际应用灵活性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过少样本学习有效解决CAM/CAD分割中的数据瓶颈问题，结合网络结构改进进一步优化特征学习与分类性能。

result: 显著降低对完整标注数据的依赖，提升模型在新型分割任务中的适应性与实际应用灵活性。
conclusion: 该方法通过少样本学习有效解决CAM/CAD分割中的数据瓶颈问题，结合网络结构改进进一步优化特征学习与分类性能。
search_text: CAM/CAD Point Cloud Part Segmentation via Few-Shot Learning 通过少样本学习进行 CAM/CAD 点云零件分割 3D part segmentation is an essential step in advanced CAM/CAD workflow. Precise 3D segmentation contributes to lower defective rate of work-pieces produced by the manufacturing equipment (such as computer controlled CNCs), thereby improving work efficiency and attaining the attendant economic benefits. A large class of existing works on 3D model segmentation are mostly based on fully-supervised learning, which trains the AI models with large, annotated datasets. However, the disadvantage is that the resulting models from the fully-supervised learning methodology are highly reliant on the completeness of the available dataset, and its generalization ability is relatively poor to new unknown segmentation types (i.e. further additional novel classes). In this work, we propose and develop a noteworthy few-shot learning-based approach for effective part segmentation in CAM/CAD; and this is designed to significantly enhance its generalization ability and flexibly adapt to new segmentation tasks by using only relatively rather few samples. As a result, it not only reduces the requirements for the usually unattainable and exhaustive completeness of supervision datasets, but also improves the flexibility for real-world applications. As further improvement and innovation, we additionally adopt the transform net and the center loss block in the network. These characteristics serve to improve the comprehension for 3D features of the various possible instances of the whole work-piece and ensure the close distribution of the same class in feature space. 3D 零件分割是高级 CAM/CAD 工作流程中的重要步骤。精确的3D分割有助于降低制造设备（例如计算机控制的CNC）生产的工件的缺陷率，从而提高工作效率并获得随之而来的经济效益。现有的一大批 3D 模型分割工作大多基于完全监督学习，即使用大型带注释数据集来训练 AI 模型。然而，缺点是完全监督学习方法所得到的模型高度依赖于可用数据集的完整性，并且其泛化能力对于新的未知分割类型（即进一步附加的新类别）相对较差。在这项工作中，我们提出并开发了一种值得注意的基于小样本学习的方法，用于 CAM/CAD 中的有效零件分割；这样做的目的是通过仅使用相对较少的样本来显着增强其泛化能力并灵活地适应新的分割任务。因此，它不仅降低了对监督数据集通常难以达到的详尽完整性的要求，而且提高了实际应用的灵活性。作为进一步的改进和创新，我们在网络中额外采用了变换网络和中心损失块。这些特征有助于提高对整个工件的各种可能实例的 3D 特征的理解，并确保同一类在特征空间中的紧密分布。 本文提出一种基于少样本学习的CAM/CAD点云部件分割方法，解决传统全监督方法依赖大量标注数据且泛化能力差的问题。 Jiahui Wang,Haiyue Zhu,Haoren Guo,Abdullah Al Mamun,Vadakkepat Prahlad,Tong Heng Lee eess.IV,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Cheng Zou,Furong Xu,Meng Wang,Wen Li,Yuan Cheng
title: Solutions for Fine-grained and Long-tailed Snake Species Recognition in SnakeCLEF 2022
title_zh: SnakeCLEF 2022 细粒度和长尾蛇物种识别解决方案
comment: Top solutions for FGVC9, accepted to CLEF2022
comments: Top solutions for FGVC9, accepted to CLEF2022
abstract: Automatic snake species recognition is important because it has vast potential to help lower deaths and disabilities caused by snakebites. We introduce our solution in SnakeCLEF 2022 for fine-grained snake species recognition on a heavy long-tailed class distribution. First, a network architecture is designed to extract and fuse features from multiple modalities, i.e. photograph from visual modality and geographic locality information from language modality. Then, logit adjustment based methods are studied to relieve the impact caused by the severe class imbalance. Next, a combination of supervised and self-supervised learning method is proposed to make full use of the dataset, including both labeled training data and unlabeled testing data. Finally, post processing strategies, such as multi-scale and multi-crop test-time-augmentation, location filtering and model ensemble, are employed for better performance. With an ensemble of several different models, a private score 82.65%, ranking the 3rd, is achieved on the final leaderboard.
summary: Automatic snake species recognition is important because it has vast potential to help lower deaths and disabilities caused by snakebites. We introduce our solution in SnakeCLEF 2022 for fine-grained snake species recognition on a heavy long-tailed class distribution. First, a network architecture is designed to extract and fuse features from multiple modalities, i.e. photograph from visual modality and geographic locality information from language modality. Then, logit adjustment based methods are studied to relieve the impact caused by the severe class imbalance. Next, a combination of supervised and self-supervised learning method is proposed to make full use of the dataset, including both labeled training data and unlabeled testing data. Finally, post processing strategies, such as multi-scale and multi-crop test-time-augmentation, location filtering and model ensemble, are employed for better performance. With an ensemble of several different models, a private score 82.65%, ranking the 3rd, is achieved on the final leaderboard.
abstract_zh: 自动蛇种类识别非常重要，因为它具有帮助降低蛇咬伤造成的死亡和残疾的巨大潜力。我们在 SnakeCLEF 2022 中介绍了我们的解决方案，用于在重长尾类分布上进行细粒度蛇物种识别。首先，网络架构被设计为从多种模态中提取和融合特征，即来自视觉模态的照片和来自语言模态的地理局部性信息。然后，研究了基于logit调整的方法来缓解严重的类别不平衡造成的影响。接下来，提出了监督和自监督学习相结合的方法，以充分利用数据集，包括标记的训练数据和未标记的测试数据。最后，采用后处理策略，例如多尺度和多作物测试时间增强、位置过滤和模型集成，以获得更好的性能。多个不同模型的组合，私下得分82.65%，在最终排行榜上排名第三。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对SnakeCLEF 2022比赛中细粒度和长尾分布蛇类物种识别的解决方案。
AI.motivation: 自动蛇类物种识别对减少蛇咬伤导致的死亡和残疾具有重要意义，而长尾类别分布和细粒度区分是该任务的主要挑战。
AI.method: 设计多模态特征融合网络架构，结合logit调整方法缓解类别不平衡，采用监督与自监督学习结合策略，并通过多尺度测试增强、位置过滤和模型集成等后处理技术提升性能。
AI.result: 通过模型集成方法，在SnakeCLEF 2022最终排行榜中取得私有分数82.65%，位列第三。
AI.conclusion: 多模态特征融合与类别平衡策略相结合的方法有效提升了长尾分布下的细粒度蛇类识别性能，为相关研究提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Junbo Zhang,Weiwei Wan,Nobuyuki Tanaka,Miki Fujita,Kensuke Harada
title: Integrating a Manual Pipette into a Collaborative Robot Manipulator for Flexible Liquid Dispensing
title_zh: 将手动移液器集成到协作机器人操纵器中以实现灵活的液体分配
abstract: This paper presents a system integration approach for a 6-DoF (Degree of Freedom) collaborative robot to operate a pipette for liquid dispensing. Its technical development is threefold. First, we designed an end-effector for holding and triggering manual pipettes. Second, we took advantage of a collaborative robot to recognize labware poses and planned robotic motion based on the recognized poses. Third, we developed vision-based classifiers to predict and correct positioning errors and thus precisely attached pipettes to disposable tips. Through experiments and analysis, we confirmed that the developed system, especially the planning and visual recognition methods, could help secure high-precision and flexible liquid dispensing. The developed system is suitable for low-frequency, high-repetition biochemical liquid dispensing tasks. We expect it to promote the deployment of collaborative robots for laboratory automation and thus improve the experimental efficiency without significantly customizing a laboratory environment.
summary: This paper presents a system integration approach for a 6-DoF (Degree of Freedom) collaborative robot to operate a pipette for liquid dispensing. Its technical development is threefold. First, we designed an end-effector for holding and triggering manual pipettes. Second, we took advantage of a collaborative robot to recognize labware poses and planned robotic motion based on the recognized poses. Third, we developed vision-based classifiers to predict and correct positioning errors and thus precisely attached pipettes to disposable tips. Through experiments and analysis, we confirmed that the developed system, especially the planning and visual recognition methods, could help secure high-precision and flexible liquid dispensing. The developed system is suitable for low-frequency, high-repetition biochemical liquid dispensing tasks. We expect it to promote the deployment of collaborative robots for laboratory automation and thus improve the experimental efficiency without significantly customizing a laboratory environment.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于 6-DoF（自由度）协作机器人操作移液器进行液体分配的系统集成方法。其技术发展有三个方面。首先，我们设计了一个用于固定和触发手动移液器的末端执行器。其次，我们利用协作机器人来识别实验室器具姿势，并根据识别的姿势规划机器人运动。第三，我们开发了基于视觉的分类器来预测和纠正定位错误，从而将移液器精确地连接到一次性吸头上。通过实验和分析，我们证实所开发的系统，特别是规划和视觉识别方法，可以帮助确保高精度和灵活的液体分配。所开发的系统适用于低频、高重复的生化液体分配任务。我们期望它能够促进实验室自动化协作机器人的部署，从而在不大幅定制实验室环境的情况下提高实验效率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种将手动移液器集成到协作机器人上的系统方法，以实现灵活的液体分配。
AI.motivation: 为提升实验室自动化效率，减少对实验环境的定制需求，同时实现高精度和高重复性的液体分配任务。
AI.method: 设计专用末端执行器固定和触发移液器；利用协作机器人识别实验器具姿态并规划运动；开发基于视觉的分类器预测并修正定位误差。
AI.result: 实验验证了系统在高精度和灵活性上的有效性，适用于低频次、高重复性的生化液体分配任务。
AI.conclusion: 该系统可推动协作机器人在实验室自动化中的应用，提升实验效率且无需显著改造实验室环境。

authors_text: Xiangri Lu
title: Analysis of Robocode Robot Adaptive Confrontation Based on Zero-Sum Game
title_zh: 基于零和博弈的Robocode机器人自适应对抗分析
abstract: The confrontation of modern intelligence is to some extent a non-complete information confrontation, where neither side has access to sufficient information to detect the deployment status of the adversary, and then it is necessary for the intelligence to complete information retrieval adaptively and develop confrontation strategies in the confrontation environment. In this paper, seven tank robots, including TestRobot, are organized for 1V 1 independent and mixed confrontations. The main objective of this paper is to verify the effectiveness of TestRobot's Zero-sum Game Alpha-Beta pruning algorithm combined with the estimation of the opponent's next moment motion position under the game round strategy and the effect of releasing the intelligent body's own bullets in advance to hit the opponent. Finally, based on the results of the confrontation experiments, the natural property differences of the tank intelligence are expressed by plotting histograms of 1V1 independent confrontations and radar plots of mixed confrontations.
summary: The confrontation of modern intelligence is to some extent a non-complete information confrontation, where neither side has access to sufficient information to detect the deployment status of the adversary, and then it is necessary for the intelligence to complete information retrieval adaptively and develop confrontation strategies in the confrontation environment. In this paper, seven tank robots, including TestRobot, are organized for 1V 1 independent and mixed confrontations. The main objective of this paper is to verify the effectiveness of TestRobot's Zero-sum Game Alpha-Beta pruning algorithm combined with the estimation of the opponent's next moment motion position under the game round strategy and the effect of releasing the intelligent body's own bullets in advance to hit the opponent. Finally, based on the results of the confrontation experiments, the natural property differences of the tank intelligence are expressed by plotting histograms of 1V1 independent confrontations and radar plots of mixed confrontations.
abstract_zh: 现代情报对抗在某种程度上是一种非完全信息对抗，双方都无法获得足够的信息来探测对手的部署状态，这就需要情报在对抗环境中自适应地完成信息检索并制定对抗策略。本文组织了包括TestRobot在内的7个坦克机器人进行1V 1独立和混合对抗。本文的主要目的是验证TestRobot的零和博弈Alpha-Beta剪枝算法结合游戏回合策略下对手下一时刻运动位置的估计以及提前释放智能体自身子弹击中对手的效果。最后，根据对抗实验的结果，通过绘制1V1独立对抗的直方图和混合对抗的雷达图来表达坦克智能的自然属性差异。

AI.tldr: 本文通过模拟七台坦克机器人（包括TestRobot）的1V1对抗，验证TestRobot基于零和博弈的Alpha-Beta剪枝算法结合对手运动预测和预判射击策略的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现代智能对抗常面临信息不完全问题，需通过自适应信息检索和策略调整提升对抗效能。
AI.method: 组织七台机器人进行独立及混合对抗实验，结合零和博弈算法、对手运动位置估计及预射击机制，并通过直方图和雷达图分析智能体特性差异。
AI.result: 实验验证了TestRobot算法在对抗中的有效性，且通过可视化分析揭示了不同智能体的自然属性差异。
AI.conclusion: 零和博弈算法结合预判机制能有效提升机器人对抗表现，对抗策略需考虑对手行为预测与自适应调整。

search_text: Analysis of Robocode Robot Adaptive Confrontation Based on Zero-Sum Game 基于零和博弈的Robocode机器人自适应对抗分析 The confrontation of modern intelligence is to some extent a non-complete information confrontation, where neither side has access to sufficient information to detect the deployment status of the adversary, and then it is necessary for the intelligence to complete information retrieval adaptively and develop confrontation strategies in the confrontation environment. In this paper, seven tank robots, including TestRobot, are organized for 1V 1 independent and mixed confrontations. The main objective of this paper is to verify the effectiveness of TestRobot's Zero-sum Game Alpha-Beta pruning algorithm combined with the estimation of the opponent's next moment motion position under the game round strategy and the effect of releasing the intelligent body's own bullets in advance to hit the opponent. Finally, based on the results of the confrontation experiments, the natural property differences of the tank intelligence are expressed by plotting histograms of 1V1 independent confrontations and radar plots of mixed confrontations. 现代情报对抗在某种程度上是一种非完全信息对抗，双方都无法获得足够的信息来探测对手的部署状态，这就需要情报在对抗环境中自适应地完成信息检索并制定对抗策略。本文组织了包括TestRobot在内的7个坦克机器人进行1V 1独立和混合对抗。本文的主要目的是验证TestRobot的零和博弈Alpha-Beta剪枝算法结合游戏回合策略下对手下一时刻运动位置的估计以及提前释放智能体自身子弹击中对手的效果。最后，根据对抗实验的结果，通过绘制1V1独立对抗的直方图和混合对抗的雷达图来表达坦克智能的自然属性差异。 本文通过模拟七台坦克机器人（包括TestRobot）的1V1对抗，验证TestRobot基于零和博弈的Alpha-Beta剪枝算法结合对手运动预测和预判射击策略的有效性。 Xiangri Lu cs.AI

authors_text: Jürgen Seiler,André Kaup
title: Reusing the H.264/AVC deblocking filter for efficient spatio-temporal prediction in video coding
title_zh: 重用 H.264/AVC 去块滤波器在视频编码中实现高效的时空预测
comment: ef:IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP), 2011, pp. 1049-1052
comments: ef:IEEE International Conference on Acoustics, Speech and Signal Processing (ICASSP), 2011, pp. 1049-1052
abstract: The prediction step is a very important part of hybrid video codecs for effectively compressing video sequences. While existing video codecs predict either in temporal or in spatial direction only, the compression efficiency can be increased by a combined spatio-temporal prediction. In this paper we propose an algorithm for reusing the H.264/AVC deblocking filter for spatio-temporal prediction. Reusing this highly op timized filter allows for a very low computational complexity of this prediction mode and an average rate reduction of up to 7.2% can be achieved.
summary: The prediction step is a very important part of hybrid video codecs for effectively compressing video sequences. While existing video codecs predict either in temporal or in spatial direction only, the compression efficiency can be increased by a combined spatio-temporal prediction. In this paper we propose an algorithm for reusing the H.264/AVC deblocking filter for spatio-temporal prediction. Reusing this highly op timized filter allows for a very low computational complexity of this prediction mode and an average rate reduction of up to 7.2% can be achieved.
abstract_zh: 预测步骤是混合视频编解码器中用于有效压缩视频序列的非常重要的部分。虽然现有视频编解码器仅在时间或空间方向上进行预测，但可以通过组合的时空预测来提高压缩效率。在本文中，我们提出了一种重用 H.264/AVC 去块滤波器进行时空预测的算法。重复使用这种高度优化的滤波器可以使这种预测模式的计算复杂度非常低，并且可以实现高达 7.2% 的平均速率降低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过重用H.264/AVC去块滤波器实现高效时空预测的视频编码算法。
AI.motivation: 现有视频编码标准仅支持单向时空预测，限制了压缩效率，而结合时空预测可显著提升压缩性能。
AI.method: 将H.264/AVC中高度优化的去块滤波器重构为时空预测模块，降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 在保持低计算复杂度的同时，平均比特率降低达7.2%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过复用现有硬件加速模块，为高效视频编码提供了可行的时空预测解决方案。

authors_text: Sébastien Ollivier,Sheng Li,Yue Tang,Chayanika Chaudhuri,Peipei Zhou,Xulong Tang,Jingtong Hu,Alex K. Jones
title: Sustainable AI Processing at the Edge
title_zh: 边缘的可持续人工智能处理
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: Edge computing is a popular target for accelerating machine learning algorithms supporting mobile devices without requiring the communication latencies to handle them in the cloud. Edge deployments of machine learning primarily consider traditional concerns such as SWaP constraints (Size, Weight, and Power) for their installations. However, such metrics are not entirely sufficient to consider environmental impacts from computing given the significant contributions from embodied energy and carbon. In this paper we explore the tradeoffs of convolutional neural network acceleration engines for both inference and on-line training. In particular, we explore the use of processing-in-memory (PIM) approaches, mobile GPU accelerators, and recently released FPGAs, and compare them with novel Racetrack memory PIM. Replacing PIM-enabled DDR3 with Racetrack memory PIM can recover its embodied energy as quickly as 1 year. For high activity ratios, mobile GPUs can be more sustainable but have higher embodied energy to overcome compared to PIM-enabled Racetrack memory.
summary: Edge computing is a popular target for accelerating machine learning algorithms supporting mobile devices without requiring the communication latencies to handle them in the cloud. Edge deployments of machine learning primarily consider traditional concerns such as SWaP constraints (Size, Weight, and Power) for their installations. However, such metrics are not entirely sufficient to consider environmental impacts from computing given the significant contributions from embodied energy and carbon. In this paper we explore the tradeoffs of convolutional neural network acceleration engines for both inference and on-line training. In particular, we explore the use of processing-in-memory (PIM) approaches, mobile GPU accelerators, and recently released FPGAs, and compare them with novel Racetrack memory PIM. Replacing PIM-enabled DDR3 with Racetrack memory PIM can recover its embodied energy as quickly as 1 year. For high activity ratios, mobile GPUs can be more sustainable but have higher embodied energy to overcome compared to PIM-enabled Racetrack memory.
abstract_zh: 边缘计算是加速支持移动设备的机器学习算法的热门目标，而无需通信延迟来在云中处理它们。机器学习的边缘部署主要考虑传统问题，例如其安装的 SWaP 限制（尺寸、重量和功耗）。然而，考虑到蕴含能源和碳的巨大贡献，这些指标并不足以考虑计算对环境的影响。在本文中，我们探讨了卷积神经网络加速引擎在推理和在线训练方面的权衡。我们特别探索了内存处理 (PIM) 方法、移动 GPU 加速器和最近发布的 FPGA 的使用，并将它们与新颖的 Racetrack 内存 PIM 进行比较。用 Racetrack 内存 PIM 替换支持 PIM 的 DDR3，最快可在 1 年内恢复其体现的能量。对于高活动率，移动 GPU 可以更具可持续性，但与支持 PIM 的 Racetrack 内存相比，需要克服更高的体现能量。

AI.tldr: 研究边缘计算中不同AI加速器的可持续性，比较其环境影响
AI.motivation: 传统指标忽视环境影响，需评估AI加速器的可持续性
AI.method: 比较PIM、移动GPU、FPGA和Racetrack内存PIM的固有能量与可持续性
AI.result: Racetrack内存PIM一年内回收能量，移动GPU高活动率下更可持续但固有能量更高
AI.conclusion: Racetrack内存PIM在可持续性上优于传统PIM，移动GPU在高负载下更优但需权衡固有能量

authors_text: Sixing Yan,William K. Cheung,Keith Chiu,Terence M. Tong,Charles K. Cheung,Simon See
title: Attributed Abnormality Graph Embedding for Clinically Accurate X-Ray Report Generation
title_zh: 用于生成临床准确 X 射线报告的归因异常图嵌入
abstract: Automatic generation of medical reports from X-ray images can assist radiologists to perform the time-consuming and yet important reporting task. Yet, achieving clinically accurate generated reports remains challenging. Modeling the underlying abnormalities using the knowledge graph approach has been found promising in enhancing the clinical accuracy. In this paper, we introduce a novel fined-grained knowledge graph structure called an attributed abnormality graph (ATAG). The ATAG consists of interconnected abnormality nodes and attribute nodes, allowing it to better capture the abnormality details. In contrast to the existing methods where the abnormality graph was constructed manually, we propose a methodology to automatically construct the fine-grained graph structure based on annotations, medical reports in X-ray datasets, and the RadLex radiology lexicon. We then learn the ATAG embedding using a deep model with an encoder-decoder architecture for the report generation. In particular, graph attention networks are explored to encode the relationships among the abnormalities and their attributes. A gating mechanism is adopted and integrated with various decoders for the generation. We carry out extensive experiments based on the benchmark datasets, and show that the proposed ATAG-based deep model outperforms the SOTA methods by a large margin and can improve the clinical accuracy of the generated reports.
summary: Automatic generation of medical reports from X-ray images can assist radiologists to perform the time-consuming and yet important reporting task. Yet, achieving clinically accurate generated reports remains challenging. Modeling the underlying abnormalities using the knowledge graph approach has been found promising in enhancing the clinical accuracy. In this paper, we introduce a novel fined-grained knowledge graph structure called an attributed abnormality graph (ATAG). The ATAG consists of interconnected abnormality nodes and attribute nodes, allowing it to better capture the abnormality details. In contrast to the existing methods where the abnormality graph was constructed manually, we propose a methodology to automatically construct the fine-grained graph structure based on annotations, medical reports in X-ray datasets, and the RadLex radiology lexicon. We then learn the ATAG embedding using a deep model with an encoder-decoder architecture for the report generation. In particular, graph attention networks are explored to encode the relationships among the abnormalities and their attributes. A gating mechanism is adopted and integrated with various decoders for the generation. We carry out extensive experiments based on the benchmark datasets, and show that the proposed ATAG-based deep model outperforms the SOTA methods by a large margin and can improve the clinical accuracy of the generated reports.
abstract_zh: 从 X 射线图像自动生成医疗报告可以帮助放射科医生执行耗时但重要的报告任务。然而，获得临床上准确的生成报告仍然具有挑战性。使用知识图方法对潜在异常进行建模已被发现有望提高临床准确性。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的细粒度知识图结构，称为归因异常图（ATAG）。 ATAG由相互关联的异常节点和属性节点组成，使其能够更好地捕获异常细节。与手动构建异常图的现有方法相比，我们提出了一种基于注释、X 射线数据集中的医疗报告和 RadLex 放射学词典自动构建细粒度图结构的方法。然后，我们使用具有编码器-解码器架构的深度模型来学习 ATAG 嵌入，以生成报告。特别是，探索图注意力网络来编码异常及其属性之间的关系。采用门控机制并与各种解码器集成进行生成。我们基于基准数据集进行了广泛的实验，结果表明所提出的基于 ATAG 的深度模型大幅优于 SOTA 方法，并且可以提高生成报告的临床准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于属性异常图（ATAG）的深度学习模型，用于生成临床准确的X光报告。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在生成临床准确的X光报告时存在挑战，手动构建的异常图难以捕捉细节，需自动化的细粒度知识图谱结构提升准确性。
AI.method: 构建自动化的属性异常图（ATAG），包含异常节点和属性节点，并利用图注意力网络编码关系，结合门控机制与解码器生成报告。
AI.result: 在基准数据集上实验表明，ATAG模型显著优于现有方法，有效提升了生成报告的临床准确性。
AI.conclusion: ATAG通过自动构建细粒度图结构并建模异常与属性关系，为临床准确的X光报告生成提供了有效解决方案。

search_text: Attributed Abnormality Graph Embedding for Clinically Accurate X-Ray Report Generation 用于生成临床准确 X 射线报告的归因异常图嵌入 Automatic generation of medical reports from X-ray images can assist radiologists to perform the time-consuming and yet important reporting task. Yet, achieving clinically accurate generated reports remains challenging. Modeling the underlying abnormalities using the knowledge graph approach has been found promising in enhancing the clinical accuracy. In this paper, we introduce a novel fined-grained knowledge graph structure called an attributed abnormality graph (ATAG). The ATAG consists of interconnected abnormality nodes and attribute nodes, allowing it to better capture the abnormality details. In contrast to the existing methods where the abnormality graph was constructed manually, we propose a methodology to automatically construct the fine-grained graph structure based on annotations, medical reports in X-ray datasets, and the RadLex radiology lexicon. We then learn the ATAG embedding using a deep model with an encoder-decoder architecture for the report generation. In particular, graph attention networks are explored to encode the relationships among the abnormalities and their attributes. A gating mechanism is adopted and integrated with various decoders for the generation. We carry out extensive experiments based on the benchmark datasets, and show that the proposed ATAG-based deep model outperforms the SOTA methods by a large margin and can improve the clinical accuracy of the generated reports. 从 X 射线图像自动生成医疗报告可以帮助放射科医生执行耗时但重要的报告任务。然而，获得临床上准确的生成报告仍然具有挑战性。使用知识图方法对潜在异常进行建模已被发现有望提高临床准确性。在本文中，我们介绍了一种新颖的细粒度知识图结构，称为归因异常图（ATAG）。 ATAG由相互关联的异常节点和属性节点组成，使其能够更好地捕获异常细节。与手动构建异常图的现有方法相比，我们提出了一种基于注释、X 射线数据集中的医疗报告和 RadLex 放射学词典自动构建细粒度图结构的方法。然后，我们使用具有编码器-解码器架构的深度模型来学习 ATAG 嵌入，以生成报告。特别是，探索图注意力网络来编码异常及其属性之间的关系。采用门控机制并与各种解码器集成进行生成。我们基于基准数据集进行了广泛的实验，结果表明所提出的基于 ATAG 的深度模型大幅优于 SOTA 方法，并且可以提高生成报告的临床准确性。 本文提出了一种基于属性异常图（ATAG）的深度学习模型，用于生成临床准确的X光报告。 Sixing Yan,William K. authors_text: Shunyu Yao,Howard Chen,John Yang,Karthik Narasimhan
title: WebShop: Towards Scalable Real-World Web Interaction with Grounded Language Agents
title_zh: WebShop：与基础语言代理实现可扩展的现实世界网络交互
comment: Project page with code, data, demos: https://webshop-pnlp.github.io. v3 is NeurIPS camera ready version. v4 fixes the choice oracle result as per https://github.com/princeton-nlp/WebShop/issues/15
comments: Project page with code, data, demos: https://webshop-pnlp.github.io. v3 is NeurIPS camera ready version. v4 fixes the choice oracle result as per https://github.com/princeton-nlp/WebShop/issues/15
abstract: Existing benchmarks for grounding language in interactive environments either lack real-world linguistic elements, or prove difficult to scale up due to substantial human involvement in the collection of data or feedback signals. To bridge this gap, we develop WebShop -- a simulated e-commerce website environment with $1.18$ million real-world products and $12,087$ crowd-sourced text instructions. Given a text instruction specifying a product requirement, an agent needs to navigate multiple types of webpages and issue diverse actions to find, customize, and purchase an item. WebShop provides several challenges for language grounding including understanding compositional instructions, query (re-)formulation, comprehending and acting on noisy text in webpages, and performing strategic exploration. We collect over $1,600$ human demonstrations for the task, and train and evaluate a diverse range of agents using reinforcement learning, imitation learning, and pre-trained image and language models. Our best model achieves a task success rate of $29\%$, which outperforms rule-based heuristics ($9.6\%$) but is far lower than human expert performance ($59\%$). We also analyze agent and human trajectories and ablate various model components to provide insights for developing future agents with stronger language understanding and decision making abilities. Finally, we show that agents trained on WebShop exhibit non-trivial sim-to-real transfer when evaluated on amazon.com and ebay.com, indicating the potential value of WebShop in developing practical web-based agents that can operate in the wild.
summary: Existing benchmarks for grounding language in interactive environments either lack real-world linguistic elements, or prove difficult to scale up due to substantial human involvement in the collection of data or feedback signals. To bridge this gap, we develop WebShop -- a simulated e-commerce website environment with $1.18$ million real-world products and $12,087$ crowd-sourced text instructions. Given a text instruction specifying a product requirement, an agent needs to navigate multiple types of webpages and issue diverse actions to find, customize, and purchase an item. WebShop provides several challenges for language grounding including understanding compositional instructions, query (re-)formulation, comprehending and acting on noisy text in webpages, and performing strategic exploration. We collect over $1,600$ human demonstrations for the task, and train and evaluate a diverse range of agents using reinforcement learning, imitation learning, and pre-trained image and language models. Our best model achieves a task success rate of $29\%$, which outperforms rule-based heuristics ($9.6\%$) but is far lower than human expert performance ($59\%$). We also analyze agent and human trajectories and ablate various model components to provide insights for developing future agents with stronger language understanding and decision making abilities. Finally, we show that agents trained on WebShop exhibit non-trivial sim-to-real transfer when evaluated on amazon.com and ebay.com, indicating the potential value of WebShop in developing practical web-based agents that can operate in the wild.
abstract_zh: 交互环境中的现有语言基准要么缺乏现实世界的语言元素，要么由于人类大量参与数据或反馈信号的收集而难以扩展。为了弥补这一差距，我们开发了 WebShop——一个模拟电子商务网站环境，其中包含价值 1.18 美元的真实世界产品和价值 12,087 美元的众包文本说明。给定指定产品要求的文本指令，代理需要导航多种类型的网页并发出不同的操作来查找、定制和购买商品。 WebShop 为语言基础提供了多项挑战，包括理解构图指令、查询（重新）表述、理解网页中的嘈杂文本并对其采取行动，以及执行策略探索。我们为该任务收集了超过 1,600 美元的人类演示，并使用强化学习、模仿学习以及预训练的图像和语言模型来训练和评估各种代理。我们的最佳模型实现了 $29\%$ 的任务成功率，优于基于规则的启发式方法 ($9.6\%$)，但远低于人类专家的表现 ($59\%$)。我们还分析智能体和人类轨迹，并消除各种模型组件，为开发具有更强语言理解和决策能力的未来智能体提供见解。最后，我们表明，在 amazon.com 和 ebay.com 上进行评估时，在 WebShop 上训练的代理表现出不平凡的模拟到真实的迁移，这表明 WebShop 在开发可在野外运行的实用的基于网络的代理方面具有潜在价值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出WebShop，一个包含118万真实商品和1.2万用户指令的模拟电商环境，用于训练和评估能处理复杂网页交互的语言代理。
AI.motivation: 现有基准缺乏真实语言元素或难以扩展，需创建可模拟真实电商交互且支持大规模测试的环境以推动语言代理研究。
AI.method: 构建包含真实商品和用户指令的模拟电商网站，通过强化学习、模仿学习及预训练模型训练代理，评估其导航、定制和购买商品的能力。
AI.result: 最佳模型任务成功率达29%，优于规则方法（9.6%）但低于人类（59%），且在亚马逊和eBay展示出模拟到现实的迁移能力。
AI.conclusion: WebShop为开发实用网络代理提供有效测试平台，未来需提升代理的语言理解与决策能力以接近人类水平。
