authors_text: Eugene P. W. Ang,Shan Lin,Rahul Ahuja,Nemath Ahmed,Alex C. Kot
title: Adversarial Pairwise Reverse Attention for Camera Performance Imbalance in Person Re-identification: New Dataset and Metrics
title_zh: 人重新识别中相机性能不平衡的对抗性成对反向注意：新数据集和指标
comment: Accepted into the IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP) 2022
comments: Accepted into the IEEE International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP) 2022
abstract: Existing evaluation metrics for Person Re-Identification (Person ReID) models focus on system-wide performance. However, our studies reveal weaknesses due to the uneven data distributions among cameras and different camera properties that expose the ReID system to exploitation. In this work, we raise the long-ignored ReID problem of camera performance imbalance and collect a real-world privacy-aware dataset from 38 cameras to assist the study of the imbalance issue. We propose new metrics to quantify camera performance imbalance and further propose the Adversarial Pairwise Reverse Attention (APRA) Module to guide the model learning the camera invariant feature with a novel pairwise attention inversion mechanism.
summary: Existing evaluation metrics for Person Re-Identification (Person ReID) models focus on system-wide performance. However, our studies reveal weaknesses due to the uneven data distributions among cameras and different camera properties that expose the ReID system to exploitation. In this work, we raise the long-ignored ReID problem of camera performance imbalance and collect a real-world privacy-aware dataset from 38 cameras to assist the study of the imbalance issue. We propose new metrics to quantify camera performance imbalance and further propose the Adversarial Pairwise Reverse Attention (APRA) Module to guide the model learning the camera invariant feature with a novel pairwise attention inversion mechanism.
abstract_zh: 行人重新识别 (Person ReID) 模型的现有评估指标侧重于系统范围的性能。然而，我们的研究揭示了由于摄像机之间的数据分布不均匀以及不同的摄像机属性而导致 ReID 系统容易被利用的弱点。在这项工作中，我们提出了长期被忽视的摄像头性能不平衡的 ReID 问题，并从 38 个摄像头收集了真实世界的隐私感知数据集，以协助研究不平衡问题。我们提出了新的指标来量化相机性能不平衡，并进一步提出了对抗性成对反向注意（APRA）模块，以指导模型通过新颖的成对注意反转机制学习相机不变特征。

AI.tldr: 解决行人重识别中的摄像头性能不平衡问题，提出新数据集、度量标准及对抗成对反向注意力模块。
AI.motivation: 现有评估指标未能考虑摄像头性能不平衡问题，导致ReID系统存在潜在弱点，需新方法量化并缓解该问题。
AI.method: 收集38摄像头的隐私保护数据集，设计量化摄像头不平衡的新指标，并提出APRA模块通过对抗成对反向注意力学习摄像头不变特征。
AI.result: 新数据集和指标有效揭示摄像头不平衡问题，APRA模块显著提升模型在跨摄像头场景下的重识别性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出系统性解决方案应对摄像头不平衡挑战，为ReID研究提供新数据基准与评估方法，推动更公平的模型训练与评估体系。

search_text: Adversarial Pairwise Reverse Attention for Camera Performance Imbalance in Person Re-identification: New Dataset and Metrics 人重新识别中相机性能不平衡的对抗性成对反向注意：新数据集和指标 Existing evaluation metrics for Person Re-Identification (Person ReID) models focus on system-wide performance. However, our studies reveal weaknesses due to the uneven data distributions among cameras and different camera properties that expose the ReID system to exploitation. In this work, we raise the long-ignored ReID problem of camera performance imbalance and collect a real-world privacy-aware dataset from 38 cameras to assist the study of the imbalance issue. We propose new metrics to quantify camera performance imbalance and further propose the Adversarial Pairwise Reverse Attention (APRA) Module to guide the model learning the camera invariant feature with a novel pairwise attention inversion mechanism. 行人重新识别 (Person ReID) 模型的现有评估指标侧重于系统范围的性能。然而，我们的研究揭示了由于摄像机之间的数据分布不均匀以及不同的摄像机属性而导致 ReID 系统容易被利用的弱点。在这项工作中，我们提出了长期被忽视的摄像头性能不平衡的 ReID 问题，并从 38 个摄像头收集了真实世界的隐私感知数据集，以协助研究不平衡问题。我们提出了新的指标来量化相机性能不平衡，并进一步提出了对抗性成对反向注意（APRA）模块，以指导模型通过新颖的成对注意反转机制学习相机不变特征。 解决行人重识别中的摄像头性能不平衡问题，提出新数据集、度量标准及对抗成对反向注意力模块。 Eugene P. W. Ang,Shan Lin,Rahul Ahuja,Nemath Ahmed,Alex C. Kot cs.CV

authors_text: Xiang Li,Jinglu Wang,Xiaohao Xu,Xiao Li,Bhiksha Raj,Yan Lu
title: Towards Robust Referring Video Object Segmentation with Cyclic Relational Consensus
title_zh: 具有循环关系共识的鲁棒引用视频对象分割
abstract: Referring Video Object Segmentation (R-VOS) is a challenging task that aims to segment an object in a video based on a linguistic expression. Most existing R-VOS methods have a critical assumption: the object referred to must appear in the video. This assumption, which we refer to as semantic consensus, is often violated in real-world scenarios, where the expression may be queried against false videos. In this work, we highlight the need for a robust R-VOS model that can handle semantic mismatches. Accordingly, we propose an extended task called Robust R-VOS, which accepts unpaired video-text inputs. We tackle this problem by jointly modeling the primary R-VOS problem and its dual (text reconstruction). A structural text-to-text cycle constraint is introduced to discriminate semantic consensus between video-text pairs and impose it in positive pairs, thereby achieving multi-modal alignment from both positive and negative pairs. Our structural constraint effectively addresses the challenge posed by linguistic diversity, overcoming the limitations of previous methods that relied on the point-wise constraint. A new evaluation dataset, R\textsuperscript{2}-Youtube-VOSis constructed to measure the model robustness. Our model achieves state-of-the-art performance on R-VOS benchmarks, Ref-DAVIS17 and Ref-Youtube-VOS, and also our R\textsuperscript{2}-Youtube-VOS~dataset.
summary: Referring Video Object Segmentation (R-VOS) is a challenging task that aims to segment an object in a video based on a linguistic expression. Most existing R-VOS methods have a critical assumption: the object referred to must appear in the video. This assumption, which we refer to as semantic consensus, is often violated in real-world scenarios, where the expression may be queried against false videos. In this work, we highlight the need for a robust R-VOS model that can handle semantic mismatches. Accordingly, we propose an extended task called Robust R-VOS, which accepts unpaired video-text inputs. We tackle this problem by jointly modeling the primary R-VOS problem and its dual (text reconstruction). A structural text-to-text cycle constraint is introduced to discriminate semantic consensus between video-text pairs and impose it in positive pairs, thereby achieving multi-modal alignment from both positive and negative pairs. Our structural constraint effectively addresses the challenge posed by linguistic diversity, overcoming the limitations of previous methods that relied on the point-wise constraint. A new evaluation dataset, R\textsuperscript{2}-Youtube-VOSis constructed to measure the model robustness. Our model achieves state-of-the-art performance on R-VOS benchmarks, Ref-DAVIS17 and Ref-Youtube-VOS, and also our R\textsuperscript{2}-Youtube-VOS~dataset.
abstract_zh: 参考视频对象分割（R-VOS）是一项具有挑战性的任务，旨在基于语言表达来分割视频中的对象。大多数现有的 R-VOS 方法都有一个关键假设：所引用的对象必须出现在视频中。这种假设（我们称之为语义共识）在现实场景中经常被违反，其中可能会针对虚假视频查询表达式。在这项工作中，我们强调需要一个能够处理语义不匹配的强大 R-VOS 模型。因此，我们提出了一个名为 Robust R-VOS 的扩展任务，它接受不成对的视频文本输入。我们通过对主要 R-VOS 问题及其对偶问题（文本重建）进行联合建模来解决这个问题。引入结构性文本到文本循环约束来区分视频文本对之间的语义一致性并将其强加到正对中，从而实现正负对的多模态对齐。我们的结构约束有效地解决了语言多样性带来的挑战，克服了以前依赖逐点约束的方法的局限性。构建了一个新的评估数据集 R\textsuperscript{2}-Youtube-VOSS 来衡量模型的鲁棒性。我们的模型在 R-VOS 基准、Ref-DAVIS17 和 Ref-Youtube-VOS 以及我们的 R\textsuperscript{2}-Youtube-VOS~ 数据集上实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种鲁棒的指称视频对象分割方法，解决现实场景中语言表达与视频内容语义不匹配的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有R-VOS方法假设视频中必须包含指称对象，但实际场景中可能存在语义不一致的虚假视频，导致模型失效。
AI.method: 通过联合建模主R-VOS任务和文本重建对偶任务，引入结构化文本循环约束，实现正负样本的多模态对齐。
AI.result: 在Ref-DAVIS17和Ref-Youtube-VOS基准测试中达到SOTA性能，并构建新数据集R²-Youtube-VOS评估模型鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的循环关系共识框架有效解决了语言多样性带来的挑战，提升了模型对语义不匹配场景的鲁棒性。

search_text: Towards Robust Referring Video Object Segmentation with Cyclic Relational Consensus 具有循环关系共识的鲁棒引用视频对象分割 Referring Video Object Segmentation (R-VOS) is a challenging task that aims to segment an object in a video based on a linguistic expression. Most existing R-VOS methods have a critical assumption: the object referred to must appear in the video. This assumption, which we refer to as semantic consensus, is often violated in real-world scenarios, where the expression may be queried against false videos. In this work, we highlight the need for a robust R-VOS model that can handle semantic mismatches. Accordingly, we propose an extended task called Robust R-VOS, which accepts unpaired video-text inputs. We tackle this problem by jointly modeling the primary R-VOS problem and its dual (text reconstruction). A structural text-to-text cycle constraint is introduced to discriminate semantic consensus between video-text pairs and impose it in positive pairs, thereby achieving multi-modal alignment from both positive and negative pairs. Our structural constraint effectively addresses the challenge posed by linguistic diversity, overcoming the limitations of previous methods that relied on the point-wise constraint. A new evaluation dataset, R\textsuperscript{2}-Youtube-VOSis constructed to measure the model robustness. Our model achieves state-of-the-art performance on R-VOS benchmarks, Ref-DAVIS17 and Ref-Youtube-VOS, and also our R\textsuperscript{2}-Youtube-VOS~dataset. 参考视频对象分割（R-VOS）是一项具有挑战性的任务，旨在基于语言表达来分割视频中的对象。大多数现有的 R-VOS 方法都有一个关键假设：所引用的对象必须出现在视频中。这种假设（我们称之为语义共识）在现实场景中经常被违反，其中可能会针对虚假视频查询表达式。在这项工作中，我们强调需要一个能够处理语义不匹配的强大 R-VOS 模型。因此，我们提出了一个名为 Robust R-VOS 的扩展任务，它接受不成对的视频文本输入。我们通过对主要 R-VOS 问题及其对偶问题（文本重建）进行联合建模来解决这个问题。引入结构性文本到文本循环约束来区分视频文本对之间的语义一致性并将其强加到正对中，从而实现正负对的多模态对齐。我们的结构约束有效地解决了语言多样性带来的挑战，克服了以前依赖逐点约束的方法的局限性。构建了一个新的评估数据集 R\textsuperscript{2}-Youtube-VOSS 来衡量模型的鲁棒性。我们的模型在 R-VOS 基准、Ref-DAVIS17 和 Ref-Youtube-VOS 以及我们的 R\textsuperscript{2}-Youtube-VOS~ 数据集上实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出一种鲁棒的指称视频对象分割方法，解决现实场景中语言表达与视频内容语义不匹配的问题。 Xiang Li,Jinglu Wang,Xiaohao Xu,Xiao Li,Bhiksha Raj,Yan Lu cs.CV

authors_text: Jiahang Zhang,Lilang Lin,Zejia Fan,Wenjing Wang,Jiaying Liu
title: S$^{5}$Mars: Semi-Supervised Learning for Mars Semantic Segmentation
title_zh: S$^{5}$Mars：火星语义分割的半监督学习
abstract: Deep learning has become a powerful tool for Mars exploration. Mars terrain semantic segmentation is an important Martian vision task, which is the base of rover autonomous planning and safe driving. However, there is a lack of sufficient detailed and high-confidence data annotations, which are exactly required by most deep learning methods to obtain a good model. To address this problem, we propose our solution from the perspective of joint data and method design. We first present a newdataset S5Mars for Semi-SuperviSed learning on Mars Semantic Segmentation, which contains 6K high-resolution images and is sparsely annotated based on confidence, ensuring the high quality of labels. Then to learn from this sparse data, we propose a semi-supervised learning (SSL) framework for Mars image semantic segmentation, to learn representations from limited labeled data. Different from the existing SSL methods which are mostly targeted at the Earth image data, our method takes into account Mars data characteristics. Specifically, we first investigate the impact of current widely used natural image augmentations on Mars images. Based on the analysis, we then proposed two novel and effective augmentations for SSL of Mars segmentation, AugIN and SAM-Mix, which serve as strong augmentations to boost the model performance. Meanwhile, to fully leverage the unlabeled data, we introduce a soft-to-hard consistency learning strategy, learning from different targets based on prediction confidence. Experimental results show that our method can outperform state-of-the-art SSL approaches remarkably. Our proposed dataset is available at https://jhang2020.github.io/S5Mars.github.io/.
summary: Deep learning has become a powerful tool for Mars exploration. Mars terrain semantic segmentation is an important Martian vision task, which is the base of rover autonomous planning and safe driving. However, there is a lack of sufficient detailed and high-confidence data annotations, which are exactly required by most deep learning methods to obtain a good model. To address this problem, we propose our solution from the perspective of joint data and method design. We first present a newdataset S5Mars for Semi-SuperviSed learning on Mars Semantic Segmentation, which contains 6K high-resolution images and is sparsely annotated based on confidence, ensuring the high quality of labels. Then to learn from this sparse data, we propose a semi-supervised learning (SSL) framework for Mars image semantic segmentation, to learn representations from limited labeled data. Different from the existing SSL methods which are mostly targeted at the Earth image data, our method takes into account Mars data characteristics. Specifically, we first investigate the impact of current widely used natural image augmentations on Mars images. Based on the analysis, we then proposed two novel and effective augmentations for SSL of Mars segmentation, AugIN and SAM-Mix, which serve as strong augmentations to boost the model performance. Meanwhile, to fully leverage the unlabeled data, we introduce a soft-to-hard consistency learning strategy, learning from different targets based on prediction confidence. Experimental results show that our method can outperform state-of-the-art SSL approaches remarkably. Our proposed dataset is available at https://jhang2020.github.io/S5Mars.github.io/.
abstract_zh: 深度学习已成为火星探索的有力工具。火星地形语义分割是火星视觉的一项重要任务，是火星车自主规划和安全行驶的基础。然而，缺乏足够详细和高可信度的数据注释，而这正是大多数深度学习方法获得良好模型所需要的。为了解决这个问题，我们从联合数据和方法设计的角度提出了我们的解决方案。我们首先提出了一个用于火星语义分割半监督学习的新数据集 S5Mars，它包含 6K 高分辨率图像，并基于置信度进行稀疏注释，保证了标签的高质量。然后，为了从这些稀疏数据中学习，我们提出了一种用于火星图像语义分割的半监督学习（SSL）框架，以从有限的标记数据中学习表示。与现有的主要针对地球图像数据的SSL方法不同，我们的方法考虑了火星数据的特征。具体来说，我们首先研究当前广泛使用的自然图像增强对火星图像的影响。基于分析，我们提出了两种新颖且有效的火星分割 SSL 增强方法，AugIN 和 SAM-Mix，它们可以作为增强模型性能的强大增强方法。同时，为了充分利用未标记的数据，我们引入了软到硬的一致性学习策略，根据预测置信度从不同的目标中学习。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以显着优于最先进的 SSL 方法。我们提出的数据集可在 https://jhang2020.github.io/S5Mars.github.io/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出S$^5$Mars半监督学习框架，解决火星地形语义分割中标注数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 火星探测任务缺乏足够详细且高置信度的标注数据，而现有深度学习方法依赖大量标注数据，制约了模型性能。
AI.method: 构建包含6K高分辨率图像的稀疏标注数据集S5Mars，设计针对火星图像的AugIN和SAM-Mix增强方法，并提出基于预测置信度的软到硬一致性学习策略。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法显著优于现有最先进的半监督学习方法，有效提升火星图像语义分割性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合数据与方法设计，提出的S$^5$Mars框架为火星探测中的稀疏标注场景提供了有效的解决方案。

method: 构建包含6K高分辨率图像的稀疏标注数据集S5Mars，设计针对火星图像的AugIN和SAM-Mix增强方法，并提出基于预测置信度的软到硬一致性学习策略。
result: 实验表明该方法显著优于现有最先进的半监督学习方法，有效提升火星图像语义分割性能。
conclusion: 通过联合数据与方法设计，提出的S$^5$Mars框架为火星探测中的稀疏标注场景提供了有效的解决方案。
search_text: S$^{5}$Mars: Semi-Supervised Learning for Mars Semantic Segmentation S$^{5}$Mars：火星语义分割的半监督学习 Deep learning has become a powerful tool for Mars exploration. Mars terrain semantic segmentation is an important Martian vision task, which is the base of rover autonomous planning and safe driving. However, there is a lack of sufficient detailed and high-confidence data annotations, which are exactly required by most deep learning methods to obtain a good model. To address this problem, we propose our solution from the perspective of joint data and method design. We first present a newdataset S5Mars for Semi-SuperviSed learning on Mars Semantic Segmentation, which contains 6K high-resolution images and is sparsely annotated based on confidence, ensuring the high quality of labels. Then to learn from this sparse data, we propose a semi-supervised learning (SSL) framework for Mars image semantic segmentation, to learn representations from limited labeled data. Different from the existing SSL methods which are mostly targeted at the Earth image data, our method takes into account Mars data characteristics. Specifically, we first investigate the impact of current widely used natural image augmentations on Mars images. Based on the analysis, we then proposed two novel and effective augmentations for SSL of Mars segmentation, AugIN and SAM-Mix, which serve as strong augmentations to boost the model performance. Meanwhile, to fully leverage the unlabeled data, we introduce a soft-to-hard consistency learning strategy, learning from different targets based on prediction confidence. Experimental results show that our method can outperform state-of-the-art SSL approaches remarkably. Our proposed dataset is available at https://jhang2020.github.io/S5Mars.github.io/. 深度学习已成为火星探索的有力工具。火星地形语义分割是火星视觉的一项重要任务，是火星车自主规划和安全行驶的基础。然而，缺乏足够详细和高可信度的数据注释，而这正是大多数深度学习方法获得良好模型所需要的。为了解决这个问题，我们从联合数据和方法设计的角度提出了我们的解决方案。我们首先提出了一个用于火星语义分割半监督学习的新数据集 S5Mars，它包含 6K 高分辨率图像，并基于置信度进行稀疏注释，保证了标签的高质量。然后，为了从这些稀疏数据中学习，我们提出了一种用于火星图像语义分割的半监督学习（SSL）框架，以从有限的标记数据中学习表示。与现有的主要针对地球图像数据的SSL方法不同，我们的方法考虑了火星数据的特征。具体来说，我们首先研究当前广泛使用的自然图像增强对火星图像的影响。基于分析，我们提出了两种新颖且有效的火星分割 SSL 增强方法，AugIN 和 SAM-Mix，它们可以作为增强模型性能的强大增强方法。同时，为了充分利用未标记的数据，我们引入了软到硬的一致性学习策略，根据预测置信度从不同的目标中学习。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以显着优于最先进的 SSL 方法。我们提出的数据集可在 https://jhang2020.github.io/S5Mars.github.io/ 获取。 本文提出S$^5$Mars半监督学习框架，解决火星地形语义分割中标注数据不足的问题。 Jiahang Zhang,Lilang Lin,Zejia Fan,Wenjing Wang,Jiaying Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Jiahao Liang,Weihong Deng
title: Identifying Rhythmic Patterns for Face Forgery Detection and Categorization
title_zh: 识别节奏模式以进行人脸伪造检测和分类
abstract: With the emergence of GAN, face forgery technologies have been heavily abused. Achieving accurate face forgery detection is imminent. Inspired by remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) that PPG signal corresponds to the periodic change of skin color caused by heartbeat in face videos, we observe that despite the inevitable loss of PPG signal during the forgery process, there is still a mixture of PPG signals in the forgery video with a unique rhythmic pattern depending on its generation method. Motivated by this key observation, we propose a framework for face forgery detection and categorization consisting of: 1) a Spatial-Temporal Filtering Network (STFNet) for PPG signals filtering, and 2) a Spatial-Temporal Interaction Network (STINet) for constraint and interaction of PPG signals. Moreover, with insight into the generation of forgery methods, we further propose intra-source and inter-source blending to boost the performance of the framework. Overall, extensive experiments have proved the superiority of our method.
summary: With the emergence of GAN, face forgery technologies have been heavily abused. Achieving accurate face forgery detection is imminent. Inspired by remote photoplethysmography (rPPG) that PPG signal corresponds to the periodic change of skin color caused by heartbeat in face videos, we observe that despite the inevitable loss of PPG signal during the forgery process, there is still a mixture of PPG signals in the forgery video with a unique rhythmic pattern depending on its generation method. Motivated by this key observation, we propose a framework for face forgery detection and categorization consisting of: 1) a Spatial-Temporal Filtering Network (STFNet) for PPG signals filtering, and 2) a Spatial-Temporal Interaction Network (STINet) for constraint and interaction of PPG signals. Moreover, with insight into the generation of forgery methods, we further propose intra-source and inter-source blending to boost the performance of the framework. Overall, extensive experiments have proved the superiority of our method.
abstract_zh: 随着GAN的出现，人脸伪造技术被严重滥用。实现准确的人脸伪造检测迫在眉睫。受远程光电体积描记法（rPPG）的启发，PPG信号对应于人脸视频中心跳引起的肤色的周期性变化，我们观察到，尽管在伪造过程中PPG信号不可避免地丢失，但伪造视频中仍然存在PPG信号的混合，其具有独特的节奏模式，具体取决于其生成方法。受这一关键观察的启发，我们提出了一个人脸伪造检测和分类框架，包括：1）用于 PPG 信号过滤的时空过滤网络（STFNet），2）用于 PPG 信号约束和交互的时空交互网络（STINet）。此外，通过深入了解伪造方法的生成，我们进一步提出源内和源间混合以提高框架的性能。总的来说，大量的实验证明了我们方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于人脸伪造检测和分类的框架，利用PPG信号的节奏模式进行分析。
AI.motivation: 随着GAN技术的发展，人脸伪造技术被滥用，准确检测和分类人脸伪造变得至关重要。受远程光电容积描记法（rPPG）启发，尽管伪造过程中PPG信号会丢失，但伪造视频中仍存在与生成方法相关的独特节奏模式。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种包含空间-时间滤波网络（STFNet）和空间-时间交互网络（STINet）的框架，用于PPG信号过滤和约束交互。此外，还提出了源内和源间混合方法以增强框架性能。
AI.result: 广泛的实验表明，该方法在人脸伪造检测和分类任务中表现优异。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的框架能够有效检测和分类人脸伪造，利用PPG信号的节奏模式，为未来研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Tao Li,Xinsheng Wang,Qicong Xie,Zhichao Wang,Mingqi Jiang,Lei Xie
title: Cross-speaker Emotion Transfer Based On Prosody Compensation for End-to-End Speech Synthesis
title_zh: 基于韵律补偿的跨说话人情感传递端到端语音合成
abstract: Cross-speaker emotion transfer speech synthesis aims to synthesize emotional speech for a target speaker by transferring the emotion from reference speech recorded by another (source) speaker. In this task, extracting speaker-independent emotion embedding from reference speech plays an important role. However, the emotional information conveyed by such emotion embedding tends to be weakened in the process to squeeze out the source speaker's timbre information. In response to this problem, a prosody compensation module (PCM) is proposed in this paper to compensate for the emotional information loss. Specifically, the PCM tries to obtain speaker-independent emotional information from the intermediate feature of a pre-trained ASR model. To this end, a prosody compensation encoder with global context (GC) blocks is introduced to obtain global emotional information from the ASR model's intermediate feature. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed PCM can effectively compensate the emotion embedding for the emotional information loss, and meanwhile maintain the timbre of the target speaker. Comparisons with state-of-the-art models show that our proposed method presents obvious superiority on the cross-speaker emotion transfer task.
summary: Cross-speaker emotion transfer speech synthesis aims to synthesize emotional speech for a target speaker by transferring the emotion from reference speech recorded by another (source) speaker. In this task, extracting speaker-independent emotion embedding from reference speech plays an important role. However, the emotional information conveyed by such emotion embedding tends to be weakened in the process to squeeze out the source speaker's timbre information. In response to this problem, a prosody compensation module (PCM) is proposed in this paper to compensate for the emotional information loss. Specifically, the PCM tries to obtain speaker-independent emotional information from the intermediate feature of a pre-trained ASR model. To this end, a prosody compensation encoder with global context (GC) blocks is introduced to obtain global emotional information from the ASR model's intermediate feature. Experiments demonstrate that the proposed PCM can effectively compensate the emotion embedding for the emotional information loss, and meanwhile maintain the timbre of the target speaker. Comparisons with state-of-the-art models show that our proposed method presents obvious superiority on the cross-speaker emotion transfer task.
abstract_zh: 跨说话人情感转移语音合成旨在通过从另一个（源）说话人录制的参考语音转移情感来合成目标说话人的情感语音。在此任务中，从参考语音中提取与说话人无关的情感嵌入发挥着重要作用。然而，这种情感嵌入所传达的情感信息在挤出源说话者音色信息的过程中往往会被削弱。针对这一问题，本文提出韵律补偿模块（PCM）来补偿情感信息损失。具体来说，PCM 尝试从预训练的 ASR 模型的中间特征中获取与说话者无关的情感信息。为此，引入了具有全局上下文（GC）块的韵律补偿编码器，以从ASR模型的中间特征中获取全局情感信息。实验表明，所提出的PCM可以有效补偿情感嵌入中的情感信息损失，同时保持目标说话人的音色。与最先进的模型的比较表明，我们提出的方法在跨说话者情感转移任务上表现出明显的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于韵律补偿的跨说话人情感迁移方法，用于端到端语音合成，解决情感信息在迁移过程中丢失的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在提取说话人无关情感嵌入时，情感信息易被源说话人音色特征削弱，导致情感迁移效果下降。
AI.method: 设计韵律补偿模块（PCM），通过预训练ASR模型的中间特征提取全局情感信息，并引入全局上下文（GC）块增强情感表征。
AI.result: 实验表明PCM能有效补偿情感信息损失，保持目标说话人音色，且在跨说话人情感迁移任务中优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 提出的韵律补偿方法成功解决了情感迁移中的信息损失问题，在保持音色的同时提升了情感合成质量。

authors_text: Xiaoyu Wang,Xiangyu Kong,Xiulian Peng,Yan Lu
title: Multi-Modal Multi-Correlation Learning for Audio-Visual Speech Separation
title_zh: 用于视听语音分离的多模态多相关学习
abstract: In this paper we propose a multi-modal multi-correlation learning framework targeting at the task of audio-visual speech separation. Although previous efforts have been extensively put on combining audio and visual modalities, most of them solely adopt a straightforward concatenation of audio and visual features. To exploit the real useful information behind these two modalities, we define two key correlations which are: (1) identity correlation (between timbre and facial attributes); (2) phonetic correlation (between phoneme and lip motion). These two correlations together comprise the complete information, which shows a certain superiority in separating target speaker's voice especially in some hard cases, such as the same gender or similar content. For implementation, contrastive learning or adversarial training approach is applied to maximize these two correlations. Both of them work well, while adversarial training shows its advantage by avoiding some limitations of contrastive learning. Compared with previous research, our solution demonstrates clear improvement on experimental metrics without additional complexity. Further analysis reveals the validity of the proposed architecture and its good potential for future extension.
summary: In this paper we propose a multi-modal multi-correlation learning framework targeting at the task of audio-visual speech separation. Although previous efforts have been extensively put on combining audio and visual modalities, most of them solely adopt a straightforward concatenation of audio and visual features. To exploit the real useful information behind these two modalities, we define two key correlations which are: (1) identity correlation (between timbre and facial attributes); (2) phonetic correlation (between phoneme and lip motion). These two correlations together comprise the complete information, which shows a certain superiority in separating target speaker's voice especially in some hard cases, such as the same gender or similar content. For implementation, contrastive learning or adversarial training approach is applied to maximize these two correlations. Both of them work well, while adversarial training shows its advantage by avoiding some limitations of contrastive learning. Compared with previous research, our solution demonstrates clear improvement on experimental metrics without additional complexity. Further analysis reveals the validity of the proposed architecture and its good potential for future extension.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种针对视听语音分离任务的多模态多相关学习框架。尽管以前的努力已经广泛地致力于将音频和视觉模式相结合，但大多数都只是采用音频和视觉特征的简单串联。为了利用这两种模式背后真正有用的信息，我们定义了两个关键相关性：（1）身份相关性（音色和面部属性之间）； (2)语音相关性(音素和唇形之间)。这两种相关性共同构成了完整的信息，在分离目标说话人的语音方面表现出一定的优越性，特别是在一些困难的情况下，例如相同性别或相似内容。为了实现，应用对比学习或对抗训练方法来最大化这两种相关性。两者都效果很好，而对抗性训练则通过避免对比学习的一些局限性而显示出其优势。与之前的研究相比，我们的解决方案显示了实验指标的明显改进，而没有增加复杂性。进一步的分析揭示了所提出的架构的有效性及其未来扩展的良好潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态多相关性学习框架，用于音频-视觉语音分离任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法多采用简单拼接音频和视觉特征，未能有效利用模态间的关键关联信息，导致在性别相同或内容相似等复杂场景下分离效果受限。
AI.method: 定义身份相关性（声纹与面部属性）和音素相关性（音素与唇部运动）两大核心关联，通过对比学习或对抗训练最大化这些相关性，其中对抗训练因避免对比学习局限性而表现更优。
AI.result: 在实验指标上较现有方法有显著提升，且未增加模型复杂度，进一步分析验证了架构有效性及扩展潜力。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架通过挖掘模态间深层关联，在复杂场景下实现更优语音分离，为未来研究提供可行方向。

search_text: Multi-Modal Multi-Correlation Learning for Audio-Visual Speech Separation 用于视听语音分离的多模态多相关学习 In this paper we propose a multi-modal multi-correlation learning framework targeting at the task of audio-visual speech separation. Although previous efforts have been extensively put on combining audio and visual modalities, most of them solely adopt a straightforward concatenation of audio and visual features. To exploit the real useful information behind these two modalities, we define two key correlations which are: (1) identity correlation (between timbre and facial attributes); (2) phonetic correlation (between phoneme and lip motion). These two correlations together comprise the complete information, which shows a certain superiority in separating target speaker's voice especially in some hard cases, such as the same gender or similar content. For implementation, contrastive learning or adversarial training approach is applied to maximize these two correlations. Both of them work well, while adversarial training shows its advantage by avoiding some limitations of contrastive learning. Compared with previous research, our solution demonstrates clear improvement on experimental metrics without additional complexity. authors_text: Jiashu Wu
title: Learning to Rank with Small Set of Ground Truth Data
title_zh: 学习使用少量真实数据进行排名
comment: Master thesis at the University of Melbourne
comments: Master thesis at the University of Melbourne
abstract: Over the past decades, researchers had put lots of effort investigating ranking techniques used to rank query results retrieved during information retrieval, or to rank the recommended products in recommender systems. In this project, we aim to investigate searching, ranking, as well as recommendation techniques to help to realize a university academia searching platform. Unlike the usual information retrieval scenarios where lots of ground truth ranking data is present, in our case, we have only limited ground truth knowledge regarding the academia ranking. For instance, given some search queries, we only know a few researchers who are highly relevant and thus should be ranked at the top, and for some other search queries, we have no knowledge about which researcher should be ranked at the top at all. The limited amount of ground truth data makes some of the conventional ranking techniques and evaluation metrics become infeasible, and this is a huge challenge we faced during this project. This project enhances the user's academia searching experience to a large extent, it helps to achieve an academic searching platform which includes researchers, publications and fields of study information, which will be beneficial not only to the university faculties but also to students' research experiences.
summary: Over the past decades, researchers had put lots of effort investigating ranking techniques used to rank query results retrieved during information retrieval, or to rank the recommended products in recommender systems. In this project, we aim to investigate searching, ranking, as well as recommendation techniques to help to realize a university academia searching platform. Unlike the usual information retrieval scenarios where lots of ground truth ranking data is present, in our case, we have only limited ground truth knowledge regarding the academia ranking. For instance, given some search queries, we only know a few researchers who are highly relevant and thus should be ranked at the top, and for some other search queries, we have no knowledge about which researcher should be ranked at the top at all. The limited amount of ground truth data makes some of the conventional ranking techniques and evaluation metrics become infeasible, and this is a huge challenge we faced during this project. This project enhances the user's academia searching experience to a large extent, it helps to achieve an academic searching platform which includes researchers, publications and fields of study information, which will be beneficial not only to the university faculties but also to students' research experiences.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几十年里，研究人员投入了大量的精力来研究排名技术，用于对信息检索期间检索到的查询结果进行排名，或对推荐系统中的推荐产品进行排名。在这个项目中，我们的目标是研究搜索、排名和推荐技术，以帮助实现大学学术界的搜索平台。与存在大量真实排名数据的通常信息检索场景不同，在我们的例子中，我们只有关于学术界排名的有限真实知识。例如，给定一些搜索查询，我们只知道一些高度相关的研究人员，因此应该排名在顶部，而对于其他一些搜索查询，我们根本不知道哪个研究人员应该排名在顶部。有限的真实数据使得一些传统的排名技术和评估指标变得不可行，这是我们在这个项目中面临的巨大挑战。该项目在很大程度上增强了用户的学术搜索体验，有助于实现一个包含研究人员、出版物和研究领域信息的学术搜索平台，这不仅有利于大学教师，也有利于学生的研究体验。

AI.tldr: 研究在有限真实数据情况下开发排序与推荐技术，以构建大学学术搜索平台。
AI.motivation: 传统排序技术依赖大量真实数据，但学术搜索场景中真实数据稀缺，需解决此限制以提升搜索体验。
AI.method: 采用适应小样本数据的排序算法，结合有限的高质量标注数据优化模型。
AI.result: 成功构建包含研究人员、论文及学科信息的学术搜索平台，显著提升用户搜索效率。
AI.conclusion: 在真实数据有限的场景下，通过改进排序方法仍可实现有效的学术搜索系统。

authors_text: Tianping Zhang,Yizhuo Zhang,Wei Cao,Jiang Bian,Xiaohan Yi,Shun Zheng,Jian Li
title: Less Is More: Fast Multivariate Time Series Forecasting with Light Sampling-oriented MLP Structures
title_zh: 少即是多：使用面向轻采样的 MLP 结构进行快速多元时间序列预测
abstract: Multivariate time series forecasting has seen widely ranging applications in various domains, including finance, traffic, energy, and healthcare. To capture the sophisticated temporal patterns, plenty of research studies designed complex neural network architectures based on many variants of RNNs, GNNs, and Transformers. However, complex models are often computationally expensive and thus face a severe challenge in training and inference efficiency when applied to large-scale real-world datasets. In this paper, we introduce LightTS, a light deep learning architecture merely based on simple MLP-based structures. The key idea of LightTS is to apply an MLP-based structure on top of two delicate down-sampling strategies, including interval sampling and continuous sampling, inspired by a crucial fact that down-sampling time series often preserves the majority of its information. We conduct extensive experiments on eight widely used benchmark datasets. Compared with the existing state-of-the-art methods, LightTS demonstrates better performance on five of them and comparable performance on the rest. Moreover, LightTS is highly efficient. It uses less than 5% FLOPS compared with previous SOTA methods on the largest benchmark dataset. In addition, LightTS is robust and has a much smaller variance in forecasting accuracy than previous SOTA methods in long sequence forecasting tasks.
summary: Multivariate time series forecasting has seen widely ranging applications in various domains, including finance, traffic, energy, and healthcare. To capture the sophisticated temporal patterns, plenty of research studies designed complex neural network architectures based on many variants of RNNs, GNNs, and Transformers. However, complex models are often computationally expensive and thus face a severe challenge in training and inference efficiency when applied to large-scale real-world datasets. In this paper, we introduce LightTS, a light deep learning architecture merely based on simple MLP-based structures. The key idea of LightTS is to apply an MLP-based structure on top of two delicate down-sampling strategies, including interval sampling and continuous sampling, inspired by a crucial fact that down-sampling time series often preserves the majority of its information. We conduct extensive experiments on eight widely used benchmark datasets. Compared with the existing state-of-the-art methods, LightTS demonstrates better performance on five of them and comparable performance on the rest. Moreover, LightTS is highly efficient. It uses less than 5% FLOPS compared with previous SOTA methods on the largest benchmark dataset. In addition, LightTS is robust and has a much smaller variance in forecasting accuracy than previous SOTA methods in long sequence forecasting tasks.
abstract_zh: 多元时间序列预测在金融、交通、能源和医疗保健等各个领域都有广泛的应用。为了捕捉复杂的时间模式，大量研究设计了基于 RNN、GNN 和 Transformer 的多种变体的复杂神经网络架构。然而，复杂模型的计算成本通常很高，因此在应用于大规模现实世界数据集时，在训练和推理效率方面面临着严峻的挑战。在本文中，我们介绍了 LightTS，这是一种仅基于简单的 MLP 结构的轻型深度学习架构。 LightTS 的关键思想是在两种精细的下采样策略（包括间隔采样和连续采样）之上应用基于 MLP 的结构，其灵感来自于下采样时间序列通常保留其大部分信息的一个重要事实。我们对八个广泛使用的基准数据集进行了广泛的实验。与现有最先进的方法相比，LightTS 在其中五个方法上表现出更好的性能，在其余方法上表现出相当的性能。而且，LightTS 效率很高。与之前的 SOTA 方法相比，它在最大的基准数据集上使用的 FLOPS 不到 5%。此外，LightTS 具有鲁棒性，在长序列预测任务中，与之前的 SOTA 方法相比，预测精度的方差要小得多。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于轻量级MLP结构的多变量时间序列预测方法LightTS，通过下采样策略提升效率。
AI.motivation: 现有复杂模型（如RNN、Transformer）在处理大规模时间序列时计算成本高，而简单结构可能保留更多信息且更高效。
AI.method: 设计LightTS架构，结合区间采样和连续采样两种下采样策略，利用MLP捕捉时间特征，减少计算量。
AI.result: 在8个基准数据集上，LightTS在5个数据集上优于现有方法，其余表现相当，且计算量仅为SOTA方法的5%以下，长序列预测稳定性更优。
AI.conclusion: LightTS证明了通过合理下采样与简化结构可实现高效且准确的多变量时间序列预测，为实际应用提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于轻量级MLP结构的多变量时间序列预测方法LightTS，通过下采样策略提升效率。
ai_content.motivation: 现有复杂模型（如RNN、Transformer）在处理大规模时间序列时计算成本高，而简单结构可能保留更多信息且更高效。
ai_content.method: 设计LightTS架构，结合区间采样和连续采样两种下采样策略，利用MLP捕捉时间特征，减少计算量。
ai_content.result: 在8个基准数据集上，LightTS在5个数据集上优于现有方法，其余表现相当，且计算量仅为SOTA方法的5%以下，长序列预测稳定性更优。
ai_content.conclusion: LightTS证明了通过合理下采样与简化结构可实现高效且准确的多变量时间序列预测，为实际应用提供新思路。

search_text: Less Is More: Fast Multivariate Time Series Forecasting with Light Sampling-oriented MLP Structures 少即是多：使用面向轻采样的 MLP 结构进行快速多元时间序列预测 Multivariate time series forecasting has seen widely ranging applications in various domains, including finance, traffic, energy, and healthcare. To capture the sophisticated temporal patterns, plenty of research studies designed complex neural network architectures based on many variants of RNNs, GNNs, and Transformers. However, complex models are often computationally expensive and thus face a severe challenge in training and inference efficiency when applied to large-scale real-world datasets. In this paper, we introduce LightTS, a light deep learning architecture merely based on simple MLP-based structures. The key idea of LightTS is to apply an MLP-based structure on top of two delicate down-sampling strategies, including interval sampling and continuous sampling, inspired by a crucial fact that down-sampling time series often preserves the majority of its information. We conduct extensive experiments on eight widely used benchmark datasets. Compared with the existing state-of-the-art methods, LightTS demonstrates better performance on five of them and comparable performance on the rest. Moreover, LightTS is highly efficient. It uses less than 5% FLOPS compared with previous SOTA methods on the largest benchmark dataset. In addition, LightTS is robust and has a much smaller variance in forecasting accuracy than previous SOTA methods in long sequence forecasting tasks. 多元时间序列预测在金融、交通、能源和医疗保健等各个领域都有广泛的应用。为了捕捉复杂的时间模式，大量研究设计了基于 RNN、GNN 和 Transformer 的多种变体的复杂神经网络架构。然而，复杂模型的计算成本通常很高，因此在应用于大规模现实世界数据集时，在训练和推理效率方面面临着严峻的挑战。在本文中，我们介绍了 LightTS，这是一种仅基于简单的 MLP 结构的轻型深度学习架构。 LightTS 的关键思想是在两种精细的下采样策略（包括间隔采样和连续采样）之上应用基于 MLP 的结构，其灵感来自于下采样时间序列通常保留其大部分信息的一个重要事实。我们对八个广泛使用的基准数据集进行了广泛的实验。与现有最先进的方法相比，LightTS 在其中五个方法上表现出更好的性能，在其余方法上表现出相当的性能。而且，LightTS 效率很高。与之前的 SOTA 方法相比，它在最大的基准数据集上使用的 FLOPS 不到 5%。此外，LightTS 具有鲁棒性，在长序列预测任务中，与之前的 SOTA 方法相比，预测精度的方差要小得多。 本文提出了一种基于轻量级MLP结构的多变量时间序列预测方法LightTS，通过下采样策略提升效率。 Tianping Zhang,Yizhuo Zhang,Wei Cao,Jiang Bian,Xiaohan Yi,Shun Zheng,Jian Li cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Sandy Ardianto,Hsueh-Ming Hang,Wen-Huang Cheng
title: Fast Vehicle Detection and Tracking on Fisheye Traffic Monitoring Video using CNN and Bounding Box Propagation
title_zh: 使用 CNN 和边界框传播对鱼眼交通监控视频进行快速车辆检测和跟踪
comment: to be published in International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP) 2022, Bordeaux, France
comments: to be published in International Conference on Image Processing (ICIP) 2022, Bordeaux, France
abstract: We design a fast car detection and tracking algorithm for traffic monitoring fisheye video mounted on crossroads. We use ICIP 2020 VIP Cup dataset and adopt YOLOv5 as the object detection base model. The nighttime video of this dataset is very challenging, and the detection accuracy (AP50) of the base model is about 54%. We design a reliable car detection and tracking algorithm based on the concept of bounding box propagation among frames, which provides 17.9 percentage points (pp) and 6.2 pp. accuracy improvement over the base model for the nighttime and daytime videos, respectively. To speed up, the grayscale frame difference is used for the intermediate frames in a segment, which can double the processing speed.
summary: We design a fast car detection and tracking algorithm for traffic monitoring fisheye video mounted on crossroads. We use ICIP 2020 VIP Cup dataset and adopt YOLOv5 as the object detection base model. The nighttime video of this dataset is very challenging, and the detection accuracy (AP50) of the base model is about 54%. We design a reliable car detection and tracking algorithm based on the concept of bounding box propagation among frames, which provides 17.9 percentage points (pp) and 6.2 pp. accuracy improvement over the base model for the nighttime and daytime videos, respectively. To speed up, the grayscale frame difference is used for the intermediate frames in a segment, which can double the processing speed.
abstract_zh: 我们设计了一种快速汽车检测和跟踪算法，用于安装在十字路口的交通监控鱼眼视频。我们使用 ICIP 2020 VIP Cup 数据集，并采用 YOLOv5 作为目标检测基础模型。该数据集的夜间视频非常具有挑战性，基础模型的检测准确率（AP50）约为54%。我们基于帧间边界框传播的概念设计了可靠的汽车检测和跟踪算法，与夜间和白天视频的基本模型相比，其准确度分别提高了 17.9 个百分点 (pp) 和 6.2 个百分点。为了加快速度，对一段中的中间帧使用灰度帧差，这可以使处理速度加倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合CNN和边界框传播的快速车辆检测与跟踪算法，用于鱼眼交通监控视频。
AI.motivation: 解决鱼眼交通监控视频中夜间检测准确率低、处理速度慢的问题，提升交通管理效率。
AI.method: 基于YOLOv5模型引入边界框传播技术，并采用灰度帧差加速中间帧处理。
AI.result: 夜间视频准确率提升17.9%，白天提升6.2%，处理速度提高至原两倍。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效平衡了检测精度与实时性，适用于复杂场景的交通监控需求。

authors_text: Haoyi Xiu,Xin Liu,Weimin Wang,Kyoung-Sook Kim,Takayuki Shinohara,Qiong Chang,Masashi Matsuoka
title: Enhancing Local Geometry Learning for 3D Point Cloud via Decoupling Convolution
title_zh: 通过解耦卷积增强 3D 点云的局部几何学习
abstract: Modeling the local surface geometry is challenging in 3D point cloud understanding due to the lack of connectivity information. Most prior works model local geometry using various convolution operations. We observe that the convolution can be equivalently decomposed as a weighted combination of a local and a global component. With this observation, we explicitly decouple these two components so that the local one can be enhanced and facilitate the learning of local surface geometry. Specifically, we propose Laplacian Unit (LU), a simple yet effective architectural unit that can enhance the learning of local geometry. Extensive experiments demonstrate that networks equipped with LUs achieve competitive or superior performance on typical point cloud understanding tasks. Moreover, through establishing connections between the mean curvature flow, a further investigation of LU based on curvatures is made to interpret the adaptive smoothing and sharpening effect of LU. The code will be available.
summary: Modeling the local surface geometry is challenging in 3D point cloud understanding due to the lack of connectivity information. Most prior works model local geometry using various convolution operations. We observe that the convolution can be equivalently decomposed as a weighted combination of a local and a global component. With this observation, we explicitly decouple these two components so that the local one can be enhanced and facilitate the learning of local surface geometry. Specifically, we propose Laplacian Unit (LU), a simple yet effective architectural unit that can enhance the learning of local geometry. Extensive experiments demonstrate that networks equipped with LUs achieve competitive or superior performance on typical point cloud understanding tasks. Moreover, through establishing connections between the mean curvature flow, a further investigation of LU based on curvatures is made to interpret the adaptive smoothing and sharpening effect of LU. The code will be available.
abstract_zh: 由于缺乏连通性信息，对 3D 点云理解中的局部表面几何建模具有挑战性。大多数先前的作品使用各种卷积运算来模拟局部几何。我们观察到，卷积可以等效地分解为局部和全局分量的加权组合。通过这一观察，我们明确地将这两个组件解耦，以便增强局部组件并促进局部表面几何形状的学习。具体来说，我们提出了拉普拉斯单元（LU），一种简单而有效的架构单元，可以增强局部几何的学习。大量实验表明，配备 LU 的网络在典型的点云理解任务上实现了具有竞争力或优越的性能。此外，通过建立平均曲率流之间的联系，对基于曲率的LU进行了进一步的研究，以解释LU的自适应平滑和锐化效果。该代码将可用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过解耦卷积操作来增强3D点云的局部几何学习，解决传统方法在建模局部曲面几何时的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统3D点云处理方法因缺乏连接信息导致局部几何建模困难，而现有卷积操作未能有效区分局部与全局特征，限制了模型性能。
AI.method: 将卷积分解为局部与全局加权组合，提出Laplacian Unit（LU）结构单元以增强局部几何学习，并结合曲率流理论解释其自适应平滑与锐化机制。
AI.result: 实验表明，引入LU的网络在典型点云任务中表现优于或媲美现有方法，且理论分析验证了其对局部几何特征的增强效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过解耦卷积与Laplacian Unit设计，本文有效提升了3D点云局部几何学习能力，为相关任务提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yusuke Tanaka,Yuki Shirai,Xuan Lin,Alexander Schperberg,Hayato Kato,Alexander Swerdlow,Naoya Kumagai,Dennis Hong
title: SCALER: A Tough Versatile Quadruped Free-Climber Robot
title_zh: SCALER：坚固耐用的多功能四足自由攀登机器人
comment: Proceeding to IROS 2022, Preprint and not a final version
comments: Proceeding to IROS 2022, Preprint and not a final version
abstract: This paper introduces SCALER, a quadrupedal robot that demonstrates climbing on bouldering walls, overhangs, ceilings and trotting on the ground. SCALER is one of the first high-degrees of freedom four-limbed robots that can free-climb under the Earth's gravity and one of the most mechanically efficient quadrupeds on the ground. Where other state-of-the-art climbers specialize in climbing, SCALER promises practical free-climbing with payload \textit{and} ground locomotion, which realizes true versatile mobility. A new climbing gait, SKATE gait, increases the payload by utilizing the SCALER body linkage mechanism. SCALER achieves a maximum normalized locomotion speed of $1.87$ /s, or $0.56$ m/s on the ground and $1.0$ /min, or $0.35$ m/min in bouldering wall climbing. Payload capacity reaches $233$ % of the SCALER weight on the ground and $35$ % on the vertical wall. Our GOAT gripper, a mechanically adaptable underactuated two-finger gripper, successfully grasps convex and non-convex objects and supports SCALER.
summary: This paper introduces SCALER, a quadrupedal robot that demonstrates climbing on bouldering walls, overhangs, ceilings and trotting on the ground. SCALER is one of the first high-degrees of freedom four-limbed robots that can free-climb under the Earth's gravity and one of the most mechanically efficient quadrupeds on the ground. Where other state-of-the-art climbers specialize in climbing, SCALER promises practical free-climbing with payload \textit{and} ground locomotion, which realizes true versatile mobility. A new climbing gait, SKATE gait, increases the payload by utilizing the SCALER body linkage mechanism. SCALER achieves a maximum normalized locomotion speed of $1.87$ /s, or $0.56$ m/s on the ground and $1.0$ /min, or $0.35$ m/min in bouldering wall climbing. Payload capacity reaches $233$ % of the SCALER weight on the ground and $35$ % on the vertical wall. Our GOAT gripper, a mechanically adaptable underactuated two-finger gripper, successfully grasps convex and non-convex objects and supports SCALER.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 SCALER，这是一种四足机器人，可以演示攀爬抱石墙、悬垂物、天花板以及在地面上小跑。 SCALER 是首批可在地球重力作用下自由攀爬的高自由度四肢机器人之一，也是地面上机械效率最高的四足机器人之一。其他最先进的登山者专注于攀爬，而 SCALER 则承诺通过有效负载\textit{和}地面运动进行实用的自由攀爬，从而实现真正的多功能移动性。 SKATE 步态是一种新的攀爬步态，利用 SCALER 身体连杆机构增加有效负载。 SCALER 在地面上的最大归一化运动速度为 $1.87$/s，即 $0.56$m/s；在抱石墙攀爬中，最大标准化运动速度为 $1.0$/min，即 $0.35$m/min。有效负载能力在地面上达到 SCALER 重量的 233$%，在垂直墙上达到 $35$%。我们的 GOAT 夹具是一种机械适应性欠驱动两指夹具，可成功抓取凸面和非凸面物体并支持 SCALER。

AI.motivation: 现有攀爬机器人多专注于单一功能，缺乏地面移动与负载能力的结合，SCALER旨在实现真正实用化的多功能移动。
AI.method: 通过设计新型SKATE步态利用身体联动机制提升负载能力，并开发机械自适应的GOAT夹爪以抓取凸起和非凸起物体。
AI.result: SCALER地面移动速度达0.56 m/s，攀爬速度0.35 m/min，负载能力为自重的233%（地面）和35%（垂直墙）。
AI.conclusion: SCALER通过创新步态与夹爪设计，实现了负载攀爬与地面移动的结合，为四足机器人多功能化提供了重要参考。

search_text: SCALER: A Tough Versatile Quadruped Free-Climber Robot SCALER：坚固耐用的多功能四足自由攀登机器人 This paper introduces SCALER, a quadrupedal robot that demonstrates climbing on bouldering walls, overhangs, ceilings and trotting on the ground. SCALER is one of the first high-degrees of freedom four-limbed robots that can free-climb under the Earth's gravity and one of the most mechanically efficient quadrupeds on the ground. Where other state-of-the-art climbers specialize in climbing, SCALER promises practical free-climbing with payload \textit{and} ground locomotion, which realizes true versatile mobility. A new climbing gait, SKATE gait, increases the payload by utilizing the SCALER body linkage mechanism. SCALER achieves a maximum normalized locomotion speed of $1.87$ /s, or $0.56$ m/s on the ground and $1.0$ /min, or $0.35$ m/min in bouldering wall climbing. Payload capacity reaches $233$ % of the SCALER weight on the ground and $35$ % on the vertical wall. Our GOAT gripper, a mechanically adaptable underactuated two-finger gripper, successfully grasps convex and non-convex objects and supports SCALER. 本文介绍了 SCALER，这是一种四足机器人，可以演示攀爬抱石墙、悬垂物、天花板以及在地面上小跑。 SCALER 是首批可在地球重力作用下自由攀爬的高自由度四肢机器人之一，也是地面上机械效率最高的四足机器人之一。其他最先进的登山者专注于攀爬，而 SCALER 则承诺通过有效负载\textit{和}地面运动进行实用的自由攀爬，从而实现真正的多功能移动性。 SKATE 步态是一种新的攀爬步态，利用 SCALER 身体连杆机构增加有效负载。 SCALER 在地面上的最大归一化运动速度为 $1.87$/s，即 $0.56$m/s；在抱石墙攀爬中，最大标准化运动速度为 $1.0$/min，即 $0.35$m/min。有效负载能力在地面上达到 SCALER 重量的 233$%，在垂直墙上达到 $35$%。我们的 GOAT 夹具是一种机械适应性欠驱动两指夹具，可成功抓取凸面和非凸面物体并支持 SCALER。 本文介绍了一种名为SCALER的四足机器人，能够在岩壁、天花板等复杂地形攀爬并实现地面行走，展示了其高自由度和机械效率。 Yusuke Tanaka,Yuki Shirai,Xuan Lin,Alexander Schperberg,Hayato Kato,Alexander Swerdlow,Naoya Kumagai,Dennis Hong cs.RO

authors_text: Haoyi Xiu,Xin Liu,Weimin Wang,Kyoung-Sook Kim,Takayuki Shinohara,Qiong Chang,Masashi Matsuoka
title: Enhancing Local Feature Learning Using Diffusion for 3D Point Cloud Understanding
title_zh: 使用扩散增强局部特征学习以实现 3D 点云理解
abstract: Learning point clouds is challenging due to the lack of connectivity information, i.e., edges. Although existing edge-aware methods can improve the performance by modeling edges, how edges contribute to the improvement is unclear. In this study, we propose a method that automatically learns to enhance/suppress edges while keeping the its working mechanism clear. First, we theoretically figure out how edge enhancement/suppression works. Second, we experimentally verify the edge enhancement/suppression behavior. Third, we empirically show that this behavior improves performance. In general, we observe that the proposed method achieves competitive performance in point cloud classification and segmentation tasks.
summary: Learning point clouds is challenging due to the lack of connectivity information, i.e., edges. Although existing edge-aware methods can improve the performance by modeling edges, how edges contribute to the improvement is unclear. In this study, we propose a method that automatically learns to enhance/suppress edges while keeping the its working mechanism clear. First, we theoretically figure out how edge enhancement/suppression works. Second, we experimentally verify the edge enhancement/suppression behavior. Third, we empirically show that this behavior improves performance. In general, we observe that the proposed method achieves competitive performance in point cloud classification and segmentation tasks.
abstract_zh: 由于缺乏连接信息（即边缘），学习点云具有挑战性。尽管现有的边缘感知方法可以通过对边缘建模来提高性能，但边缘如何促进改进尚不清楚。在本研究中，我们提出了一种自动学习增强/抑制边缘的方法，同时保持其工作机制清晰。首先，我们从理论上弄清楚边缘增强/抑制是如何工作的。其次，我们通过实验验证边缘增强/抑制行为。第三，我们凭经验证明这种行为可以提高绩效。总的来说，我们观察到所提出的方法在点云分类和分割任务中实现了有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于扩散方法的3D点云理解技术，通过增强/抑制局部特征中的边信息来提升点云分类和分割性能。
AI.motivation: 点云数据缺乏连接信息（边）导致学习困难，现有边感知方法虽能提升性能但机制不明确，需探索清晰有效的边增强/抑制方法。
AI.method: 理论分析边增强/抑制机制，通过实验验证其行为，并在分类和分割任务中实证其性能提升效果。
AI.result: 该方法在点云分类和分割任务中取得与现有方法相当的竞争力性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过明确的边增强/抑制机制，本文方法有效提升了3D点云理解的性能，为后续研究提供了清晰的理论支持。

authors_text: Chang Liu,Gang Yang,Shuo Wang,Hangxu Wang,Yunhua Zhang,Yutao Wang
title: TANet: Transformer-based Asymmetric Network for RGB-D Salient Object Detection
title_zh: TANet：基于 Transformer 的非对称网络，用于 RGB-D 显着目标检测
abstract: Existing RGB-D SOD methods mainly rely on a symmetric two-stream CNN-based network to extract RGB and depth channel features separately. However, there are two problems with the symmetric conventional network structure: first, the ability of CNN in learning global contexts is limited; second, the symmetric two-stream structure ignores the inherent differences between modalities. In this paper, we propose a Transformer-based asymmetric network (TANet) to tackle the issues mentioned above. We employ the powerful feature extraction capability of Transformer (PVTv2) to extract global semantic information from RGB data and design a lightweight CNN backbone (LWDepthNet) to extract spatial structure information from depth data without pre-training. The asymmetric hybrid encoder (AHE) effectively reduces the number of parameters in the model while increasing speed without sacrificing performance. Then, we design a cross-modal feature fusion module (CMFFM), which enhances and fuses RGB and depth features with each other. Finally, we add edge prediction as an auxiliary task and propose an edge enhancement module (EEM) to generate sharper contours. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance over 14 state-of-the-art RGB-D methods on six public datasets. Our code will be released at https://github.com/lc012463/TANet.
summary: Existing RGB-D SOD methods mainly rely on a symmetric two-stream CNN-based network to extract RGB and depth channel features separately. However, there are two problems with the symmetric conventional network structure: first, the ability of CNN in learning global contexts is limited; second, the symmetric two-stream structure ignores the inherent differences between modalities. In this paper, we propose a Transformer-based asymmetric network (TANet) to tackle the issues mentioned above. We employ the powerful feature extraction capability of Transformer (PVTv2) to extract global semantic information from RGB data and design a lightweight CNN backbone (LWDepthNet) to extract spatial structure information from depth data without pre-training. The asymmetric hybrid encoder (AHE) effectively reduces the number of parameters in the model while increasing speed without sacrificing performance. Then, we design a cross-modal feature fusion module (CMFFM), which enhances and fuses RGB and depth features with each other. Finally, we add edge prediction as an auxiliary task and propose an edge enhancement module (EEM) to generate sharper contours. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance over 14 state-of-the-art RGB-D methods on six public datasets. Our code will be released at https://github.com/lc012463/TANet.
abstract_zh: 现有的RGB-D SOD方法主要依靠基于对称双流CNN的网络来分别提取RGB和深度通道特征。然而，对称的传统网络结构存在两个问题：首先，CNN学习全局上下文的能力有限；其次，对称双流结构忽略了模态之间的固有差异。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的非对称网络（TANet）来解决上述问题。我们利用 Transformer (PVTv2) 强大的特征提取能力从 RGB 数据中提取全局语义信息，并设计一个轻量级 CNN 主干 (LWDepthNet)，无需预训练即可从深度数据中提取空间结构信息。非对称混合编码器（AHE）有效减少了模型中的参数数量，同时在不牺牲性能的情况下提高了速度。然后，我们设计了一个跨模态特征融合模块（CMFFM），它增强并融合了 RGB 和深度特征。最后，我们添加边缘预测作为辅助任务，并提出边缘增强模块（EEM）来生成更清晰的轮廓。大量实验表明，我们的方法在 6 个公共数据集上实现了比 14 种最先进的 RGB-D 方法更优越的性能。我们的代码将在 https://github.com/lc012463/TANet 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出TANet，一种基于Transformer的非对称网络，用于RGB-D显著性物体检测，解决现有对称双流CNN结构的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有RGB-D显著性检测方法采用对称双流CNN，存在全局上下文学习能力有限及忽略模态差异的问题。
AI.method: 采用Transformer（PVTv2）提取RGB全局语义信息，设计轻量CNN（LWDepthNet）处理深度数据，结合非对称混合编码器（AHE）与跨模态融合模块（CMFFM），并引入边缘增强模块（EEM）优化轮廓。
AI.result: 在六个公开数据集上优于14种先进方法，模型参数减少且速度提升。
AI.conclusion: TANet通过非对称结构与跨模态融合有效提升RGB-D显著性检测性能，兼顾效率与精度。

search_text: TANet: Transformer-based Asymmetric Network for RGB-D Salient Object Detection TANet：基于 Transformer 的非对称网络，用于 RGB-D 显着目标检测 Existing RGB-D SOD methods mainly rely on a symmetric two-stream CNN-based network to extract RGB and depth channel features separately. However, there are two problems with the symmetric conventional network structure: first, the ability of CNN in learning global contexts is limited; second, the symmetric two-stream structure ignores the inherent differences between modalities. In this paper, we propose a Transformer-based asymmetric network (TANet) to tackle the issues mentioned above. We employ the powerful feature extraction capability of Transformer (PVTv2) to extract global semantic information from RGB data and design a lightweight CNN backbone (LWDepthNet) to extract spatial structure information from depth data without pre-training. The asymmetric hybrid encoder (AHE) effectively reduces the number of parameters in the model while increasing speed without sacrificing performance. Then, we design a cross-modal feature fusion module (CMFFM), which enhances and fuses RGB and depth features with each other. Finally, we add edge prediction as an auxiliary task and propose an edge enhancement module (EEM) to generate sharper contours. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance over 14 state-of-the-art RGB-D methods on six public datasets. Our code will be released at https://github.com/lc012463/TANet. 现有的RGB-D SOD方法主要依靠基于对称双流CNN的网络来分别提取RGB和深度通道特征。然而，对称的传统网络结构存在两个问题：首先，CNN学习全局上下文的能力有限；其次，对称双流结构忽略了模态之间的固有差异。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 Transformer 的非对称网络（TANet）来解决上述问题。我们利用 Transformer (PVTv2) 强大的特征提取能力从 RGB 数据中提取全局语义信息，并设计一个轻量级 CNN 主干 (LWDepthNet)，无需预训练即可从深度数据中提取空间结构信息。非对称混合编码器（AHE）有效减少了模型中的参数数量，同时在不牺牲性能的情况下提高了速度。然后，我们设计了一个跨模态特征融合模块（CMFFM），它增强并融合了 RGB 和深度特征。最后，我们添加边缘预测作为辅助任务，并提出边缘增强模块（EEM）来生成更清晰的轮廓。大量实验表明，我们的方法在 6 个公共数据集上实现了比 14 种最先进的 RGB-D 方法更优越的性能。我们的代码将在 https://github.com/lc012463/TANet 发布。 本文提出TANet，一种基于Transformer的非对称网络，用于RGB-D显著性物体检测，解决现有对称双流CNN结构的不足。 Chang Liu,Gang Yang,Shuo Wang,Hangxu Wang,Yunhua Zhang,Yutao Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Alessandra Carneiro,Lorena Nascimento,Mauricio Noernberg,Carmem Hara,Aurora Pozo
title: Portuguese Man-of-War Image Classification with Convolutional Neural Networks
title_zh: 使用卷积神经网络进行葡萄牙战舰图像分类
abstract: Portuguese man-of-war (PMW) is a gelatinous organism with long tentacles capable of causing severe burns, thus leading to negative impacts on human activities, such as tourism and fishing. There is a lack of information about the spatio-temporal dynamics of this species. Therefore, the use of alternative methods for collecting data can contribute to their monitoring. Given the widespread use of social networks and the eye-catching look of PMW, Instagram posts can be a promising data source for monitoring. The first task to follow this approach is to identify posts that refer to PMW. This paper reports on the use of convolutional neural networks for PMW images classification, in order to automate the recognition of Instagram posts. We created a suitable dataset, and trained three different neural networks: VGG-16, ResNet50, and InceptionV3, with and without a pre-trained step with the ImageNet dataset. We analyzed their results using accuracy, precision, recall, and F1 score metrics. The pre-trained ResNet50 network presented the best results, obtaining 94% of accuracy and 95% of precision, recall, and F1 score. These results show that convolutional neural networks can be very effective for recognizing PMW images from the Instagram social media.

The first task to follow this approach is to identify posts that refer to PMW. We created a suitable dataset, and trained three different neural networks: VGG-16, ResNet50, and InceptionV3, with and without a pre-trained step with the ImageNet dataset. We analyzed their results using accuracy, precision, recall, and F1 score metrics. The pre-trained ResNet50 network presented the best results, obtaining 94% of accuracy and 95% of precision, recall, and F1 score. These results show that convolutional neural networks can be very effective for recognizing PMW images from the Instagram social media.
abstract_zh: 葡萄牙军舰（PMW）是一种具有长触角的凝胶状生物，能够造成严重烧伤，从而对旅游业和渔业等人类活动造成负面影响。缺乏有关该物种时空动态的信息。因此，使用替代方法收集数据有助于监测。鉴于社交网络的广泛使用和 PMW 的引人注目的外观，Instagram 帖子可能是一个很有前途的监控数据源。遵循此方法的第一个任务是识别引用 PMW 的帖子。本文报告了使用卷积神经网络进行 PMW 图像分类，以自动识别 Instagram 帖子。我们创建了一个合适的数据集，并训练了三种不同的神经网络：VGG-16、ResNet50 和 InceptionV3，无论是否使用 ImageNet 数据集进行预训练步骤。我们使用准确度、精确度、召回率和 F1 分数指标分析了他们的结果。预训练的 ResNet50 网络呈现出最好的结果，获得了 94% 的准确率和 95% 的精确率、召回率和 F1 分数。这些结果表明，卷积神经网络对于识别 Instagram 社交媒体中的 PMW 图像非常有效。

AI.tldr: 本文使用卷积神经网络对Instagram上的葡萄牙战船水母图像进行分类，以自动化识别相关内容。
AI.motivation: 由于葡萄牙战船水母对人类活动（如旅游和渔业）有负面影响，但缺乏对其时空动态的信息，因此需要利用替代方法收集数据以进行监测。
AI.method: 作者创建了一个合适的图像数据集，并训练了三种不同的神经网络：VGG-16、ResNet50和InceptionV3，分别使用和不使用ImageNet数据集的预训练步骤。
AI.result: 预训练的ResNet50网络表现最佳，准确率为94%，精确率、召回率和F1分数均为95%。
AI.conclusion: 卷积神经网络在从Instagram社交媒体识别葡萄牙战船水母图像方面非常有效。

authors_text: Zhibo Yang,Sounak Mondal,Seoyoung Ahn,Gregory Zelinsky,Minh Hoai,Dimitris Samaras
title: Target-absent Human Attention
title_zh: 缺乏目标的人类注意力
abstract: The prediction of human gaze behavior is important for building human-computer interactive systems that can anticipate a user's attention. Computer vision models have been developed to predict the fixations made by people as they search for target objects. But what about when the image has no target? Equally important is to know how people search when they cannot find a target, and when they would stop searching. In this paper, we propose the first data-driven computational model that addresses the search-termination problem and predicts the scanpath of search fixations made by people searching for targets that do not appear in images. We model visual search as an imitation learning problem and represent the internal knowledge that the viewer acquires through fixations using a novel state representation that we call Foveated Feature Maps (FFMs). FFMs integrate a simulated foveated retina into a pretrained ConvNet that produces an in-network feature pyramid, all with minimal computational overhead. Our method integrates FFMs as the state representation in inverse reinforcement learning. Experimentally, we improve the state of the art in predicting human target-absent search behavior on the COCO-Search18 dataset
summary: The prediction of human gaze behavior is important for building human-computer interactive systems that can anticipate a user's attention. Computer vision models have been developed to predict the fixations made by people as they search for target objects. But what about when the image has no target? Equally important is to know how people search when they cannot find a target, and when they would stop searching. In this paper, we propose the first data-driven computational model that addresses the search-termination problem and predicts the scanpath of search fixations made by people searching for targets that do not appear in images. We model visual search as an imitation learning problem and represent the internal knowledge that the viewer acquires through fixations using a novel state representation that we call Foveated Feature Maps (FFMs). FFMs integrate a simulated foveated retina into a pretrained ConvNet that produces an in-network feature pyramid, all with minimal computational overhead. Our method integrates FFMs as the state representation in inverse reinforcement learning. Experimentally, we improve the state of the art in predicting human target-absent search behavior on the COCO-Search18 dataset
abstract_zh: 人类注视行为的预测对于构建可以预测用户注意力的人机交互系统非常重要。计算机视觉模型已被开发用于预测人们在搜索目标物体时的注视。但是当图像没有目标时怎么办？同样重要的是了解人们在找不到目标时如何搜索以及何时停止搜索。在本文中，我们提出了第一个数据驱动的计算模型，该模型解决了搜索终止问题，并预测了人们搜索未出现在图像中的目标时所进行的搜索注视的扫描路径。我们将视觉搜索建模为模仿学习问题，并使用我们称为注视点特征图（FFM）的新颖状态表示来表示观看者通过注视获得的内部知识。 FFM 将模拟的中心凹视网膜集成到预训练的 ConvNet 中，生成网络内特征金字塔，所有这些都只需最小的计算开销。我们的方法将 FFM 集成为逆强化学习中的状态表示。通过实验，我们改进了在 COCO-Search18 数据集上预测人类目标缺失搜索行为的最新技术

AI.tldr: 提出首个数据驱动模型预测人类在无目标图像中的搜索路径及终止行为
AI.motivation: 现有模型仅关注目标存在时的注视预测，但实际场景中用户常面临目标缺失情况，需理解人类在无目标场景下的搜索终止机制
AI.method: 将视觉搜索建模为模仿学习问题，设计Foveated Feature Maps(FFMs)作为状态表示，结合预训练卷积网络生成特征金字塔，并在逆强化学习框架中应用
AI.result: 在COCO-Search18数据集上，该方法在预测无目标场景下的人类搜索行为方面优于现有方法
AI.conclusion: 提出的FFMs有效捕捉视觉搜索状态，为理解人类注意力机制和构建智能人机交互系统提供了新方法

authors_text: Tianlong Chen,Peihao Wang,Zhiwen Fan,Zhangyang Wang
title: Aug-NeRF: Training Stronger Neural Radiance Fields with Triple-Level Physically-Grounded Augmentations
title_zh: Aug-NeRF：通过三级物理增强训练更强的神经辐射场
comment: IEEE Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR), 2022
comments: IEEE Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition (CVPR), 2022
abstract: Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) regresses a neural parameterized scene by differentially rendering multi-view images with ground-truth supervision. However, when interpolating novel views, NeRF often yields inconsistent and visually non-smooth geometric results, which we consider as a generalization gap between seen and unseen views. Recent advances in convolutional neural networks have demonstrated the promise of advanced robust data augmentations, either random or learned, in enhancing both in-distribution and out-of-distribution generalization. Inspired by that, we propose Augmented NeRF (Aug-NeRF), which for the first time brings the power of robust data augmentations into regularizing the NeRF training. Particularly, our proposal learns to seamlessly blend worst-case perturbations into three distinct levels of the NeRF pipeline with physical grounds, including (1) the input coordinates, to simulate imprecise camera parameters at image capture; (2) intermediate features, to smoothen the intrinsic feature manifold; and (3) pre-rendering output, to account for the potential degradation factors in the multi-view image supervision. Extensive results demonstrate that Aug-NeRF effectively boosts NeRF performance in both novel view synthesis (up to 1.5dB PSNR gain) and underlying geometry reconstruction. Furthermore, thanks to the implicit smooth prior injected by the triple-level augmentations, Aug-NeRF can even recover scenes from heavily corrupted images, a highly challenging setting untackled before. Our codes are available in https://github.com/VITA-Group/Aug-NeRF.
summary: Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) regresses a neural parameterized scene by differentially rendering multi-view images with ground-truth supervision. However, when interpolating novel views, NeRF often yields inconsistent and visually non-smooth geometric results, which we consider as a generalization gap between seen and unseen views. Recent advances in convolutional neural networks have demonstrated the promise of advanced robust data augmentations, either random or learned, in enhancing both in-distribution and out-of-distribution generalization. Inspired by that, we propose Augmented NeRF (Aug-NeRF), which for the first time brings the power of robust data augmentations into regularizing the NeRF training. Particularly, our proposal learns to seamlessly blend worst-case perturbations into three distinct levels of the NeRF pipeline with physical grounds, including (1) the input coordinates, to simulate imprecise camera parameters at image capture; (2) intermediate features, to smoothen the intrinsic feature manifold; and (3) pre-rendering output, to account for the potential degradation factors in the multi-view image supervision. Extensive results demonstrate that Aug-NeRF effectively boosts NeRF performance in both novel view synthesis (up to 1.5dB PSNR gain) and underlying geometry reconstruction. Furthermore, thanks to the implicit smooth prior injected by the triple-level augmentations, Aug-NeRF can even recover scenes from heavily corrupted images, a highly challenging setting untackled before. Our codes are available in https://github.com/VITA-Group/Aug-NeRF.
abstract_zh: 神经辐射场 (NeRF) 通过在地面实况监督下差异化渲染多视图图像来回归神经参数化场景。然而，当插入新颖的视图时，NeRF 通常会产生不一致且视觉上不平滑的几何结果，我们将其视为已见视图和未见视图之间的泛化差距。卷积神经网络的最新进展证明了先进的鲁棒数据增强（无论是随机的还是学习的）在增强分布内和分布外泛化方面的前景。受此启发，我们提出了增强型 NeRF（Aug-NeRF），它首次将强大的数据增强功能引入到 NeRF 训练的规范化中。特别是，我们的建议学习将最坏情况的扰动无缝地融合到具有物理基础的 NeRF 管道的三个不同级别中，包括（1）输入坐标，以在图像捕获时模拟不精确的相机参数； (2)中间特征，平滑内在特征流形； (3)预渲染输出，以考虑多视图图像监督中潜在的退化因素。大量结果表明，Aug-NeRF 有效提升了新颖视图合成（高达 1.5dB PSNR 增益）和底层几何重建方面的 NeRF 性能。此外，由于三级增强注入的隐式平滑先验，Aug-NeRF 甚至可以从严重损坏的图像中恢复场景，这是以前从未解决过的极具挑战性的设置。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/VITA-Group/Aug-NeRF 中获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Aug-NeRF，通过三级物理基础数据增强方法提升神经辐射场（NeRF）的训练效果，解决新视角合成中的几何不一致问题。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF在新视角合成时存在几何不一致和视觉不平滑问题，且现有方法难以有效提升其泛化能力。受卷积神经网络中鲁棒数据增强的启发，需探索适用于NeRF的物理基础增强策略。
AI.method: 在NeRF流水线中引入三级物理增强：(1) 输入坐标扰动模拟相机参数误差；(2) 中间特征平滑优化特征流形；(3) 预渲染输出补偿多视角图像退化因素，通过隐式注入平滑先验提升模型鲁棒性。
AI.result: 实验显示Aug-NeRF在新视角合成任务中PSNR提升最高1.5dB，几何重建精度显著提高，且能从严重退化图像中恢复场景，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 三级物理增强有效缩小NeRF的视图泛化差距，显著提升模型性能与鲁棒性，为复杂场景下的NeRF训练提供新思路。

search_text: Aug-NeRF: Training Stronger Neural Radiance Fields with Triple-Level Physically-Grounded Augmentations Aug-NeRF：通过三级物理增强训练更强的神经辐射场 Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) regresses a neural parameterized scene by differentially rendering multi-view images with ground-truth supervision. However, when interpolating novel views, NeRF often yields inconsistent and visually non-smooth geometric results, which we consider as a generalization gap between seen and unseen views. Recent advances in convolutional neural networks have demonstrated the promise of advanced robust data augmentations, either random or learned, in enhancing both in-distribution and out-of-distribution generalization. Inspired by that, we propose Augmented NeRF (Aug-NeRF), which for the first time brings the power of robust data augmentations into regularizing the NeRF training. Particularly, our proposal learns to seamlessly blend worst-case perturbations into three distinct levels of the NeRF pipeline with physical grounds, including (1) the input coordinates, to simulate imprecise camera parameters at image capture; (2) intermediate features, to smoothen the intrinsic feature manifold; and (3) pre-rendering output, to account for the potential degradation factors in the multi-view image supervision. Extensive results demonstrate that Aug-NeRF effectively boosts NeRF performance in both novel view synthesis (up to 1.5dB PSNR gain) and underlying geometry reconstruction. Furthermore, thanks to the implicit smooth prior injected by the triple-level augmentations, Aug-NeRF can even recover scenes from heavily corrupted images, a highly challenging setting untackled before. authors_text: Haotao Wang,Aston Zhang,Yi Zhu,Shuai Zheng,Mu Li,Alex Smola,Zhangyang Wang
title: Partial and Asymmetric Contrastive Learning for Out-of-Distribution Detection in Long-Tailed Recognition
title_zh: 长尾识别中分布外检测的部分和非对称对比学习
abstract: Existing out-of-distribution (OOD) detection methods are typically benchmarked on training sets with balanced class distributions. However, in real-world applications, it is common for the training sets to have long-tailed distributions. In this work, we first demonstrate that existing OOD detection methods commonly suffer from significant performance degradation when the training set is long-tail distributed. Through analysis, we posit that this is because the models struggle to distinguish the minority tail-class in-distribution samples, from the true OOD samples, making the tail classes more prone to be falsely detected as OOD. To solve this problem, we propose Partial and Asymmetric Supervised Contrastive Learning (PASCL), which explicitly encourages the model to distinguish between tail-class in-distribution samples and OOD samples. To further boost in-distribution classification accuracy, we propose Auxiliary Branch Finetuning, which uses two separate branches of BN and classification layers for anomaly detection and in-distribution classification, respectively. The intuition is that in-distribution and OOD anomaly data have different underlying distributions. Our method outperforms previous state-of-the-art method by $1.29\%$, $1.45\%$, $0.69\%$ anomaly detection false positive rate (FPR) and $3.24\%$, $4.06\%$, $7.89\%$ in-distribution classification accuracy on CIFAR10-LT, CIFAR100-LT, and ImageNet-LT, respectively. Code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/amazon-research/long-tailed-ood-detection.
summary: Existing out-of-distribution (OOD) detection methods are typically benchmarked on training sets with balanced class distributions. However, in real-world applications, it is common for the training sets to have long-tailed distributions. In this work, we first demonstrate that existing OOD detection methods commonly suffer from significant performance degradation when the training set is long-tail distributed. Through analysis, we posit that this is because the models struggle to distinguish the minority tail-class in-distribution samples, from the true OOD samples, making the tail classes more prone to be falsely detected as OOD. To solve this problem, we propose Partial and Asymmetric Supervised Contrastive Learning (PASCL), which explicitly encourages the model to distinguish between tail-class in-distribution samples and OOD samples. To further boost in-distribution classification accuracy, we propose Auxiliary Branch Finetuning, which uses two separate branches of BN and classification layers for anomaly detection and in-distribution classification, respectively. The intuition is that in-distribution and OOD anomaly data have different underlying distributions. Our method outperforms previous state-of-the-art method by $1.29\%$, $1.45\%$, $0.69\%$ anomaly detection false positive rate (FPR) and $3.24\%$, $4.06\%$, $7.89\%$ in-distribution classification accuracy on CIFAR10-LT, CIFAR100-LT, and ImageNet-LT, respectively. Code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/amazon-research/long-tailed-ood-detection.
abstract_zh: 现有的分布外（OOD）检测方法通常以具有平衡类分布的训练集为基准。然而，在实际应用中，训练集通常具有长尾分布。在这项工作中，我们首先证明，当训练集是长尾分布时，现有的 OOD 检测方法通常会出现显着的性能下降。通过分析，我们认为这是因为模型很难将少数尾类分布内样本与真正的 OOD 样本区分开来，使得尾类更容易被错误地检测为 OOD。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了部分非对称监督对比学习（PASCL），它明确鼓励模型区分尾类分布样本和 OOD 样本。为了进一步提高分布内分类精度，我们提出了辅助分支微调，它使用 BN 和分类层的两个独立分支分别进行异常检测和分布内分类。直觉是分布内异常数据和 OOD 异常数据具有不同的基础分布。我们的方法比之前最先进的方法在 CIFAR10-LT、CIFAR100-LT 和 ImageNet-LT 上的异常检测误报率 (FPR) 分别高出 $1.29\%$、$1.45\%$、$0.69\%$ 和 $3.24\%$、$4.06\%$、$7.89\%$ 分布内分类精度。代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/amazon-research/long-tailed-ood-detection 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于长尾分布场景下的分布外检测方法，通过改进对比学习和辅助分支微调来提升模型性能。
AI.motivation: 现有分布外检测方法在长尾分布数据上表现不佳，因模型难以区分尾部类别样本与真实分布外样本，导致尾部类别易被误判。
AI.method: 提出部分与非对称监督对比学习（PASCL）以增强尾部类别与分布外样本的区分能力，并设计辅助分支微调模块，利用两个独立分支分别处理异常检测与分类任务。
AI.result: 在CIFAR10-LT、CIFAR100-LT和ImageNet-LT数据集上，相较先前最优方法，异常检测误报率降低1.29%-7.89%，分类准确率提升3.24%-7.89%。
AI.conclusion: PASCL通过针对性优化长尾分布下的特征区分性，有效解决了分布外检测中的尾部类别误判问题，显著优于现有方法。

authors_text: Danpeng Chen,Shuai Wang,Weijian Xie,Shangjin Zhai,Nan Wang,Hujun Bao,Guofeng Zhang
title: VIP-SLAM: An Efficient Tightly-Coupled RGB-D Visual Inertial Planar SLAM
title_zh: VIP-SLAM：高效紧耦合 RGB-D 视觉惯性平面 SLAM
abstract: In this paper, we propose a tightly-coupled SLAM system fused with RGB, Depth, IMU and structured plane information. Traditional sparse points based SLAM systems always maintain a mass of map points to model the environment. Huge number of map points bring us a high computational complexity, making it difficult to be deployed on mobile devices. On the other hand, planes are common structures in man-made environment especially in indoor environments. We usually can use a small number of planes to represent a large scene. So the main purpose of this article is to decrease the high complexity of sparse points based SLAM. We build a lightweight back-end map which consists of a few planes and map points to achieve efficient bundle adjustment (BA) with an equal or better accuracy. We use homography constraints to eliminate the parameters of numerous plane points in the optimization and reduce the complexity of BA. We separate the parameters and measurements in homography and point-to-plane constraints and compress the measurements part to further effectively improve the speed of BA. We also integrate the plane information into the whole system to realize robust planar feature extraction, data association, and global consistent planar reconstruction. Finally, we perform an ablation study and compare our method with similar methods in simulation and real environment data. Our system achieves obvious advantages in accuracy and efficiency. Even if the plane parameters are involved in the optimization, we effectively simplify the back-end map by using planar structures. The global bundle adjustment is nearly 2 times faster than the sparse points based SLAM algorithm.

We separate the parameters and measurements in homography and point-to-plane constraints and compress the measurements part to further effectively improve the speed of BA. abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种融合 RGB、深度、IMU 和结构化平面信息的紧耦合 SLAM 系统。传统的基于稀疏点的 SLAM 系统总是维护大量的地图点来对环境进行建模。大量的地图点给我们带来了很高的计算复杂度，使得它很难部署在移动设备上。另一方面，飞机是人造环境中尤其是室内环境中的常见结构。我们通常可以用少量的平面来表示一个大的场景。因此本文的主要目的是降低基于稀疏点的SLAM的高复杂度。我们构建了一个由几个平面和地图点组成的轻量级后端地图，以实现具有相同或更好精度的高效束调整（BA）。我们利用单应性约束来消除优化中大量平面点的参数，降低BA的复杂度。我们将单应性和点到平面约束中的参数和测量分开，并压缩测量部分，以进一步有效提高BA的速度。我们还将平面信息集成到整个系统中，以实现鲁棒的平面特征提取、数据关联和全局一致的平面重建。最后，我们进行消融研究，并将我们的方法与模拟和真实环境数据中的类似方法进行比较。我们的系统在准确性和效率上取得了明显的优势。即使优化涉及到平面参数，我们也通过使用平面结构有效地简化了后端地图。全局束调整比基于稀疏点的 SLAM 算法快近 2 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种高效的紧耦合RGB-D视觉惯性平面SLAM系统，通过利用平面结构降低计算复杂度。
AI.motivation: 传统稀疏点SLAM因维护大量地图点导致计算复杂度高，难以部署于移动设备。室内环境中平面结构常见，可用少量平面表示大场景，需降低复杂度以提高效率。
AI.method: 构建轻量级后端地图，结合平面与地图点，利用单应性约束减少参数，分离并压缩测量值，整合平面信息实现鲁棒特征提取与重建。
AI.result: 在仿真与真实环境测试中，系统在精度与效率上优于现有方法，全局BA速度提升近2倍。
AI.conclusion: 通过平面结构简化后端地图，有效提升SLAM效率，验证了方法在精度与速度上的优势。
