authors_text: Haotao Wang,Aston Zhang,Shuai Zheng,Xingjian Shi,Mu Li,Zhangyang Wang
title: Removing Batch Normalization Boosts Adversarial Training
title_zh: 删除批量归一化可增强对抗性训练
abstract: Adversarial training (AT) defends deep neural networks against adversarial attacks. One challenge that limits its practical application is the performance degradation on clean samples. A major bottleneck identified by previous works is the widely used batch normalization (BN), which struggles to model the different statistics of clean and adversarial training samples in AT. Although the dominant approach is to extend BN to capture this mixture of distribution, we propose to completely eliminate this bottleneck by removing all BN layers in AT. Our normalizer-free robust training (NoFrost) method extends recent advances in normalizer-free networks to AT for its unexplored advantage on handling the mixture distribution challenge. We show that NoFrost achieves adversarial robustness with only a minor sacrifice on clean sample accuracy. On ImageNet with ResNet50, NoFrost achieves $74.06\%$ clean accuracy, which drops merely $2.00\%$ from standard training. In contrast, BN-based AT obtains $59.28\%$ clean accuracy, suffering a significant $16.78\%$ drop from standard training. In addition, NoFrost achieves a $23.56\%$ adversarial robustness against PGD attack, which improves the $13.57\%$ robustness in BN-based AT. We observe better model smoothness and larger decision margins from NoFrost, which make the models less sensitive to input perturbations and thus more robust. Moreover, when incorporating more data augmentations into NoFrost, it achieves comprehensive robustness against multiple distribution shifts. Code and pre-trained models are public at https://github.com/amazon-research/normalizer-free-robust-training.
summary: Adversarial training (AT) defends deep neural networks against adversarial attacks. One challenge that limits its practical application is the performance degradation on clean samples. A major bottleneck identified by previous works is the widely used batch normalization (BN), which struggles to model the different statistics of clean and adversarial training samples in AT. Although the dominant approach is to extend BN to capture this mixture of distribution, we propose to completely eliminate this bottleneck by removing all BN layers in AT. Our normalizer-free robust training (NoFrost) method extends recent advances in normalizer-free networks to AT for its unexplored advantage on handling the mixture distribution challenge. We show that NoFrost achieves adversarial robustness with only a minor sacrifice on clean sample accuracy. On ImageNet with ResNet50, NoFrost achieves $74.06\%$ clean accuracy, which drops merely $2.00\%$ from standard training. In contrast, BN-based AT obtains $59.28\%$ clean accuracy, suffering a significant $16.78\%$ drop from standard training. In addition, NoFrost achieves a $23.56\%$ adversarial robustness against PGD attack, which improves the $13.57\%$ robustness in BN-based AT. We observe better model smoothness and larger decision margins from NoFrost, which make the models less sensitive to input perturbations and thus more robust. Moreover, when incorporating more data augmentations into NoFrost, it achieves comprehensive robustness against multiple distribution shifts. Code and pre-trained models are public at https://github.com/amazon-research/normalizer-free-robust-training.
abstract_zh: 对抗性训练（AT）可保护深度神经网络免受对抗性攻击。限制其实际应用的一项挑战是清洁样品的性能下降。之前的工作发现的一个主要瓶颈是广泛使用的批量归一化（BN），它很难对 AT 中干净和对抗训练样本的不同统计数据进行建模。尽管主要的方法是扩展 BN 来捕获这种分布的混合，但我们建议通过删除 AT 中的所有 BN 层来完全消除这个瓶颈。我们的无归一化器稳健训练 (NoFrost) 方法将无归一化器网络的最新进展扩展到 AT，因为它在处理混合分布挑战方面具有未被探索的优势。我们证明，NoFrost 只在干净样本准确性方面做出了很小的牺牲，就实现了对抗鲁棒性。在使用 ResNet50 的 ImageNet 上，NoFrost 实现了 74.06\%$ 的干净准确率，仅比标准训练下降了 $2.00\%$。相比之下，基于 BN 的 AT 获得了 $59.28\%$ 的干净准确度，与标准训练相比显着下降了 $16.78\%$。此外，NoFrost 针对 PGD 攻击实现了 $23.56\%$ 的对抗鲁棒性，这提高了基于 BN 的 AT 的 $13.57\%$ 的鲁棒性。我们观察到 NoFrost 具有更好的模型平滑度和更大的决策裕度，这使得模型对输入扰动不太敏感，从而更加稳健。此外，当将更多数据增强合并到 NoFrost 中时，它可以实现针对多个分布变化的全面鲁棒性。代码和预训练模型在 https://github.com/amazon-research/normalizer-free-robust-training 上公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过移除批量归一化层（BN）来提升对抗训练的效果。
AI.motivation: 对抗训练中，批量归一化层难以建模干净样本与对抗样本的分布差异，导致性能下降。现有方法试图扩展BN以适应混合分布，但效果有限。
AI.method: 提出无归一化鲁棒训练方法NoFrost，完全移除对抗训练中的BN层，并扩展无归一化网络的优势以处理分布混合问题。
AI.result: 在ImageNet上，NoFrost的干净样本准确率为74.06%（仅下降2.00%），显著优于基于BN的对抗训练（59.28%，下降16.78%）。同时，其对PGD攻击的鲁棒性达到23.56%，优于BN基方法的13.57%。
AI.conclusion: 移除BN层的NoFrost方法在保持高干净样本精度的同时显著提升对抗鲁棒性，验证了无归一化网络在对抗训练中的有效性。

authors_text: Di Zhang,Qiang Niu,Youzhou Zhou
title: Modeling Randomly Walking Volatility with Chained Gamma Distributions
title_zh: 使用链式伽玛分布对随机行走波动率进行建模
abstract: Volatility clustering is a common phenomenon in financial time series. Typically, linear models can be used to describe the temporal autocorrelation of the (logarithmic) variance of returns. Considering the difficulty in estimating this model, we construct a Dynamic Bayesian Network, which utilizes the conjugate prior relation of normal-gamma and gamma-gamma, so that its posterior form locally remains unchanged at each node. This makes it possible to find approximate solutions using variational methods quickly. Furthermore, we ensure that the volatility expressed by the model is an independent incremental process after inserting dummy gamma nodes between adjacent time steps. We have found that this model has two advantages: 1) It can be proved that it can express heavier tails than Gaussians, i.e., have positive excess kurtosis, compared to popular linear models. 2) If the variational inference(VI) is used for state estimation, it runs much faster than Monte Carlo(MC) methods since the calculation of the posterior uses only basic arithmetic operations. And its convergence process is deterministic. We tested the model, named Gam-Chain, using recent Crypto, Nasdaq, and Forex records of varying resolutions. The results show that: 1) In the same case of using MC, this model can achieve comparable state estimation results with the regular lognormal chain. 2) In the case of only using VI, this model can obtain accuracy that are slightly worse than MC, but still acceptable in practice; 3) Only using VI, the running time of Gam-Chain, in general case, can be reduced to below 5% of that based on the lognormal chain via MC.
summary: Volatility clustering is a common phenomenon in financial time series. Typically, linear models can be used to describe the temporal autocorrelation of the (logarithmic) variance of returns. Considering the difficulty in estimating this model, we construct a Dynamic Bayesian Network, which utilizes the conjugate prior relation of normal-gamma and gamma-gamma, so that its posterior form locally remains unchanged at each node. This makes it possible to find approximate solutions using variational methods quickly. Furthermore, we ensure that the volatility expressed by the model is an independent incremental process after inserting dummy gamma nodes between adjacent time steps. We have found that this model has two advantages: 1) It can be proved that it can express heavier tails than Gaussians, i.e., have positive excess kurtosis, compared to popular linear models. 2) If the variational inference(VI) is used for state estimation, it runs much faster than Monte Carlo(MC) methods since the calculation of the posterior uses only basic arithmetic operations. And its convergence process is deterministic. We tested the model, named Gam-Chain, using recent Crypto, Nasdaq, and Forex records of varying resolutions. The results show that: 1) In the same case of using MC, this model can achieve comparable state estimation results with the regular lognormal chain. 2) In the case of only using VI, this model can obtain accuracy that are slightly worse than MC, but still acceptable in practice; 3) Only using VI, the running time of Gam-Chain, in general case, can be reduced to below 5% of that based on the lognormal chain via MC.
abstract_zh: 波动聚类是金融时间序列中的常见现象。通常，线性模型可用于描述回报（对数）方差的时间自相关性。考虑到估计该模型的困难，我们构建了动态贝叶斯网络，该网络利用正常伽玛和伽玛伽玛的共轭先验关系，使其后验形式在每个节点局部保持不变。这使得可以使用变分方法快速找到近似解。此外，我们确保在相邻时间步之间插入虚拟伽玛节点后，模型所表达的波动性是一个独立的增量过程。我们发现该模型有两个优点：1）可以证明，与流行的线性模型相比，它可以表达比高斯模型更重的尾部，即具有正的超额峰度。 2）如果使用变分推理（VI）进行状态估计，它的运行速度比蒙特卡罗（MC）方法快得多，因为后验的计算仅使用基本算术运算。并且其收敛过程是确定性的。我们使用不同分辨率的最新加密货币、纳斯达克和外汇记录测试了名为 Gam-Chain 的模型。结果表明：1）在同样使用MC的情况下，该模型可以达到与正则对数正态链相当的状态估计结果。 2）在仅使用VI的情况下，该模型可以获得比MC稍差的精度，但在实践中仍然可以接受； 3）仅使用VI，一般情况下Gam-Chain的运行时间可以减少到基于MC的对数正态链的运行时间的5%以下。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于链式伽马分布的动态贝叶斯网络模型，用于捕捉金融时间序列中的波动率聚类现象，并通过变分推断方法实现高效计算。
AI.motivation: 传统线性模型在估计波动率时存在计算复杂度高、难以处理厚尾分布等问题，需构建更高效且能表达重尾特性的波动率模型。
AI.method: 构建动态贝叶斯网络，利用正态-伽马和伽马-伽马共轭先验关系保持后验形式不变，并通过插入虚拟伽马节点使波动率成为独立增量过程，结合变分推断（VI）加速计算。
AI.result: 1) 在蒙特卡洛（MC）方法下，模型状态估计效果与常规对数正态链相当；2) 仅用VI时精度略低于MC但实际可接受；3) VI下运行时间较MC对数正态链降低至5%以下。
AI.conclusion: Gam-Chain模型在保持精度的同时显著提升计算效率，适用于需要实时处理的金融数据分析场景。

authors_text: Keshav Kasichainula,Hadi Mansourifar,Weidong Shi
title: RAF: Recursive Adversarial Attacks on Face Recognition Using Extremely Limited Queries
title_zh: RAF：使用极其有限的查询对人脸识别进行递归对抗性攻击
abstract: Recent successful adversarial attacks on face recognition show that, despite the remarkable progress of face recognition models, they are still far behind the human intelligence for perception and recognition. It reveals the vulnerability of deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) as state-of-the-art building block for face recognition models against adversarial examples, which can cause certain consequences for secure systems. Gradient-based adversarial attacks are widely studied before and proved to be successful against face recognition models. However, finding the optimized perturbation per each face needs to submitting the significant number of queries to the target model. In this paper, we propose recursive adversarial attack on face recognition using automatic face warping which needs extremely limited number of queries to fool the target model. Instead of a random face warping procedure, the warping functions are applied on specific detected regions of face like eyebrows, nose, lips, etc. We evaluate the robustness of proposed method in the decision-based black-box attack setting, where the attackers have no access to the model parameters and gradients, but hard-label predictions and confidence scores are provided by the target model.
summary: Recent successful adversarial attacks on face recognition show that, despite the remarkable progress of face recognition models, they are still far behind the human intelligence for perception and recognition. It reveals the vulnerability of deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs) as state-of-the-art building block for face recognition models against adversarial examples, which can cause certain consequences for secure systems. Gradient-based adversarial attacks are widely studied before and proved to be successful against face recognition models. However, finding the optimized perturbation per each face needs to submitting the significant number of queries to the target model. In this paper, we propose recursive adversarial attack on face recognition using automatic face warping which needs extremely limited number of queries to fool the target model. Instead of a random face warping procedure, the warping functions are applied on specific detected regions of face like eyebrows, nose, lips, etc. We evaluate the robustness of proposed method in the decision-based black-box attack setting, where the attackers have no access to the model parameters and gradients, but hard-label predictions and confidence scores are provided by the target model.
abstract_zh: 最近针对人脸识别的成功对抗攻击表明，尽管人脸识别模型取得了显着进步，但它们在感知和识别方面仍然远远落后于人类智能。它揭示了深度卷积神经网络（CNN）作为针对对抗性示例的人脸识别模型的最先进构建块的脆弱性，这可能会给安全系统带来某些后果。基于梯度的对抗攻击之前已被广泛研究，并被证明可以成功对抗人脸识别模型。然而，找到每个面孔的优化扰动需要向目标模型提交大量查询。在本文中，我们提出使用自动面部扭曲对面部识别进行递归对抗攻击，这需要极其有限的查询数量来欺骗目标模型。扭曲函数不是随机面部扭曲过程，而是应用于面部的特定检测区域，如眉毛、鼻子、嘴唇等。我们评估了所提出的方法在基于决策的黑盒攻击设置中的鲁棒性，其中攻击者无法访问模型参数和梯度，但目标模型提供硬标签预测和置信度分数。

AI.tldr: 提出一种利用极少量查询的递归对抗攻击方法，针对人脸识别系统进行攻击。
AI.motivation: 现有梯度攻击需要大量查询，且需提高对抗攻击效率，减少查询次数，同时利用面部特定区域进行更有效的变形。
AI.method: 采用自动面部变形技术，针对面部特定区域（如眉毛、鼻子、嘴唇）进行递归攻击，无需梯度信息，仅需少量查询。
AI.result: 在决策型黑盒攻击环境下验证了方法的有效性，证明其能以极少量查询成功欺骗目标模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法相比传统梯度攻击更高效，适用于无梯度信息的黑盒攻击场景，揭示了人脸识别系统的潜在脆弱性。

authors_text: Meghal Gupta,Rachel Yun Zhang
title: Efficient Interactive Coding Achieving Optimal Error Resilience Over the Binary Channel
title_zh: 高效的交互式编码在二进制通道上实现最佳的容错能力
abstract: Given a noiseless protocol $π_0$ computing a function $f(x, y)$ of Alice and Bob's private inputs $x, y$, the goal of interactive coding is to construct an error-resilient protocol $π$ computing $f$ such that even if some fraction of the communication is adversarially corrupted, both parties still learn $f(x, y)$. Ideally, the resulting scheme $π$ should be positive rate, computationally efficient, and achieve optimal error resilience. While interactive coding over large alphabets is well understood, the situation over the binary alphabet has remained evasive. At the present moment, the known schemes over the binary alphabet that achieve a higher error resilience than a trivial adaptation of large alphabet schemes are either still suboptimally error resilient [EKS20], or optimally error resilient with exponential communication complexity [GZ22]. In this work, we construct a scheme achieving optimality in all three parameters: our protocol is positive rate, computationally efficient, and resilient to the optimal $\frac16 - ε$ adversarial errors. Our protocol employs a new type of code that we call a layered code, which may be of independent interest. Like a tree code, a layered code allows the coder to encode a message in an online fashion, but is defined on a graph instead of a tree.
summary: Given a noiseless protocol $π_0$ computing a function $f(x, y)$ of Alice and Bob's private inputs $x, y$, the goal of interactive coding is to construct an error-resilient protocol $π$ computing $f$ such that even if some fraction of the communication is adversarially corrupted, both parties still learn $f(x, y)$. Ideally, the resulting scheme $π$ should be positive rate, computationally efficient, and achieve optimal error resilience. While interactive coding over large alphabets is well understood, the situation over the binary alphabet has remained evasive. At the present moment, the known schemes over the binary alphabet that achieve a higher error resilience than a trivial adaptation of large alphabet schemes are either still suboptimally error resilient [EKS20], or optimally error resilient with exponential communication complexity [GZ22]. In this work, we construct a scheme achieving optimality in all three parameters: our protocol is positive rate, computationally efficient, and resilient to the optimal $\frac16 - ε$ adversarial errors. Our protocol employs a new type of code that we call a layered code, which may be of independent interest. Like a tree code, a layered code allows the coder to encode a message in an online fashion, but is defined on a graph instead of a tree.
abstract_zh: 给定一个无噪声协议 $π_0$ 计算 Alice 和 Bob 的私有输入 $x, y$ 的函数 $f(x, y)$，交互式编码的目标是构建一个容错协议 $π$ 计算 $f$，这样即使通信的某些部分被对抗性破坏，双方仍然可以学习 $f(x, y)$。理想情况下，所得方案 $π$ 应该是正率、计算效率高，并实现最佳的错误恢复能力。虽然大字母表上的交互式编码已被很好地理解，但二进制字母表上的情况仍然难以捉摸。目前，与大字母表方案的简单适应相比，二进制字母表上的已知方案实现了更高的错误恢复能力，或者仍然是次优的错误恢复能力[EKS20]，或者是具有指数通信复杂性的最佳错误恢复能力[GZ22]。在这项工作中，我们构建了一个在所有三个参数上实现最优的方案：我们的协议是正率、计算效率高、并且能够适应最优 $\frac16 - ε$ 对抗错误。我们的协议采用了一种新型代码，我们称之为分层代码，它可能具有独立的兴趣。与树代码一样，分层代码允许编码器以在线方式对消息进行编码，但它是在图而不是树上定义的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种高效的交互编码方案，能够在二元信道上实现最优的错误恢复能力。
AI.motivation: 在二元信道上实现高效且具有最优错误恢复能力的交互编码仍然是一个未解难题。现有的方案要么错误恢复能力不足，要么通信复杂度过高。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种新的编码方法，称为分层码，该编码方法基于图结构，允许在线编码，并类似于树码。
AI.result: 本文构造了一种方案，在三个关键参数上实现了最优：正速率、计算效率高，并且能够抵抗最优的 $\ rac{1}{6} - ε$ 的对抗性错误。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的分层码方法不仅解决了二元信道上交互编码的难题，还可能具有独立的研究价值。

search_text: Efficient Interactive Coding Achieving Optimal Error Resilience Over the Binary Channel 高效的交互式编码在二进制通道上实现最佳的容错能力 Given a noiseless protocol $π_0$ computing a function $f(x, y)$ of Alice and Bob's private inputs $x, y$, the goal of interactive coding is to construct an error-resilient protocol $π$ computing $f$ such that even if some fraction of the communication is adversarially corrupted, both parties still learn $f(x, y)$. Ideally, the resulting scheme $π$ should be positive rate, computationally efficient, and achieve optimal error resilience. While interactive coding over large alphabets is well understood, the situation over the binary alphabet has remained evasive. At the present moment, the known schemes over the binary alphabet that achieve a higher error resilience than a trivial adaptation of large alphabet schemes are either still suboptimally error resilient [EKS20], or optimally error resilient with exponential communication complexity [GZ22]. In this work, we construct a scheme achieving optimality in all three parameters: our protocol is positive rate, computationally efficient, and resilient to the optimal $\frac16 - ε$ adversarial errors. Our protocol employs a new type of code that we call a layered code, which may be of independent interest. Like a tree code, a layered code allows the coder to encode a message in an online fashion, but is defined on a graph instead of a tree. 给定一个无噪声协议 $π_0$ 计算 Alice 和 Bob 的私有输入 $x, y$ 的函数 $f(x, y)$，交互式编码的目标是构建一个容错协议 $π$ 计算 $f$，这样即使通信的某些部分被对抗性破坏，双方仍然可以学习 $f(x, y)$。理想情况下，所得方案 $π$ 应该是正率、计算效率高，并实现最佳的错误恢复能力。虽然大字母表上的交互式编码已被很好地理解，但二进制字母表上的情况仍然难以捉摸。目前，与大字母表方案的简单适应相比，二进制字母表上的已知方案实现了更高的错误恢复能力，或者仍然是次优的错误恢复能力[EKS20]，或者是具有指数通信复杂性的最佳错误恢复能力[GZ22]。在这项工作中，我们构建了一个在所有三个参数上实现最优的方案：我们的协议是正率、计算效率高、并且能够适应最优 $\frac16 - ε$ 对抗错误。我们的协议采用了一种新型代码，我们称之为分层代码，它可能具有独立的兴趣。与树代码一样，分层代码允许编码器以在线方式对消息进行编码，但它是在图而不是树上定义的。 本文提出了一种高效的交互编码方案，能够在二元信道上实现最优的错误恢复能力。 Meghal Gupta,Rachel Yun Zhang cs.DS,cs.IT

authors_text: Dimitrios Kollias
title: ABAW: Learning from Synthetic Data & Multi-Task Learning Challenges
title_zh: ABAW：从综合数据和多任务学习挑战中学习
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2202.10659; text overlap with arXiv:1704.07863 by other authors
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2202.10659; text overlap with arXiv:1704.07863 by other authors
abstract: This paper describes the fourth Affective Behavior Analysis in-the-wild (ABAW) Competition, held in conjunction with European Conference on Computer Vision (ECCV), 2022. The 4th ABAW Competition is a continuation of the Competitions held at IEEE CVPR 2022, ICCV 2021, IEEE FG 2020 and IEEE CVPR 2017 Conferences, and aims at automatically analyzing affect. In the previous runs of this Competition, the Challenges targeted Valence-Arousal Estimation, Expression Classification and Action Unit Detection. This year the Competition encompasses two different Challenges: i) a Multi-Task-Learning one in which the goal is to learn at the same time (i.e., in a multi-task learning setting) all the three above mentioned tasks; and ii) a Learning from Synthetic Data one in which the goal is to learn to recognise the basic expressions from artificially generated data and generalise to real data. The Aff-Wild2 database is a large scale in-the-wild database and the first one that contains annotations for valence and arousal, expressions and action units. This database is the basis for the above Challenges. In more detail: i) s-Aff-Wild2 -- a static version of Aff-Wild2 database -- has been constructed and utilized for the purposes of the Multi-Task-Learning Challenge; and ii) some specific frames-images from the Aff-Wild2 database have been used in an expression manipulation manner for creating the synthetic dataset, which is the basis for the Learning from Synthetic Data Challenge. In this paper, at first we present the two Challenges, along with the utilized corpora, then we outline the evaluation metrics and finally present the baseline systems per Challenge, as well as their derived results. More information regarding the Competition can be found in the competition's website: https://ibug.doc.ic.ac.uk/resources/eccv-2023-4th-abaw/.

abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 2022 年与欧洲计算机视觉会议 (ECCV) 联合举办的第四届野外情感行为分析 (ABAW) 竞赛。第四届 ABAW 竞赛是 IEEE CVPR 2022、ICCV 2021、IEEE FG 2020 和 IEEE CVPR 2017 会议上举办的竞赛的延续，旨在自动分析情感。在本次比赛的前几届比赛中，挑战的目标是效价唤醒估计、表达分类和动作单元检测。今年的竞赛包含两个不同的挑战：i）多任务学习挑战，其目标是同时（即在多任务学习环境中）学习上述所有三个任务； ii）从合成数据中学习，其目标是学习识别人工生成的数据中的基本表达式并将其推广到真实数据。 Aff-Wild2 数据库是一个大规模的野外数据库，也是第一个包含效价和唤醒、表达和动作单元注释的数据库。该数据库是上述挑战的基础。更详细地说： i) s-Aff-Wild2——Aff-Wild2 数据库的静态版本——是为了多任务学习挑战而构建和使用的； ii) 来自 Aff-Wild2 数据库的一些特定帧图像已以表达操作方式用于创建合成数据集，这是从合成数据挑战中学习的基础。在本文中，我们首先介绍两个挑战以及所使用的语料库，然后概述评估指标，最后介绍每个挑战的基线系统及其派生结果。有关比赛的更多信息可以在比赛网站上找到：https://ibug.doc.ic.ac.uk/resources/eccv-2023-4th-abaw/。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了第四届ABAW竞赛，包含多任务学习和合成数据学习两个挑战，旨在通过Aff-Wild2数据库分析情感行为。
AI.motivation: 推动情感分析技术发展，通过多任务学习整合多种任务并利用合成数据提升真实场景下的表情识别能力。
AI.method: 基于Aff-Wild2数据库构建静态版本s-Aff-Wild2用于多任务学习挑战，并通过图像处理生成合成数据集用于合成数据学习挑战，同时制定评估指标并提供基线系统。
AI.result: 介绍了两个挑战的基线系统及实验结果，但未具体说明性能指标数值。
AI.conclusion: 竞赛为多任务学习和合成数据泛化提供了研究平台，验证了Aff-Wild2数据库在情感分析中的有效性。

authors_text: Eleanor Loh,Jalaj Khandelwal,Brian Regan,Duncan A. Little
title: Promotheus: An End-to-End Machine Learning Framework for Optimizing Markdown in Online Fashion E-commerce
title_zh: Promotheus：用于优化在线时尚电子商务中 Markdown 的端到端机器学习框架
abstract: Managing discount promotional events ("markdown") is a significant part of running an e-commerce business, and inefficiencies here can significantly hamper a retailer's profitability. Traditional approaches for tackling this problem rely heavily on price elasticity modelling. However, the partial information nature of price elasticity modelling, together with the non-negotiable responsibility for protecting profitability, mean that machine learning practitioners must often go through great lengths to define strategies for measuring offline model quality. In the face of this, many retailers fall back on rule-based methods, thus forgoing significant gains in profitability that can be captured by machine learning. In this paper, we introduce two novel end-to-end markdown management systems for optimising markdown at different stages of a retailer's journey. The first system, "Ithax", enacts a rational supply-side pricing strategy without demand estimation, and can be usefully deployed as a "cold start" solution to collect markdown data while maintaining revenue control. The second system, "Promotheus", presents a full framework for markdown optimization with price elasticity. We describe in detail the specific modelling and validation procedures that, within our experience, have been crucial to building a system that performs robustly in the real world. Both markdown systems achieve superior profitability compared to decisions made by our experienced operations teams in a controlled online test, with improvements of 86% (Promotheus) and 79% (Ithax) relative to manual strategies. These systems have been deployed to manage markdown at ASOS.com, and both systems can be fruitfully deployed for price optimization across a wide variety of retail e-commerce settings.

Traditional approaches for tackling this problem rely heavily on price elasticity modelling. However, the partial information nature of price elasticity modelling, together with the non-negotiable responsibility for protecting profitability, mean that machine learning practitioners must often go through great lengths to define strategies for measuring offline model quality. In the face of this, many retailers fall back on rule-based methods, thus forgoing significant gains in profitability that can be captured by machine learning. In this paper, we introduce two novel end-to-end markdown management systems for optimising markdown at different stages of a retailer's journey. The first system, "Ithax", enacts a rational supply-side pricing strategy without demand estimation, and can be usefully deployed as a "cold start" solution to collect markdown data while maintaining revenue control. The second system, "Promotheus", presents a full framework for markdown optimization with price elasticity. We describe in detail the specific modelling and validation procedures that, within our experience, have been crucial to building a system that performs robustly in the real world. Both markdown systems achieve superior profitability compared to decisions made by our experienced operations teams in a controlled online test, with improvements of 86% (Promotheus) and 79% (Ithax) relative to manual strategies. These systems have been deployed to manage markdown at ASOS.com, and both systems can be fruitfully deployed for price optimization across a wide variety of retail e-commerce settings.
abstract_zh: 管理折扣促销活动（“降价”）是电子商务业务运营的重要组成部分，而效率低下可能会严重影响零售商的盈利能力。解决这个问题的传统方法在很大程度上依赖于价格弹性模型。然而，价格弹性模型的部分信息性质，以及保护盈利能力的不可协商的责任，意味着机器学习从业者必须经常花费大量精力来定义衡量离线模型质量的策略。面对这种情况，许多零售商转而求助于基于规则的方法，从而放弃了可以通过机器学习获得的显着盈利收益。在本文中，我们介绍了两种新颖的端到端降价管理系统，用于优化零售商旅程不同阶段的降价。第一个系统“Ithax”在无需估计需求的情况下制定了合理的供应方定价策略，并且可以有效地部署为“冷启动”解决方案，以收集降价数据，同时保持收入控制。第二个系统“Promotheus”提供了具有价格弹性的降价优化的完整框架。我们详细描述了具体的建模和验证程序，根据我们的经验，这些程序对于构建在现实世界中稳健运行的系统至关重要。与我们经验丰富的运营团队在受控在线测试中做出的决策相比，这两种降价系统都实现了卓越的盈利能力，相对于手动策略分别提高了 86% (Promotheus) 和 79% (Ithax)。这些系统已被部署来管理 ASOS.com 的降价，并且这两个系统都可以有效地部署在各种零售电子商务设置中进行价格优化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种端到端的机器学习系统Ithax和Promotheus，用于优化线上时尚电商的促销定价策略。
AI.motivation: 传统促销定价依赖价格弹性模型存在信息不全问题，导致零售商难以充分发挥机器学习潜力，需通过规则方法降低利润空间。
AI.method: Ithax采用无需需求预测的供给侧定价策略作为冷启动方案，Promotheus则构建包含价格弹性的完整优化框架，并通过特定建模与验证流程确保系统鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在ASOS.com部署后，Promotheus和Ithax分别较人工策略提升86%和79%盈利能力，且适用于多种零售电商场景。
AI.conclusion: 两种系统均显著优于人工操作，为电商促销定价提供了可扩展的机器学习解决方案。

search_text: Promotheus: An End-to-End Machine Learning Framework for Optimizing Markdown in Online Fashion E-commerce Promotheus：用于优化在线时尚电子商务中 Markdown 的端到端机器学习框架 Managing discount promotional events ("markdown") is a significant part of running an e-commerce business, and inefficiencies here can significantly hamper a retailer's profitability. Traditional approaches for tackling this problem rely heavily on price elasticity modelling. However, the partial information nature of price elasticity modelling, together with the non-negotiable responsibility for protecting profitability, mean that machine learning practitioners must often go through great lengths to define strategies for measuring offline model quality. In the face of this, many retailers fall back on rule-based methods, thus forgoing significant gains in profitability that can be captured by machine learning. In this paper, we introduce two novel end-to-end markdown management systems for optimising markdown at different stages of a retailer's journey. The first system, "Ithax", enacts a rational supply-side pricing strategy without demand estimation, and can be usefully deployed as a "cold start" solution to collect markdown data while maintaining revenue control. The second system, "Promotheus", presents a full framework for markdown optimization with price elasticity. We describe in detail the specific modelling and validation procedures that, within our experience, have been crucial to building a system that performs robustly in the real world. Both markdown systems achieve superior profitability compared to decisions made by our experienced operations teams in a controlled online test, with improvements of 86% (Promotheus) and 79% (Ithax) relative to manual strategies. These systems have been deployed to manage markdown at ASOS.com, and both systems can be fruitfully deployed for price optimization across a wide variety of retail e-commerce settings. 管理折扣促销活动（“降价”）是电子商务业务运营的重要组成部分，而效率低下可能会严重影响零售商的盈利能力。解决这个问题的传统方法在很大程度上依赖于价格弹性模型。然而，价格弹性模型的部分信息性质，以及保护盈利能力的不可协商的责任，意味着机器学习从业者必须经常花费大量精力来定义衡量离线模型质量的策略。面对这种情况，许多零售商转而求助于基于规则的方法，从而放弃了可以通过机器学习获得的显着盈利收益。在本文中，我们介绍了两种新颖的端到端降价管理系统，用于优化零售商旅程不同阶段的降价。第一个系统“Ithax”在无需估计需求的情况下制定了合理的供应方定价策略，并且可以有效地部署为“冷启动”解决方案，以收集降价数据，同时保持收入控制。第二个系统“Promotheus”提供了具有价格弹性的降价优化的完整框架。我们详细描述了具体的建模和验证程序，根据我们的经验，这些程序对于构建在现实世界中稳健运行的系统至关重要。与我们经验丰富的运营团队在受控在线测试中做出的决策相比，这两种降价系统都实现了卓越的盈利能力，相对于手动策略分别提高了 86% (Promotheus) 和 79% (Ithax)。这些系统已被部署来管理 ASOS.com 的降价，并且这两个系统都可以有效地部署在各种零售电子商务设置中进行价格优化。 本文提出两种端到端的机器学习系统Ithax和Promotheus，用于优化线上时尚电商的促销定价策略。 Eleanor Loh,Jalaj Khandelwal,Brian Regan,Duncan A. authors_text: Lingyu Zhu,Esa Rahtu,Hang Zhao
title: Beyond Visual Field of View: Perceiving 3D Environment with Echoes and Vision
title_zh: 超越视野：通过回声和视觉感知 3D 环境
abstract: This paper focuses on perceiving and navigating 3D environments using echoes and RGB image. In particular, we perform depth estimation by fusing RGB image with echoes, received from multiple orientations. Unlike previous works, we go beyond the field of view of the RGB and estimate dense depth maps for substantially larger parts of the environment. We show that the echoes provide holistic and in-expensive information about the 3D structures complementing the RGB image. Moreover, we study how echoes and the wide field-of-view depth maps can be utilised in robot navigation. We compare the proposed methods against recent baselines using two sets of challenging realistic 3D environments: Replica and Matterport3D. The implementation and pre-trained models will be made publicly available.
summary: This paper focuses on perceiving and navigating 3D environments using echoes and RGB image. In particular, we perform depth estimation by fusing RGB image with echoes, received from multiple orientations. Unlike previous works, we go beyond the field of view of the RGB and estimate dense depth maps for substantially larger parts of the environment. We show that the echoes provide holistic and in-expensive information about the 3D structures complementing the RGB image. Moreover, we study how echoes and the wide field-of-view depth maps can be utilised in robot navigation. We compare the proposed methods against recent baselines using two sets of challenging realistic 3D environments: Replica and Matterport3D. The implementation and pre-trained models will be made publicly available.
abstract_zh: 本文重点介绍使用回声和 RGB 图像感知和导航 3D 环境。特别是，我们通过将 RGB 图像与从多个方向接收到的回波融合来执行深度估计。与之前的工作不同，我们超越了 RGB 的视野，并估计了环境中更大部分的密集深度图。我们表明，回波提供了有关补充 RGB 图像的 3D 结构的整体且廉价的信息。此外，我们研究了如何在机器人导航中利用回声和宽视场深度图。我们使用两组具有挑战性的现实 3D 环境（Replica 和 Matterport3D）将所提出的方法与最近的基线进行比较。实施和预训练模型将公开。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种融合RGB图像与多方向回声数据的方法，用于生成超出RGB视野范围的密集深度图，以提升三维环境感知与机器人导航能力。
AI.motivation: 传统RGB相机视野有限，难以获取大范围环境信息；而回声传感器虽能提供三维结构信息但分辨率较低。本文旨在结合两者优势，以低成本获取更全面的环境感知。
AI.method: 通过融合RGB图像与多方向回声数据，设计深度学习模型估计密集深度图，并利用宽视野深度图优化机器人导航路径规划。
AI.result: 在Replica和Matterport3D数据集上，本文方法相较最新基线模型在深度估计精度和导航成功率上均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 回声与视觉信息的融合能有效扩展环境感知范围，所提方法为低成本高精度三维环境建模与机器人导航提供了新思路。

authors_text: Giulia Perugia,Dominika Lisy
title: Robot's Gendering Trouble: A Scoping Review of Gendering Humanoid Robots and its Effects on HRI
title_zh: 机器人的性别问题：人形机器人性别界定及其对 HRI 的影响的范围审查
comment: 29 pages, 1 figure, 3 long tables. The present paper has been submitted for publication to the International Journal of Social Robotics and is currently under review
comments: 29 pages, 1 figure, 3 long tables. The present paper has been submitted for publication to the International Journal of Social Robotics and is currently under review
abstract: The discussion around the problematic practice of gendering humanoid robots has risen to the foreground in the last few years. To lay the basis for a thorough understanding of how robot's "gender" has been understood within the Human-Robot Interaction (HRI) community - i.e., how it has been manipulated, in which contexts, and which effects it has yield on people's perceptions and interactions with robots - we performed a scoping review of the literature. We identified 553 papers relevant for our review retrieved from 5 different databases. The final sample of reviewed papers included 35 papers written between 2005 and 2021, which involved a total of 3902 participants. In this article, we thoroughly summarize these papers by reporting information about their objectives and assumptions on gender (i.e., definitions and reasons to manipulate gender), their manipulation of robot's "gender" (i.e., gender cues and manipulation checks), their experimental designs (e.g., demographics of participants, employed robots), and their results (i.e., main and interaction effects). The review reveals that robot's "gender" does not affect crucial constructs for the HRI, such as likability and acceptance, but rather bears its strongest effect on stereotyping. We leverage our different epistemological backgrounds in Social Robotics and Gender Studies to provide a comprehensive interdisciplinary perspective on the results of the review and suggest ways to move forward in the field of HRI.
summary: The discussion around the problematic practice of gendering humanoid robots has risen to the foreground in the last few years. To lay the basis for a thorough understanding of how robot's "gender" has been understood within the Human-Robot Interaction (HRI) community - i.e., how it has been manipulated, in which contexts, and which effects it has yield on people's perceptions and interactions with robots - we performed a scoping review of the literature. We identified 553 papers relevant for our review retrieved from 5 different databases. The final sample of reviewed papers included 35 papers written between 2005 and 2021, which involved a total of 3902 participants. In this article, we thoroughly summarize these papers by reporting information about their objectives and assumptions on gender (i.e., definitions and reasons to manipulate gender), their manipulation of robot's "gender" (i.e., gender cues and manipulation checks), their experimental designs (e.g., demographics of participants, employed robots), and their results (i.e., main and interaction effects). The review reveals that robot's "gender" does not affect crucial constructs for the HRI, such as likability and acceptance, but rather bears its strongest effect on stereotyping. We leverage our different epistemological backgrounds in Social Robotics and Gender Studies to provide a comprehensive interdisciplinary perspective on the results of the review and suggest ways to move forward in the field of HRI.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几年里，围绕人形机器人性别化这一有问题的做法的讨论已经引起了人们的关注。为了彻底了解机器人的“性别”在人机交互（HRI）社区中是如何被理解的——即它是如何被操纵的、在什么背景下以及它对人们的感知和与机器人的交互产生了哪些影响——我们对文献进行了范围界定审查。我们从 5 个不同的数据库中检索到了 553 篇与我们的综述相关的论文。最终的评审论文样本包括 2005 年至 2021 年间撰写的 35 篇论文，共有 3902 名参与者。在本文中，我们通过报告有关性别的目标和假设（即操纵性别的定义和原因）、对机器人“性别”的操纵（即性别线索和操纵检查）、实验设计（例如参与者的人口统计、雇用的机器人）及其结果（即主要效应和交互效应）的信息，彻底总结了这些论文。审查表明，机器人的“性别”并不影响 HRI 的关键结构，例如可爱度和接受度，但对刻板印象的影响最大。我们利用社会机器人学和性别研究方面的不同认识论背景，对审查结果提供全面的跨学科视角，并提出在 HRI 领域前进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文通过系统综述探讨性别化人形机器人对人机交互（HRI）的影响，分析其性别化方式及效果。
AI.motivation: 近年来性别化人形机器人引发争议，需厘清其在HRI中的应用方式及对人类认知的影响机制。
AI.method: 从5个数据库检索553篇文献，最终纳入2005-2021年间35篇实证研究，分析其性别化手段、实验设计及结果。
AI.result: 机器人性别对可接受性、亲和力等核心HRI指标影响有限，但显著强化人类刻板印象。
AI.conclusion: 建议HRI领域需结合社会机器人学与性别研究，建立跨学科框架以规范性别化设计实践。

search_text: Robot's Gendering Trouble: A Scoping Review of Gendering Humanoid Robots and its Effects on HRI 机器人的性别问题：人形机器人性别界定及其对 HRI 的影响的范围审查 The discussion around the problematic practice of gendering humanoid robots has risen to the foreground in the last few years. To lay the basis for a thorough understanding of how robot's "gender" has been understood within the Human-Robot Interaction (HRI) community - i.e., how it has been manipulated, in which contexts, and which effects it has yield on people's perceptions and interactions with robots - we performed a scoping review of the literature. We identified 553 papers relevant for our review retrieved from 5 different databases. The final sample of reviewed papers included 35 papers written between 2005 and 2021, which involved a total of 3902 participants. In this article, we thoroughly summarize these papers by reporting information about their objectives and assumptions on gender (i.e., definitions and reasons to manipulate gender), their manipulation of robot's "gender" (i.e., gender cues and manipulation checks), their experimental designs (e.g., demographics of participants, employed robots), and their results (i.e., main and interaction effects). The review reveals that robot's "gender" does not affect crucial constructs for the HRI, such as likability and acceptance, but rather bears its strongest effect on stereotyping. We leverage our different epistemological backgrounds in Social Robotics and Gender Studies to provide a comprehensive interdisciplinary perspective on the results of the review and suggest ways to move forward in the field of HRI. 在过去的几年里，围绕人形机器人性别化这一有问题的做法的讨论已经引起了人们的关注。为了彻底了解机器人的“性别”在人机交互（HRI）社区中是如何被理解的——即它是如何被操纵的、在什么背景下以及它对人们的感知和与机器人的交互产生了哪些影响——我们对文献进行了范围界定审查。我们从 5 个不同的数据库中检索到了 553 篇与我们的综述相关的论文。最终的评审论文样本包括 2005 年至 2021 年间撰写的 35 篇论文，共有 3902 名参与者。在本文中，我们通过报告有关性别的目标和假设（即操纵性别的定义和原因）、对机器人“性别”的操纵（即性别线索和操纵检查）、实验设计（例如参与者的人口统计、雇用的机器人）及其结果（即主要效应和交互效应）的信息，彻底总结了这些论文。审查表明，机器人的“性别”并不影响 HRI 的关键结构，例如可爱度和接受度，但对刻板印象的影响最大。我们利用社会机器人学和性别研究方面的不同认识论背景，对审查结果提供全面的跨学科视角，并提出在 HRI 领域前进的方法。 本文通过系统综述探讨性别化人形机器人对人机交互（HRI）的影响，分析其性别化方式及效果。 Giulia Perugia,Dominika Lisy cs.RO,cs.HC

authors_text: Noam Gottlieb,Michael Werman
title: DecisioNet: A Binary-Tree Structured Neural Network
title_zh: DecisioNet：二叉树结构神经网络
comment: The paper has been accepted to the ACCV2022 conference. A short summary video about the paper can be found at https://whova.com/portal/webapp/hybri1_202112/Artifact/70297
comments: The paper has been accepted to the ACCV2022 conference. A short summary video about the paper can be found at https://whova.com/portal/webapp/hybri1_202112/Artifact/70297
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) and decision trees (DTs) are both state-of-the-art classifiers. DNNs perform well due to their representational learning capabilities, while DTs are computationally efficient as they perform inference along one route (root-to-leaf) that is dependent on the input data. In this paper, we present DecisioNet (DN), a binary-tree structured neural network. We propose a systematic way to convert an existing DNN into a DN to create a lightweight version of the original model. DecisioNet takes the best of both worlds - it uses neural modules to perform representational learning and utilizes its tree structure to perform only a portion of the computations. We evaluate various DN architectures, along with their corresponding baseline models on the FashionMNIST, CIFAR10, and CIFAR100 datasets. We show that the DN variants achieve similar accuracy while significantly reducing the computational cost of the original network.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) and decision trees (DTs) are both state-of-the-art classifiers. DNNs perform well due to their representational learning capabilities, while DTs are computationally efficient as they perform inference along one route (root-to-leaf) that is dependent on the input data. In this paper, we present DecisioNet (DN), a binary-tree structured neural network. We propose a systematic way to convert an existing DNN into a DN to create a lightweight version of the original model. DecisioNet takes the best of both worlds - it uses neural modules to perform representational learning and utilizes its tree structure to perform only a portion of the computations. We evaluate various DN architectures, along with their corresponding baseline models on the FashionMNIST, CIFAR10, and CIFAR100 datasets. We show that the DN variants achieve similar accuracy while significantly reducing the computational cost of the original network.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 和决策树 (DT) 都是最先进的分类器。 DNN 因其表征学习能力而表现良好，而 DT 的计算效率很高，因为它们沿着依赖于输入数据的一条路径（从根到叶）执行推理。在本文中，我们提出了 DecisioNet (DN)，一种二叉树结构的神经网络。我们提出了一种系统方法，将现有的 DNN 转换为 DN，以创建原始模型的轻量级版本。 DecisioNet 集两全其美 - 它使用神经模块来执行表征学习，并利用其树结构仅执行一部分计算。我们在 FashionMNIST、CIFAR10 和 CIFAR100 数据集上评估各种 DN 架构及其相应的基线模型。我们表明，DN 变体实现了相似的精度，同时显着降低了原始网络的计算成本。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合深度神经网络和决策树优势的二叉树结构神经网络DecisioNet，将现有DNN转换为轻量级模型以降低计算成本
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络（DNN）虽具强大表示学习能力但计算成本高，决策树（DT）虽高效但表达能力有限，因此提出结合两者优势的DecisioNet以兼顾准确性与效率
AI.method: 提出系统性方法将现有DNN转换为二叉树结构的DecisioNet，利用树结构路由机制选择性执行计算，减少冗余运算
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实验表明，DecisioNet变体在保持与原模型相似准确率的同时，显著降低了计算成本
AI.conclusion: DecisioNet通过结合神经网络与决策树优势，在保持模型性能的同时有效降低计算成本，为轻量化模型设计提供新思路

authors_text: Liam Schramm,Yunfu Deng,Edgar Granados,Abdeslam Boularias
title: USHER: Unbiased Sampling for Hindsight Experience Replay
title_zh: USHER：事后经验回放的公正采样
abstract: Dealing with sparse rewards is a long-standing challenge in reinforcement learning (RL). Hindsight Experience Replay (HER) addresses this problem by reusing failed trajectories for one goal as successful trajectories for another. This allows for both a minimum density of reward and for generalization across multiple goals. However, this strategy is known to result in a biased value function, as the update rule underestimates the likelihood of bad outcomes in a stochastic environment. We propose an asymptotically unbiased importance-sampling-based algorithm to address this problem without sacrificing performance on deterministic environments. We show its effectiveness on a range of robotic systems, including challenging high dimensional stochastic environments.
summary: Dealing with sparse rewards is a long-standing challenge in reinforcement learning (RL). Hindsight Experience Replay (HER) addresses this problem by reusing failed trajectories for one goal as successful trajectories for another. This allows for both a minimum density of reward and for generalization across multiple goals. However, this strategy is known to result in a biased value function, as the update rule underestimates the likelihood of bad outcomes in a stochastic environment. We propose an asymptotically unbiased importance-sampling-based algorithm to address this problem without sacrificing performance on deterministic environments. We show its effectiveness on a range of robotic systems, including challenging high dimensional stochastic environments.
abstract_zh: 处理稀疏奖励是强化学习（RL）中长期存在的挑战。事后经验重播 (HER) 通过将一个目标的失败轨迹重新用作另一个目标的成功轨迹来解决这一问题。这允许最小奖励密度和跨多个目标的泛化。然而，众所周知，这种策略会导致价值函数有偏差，因为更新规则低估了随机环境中出现不良结果的可能性。我们提出了一种基于渐近无偏重要性采样的算法来解决这个问题，而不会牺牲确定性环境下的性能。我们展示了它在一系列机器人系统上的有效性，包括具有挑战性的高维随机环境。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为USHER的无偏采样算法，用于改进强化学习中稀疏奖励场景下的 hindsight experience replay（HER）方法。
AI.motivation: HER方法在稀疏奖励场景下通过重用失败轨迹提升学习效率，但存在价值函数估计偏差问题，导致在随机环境中低估负面结果的可能性。
AI.method: 设计基于重要性抽样的渐近无偏算法，通过调整采样权重消除偏差，同时保持对确定性环境的性能优势。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在多种机器人系统及高维随机环境中有效，成功解决了HER的偏差问题且不牺牲性能。
AI.conclusion: USHER通过无偏采样机制改进HER，为稀疏奖励场景下的强化学习提供了更可靠的价值估计方案。

authors_text: Shuheng Liu,Xiyue Huang,Pavlos Protopapas
title: Evaluating Error Bound for Physics-Informed Neural Networks on Linear Dynamical Systems
title_zh: 评估线性动力系统上物理信息神经网络的误差界
abstract: There have been extensive studies on solving differential equations using physics-informed neural networks. While this method has proven advantageous in many cases, a major criticism lies in its lack of analytical error bounds. Therefore, it is less credible than its traditional counterparts, such as the finite difference method. This paper shows that one can mathematically derive explicit error bounds for physics-informed neural networks trained on a class of linear systems of differential equations. More importantly, evaluating such error bounds only requires evaluating the differential equation residual infinity norm over the domain of interest. Our work shows a link between network residuals, which is known and used as loss function, and the absolute error of solution, which is generally unknown. Our approach is semi-phenomonological and independent of knowledge of the actual solution or the complexity or architecture of the network. Using the method of manufactured solution on linear ODEs and system of linear ODEs, we empirically verify the error evaluation algorithm and demonstrate that the actual error strictly lies within our derived bound.
summary: There have been extensive studies on solving differential equations using physics-informed neural networks. While this method has proven advantageous in many cases, a major criticism lies in its lack of analytical error bounds. Therefore, it is less credible than its traditional counterparts, such as the finite difference method. This paper shows that one can mathematically derive explicit error bounds for physics-informed neural networks trained on a class of linear systems of differential equations. More importantly, evaluating such error bounds only requires evaluating the differential equation residual infinity norm over the domain of interest. Our work shows a link between network residuals, which is known and used as loss function, and the absolute error of solution, which is generally unknown. Our approach is semi-phenomonological and independent of knowledge of the actual solution or the complexity or architecture of the network. Using the method of manufactured solution on linear ODEs and system of linear ODEs, we empirically verify the error evaluation algorithm and demonstrate that the actual error strictly lies within our derived bound.
abstract_zh: 关于使用物理信息神经网络求解微分方程已经进行了广泛的研究。虽然这种方法在许多情况下被证明是有利的，但主要的批评在于它缺乏分析误差范围。因此，它的可信度不如传统方法（例如有限差分法）。本文表明，人们可以在数学上导出在一类线性微分方程系统上训练的物理信息神经网络的显式误差界限。更重要的是，评估此类误差范围仅需要评估感兴趣域上的微分方程残差无穷范数。我们的工作展示了网络残差（已知并用作损失函数）与解的绝对误差（通常未知）之间的联系。我们的方法是半现象学的，独立于实际解决方案或网络的复杂性或架构的知识。使用线性 ODE 和线性 ODE 系统的制造解方法，我们凭经验验证了误差评估算法，并证明实际误差严格位于我们推导的范围内。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何为物理信息神经网络（PINNs）在求解线性动力系统时提供显式的误差界分析。
AI.motivation: 尽管物理信息神经网络在求解微分方程中表现出优势，但其缺乏理论误差界导致可信度不足，传统方法如有限差分法更具可靠性。
AI.method: 通过半经验方法推导误差界，仅需计算微分方程残差的无穷范数，并利用制造解法验证误差评估算法。
AI.result: 实验表明实际误差严格位于推导的误差界内，验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 建立了网络残差与解误差的关联，为PINNs提供了无需先验知识的误差评估框架，提升了其可信度。

authors_text: Mani Kumar Tellamekala,Ömer Sümer,Björn W. Schuller,Elisabeth André,Timo Giesbrecht,Michel Valstar
title: Are 3D Face Shapes Expressive Enough for Recognising Continuous Emotions and Action Unit Intensities?
title_zh: 3D 面部形状是否足以识别连续情绪和动作单元强度？
comment: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Affective Computing
comments: Accepted to IEEE Transactions on Affective Computing
abstract: Recognising continuous emotions and action unit (AU) intensities from face videos requires a spatial and temporal understanding of expression dynamics. Existing works primarily rely on 2D face appearances to extract such dynamics. This work focuses on a promising alternative based on parametric 3D face shape alignment models, which disentangle different factors of variation, including expression-induced shape variations. We aim to understand how expressive 3D face shapes are in estimating valence-arousal and AU intensities compared to the state-of-the-art 2D appearance-based models. We benchmark four recent 3D face alignment models: ExpNet, 3DDFA-V2, DECA, and EMOCA. In valence-arousal estimation, expression features of 3D face models consistently surpassed previous works and yielded an average concordance correlation of .739 and .574 on SEWA and AVEC 2019 CES corpora, respectively. We also study how 3D face shapes performed on AU intensity estimation on BP4D and DISFA datasets, and report that 3D face features were on par with 2D appearance features in AUs 4, 6, 10, 12, and 25, but not the entire set of AUs. To understand this discrepancy, we conduct a correspondence analysis between valence-arousal and AUs, which points out that accurate prediction of valence-arousal may require the knowledge of only a few AUs.

Existing works primarily rely on 2D face appearances to extract such dynamics. This work focuses on a promising alternative based on parametric 3D face shape alignment models, which disentangle different factors of variation, including expression-induced shape variations. We aim to understand how expressive 3D face shapes are in estimating valence-arousal and AU intensities compared to the state-of-the-art 2D appearance-based models. We benchmark four recent 3D face alignment models: ExpNet, 3DDFA-V2, DECA, and EMOCA. In valence-arousal estimation, expression features of 3D face models consistently surpassed previous works and yielded an average concordance correlation of .739 and .574 on SEWA and AVEC 2019 CES corpora, respectively. We also study how 3D face shapes performed on AU intensity estimation on BP4D and DISFA datasets, and report that 3D face features were on par with 2D appearance features in AUs 4, 6, 10, 12, and 25, but not the entire set of AUs. To understand this discrepancy, we conduct a correspondence analysis between valence-arousal and AUs, which points out that accurate prediction of valence-arousal may require the knowledge of only a few AUs.
abstract_zh: 从面部视频中识别连续情绪和动作单元（AU）强度需要对表情动态的空间和时间理解。现有的作品主要依靠 2D 面部外观来提取这种动态。这项工作的重点是基于参数化 3D 面部形状对齐模型的有前景的替代方案，该模型可以理清不同的变化因素，包括表情引起的形状变化。我们的目标是了解与最先进的基于外观的 2D 模型相比，3D 面部形状在估计价唤醒和 AU 强度方面的表现力如何。我们对四种最新的 3D 人脸对齐模型进行了基准测试：ExpNet、3DDFA-V2、DECA 和 EMOCA。在效价唤醒估计中，3D 人脸模型的表情特征始终超越了之前的工作，并在 SEWA 和 AVEC 2019 CES 语料库上分别产生了 0.739 和 0.574 的平均一致性相关性。我们还研究了 3D 面部形状如何在 BP4D 和 DISFA 数据集上的 AU 强度估计上执行，并报告说 3D 面部特征与 AU 4、6、10、12 和 25 中的 2D 外观特征相当，但不是整个 AU 集。为了理解这种差异，我们对价态唤醒和 AU 之间进行了对应分析，指出准确预测价态唤醒可能只需要少数 AU 的知识。

AI.tldr: 本文研究3D面部形状在连续情绪识别和动作单元（AU）强度估计中的表现，并与基于2D外观的最新方法进行对比。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要依赖2D面部外观提取表情动态，但可能无法充分捕捉表情变化。3D面部形状模型可分离表达相关的形状变化，可能提供更有效的特征。
AI.method: 基准测试了四类3D面部对齐模型（ExpNet、3DDFA-V2、DECA、EMOCA），在SEWA、AVEC 2019、BP4D和DISFA数据集上评估其对连续情绪（愉悦-唤醒）和AU强度的预测能力。
AI.result: 3D模型在连续情绪估计中表现优于2D方法（SEWA CC=0.739，AVEC 2019 CC=0.574），但在AU强度估计中仅部分AU（4、6、10、12、25）与2D相当，其余AU表现不足。
AI.conclusion: 3D面部形状对连续情绪识别有效，但对AU强度估计的泛化能力有限。情绪预测可能仅需少数关键AU的先验知识。

authors_text: Vahid Reza Khazaie,Anthony Wong,Yalda Mohsenzadeh
title: Augment to Detect Anomalies with Continuous Labelling
title_zh: 通过连续标记增强检测异常
abstract: Anomaly detection is to recognize samples that differ in some respect from the training observations. These samples which do not conform to the distribution of normal data are called outliers or anomalies. In real-world anomaly detection problems, the outliers are absent, not well defined, or have a very limited number of instances. Recent state-of-the-art deep learning-based anomaly detection methods suffer from high computational cost, complexity, unstable training procedures, and non-trivial implementation, making them difficult to deploy in real-world applications. To combat this problem, we leverage a simple learning procedure that trains a lightweight convolutional neural network, reaching state-of-the-art performance in anomaly detection. In this paper, we propose to solve anomaly detection as a supervised regression problem. We label normal and anomalous data using two separable distributions of continuous values. To compensate for the unavailability of anomalous samples during training time, we utilize straightforward image augmentation techniques to create a distinct set of samples as anomalies. The distribution of the augmented set is similar but slightly deviated from the normal data, whereas real anomalies are expected to have an even further distribution. Therefore, training a regressor on these augmented samples will result in more separable distributions of labels for normal and real anomalous data points. Anomaly detection experiments on image and video datasets show the superiority of the proposed method over the state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Anomaly detection is to recognize samples that differ in some respect from the training observations. These samples which do not conform to the distribution of normal data are called outliers or anomalies. In real-world anomaly detection problems, the outliers are absent, not well defined, or have a very limited number of instances. Recent state-of-the-art deep learning-based anomaly detection methods suffer from high computational cost, complexity, unstable training procedures, and non-trivial implementation, making them difficult to deploy in real-world applications. To combat this problem, we leverage a simple learning procedure that trains a lightweight convolutional neural network, reaching state-of-the-art performance in anomaly detection. In this paper, we propose to solve anomaly detection as a supervised regression problem. We label normal and anomalous data using two separable distributions of continuous values. To compensate for the unavailability of anomalous samples during training time, we utilize straightforward image augmentation techniques to create a distinct set of samples as anomalies. The distribution of the augmented set is similar but slightly deviated from the normal data, whereas real anomalies are expected to have an even further distribution. Therefore, training a regressor on these augmented samples will result in more separable distributions of labels for normal and real anomalous data points. Anomaly detection experiments on image and video datasets show the superiority of the proposed method over the state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 异常检测是识别在某些方面与训练观察结果不同的样本。这些不符合正态数据分布的样本称为异常值或异常值。在现实世界的异常检测问题中，异常值不存在、没有明确定义，或者实例数量非常有限。最近最先进的基于深度学习的异常检测方法存在计算成本高、复杂性、训练过程不稳定和实现不简单的问题，使得它们难以在实际应用中部署。为了解决这个问题，我们利用一个简单的学习程序来训练轻量级卷积神经网络，从而在异常检测方面达到最先进的性能。在本文中，我们建议将异常检测作为监督回归问题来解决。我们使用连续值的两个可分离分布来标记正常和异常数据。为了补偿训练期间异常样本的不可用，我们利用简单的图像增强技术来创建一组不同的样本作为异常。增强集的分布类似，但与正常数据略有偏差，而实际异常预计会有更进一步的分布。因此，在这些增强样本上训练回归器将导致正常数据点和真实异常数据点的标签分布更加可分离。对图像和视频数据集的异常检测实验表明，所提出的方法相对于最先进的方法具有优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于连续标签和图像增强的异常检测方法，通过监督回归解决异常检测问题。
AI.motivation: 现有深度学习异常检测方法计算成本高、实现复杂且难以部署，而真实场景中异常样本稀缺且分布不明确。
AI.method: 训练轻量级卷积神经网络，将异常检测建模为监督回归问题，利用连续值分布标签并结合图像增强生成合成异常样本。
AI.result: 在图像和视频数据集上的实验表明，该方法优于现有最先进方法，实现了更清晰的正常与异常数据分布分离。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过简单高效的策略解决了异常样本稀缺问题，在保持高性能的同时降低了计算复杂度，适用于实际应用场景。

search_text: Augment to Detect Anomalies with Continuous Labelling 通过连续标记增强检测异常 Anomaly detection is to recognize samples that differ in some respect from the training observations. These samples which do not conform to the distribution of normal data are called outliers or anomalies. In real-world anomaly detection problems, the outliers are absent, not well defined, or have a very limited number of instances. Recent state-of-the-art deep learning-based anomaly detection methods suffer from high computational cost, complexity, unstable training procedures, and non-trivial implementation, making them difficult to deploy in real-world applications. To combat this problem, we leverage a simple learning procedure that trains a lightweight convolutional neural network, reaching state-of-the-art performance in anomaly detection. In this paper, we propose to solve anomaly detection as a supervised regression problem. We label normal and anomalous data using two separable distributions of continuous values. To compensate for the unavailability of anomalous samples during training time, we utilize straightforward image augmentation techniques to create a distinct set of samples as anomalies. The distribution of the augmented set is similar but slightly deviated from the normal data, whereas real anomalies are expected to have an even further distribution. Therefore, training a regressor on these augmented samples will result in more separable distributions of labels for normal and real anomalous data points. Anomaly detection experiments on image and video datasets show the superiority of the proposed method over the state-of-the-art approaches. 异常检测是识别在某些方面与训练观察结果不同的样本。这些不符合正态数据分布的样本称为异常值或异常值。在现实世界的异常检测问题中，异常值不存在、没有明确定义，或者实例数量非常有限。最近最先进的基于深度学习的异常检测方法存在计算成本高、复杂性、训练过程不稳定和实现不简单的问题，使得它们难以在实际应用中部署。为了解决这个问题，我们利用一个简单的学习程序来训练轻量级卷积神经网络，从而在异常检测方面达到最先进的性能。在本文中，我们建议将异常检测作为监督回归问题来解决。我们使用连续值的两个可分离分布来标记正常和异常数据。为了补偿训练期间异常样本的不可用，我们利用简单的图像增强技术来创建一组不同的样本作为异常。增强集的分布类似，但与正常数据略有偏差，而实际异常预计会有更进一步的分布。因此，在这些增强样本上训练回归器将导致正常数据点和真实异常数据点的标签分布更加可分离。对图像和视频数据集的异常检测实验表明，所提出的方法相对于最先进的方法具有优越性。 本文提出一种基于连续标签和图像增强的异常检测方法，通过监督回归解决异常检测问题。 Vahid Reza Khazaie,Anthony Wong,Yalda Mohsenzadeh cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Václav Blažej,Pratibha Choudhary,Dušan Knop,Šimon Schierreich,Ondřej Suchý,Tomáš Valla
title: On Polynomial Kernels for Traveling Salesperson Problem and its Generalizations
title_zh: 旅行商问题的多项式核及其推广
comment: 46 pages, 4 figures, Full version of ESA '22 paper
comments: 46 pages, 4 figures, Full version of ESA '22 paper
abstract: For many problems, the important instances from practice possess certain structure that one should reflect in the design of specific algorithms. As data reduction is an important and inextricable part of today's computation, we employ one of the most successful models of such precomputation -- the kernelization. Within this framework, we focus on Traveling Salesperson Problem (TSP) and some of its generalizations. We provide a kernel for TSP with size polynomial in either the feedback edge set number or the size of a modulator to constant-sized components. For its generalizations, we also consider other structural parameters such as the vertex cover number and the size of a modulator to constant-sized paths. We complement our results from the negative side by showing that the existence of a polynomial-sized kernel with respect to the fractioning number, the combined parameter maximum degree and treewidth, and, in the case of Subset-TSP, modulator to disjoint cycles (i.e., the treewidth two graphs) is unlikely.
summary: For many problems, the important instances from practice possess certain structure that one should reflect in the design of specific algorithms. As data reduction is an important and inextricable part of today's computation, we employ one of the most successful models of such precomputation -- the kernelization. Within this framework, we focus on Traveling Salesperson Problem (TSP) and some of its generalizations. We provide a kernel for TSP with size polynomial in either the feedback edge set number or the size of a modulator to constant-sized components. For its generalizations, we also consider other structural parameters such as the vertex cover number and the size of a modulator to constant-sized paths. We complement our results from the negative side by showing that the existence of a polynomial-sized kernel with respect to the fractioning number, the combined parameter maximum degree and treewidth, and, in the case of Subset-TSP, modulator to disjoint cycles (i.e., the treewidth two graphs) is unlikely.
abstract_zh: 对于许多问题来说，实践中的重要实例都具有一定的结构，应该在具体算法的设计中反映出来。由于数据缩减是当今计算中重要且不可分割的一部分，因此我们采用了此类预计算最成功的模型之一——内核化。在此框架内，我们重点关注旅行商问题（TSP）及其一些概括。我们为 TSP 提供了一个内核，其尺寸多项式可以是反馈边缘集数量，也可以是调制器尺寸为恒定尺寸的组件。对于其概括，我们还考虑其他结构参数，例如顶点覆盖数和恒定大小路径的调制器的大小。我们从消极的一面补充了我们的结果，表明多项式大小的内核相对于分数、组合参数最大度和树宽的存在，以及在子集-TSP的情况下，不相交循环的调制器（即树宽两个图）是不可能的。

AI.tldr: 研究旅行商问题及其扩展问题的多项式核的存在性及构造方法。
AI.motivation: 针对实际问题中实例的结构特性，探索有效的数据预处理方法（内核化）以优化TSP及其扩展问题的求解效率。
AI.method: 采用内核化技术，基于反馈边集数、顶点覆盖数等结构参数设计多项式大小的核，并通过参数化复杂性分析验证结果。
AI.result: 为TSP及其扩展问题构造了多项式大小的核，同时证明了基于分片数、最大度数与树宽等参数的多项式核存在性较低。
AI.conclusion: 内核化方法能有效处理TSP及其扩展问题，但某些结构参数下多项式核的存在性受限，需进一步研究其他参数。

authors_text: Sujoy Bhore,Fabian Klute,Jelle J. Oostveen
title: On Streaming Algorithms for Geometric Independent Set and Clique
title_zh: 几何独立集和团的流式算法
abstract: We study the maximum geometric independent set and clique problems in the streaming model. Given a collection of geometric objects arriving in an insertion only stream, the aim is to find a subset such that all objects in the subset are pairwise disjoint or intersect respectively. We show that no constant factor approximation algorithm exists to find a maximum set of independent segments or $2$-intervals without using a linear number of bits. Interestingly, our proof only requires a set of segments whose intersection graph is also an interval graph. This reveals an interesting discrepancy between segments and intervals as there does exist a $2$-approximation for finding an independent set of intervals that uses only $O(α(\mathcal{I})\log |\mathcal{I}|)$ bits of memory for a set of intervals $\mathcal{I}$ with $α(\mathcal{I})$ being the size of the largest independent set of $\mathcal{I}$. On the flipside we show that for the geometric clique problem there is no constant-factor approximation algorithm using less than a linear number of bits even for unit intervals. On the positive side we show that the maximum geometric independent set in a set of axis-aligned unit-height rectangles can be $4$-approximated using only $O(α(\mathcal{R})\log |\mathcal{R}|)$ bits.
summary: We study the maximum geometric independent set and clique problems in the streaming model. Given a collection of geometric objects arriving in an insertion only stream, the aim is to find a subset such that all objects in the subset are pairwise disjoint or intersect respectively. We show that no constant factor approximation algorithm exists to find a maximum set of independent segments or $2$-intervals without using a linear number of bits. Interestingly, our proof only requires a set of segments whose intersection graph is also an interval graph. This reveals an interesting discrepancy between segments and intervals as there does exist a $2$-approximation for finding an independent set of intervals that uses only $O(α(\mathcal{I})\log |\mathcal{I}|)$ bits of memory for a set of intervals $\mathcal{I}$ with $α(\mathcal{I})$ being the size of the largest independent set of $\mathcal{I}$. On the flipside we show that for the geometric clique problem there is no constant-factor approximation algorithm using less than a linear number of bits even for unit intervals. On the positive side we show that the maximum geometric independent set in a set of axis-aligned unit-height rectangles can be $4$-approximated using only $O(α(\mathcal{R})\log |\mathcal{R}|)$ bits.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了流模型中的最大几何独立集和团问题。给定到达仅插入流中的几何对象的集合，目标是找到一个子集，使得子集中的所有对象分别成对不相交或相交。我们表明，不存在常数因子近似算法来找到独立段的最大集合或不使用线性位数的$2$间隔。有趣的是，我们的证明只需要一组线段，其交集图也是区间图。这揭示了段和间隔之间的一个有趣的差异，因为确实存在一个 $2$ 近似值来查找一组独立的间隔，该近似仅使用 $O(α(\mathcal{I})\log |\mathcal{I}|)$ 位内存来表示一组间隔 $\mathcal{I}$，其中 $α(\mathcal{I})$ 是 $\mathcal{I}$ 的最大独立集合的大小。另一方面，我们表明，对于几何集团问题，即使对于单位间隔，也不存在使用少于线性位数的常数因子近似算法。从积极的一面来看，我们表明，一组轴对齐的单位高度矩形中的最大几何独立集可以仅使用 $O(α(\mathcal{R})\log |\mathcal{R}|)$ 位来近似为 $4$ 。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在流模型下几何独立集和团问题的近似算法，分析了不同几何对象的内存限制与算法可行性。
AI.motivation: 在流模型中处理大规模几何数据时，需在有限内存下设计高效近似算法，但现有方法的内存复杂度与近似比之间的关系尚不明确。
AI.method: 通过构造反例证明下界，结合区间图特性分析算法限制；针对特定几何对象（如单位矩形）设计近似算法并分析其内存使用。
AI.result: 证明段和2区间独立集无常数因子近似算法（需线性内存），而区间独立集存在2近似算法；单位矩形独立集可4近似且内存复杂度为O(α(R) log |R|)。
AI.conclusion: 几何对象的结构差异显著影响流模型下的算法可行性，某些问题需线性内存，而特定结构（如单位矩形）可实现高效近似。

search_text: On Streaming Algorithms for Geometric Independent Set and Clique 几何独立集和团的流式算法 We study the maximum geometric independent set and clique problems in the streaming model. Given a collection of geometric objects arriving in an insertion only stream, the aim is to find a subset such that all objects in the subset are pairwise disjoint or intersect respectively. We show that no constant factor approximation algorithm exists to find a maximum set of independent segments or $2$-intervals without using a linear number of bits. Interestingly, our proof only requires a set of segments whose intersection graph is also an interval graph. This reveals an interesting discrepancy between segments and intervals as there does exist a $2$-approximation for finding an independent set of intervals that uses only $O(α(\mathcal{I})\log |\mathcal{I}|)$ bits of memory for a set of intervals $\mathcal{I}$ with $α(\mathcal{I})$ being the size of the largest independent set of $\mathcal{I}$. On the flipside we show that for the geometric clique problem there is no constant-factor approximation algorithm using less than a linear number of bits even for unit intervals. On the positive side we show that the maximum geometric independent set in a set of axis-aligned unit-height rectangles can be $4$-approximated using only $O(α(\mathcal{R})\log |\mathcal{R}|)$ bits. 我们研究了流模型中的最大几何独立集和团问题。给定到达仅插入流中的几何对象的集合，目标是找到一个子集，使得子集中的所有对象分别成对不相交或相交。我们表明，不存在常数因子近似算法来找到独立段的最大集合或不使用线性位数的$2$间隔。有趣的是，我们的证明只需要一组线段，其交集图也是区间图。这揭示了段和间隔之间的一个有趣的差异，因为确实存在一个 $2$ 近似值来查找一组独立的间隔，该近似仅使用 $O(α(\mathcal{I})\log |\mathcal{I}|)$ 位内存来表示一组间隔 $\mathcal{I}$，其中 $α(\mathcal{I})$ 是 $\mathcal{I}$ 的最大独立集合的大小。另一方面，我们表明，对于几何集团问题，即使对于单位间隔，也不存在使用少于线性位数的常数因子近似算法。从积极的一面来看，我们表明，一组轴对齐的单位高度矩形中的最大几何独立集可以仅使用 $O(α(\mathcal{R})\log |\mathcal{R}|)$ 位来近似为 $4$ 。 本文研究了在流模型下几何独立集和团问题的近似算法，分析了不同几何对象的内存限制与算法可行性。 Sujoy Bhore,Fabian Klute,Jelle J. Oostveen cs.CG,cs.DS

authors_text: Vahid Reza Khazaie,Anthony Wong,John Taylor Jewell,Yalda Mohsenzadeh
title: Anomaly Detection with Adversarially Learned Perturbations of Latent Space
title_zh: 通过对抗学习潜在空间扰动进行异常检测
comment: Accepted in the 2022 19th Conference on Robots and Vision (CRV)
comments: Accepted in the 2022 19th Conference on Robots and Vision (CRV)
abstract: Anomaly detection is to identify samples that do not conform to the distribution of the normal data. Due to the unavailability of anomalous data, training a supervised deep neural network is a cumbersome task. As such, unsupervised methods are preferred as a common approach to solve this task. Deep autoencoders have been broadly adopted as a base of many unsupervised anomaly detection methods. However, a notable shortcoming of deep autoencoders is that they provide insufficient representations for anomaly detection by generalizing to reconstruct outliers. In this work, we have designed an adversarial framework consisting of two competing components, an Adversarial Distorter, and an Autoencoder. The Adversarial Distorter is a convolutional encoder that learns to produce effective perturbations and the autoencoder is a deep convolutional neural network that aims to reconstruct the images from the perturbed latent feature space. The networks are trained with opposing goals in which the Adversarial Distorter produces perturbations that are applied to the encoder's latent feature space to maximize the reconstruction error and the autoencoder tries to neutralize the effect of these perturbations to minimize it. When applied to anomaly detection, the proposed method learns semantically richer representations due to applying perturbations to the feature space. The proposed method outperforms the existing state-of-the-art methods in anomaly detection on image and video datasets.

In this work, we have designed an adversarial framework consisting of two competing components, an Adversarial Distorter, and an Autoencoder. The Adversarial Distorter is a convolutional encoder that learns to produce effective perturbations and the autoencoder is a deep convolutional neural network that aims to reconstruct the images from the perturbed latent feature space. The networks are trained with opposing goals in which the Adversarial Distorter produces perturbations that are applied to the encoder's latent feature space to maximize the reconstruction error and the autoencoder tries to neutralize the effect of these perturbations to minimize it. When applied to anomaly detection, the proposed method learns semantically richer representations due to applying perturbations to the feature space. The proposed method outperforms the existing state-of-the-art methods in anomaly detection on image and video datasets.
abstract_zh: 异常检测是识别不符合正态数据分布的样本。由于无法获得异常数据，训练有监督的深度神经网络是一项繁琐的任务。因此，无监督方法是解决此任务的常用方法。深度自动编码器已被广泛采用作为许多无监督异常检测方法的基础。然而，深度自动编码器的一个显着缺点是它们通过泛化重建异常值来为异常检测提供不足的表示。在这项工作中，我们设计了一个对抗框架，由两个竞争组件组成：对抗扭曲器和自动编码器。 Adversarial Distorter 是一种卷积编码器，可以学习产生有效的扰动，而自动编码器是一种深度卷积神经网络，旨在从扰动的潜在特征空间重建图像。这些网络以相反的目标进行训练，其中对抗性扭曲器产生扰动，这些扰动应用于编码器的潜在特征空间以最大化重建误差，而自动编码器尝试中和这些扰动的影响以将其最小化。当应用于异常检测时，所提出的方法由于对特征空间应用扰动而学习语义上更丰富的表示。该方法在图像和视频数据集的异常检测方面优于现有的最先进方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于对抗学习的异常检测方法，通过在潜在空间中引入对抗性扰动来增强自编码器的表示能力。
AI.motivation: 传统自编码器在异常检测中因无法有效泛化到异常样本而表现不足，需通过对抗学习提升潜在空间表示的语义丰富性。
AI.method: 设计包含对抗扰动器和自编码器的对抗框架，扰动器生成潜在空间扰动以最大化重建误差，自编码器则通过对抗训练最小化该误差。
AI.result: 该方法在图像和视频数据集上优于现有最先进异常检测技术。
AI.conclusion: 对抗性潜在扰动训练使自编码器学习到更丰富的语义表征，显著提升异常检测性能。

authors_text: Yun Liao,Seyyed Ali Hashemi,Hengjie Yang,John M. Cioffi
title: Scalable Polar Code Construction for Successive Cancellation List Decoding: A Graph Neural Network-Based Approach
title_zh: 用于连续取消列表解码的可扩展 Polar 码构建：基于图神经网络的方法
comment: 33 pages, 11 figures, submitted to IEEE Transactions on Communications
comments: 33 pages, 11 figures, submitted to IEEE Transactions on Communications
abstract: While constructing polar codes for successive-cancellation decoding can be implemented efficiently by sorting the bit-channels, finding optimal polar codes for cyclic-redundancy-check-aided successive-cancellation list (CA-SCL) decoding in an efficient and scalable manner still awaits investigation. This paper first maps a polar code to a unique heterogeneous graph called the polar-code-construction message-passing (PCCMP) graph. Next, a heterogeneous graph-neural-network-based iterative message-passing (IMP) algorithm is proposed which aims to find a PCCMP graph that corresponds to the polar code with minimum frame error rate under CA-SCL decoding. This new IMP algorithm's major advantage lies in its scalability power. That is, the model complexity is independent of the blocklength and code rate, and a trained IMP model over a short polar code can be readily applied to a long polar code's construction. Numerical experiments show that IMP-based polar-code constructions outperform classical constructions under CA-SCL decoding. In addition, when an IMP model trained on a length-128 polar code directly applies to the construction of polar codes with different code rates and blocklengths, simulations show that these polar code constructions deliver comparable performance to the 5G polar codes.
summary: While constructing polar codes for successive-cancellation decoding can be implemented efficiently by sorting the bit-channels, finding optimal polar codes for cyclic-redundancy-check-aided successive-cancellation list (CA-SCL) decoding in an efficient and scalable manner still awaits investigation. This paper first maps a polar code to a unique heterogeneous graph called the polar-code-construction message-passing (PCCMP) graph. Next, a heterogeneous graph-neural-network-based iterative message-passing (IMP) algorithm is proposed which aims to find a PCCMP graph that corresponds to the polar code with minimum frame error rate under CA-SCL decoding. This new IMP algorithm's major advantage lies in its scalability power. That is, the model complexity is independent of the blocklength and code rate, and a trained IMP model over a short polar code can be readily applied to a long polar code's construction. Numerical experiments show that IMP-based polar-code constructions outperform classical constructions under CA-SCL decoding. In addition, when an IMP model trained on a length-128 polar code directly applies to the construction of polar codes with different code rates and blocklengths, simulations show that these polar code constructions deliver comparable performance to the 5G polar codes.
abstract_zh: 虽然可以通过对比特通道进行排序来有效地构建用于连续消除解码的极性码，但以高效且可扩展的方式找到用于循环冗余校验辅助连续消除列表（CA-SCL）解码的最佳极性码仍有待研究。本文首先将 Polar 码映射到一个独特的异构图，称为 Polar 码构造消息传递（PCCMP）图。接下来，提出了一种基于异构图神经网络的迭代消息传递（IMP）算法，其目的是找到与CA-SCL解码下帧错误率最小的Polar码对应的PCCMP图。这种新的 IMP 算法的主要优势在于其可扩展性。也就是说，模型复杂度与块长度和码率无关，并且在短极性码上训练的 IMP 模型可以很容易地应用于长极性码的构造。数值实验表明，在 CA-SCL 解码下，基于 IMP 的极性码构造优于经典构造。此外，当在长度为128的Polar码上训练的IMP模型直接应用于具有不同码率和块长度的Polar码的构造时，模拟表明这些Polar码构造提供了与5G Polar码相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于图神经网络的可扩展极性码构造方法，用于循环冗余校验辅助的列表译码。
AI.motivation: 现有极性码构造方法在循环冗余校验辅助列表译码下缺乏高效性和可扩展性，需探索更优解决方案。
AI.method: 将极性码映射为异构图（PCCMP图），设计基于图神经网络的迭代消息传递算法（IMP）进行优化构造。
AI.result: IMP方法在CA-SCL译码下优于经典构造方案，且训练短码模型可直接应用于不同码率和码长的极性码构造，性能接近5G极性码。
AI.conclusion: 图神经网络为极性码构造提供了可扩展框架，在保持低复杂度的同时实现了性能提升。

authors_text: Miguel Ferrer,María de Diego,Gema Piñero,Amin Hassani,Marc Moonen,Alberto González
title: Transfer functions of FXLMS-based Multi-channel Multi-tone Active Noise Equalizers
title_zh: 基于 FXLMS 的多通道多音有源噪声均衡器的传递函数
abstract: Multi-channel Multi-tone Active Noise Equalizers can achieve different user-selected noise spectrum profiles even at different space positions. They can apply a different equalization factor at each noise frequency component and each control point. Theoretically, the value of the transfer function at the frequencies where the noise signal has energy is determined by the equalizer configuration. In this work, we show how to calculate these transfer functions with a double aim: to verify that at the frequencies of interest the values imposed by the equalizer settings are obtained, and to characterize the behavior of these transfer functions in the rest of the spectrum, as well as to get clues to predict the convergence behaviour of the algorithm. The information provided thanks to these transfer functions serves as a practical alternative to the cumbersome statistical analysis of convergence, whose results are often of no practical use.
summary: Multi-channel Multi-tone Active Noise Equalizers can achieve different user-selected noise spectrum profiles even at different space positions. They can apply a different equalization factor at each noise frequency component and each control point. Theoretically, the value of the transfer function at the frequencies where the noise signal has energy is determined by the equalizer configuration. In this work, we show how to calculate these transfer functions with a double aim: to verify that at the frequencies of interest the values imposed by the equalizer settings are obtained, and to characterize the behavior of these transfer functions in the rest of the spectrum, as well as to get clues to predict the convergence behaviour of the algorithm. The information provided thanks to these transfer functions serves as a practical alternative to the cumbersome statistical analysis of convergence, whose results are often of no practical use.
abstract_zh: 多通道多音调有源噪声均衡器即使在不同的空间位置也可以实现不同的用户选择的噪声频谱轮廓。他们可以在每个噪声频率分量和每个控制点应用不同的均衡因子。理论上，噪声信号具有能量的频率处的传递函数值由均衡器配置决定。在这项工作中，我们展示了如何计算这些传递函数，其目的有两个：验证在感兴趣的频率下是否获得了均衡器设置所施加的值，表征这些传递函数在频谱其余部分中的行为，以及获取预测算法收敛行为的线索。这些传递函数提供的信息可以作为繁琐的收敛统计分析的实用替代方案，其结果通常没有实际用途。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于FXLMS算法的多通道多音调主动噪声均衡器的传递函数计算方法。
AI.motivation: 验证均衡器在目标频率处的设定值是否达成，并分析其在其他频段的行为特征，以预测算法收敛性。
AI.method: 通过理论推导和计算，分析多通道多音调主动噪声均衡器的传递函数特性。
AI.result: 明确了传递函数在目标频率处的设定值验证方法，并揭示了其在非目标频段的行为规律。
AI.conclusion: 传递函数分析为算法收敛性研究提供了实用的替代方案，避免了复杂的统计分析。

authors_text: Alexander Schäfer,Gerd Reis,Didier Stricker
title: The Gesture Authoring Space: Authoring Customised Hand Gestures for Grasping Virtual Objects in Immersive Virtual Environments
title_zh: 手势创作空间：创作定制手势以在沉浸式虚拟环境中抓取虚拟对象
abstract: Natural user interfaces are on the rise. Manufacturers for Augmented, Virtual, and Mixed Reality head mounted displays are increasingly integrating new sensors into their consumer grade products, allowing gesture recognition without additional hardware. This offers new possibilities for bare handed interaction within virtual environments. This work proposes a hand gesture authoring tool for object specific grab gestures allowing virtual objects to be grabbed as in the real world. The presented solution uses template matching for gesture recognition and requires no technical knowledge to design and create custom tailored hand gestures. In a user study, the proposed approach is compared with the pinch gesture and the controller for grasping virtual objects. The different grasping techniques are compared in terms of accuracy, task completion time, usability, and naturalness. The study showed that gestures created with the proposed approach are perceived by users as a more natural input modality than the others.
summary: Natural user interfaces are on the rise. Manufacturers for Augmented, Virtual, and Mixed Reality head mounted displays are increasingly integrating new sensors into their consumer grade products, allowing gesture recognition without additional hardware. This offers new possibilities for bare handed interaction within virtual environments. The presented solution uses template matching for gesture recognition and requires no technical knowledge to design and create custom tailored hand gestures. In a user study, the proposed approach is compared with the pinch gesture and the controller for grasping virtual objects. The different grasping techniques are compared in terms of accuracy, task completion time, usability, and naturalness. The study showed that gestures created with the proposed approach are perceived by users as a more natural input modality than the others.
abstract_zh: 自然用户界面正在兴起。增强现实、虚拟现实和混合现实头戴式显示器制造商越来越多地将新传感器集成到其消费级产品中，无需额外硬件即可实现手势识别。这为虚拟环境中的徒手交互提供了新的可能性。这项工作提出了一种针对特定对象抓取手势的手势创作工具，允许像在现实世界中一样抓取虚拟对象。所提出的解决方案使用模板匹配进行手势识别，无需技术知识即可设计和创建定制手势。在用户研究中，将所提出的方法与捏合手势和用于抓取虚拟对象的控制器进行了比较。不同的抓取技术在准确性、任务完成时间、可用性和自然度方面进行了比较。研究表明，使用所提出的方法创建的手势被用户视为比其他方式更自然的输入方式。

AI.tldr: 开发一种用于在沉浸式虚拟环境中创建自定义手部抓取手势的工具
AI.motivation: 传统虚拟物体抓取方法（如捏合手势和控制器）存在局限性，需要更自然、用户友好的交互方式
AI.method: 采用模板匹配技术进行手势识别，提供直观界面供用户设计自定义手势，无需编程或技术背景
AI.result: 用户研究显示，与捏合手势和控制器相比，该方法在自然性、准确性、任务完成时间和可用性方面表现更优
AI.conclusion: 提出的工具有效支持用户创建自然、个性化的抓取手势，提升沉浸式虚拟环境的交互体验

authors_text: Fausto Giunchiglia,Mayukh Bagchi
title: Representation Heterogeneity
title_zh: 表征异质性
abstract: Semantic Heterogeneity is conventionally understood as the existence of variance in the representation of a target reality when modelled, by independent parties, in different databases, schemas and/ or data. We argue that the mere encoding of variance, while being necessary, is not sufficient enough to deal with the problem of representational heterogeneity, given that it is also necessary to encode the unifying basis on which such variance is manifested. To that end, this paper introduces a notion of Representation Heterogeneity in terms of the co-occurrent notions of Representation Unity and Representation Diversity. We have representation unity when two heterogeneous representations model the same target reality, representation diversity otherwise. In turn, this paper also highlights how these two notions get instantiated across the two layers of any representation, i.e., Language and Knowledge.
summary: Semantic Heterogeneity is conventionally understood as the existence of variance in the representation of a target reality when modelled, by independent parties, in different databases, schemas and/ or data. We argue that the mere encoding of variance, while being necessary, is not sufficient enough to deal with the problem of representational heterogeneity, given that it is also necessary to encode the unifying basis on which such variance is manifested. To that end, this paper introduces a notion of Representation Heterogeneity in terms of the co-occurrent notions of Representation Unity and Representation Diversity. We have representation unity when two heterogeneous representations model the same target reality, representation diversity otherwise. In turn, this paper also highlights how these two notions get instantiated across the two layers of any representation, i.e., Language and Knowledge.
abstract_zh: 语义异质性通常被理解为当由独立方在不同的数据库、模式和/或数据中建模时，目标现实的表示存在差异。我们认为，仅仅对方差进行编码虽然是必要的，但不足以解决表征异质性的问题，因为还需要对体现这种方差的统一基础进行编码。为此，本文根据表征统一性和表征多样性的共现概念引入了表征异质性的概念。当两个异构表示模拟相同的目标现实时，我们就具有表示统一性，否则表示表示多样性。反过来，本文还强调了这两个概念如何在任何表示的两个层（即语言和知识）中实例化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出表示异质性的概念框架，结合表示统一性与多样性，分析其在语言和知识层的体现。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅编码表示差异不足，需同时捕捉异质性背后的统一基础以解决跨系统建模问题。
AI.method: 通过理论框架构建，定义表示统一性（同一现实的异质表示）与多样性（非同一现实的表示），并分析其在语言和知识层的实例化。
AI.result: 提出表示异质性理论模型，明确统一性与多样性的区分标准及其在语言（语法/语义）和知识（本体/逻辑）层的实现方式。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为跨数据库/系统异质数据整合提供了理论依据，需同时考虑差异性与统一性基础以实现有效建模。
