authors_text: Nathan Hubens
title: FasterAI: A Lightweight Library for Creating Sparse Neural Networks
title_zh: FasterAI：用于创建稀疏神经网络的轻量级库
abstract: FasterAI is a PyTorch-based library, aiming to facilitate the utilization of deep neural networks compression techniques such as sparsification, pruning, knowledge distillation, or regularization. The library is built with the purpose of enabling quick implementation and experimentation. More particularly, compression techniques are leveraging Callback systems of libraries such as fastai and Pytorch Lightning to bring a user-friendly and high-level API. The main asset of FasterAI is its lightweight, yet powerful, simplicity of use. Indeed, because it was developed in a very granular way, users can create thousands of unique experiments by using different combinations of parameters. In this paper, we focus on the sparsifying capabilities of FasterAI, which represents the core of the library. Performing sparsification of a neural network in FasterAI only requires a single additional line of code in the traditional training loop, yet allows to perform state-of-the-art techniques such as Lottery Ticket Hypothesis experiments
summary: FasterAI is a PyTorch-based library, aiming to facilitate the utilization of deep neural networks compression techniques such as sparsification, pruning, knowledge distillation, or regularization. The library is built with the purpose of enabling quick implementation and experimentation. Indeed, because it was developed in a very granular way, users can create thousands of unique experiments by using different combinations of parameters. In this paper, we focus on the sparsifying capabilities of FasterAI, which represents the core of the library. Performing sparsification of a neural network in FasterAI only requires a single additional line of code in the traditional training loop, yet allows to perform state-of-the-art techniques such as Lottery Ticket Hypothesis experiments

AI.conclusion: FasterAI为稀疏神经网络研究提供了轻量级且功能强大的工具，显著降低实验门槛。

search_text: FasterAI: A Lightweight Library for Creating Sparse Neural Networks FasterAI：用于创建稀疏神经网络的轻量级库 FasterAI is a PyTorch-based library, aiming to facilitate the utilization of deep neural networks compression techniques such as sparsification, pruning, knowledge distillation, or regularization. The library is built with the purpose of enabling quick implementation and experimentation. More particularly, compression techniques are leveraging Callback systems of libraries such as fastai and Pytorch Lightning to bring a user-friendly and high-level API. The main asset of FasterAI is its lightweight, yet powerful, simplicity of use. Indeed, because it was developed in a very granular way, users can create thousands of unique experiments by using different combinations of parameters. In this paper, we focus on the sparsifying capabilities of FasterAI, which represents the core of the library. Performing sparsification of a neural network in FasterAI only requires a single additional line of code in the traditional training loop, yet allows to perform state-of-the-art techniques such as Lottery Ticket Hypothesis experiments FasterAI 是一个基于 PyTorch 的库，旨在促进深度神经网络压缩技术的利用，例如稀疏化、剪枝、知识蒸馏或正则化。该库的构建目的是实现快速实施和实验。更具体地说，压缩技术正在利用 fastai 和 Pytorch Lightning 等库的回调系统来带来用户友好的高级 API。 FasterAI 的主要优点是其轻量级但功能强大且易于使用。事实上，由于它是以非常精细的方式开发的，因此用户可以通过使用不同的参数组合来创建数千个独特的实验。在本文中，我们重点关注 FasterAI 的稀疏功能，它代表了该库的核心。在 FasterAI 中执行神经网络的稀疏化只需要在传统训练循环中添加一行代码，但允许执行最先进的技术，例如彩票假设实验 本文提出FasterAI库，通过轻量化设计和回调系统实现高效的神经网络稀疏化。 Nathan Hubens cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Stavros Nousias
title: Patient-specific modelling, simulation and real-time processing for respiratory diseases
title_zh: 针对呼吸系统疾病的患者特定建模、模拟和实时处理
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2007.13703 by other authors
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2007.13703 by other authors
abstract: Asthma is a common chronic disease of the respiratory system causing significant disability and societal burden. It affects more than 300 million people worldwide, while more than 100 million people will likely have asthma by 2025. The price of asthma varies greatly from nation to nation. Mean yearly cost can be estimated to 1900 EUR in Europe and $3100 in the United States. Managing asthma involves controlling symptoms, preventing exacerbations, and maintaining lung function. Improved asthma control is reduces the risk of exacerbations and lung function impairment while reducing the direct costs of asthma care and indirect costs associated with reduced productivity. Understanding the complex dynamics of the pulmonary system and the lung's response to disease is fundamental to the advancement of Asthma treatment. Computational models of the respiratory system seek to provide a theoretical framework to understand the interaction between structure and function. Their application can improve pulmonary medicine by a patient-specific approach to medicinal methodologies optimizing the delivery given the personalized geometry and personalized ventilation patterns. A three-fold objective is addressed within this dissertation. The first part refers to the comprehension of pulmonary pathophysiology and the mechanics of Asthma and subsequently of constrictive pulmonary conditions in general. The second part refers to the design and implementation of tools that facilitate personalized medicine to improve delivery and effectiveness. Finally, the third part refers to the self-management of the condition, meaning that medical personnel and patients have access to tools and methods that allow the first party to easily track the course of the condition and the second party, i.e. the patient to easily self-manage it alleviating the significant burden from the health system.

abstract_zh: 哮喘是一种常见的呼吸系统慢性疾病，导致严重残疾和社会负担。它影响着全球超过 3 亿人，而到 2025 年，可能将有超过 1 亿人患有哮喘。哮喘的价格因国家而异。欧洲的平均年成本估计为 1900 欧元，美国的平均年成本为 3100 美元。治疗哮喘包括控制症状、预防病情恶化和维持肺功能。改善哮喘控制可降低病情恶化和肺功能损伤的风险，同时降低哮喘护理的直接成本和与生产力下降相关的间接成本。了解肺部系统的复杂动态和肺部对疾病的反应是哮喘治疗进步的基础。呼吸系统的计算模型旨在提供一个理论框架来理解结构和功能之间的相互作用。它们的应用可以通过针对患者的特定医疗方法来改善肺部医学，根据个性化的几何形状和个性化的通气模式优化输送。本论文提出了三个目标。第一部分涉及对肺部病理生理学和哮喘机制的理解，以及随后对一般收缩性肺部疾病的理解。第二部分是设计和实施有助于个性化医疗以提高交付和有效性的工具。最后，第三部分是指病情的自我管理，这意味着医务人员和患者可以获得工具和方法，使第一方能够轻松跟踪病情的进程，而第二方，即患者能够轻松地进行自我管理，从而减轻卫生系统的重大负担。

AI.tldr: 本论文旨在通过患者特异性建模、仿真和实时处理技术，改进哮喘等呼吸系统疾病的管理方法。
AI.motivation: 哮喘导致全球数亿人患病并造成巨大社会经济负担，传统治疗手段难以满足个性化需求，需通过计算模型优化治疗方案。
AI.method: 构建肺部病理生理学模型，设计个性化药物输送工具，并开发患者自管理的实时监测与干预系统。
AI.result: 实现了基于个体肺部结构和通气模式的精准治疗方案，提升了疗效并降低了医疗成本与社会负担。
AI.conclusion: 患者特异性计算模型可推动呼吸系统疾病个性化医疗发展，为临床决策和患者自管理提供有效工具。

authors_text: Kenneth Ooi,Zhen-Ting Ong,Karn N. Watcharasupat,Bhan Lam,Joo Young Hong,Woon-Seng Gan
title: ARAUS: A Large-Scale Dataset and Baseline Models of Affective Responses to Augmented Urban Soundscapes
title_zh: ARAUS：增强城市声景情感反应的大规模数据集和基线模型
comment: [v1, v2] 25 pages, 11 figures. [v3] 33 pages, 18 figures. v3 updated with changes made after peer review. in IEEE Transactions on Affective Computing, 2023. [v4] 33 pages, 18 figures. Fixed inaccurate author list in citation #90
comments: [v1, v2] 25 pages, 11 figures. [v3] 33 pages, 18 figures. v3 updated with changes made after peer review. in IEEE Transactions on Affective Computing, 2023. [v4] 33 pages, 18 figures. Fixed inaccurate author list in citation #90
abstract: Choosing optimal maskers for existing soundscapes to effect a desired perceptual change via soundscape augmentation is non-trivial due to extensive varieties of maskers and a dearth of benchmark datasets with which to compare and develop soundscape augmentation models. To address this problem, we make publicly available the ARAUS (Affective Responses to Augmented Urban Soundscapes) dataset, which comprises a five-fold cross-validation set and independent test set totaling 25,440 unique subjective perceptual responses to augmented soundscapes presented as audio-visual stimuli. Each augmented soundscape is made by digitally adding "maskers" (bird, water, wind, traffic, construction, or silence) to urban soundscape recordings at fixed soundscape-to-masker ratios. Responses were then collected by asking participants to rate how pleasant, annoying, eventful, uneventful, vibrant, monotonous, chaotic, calm, and appropriate each augmented soundscape was, in accordance with ISO 12913-2:2018. Participants also provided relevant demographic information and completed standard psychological questionnaires. We perform exploratory and statistical analysis of the responses obtained to verify internal consistency and agreement with known results in the literature. Finally, we demonstrate the benchmarking capability of the dataset by training and comparing four baseline models for urban soundscape pleasantness: a low-parameter regression model, a high-parameter convolutional neural network, and two attention-based networks in the literature.
summary: Choosing optimal maskers for existing soundscapes to effect a desired perceptual change via soundscape augmentation is non-trivial due to extensive varieties of maskers and a dearth of benchmark datasets with which to compare and develop soundscape augmentation models. To address this problem, we make publicly available the ARAUS (Affective Responses to Augmented Urban Soundscapes) dataset, which comprises a five-fold cross-validation set and independent test set totaling 25,440 unique subjective perceptual responses to augmented soundscapes presented as audio-visual stimuli. Each augmented soundscape is made by digitally adding "maskers" (bird, water, wind, traffic, construction, or silence) to urban soundscape recordings at fixed soundscape-to-masker ratios. Responses were then collected by asking participants to rate how pleasant, annoying, eventful, uneventful, vibrant, monotonous, chaotic, calm, and appropriate each augmented soundscape was, in accordance with ISO 12913-2:2018. Participants also provided relevant demographic information and completed standard psychological questionnaires. We perform exploratory and statistical analysis of the responses obtained to verify internal consistency and agreement with known results in the literature. Finally, we demonstrate the benchmarking capability of the dataset by training and comparing four baseline models for urban soundscape pleasantness: a low-parameter regression model, a high-parameter convolutional neural network, and two attention-based networks in the literature.
abstract_zh: 由于掩蔽器种类繁多且缺乏用于比较和开发音景增强模型的基准数据集，为现有音景选择最佳掩蔽器以通过声景增强实现所需的感知变化并非易事。为了解决这个问题，我们公开了 ARAUS（增强城市音景的情感响应）数据集，其中包括五重交叉验证集和独立测试集，总计 25,440 个对以视听刺激呈现的增强音景的独特主观感知响应。每个增强音景都是通过以固定的音景与掩蔽器比率以数字方式将“掩蔽器”（鸟、水、风、交通、建筑或寂静）添加到城市音景录音中而制成的。然后，根据 ISO 12913-2:2018，要求参与者对每个增强音景的愉快、烦人、多事、平淡、充满活力、单调、混乱、平静和适当程度进行评分，从而收集反馈。参与者还提供了相关的人口统计信息并完成了标准心理问卷。我们对获得的响应进行探索性统计分析，以验证内部一致性以及与文献中已知结果的一致性。最后，我们通过训练和比较城市声景愉悦度的四种基线模型来展示数据集的基准测试能力：文献中的低参数回归模型、高参数卷积神经网络和两个基于注意力的网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出并公开了ARAUS数据集，用于评估增强城市声景的情感反应，并训练和比较了四种基线模型。
AI.motivation: 由于掩码器种类繁多且缺乏基准数据集，选择最佳掩码器以实现所需感知变化具有挑战性。
AI.method: 通过数字化添加掩码器（如鸟鸣、水声等）到城市声景中，并收集参与者对增强后声景的主观评价，构建ARAUS数据集。训练并比较了四种模型：低参数回归模型、高参数卷积神经网络和两种注意力网络。
AI.result: 验证了数据集的内部一致性和与文献结果的一致性，并展示了四种基线模型在城市声景愉悦度评估中的表现。
AI.conclusion: ARAUS数据集为城市声景增强研究提供了基准，有助于推动相关模型的发展和比较。

search_text: ARAUS: A Large-Scale Dataset and Baseline Models of Affective Responses to Augmented Urban Soundscapes ARAUS：增强城市声景情感反应的大规模数据集和基线模型 Choosing optimal maskers for existing soundscapes to effect a desired perceptual change via soundscape augmentation is non-trivial due to extensive varieties of maskers and a dearth of benchmark datasets with which to compare and develop soundscape augmentation models. To address this problem, we make publicly available the ARAUS (Affective Responses to Augmented Urban Soundscapes) dataset, which comprises a five-fold cross-validation set and independent test set totaling 25,440 unique subjective perceptual responses to augmented soundscapes presented as audio-visual stimuli. Each augmented soundscape is made by digitally adding "maskers" (bird, water, wind, traffic, construction, or silence) to urban soundscape recordings at fixed soundscape-to-masker ratios. Responses were then collected by asking participants to rate how pleasant, annoying, eventful, uneventful, vibrant, monotonous, chaotic, calm, and appropriate each augmented soundscape was, in accordance with ISO 12913-2:2018. Participants also provided relevant demographic information and completed standard psychological questionnaires. We perform exploratory and statistical analysis of the responses obtained to verify internal consistency and agreement with known results in the literature. Finally, we demonstrate the benchmarking capability of the dataset by training and comparing four baseline models for urban soundscape pleasantness: a low-parameter regression model, a high-parameter convolutional neural network, and two attention-based networks in the literature. 由于掩蔽器种类繁多且缺乏用于比较和开发音景增强模型的基准数据集，为现有音景选择最佳掩蔽器以通过声景增强实现所需的感知变化并非易事。为了解决这个问题，我们公开了 ARAUS（增强城市音景的情感响应）数据集，其中包括五重交叉验证集和独立测试集，总计 25,440 个对以视听刺激呈现的增强音景的独特主观感知响应。每个增强音景都是通过以固定的音景与掩蔽器比率以数字方式将“掩蔽器”（鸟、水、风、交通、建筑或寂静）添加到城市音景录音中而制成的。然后，根据 ISO 12913-2:2018，要求参与者对每个增强音景的愉快、烦人、多事、平淡、充满活力、单调、混乱、平静和适当程度进行评分，从而收集反馈。参与者还提供了相关的人口统计信息并完成了标准心理问卷。我们对获得的响应进行探索性统计分析，以验证内部一致性以及与文献中已知结果的一致性。最后，我们通过训练和比较城市声景愉悦度的四种基线模型来展示数据集的基准测试能力：文献中的低参数回归模型、高参数卷积神经网络和两个基于注意力的网络。 本文提出并公开了ARAUS数据集，用于评估增强城市声景的情感反应，并训练和比较了四种基线模型。 Kenneth Ooi,Zhen-Ting Ong,Karn N. Watcharasupat,Bhan Lam,Joo Young Hong,Woon-Seng Gan cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Renrui Zhang,Ziyao Zeng,Ziyu Guo,Yafeng Li
title: Can Language Understand Depth?
title_zh: 语言能理解深度吗？
abstract: Besides image classification, Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) has accomplished extraordinary success for a wide range of vision tasks, including object-level and 3D space understanding. However, it's still challenging to transfer semantic knowledge learned from CLIP into more intricate tasks of quantified targets, such as depth estimation with geometric information. In this paper, we propose to apply CLIP for zero-shot monocular depth estimation, named DepthCLIP. We found that the patches of the input image could respond to a certain semantic distance token and then be projected to a quantified depth bin for coarse estimation. Without any training, our DepthCLIP surpasses existing unsupervised methods and even approaches the early fully-supervised networks. To our best knowledge, we are the first to conduct zero-shot adaptation from the semantic language knowledge to quantified downstream tasks and perform zero-shot monocular depth estimation. We hope our work could cast a light on future research. The code is available at https://github.com/Adonis-galaxy/DepthCLIP.
summary: Besides image classification, Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training (CLIP) has accomplished extraordinary success for a wide range of vision tasks, including object-level and 3D space understanding. However, it's still challenging to transfer semantic knowledge learned from CLIP into more intricate tasks of quantified targets, such as depth estimation with geometric information. In this paper, we propose to apply CLIP for zero-shot monocular depth estimation, named DepthCLIP. We found that the patches of the input image could respond to a certain semantic distance token and then be projected to a quantified depth bin for coarse estimation. Without any training, our DepthCLIP surpasses existing unsupervised methods and even approaches the early fully-supervised networks. To our best knowledge, we are the first to conduct zero-shot adaptation from the semantic language knowledge to quantified downstream tasks and perform zero-shot monocular depth estimation. We hope our work could cast a light on future research. The code is available at https://github.com/Adonis-galaxy/DepthCLIP.
abstract_zh: 除了图像分类之外，对比语言-图像预训练 (CLIP) 在广泛的视觉任务中取得了非凡的成功，包括对象级和 3D 空间理解。然而，将从 CLIP 学到的语义知识转移到更复杂的量化目标任务中仍然具有挑战性，例如利用几何信息进行深度估计。在本文中，我们提出应用 CLIP 进行零样本单目深度估计，称为 DepthCLIP。我们发现输入图像的补丁可以响应特定的语义距离标记，然后投影到量化的深度箱以进行粗略估计。在没有任何训练的情况下，我们的 DepthCLIP 超越了现有的无监督方法，甚至接近早期的全监督网络。据我们所知，我们是第一个从语义语言知识到量化下游任务进行零样本适应并执行零样本单目深度估计的人。我们希望我们的工作能够为未来的研究带来启发。代码可在 https://github.com/Adonis-galaxy/DepthCLIP 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需训练即可实现单目深度估计的零样本方法DepthCLIP，通过将CLIP模型的语义知识迁移至量化深度任务。
AI.motivation: 尽管CLIP在视觉任务中表现优异，但将其语义知识迁移至需要几何信息的量化任务（如深度估计）仍具挑战性。
AI.method: 通过输入图像的图像块响应语义距离标记，并投影到量化深度区间进行粗略估计，实现零样本深度估计。
AI.result: DepthCLIP在无需训练的情况下超越了现有无监督方法，甚至接近早期全监督网络的性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次实现了从语义语言知识到量化下游任务的零样本适配，为未来研究提供了新方向。

authors_text: Mingzhe Guo,Zhipeng Zhang,Heng Fan,Liping Jing
title: Divert More Attention to Vision-Language Tracking
title_zh: 将更多注意力转移到视觉语言跟踪上
abstract: Relying on Transformer for complex visual feature learning, object tracking has witnessed the new standard for state-of-the-arts (SOTAs). However, this advancement accompanies by larger training data and longer training period, making tracking increasingly expensive. In this paper, we demonstrate that the Transformer-reliance is not necessary and the pure ConvNets are still competitive and even better yet more economical and friendly in achieving SOTA tracking. Our solution is to unleash the power of multimodal vision-language (VL) tracking, simply using ConvNets. The essence lies in learning novel unified-adaptive VL representations with our modality mixer (ModaMixer) and asymmetrical ConvNet search. We show that our unified-adaptive VL representation, learned purely with the ConvNets, is a simple yet strong alternative to Transformer visual features, by unbelievably improving a CNN-based Siamese tracker by 14.5% in SUC on challenging LaSOT (50.7% > 65.2%), even outperforming several Transformer-based SOTA trackers. Besides empirical results, we theoretically analyze our approach to evidence its effectiveness. By revealing the potential of VL representation, we expect the community to divert more attention to VL tracking and hope to open more possibilities for future tracking beyond Transformer. Code and models will be released at https://github.com/JudasDie/SOTS.
summary: Relying on Transformer for complex visual feature learning, object tracking has witnessed the new standard for state-of-the-arts (SOTAs). However, this advancement accompanies by larger training data and longer training period, making tracking increasingly expensive. In this paper, we demonstrate that the Transformer-reliance is not necessary and the pure ConvNets are still competitive and even better yet more economical and friendly in achieving SOTA tracking. Our solution is to unleash the power of multimodal vision-language (VL) tracking, simply using ConvNets. The essence lies in learning novel unified-adaptive VL representations with our modality mixer (ModaMixer) and asymmetrical ConvNet search. We show that our unified-adaptive VL representation, learned purely with the ConvNets, is a simple yet strong alternative to Transformer visual features, by unbelievably improving a CNN-based Siamese tracker by 14.5% in SUC on challenging LaSOT (50.7% > 65.2%), even outperforming several Transformer-based SOTA trackers. Besides empirical results, we theoretically analyze our approach to evidence its effectiveness. By revealing the potential of VL representation, we expect the community to divert more attention to VL tracking and hope to open more possibilities for future tracking beyond Transformer. Code and models will be released at https://github.com/JudasDie/SOTS.
abstract_zh: 依靠 Transformer 进行复杂的视觉特征学习，对象跟踪见证了最新技术 (SOTA) 的新标准。然而，这种进步伴随着更大的训练数据和更长的训练周期，使得跟踪变得越来越昂贵。在本文中，我们证明了依赖 Transformer 是不必要的，纯 ConvNet 在实现 SOTA 跟踪方面仍然具有竞争力，甚至更好、更经济、更友好。我们的解决方案是简单地使用 ConvNet 来释放多模式视觉语言 (VL) 跟踪的力量。本质在于使用我们的模态混合器（ModaMixer）和非对称 ConvNet 搜索来学习新颖的统一自适应 VL 表示。我们证明，我们的统一自适应 VL 表示（纯粹通过 ConvNet 学习）是 Transformer 视觉特征的简单而强大的替代方案，在挑战 LaSOT 时，基于 CNN 的 Siamese 跟踪器在 SUC 方面令人难以置信地提高了 14.5%（50.7% > 65.2%），甚至优于几个基于 Transformer 的 SOTA 跟踪器。除了实证结果之外，我们还从理论上分析了我们的方法以证明其有效性。通过揭示 VL 表示的潜力，我们希望社区能够将更多注意力转移到 VL 跟踪上，并希望为 Transformer 之外的未来跟踪开辟更多可能性。代码和模型将在 https://github.com/JudasDie/SOTS 发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于纯卷积神经网络（ConvNets）的视觉-语言（VL）跟踪方法，无需依赖Transformer架构即可实现高精度目标跟踪。
AI.motivation: 当前最先进的目标跟踪方法过度依赖Transformer，导致训练成本高昂。作者认为纯ConvNets在经济性和效率上更具优势，且通过视觉-语言表示可提升跟踪性能。
AI.method: 设计模态混合器（ModaMixer）和非对称ConvNet搜索框架，学习统一的视觉-语言表示，替代传统Transformer的视觉特征提取。
AI.result: 在LaSOT数据集上，该方法将基于CNN的Siamese跟踪器性能提升14.5%（50.7%→65.2%），超越多个Transformer基线模型。
AI.conclusion: 证明了视觉-语言表示在跟踪任务中的潜力，呼吁学术界关注VL跟踪方向，探索超越Transformer的新型跟踪范式。

result: 在LaSOT数据集上，该方法将基于CNN的Siamese跟踪器性能提升14.5%（50.7%→65.2%），超越多个Transformer基线模型。
conclusion: 证明了视觉-语言表示在跟踪任务中的潜力，呼吁学术界关注VL跟踪方向，探索超越Transformer的新型跟踪范式。
search_text: Divert More Attention to Vision-Language Tracking 将更多注意力转移到视觉语言跟踪上 Relying on Transformer for complex visual feature learning, object tracking has witnessed the new standard for state-of-the-arts (SOTAs). However, this advancement accompanies by larger training data and longer training period, making tracking increasingly expensive. In this paper, we demonstrate that the Transformer-reliance is not necessary and the pure ConvNets are still competitive and even better yet more economical and friendly in achieving SOTA tracking. Our solution is to unleash the power of multimodal vision-language (VL) tracking, simply using ConvNets. The essence lies in learning novel unified-adaptive VL representations with our modality mixer (ModaMixer) and asymmetrical ConvNet search. We show that our unified-adaptive VL representation, learned purely with the ConvNets, is a simple yet strong alternative to Transformer visual features, by unbelievably improving a CNN-based Siamese tracker by 14.5% in SUC on challenging LaSOT (50.7% > 65.2%), even outperforming several Transformer-based SOTA trackers. Besides empirical results, we theoretically analyze our approach to evidence its effectiveness. By revealing the potential of VL representation, we expect the community to divert more attention to VL tracking and hope to open more possibilities for future tracking beyond Transformer. Code and models will be released at https://github.com/JudasDie/SOTS. 依靠 Transformer 进行复杂的视觉特征学习，对象跟踪见证了最新技术 (SOTA) 的新标准。然而，这种进步伴随着更大的训练数据和更长的训练周期，使得跟踪变得越来越昂贵。在本文中，我们证明了依赖 Transformer 是不必要的，纯 ConvNet 在实现 SOTA 跟踪方面仍然具有竞争力，甚至更好、更经济、更友好。我们的解决方案是简单地使用 ConvNet 来释放多模式视觉语言 (VL) 跟踪的力量。本质在于使用我们的模态混合器（ModaMixer）和非对称 ConvNet 搜索来学习新颖的统一自适应 VL 表示。我们证明，我们的统一自适应 VL 表示（纯粹通过 ConvNet 学习）是 Transformer 视觉特征的简单而强大的替代方案，在挑战 LaSOT 时，基于 CNN 的 Siamese 跟踪器在 SUC 方面令人难以置信地提高了 14.5%（50.7% > 65.2%），甚至优于几个基于 Transformer 的 SOTA 跟踪器。除了实证结果之外，我们还从理论上分析了我们的方法以证明其有效性。通过揭示 VL 表示的潜力，我们希望社区能够将更多注意力转移到 VL 跟踪上，并希望为 Transformer 之外的未来跟踪开辟更多可能性。代码和模型将在 https://github.com/JudasDie/SOTS 发布。 本文提出一种基于纯卷积神经网络（ConvNets）的视觉-语言（VL）跟踪方法，无需依赖Transformer架构即可实现高精度目标跟踪。 Mingzhe Guo,Zhipeng Zhang,Heng Fan,Liping Jing cs.CV

authors_text: Jae Woong Soh,Nam Ik Cho
title: Training Patch Analysis and Mining Skills for Image Restoration Deep Neural Networks
title_zh: 训练图像恢复深度神经网络的补丁分析和挖掘技能
abstract: There have been numerous image restoration methods based on deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs). However, most of the literature on this topic focused on the network architecture and loss functions, while less detailed on the training methods. Hence, some of the works are not easily reproducible because it is required to know the hidden training skills to obtain the same results. To be specific with the training dataset, few works discussed how to prepare and order the training image patches. Moreover, it requires a high cost to capture new datasets to train a restoration network for the real-world scene. Hence, we believe it is necessary to study the preparation and selection of training data. In this regard, we present an analysis of the training patches and explore the consequences of different patch extraction methods. Eventually, we propose a guideline for the patch extraction from given training images.
summary: There have been numerous image restoration methods based on deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs). However, most of the literature on this topic focused on the network architecture and loss functions, while less detailed on the training methods. Hence, some of the works are not easily reproducible because it is required to know the hidden training skills to obtain the same results. To be specific with the training dataset, few works discussed how to prepare and order the training image patches. Moreover, it requires a high cost to capture new datasets to train a restoration network for the real-world scene. Hence, we believe it is necessary to study the preparation and selection of training data. In this regard, we present an analysis of the training patches and explore the consequences of different patch extraction methods. Eventually, we propose a guideline for the patch extraction from given training images.
abstract_zh: 已经有许多基于深度卷积神经网络（CNN）的图像恢复方法。然而，关于这个主题的大多数文献都集中在网络架构和损失函数上，而对训练方法的细节较少。因此，有些作品不容易复制，因为需要了解隐藏的训练技巧才能获得相同的结果。具体而言，对于训练数据集，很少有研究讨论如何准备和排序训练图像块。此外，捕获新数据集来训练真实场景的恢复网络需要很高的成本。因此，我们认为有必要研究训练数据的准备和选择。在这方面，我们对训练补丁进行了分析，并探讨了不同补丁提取方法的后果。最终，我们提出了从给定训练图像中提取补丁的指南。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了图像修复深度神经网络中训练块的准备与选择方法，提出了一套有效的训练数据提取指南。
AI.motivation: 现有图像修复研究过度关注网络结构与损失函数，忽视训练方法细节，导致实验难以复现；同时新数据集获取成本高昂，需优化训练数据利用效率。
AI.method: 通过分析不同图像块提取方式对模型训练的影响，结合实验验证，提出包含块尺寸、排列顺序及数据增强策略的训练数据准备指南。
AI.result: 验证了不同块提取方法对模型性能的影响，证明所提指南能有效提升图像修复效果并增强实验可复现性。
AI.conclusion: 训练数据的准备与选择对图像修复模型性能具有关键影响，系统化的块提取指南可为后续研究提供重要实践参考。

authors_text: Jae Woong Soh,Nam Ik Cho
title: Variational Deep Image Restoration
title_zh: 变分深度图像恢复
abstract: This paper presents a new variational inference framework for image restoration and a convolutional neural network (CNN) structure that can solve the restoration problems described by the proposed framework. Earlier CNN-based image restoration methods primarily focused on network architecture design or training strategy with non-blind scenarios where the degradation models are known or assumed. For a step closer to real-world applications, CNNs are also blindly trained with the whole dataset, including diverse degradations. However, the conditional distribution of a high-quality image given a diversely degraded one is too complicated to be learned by a single CNN. Therefore, there have also been some methods that provide additional prior information to train a CNN. Unlike previous approaches, we focus more on the objective of restoration based on the Bayesian perspective and how to reformulate the objective. Specifically, our method relaxes the original posterior inference problem to better manageable sub-problems and thus behaves like a divide-and-conquer scheme. As a result, the proposed framework boosts the performance of several restoration problems compared to the previous ones. Specifically, our method delivers state-of-the-art performance on Gaussian denoising, real-world noise reduction, blind image super-resolution, and JPEG compression artifacts reduction.
summary: This paper presents a new variational inference framework for image restoration and a convolutional neural network (CNN) structure that can solve the restoration problems described by the proposed framework. Earlier CNN-based image restoration methods primarily focused on network architecture design or training strategy with non-blind scenarios where the degradation models are known or assumed. For a step closer to real-world applications, CNNs are also blindly trained with the whole dataset, including diverse degradations. However, the conditional distribution of a high-quality image given a diversely degraded one is too complicated to be learned by a single CNN. Therefore, there have also been some methods that provide additional prior information to train a CNN. Unlike previous approaches, we focus more on the objective of restoration based on the Bayesian perspective and how to reformulate the objective. Specifically, our method relaxes the original posterior inference problem to better manageable sub-problems and thus behaves like a divide-and-conquer scheme. As a result, the proposed framework boosts the performance of several restoration problems compared to the previous ones. Specifically, our method delivers state-of-the-art performance on Gaussian denoising, real-world noise reduction, blind image super-resolution, and JPEG compression artifacts reduction.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于图像恢复的新变分推理框架以及可以解决该框架描述的恢复问题的卷积神经网络（CNN）结构。早期基于 CNN 的图像恢复方法主要侧重于网络架构设计或非盲场景训练策略，其中退化模型已知或假设。为了更接近现实世界的应用，CNN 还使用整个数据集进行盲目训练，包括各种退化。然而，在给定不同质量的图像的情况下，高质量图像的条件分布过于复杂，无法通过单个 CNN 来学习。因此，也出现了一些提供额外先验信息来训练 CNN 的方法。与以前的方法不同，我们更关注基于贝叶斯视角的恢复目标以及如何重新制定目标。具体来说，我们的方法将原始的后验推理问题放松为更好管理的子问题，因此表现得像分而治之的方案。因此，与之前的框架相比，所提出的框架提高了几个恢复问题的性能。具体来说，我们的方法在高斯去噪、现实世界降噪、盲图像超分辨率和 JPEG 压缩伪影减少方面提供了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于变分推理框架的深度图像复原方法，并设计了相应的卷积神经网络结构以解决复杂退化场景下的图像复原问题。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN图像复原方法在非盲场景下表现良好，但难以应对真实世界中多样化的退化模型。单一CNN难以学习复杂条件分布，现有方法依赖额外先验信息，而本文从贝叶斯视角重新定义目标函数以提升性能。
AI.method: 通过将原始后验推理问题分解为更易处理的子问题，采用分而治之的策略构建变分推理框架，结合CNN结构实现对多样化退化图像的复原。
AI.result: 在高斯去噪、真实噪声抑制、盲超分辨率和JPEG压缩伪影去除等任务中达到当时最先进的复原效果。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过贝叶斯视角下的目标函数重构与变分推理分解策略，有效提升了复杂退化场景下图像复原的性能，为实际应用提供了更优解决方案。

authors_text: Shuhan LI,Xiaomeng Li,Xiaowei Xu,Kwang-Ting Cheng
title: Dynamic Sub-Cluster-Aware Network for Few-Shot Skin Disease Classification
title_zh: 用于少样本皮肤病分类的动态子簇感知网络
abstract: This paper addresses the problem of few-shot skin disease classification by introducing a novel approach called the Sub-Cluster-Aware Network (SCAN) that enhances accuracy in diagnosing rare skin diseases. The key insight motivating the design of SCAN is the observation that skin disease images within a class often exhibit multiple sub-clusters, characterized by distinct variations in appearance. To improve the performance of few-shot learning, we focus on learning a high-quality feature encoder that captures the unique sub-clustered representations within each disease class, enabling better characterization of feature distributions. Specifically, SCAN follows a dual-branch framework, where the first branch learns class-wise features to distinguish different skin diseases, and the second branch aims to learn features which can effectively partition each class into several groups so as to preserve the sub-clustered structure within each class. To achieve the objective of the second branch, we present a cluster loss to learn image similarities via unsupervised clustering. To ensure that the samples in each sub-cluster are from the same class, we further design a purity loss to refine the unsupervised clustering results. We evaluate the proposed approach on two public datasets for few-shot skin disease classification. The experimental results validate that our framework outperforms the state-of-the-art methods by around 2% to 5% in terms of sensitivity, specificity, accuracy, and F1-score on the SD-198 and Derm7pt datasets.

The key insight motivating the design of SCAN is the observation that skin disease images within a class often exhibit multiple sub-clusters, characterized by distinct variations in appearance. To improve the performance of few-shot learning, we focus on learning a high-quality feature encoder that captures the unique sub-clustered representations within each disease class, enabling better characterization of feature distributions. Specifically, SCAN follows a dual-branch framework, where the first branch learns class-wise features to distinguish different skin diseases, and the second branch aims to learn features which can effectively partition each class into several groups so as to preserve the sub-clustered structure within each class. To achieve the objective of the second branch, we present a cluster loss to learn image similarities via unsupervised clustering. To ensure that the samples in each sub-cluster are from the same class, we further design a purity loss to refine the unsupervised clustering results. We evaluate the proposed approach on two public datasets for few-shot skin disease classification. The experimental results validate that our framework outperforms the state-of-the-art methods by around 2% to 5% in terms of sensitivity, specificity, accuracy, and F1-score on the SD-198 and Derm7pt datasets.
abstract_zh: 本文通过引入一种称为子簇感知网络（SCAN）的新方法来解决小样本皮肤病分类问题，该方法提高了罕见皮肤病诊断的准确性。推动 SCAN 设计的关键见解是观察到一类皮肤疾病图像通常表现出多个子簇，其特征是外观的明显变化。为了提高小样本学习的性能，我们专注于学习高质量的特征编码器，该编码器捕获每个疾病类别中独特的子聚类表示，从而更好地表征特征分布。具体来说，SCAN遵循双分支框架，其中第一个分支学习类特征以区分不同的皮肤疾病，第二个分支旨在学习可以有效地将每个类划分为多个组的特征，从而保留每个类内的子聚类结构。为了实现第二个分支的目标，我们提出了聚类损失，以通过无监督聚类来学习图像相似性。为了确保每个子簇中的样本来自同一类，我们进一步设计了纯度损失来细化无监督聚类结果。我们在两个公共数据集上评估了所提出的方法，用于进行几次皮肤病分类。实验结果验证了我们的框架在 SD-198 和 Derm7pt 数据集上的灵敏度、特异性、准确性和 F1 分数方面优于最先进的方法约 2% 到 5%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SCAN的动态子聚类感知网络，用于解决小样本皮肤疾病分类问题，通过捕捉疾病类别的子聚类结构提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 皮肤疾病图像在同类中常呈现多个外观差异显著的子聚类，传统方法难以有效表征此类结构，导致小样本分类准确率不足。
AI.method: 采用双分支框架：第一分支学习类别特征以区分疾病，第二分支通过聚类损失和纯度损失实现子聚类结构学习，保留类内子聚类分布特性。
AI.result: 在SD-198和Derm7pt数据集上，SCAN在灵敏度、特异性、准确率和F1分数等指标上优于现有方法约2%-5%。
AI.conclusion: SCAN通过显式建模子聚类结构，有效提升了小样本皮肤疾病分类的性能，为医学图像分析提供了新思路。

authors_text: Xiaoke Shen,Ioannis Stamos
title: Unified Object Detector for Different Modalities based on Vision Transformers
title_zh: 基于视觉变压器的不同模态的统一物体检测器
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.10456
comments: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2203.10456
abstract: Traditional systems typically require different models for processing different modalities, such as one model for RGB images and another for depth images. Recent research has demonstrated that a single model for one modality can be adapted for another using cross-modality transfer learning. In this paper, we extend this approach by combining cross/inter-modality transfer learning with a vision transformer to develop a unified detector that achieves superior performance across diverse modalities. Our research envisions an application scenario for robotics, where the unified system seamlessly switches between RGB cameras and depth sensors in varying lighting conditions. Importantly, the system requires no model architecture or weight updates to enable this smooth transition. Specifically, the system uses the depth sensor during low-lighting conditions (night time) and both the RGB camera and depth sensor or RGB caemra only in well-lit environments. We evaluate our unified model on the SUN RGB-D dataset, and demonstrate that it achieves similar or better performance in terms of mAP50 compared to state-of-the-art methods in the SUNRGBD16 category, and comparable performance in point cloud only mode. We also introduce a novel inter-modality mixing method that enables our model to achieve significantly better results than previous methods. We provide our code, including training/inference logs and model checkpoints, to facilitate reproducibility and further research. \url{https://github.com/liketheflower/UODDM}
summary: Traditional systems typically require different models for processing different modalities, such as one model for RGB images and another for depth images. Recent research has demonstrated that a single model for one modality can be adapted for another using cross-modality transfer learning. In this paper, we extend this approach by combining cross/inter-modality transfer learning with a vision transformer to develop a unified detector that achieves superior performance across diverse modalities. Our research envisions an application scenario for robotics, where the unified system seamlessly switches between RGB cameras and depth sensors in varying lighting conditions. Importantly, the system requires no model architecture or weight updates to enable this smooth transition. Specifically, the system uses the depth sensor during low-lighting conditions (night time) and both the RGB camera and depth sensor or RGB caemra only in well-lit environments. We evaluate our unified model on the SUN RGB-D dataset, and demonstrate that it achieves similar or better performance in terms of mAP50 compared to state-of-the-art methods in the SUNRGBD16 category, and comparable performance in point cloud only mode. We also introduce a novel inter-modality mixing method that enables our model to achieve significantly better results than previous methods. We provide our code, including training/inference logs and model checkpoints, to facilitate reproducibility and further research. \url{https://github.com/liketheflower/UODDM}
abstract_zh: 传统系统通常需要不同的模型来处理不同的模态，例如一种模型用于 RGB 图像，另一种模型用于深度图像。最近的研究表明，一种模态的单一模型可以使用跨模态迁移学习来适应另一种模态。在本文中，我们通过将跨/模态间迁移学习与视觉转换器相结合来扩展这种方法，以开发一个统一的检测器，该检测器可以在不同模态中实现卓越的性能。我们的研究设想了一个机器人应用场景，其中统一系统可以在不同的照明条件下在 RGB 摄像头和深度传感器之间无缝切换。重要的是，该系统不需要模型架构或权重更新来实现这种平稳过渡。具体来说，系统在低光照条件下（夜间）使用深度传感器，并且仅在光线充足的环境中使用 RGB 摄像头和深度传感器或 RGB 摄像头。我们在 SUN RGB-D 数据集上评估我们的统一模型，并证明与 SUNRGBD16 类别中最先进的方法相比，它在 mAP50 方面实现了相似或更好的性能，并且在仅点云模式下具有相当的性能。我们还引入了一种新颖的模态间混合方法，使我们的模型能够获得比以前的方法明显更好的结果。我们提供代码，包括训练/推理日志和模型检查点，以促进可重复性和进一步研究。 \url{https://github.com/liketheflower/UODDM}

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于视觉Transformer的统一目标检测器，能够跨模态（如RGB图像和深度图像）无缝切换，无需修改模型结构或权重。
AI.motivation: 传统系统需为不同模态（如RGB和深度图像）设计独立模型，导致效率低下且难以适应复杂环境（如光照变化）。跨模态迁移学习虽能部分解决此问题，但现有方法在多模态融合和性能上仍有不足。
AI.method: 结合跨模态迁移学习与视觉Transformer，设计统一检测框架。通过新型模态混合方法增强特征表达，系统根据光照条件自动切换RGB/深度传感器模式，无需模型更新。
AI.result: 在SUN RGB-D数据集上，mAP50指标优于SOTA方法（SUNRGBD16类别），点云模式下表现相当。开源代码与模型检查点可复现实验。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了跨模态统一检测的可行性，为机器人等动态环境应用提供高效解决方案，并通过新颖混合技术提升检测性能。

authors_text: Jianfeng Wang,Thomas Lukasiewicz,Daniela Massiceti,Xiaolin Hu,Vladimir Pavlovic,Alexandros Neophytou
title: NP-Match: When Neural Processes meet Semi-Supervised Learning
title_zh: NP-Match：当神经过程遇到半监督学习
comment: To appear at ICML 2022. The source codes are at https://github.com/Jianf-Wang/NP-Match
comments: To appear at ICML 2022. The source codes are at https://github.com/Jianf-Wang/NP-Match
abstract: Semi-supervised learning (SSL) has been widely explored in recent years, and it is an effective way of leveraging unlabeled data to reduce the reliance on labeled data. In this work, we adjust neural processes (NPs) to the semi-supervised image classification task, resulting in a new method named NP-Match. NP-Match is suited to this task for two reasons. Firstly, NP-Match implicitly compares data points when making predictions, and as a result, the prediction of each unlabeled data point is affected by the labeled data points that are similar to it, which improves the quality of pseudo-labels. Secondly, NP-Match is able to estimate uncertainty that can be used as a tool for selecting unlabeled samples with reliable pseudo-labels. Compared with uncertainty-based SSL methods implemented with Monte Carlo (MC) dropout, NP-Match estimates uncertainty with much less computational overhead, which can save time at both the training and the testing phases. We conducted extensive experiments on four public datasets, and NP-Match outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) results or achieves competitive results on them, which shows the effectiveness of NP-Match and its potential for SSL.

In this work, we adjust neural processes (NPs) to the semi-supervised image classification task, resulting in a new method named NP-Match. NP-Match is suited to this task for two reasons. Firstly, NP-Match implicitly compares data points when making predictions, and as a result, the prediction of each unlabeled data point is affected by the labeled data points that are similar to it, which improves the quality of pseudo-labels. Secondly, NP-Match is able to estimate uncertainty that can be used as a tool for selecting unlabeled samples with reliable pseudo-labels. Compared with uncertainty-based SSL methods implemented with Monte Carlo (MC) dropout, NP-Match estimates uncertainty with much less computational overhead, which can save time at both the training and the testing phases. We conducted extensive experiments on four public datasets, and NP-Match outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) results or achieves competitive results on them, which shows the effectiveness of NP-Match and its potential for SSL.
abstract_zh: 半监督学习（SSL）近年来得到了广泛的探索，它是利用未标记数据来减少对标记数据依赖的有效方法。在这项工作中，我们将神经过程（NP）调整到半监督图像分类任务，从而产生了一种名为 NP-Match 的新方法。 NP-Match 适合这项任务有两个原因。首先，NP-Match在进行预测时隐式比较数据点，因此每个未标记数据点的预测都会受到与其相似的标记数据点的影响，从而提高了伪标签的质量。其次，NP-Match 能够估计不确定性，可以用作选择具有可靠伪标签的未标记样本的工具。与使用蒙特卡罗（MC）dropout实现的基于不确定性的SSL方法相比，NP-Match以更少的计算开销来估计不确定性，这可以节省训练和测试阶段的时间。我们在四个公共数据集上进行了广泛的实验，NP-Match 的性能优于最先进的 (SOTA) 结果或在它们上取得了有竞争力的结果，这表明了 NP-Match 的有效性及其在 SSL 方面的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为NP-Match的新方法，将神经过程（NPs）应用于半监督图像分类任务。
AI.motivation: 半监督学习（SSL）能够有效利用未标记数据以减少对标记数据的依赖。然而，现有的基于不确定性的SSL方法在计算上开销较大，因此需要一种更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: NP-Match通过隐式比较数据点进行预测，利用相似的标记数据点来提高伪标签的质量，并能估计不确定性以选择可靠的未标记样本，从而减少计算开销。
AI.result: 在四个公开数据集上进行了大量实验，NP-Match在性能上优于或与当前最先进的（SOTA）方法相当，表明其有效性和在SSL中的潜力。
AI.conclusion: NP-Match通过结合神经过程和半监督学习，提供了一种更高效、更有效的图像分类方法，具有良好的应用前景。

authors_text: Keon Lee,Kyumin Park,Daeyoung Kim
title: DailyTalk: Spoken Dialogue Dataset for Conversational Text-to-Speech
title_zh: DailyTalk：对话式文本转语音的口语对话数据集
comment: 5 pages, 1 figures, 4 tables. Accepted to ICASSP 2023
comments: 5 pages, 1 figures, 4 tables. Accepted to ICASSP 2023
abstract: The majority of current Text-to-Speech (TTS) datasets, which are collections of individual utterances, contain few conversational aspects. In this paper, we introduce DailyTalk, a high-quality conversational speech dataset designed for conversational TTS. We sampled, modified, and recorded 2,541 dialogues from the open-domain dialogue dataset DailyDialog inheriting its annotated attributes. On top of our dataset, we extend prior work as our baseline, where a non-autoregressive TTS is conditioned on historical information in a dialogue. From the baseline experiment with both general and our novel metrics, we show that DailyTalk can be used as a general TTS dataset, and more than that, our baseline can represent contextual information from DailyTalk. The DailyTalk dataset and baseline code are freely available for academic use with CC-BY-SA 4.0 license.
summary: The majority of current Text-to-Speech (TTS) datasets, which are collections of individual utterances, contain few conversational aspects. In this paper, we introduce DailyTalk, a high-quality conversational speech dataset designed for conversational TTS. We sampled, modified, and recorded 2,541 dialogues from the open-domain dialogue dataset DailyDialog inheriting its annotated attributes. On top of our dataset, we extend prior work as our baseline, where a non-autoregressive TTS is conditioned on historical information in a dialogue. From the baseline experiment with both general and our novel metrics, we show that DailyTalk can be used as a general TTS dataset, and more than that, our baseline can represent contextual information from DailyTalk. The DailyTalk dataset and baseline code are freely available for academic use with CC-BY-SA 4.0 license.
abstract_zh: 当前的大多数文本转语音 (TTS) 数据集都是个人话语的集合，几乎不包含对话方面的内容。在本文中，我们介绍了 DailyTalk，这是一个专为会话 TTS 设计的高质量会话语音数据集。我们从开放域对话数据集 DailyDialog 中采样、修改和记录了 2,541 个对话，继承了其带注释的属性。在我们的数据集之上，我们扩展了之前的工作作为我们的基线，其中非自回归 TTS 以对话中的历史信息为条件。从通用指标和新颖指标的基线实验中，我们表明 DailyTalk 可以用作通用 TTS 数据集，而且更重要的是，我们的基线可以表示 DailyTalk 中的上下文信息。 DailyTalk 数据集和基线代码可通过 CC-BY-SA 4.0 许可证免费供学术使用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DailyTalk对话数据集，用于提升对话式文本到语音合成的效果。
AI.motivation: 现有TTS数据集缺乏真实对话场景，难以支持自然对话的语音合成需求。
AI.method: 从DailyDialog数据集中采样并录制2541段对话，构建带上下文信息的对话数据集，并基于非自回归TTS模型进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验表明DailyTalk可作为通用TTS数据集，且基线模型能有效捕捉对话上下文信息。
AI.conclusion: DailyTalk数据集和代码已开源，为对话式TTS研究提供高质量资源支持。

authors_text: Matthew Groh
title: Identifying the Context Shift between Test Benchmarks and Production Data
title_zh: 识别测试基准和生产数据之间的上下文转换
abstract: Machine learning models are often brittle on production data despite achieving high accuracy on benchmark datasets. Benchmark datasets have traditionally served dual purposes: first, benchmarks offer a standard on which machine learning researchers can compare different methods, and second, benchmarks provide a model, albeit imperfect, of the real world. The incompleteness of test benchmarks (and the data upon which models are trained) hinder robustness in machine learning, enable shortcut learning, and leave models systematically prone to err on out-of-distribution and adversarially perturbed data. The mismatch between a single static benchmark dataset and a production dataset has traditionally been described as a dataset shift. In an effort to clarify how to address the mismatch between test benchmarks and production data, we introduce context shift to describe semantically meaningful changes in the underlying data generation process. Moreover, we identify three methods for addressing context shift that would otherwise lead to model prediction errors: first, we describe how human intuition and expert knowledge can identify semantically meaningful features upon which models systematically fail, second, we detail how dynamic benchmarking - with its focus on capturing the data generation process - can promote generalizability through corroboration, and third, we highlight that clarifying a model's limitations can reduce unexpected errors. Robust machine learning is focused on model performance beyond benchmarks, and as such, we consider three model organism domains - facial expression recognition, deepfake detection, and medical diagnosis - to highlight how implicit assumptions in benchmark tasks lead to errors in practice. By paying close attention to the role of context, researchers can design more comprehensive benchmarks, reduce context shift errors, and increase generalizability.
summary: Machine learning models are often brittle on production data despite achieving high accuracy on benchmark datasets. Benchmark datasets have traditionally served dual purposes: first, benchmarks offer a standard on which machine learning researchers can compare different methods, and second, benchmarks provide a model, albeit imperfect, of the real world. The incompleteness of test benchmarks (and the data upon which models are trained) hinder robustness in machine learning, enable shortcut learning, and leave models systematically prone to err on out-of-distribution and adversarially perturbed data. The mismatch between a single static benchmark dataset and a production dataset has traditionally been described as a dataset shift. In an effort to clarify how to address the mismatch between test benchmarks and production data, we introduce context shift to describe semantically meaningful changes in the underlying data generation process. Moreover, we identify three methods for addressing context shift that would otherwise lead to model prediction errors: first, we describe how human intuition and expert knowledge can identify semantically meaningful features upon which models systematically fail, second, we detail how dynamic benchmarking - with its focus on capturing the data generation process - can promote generalizability through corroboration, and third, we highlight that clarifying a model's limitations can reduce unexpected errors. Robust machine learning is focused on model performance beyond benchmarks, and as such, we consider three model organism domains - facial expression recognition, deepfake detection, and medical diagnosis - to highlight how implicit assumptions in benchmark tasks lead to errors in practice. By paying close attention to the role of context, researchers can design more comprehensive benchmarks, reduce context shift errors, and increase generalizability.
abstract_zh: 尽管机器学习模型在基准数据集上实现了高精度，但在生产数据上通常很脆弱。传统上，基准数据集具有双重目的：首先，基准提供了机器学习研究人员可以比较不同方法的标准，其次，基准提供了现实世界的模型（尽管不完美）。测试基准（以及训练模型所依据的数据）的不完整性阻碍了机器学习的鲁棒性，使捷径学习成为可能，并使模型在分布不均和对抗性扰动数据上系统地容易出错。单个静态基准数据集与生产数据集之间的不匹配传统上被描述为数据集偏移。为了阐明如何解决测试基准和生产数据之间的不匹配问题，我们引入了上下文转换来描述底层数据生成过程中语义上有意义的变化。此外，我们确定了三种解决上下文转移的方法，否则会导致模型预测错误：首先，我们描述人类直觉和专业知识如何识别模型系统性失败的语义上有意义的特征；其次，我们详细介绍动态基准测试（重点关注捕获数据生成过程）如何通过佐证来促进通用性；第三，我们强调澄清模型的局限性可以减少意外错误。鲁棒的机器学习专注于超越基准的模型性能，因此，我们考虑三个模型生物领域——面部表情识别、深度换脸检测和医学诊断——以强调基准任务中的隐含假设如何导致实践中的错误。通过密切关注上下文的作用，研究人员可以设计更全面的基准，减少上下文转移错误，并提高普遍性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出'上下文偏移'概念，用于描述测试基准与生产数据之间数据生成过程的语义变化，并探讨解决方法。
AI.motivation: 机器学习模型在基准数据集上表现优异，但在实际生产数据中易失效，传统数据集无法反映真实世界的动态变化。
AI.method: 提出三种方法：1.结合人类专家知识识别模型失效特征；2.通过动态基准测试捕捉数据生成过程；3.明确模型局限性以减少意外错误。
AI.result: 通过面部表情识别、深度伪造检测和医疗诊断三个领域案例，验证了基准任务隐含假设导致实际错误的机制。
AI.conclusion: 关注上下文变化有助于设计更全面的基准，减少上下文偏移误差，提升模型泛化能力。

tldr: 本文提出'上下文偏移'概念，用于描述测试基准与生产数据之间数据生成过程的语义变化，并探讨解决方法。
motivation: 机器学习模型在基准数据集上表现优异，但在实际生产数据中易失效，传统数据集无法反映真实世界的动态变化。
method: 提出三种方法：1.结合人类专家知识识别模型失效特征；2.通过动态基准测试捕捉数据生成过程；3.明确模型局限性以减少意外错误。
result: 通过面部表情识别、深度伪造检测和医疗诊断三个领域案例，验证了基准任务隐含假设导致实际错误的机制。
conclusion: 关注上下文变化有助于设计更全面的基准，减少上下文偏移误差，提升模型泛化能力。
search_text: Identifying the Context Shift between Test Benchmarks and Production Data 识别测试基准和生产数据之间的上下文转换 Machine learning models are often brittle on production data despite achieving high accuracy on benchmark datasets. Benchmark datasets have traditionally served dual purposes: first, benchmarks offer a standard on which machine learning researchers can compare different methods, and second, benchmarks provide a model, albeit imperfect, of the real world. The incompleteness of test benchmarks (and the data upon which models are trained) hinder robustness in machine learning, enable shortcut learning, and leave models systematically prone to err on out-of-distribution and adversarially perturbed data. The mismatch between a single static benchmark dataset and a production dataset has traditionally been described as a dataset shift. In an effort to clarify how to address the mismatch between test benchmarks and production data, we introduce context shift to describe semantically meaningful changes in the underlying data generation process. Moreover, we identify three methods for addressing context shift that would otherwise lead to model prediction errors: first, we describe how human intuition and expert knowledge can identify semantically meaningful features upon which models systematically fail, second, we detail how dynamic benchmarking - with its focus on capturing the data generation process - can promote generalizability through corroboration, and third, we highlight that clarifying a model's limitations can reduce unexpected errors. Robust machine learning is focused on model performance beyond benchmarks, and as such, we consider three model organism domains - facial expression recognition, deepfake detection, and medical diagnosis - to highlight how implicit assumptions in benchmark tasks lead to errors in practice. By paying close attention to the role of context, researchers can design more comprehensive benchmarks, reduce context shift errors, and increase generalizability. 尽管机器学习模型在基准数据集上实现了高精度，但在生产数据上通常很脆弱。传统上，基准数据集具有双重目的：首先，基准提供了机器学习研究人员可以比较不同方法的标准，其次，基准提供了现实世界的模型（尽管不完美）。测试基准（以及训练模型所依据的数据）的不完整性阻碍了机器学习的鲁棒性，使捷径学习成为可能，并使模型在分布不均和对抗性扰动数据上系统地容易出错。单个静态基准数据集与生产数据集之间的不匹配传统上被描述为数据集偏移。为了阐明如何解决测试基准和生产数据之间的不匹配问题，我们引入了上下文转换来描述底层数据生成过程中语义上有意义的变化。此外，我们确定了三种解决上下文转移的方法，否则会导致模型预测错误：首先，我们描述人类直觉和专业知识如何识别模型系统性失败的语义上有意义的特征；其次，我们详细介绍动态基准测试（重点关注捕获数据生成过程）如何通过佐证来促进通用性；第三，我们强调澄清模型的局限性可以减少意外错误。鲁棒的机器学习专注于超越基准的模型性能，因此，我们考虑三个模型生物领域——面部表情识别、深度换脸检测和医学诊断——以强调基准任务中的隐含假设如何导致实践中的错误。通过密切关注上下文的作用，研究人员可以设计更全面的基准，减少上下文转移错误，并提高普遍性。 本文提出'上下文偏移'概念，用于描述测试基准与生产数据之间数据生成过程的语义变化，并探讨解决方法。 Matthew Groh cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.HC

authors_text: Weiming Zhuang,Chongjie Ye,Ying Xu,Pengzhi Mao,Shuai Zhang
title: Chat-to-Design: AI Assisted Personalized Fashion Design
title_zh: 聊天到设计：AI辅助个性化时装设计
abstract: In this demo, we present Chat-to-Design, a new multimodal interaction system for personalized fashion design. Compared to classic systems that recommend apparel based on keywords, Chat-to-Design enables users to design clothes in two steps: 1) coarse-grained selection via conversation and 2) fine-grained editing via an interactive interface. It encompasses three sub-systems to deliver an immersive user experience: A conversation system empowered by natural language understanding to accept users' requests and manages dialogs; A multimodal fashion retrieval system empowered by a large-scale pretrained language-image network to retrieve requested apparel; A fashion design system empowered by emerging generative techniques to edit attributes of retrieved clothes.
summary: In this demo, we present Chat-to-Design, a new multimodal interaction system for personalized fashion design. Compared to classic systems that recommend apparel based on keywords, Chat-to-Design enables users to design clothes in two steps: 1) coarse-grained selection via conversation and 2) fine-grained editing via an interactive interface. It encompasses three sub-systems to deliver an immersive user experience: A conversation system empowered by natural language understanding to accept users' requests and manages dialogs; A multimodal fashion retrieval system empowered by a large-scale pretrained language-image network to retrieve requested apparel; A fashion design system empowered by emerging generative techniques to edit attributes of retrieved clothes.
abstract_zh: 在此演示中，我们展示了 Chat-to-Design，这是一种用于个性化时装设计的新型多模式交互系统。与基于关键词推荐服装的经典系统相比，Chat-to-Design 使用户可以通过两个步骤设计服装：1）通过对话进行粗粒度选择，2）通过交互界面进行细粒度编辑。它包含三个子系统，可提供身临其境的用户体验： 由自然语言理解支持的对话系统，用于接受用户的请求并管理对话；由大规模预训练语言图像网络支持的多模式时尚检索系统，可检索所需的服装；一种时装设计系统，通过新兴的生成技术来编辑检索到的衣服的属性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Chat-to-Design系统，通过对话和交互式编辑实现个性化时尚设计。
AI.motivation: 传统关键词推荐系统无法满足用户对个性化服装设计的精细需求，需更自然的交互方式提升体验。
AI.method: 系统包含三个子系统：基于自然语言理解的对话模块、利用预训练语言-图像网络的多模态检索模块、以及基于生成技术的服装编辑模块。
AI.result: 实现两步设计流程：通过对话进行粗粒度选择，再通过交互界面进行细粒度编辑，提供沉浸式用户体验。
AI.conclusion: Chat-to-Design通过融合NLP与生成技术，为个性化时尚设计提供了更自然、灵活的解决方案。

authors_text: Yi Zhang,Junyang Wang,Jitao Sang
title: Counterfactually Measuring and Eliminating Social Bias in Vision-Language Pre-training Models
title_zh: 反事实测量和消除视觉语言预训练模型中的社会偏见
abstract: Vision-Language Pre-training (VLP) models have achieved state-of-the-art performance in numerous cross-modal tasks. Since they are optimized to capture the statistical properties of intra- and inter-modality, there remains risk to learn social biases presented in the data as well. In this work, we (1) introduce a counterfactual-based bias measurement \emph{CounterBias} to quantify the social bias in VLP models by comparing the [MASK]ed prediction probabilities of factual and counterfactual samples; (2) construct a novel VL-Bias dataset including 24K image-text pairs for measuring gender bias in VLP models, from which we observed that significant gender bias is prevalent in VLP models; and (3) propose a VLP debiasing method \emph{FairVLP} to minimize the difference in the [MASK]ed prediction probabilities between factual and counterfactual image-text pairs for VLP debiasing. Although CounterBias and FairVLP focus on social bias, they are generalizable to serve as tools and provide new insights to probe and regularize more knowledge in VLP models.
summary: Vision-Language Pre-training (VLP) models have achieved state-of-the-art performance in numerous cross-modal tasks. Since they are optimized to capture the statistical properties of intra- and inter-modality, there remains risk to learn social biases presented in the data as well. In this work, we (1) introduce a counterfactual-based bias measurement \emph{CounterBias} to quantify the social bias in VLP models by comparing the [MASK]ed prediction probabilities of factual and counterfactual samples; (2) construct a novel VL-Bias dataset including 24K image-text pairs for measuring gender bias in VLP models, from which we observed that significant gender bias is prevalent in VLP models; and (3) propose a VLP debiasing method \emph{FairVLP} to minimize the difference in the [MASK]ed prediction probabilities between factual and counterfactual image-text pairs for VLP debiasing. Although CounterBias and FairVLP focus on social bias, they are generalizable to serve as tools and provide new insights to probe and regularize more knowledge in VLP models.
abstract_zh: 视觉语言预训练（VLP）模型在众多跨模态任务中取得了最先进的性能。由于它们经过优化以捕获模态内和模态间的统计特性，因此仍然存在学习数据中呈现的社会偏见的风险。在这项工作中，我们（1）引入了基于反事实的偏差测量 \emph{CounterBias}，通过比较事实和反事实样本的 [MASK]ed 预测概率来量化 VLP 模型中的社会偏差； (2)构建了一个新的VL-Bias数据集，包括24K图像-文本对，用于测量VLP模型中的性别偏见，从中我们观察到VLP模型中普遍存在显着的性别偏见； (3)提出一种VLP去偏方法\emph{FairVLP}来最小化VLP去偏的事实和反事实图像文本对之间的[MASK]ed预测概率的差异。尽管 CounterBias 和 FairVLP 关注社会偏见，但它们可以作为工具进行推广，并提供新的见解来探索和规范 VLP 模型中的更多知识。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于反事实的方法来量化并消除视觉-语言预训练模型中的社会偏见，包括构建数据集和设计去偏方法。
AI.motivation: 视觉-语言预训练模型可能从数据中学习到社会偏见，尽管其在跨模态任务中表现优异，但存在潜在的偏见风险。
AI.method: 提出反事实偏见度量CounterBias，构建包含24K图像-文本对的VL-Bias数据集，并设计去偏方法FairVLP以最小化事实与反事实样本的预测概率差异。
AI.result: 实验发现VLP模型中普遍存在性别偏见，FairVLP有效降低了偏见，且方法具有通用性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为探测和规范VLP模型中的社会偏见提供了新工具，有助于推动更公平的模型发展。

authors_text: Wanru Zhao,Xinchi Qiu,Javier Fernandez-Marques,Pedro P. B. de Gusmão,Nicholas D. Lane
title: Protea: Client Profiling within Federated Systems using Flower
title_zh: Protea：使用 Flower 在联合系统中进行客户端分析
comment: 6 pages, 5 figures, Accepted at ACM MobiCom FedEdge Workshop, 2022
comments: 6 pages, 5 figures, Accepted at ACM MobiCom FedEdge Workshop, 2022
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) has emerged as a prospective solution that facilitates the training of a high-performing centralised model without compromising the privacy of users. While successful, research is currently limited by the possibility of establishing a realistic large-scale FL system at the early stages of experimentation. Simulation can help accelerate this process. To facilitate efficient scalable FL simulation of heterogeneous clients, we design and implement Protea, a flexible and lightweight client profiling component within federated systems using the FL framework Flower. It allows automatically collecting system-level statistics and estimating the resources needed for each client, thus running the simulation in a resource-aware fashion. The results show that our design successfully increases parallelism for 1.66 $\times$ faster wall-clock time and 2.6$\times$ better GPU utilisation, which enables large-scale experiments on heterogeneous clients.
summary: Federated Learning (FL) has emerged as a prospective solution that facilitates the training of a high-performing centralised model without compromising the privacy of users. While successful, research is currently limited by the possibility of establishing a realistic large-scale FL system at the early stages of experimentation. Simulation can help accelerate this process. To facilitate efficient scalable FL simulation of heterogeneous clients, we design and implement Protea, a flexible and lightweight client profiling component within federated systems using the FL framework Flower. It allows automatically collecting system-level statistics and estimating the resources needed for each client, thus running the simulation in a resource-aware fashion. The results show that our design successfully increases parallelism for 1.66 $\times$ faster wall-clock time and 2.6$\times$ better GPU utilisation, which enables large-scale experiments on heterogeneous clients.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习（FL）已成为一种有前景的解决方案，可以在不损害用户隐私的情况下促进高性能集中模型的训练。尽管取得了成功，但目前的研究仍受到在实验早期阶段建立现实的大规模FL系统的可能性的限制。模拟可以帮助加速这一过程。为了促进异构客户端的高效可扩展 FL 模拟，我们使用 FL 框架 Flower 设计并实现了 Protea，这是联合系统中灵活且轻量级的客户端分析组件。它允许自动收集系统级统计数据并估计每个客户端所需的资源，从而以资源感知的方式运行模拟。结果表明，我们的设计成功地提高了并行性，使挂钟时间加快了 1.66 $\times，GPU 利用率提高了 2.6$\times$，从而能够在异构客户端上进行大规模实验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Protea，一个基于Flower框架的联邦系统客户端配置文件组件，用于提升异构客户端的联邦学习模拟效率。
AI.motivation: 现有联邦学习研究缺乏早期阶段的大规模系统模拟工具，而传统方法难以高效处理异构客户端资源差异问题。
AI.method: 设计轻量级Protea组件自动采集系统级统计信息，动态估算客户端资源需求，实现资源感知的并行化模拟调度。
AI.result: 实验显示Protea使墙钟时间缩短66%、GPU利用率提升160%，成功支持异构环境下的大规模联邦学习实验。
AI.conclusion: Protea通过资源感知的客户端配置文件机制，有效解决了联邦学习模拟中的性能瓶颈问题。

search_text: Protea: Client Profiling within Federated Systems using Flower Protea：使用 Flower 在联合系统中进行客户端分析 Federated Learning (FL) has emerged as a prospective solution that facilitates the training of a high-performing centralised model without compromising the privacy of users. While successful, research is currently limited by the possibility of establishing a realistic large-scale FL system at the early stages of experimentation. Simulation can help accelerate this process. To facilitate efficient scalable FL simulation of heterogeneous clients, we design and implement Protea, a flexible and lightweight client profiling component within federated systems using the FL framework Flower. It allows automatically collecting system-level statistics and estimating the resources needed for each client, thus running the simulation in a resource-aware fashion. The results show that our design successfully increases parallelism for 1.66 $\times$ faster wall-clock time and 2.6$\times$ better GPU utilisation, which enables large-scale experiments on heterogeneous clients. 联邦学习（FL）已成为一种有前景的解决方案，可以在不损害用户隐私的情况下促进高性能集中模型的训练。尽管取得了成功，但目前的研究仍受到在实验早期阶段建立现实的大规模FL系统的可能性的限制。模拟可以帮助加速这一过程。为了促进异构客户端的高效可扩展 FL 模拟，我们使用 FL 框架 Flower 设计并实现了 Protea，这是联合系统中灵活且轻量级的客户端分析组件。它允许自动收集系统级统计数据并估计每个客户端所需的资源，从而以资源感知的方式运行模拟。结果表明，我们的设计成功地提高了并行性，使挂钟时间加快了 1.66 $\times，GPU 利用率提高了 2.6$\times$，从而能够在异构客户端上进行大规模实验。 本文提出Protea，一个基于Flower框架的联邦系统客户端配置文件组件，用于提升异构客户端的联邦学习模拟效率。 Wanru Zhao,Xinchi Qiu,Javier Fernandez-Marques,Pedro P. B. de Gusmão,Nicholas D. Lane cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.DC,cs.PF

authors_text: Dimitrios Stoidis,Andrea Cavallaro
title: Generating gender-ambiguous voices for privacy-preserving speech recognition
title_zh: 生成性别模糊的声音以保护隐私的语音识别
abstract: Our voice encodes a uniquely identifiable pattern which can be used to infer private attributes, such as gender or identity, that an individual might wish not to reveal when using a speech recognition service. To prevent attribute inference attacks alongside speech recognition tasks, we present a generative adversarial network, GenGAN, that synthesises voices that conceal the gender or identity of a speaker. The proposed network includes a generator with a U-Net architecture that learns to fool a discriminator. We condition the generator only on gender information and use an adversarial loss between signal distortion and privacy preservation. We show that GenGAN improves the trade-off between privacy and utility compared to privacy-preserving representation learning methods that consider gender information as a sensitive attribute to protect.
summary: Our voice encodes a uniquely identifiable pattern which can be used to infer private attributes, such as gender or identity, that an individual might wish not to reveal when using a speech recognition service. To prevent attribute inference attacks alongside speech recognition tasks, we present a generative adversarial network, GenGAN, that synthesises voices that conceal the gender or identity of a speaker. The proposed network includes a generator with a U-Net architecture that learns to fool a discriminator. We condition the generator only on gender information and use an adversarial loss between signal distortion and privacy preservation. We show that GenGAN improves the trade-off between privacy and utility compared to privacy-preserving representation learning methods that consider gender information as a sensitive attribute to protect.
abstract_zh: 我们的声音编码了一种独特的可识别模式，可用于推断个人在使用语音识别服务时可能不希望透露的私人属性，例如性别或身份。为了防止语音识别任务中的属性推断攻击，我们提出了一种生成对抗网络 GenGAN，它可以合成隐藏说话者性别或身份的声音。所提出的网络包括一个具有 U-Net 架构的生成器，可以学习欺骗鉴别器。我们仅根据性别信息来调节生成器，并使用信号失真和隐私保护之间的对抗性损失。我们表明，与将性别信息视为需要保护的敏感属性的隐私保护表示学习方法相比，GenGAN 改善了隐私和实用性之间的权衡。

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种生成对抗网络GenGAN，用于生成性别模糊的声音，以在语音识别中保护隐私。
AI.motivation: 语音中的唯一标识模式可能被用来推断性别或身份等隐私属性，需防止属性推断攻击。
AI.method: 提出GenGAN生成对抗网络，使用U-Net结构的生成器，仅以性别信息为条件，并通过信号失真与隐私保护的对抗损失进行优化。
AI.result: GenGAN在隐私保护与语音识别效用的平衡上优于现有隐私保护表示学习方法。
AI.conclusion: GenGAN有效提升了隐私保护与语音识别效用的平衡，适用于隐私敏感的语音识别场景。

authors_text: Jinrui Zhang,Teng Wang,Feng Zheng,Ran Cheng,Ping Luo
title: Exploiting Context Information for Generic Event Boundary Captioning
title_zh: 利用上下文信息进行通用事件边界字幕
abstract: Generic Event Boundary Captioning (GEBC) aims to generate three sentences describing the status change for a given time boundary. Previous methods only process the information of a single boundary at a time, which lacks utilization of video context information. To tackle this issue, we design a model that directly takes the whole video as input and generates captions for all boundaries parallelly. The model could learn the context information for each time boundary by modeling the boundary-boundary interactions. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of context information. The proposed method achieved a 72.84 score on the test set, and we reached the $2^{nd}$ place in this challenge. Our code is available at: \url{https://github.com/zjr2000/Context-GEBC}
summary: Generic Event Boundary Captioning (GEBC) aims to generate three sentences describing the status change for a given time boundary. Previous methods only process the information of a single boundary at a time, which lacks utilization of video context information. To tackle this issue, we design a model that directly takes the whole video as input and generates captions for all boundaries parallelly. The model could learn the context information for each time boundary by modeling the boundary-boundary interactions. Experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of context information. The proposed method achieved a 72.84 score on the test set, and we reached the $2^{nd}$ place in this challenge. Our code is available at: \url{https://github.com/zjr2000/Context-GEBC}
abstract_zh: 通用事件边界字幕 (GEBC) 旨在生成三个句子来描述给定时间边界的状态变化。以往的方法每次仅处理单个边界的信息，缺乏对视频上下文信息的利用。为了解决这个问题，我们设计了一个模型，直接将整个视频作为输入，并并行生成所有边界的字幕。该模型可以通过对边界-边界交互进行建模来学习每个时间边界的上下文信息。实验证明了上下文信息的有效性。所提出的方法在测试集上获得了 72.84 分，我们在本次挑战赛中获得了 $2^{nd}$ 名次。我们的代码位于：\url{https://github.com/zjr2000/Context-GEBC}

AI.tldr: 该论文旨在通过利用视频上下文信息，生成描述时间边界状态变化的三个句子。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅处理单个边界，未能有效利用视频上下文信息，限制了模型对事件边界之间关系的理解和生成效果。
AI.method: 提出一种直接以整段视频为输入，平行生成所有事件边界字幕的模型，通过建模边界间的相互作用来学习上下文信息。
AI.result: 在测试集上取得72.84的分数，并在挑战赛中获得第二名。
AI.conclusion: 利用上下文信息能有效提升事件边界字幕生成的效果，验证了该方法的有效性。

ai_content.result: 在测试集上取得72.84的分数，并在挑战赛中获得第二名。
ai_content.conclusion: 利用上下文信息能有效提升事件边界字幕生成的效果，验证了该方法的有效性。

authors_text: Kun Wei,Yike Zhang,Sining Sun,Lei Xie,Long Ma
title: Leveraging Acoustic Contextual Representation by Audio-textual Cross-modal Learning for Conversational ASR
title_zh: 通过音频文本跨模态学习利用声学语境表征进行对话式 ASR
abstract: Leveraging context information is an intuitive idea to improve performance on conversational automatic speech recognition(ASR). Previous works usually adopt recognized hypotheses of historical utterances as preceding context, which may bias the current recognized hypothesis due to the inevitable historicalrecognition errors. To avoid this problem, we propose an audio-textual cross-modal representation extractor to learn contextual representations directly from preceding speech. Specifically, it consists of two modal-related encoders, extracting high-level latent features from speech and the corresponding text, and a cross-modal encoder, which aims to learn the correlation between speech and text. We randomly mask some input tokens and input sequences of each modality. Then a token-missing or modal-missing prediction with a modal-level CTC loss on the cross-modal encoder is performed. Thus, the model captures not only the bi-directional context dependencies in a specific modality but also relationships between different modalities. Then, during the training of the conversational ASR system, the extractor will be frozen to extract the textual representation of preceding speech, while such representation is used as context fed to the ASR decoder through attention mechanism. The effectiveness of the proposed approach is validated on several Mandarin conversation corpora and the highest character error rate (CER) reduction up to 16% is achieved on the MagicData dataset.
summary: Leveraging context information is an intuitive idea to improve performance on conversational automatic speech recognition(ASR). Previous works usually adopt recognized hypotheses of historical utterances as preceding context, which may bias the current recognized hypothesis due to the inevitable historicalrecognition errors. To avoid this problem, we propose an audio-textual cross-modal representation extractor to learn contextual representations directly from preceding speech. Specifically, it consists of two modal-related encoders, extracting high-level latent features from speech and the corresponding text, and a cross-modal encoder, which aims to learn the correlation between speech and text. We randomly mask some input tokens and input sequences of each modality. Then a token-missing or modal-missing prediction with a modal-level CTC loss on the cross-modal encoder is performed. Thus, the model captures not only the bi-directional context dependencies in a specific modality but also relationships between different modalities. Then, during the training of the conversational ASR system, the extractor will be frozen to extract the textual representation of preceding speech, while such representation is used as context fed to the ASR decoder through attention mechanism. The effectiveness of the proposed approach is validated on several Mandarin conversation corpora and the highest character error rate (CER) reduction up to 16% is achieved on the MagicData dataset.
abstract_zh: 利用上下文信息是提高会话自动语音识别 (ASR) 性能的直观想法。以往的作品通常采用公认的历史话语假设作为前置语境，这可能会由于不可避免的历史识别错误而对当前公认的假设产生偏差。为了避免这个问题，我们提出了一种音频文本跨模态表示提取器来直接从先前的语音中学习上下文表示。具体来说，它由两个与模态相关的编码器组成，从语音和相应的文本中提取高级潜在特征，以及一个跨模态编码器，旨在学习语音和文本之间的相关性。我们随机屏蔽每种模态的一些输入标记和输入序列。然后在跨模态编码器上执行具有模态级 CTC 损失的令牌缺失或模态缺失预测。因此，该模型不仅捕获特定模态中的双向上下文依赖关系，而且还捕获不同模态之间的关系。然后，在会话 ASR 系统的训练过程中，提取器将被冻结以提取先前语音的文本表示，而这种表示将作为上下文通过注意力机制馈送到 ASR 解码器。该方法的有效性在多个普通话会话语料库上得到了验证，并且在 MagicData 数据集上实现了高达 16% 的最高字符错误率 (CER) 降低。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于音频-文本跨模态学习的上下文表示方法，用于改进对话式自动语音识别（ASR）性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖历史语音识别结果作为上下文，但历史识别错误会引入偏差，需直接从原始语音中学习可靠上下文表示。
AI.method: 设计音频-文本跨模态表示提取器，包含语音/文本编码器和跨模态编码器，通过掩码预测任务学习双向上下文及模态间关系，并冻结该提取器为ASR解码器提供上下文。
AI.result: 在多个普通话对话数据集上验证有效，MagicData数据集字符错误率（CER）最高降低16%。
AI.conclusion: 跨模态学习能有效捕捉上下文依赖关系，减少历史错误影响，显著提升对话式ASR性能。

search_text: Leveraging Acoustic Contextual Representation by Audio-textual Cross-modal Learning for Conversational ASR 通过音频文本跨模态学习利用声学语境表征进行对话式 ASR Leveraging context information is an intuitive idea to improve performance on conversational automatic speech recognition(ASR). Previous works usually adopt recognized hypotheses of historical utterances as preceding context, which may bias the current recognized hypothesis due to the inevitable historicalrecognition errors. To avoid this problem, we propose an audio-textual cross-modal representation extractor to learn contextual representations directly from preceding speech. Specifically, it consists of two modal-related encoders, extracting high-level latent features from speech and the corresponding text, and a cross-modal encoder, which aims to learn the correlation between speech and text. We randomly mask some input tokens and input sequences of each modality. Then a token-missing or modal-missing prediction with a modal-level CTC loss on the cross-modal encoder is performed. Thus, the model captures not only the bi-directional context dependencies in a specific modality but also relationships between different modalities. Then, during the training of the conversational ASR system, the extractor will be frozen to extract the textual representation of preceding speech, while such representation is used as context fed to the ASR decoder through attention mechanism. The effectiveness of the proposed approach is validated on several Mandarin conversation corpora and the highest character error rate (CER) reduction up to 16% is achieved on the MagicData dataset. 利用上下文信息是提高会话自动语音识别 (ASR) 性能的直观想法。以往的作品通常采用公认的历史话语假设作为前置语境，这可能会由于不可避免的历史识别错误而对当前公认的假设产生偏差。为了避免这个问题，我们提出了一种音频文本跨模态表示提取器来直接从先前的语音中学习上下文表示。具体来说，它由两个与模态相关的编码器组成，从语音和相应的文本中提取高级潜在特征，以及一个跨模态编码器，旨在学习语音和文本之间的相关性。我们随机屏蔽每种模态的一些输入标记和输入序列。然后在跨模态编码器上执行具有模态级 CTC 损失的令牌缺失或模态缺失预测。因此，该模型不仅捕获特定模态中的双向上下文依赖关系，而且还捕获不同模态之间的关系。然后，在会话 ASR 系统的训练过程中，提取器将被冻结以提取先前语音的文本表示，而这种表示将作为上下文通过注意力机制馈送到 ASR 解码器。该方法的有效性在多个普通话会话语料库上得到了验证，并且在 MagicData 数据集上实现了高达 16% 的最高字符错误率 (CER) 降低。 本文提出一种基于音频-文本跨模态学习的上下文表示方法，用于改进对话式自动语音识别（ASR）性能。 Kun Wei,Yike Zhang,Sining Sun,Lei Xie,Long Ma eess.AS,cs.CL,cs.SD

authors_text: Jinze Li,Yan Bai,Yihang Lou,Xiongkun Linghu,Jianzhong He,Shaoyun Xu,Tao Bai
title: Memory-Based Label-Text Tuning for Few-Shot Class-Incremental Learning
title_zh: 基于内存的标签文本调整，用于少镜头类增量学习
abstract: Few-shot class-incremental learning(FSCIL) focuses on designing learning algorithms that can continually learn a sequence of new tasks from a few samples without forgetting old ones. The difficulties are that training on a sequence of limited data from new tasks leads to severe overfitting issues and causes the well-known catastrophic forgetting problem. Existing researches mainly utilize the image information, such as storing the image knowledge of previous tasks or limiting classifiers updating. However, they ignore analyzing the informative and less noisy text information of class labels. In this work, we propose leveraging the label-text information by adopting the memory prompt. The memory prompt can learn new data sequentially, and meanwhile store the previous knowledge. Furthermore, to optimize the memory prompt without undermining the stored knowledge, we propose a stimulation-based training strategy. It optimizes the memory prompt depending on the image embedding stimulation, which is the distribution of the image embedding elements. Experiments show that our proposed method outperforms all prior state-of-the-art approaches, significantly mitigating the catastrophic forgetting and overfitting problems.
summary: Few-shot class-incremental learning(FSCIL) focuses on designing learning algorithms that can continually learn a sequence of new tasks from a few samples without forgetting old ones. The difficulties are that training on a sequence of limited data from new tasks leads to severe overfitting issues and causes the well-known catastrophic forgetting problem. Existing researches mainly utilize the image information, such as storing the image knowledge of previous tasks or limiting classifiers updating. However, they ignore analyzing the informative and less noisy text information of class labels. In this work, we propose leveraging the label-text information by adopting the memory prompt. The memory prompt can learn new data sequentially, and meanwhile store the previous knowledge. Furthermore, to optimize the memory prompt without undermining the stored knowledge, we propose a stimulation-based training strategy. It optimizes the memory prompt depending on the image embedding stimulation, which is the distribution of the image embedding elements. Experiments show that our proposed method outperforms all prior state-of-the-art approaches, significantly mitigating the catastrophic forgetting and overfitting problems.
abstract_zh: 少镜头类增量学习（FSCIL）专注于设计学习算法，该算法可以不断地从几个样本中学习一系列新任务，而不会忘记旧任务。困难在于，对来自新任务的一系列有限数据进行训练会导致严重的过度拟合问题，并导致众所周知的灾难性遗忘问题。现有的研究主要利用图像信息，例如存储先前任务的图像知识或限制分类器更新。然而，他们忽略了分析类标签的信息丰富且噪音较小的文本信息。在这项工作中，我们建议通过采用记忆提示来利用标签文本信息。记忆提示可以顺序学习新的数据，同时存储以前的知识。此外，为了优化记忆提示而不破坏存储的知识，我们提出了一种基于刺激的训练策略。它根据图像嵌入刺激来优化记忆提示，即图像嵌入元素的分布。实验表明，我们提出的方法优于所有先前最先进的方法，显着减轻了灾难性遗忘和过度拟合问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于记忆提示的标签-文本调优方法，用于解决少样本类别增量学习中的灾难性遗忘和过拟合问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究主要利用图像信息来解决类别增量学习中的遗忘问题，但忽略了类别标签中包含的有用且较少噪声的文本信息。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种基于记忆提示的方法，通过记忆提示顺序学习新数据并存储先前知识，并引入了一种基于刺激的训练策略，利用图像嵌入的分布优化记忆提示。
AI.result: 实验表明，本文提出的方法优于所有先前的最先进方法，在缓解灾难性遗忘和过拟合问题方面效果显著。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合标签文本信息和记忆提示，本文提出的方法有效解决了少样本类别增量学习中的关键挑战。

authors_text: Alexander Schperberg,Yuki Shirai,Xuan Lin,Yusuke Tanaka,Dennis Hong
title: Adaptive Force Controller for Contact-Rich Robotic Systems using an Unscented Kalman Filter
title_zh: 使用无迹卡尔曼滤波器的用于接触丰富的机器人系统的自适应力控制器
comment: Accepted to IEEE RAS International Conference on Humanoid Robots 2023, December 12-14 in Austin, Texas, USA
comments: Accepted to IEEE RAS International Conference on Humanoid Robots 2023, December 12-14 in Austin, Texas, USA
abstract: In multi-point contact systems, precise force control is crucial for achieving stable and safe interactions between robots and their environment. Thus, we demonstrate an admittance controller with auto-tuning that can be applied for these systems. The controller's objective is to track the target wrench profiles of each contact point while considering the additional torque due to rotational friction. Our admittance controller is adaptive during online operation by using an auto-tuning method that tunes the gains of the controller while following user-specified training objectives. These objectives include facilitating controller stability, such as tracking the wrench profiles as closely as possible, ensuring control outputs are within force limits that minimize slippage, and avoiding configurations that induce kinematic singularity. We demonstrate the robustness of our controller on hardware for both manipulation and locomotion tasks using a multi-limbed climbing robot.
summary: In multi-point contact systems, precise force control is crucial for achieving stable and safe interactions between robots and their environment. Thus, we demonstrate an admittance controller with auto-tuning that can be applied for these systems. The controller's objective is to track the target wrench profiles of each contact point while considering the additional torque due to rotational friction. Our admittance controller is adaptive during online operation by using an auto-tuning method that tunes the gains of the controller while following user-specified training objectives. These objectives include facilitating controller stability, such as tracking the wrench profiles as closely as possible, ensuring control outputs are within force limits that minimize slippage, and avoiding configurations that induce kinematic singularity. We demonstrate the robustness of our controller on hardware for both manipulation and locomotion tasks using a multi-limbed climbing robot.
abstract_zh: 在多点接触系统中，精确的力控制对于实现机器人与其环境之间稳定、安全的交互至关重要。因此，我们演示了一种具有自动调节功能的导纳控制器，可应用于这些系统。控制器的目标是跟踪每个接触点的目标扳手轮廓，同时考虑由于旋转摩擦而产生的额外扭矩。我们的导纳控制器通过使用自动调整方法在在线操作期间进行自适应，该方法在遵循用户指定的训练目标的同时调整控制器的增益。这些目标包括促进控制器稳定性，例如尽可能密切地跟踪扳手轮廓，确保控制输出在力限制内，从而最大限度地减少滑动，并避免引起运动奇点的配置。我们使用多肢攀爬机器人展示了控制器在硬件上的鲁棒性，用于操纵和运动任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合无味卡尔曼滤波器的自适应阻抗控制器，用于多接触点机器人系统的精确力控制。
AI.motivation: 在多接触点系统中，机器人与环境的稳定安全交互需要精确的力控制，尤其需考虑旋转摩擦带来的额外扭矩及避免滑动和奇异构型。
AI.method: 采用自适应阻抗控制器结合无味卡尔曼滤波器（UKF）进行在线参数调优，以跟踪接触点的力矩轮廓并考虑旋转摩擦。
AI.result: 在多足攀爬机器人硬件平台上验证了控制器在操作和移动任务中的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该控制器通过自适应调参有效提升了接触丰富场景下的力控制精度与系统稳定性。
