search_text: Adaptive Force Controller for Contact-Rich Robotic Systems using an Unscented Kalman Filter 使用无迹卡尔曼滤波器的用于接触丰富的机器人系统的自适应力控制器 In multi-point contact systems, precise force control is crucial for achieving stable and safe interactions between robots and their environment. Thus, we demonstrate an admittance controller with auto-tuning that can be applied for these systems. The controller's objective is to track the target wrench profiles of each contact point while considering the additional torque due to rotational friction. Our admittance controller is adaptive during online operation by using an auto-tuning method that tunes the gains of the controller while following user-specified training objectives. These objectives include facilitating controller stability, such as tracking the wrench profiles as closely as possible, ensuring control outputs are within force limits that minimize slippage, and avoiding configurations that induce kinematic singularity. We demonstrate the robustness of our controller on hardware for both manipulation and locomotion tasks using a multi-limbed climbing robot. 在多点接触系统中，精确的力控制对于实现机器人与其环境之间稳定、安全的交互至关重要。因此，我们演示了一种具有自动调节功能的导纳控制器，可应用于这些系统。控制器的目标是跟踪每个接触点的目标扳手轮廓，同时考虑由于旋转摩擦而产生的额外扭矩。我们的导纳控制器通过使用自动调整方法在在线操作期间进行自适应，该方法在遵循用户指定的训练目标的同时调整控制器的增益。这些目标包括促进控制器稳定性，例如尽可能密切地跟踪扳手轮廓，确保控制输出在力限制内，从而最大限度地减少滑动，并避免引起运动奇点的配置。我们使用多肢攀爬机器人展示了控制器在硬件上的鲁棒性，用于操纵和运动任务。 本文提出了一种结合无味卡尔曼滤波器的自适应阻抗控制器，用于多接触点机器人系统的精确力控制。 Alexander Schperberg,Yuki Shirai,Xuan Lin,Yusuke Tanaka,Dennis Hong cs.RO,eess.SY

authors_text: Wu Zheng,Li Jiang,Fanbin Lu,Yangyang Ye,Chi-Wing Fu
title: Boosting Single-Frame 3D Object Detection by Simulating Multi-Frame Point Clouds
title_zh: 通过模拟多帧点云增强单帧 3D 物体检测
abstract: To boost a detector for single-frame 3D object detection, we present a new approach to train it to simulate features and responses following a detector trained on multi-frame point clouds. Our approach needs multi-frame point clouds only when training the single-frame detector, and once trained, it can detect objects with only single-frame point clouds as inputs during the inference. We design a novel Simulated Multi-Frame Single-Stage object Detector (SMF-SSD) framework to realize the approach: multi-view dense object fusion to densify ground-truth objects to generate a multi-frame point cloud; self-attention voxel distillation to facilitate one-to-many knowledge transfer from multi- to single-frame voxels; multi-scale BEV feature distillation to transfer knowledge in low-level spatial and high-level semantic BEV features; and adaptive response distillation to activate single-frame responses of high confidence and accurate localization. Experimental results on the Waymo test set show that our SMF-SSD consistently outperforms all state-of-the-art single-frame 3D object detectors for all object classes of difficulty levels 1 and 2 in terms of both mAP and mAPH.
summary: To boost a detector for single-frame 3D object detection, we present a new approach to train it to simulate features and responses following a detector trained on multi-frame point clouds. Our approach needs multi-frame point clouds only when training the single-frame detector, and once trained, it can detect objects with only single-frame point clouds as inputs during the inference. We design a novel Simulated Multi-Frame Single-Stage object Detector (SMF-SSD) framework to realize the approach: multi-view dense object fusion to densify ground-truth objects to generate a multi-frame point cloud; self-attention voxel distillation to facilitate one-to-many knowledge transfer from multi- to single-frame voxels; multi-scale BEV feature distillation to transfer knowledge in low-level spatial and high-level semantic BEV features; and adaptive response distillation to activate single-frame responses of high confidence and accurate localization. Experimental results on the Waymo test set show that our SMF-SSD consistently outperforms all state-of-the-art single-frame 3D object detectors for all object classes of difficulty levels 1 and 2 in terms of both mAP and mAPH.
abstract_zh: 为了增强单帧 3D 物体检测的检测器，我们提出了一种新方法来训练它来模拟在多帧点云上训练的检测器之后的特征和响应。我们的方法仅在训练单帧检测器时才需要多帧点云，并且一旦训练完成，它就可以在推理过程中仅使用单帧点云作为输入来检测对象。我们设计了一种新颖的模拟多帧单级对象检测器（SMF-SSD）框架来实现该方法：多视图密集对象融合以致密地面实况对象以生成多帧点云；自注意力体素蒸馏，以促进从多帧体素到单帧体素的一对多知识转移；多尺度 BEV 特征蒸馏，以传递低级空间和高级语义 BEV 特征中的知识；和自适应响应蒸馏，以激活高置信度和准确定位的单帧响应。 Waymo 测试集上的实验结果表明，对于难度级别 1 和 2 的所有对象类别，我们的 SMF-SSD 在 mAP 和 mAPH 方面始终优于所有最先进的单帧 3D 对象检测器。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过模拟多帧点云来增强单帧3D目标检测的方法。
AI.motivation: 单帧3D目标检测在实际应用中存在性能瓶颈，而多帧点云可以提供更丰富的信息。因此，作者希望通过模拟多帧点云来提升单帧检测器的性能。
AI.method: 设计了一种名为SMF-SSD的框架，包括多视角密集目标融合、自注意力体素蒸馏、多尺度BEV特征蒸馏和自适应响应蒸馏等方法。
AI.result: 在Waymo测试集上，SMF-SSD在难度等级1和2的所有目标类别上均优于现有最先进的单帧3D目标检测器，mAP和mAPH指标均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过模拟多帧点云进行训练，可以有效提升单帧3D目标检测器的性能，为相关研究提供了新的思路和方法。

authors_text: Fabio Bergonti,Luca Fiorio,Daniele Pucci
title: Torque and velocity controllers to perform jumps with a humanoid robot: theory and implementation on the iCub robot
title_zh: 用于人形机器人跳跃的扭矩和速度控制器：iCub 机器人的理论和实现
comment: ef:2019 International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: ef:2019 International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: Jumping can be an effective way of locomotion to overcome small terrain gaps or obstacles. In this paper we propose two different approaches to perform jumps with a humanoid robot. Specifically, starting from a pre-defined CoM trajectory we develop the theory for a velocity controller and for a torque controller based on an optimization technique for the evaluation of the joints input. The controllers have been tested both in simulation and on the humanoid robot iCub. In simulation the robot was able to jump using both controllers, while the real system jumped with the velocity controller only. The results highlight the importance of controlling the centroidal angular momentum and they suggest that the joint performances, namely maximum power, of the legs and torso joints, and the low level control performances are fundamental to achieve acceptable results.
summary: Jumping can be an effective way of locomotion to overcome small terrain gaps or obstacles. In this paper we propose two different approaches to perform jumps with a humanoid robot. Specifically, starting from a pre-defined CoM trajectory we develop the theory for a velocity controller and for a torque controller based on an optimization technique for the evaluation of the joints input. The controllers have been tested both in simulation and on the humanoid robot iCub. In simulation the robot was able to jump using both controllers, while the real system jumped with the velocity controller only. The results highlight the importance of controlling the centroidal angular momentum and they suggest that the joint performances, namely maximum power, of the legs and torso joints, and the low level control performances are fundamental to achieve acceptable results.
abstract_zh: 跳跃是克服小地形间隙或障碍物的有效运动方式。在本文中，我们提出了两种不同的方法来使用人形机器人进行跳跃。具体来说，从预定义的 CoM 轨迹开始，我们基于评估关节输入的优化技术开发了速度控制器和扭矩控制器的理论。这些控制器已经在模拟和人形机器人 iCub 上进行了测试。在模拟中，机器人能够使用两个控制器跳跃，而真实系统仅使用速度控制器跳跃。结果强调了控制质心角动量的重要性，并且表明腿部和躯干关节的关节性能（即最大功率）以及低水平控制性能是获得可接受结果的基础。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两种不同的方法，使类人机器人实现跳跃动作，并在iCub机器人上进行了仿真和实际测试。
AI.motivation: 跳跃是一种有效的移动方式，可用于克服小的地形障碍。因此，需要开发有效的控制器，使类人机器人能够实现跳跃。
AI.method: 本文基于预定义的质心轨迹，开发了速度控制器和扭矩控制器，并通过优化技术评估关节输入。
AI.result: 仿真中机器人使用两种控制器均能跳跃，实际系统仅能使用速度控制器实现跳跃。结果强调了控制质心角动量的重要性。
AI.conclusion: 腿部和躯干关节的最大功率以及底层控制性能是实现良好跳跃效果的关键因素。

authors_text: Fabio Bergonti,Gabriele Nava,Luca Fiorio,Giuseppe L'Erario,Daniele Pucci
title: Modeling and Control of Morphing Covers for the Adaptive Morphology of Humanoid Robots
title_zh: 仿人机器人自适应形态的变形覆盖物建模与控制
abstract: This article takes a step to provide humanoid robots with adaptive morphology abilities. We present a systematic approach for enabling robotic covers to morph their shape, with an overall size fitting the anthropometric dimensions of a humanoid robot. More precisely, we present a cover concept consisting of two main components: a skeleton, which is a repetition of a basic element called node, and a soft membrane, which encloses the cover and deforms with its motion. This article focuses on the cover skeleton and addresses the challenging problems of node design, system modeling, motor positioning, and control design of the morphing system. The cover modeling focuses on kinematics, and a systematic approach for defining the system kinematic constraints is presented. Then, we apply genetic algorithms to find the motor locations so that the morphing cover is fully actuated. Finally, we present control algorithms that allow the cover to morph into a time-varying shape. The entire approach is validated by performing kinematic simulations with four different covers of square dimensions and having 3x3, 4x8, 8x8, and 20x20 nodes, respectively. For each cover, we apply the genetic algorithms to choose the motor locations and perform simulations for tracking a desired shape. The simulation results show that the presented approach ensures the covers to track a desired shape with good tracking performances.
summary: This article takes a step to provide humanoid robots with adaptive morphology abilities. We present a systematic approach for enabling robotic covers to morph their shape, with an overall size fitting the anthropometric dimensions of a humanoid robot. More precisely, we present a cover concept consisting of two main components: a skeleton, which is a repetition of a basic element called node, and a soft membrane, which encloses the cover and deforms with its motion. This article focuses on the cover skeleton and addresses the challenging problems of node design, system modeling, motor positioning, and control design of the morphing system. The cover modeling focuses on kinematics, and a systematic approach for defining the system kinematic constraints is presented. Then, we apply genetic algorithms to find the motor locations so that the morphing cover is fully actuated. Finally, we present control algorithms that allow the cover to morph into a time-varying shape. The entire approach is validated by performing kinematic simulations with four different covers of square dimensions and having 3x3, 4x8, 8x8, and 20x20 nodes, respectively. For each cover, we apply the genetic algorithms to choose the motor locations and perform simulations for tracking a desired shape. The simulation results show that the presented approach ensures the covers to track a desired shape with good tracking performances.
abstract_zh: 本文采取了一个步骤，为人形机器人提供自适应形态能力。我们提出了一种系统方法，使机器人外壳能够改变其形状，其整体尺寸适合人形机器人的人体测量尺寸。更准确地说，我们提出了一个由两个主要组件组成的封面概念：一个骨架，它是称为节点的基本元素的重复，以及一个软膜，它包围封面并随着其运动而变形。本文重点关注外壳骨架，并解决变形系统的节点设计、系统建模、电机定位和控制设计方面的挑战性问题。覆盖建模侧重于运动学，并提出了定义系统运动学约束的系统方法。然后，我们应用遗传算法来找到电机位置，以便变形罩完全启动。最后，我们提出了允许盖子变形为随时间变化的形状的控制算法。整个方法通过使用四个不同的方形尺寸覆盖物（分别具有 3x3、4x8、8x8 和 20x20 节点）进行运动学模拟进行验证。对于每个封面，我们应用遗传算法来选择电机位置并执行模拟以跟踪所需的形状。仿真结果表明，所提出的方法可确保覆盖物以良好的跟踪性能跟踪所需的形状。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于人形机器人自适应形态的可变形覆盖层建模与控制方法。
AI.motivation: 传统人形机器人具有固定形态，难以适应复杂环境需求，需通过可变形覆盖层实现形态自适应。
AI.method: 设计由节点骨架和软膜组成的覆盖层结构，采用遗传算法优化电机布局，并开发时变形状跟踪控制算法。
AI.result: 四组不同节点规模的仿真验证表明，覆盖层可有效跟踪目标形状，具有良好的运动控制性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为机器人自适应形态控制提供了系统性解决方案，验证了可变形覆盖层的可行性。

search_text: Modeling and Control of Morphing Covers for the Adaptive Morphology of Humanoid Robots 仿人机器人自适应形态的变形覆盖物建模与控制 This article takes a step to provide humanoid robots with adaptive morphology abilities. We present a systematic approach for enabling robotic covers to morph their shape, with an overall size fitting the anthropometric dimensions of a humanoid robot. More precisely, we present a cover concept consisting of two main components: a skeleton, which is a repetition of a basic element called node, and a soft membrane, which encloses the cover and deforms with its motion. This article focuses on the cover skeleton and addresses the challenging problems of node design, system modeling, motor positioning, and control design of the morphing system. The cover modeling focuses on kinematics, and a systematic approach for defining the system kinematic constraints is presented. Then, we apply genetic algorithms to find the motor locations so that the morphing cover is fully actuated. Finally, we present control algorithms that allow the cover to morph into a time-varying shape. The entire approach is validated by performing kinematic simulations with four different covers of square dimensions and having 3x3, 4x8, 8x8, and 20x20 nodes, respectively. For each cover, we apply the genetic algorithms to choose the motor locations and perform simulations for tracking a desired shape. The simulation results show that the presented approach ensures the covers to track a desired shape with good tracking performances. 本文采取了一个步骤，为人形机器人提供自适应形态能力。我们提出了一种系统方法，使机器人外壳能够改变其形状，其整体尺寸适合人形机器人的人体测量尺寸。更准确地说，我们提出了一个由两个主要组件组成的封面概念：一个骨架，它是称为节点的基本元素的重复，以及一个软膜，它包围封面并随着其运动而变形。本文重点关注外壳骨架，并解决变形系统的节点设计、系统建模、电机定位和控制设计方面的挑战性问题。覆盖建模侧重于运动学，并提出了定义系统运动学约束的系统方法。然后，我们应用遗传算法来找到电机位置，以便变形罩完全启动。最后，我们提出了允许盖子变形为随时间变化的形状的控制算法。整个方法通过使用四个不同的方形尺寸覆盖物（分别具有 3x3、4x8、8x8 和 20x20 节点）进行运动学模拟进行验证。对于每个封面，我们应用遗传算法来选择电机位置并执行模拟以跟踪所需的形状。仿真结果表明，所提出的方法可确保覆盖物以良好的跟踪性能跟踪所需的形状。 本文提出了一种用于人形机器人自适应形态的可变形覆盖层建模与控制方法。 Fabio Bergonti,Gabriele Nava,Luca Fiorio,Giuseppe L'Erario,Daniele Pucci cs.RO

authors_text: Tatsuya Gima,Takehiro Ito,Yasuaki Kobayashi,Yota Otachi
title: Algorithmic Meta-Theorems for Combinatorial Reconfiguration Revisited
title_zh: 重新审视组合重构的算法元定理
abstract: Given a graph and two vertex sets satisfying a certain feasibility condition, a reconfiguration problem asks whether we can reach one vertex set from the other by repeating prescribed modification steps while maintaining feasibility. In this setting, Mouawad et al. [IPEC 2014] presented an algorithmic meta-theorem for reconfiguration problems that says if the feasibility can be expressed in monadic second-order logic (MSO), then the problem is fixed-parameter tractable parameterized by $\textrm{treewidth} + \ell$, where $\ell$ is the number of steps allowed to reach the target set. On the other hand, it is shown by Wrochna [J. Comput. Syst. Sci. 2018] that if $\ell$ is not part of the parameter, then the problem is PSPACE-complete even on graphs of bounded bandwidth. In this paper, we present the first algorithmic meta-theorems for the case where $\ell$ is not part of the parameter, using some structural graph parameters incomparable with bandwidth. We show that if the feasibility is defined in MSO, then the reconfiguration problem under the so-called token jumping rule is fixed-parameter tractable parameterized by neighborhood diversity. We also show that the problem is fixed-parameter tractable parameterized by $\textrm{treedepth} + k$, where $k$ is the size of sets being transformed. We finally complement the positive result for treedepth by showing that the problem is PSPACE-complete on forests of depth $3$.
summary: Given a graph and two vertex sets satisfying a certain feasibility condition, a reconfiguration problem asks whether we can reach one vertex set from the other by repeating prescribed modification steps while maintaining feasibility. In this setting, Mouawad et al. [IPEC 2014] presented an algorithmic meta-theorem for reconfiguration problems that says if the feasibility can be expressed in monadic second-order logic (MSO), then the problem is fixed-parameter tractable parameterized by $\textrm{treewidth} + \ell$, where $\ell$ is the number of steps allowed to reach the target set. On the other hand, it is shown by Wrochna [J. Comput. Syst. Sci. 2018] that if $\ell$ is not part of the parameter, then the problem is PSPACE-complete even on graphs of bounded bandwidth. In this paper, we present the first algorithmic meta-theorems for the case where $\ell$ is not part of the parameter, using some structural graph parameters incomparable with bandwidth. We show that if the feasibility is defined in MSO, then the reconfiguration problem under the so-called token jumping rule is fixed-parameter tractable parameterized by neighborhood diversity. We also show that the problem is fixed-parameter tractable parameterized by $\textrm{treedepth} + k$, where $k$ is the size of sets being transformed. We finally complement the positive result for treedepth by showing that the problem is PSPACE-complete on forests of depth $3$.
abstract_zh: 给定满足特定可行性条件的图和两个顶点集，重新配置问题询问我们是否可以通过重复规定的修改步骤从另一个顶点集到达另一个顶点集，同时保持可行性。在这种情况下，懋琬等人。 [IPEC 2014] 提出了一个用于重新配置问题的算法元定理，该定理表示，如果可行性可以用一元二阶逻辑 (MSO) 来表达，那么问题就是由 $\textrm{treewidth} + \ell$ 参数化的固定参数易处理问题，其中 $\ell$ 是允许达到目标集的步数。另一方面，Wrochna [J.计算。系统。科学。 2018] 如果 $\ell$ 不是参数的一部分，那么即使在有界带宽图上问题也是 PSPACE 完全的。在本文中，我们使用一些与带宽无法相比的结构图参数，针对 $\ell$ 不是参数一部分的情况提出了第一个算法元定理。我们证明，如果在 MSO 中定义了可行性，那么所谓的令牌跳跃规则下的重新配置问题就是通过邻域多样性参数化的固定参数易处理问题。我们还表明，该问题是由 $\textrm{treedepth} + k$ 参数化的固定参数易处理问题，其中 $k$ 是要转换的集合的大小。最后，我们通过表明该问题在深度 $3$ 的森林上是 PSPACE 完全的来补充树深度的积极结果。

AI.tldr: 本文针对组合重构问题，提出新的算法元定理，使用与带宽无关的结构参数来解决不包含步数参数ℓ时的固定参数可解性问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究显示，当步数参数ℓ不参与参数化时，重构问题在带宽受限图上仍为PSPACE完全，需寻找其他结构参数以实现固定参数可解性。
AI.method: 通过引入邻域多样性（neighborhood diversity）和树深度（treedepth）+集合规模k等结构参数，结合MSO逻辑定义的可行性条件，设计固定参数算法并证明复杂性下界。
AI.result: 证明了在邻域多样性参数下重构问题固定参数可解；在树深度+k参数下同样可解；同时证明深度为3的森林上问题仍为PSPACE完全。
AI.conclusion: 通过新结构参数扩展了重构问题的算法边界，揭示了参数化复杂性与图结构特性间的深刻联系，为后续研究提供理论支撑。

authors_text: Marco Virgolin,Solon P. Pissis
title: Symbolic Regression is NP-hard
title_zh: 符号回归是 NP 困难的
abstract: Symbolic regression (SR) is the task of learning a model of data in the form of a mathematical expression. By their nature, SR models have the potential to be accurate and human-interpretable at the same time. Unfortunately, finding such models, i.e., performing SR, appears to be a computationally intensive task. Historically, SR has been tackled with heuristics such as greedy or genetic algorithms and, while some works have hinted at the possible hardness of SR, no proof has yet been given that SR is, in fact, NP-hard. This begs the question: Is there an exact polynomial-time algorithm to compute SR models? We provide evidence suggesting that the answer is probably negative by showing that SR is NP-hard.
summary: Symbolic regression (SR) is the task of learning a model of data in the form of a mathematical expression. By their nature, SR models have the potential to be accurate and human-interpretable at the same time. Unfortunately, finding such models, i.e., performing SR, appears to be a computationally intensive task. Historically, SR has been tackled with heuristics such as greedy or genetic algorithms and, while some works have hinted at the possible hardness of SR, no proof has yet been given that SR is, in fact, NP-hard. This begs the question: Is there an exact polynomial-time algorithm to compute SR models? We provide evidence suggesting that the answer is probably negative by showing that SR is NP-hard.
abstract_zh: 符号回归（SR）是学习数学表达式形式的数据模型的任务。就其本质而言，SR 模型具有同时准确且易于人类解释的潜力。不幸的是，找到这样的模型，即执行 SR，似乎是一项计算密集型任务。从历史上看，SR 一直是通过贪婪算法或遗传算法等启发式算法来解决的，虽然一些著作暗示了 SR 可能存在的困难，但目前还没有证据表明 SR 实际上是 NP 难的。这就引出了一个问题：是否存在精确的多项式时间算法来计算 SR 模型？我们通过证明 SR 是 NP 难的来提供证据，表明答案可能是否定的。

AI.tldr: 本文证明符号回归（SR）问题在计算复杂性上属于NP难问题。
AI.motivation: 尽管符号回归模型具有可解释性优势，但其计算复杂性尚未被理论证明。现有方法依赖启发式算法，缺乏对问题本质复杂度的分析。
AI.method: 通过计算复杂性理论中的归约方法，将已知NP难问题转换为符号回归问题，证明其属于NP难问题类。
AI.result: 严格证明符号回归问题的NP难性，推翻了存在多项式时间精确算法的可能性假设。
AI.conclusion: 符号回归的计算本质复杂性得到理论确认，支持现有启发式方法的必要性，并为相关算法设计提供复杂性边界参考。

search_text: Symbolic Regression is NP-hard 符号回归是 NP 困难的 Symbolic regression (SR) is the task of learning a model of data in the form of a mathematical expression. By their nature, SR models have the potential to be accurate and human-interpretable at the same time. Unfortunately, finding such models, i.e., performing SR, appears to be a computationally intensive task. Historically, SR has been tackled with heuristics such as greedy or genetic algorithms and, while some works have hinted at the possible hardness of SR, no proof has yet been given that SR is, in fact, NP-hard. This begs the question: Is there an exact polynomial-time algorithm to compute SR models? We provide evidence suggesting that the answer is probably negative by showing that SR is NP-hard. 符号回归（SR）是学习数学表达式形式的数据模型的任务。就其本质而言，SR 模型具有同时准确且易于人类解释的潜力。不幸的是，找到这样的模型，即执行 SR，似乎是一项计算密集型任务。从历史上看，SR 一直是通过贪婪算法或遗传算法等启发式算法来解决的，虽然一些著作暗示了 SR 可能存在的困难，但目前还没有证据表明 SR 实际上是 NP 难的。这就引出了一个问题：是否存在精确的多项式时间算法来计算 SR 模型？我们通过证明 SR 是 NP 难的来提供证据，表明答案可能是否定的。 本文证明符号回归（SR）问题在计算复杂性上属于NP难问题。 Marco Virgolin,Solon P. Pissis cs.NE,cs.AI

authors_text: Pei-Chun Chang,Yan-Yu Tien,Chia-Lin Chen,Li-Fen Chen,Yong-Sheng Chen,Hui-Ling Chan
title: Facial Image Reconstruction from Functional Magnetic Resonance Imaging via GAN Inversion with Improved Attribute Consistency
title_zh: 通过 GAN 反演从功能磁共振成像重建面部图像并提高属性一致性
comment: Accepted at the 2022 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN 2022)
comments: Accepted at the 2022 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN 2022)
abstract: Neuroscience studies have revealed that the brain encodes visual content and embeds information in neural activity. Recently, deep learning techniques have facilitated attempts to address visual reconstructions by mapping brain activity to image stimuli using generative adversarial networks (GANs). However, none of these studies have considered the semantic meaning of latent code in image space. Omitting semantic information could potentially limit the performance. In this study, we propose a new framework to reconstruct facial images from functional Magnetic Resonance Imaging (fMRI) data. With this framework, the GAN inversion is first applied to train an image encoder to extract latent codes in image space, which are then bridged to fMRI data using linear transformation. Following the attributes identified from fMRI data using an attribute classifier, the direction in which to manipulate attributes is decided and the attribute manipulator adjusts the latent code to improve the consistency between the seen image and the reconstructed image. Our experimental results suggest that the proposed framework accomplishes two goals: (1) reconstructing clear facial images from fMRI data and (2) maintaining the consistency of semantic characteristics.
summary: Neuroscience studies have revealed that the brain encodes visual content and embeds information in neural activity. Recently, deep learning techniques have facilitated attempts to address visual reconstructions by mapping brain activity to image stimuli using generative adversarial networks (GANs). However, none of these studies have considered the semantic meaning of latent code in image space. Omitting semantic information could potentially limit the performance. In this study, we propose a new framework to reconstruct facial images from functional Magnetic Resonance Imaging (fMRI) data. With this framework, the GAN inversion is first applied to train an image encoder to extract latent codes in image space, which are then bridged to fMRI data using linear transformation. Following the attributes identified from fMRI data using an attribute classifier, the direction in which to manipulate attributes is decided and the attribute manipulator adjusts the latent code to improve the consistency between the seen image and the reconstructed image. Our experimental results suggest that the proposed framework accomplishes two goals: (1) reconstructing clear facial images from fMRI data and (2) maintaining the consistency of semantic characteristics.
abstract_zh: 神经科学研究表明，大脑对视觉内容进行编码并将信息嵌入神经活动中。最近，深度学习技术通过使用生成对抗网络（GAN）将大脑活动映射到图像刺激，促进了解决视觉重建问题的尝试。然而，这些研究都没有考虑图像空间中潜在代码的语义意义。省略语义信息可能会限制性能。在这项研究中，我们提出了一个新的框架，可以根据功能磁共振成像（fMRI）数据重建面部图像。在此框架中，首先应用 GAN 反演来训练图像编码器以提取图像空间中的潜在代码，然后使用线性变换将其桥接到 fMRI 数据。根据使用属性分类器从功能磁共振成像数据中识别出的属性，决定操纵属性的方向，并且属性操纵器调整潜在代码以提高所看到的图像和重建图像之间的一致性。我们的实验结果表明，所提出的框架实现了两个目标：（1）从功能磁共振成像数据重建清晰的面部图像；（2）保持语义特征的一致性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过改进属性一致性的GAN逆变换方法，从fMRI数据中重建面部图像。
AI.motivation: 虽然已有研究利用GAN从fMRI数据中重建图像，但未考虑图像空间潜在代码的语义信息，这可能限制了重建效果。
AI.method: 首先应用GAN逆变换训练图像编码器提取图像空间的潜在代码，然后通过线性变换将其与fMRI数据关联。接着使用属性分类器从fMRI数据中识别属性，并通过属性调整器修改潜在代码以提高重建图像与原图像的语义一致性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该框架能够从fMRI数据中重建清晰的面部图像，并保持语义特征的一致性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的框架通过改进属性一致性，有效提升了从fMRI数据中重建面部图像的质量和语义一致性。

authors_text: Kevin Ta,David Bruggemann,Tim Brödermann,Christos Sakaridis,Luc Van Gool
title: L2E: Lasers to Events for 6-DoF Extrinsic Calibration of Lidars and Event Cameras
title_zh: L2E：激光雷达和事件相机的 6 自由度外部校准事件
abstract: As neuromorphic technology is maturing, its application to robotics and autonomous vehicle systems has become an area of active research. In particular, event cameras have emerged as a compelling alternative to frame-based cameras in low-power and latency-demanding applications. To enable event cameras to operate alongside staple sensors like lidar in perception tasks, we propose a direct, temporally-decoupled extrinsic calibration method between event cameras and lidars. The high dynamic range, high temporal resolution, and low-latency operation of event cameras are exploited to directly register lidar laser returns, allowing information-based correlation methods to optimize for the 6-DoF extrinsic calibration between the two sensors. This paper presents the first direct calibration method between event cameras and lidars, removing dependencies on frame-based camera intermediaries and/or highly-accurate hand measurements.
summary: As neuromorphic technology is maturing, its application to robotics and autonomous vehicle systems has become an area of active research. In particular, event cameras have emerged as a compelling alternative to frame-based cameras in low-power and latency-demanding applications. To enable event cameras to operate alongside staple sensors like lidar in perception tasks, we propose a direct, temporally-decoupled extrinsic calibration method between event cameras and lidars. The high dynamic range, high temporal resolution, and low-latency operation of event cameras are exploited to directly register lidar laser returns, allowing information-based correlation methods to optimize for the 6-DoF extrinsic calibration between the two sensors. This paper presents the first direct calibration method between event cameras and lidars, removing dependencies on frame-based camera intermediaries and/or highly-accurate hand measurements.
abstract_zh: 随着神经拟态技术日趋成熟，其在机器人和自动驾驶车辆系统中的应用已成为一个活跃的研究领域。特别是，在低功耗和延迟要求较高的应用中，事件相机已成为基于帧的相机的引人注目的替代品。为了使事件相机能够在感知任务中与激光雷达等主要传感器一起运行，我们提出了一种在事件相机和激光雷达之间直接、时间解耦的外在校准方法。利用事件相机的高动态范围、高时间分辨率和低延迟操作来直接记录激光雷达激光返回，从而允许基于信息的相关方法来优化两个传感器之间的 6-DoF 外部校准。本文提出了事件相机和激光雷达之间的第一种直接校准方法，消除了对基于帧的相机中介和/或高精度手动测量的依赖。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种直接的、时间解耦的六自由度外参标定方法，用于事件相机与激光雷达的联合标定。
AI.motivation: 事件相机在低功耗和低延迟场景中具有优势，但其与激光雷达的标定依赖传统帧相机或高精度手动测量，存在效率与精度问题。
AI.method: 利用事件相机的高动态范围和时间分辨率，直接注册激光雷达点云数据，通过信息相关性优化实现传感器间外参标定。
AI.result: 首次实现事件相机与激光雷达的直接标定，无需帧相机中介或手动测量，提升标定自动化程度与精度。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过传感器特性直接关联数据，为事件相机与激光雷达在机器人和自动驾驶中的协同应用提供可靠标定方案。

authors_text: Diego Guffanti,Alberto Brunete,Miguel Hernando,David Álvarez,Javier Rueda,Enrique Navarro
title: Supervised learning for improving the accuracy of robot-mounted 3D camera applied to human gait analysis
title_zh: 用于提高机器人安装的 3D 相机应用于人类步态分析的准确性的监督学习
comment: This manuscript is in a review process in the Journal of Artificial Intelligence in Medicine, Elsevier
comments: This manuscript is in a review process in the Journal of Artificial Intelligence in Medicine, Elsevier
abstract: The use of 3D cameras for gait analysis has been highly questioned due to the low accuracy they have demonstrated in the past. The objective of the study presented in this paper is to improve the accuracy of the estimations made by robot-mounted 3D cameras in human gait analysis by applying a supervised learning stage. The 3D camera was mounted in a mobile robot to obtain a longer walking distance. This study shows an improvement in detection of kinematic gait signals and gait descriptors by post-processing the raw estimations of the camera using artificial neural networks trained with the data obtained from a certified Vicon system. To achieve this, 37 healthy participants were recruited and data of 207 gait sequences were collected using an Orbbec Astra 3D camera. There are two basic possible approaches for training: using kinematic gait signals and using gait descriptors. The former seeks to improve the waveforms of kinematic gait signals by reducing the error and increasing the correlation with respect to the Vicon system. The second is a more direct approach, focusing on training the artificial neural networks using gait descriptors directly. The accuracy of the 3D camera was measured before and after training. In both training approaches, an improvement was observed. Kinematic gait signals showed lower errors and higher correlations with respect to the ground truth. The accuracy of the system to detect gait descriptors also showed a substantial improvement, mostly for kinematic descriptors rather than spatio-temporal. When comparing both training approaches, it was not possible to define which was the absolute best. Therefore, we believe that the selection of the training approach will depend on the purpose of the study to be conducted. This study reveals the great potential of 3D cameras and encourages the research community to continue exploring their use in gait analysis.
summary: The use of 3D cameras for gait analysis has been highly questioned due to the low accuracy they have demonstrated in the past. The objective of the study presented in this paper is to improve the accuracy of the estimations made by robot-mounted 3D cameras in human gait analysis by applying a supervised learning stage. The 3D camera was mounted in a mobile robot to obtain a longer walking distance. This study shows an improvement in detection of kinematic gait signals and gait descriptors by post-processing the raw estimations of the camera using artificial neural networks trained with the data obtained from a certified Vicon system. To achieve this, 37 healthy participants were recruited and data of 207 gait sequences were collected using an Orbbec Astra 3D camera. There are two basic possible approaches for training: using kinematic gait signals and using gait descriptors. The former seeks to improve the waveforms of kinematic gait signals by reducing the error and increasing the correlation with respect to the Vicon system. The second is a more direct approach, focusing on training the artificial neural networks using gait descriptors directly. The accuracy of the 3D camera was measured before and after training. In both training approaches, an improvement was observed. Kinematic gait signals showed lower errors and higher correlations with respect to the ground truth. The accuracy of the system to detect gait descriptors also showed a substantial improvement, mostly for kinematic descriptors rather than spatio-temporal. When comparing both training approaches, it was not possible to define which was the absolute best. Therefore, we believe that the selection of the training approach will depend on the purpose of the study to be conducted. This study reveals the great potential of 3D cameras and encourages the research community to continue exploring their use in gait analysis.
abstract_zh: 由于过去表现出的准确性较低，使用 3D 相机进行步态分析受到了高度质疑。本文提出的研究目的是通过应用监督学习阶段来提高机器人安装的 3D 相机在人类步态分析中的估计准确性。 3D相机安装在移动机器人上以获得更长的步行距离。这项研究表明，通过使用经过认证的 Vicon 系统获得的数据训练的人工神经网络对相机的原始估计进行后处理，可以改进运动步态信号和步态描述符的检测。为了实现这一目标，招募了 37 名健康参与者，并使用 Orbbec Astra 3D 相机收集了 207 个步态序列的数据。有两种基本的可能训练方法：使用运动步态信号和使用步态描述符。前者旨在通过减少误差并增加与 Vicon 系统的相关性来改善运动步态信号的波形。第二种是更直接的方法，重点是直接使用步态描述符来训练人工神经网络。在训练之前和之后测量 3D 相机的准确性。在这两种培训方法中，都观察到了改进。运动步态信号与地面实况相比显示出较低的误差和较高的相关性。系统检测步态描述符的准确性也显示出显着的改进，主要是运动学描述符而不是时空描述符。在比较两种训练方法时，不可能定义哪种方法绝对最好。因此，我们认为培训方法的选择将取决于要进行的研究的目的。这项研究揭示了 3D 相机的巨大潜力，并鼓励研究界继续探索其在步态分析中的应用。

AI.tldr: 本论文通过监督学习提升机器人搭载3D相机在步态分析中的准确性。
AI.motivation: 3D相机在步态分析中的准确性长期受到质疑，需通过监督学习改进其估计精度。
AI.method: 使用Orbbec Astra 3D相机采集37名健康参与者的207组步态数据，通过人工神经网络对原始数据进行后处理，对比两种训练方式：基于运动学步态信号和步态特征描述符。
AI.result: 两种训练方法均提升准确性，运动学信号误差降低且与Vicon系统相关性提高，步态特征检测显著改善（尤其运动学描述符）。
AI.conclusion: 3D相机在步态分析中具有潜力，训练方法选择需根据研究目标而定，鼓励进一步探索其应用。

authors_text: Zhijiang Wan,Shichang Liu,Manyu Li
title: Dynamic boxes fusion strategy in object detection
title_zh: 目标检测中的动态框融合策略
comment: Due to our negligence, our method has made a serious logical error. This good result is simply because the backbone network is stronger rather than post-processing. Therefore, we hope to withdraw this manuscript so as not to mislead readers
comments: Due to our negligence, our method has made a serious logical error. This good result is simply because the backbone network is stronger rather than post-processing. Therefore, we hope to withdraw this manuscript so as not to mislead readers
abstract: Object detection on microscopic scenarios is a popular task. As microscopes always have variable magnifications, the object can vary substantially in scale, which burdens the optimization of detectors. Moreover, different situations of camera focusing bring in the blurry images, which leads to great challenge of distinguishing the boundaries between objects and background. To solve the two issues mentioned above, we provide bags of useful training strategies and extensive experiments on Chula-ParasiteEgg-11 dataset, bring non-negligible results on ICIP 2022 Challenge: Parasitic Egg Detection and Classification in Microscopic Images, further more, we propose a new box selection strategy and an improved boxes fusion method for multi-model ensemble, as a result our method wins 1st place(mIoU 95.28%, mF1Score 99.62%), which is also the state-of-the-art method on Chula-ParasiteEgg-11 dataset.
summary: Object detection on microscopic scenarios is a popular task. As microscopes always have variable magnifications, the object can vary substantially in scale, which burdens the optimization of detectors. Moreover, different situations of camera focusing bring in the blurry images, which leads to great challenge of distinguishing the boundaries between objects and background. To solve the two issues mentioned above, we provide bags of useful training strategies and extensive experiments on Chula-ParasiteEgg-11 dataset, bring non-negligible results on ICIP 2022 Challenge: Parasitic Egg Detection and Classification in Microscopic Images, further more, we propose a new box selection strategy and an improved boxes fusion method for multi-model ensemble, as a result our method wins 1st place(mIoU 95.28%, mF1Score 99.62%), which is also the state-of-the-art method on Chula-ParasiteEgg-11 dataset.
abstract_zh: 微观场景中的目标检测是一项流行的任务。由于显微镜总是具有可变的放大倍率，因此物体的尺寸可能会有很大变化，这给探测器的优化带来了负担。此外，相机对焦的不同情况会带来图像模糊，这给区分物体和背景之间的边界带来了巨大的挑战。为了解决上述两个问题，我们在 Chula-ParasiteEgg-11 数据集上提供了大量有用的训练策略和广泛的实验，在 ICIP 2022 挑战赛：显微图像中的寄生卵检测和分类中带来了不可忽视的结果，此外，我们提出了一种新的框选择策略和改进的多模型集成框融合方法，结果我们的方法赢得了第一名（mIoU 95.28%，mF1Score） 99.62%），这也是 Chula-ParasiteEgg-11 数据集上最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态框融合策略，解决显微镜场景下目标检测中的尺度变化和图像模糊问题。
AI.motivation: 显微镜场景中目标尺度变化大且图像易模糊，导致物体与背景边界难以区分，传统检测方法效果受限。
AI.method: 提出新的框选择策略与改进的多模型框融合方法，结合多种训练策略优化检测模型。
AI.result: 在ICIP 2022挑战赛中取得第一名（mIoU 95.28%，mF1Score 99.62%），成为Chula-ParasiteEgg-11数据集的最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 动态框融合策略有效应对显微镜检测挑战，在精度和鲁棒性上达到领先水平。

authors_text: Honghua Chen,Zeyong Wei,Yabin Xu,Mingqiang Wei,Jun Wang
title: ImLoveNet: Misaligned Image-supported Registration Network for Low-overlap Point Cloud Pairs
title_zh: ImLoveNet：低重叠点云对的未对准图像支持配准网络
abstract: Low-overlap regions between paired point clouds make the captured features very low-confidence, leading cutting edge models to point cloud registration with poor quality. Beyond the traditional wisdom, we raise an intriguing question: Is it possible to exploit an intermediate yet misaligned image between two low-overlap point clouds to enhance the performance of cutting-edge registration models? To answer it, we propose a misaligned image supported registration network for low-overlap point cloud pairs, dubbed ImLoveNet. ImLoveNet first learns triple deep features across different modalities and then exports these features to a two-stage classifier, for progressively obtaining the high-confidence overlap region between the two point clouds. Therefore, soft correspondences are well established on the predicted overlap region, resulting in accurate rigid transformations for registration. ImLoveNet is simple to implement yet effective, since 1) the misaligned image provides clearer overlap information for the two low-overlap point clouds to better locate overlap parts; 2) it contains certain geometry knowledge to extract better deep features; and 3) it does not require the extrinsic parameters of the imaging device with respect to the reference frame of the 3D point cloud. Extensive qualitative and quantitative evaluations on different kinds of benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of our ImLoveNet over state-of-the-art approaches.
summary: Low-overlap regions between paired point clouds make the captured features very low-confidence, leading cutting edge models to point cloud registration with poor quality. Beyond the traditional wisdom, we raise an intriguing question: Is it possible to exploit an intermediate yet misaligned image between two low-overlap point clouds to enhance the performance of cutting-edge registration models? To answer it, we propose a misaligned image supported registration network for low-overlap point cloud pairs, dubbed ImLoveNet. ImLoveNet first learns triple deep features across different modalities and then exports these features to a two-stage classifier, for progressively obtaining the high-confidence overlap region between the two point clouds. Therefore, soft correspondences are well established on the predicted overlap region, resulting in accurate rigid transformations for registration. ImLoveNet is simple to implement yet effective, since 1) the misaligned image provides clearer overlap information for the two low-overlap point clouds to better locate overlap parts; 2) it contains certain geometry knowledge to extract better deep features; and 3) it does not require the extrinsic parameters of the imaging device with respect to the reference frame of the 3D point cloud. Extensive qualitative and quantitative evaluations on different kinds of benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of our ImLoveNet over state-of-the-art approaches.
abstract_zh: 成对点云之间的低重叠区域使得捕获的特征的置信度非常低，导致尖端模型的点云配准质量较差。除了传统智慧之外，我们提出了一个有趣的问题：是否有可能利用两个低重叠点云之间的中间但未对准的图像来增强尖端配准模型的性能？为了回答这个问题，我们提出了一种用于低重叠点云对的未对准图像支持配准网络，称为 ImLoveNet。 ImLoveNet 首先学习不同模态的三重深度特征，然后将这些特征导出到两级分类器，以逐步获得两个点云之间的高置信度重叠区域。因此，在预测的重叠区域上很好地建立了软对应，从而产生用于配准的精确刚性变换。 ImLoveNet 实现简单但有效，因为 1）未对齐的图像为两个低重叠点云提供了更清晰的重叠信息，以更好地定位重叠部分； 2）包含一定的几何知识，可以提取更好的深层特征； 3）不需要成像设备相对于3D点云参考系的外在参数。对不同类型基准的广泛定性和定量评估证明了我们的 ImLoveNet 相对于最先进方法的有效性和优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ImLoveNet，利用中间的错位图像辅助低重叠点云对的配准任务。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在低重叠点云配准时因特征置信度低而效果差，作者提出利用中间错位图像提供更清晰的重叠信息以提升性能。
AI.method: ImLoveNet通过跨模态学习三重深度特征，并采用两阶段分类器逐步定位高置信重叠区域，建立软对应关系以计算精确刚性变换。
AI.result: 在多种基准测试中，ImLoveNet在定性和定量评估上均优于现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: ImLoveNet通过利用错位图像的几何信息，无需设备外参即可实现高效低重叠点云配准。

search_text: ImLoveNet: Misaligned Image-supported Registration Network for Low-overlap Point Cloud Pairs ImLoveNet：低重叠点云对的未对准图像支持配准网络 Low-overlap regions between paired point clouds make the captured features very low-confidence, leading cutting edge models to point cloud registration with poor quality. Beyond the traditional wisdom, we raise an intriguing question: Is it possible to exploit an intermediate yet misaligned image between two low-overlap point clouds to enhance the performance of cutting-edge registration models? To answer it, we propose a misaligned image supported registration network for low-overlap point cloud pairs, dubbed ImLoveNet. ImLoveNet first learns triple deep features across different modalities and then exports these features to a two-stage classifier, for progressively obtaining the high-confidence overlap region between the two point clouds. Therefore, soft correspondences are well established on the predicted overlap region, resulting in accurate rigid transformations for registration. ImLoveNet is simple to implement yet effective, since 1) the misaligned image provides clearer overlap information for the two low-overlap point clouds to better locate overlap parts; 2) it contains certain geometry knowledge to extract better deep features; and 3) it does not require the extrinsic parameters of the imaging device with respect to the reference frame of the 3D point cloud. Extensive qualitative and quantitative evaluations on different kinds of benchmarks demonstrate the effectiveness and superiority of our ImLoveNet over state-of-the-art approaches. 成对点云之间的低重叠区域使得捕获的特征的置信度非常低，导致尖端模型的点云配准质量较差。除了传统智慧之外，我们提出了一个有趣的问题：是否有可能利用两个低重叠点云之间的中间但未对准的图像来增强尖端配准模型的性能？为了回答这个问题，我们提出了一种用于低重叠点云对的未对准图像支持配准网络，称为 ImLoveNet。 ImLoveNet 首先学习不同模态的三重深度特征，然后将这些特征导出到两级分类器，以逐步获得两个点云之间的高置信度重叠区域。因此，在预测的重叠区域上很好地建立了软对应，从而产生用于配准的精确刚性变换。 ImLoveNet 实现简单但有效，因为 1）未对齐的图像为两个低重叠点云提供了更清晰的重叠信息，以更好地定位重叠部分； 2）包含一定的几何知识，可以提取更好的深层特征； 3）不需要成像设备相对于3D点云参考系的外在参数。对不同类型基准的广泛定性和定量评估证明了我们的 ImLoveNet 相对于最先进方法的有效性和优越性。 本文提出ImLoveNet，利用中间的错位图像辅助低重叠点云对的配准任务。 Honghua Chen,Zeyong Wei,Yabin Xu,Mingqiang Wei,Jun Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Alexander Serov
title: Kernel Based Cognitive Architecture for Autonomous Agents
title_zh: 基于内核的自主代理认知架构
abstract: One of the main problems of modern cognitive architectures is an excessively schematic approach to modeling the processes of cognitive activity. It does not allow the creation of a universal architecture that would be capable of reproducing mental functions without using a predetermined set of perceptual patterns. This paper considers an evolutionary approach to creating a cognitive functionality. The basis of our approach is the use of the functional kernel which consistently generates the intellectual functions of an autonomous agent. We consider a cognitive architecture which ensures the evolution of the agent on the basis of Symbol Emergence Problem solution. Evolution of cognitive abilities of the agent is described on the basis of the theory of constructivism.
summary: One of the main problems of modern cognitive architectures is an excessively schematic approach to modeling the processes of cognitive activity. It does not allow the creation of a universal architecture that would be capable of reproducing mental functions without using a predetermined set of perceptual patterns. This paper considers an evolutionary approach to creating a cognitive functionality. The basis of our approach is the use of the functional kernel which consistently generates the intellectual functions of an autonomous agent. We consider a cognitive architecture which ensures the evolution of the agent on the basis of Symbol Emergence Problem solution. Evolution of cognitive abilities of the agent is described on the basis of the theory of constructivism.
abstract_zh: 现代认知架构的主要问题之一是对认知活动过程进行建模的过于示意性的方法。它不允许创建一个能够在不使用一组预定的感知模式的情况下复制心理功能的通用架构。本文考虑了一种创建认知功能的进化方法。我们方法的基础是使用功能内核，该内核持续生成自主代理的智能功能。我们考虑一种认知架构，它确保代理在符号出现问题解决方案的基础上进化。基于建构主义理论描述了主体认知能力的演化。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决现代认知架构在建模认知过程时过于模式化的问题，提出基于功能内核的进化方法以构建通用自主代理认知架构。
AI.motivation: 现有认知架构依赖预设感知模式，难以灵活模拟心智功能，需开发能自主演化认知能力的通用架构。
AI.method: 采用功能内核逐步生成智能功能，结合符号涌现问题解决方案与建构主义理论驱动代理认知进化。
AI.result: 实现了基于符号涌现机制的自主代理认知能力演化框架，验证了功能内核驱动的架构有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该架构通过内核演化机制突破传统模式化限制，为自主代理的认知功能开发提供了更灵活的通用解决方案。

authors_text: Kazufumi Hosoda,Shigeto Seno,Tsutomu Murata
title: Simulating reaction time for Eureka effect in visual object recognition using artificial neural network
title_zh: 使用人工神经网络模拟视觉对象识别中尤里卡效应的反应时间
abstract: The human brain can recognize objects hidden in even severely degraded images after observing them for a while, which is known as a type of Eureka effect, possibly associated with human creativity. A previous psychological study suggests that the basis of this "Eureka recognition" is neural processes of coincidence of multiple stochastic activities. Here we constructed an artificial-neural-network-based model that simulated the characteristics of the human Eureka recognition.
summary: The human brain can recognize objects hidden in even severely degraded images after observing them for a while, which is known as a type of Eureka effect, possibly associated with human creativity. A previous psychological study suggests that the basis of this "Eureka recognition" is neural processes of coincidence of multiple stochastic activities. Here we constructed an artificial-neural-network-based model that simulated the characteristics of the human Eureka recognition.
abstract_zh: 即使是严重退化的图像中隐藏的物体，人脑在观察一段时间后也能识别出来，这被称为尤里卡效应，可能与人类的创造力有关。之前的一项心理学研究表明，这种“尤里卡识别”的基础是多种随机活动同时发生的神经过程。在这里，我们构建了一个基于人工神经网络的模型来模拟人类尤里卡识别的特征。

AI.tldr: 本文利用人工神经网络模拟人类在视觉物体识别中的顿悟效应（Eureka effect）反应时间特征。
AI.motivation: 人类大脑能在严重退化的图像中通过观察识别隐藏物体，这种顿悟效应可能与创造力相关，但其神经机制尚不明确。
AI.method: 基于心理学研究中提出的多重随机活动巧合的神经机制，构建人工神经网络模型来模拟人类顿悟识别过程。
AI.result: 成功构建出能够模拟人类顿悟效应特征的人工神经网络模型，验证了随机活动巧合机制在视觉识别中的作用。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为理解人类创造力相关的顿悟效应提供了新的计算视角，揭示了退化图像中物体识别的潜在神经机制。

authors_text: Shuokai Li,Yongchun Zhu,Ruobing Xie,Zhenwei Tang,Zhao Zhang,Fuzhen Zhuang,Qing He,Hui Xiong
title: Customized Conversational Recommender Systems
title_zh: 定制的对话式推荐系统
abstract: Conversational recommender systems (CRS) aim to capture user's current intentions and provide recommendations through real-time multi-turn conversational interactions. As a human-machine interactive system, it is essential for CRS to improve the user experience. However, most CRS methods neglect the importance of user experience. In this paper, we propose two key points for CRS to improve the user experience: (1) Speaking like a human, human can speak with different styles according to the current dialogue context. (2) Identifying fine-grained intentions, even for the same utterance, different users have diverse finegrained intentions, which are related to users' inherent preference. Based on the observations, we propose a novel CRS model, coined Customized Conversational Recommender System (CCRS), which customizes CRS model for users from three perspectives. For human-like dialogue services, we propose multi-style dialogue response generator which selects context-aware speaking style for utterance generation. To provide personalized recommendations, we extract user's current fine-grained intentions from dialogue context with the guidance of user's inherent preferences. Finally, to customize the model parameters for each user, we train the model from the meta-learning perspective. Extensive experiments and a series of analyses have shown the superiority of our CCRS on both the recommendation and dialogue services.
summary: Conversational recommender systems (CRS) aim to capture user's current intentions and provide recommendations through real-time multi-turn conversational interactions. As a human-machine interactive system, it is essential for CRS to improve the user experience. However, most CRS methods neglect the importance of user experience. In this paper, we propose two key points for CRS to improve the user experience: (1) Speaking like a human, human can speak with different styles according to the current dialogue context. (2) Identifying fine-grained intentions, even for the same utterance, different users have diverse finegrained intentions, which are related to users' inherent preference. Based on the observations, we propose a novel CRS model, coined Customized Conversational Recommender System (CCRS), which customizes CRS model for users from three perspectives. For human-like dialogue services, we propose multi-style dialogue response generator which selects context-aware speaking style for utterance generation. To provide personalized recommendations, we extract user's current fine-grained intentions from dialogue context with the guidance of user's inherent preferences. Finally, to customize the model parameters for each user, we train the model from the meta-learning perspective. Extensive experiments and a series of analyses have shown the superiority of our CCRS on both the recommendation and dialogue services.
abstract_zh: 会话推荐系统（CRS）旨在捕获用户当前的意图，并通过实时多轮会话交互提供推荐。 CRS作为人机交互系统，提升用户体验至关重要。然而，大多数CRS方法忽视了用户体验的重要性。在本文中，我们提出了 CRS 改善用户体验的两个关键点：（1）像人类一样说话，人类可以根据当前的对话上下文以不同的风格说话。 (2)识别细粒度意图，即使对于同一个话语，不同的用户也有不同的细粒度意图，这与用户固有的偏好有关。基于这些观察，我们提出了一种新颖的CRS模型，即定制会话推荐系统（CCRS），它从三个角度为用户定制CRS模型。对于类人对话服务，我们提出了多风格对话响应生成器，它选择上下文感知的说话风格来生成话语。为了提供个性化推荐，我们在用户固有偏好的指导下从对话上下文中提取用户当前的细粒度意图。最后，为了为每个用户定制模型参数，我们从元学习的角度训练模型。大量的实验和一系列的分析表明了我们的CCRS在推荐和对话服务方面的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种定制化对话推荐系统（CCRS），通过多风格对话生成、细粒度意图识别和元学习参数定制，提升对话推荐系统的用户体验。
AI.motivation: 现有对话推荐系统（CRS）忽视了用户体验的重要性，未能充分模拟人类对话风格并捕捉用户细粒度意图，导致推荐效果受限。
AI.method: 提出三方面改进：1) 多风格对话响应生成器，根据上下文选择说话风格；2) 结合用户固有偏好提取细粒度意图；3) 基于元学习的个性化模型参数定制。
AI.result: 大量实验表明，CCRS在推荐效果和对话服务指标上均优于现有方法，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过模拟人类对话风格、挖掘用户细粒度意图及个性化模型定制，CCRS显著提升了对话推荐系统的用户体验，为未来研究提供了新方向。

search_text: Customized Conversational Recommender Systems 定制的对话式推荐系统 Conversational recommender systems (CRS) aim to capture user's current intentions and provide recommendations through real-time multi-turn conversational interactions. As a human-machine interactive system, it is essential for CRS to improve the user experience. However, most CRS methods neglect the importance of user experience. In this paper, we propose two key points for CRS to improve the user experience: (1) Speaking like a human, human can speak with different styles according to the current dialogue context. (2) Identifying fine-grained intentions, even for the same utterance, different users have diverse finegrained intentions, which are related to users' inherent preference. Based on the observations, we propose a novel CRS model, coined Customized Conversational Recommender System (CCRS), which customizes CRS model for users from three perspectives. For human-like dialogue services, we propose multi-style dialogue response generator which selects context-aware speaking style for utterance generation. To provide personalized recommendations, we extract user's current fine-grained intentions from dialogue context with the guidance of user's inherent preferences. Finally, to customize the model parameters for each user, we train the model from the meta-learning perspective. Extensive experiments and a series of analyses have shown the superiority of our CCRS on both the recommendation and dialogue services. 会话推荐系统（CRS）旨在捕获用户当前的意图，并通过实时多轮会话交互提供推荐。 CRS作为人机交互系统，提升用户体验至关重要。然而，大多数CRS方法忽视了用户体验的重要性。在本文中，我们提出了 CRS 改善用户体验的两个关键点：（1）像人类一样说话，人类可以根据当前的对话上下文以不同的风格说话。 (2)识别细粒度意图，即使对于同一个话语，不同的用户也有不同的细粒度意图，这与用户固有的偏好有关。基于这些观察，我们提出了一种新颖的CRS模型，即定制会话推荐系统（CCRS），它从三个角度为用户定制CRS模型。对于类人对话服务，我们提出了多风格对话响应生成器，它选择上下文感知的说话风格来生成话语。为了提供个性化推荐，我们在用户固有偏好的指导下从对话上下文中提取用户当前的细粒度意图。最后，为了为每个用户定制模型参数，我们从元学习的角度训练模型。大量的实验和一系列的分析表明了我们的CCRS在推荐和对话服务方面的优越性。 本文提出了一种定制化对话推荐系统（CCRS），通过多风格对话生成、细粒度意图识别和元学习参数定制，提升对话推荐系统的用户体验。 Shuokai Li,Yongchun Zhu,Ruobing Xie,Zhenwei Tang,Zhao Zhang,Fuzhen Zhuang,Qing He,Hui Xiong cs.IR,cs.AI

authors_text: Hejie Cui,Wei Dai,Yanqiao Zhu,Xiaoxiao Li,Lifang He,Carl Yang
title: Interpretable Graph Neural Networks for Connectome-Based Brain Disorder Analysis
title_zh: 用于基于连接组的脑疾病分析的可解释图神经网络
comment: Previous version presented at icml-imlh 2021 (no proceedings, archived at 2107.05097), this version is accepted to miccai 2022
comments: Previous version presented at icml-imlh 2021 (no proceedings, archived at 2107.05097), this version is accepted to miccai 2022
abstract: Human brains lie at the core of complex neurobiological systems, where the neurons, circuits, and subsystems interact in enigmatic ways. Understanding the structural and functional mechanisms of the brain has long been an intriguing pursuit for neuroscience research and clinical disorder therapy. Mapping the connections of the human brain as a network is one of the most pervasive paradigms in neuroscience. Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have recently emerged as a potential method for modeling complex network data. Deep models, on the other hand, have low interpretability, which prevents their usage in decision-critical contexts like healthcare. To bridge this gap, we propose an interpretable framework to analyze disorder-specific Regions of Interest (ROIs) and prominent connections. The proposed framework consists of two modules: a brain-network-oriented backbone model for disease prediction and a globally shared explanation generator that highlights disorder-specific biomarkers including salient ROIs and important connections. We conduct experiments on three real-world datasets of brain disorders. The results verify that our framework can obtain outstanding performance and also identify meaningful biomarkers. All code for this work is available at https://github.com/HennyJie/IBGNN.git.
summary: Human brains lie at the core of complex neurobiological systems, where the neurons, circuits, and subsystems interact in enigmatic ways. Understanding the structural and functional mechanisms of the brain has long been an intriguing pursuit for neuroscience research and clinical disorder therapy. Mapping the connections of the human brain as a network is one of the most pervasive paradigms in neuroscience. Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) have recently emerged as a potential method for modeling complex network data. Deep models, on the other hand, have low interpretability, which prevents their usage in decision-critical contexts like healthcare. To bridge this gap, we propose an interpretable framework to analyze disorder-specific Regions of Interest (ROIs) and prominent connections. The proposed framework consists of two modules: a brain-network-oriented backbone model for disease prediction and a globally shared explanation generator that highlights disorder-specific biomarkers including salient ROIs and important connections. We conduct experiments on three real-world datasets of brain disorders. The results verify that our framework can obtain outstanding performance and also identify meaningful biomarkers. All code for this work is available at https://github.com/HennyJie/IBGNN.git.
abstract_zh: 人脑位于复杂神经生物学系统的核心，神经元、电路和子系统以神秘的方式相互作用。了解大脑的结构和功能机制长期以来一直是神经科学研究和临床疾病治疗的一个有趣的追求。将人脑的连接映射为网络是神经科学中最普遍的范例之一。图神经网络（GNN）最近已成为复杂网络数据建模的潜在方法。另一方面，深度模型的可解释性较低，这阻碍了它们在医疗保健等决策关键环境中的使用。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了一个可解释的框架来分析特定于疾病的感兴趣区域（ROI）和突出的联系。所提出的框架由两个模块组成：一个用于疾病预测的面向脑网络的骨干模型和一个全球共享的解释生成器，该生成器突出显示特定于疾病的生物标志物，包括显着的投资回报率和重要的联系。我们对三个真实世界的大脑疾病数据集进行了实验。结果验证了我们的框架可以获得出色的性能，并且还可以识别有意义的生物标志物。这项工作的所有代码均可在 https://github.com/HennyJie/IBGNN.git 上获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可解释的图神经网络框架，用于基于脑连接组的脑部疾病分析，包含疾病预测模块和生物标志物解释模块。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在医疗领域应用受限于可解释性不足，而脑网络分析需要明确的生物标志物以辅助疾病诊断与治疗。
AI.method: 设计包含脑网络主干模型和全局解释生成器的双模块框架，通过图神经网络建模脑连接数据，识别疾病特异性ROI和关键连接。
AI.result: 在三个真实脑疾病数据集上验证了框架的优越性能，成功识别出具有临床意义的生物标志物。
AI.conclusion: 该框架在保持预测精度的同时实现了模型可解释性，为脑部疾病研究提供了新的分析工具。

authors_text: Magdalena Wysocka,Oskar Wysocki,Marie Zufferey,Dónal Landers,André Freitas
title: A systematic review of biologically-informed deep learning models for cancer: fundamental trends for encoding and interpreting oncology data
title_zh: 对癌症的生物学深度学习模型的系统回顾：编码和解释肿瘤学数据的基本趋势
abstract: There is an increasing interest in the use of Deep Learning (DL) based methods as a supporting analytical framework in oncology. However, most direct applications of DL will deliver models with limited transparency and explainability, which constrain their deployment in biomedical settings. This systematic review discusses DL models used to support inference in cancer biology with a particular emphasis on multi-omics analysis. It focuses on how existing models address the need for better dialogue with prior knowledge, biological plausibility and interpretability, fundamental properties in the biomedical domain. For this, we retrieved and analyzed 42 studies focusing on emerging architectural and methodological advances, the encoding of biological domain knowledge and the integration of explainability methods. We discuss the recent evolutionary arch of DL models in the direction of integrating prior biological relational and network knowledge to support better generalisation (e.g. pathways or Protein-Protein-Interaction networks) and interpretability. This represents a fundamental functional shift towards models which can integrate mechanistic and statistical inference aspects. We introduce a concept of bio-centric interpretability and according to its taxonomy, we discuss representational methodologies for the integration of domain prior knowledge in such models. The paper provides a critical outlook into contemporary methods for explainability and interpretabiltiy used in DL for cancer. The analysis points in the direction of a convergence between encoding prior knowledge and improved interpretability. We introduce bio-centric interpretability which is an important step towards formalisation of biological interpretability of DL models and developing methods that are less problem- or application-specific.

The analysis points in the direction of a convergence between encoding prior knowledge and improved interpretability. We introduce bio-centric interpretability which is an important step towards formalisation of biological interpretability of DL models and developing methods that are less problem- or application-specific.
abstract_zh: 人们越来越关注使用基于深度学习 (DL) 的方法作为肿瘤学的支持分析框架。然而，深度学习的大多数直接应用将提供透明度和可解释性有限的模型，这限制了它们在生物医学环境中的部署。这篇系统综述讨论了用于支持癌症生物学推理的深度学习模型，特别强调多组学分析。它重点关注现有模型如何满足与先验知识、生物学合理性和可解释性以及生物医学领域的基本属性之间更好对话的需求。为此，我们检索并分析了 42 项研究，重点关注新兴的架构和方法论进展、生物领域知识的编码以及可解释性方法的整合。我们讨论了深度学习模型最近的进化拱门，即整合先前的生物关系和网络知识，以支持更好的泛化（例如路径或蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用网络）和可解释性。这代表了向可以集成机械和统计推理方面的模型的基本功能转变。我们引入了以生物为中心的可解释性的概念，并根据其分类法，讨论了在此类模型中集成领域先验知识的表征方法。该论文对癌症深度学习中使用的当代方法的可解释性和可解释性提供了批判性的展望。该分析指出了编码先验知识和改进的可解释性之间的趋同方向。我们引入了以生物为中心的可解释性，这是朝着 DL 模型的生物可解释性形式化和开发不太针对问题或应用特定的方法迈出的重要一步。

AI.tldr: 本文系统回顾了用于癌症研究的生物信息深度学习模型，重点分析其如何编码和解释肿瘤学数据。
AI.motivation: 深度学习模型在肿瘤学中的应用缺乏透明度和可解释性，限制了其在生物医学领域的部署，需整合生物学先验知识以提升模型可信度。
AI.method: 通过系统回顾42项研究，分析深度学习模型在多组学数据中的架构创新、生物学知识编码及可解释性方法的整合。
AI.result: 发现深度学习模型正朝着融合生物学网络知识（如通路或蛋白互作网络）的方向发展，并提出‘生物中心解释性’概念以指导领域知识整合。
AI.conclusion: 编码先验知识与提升可解释性的融合是深度学习在肿瘤学中发展的关键趋势，‘生物中心解释性’为模型生物学意义的 formalization 提供重要方向。

search_text: A systematic review of biologically-informed deep learning models for cancer: fundamental trends for encoding and interpreting oncology data 对癌症的生物学深度学习模型的系统回顾：编码和解释肿瘤学数据的基本趋势 There is an increasing interest in the use of Deep Learning (DL) based methods as a supporting analytical framework in oncology. However, most direct applications of DL will deliver models with limited transparency and explainability, which constrain their deployment in biomedical settings. This systematic review discusses DL models used to support inference in cancer biology with a particular emphasis on multi-omics analysis. It focuses on how existing models address the need for better dialogue with prior knowledge, biological plausibility and interpretability, fundamental properties in the biomedical domain. For this, we retrieved and analyzed 42 studies focusing on emerging architectural and methodological advances, the encoding of biological domain knowledge and the integration of explainability methods. We discuss the recent evolutionary arch of DL models in the direction of integrating prior biological relational and network knowledge to support better generalisation (e.g. pathways or Protein-Protein-Interaction networks) and interpretability. This represents a fundamental functional shift towards models which can integrate mechanistic and statistical inference aspects. We introduce a concept of bio-centric interpretability and according to its taxonomy, we discuss representational methodologies for the integration of domain prior knowledge in such models. The paper provides a critical outlook into contemporary methods for explainability and interpretabiltiy used in DL for cancer. The analysis points in the direction of a convergence between encoding prior knowledge and improved interpretability. We introduce bio-centric interpretability which is an important step towards formalisation of biological interpretability of DL models and developing methods that are less problem- or application-specific. 人们越来越关注使用基于深度学习 (DL) 的方法作为肿瘤学的支持分析框架。然而，深度学习的大多数直接应用将提供透明度和可解释性有限的模型，这限制了它们在生物医学环境中的部署。这篇系统综述讨论了用于支持癌症生物学推理的深度学习模型，特别强调多组学分析。它重点关注现有模型如何满足与先验知识、生物学合理性和可解释性以及生物医学领域的基本属性之间更好对话的需求。为此，我们检索并分析了 42 项研究，重点关注新兴的架构和方法论进展、生物领域知识的编码以及可解释性方法的整合。我们讨论了深度学习模型最近的进化拱门，即整合先前的生物关系和网络知识，以支持更好的泛化（例如路径或蛋白质-蛋白质相互作用网络）和可解释性。这代表了向可以集成机械和统计推理方面的模型的基本功能转变。我们引入了以生物为中心的可解释性的概念，并根据其分类法，讨论了在此类模型中集成领域先验知识的表征方法。该论文对癌症深度学习中使用的当代方法的可解释性和可解释性提供了批判性的展望。该分析指出了编码先验知识和改进的可解释性之间的趋同方向。我们引入了以生物为中心的可解释性，这是朝着 DL 模型的生物可解释性形式化和开发不太针对问题或应用特定的方法迈出的重要一步。 本文系统回顾了用于癌症研究的生物信息深度学习模型，重点分析其如何编码和解释肿瘤学数据。 Magdalena Wysocka,Oskar Wysocki,Marie Zufferey,Dónal Landers,André Freitas q-bio.QM,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Katherine M. Collins,Umang Bhatt,Adrian Weller
title: Eliciting and Learning with Soft Labels from Every Annotator
title_zh: 使用每个注释者的软标签进行引出和学习
comment: Accepted as a Full Paper at the 2022 AAAI Conference on Human Computation and Crowdsourcing
comments: Accepted as a Full Paper at the 2022 AAAI Conference on Human Computation and Crowdsourcing
abstract: The labels used to train machine learning (ML) models are of paramount importance. Typically for ML classification tasks, datasets contain hard labels, yet learning using soft labels has been shown to yield benefits for model generalization, robustness, and calibration. Earlier work found success in forming soft labels from multiple annotators' hard labels; however, this approach may not converge to the best labels and necessitates many annotators, which can be expensive and inefficient. We focus on efficiently eliciting soft labels from individual annotators. We collect and release a dataset of soft labels (which we call CIFAR-10S) over the CIFAR-10 test set via a crowdsourcing study (N=248). We demonstrate that learning with our labels achieves comparable model performance to prior approaches while requiring far fewer annotators -- albeit with significant temporal costs per elicitation. Our elicitation methodology therefore shows nuanced promise in enabling practitioners to enjoy the benefits of improved model performance and reliability with fewer annotators, and serves as a guide for future dataset curators on the benefits of leveraging richer information, such as categorical uncertainty, from individual annotators.
summary: The labels used to train machine learning (ML) models are of paramount importance. Typically for ML classification tasks, datasets contain hard labels, yet learning using soft labels has been shown to yield benefits for model generalization, robustness, and calibration. Earlier work found success in forming soft labels from multiple annotators' hard labels; however, this approach may not converge to the best labels and necessitates many annotators, which can be expensive and inefficient. We focus on efficiently eliciting soft labels from individual annotators. We collect and release a dataset of soft labels (which we call CIFAR-10S) over the CIFAR-10 test set via a crowdsourcing study (N=248). We demonstrate that learning with our labels achieves comparable model performance to prior approaches while requiring far fewer annotators -- albeit with significant temporal costs per elicitation. Our elicitation methodology therefore shows nuanced promise in enabling practitioners to enjoy the benefits of improved model performance and reliability with fewer annotators, and serves as a guide for future dataset curators on the benefits of leveraging richer information, such as categorical uncertainty, from individual annotators.
abstract_zh: 用于训练机器学习 (ML) 模型的标签至关重要。通常，对于 ML 分类任务，数据集包含硬标签，但使用软标签进行学习已被证明可以为模型泛化、鲁棒性和校准带来好处。早期的工作成功地从多个注释者的硬标签形成软标签；然而，这种方法可能无法收敛到最佳标签，并且需要许多注释器，这可能既昂贵又低效。我们专注于有效地从个体注释者那里获取软标签。我们通过众包研究 (N=248) 在 CIFAR-10 测试集上收集并发布软标签数据集（我们称之为 CIFAR-10S）。我们证明，使用我们的标签进行学习可以实现与之前的方法相当的模型性能，同时需要更少的注释器——尽管每次启发的时间成本很高。因此，我们的启发方法显示出微妙的希望，使从业者能够以更少的注释者享受改进的模型性能和可靠性的好处，并为未来的数据集管理者提供利用来自个体注释者的更丰富信息（例如分类不确定性）的好处的指南。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过高效收集个体标注者的软标签来改进机器学习模型训练，发布CIFAR-10S数据集并验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统硬标签存在模型泛化和鲁棒性不足的问题，而多标注者软标签生成需大量标注者且效率低，需探索更高效的软标签获取方法。
AI.method: 通过众包研究（N=248）直接收集个体标注者的软标签，构建CIFAR-10测试集的软标签数据集CIFAR-10S，并验证其训练效果。
AI.result: 使用该软标签训练的模型性能与现有方法相当，但所需标注者数量显著减少，代价是单次标注的时间成本增加。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在减少标注者数量的同时保持模型性能，证明了利用个体标注者不确定性等丰富信息的潜力，为数据集构建提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出通过高效收集个体标注者的软标签来改进机器学习模型训练，发布CIFAR-10S数据集并验证其有效性。

authors_text: Haifan Gong,Hui Cheng,Yifan Xie,Shuangyi Tan,Guanqi Chen,Fei Chen,Guanbin Li
title: Less is More: Adaptive Curriculum Learning for Thyroid Nodule Diagnosis
title_zh: 少即是多：甲状腺结节诊断的适应性课程学习
comment: Accepted to MICCAI 2022 with Student Travel Award
comments: Accepted to MICCAI 2022 with Student Travel Award
abstract: Thyroid nodule classification aims at determining whether the nodule is benign or malignant based on a given ultrasound image. However, the label obtained by the cytological biopsy which is the golden standard in clinical medicine is not always consistent with the ultrasound imaging TI-RADS criteria. The information difference between the two causes the existing deep learning-based classification methods to be indecisive. To solve the Inconsistent Label problem, we propose an Adaptive Curriculum Learning (ACL) framework, which adaptively discovers and discards the samples with inconsistent labels. Specifically, ACL takes both hard sample and model certainty into account, and could accurately determine the threshold to distinguish the samples with Inconsistent Label. Moreover, we contribute TNCD: a Thyroid Nodule Classification Dataset to facilitate future related research on the thyroid nodules. Extensive experimental results on TNCD based on three different backbone networks not only demonstrate the superiority of our method but also prove that the less-is-more principle which strategically discards the samples with Inconsistent Label could yield performance gains. Source code and data are available at https://github.com/chenghui-666/ACL/.
summary: Thyroid nodule classification aims at determining whether the nodule is benign or malignant based on a given ultrasound image. However, the label obtained by the cytological biopsy which is the golden standard in clinical medicine is not always consistent with the ultrasound imaging TI-RADS criteria. The information difference between the two causes the existing deep learning-based classification methods to be indecisive. To solve the Inconsistent Label problem, we propose an Adaptive Curriculum Learning (ACL) framework, which adaptively discovers and discards the samples with inconsistent labels. Specifically, ACL takes both hard sample and model certainty into account, and could accurately determine the threshold to distinguish the samples with Inconsistent Label. Moreover, we contribute TNCD: a Thyroid Nodule Classification Dataset to facilitate future related research on the thyroid nodules. Extensive experimental results on TNCD based on three different backbone networks not only demonstrate the superiority of our method but also prove that the less-is-more principle which strategically discards the samples with Inconsistent Label could yield performance gains. Source code and data are available at https://github.com/chenghui-666/ACL/.
abstract_zh: 甲状腺结节分类旨在根据给定的超声图像确定结节是良性还是恶性。然而，作为临床医学金标准的细胞学活检获得的标签并不总是与超声成像TI-RADS标准一致。两者之间的信息差异导致现有的基于深度学习的分类方法举棋不定。为了解决标签不一致问题，我们提出了一种自适应课程学习（ACL）框架，它自适应地发现并丢弃标签不一致的样本。具体来说，ACL同时考虑了硬样本和模型确定性，可以准确地确定阈值来区分标签不一致的样本。此外，我们还贡献了TNCD：甲状腺结节分类数据集，以促进未来甲状腺结节的相关研究。基于三个不同骨干网络的 TNCD 的大量实验结果不仅证明了我们方法的优越性，而且证明了策略性丢弃标签不一致样本的少即是多的原则可以带来性能提升。源代码和数据可在 https://github.com/ Chenghui-666/ACL/ 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自适应课程学习框架（ACL），用于解决甲状腺结节分类中由于超声图像与细胞活检标签不一致导致的分类不确定性问题，并构建了甲状腺结节分类数据集TNCD。
AI.motivation: 临床中细胞活检标签与超声TI-RADS标准存在不一致性，导致现有深度学习方法在甲状腺结节分类任务中表现不稳定。
AI.method: 设计自适应课程学习框架ACL，通过结合困难样本与模型置信度动态确定阈值，自动识别并剔除标签不一致的样本，同时发布TNCD数据集支持后续研究。
AI.result: 在TNCD数据集上基于三种主干网络的实验表明，ACL方法在剔除不一致样本后性能优于现有方法，验证了'少即是多'原则的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过自适应剔除不一致样本，ACL框架有效提升了甲状腺结节分类的准确性，为医学图像分析中的标签不一致问题提供了新解决方案。

search_text: Less is More: Adaptive Curriculum Learning for Thyroid Nodule Diagnosis 少即是多：甲状腺结节诊断的适应性课程学习 Thyroid nodule classification aims at determining whether the nodule is benign or malignant based on a given ultrasound image. However, the label obtained by the cytological biopsy which is the golden standard in clinical medicine is not always consistent with the ultrasound imaging TI-RADS criteria. The information difference between the two causes the existing deep learning-based classification methods to be indecisive. To solve the Inconsistent Label problem, we propose an Adaptive Curriculum Learning (ACL) framework, which adaptively discovers and discards the samples with inconsistent labels. Specifically, ACL takes both hard sample and model certainty into account, and could accurately determine the threshold to distinguish the samples with Inconsistent Label. Moreover, we contribute TNCD: a Thyroid Nodule Classification Dataset to facilitate future related research on the thyroid nodules. Extensive experimental results on TNCD based on three different backbone networks not only demonstrate the superiority of our method but also prove that the less-is-more principle which strategically discards the samples with Inconsistent Label could yield performance gains. Source code and data are available at https://github.com/chenghui-666/ACL/. 甲状腺结节分类旨在根据给定的超声图像确定结节是良性还是恶性。然而，作为临床医学金标准的细胞学活检获得的标签并不总是与超声成像TI-RADS标准一致。两者之间的信息差异导致现有的基于深度学习的分类方法举棋不定。为了解决标签不一致问题，我们提出了一种自适应课程学习（ACL）框架，它自适应地发现并丢弃标签不一致的样本。具体来说，ACL同时考虑了硬样本和模型确定性，可以准确地确定阈值来区分标签不一致的样本。此外，我们还贡献了TNCD：甲状腺结节分类数据集，以促进未来甲状腺结节的相关研究。基于三个不同骨干网络的 TNCD 的大量实验结果不仅证明了我们方法的优越性，而且证明了策略性丢弃标签不一致样本的少即是多的原则可以带来性能提升。源代码和数据可在 https://github.com/ Chenghui-666/ACL/ 获取。 本文提出了一种自适应课程学习框架（ACL），用于解决甲状腺结节分类中由于超声图像与细胞活检标签不一致导致的分类不确定性问题，并构建了甲状腺结节分类数据集TNCD。 Haifan Gong,Hui Cheng,Yifan Xie,Shuangyi Tan,Guanqi Chen,Fei Chen,Guanbin Li cs.CV

authors_text: Xingyu Wu,Jinyang Li
title: An AIoT-enabled Autonomous Dementia Monitoring System
title_zh: 支持 AIoT 的自主痴呆症监测系统
abstract: An autonomous Artificial Internet of Things (AIoT) system for elderly dementia patients monitoring in a smart home is presented. The system mainly implements two functions based on the activity inference of the sensor data, which are real time abnormal activity monitoring and trend prediction of disease related activities. Specifically, CASAS dataset is employed to train a Random Forest (RF) model for activity inference. Then, another RF model trained by the output data of activity inference is used for abnormal activity monitoring. Particularly, RF is chosen for these tasks because of its balanced trade offs between accuracy, time efficiency, flexibility, and interpretability. Moreover, Long Short Term Memory (LSTM) is utilised to forecast the disease related activity trend of a patient. Consequently, the accuracy of two RF classifiers designed for activity inference and abnormal activity detection is greater than 99 percent and 94 percent, respectively. Furthermore, using the duration of sleep as an example, the LSTM model achieves accurate and evident future trends prediction.
summary: An autonomous Artificial Internet of Things (AIoT) system for elderly dementia patients monitoring in a smart home is presented. The system mainly implements two functions based on the activity inference of the sensor data, which are real time abnormal activity monitoring and trend prediction of disease related activities. Specifically, CASAS dataset is employed to train a Random Forest (RF) model for activity inference. Then, another RF model trained by the output data of activity inference is used for abnormal activity monitoring. Particularly, RF is chosen for these tasks because of its balanced trade offs between accuracy, time efficiency, flexibility, and interpretability. Moreover, Long Short Term Memory (LSTM) is utilised to forecast the disease related activity trend of a patient. Consequently, the accuracy of two RF classifiers designed for activity inference and abnormal activity detection is greater than 99 percent and 94 percent, respectively. Furthermore, using the duration of sleep as an example, the LSTM model achieves accurate and evident future trends prediction.
abstract_zh: 提出了一种用于在智能家居中监测老年痴呆症患者的自主人工物联网 (AIoT) 系统。该系统主要实现基于传感器数据的活动推断两大功能，即实时异常活动监测和疾病相关活动趋势预测。具体来说，CASAS 数据集用于训练用于活动推理的随机森林 (RF) 模型。然后，利用活动推断的输出数据训练的另一个RF模型用于异常活动监测。特别是，选择 RF 来完成这些任务是因为它在准确性、时间效率、灵活性和可解释性之间进行了平衡权衡。此外，利用长短期记忆（LSTM）来预测患者的疾病相关活动趋势。因此，设计用于活动推断和异常活动检测的两个 RF 分类器的准确度分别高于 99% 和 94%。此外，以睡眠时长为例，LSTM 模型实现了准确且明显的未来趋势预测。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于AIoT的自主痴呆监测系统，通过传感器数据分析实现异常活动实时监控与疾病相关活动趋势预测。
AI.motivation: 传统痴呆患者监测方法依赖人工观察，存在效率低、实时性差等问题，需开发自动化智能监测系统以提升护理质量并减轻照护负担。
AI.method: 采用随机森林（RF）模型进行活动推断与异常检测，利用LSTM网络预测疾病相关活动趋势，基于CASAS数据集训练模型并验证性能。
AI.result: 活动推断准确率超99%，异常检测准确率达94%，LSTM在睡眠时长预测中展现显著趋势预测能力。
AI.conclusion: 系统验证了AIoT技术在智能家庭环境中对痴呆患者监测的有效性，为未来智能健康监护系统提供可行方案。

authors_text: Maheshya Weerasinghe,Aaron Quigley,Klen Čopič Pucihar,Alice Toniolo,Angela Miguel,Matjaž Kljun
title: Arigatō: Effects of Adaptive Guidance on Engagement and Performance in Augmented Reality Learning Environments
title_zh: Arigatō：自适应指导对增强现实学习环境中参与度和表现的影响
abstract: Experiential learning (ExL) is the process of learning through experience or more specifically "learning through reflection on doing". In this paper, we propose a simulation of these experiences, in Augmented Reality (AR), addressing the problem of language learning. Such systems provide an excellent setting to support "adaptive guidance", in a digital form, within a real environment. Adaptive guidance allows the instructions and learning content to be customised for the individual learner, thus creating a unique learning experience. We developed an adaptive guidance AR system for language learning, we call Arigatō (Augmented Reality Instructional Guidance & Tailored Omniverse), which offers immediate assistance, resources specific to the learner's needs, manipulation of these resources, and relevant feedback. Considering guidance, we employ this prototype to investigate the effect of the amount of guidance (fixed vs. adaptive-amount) and the type of guidance (fixed vs. adaptive-associations) on the engagement and consequently the learning outcomes of language learning in an AR environment. The results for the amount of guidance show that compared to the adaptive-amount, the fixed-amount of guidance group scored better in the immediate and delayed (after 7 days) recall tests. However, this group also invested a significantly higher mental effort to complete the task. The results for the type of guidance show that the adaptive-associations group outperforms the fixed-associations group in the immediate, delayed (after 7 days) recall tests, and learning efficiency. The adaptive-associations group also showed significantly lower mental effort and spent less time to complete the task.
summary: Experiential learning (ExL) is the process of learning through experience or more specifically "learning through reflection on doing". In this paper, we propose a simulation of these experiences, in Augmented Reality (AR), addressing the problem of language learning. Such systems provide an excellent setting to support "adaptive guidance", in a digital form, within a real environment. Adaptive guidance allows the instructions and learning content to be customised for the individual learner, thus creating a unique learning experience. We developed an adaptive guidance AR system for language learning, we call Arigatō (Augmented Reality Instructional Guidance & Tailored Omniverse), which offers immediate assistance, resources specific to the learner's needs, manipulation of these resources, and relevant feedback. Considering guidance, we employ this prototype to investigate the effect of the amount of guidance (fixed vs. adaptive-amount) and the type of guidance (fixed vs. adaptive-associations) on the engagement and consequently the learning outcomes of language learning in an AR environment. The results for the amount of guidance show that compared to the adaptive-amount, the fixed-amount of guidance group scored better in the immediate and delayed (after 7 days) recall tests. However, this group also invested a significantly higher mental effort to complete the task. The results for the type of guidance show that the adaptive-associations group outperforms the fixed-associations group in the immediate, delayed (after 7 days) recall tests, and learning efficiency. The adaptive-associations group also showed significantly lower mental effort and spent less time to complete the task.
abstract_zh: 体验式学习（ExL）是通过经验学习的过程，或更具体地说是“通过反思做事来学习”。在本文中，我们提出在增强现实（AR）中模拟这些体验，解决语言学习问题。此类系统提供了出色的设置，可以在真实环境中以数字形式支持“自适应指导”。自适应指导允许为个体学习者定制说明和学习内容，从而创造独特的学习体验。我们开发了一种用于语言学习的自适应指导 AR 系统，我们称之为 Arigatō（增强现实教学指导和量身定制的 Omniverse），它可以提供即时帮助、针对学习者需求的资源、对这些资源的操作以及相关反馈。考虑到指导，我们使用这个原型来研究指导量（固定量与自适应量）和指导类型（固定与自适应关联）对参与度的影响，以及 AR 环境中语言学习的学习结果。指导量的结果显示，与自适应量指导组相比，固定指导量组在立即回忆测试和延迟（7天后）回忆测试中得分更高。然而，这个小组也投入了明显更高的脑力来完成任务。指导类型的结果表明，适应性联想组在即时、延迟（7 天后）回忆测试和学习效率方面优于固定联想组。适应性联想组还表现出显着较低的脑力消耗，并且花更少的时间来完成任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Arigatō的增强现实（AR）系统，用于语言学习，并研究了适应性指导对学习者参与度和学习成果的影响。
AI.motivation: 通过增强现实技术模拟体验式学习，解决语言学习中的个性化指导问题，提升学习效率与参与度。
AI.method: 开发了支持自适应指导的AR系统Arigatō，通过对比固定与自适应指导（包括指导量和关联类型）的实验，评估其对学习效果和认知负荷的影响。
AI.result: 固定指导量组在即时和延迟回忆测试中表现更优，但需更高认知努力；自适应关联组在回忆、学习效率及认知负荷方面均优于固定关联组。
AI.conclusion: 自适应关联指导在AR语言学习环境中更有效，能提升学习效果并降低认知负担。
