search_text: Efficient and Effective Local Search for the Set-Union Knapsack Problem and Budgeted Maximum Coverage Problem 高效且有效的局部搜索集并背包问题和预算最大覆盖问题 The Set-Union Knapsack Problem (SUKP) and Budgeted Maximum Coverage Problem (BMCP) are two closely related variant problems of the popular knapsack problem. Given a set of weighted elements and a set of items with nonnegative values, where each item covers several distinct elements, these two problems both aim to find a subset of items that maximizes an objective function while satisfying a knapsack capacity (budget) constraint. We propose an efficient and effective local search algorithm called E2LS for these two problems. To our knowledge, this is the first time that an algorithm has been proposed for both of them. E2LS trade-offs the search region and search efficiency by applying a proposed novel operator ADD$^*$ to traverse the refined search region. Such a trade-off mechanism allows E2LS to explore the solution space widely and quickly. The tabu search method is also applied in E2LS to help the algorithm escape from local optima. Extensive experiments on a total of 168 public instances with various scales demonstrate the excellent performance of the proposed algorithm for both the SUKP and BMCP. 集合并背包问题（SUKP）和预算最大覆盖问题（BMCP）是流行背包问题的两个密切相关的变体问题。给定一组加权元素和一组具有非负值的项目，其中每个项目涵盖多个不同的元素，这两个问题都旨在找到最大化目标函数同时满足背包容量（预算）约束的项目子集。针对这两个问题，我们提出了一种高效且有效的局部搜索算法，称为 E2LS。据我们所知，这是第一次为它们提出算法。 E2LS 通过应用提出的新颖算子 ADD$^*$ 来遍历细化搜索区域，从而权衡搜索区域和搜索效率。这种权衡机制使得E2LS能够广泛而快速地探索解决方案空间。 E2LS中也应用了禁忌搜索方法来帮助算法跳出局部最优。在总共 168 个不同规模的公共实例上进行的大量实验证明了所提出的算法对于 SUKP 和 BMCP 都有出色的性能。 本文提出了一种名为E2LS的高效局部搜索算法，用于解决集合联合背包问题（SUKP）和预算最大覆盖问题（BMCP）。 Wenli Zhu,Liangqing Luo cs.DS

authors_text: Zeyu Xiong,Daizong Liu,Pan Zhou
title: Gaussian Kernel-based Cross Modal Network for Spatio-Temporal Video Grounding
title_zh: 基于高斯核的时空视频接地跨模态网络
abstract: Spatial-Temporal Video Grounding (STVG) is a challenging task which aims to localize the spatio-temporal tube of the interested object semantically according to a natural language query. Most previous works not only severely rely on the anchor boxes extracted by Faster R-CNN, but also simply regard the video as a series of individual frames, thus lacking their temporal modeling. Instead, in this paper, we are the first to propose an anchor-free framework for STVG, called Gaussian Kernel-based Cross Modal Network (GKCMN). Specifically, we utilize the learned Gaussian Kernel-based heatmaps of each video frame to locate the query-related object. A mixed serial and parallel connection network is further developed to leverage both spatial and temporal relations among frames for better grounding. Experimental results on VidSTG dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed GKCMN.
summary: Spatial-Temporal Video Grounding (STVG) is a challenging task which aims to localize the spatio-temporal tube of the interested object semantically according to a natural language query. Most previous works not only severely rely on the anchor boxes extracted by Faster R-CNN, but also simply regard the video as a series of individual frames, thus lacking their temporal modeling. Instead, in this paper, we are the first to propose an anchor-free framework for STVG, called Gaussian Kernel-based Cross Modal Network (GKCMN). Specifically, we utilize the learned Gaussian Kernel-based heatmaps of each video frame to locate the query-related object. A mixed serial and parallel connection network is further developed to leverage both spatial and temporal relations among frames for better grounding. Experimental results on VidSTG dataset demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed GKCMN.
abstract_zh: 时空视频接地（STVG）是一项具有挑战性的任务，旨在根据自然语言查询对感兴趣对象的时空管进行语义定位。之前的大多数工作不仅严重依赖 Faster R-CNN 提取的锚框，而且简单地将视频视为一系列单独的帧，因此缺乏时间建模。相反，在本文中，我们第一个提出了 STVG 的无锚框架，称为基于高斯核的跨模态网络（GKCMN）。具体来说，我们利用学习到的每个视频帧的基于高斯核的热图来定位与查询相关的对象。进一步开发了混合串行和并行连接网络，以利用帧之间的空间和时间关系来更好地接地。 VidSTG 数据集上的实验结果证明了我们提出的 GKCMN 的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于高斯核的跨模态网络（GKCMN），用于解决时空视频定位（STVG）问题，旨在根据自然语言查询精确定位视频中的时空区域。
AI.motivation: 现有方法严重依赖Faster R-CNN提取的锚框，并将视频视为独立帧，缺乏对时间信息的建模，导致定位精度受限。因此，本文旨在提出一种无需锚框的框架，以更有效地捕捉视频的时空关系。
AI.method: 提出GKCMN框架，利用高斯核生成的热图定位查询相关物体，并通过混合串并联网络结构融合帧间的时空关系，提升定位准确性。
AI.result: 在VidSTG数据集上的实验结果验证了GKCMN在时空视频定位任务中的有效性，表现出优于现有方法的性能。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的GKCMN框架通过无锚设计和时空关系建模，有效提升了时空视频定位的准确性，为相关研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zhi Lu,Vrizlynn L. L. Thing
title: PhilaeX: Explaining the Failure and Success of AI Models in Malware Detection
title_zh: PhilaeX：解释人工智能模型在恶意软件检测中的失败和成功
comment: ef:7th International Conference on Internet of Things, Big Data and Security, ISBN 978-989-758-564-7; ISSN 2184-4976, pp 37-46, 2022
comments: ef:7th International Conference on Internet of Things, Big Data and Security, ISBN 978-989-758-564-7; ISSN 2184-4976, pp 37-46, 2022
abstract: The explanation to an AI model's prediction used to support decision making in cyber security, is of critical importance. It is especially so when the model's incorrect prediction can lead to severe damages or even losses to lives and critical assets. However, most existing AI models lack the ability to provide explanations on their prediction results, despite their strong performance in most scenarios. In this work, we propose a novel explainable AI method, called PhilaeX, that provides the heuristic means to identify the optimized subset of features to form the complete explanations of AI models' predictions. It identifies the features that lead to the model's borderline prediction, and those with positive individual contributions are extracted. The feature attributions are then quantified through the optimization of a Ridge regression model. We verify the explanation fidelity through two experiments. First, we assess our method's capability in correctly identifying the activated features in the adversarial samples of Android malwares, through the features attribution values from PhilaeX. Second, the deduction and augmentation tests, are used to assess the fidelity of the explanations. The results show that PhilaeX is able to explain different types of classifiers correctly, with higher fidelity explanations, compared to the state-of-the-arts methods such as LIME and SHAP.
summary: The explanation to an AI model's prediction used to support decision making in cyber security, is of critical importance. It is especially so when the model's incorrect prediction can lead to severe damages or even losses to lives and critical assets. However, most existing AI models lack the ability to provide explanations on their prediction results, despite their strong performance in most scenarios. In this work, we propose a novel explainable AI method, called PhilaeX, that provides the heuristic means to identify the optimized subset of features to form the complete explanations of AI models' predictions. It identifies the features that lead to the model's borderline prediction, and those with positive individual contributions are extracted. The feature attributions are then quantified through the optimization of a Ridge regression model. We verify the explanation fidelity through two experiments. First, we assess our method's capability in correctly identifying the activated features in the adversarial samples of Android malwares, through the features attribution values from PhilaeX. Second, the deduction and augmentation tests, are used to assess the fidelity of the explanations. The results show that PhilaeX is able to explain different types of classifiers correctly, with higher fidelity explanations, compared to the state-of-the-arts methods such as LIME and SHAP.
abstract_zh: 对用于支持网络安全决策的人工智能模型预测的解释至关重要。当模型的错误预测可能导致严重损害甚至生命和重要资产损失时尤其如此。然而，大多数现有的人工智能模型尽管在大多数场景下表现强劲，但缺乏对其预测结果提供解释的能力。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的可解释人工智能方法，称为 PhilaeX，它提供了启发式方法来识别优化的特征子集，以形成人工智能模型预测的完整解释。它识别导致模型边缘预测的特征，并提取那些具有积极个人贡献的特征。然后通过岭回归模型的优化来量化特征属性。我们通过两个实验验证了解释的保真度。首先，我们通过 PhilaeX 的特征属性值来评估我们的方法正确识别 Android 恶意软件对抗样本中激活特征的能力。其次，演绎和增强测试用于评估解释的保真度。结果表明，与 LIME 和 SHAP 等最先进的方法相比，PhilaeX 能够正确解释不同类型的分类器，解释保真度更高。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为PhilaeX的新方法，用于解释AI模型在恶意软件检测中的预测结果，提升模型的可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有AI模型虽在多数场景表现优异，但缺乏对预测结果的解释能力，而网络安全领域对模型错误预测的后果尤为严重，亟需可解释性方法。
AI.method: PhilaeX通过启发式方法筛选关键特征，识别导致模型临界预测的特征，并利用岭回归模型量化特征贡献值，通过对抗样本和推断/增强测试验证解释准确性。
AI.result: 实验表明，PhilaeX在识别Android恶意软件对抗样本的激活特征及解释保真度上优于LIME和SHAP等现有方法。
AI.conclusion: PhilaeX为AI模型在恶意软件检测中的预测提供了高保真度的解释，验证了其在不同分类器中的有效性与可靠性。

First, we assess our method's capability in correctly identifying the activated features in the adversarial samples of Android malwares, through the features attribution values from PhilaeX. The results show that PhilaeX is able to explain different types of classifiers correctly, with higher fidelity explanations, compared to the state-of-the-arts methods such as LIME and SHAP. 对用于支持网络安全决策的人工智能模型预测的解释至关重要。当模型的错误预测可能导致严重损害甚至生命和重要资产损失时尤其如此。然而，大多数现有的人工智能模型尽管在大多数场景下表现强劲，但缺乏对其预测结果提供解释的能力。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的可解释人工智能方法，称为 PhilaeX，它提供了启发式方法来识别优化的特征子集，以形成人工智能模型预测的完整解释。它识别导致模型边缘预测的特征，并提取那些具有积极个人贡献的特征。然后通过岭回归模型的优化来量化特征属性。我们通过两个实验验证了解释的保真度。首先，我们通过 PhilaeX 的特征属性值来评估我们的方法正确识别 Android 恶意软件对抗样本中激活特征的能力。其次，演绎和增强测试用于评估解释的保真度。结果表明，与 LIME 和 SHAP 等最先进的方法相比，PhilaeX 能够正确解释不同类型的分类器，解释保真度更高。 本文提出一种名为PhilaeX的新方法，用于解释AI模型在恶意软件检测中的预测结果，提升模型的可解释性。 Zhi Lu,Vrizlynn L. L. Thing cs.CR,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Xiaocheng Tang,Soheil Sadeghi Eshkevari,Haoyu Chen,Weidan Wu,Wei Qian,Xiaoming Wang
title: Golfer: Trajectory Prediction with Masked Goal Conditioning MnM Network
title_zh: 高尔夫球手：使用屏蔽目标调节 MnM 网络进行轨迹预测
comment: A preliminary version is presented at CVPR 2022 Workshop on Autonomous Driving https://cvpr2022.wad.vision
comments: A preliminary version is presented at CVPR 2022 Workshop on Autonomous Driving https://cvpr2022.wad.vision
abstract: Transformers have enabled breakthroughs in NLP and computer vision, and have recently began to show promising performance in trajectory prediction for Autonomous Vehicle (AV). How to efficiently model the interactive relationships between the ego agent and other road and dynamic objects remains challenging for the standard attention module. In this work we propose a general Transformer-like architectural module MnM network equipped with novel masked goal conditioning training procedures for AV trajectory prediction. The resulted model, named golfer, achieves state-of-the-art performance, winning the 2nd place in the 2022 Waymo Open Dataset Motion Prediction Challenge and ranked 1st place according to minADE.
summary: Transformers have enabled breakthroughs in NLP and computer vision, and have recently began to show promising performance in trajectory prediction for Autonomous Vehicle (AV). How to efficiently model the interactive relationships between the ego agent and other road and dynamic objects remains challenging for the standard attention module. In this work we propose a general Transformer-like architectural module MnM network equipped with novel masked goal conditioning training procedures for AV trajectory prediction. The resulted model, named golfer, achieves state-of-the-art performance, winning the 2nd place in the 2022 Waymo Open Dataset Motion Prediction Challenge and ranked 1st place according to minADE.
abstract_zh: Transformer 实现了 NLP 和计算机视觉领域的突破，并且最近开始在自动驾驶车辆 (AV) 的轨迹预测方面显示出令人鼓舞的性能。对于标准注意力模块来说，如何有效地建模自我代理与其他道路和动态对象之间的交互关系仍然是一个挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种通用的类似 Transformer 的架构模块 MnM 网络，配备了用于 AV 轨迹预测的新型屏蔽目标调节训练程序。最终的模型名为 Golfer，实现了最先进的性能，在 2022 年 Waymo 开放数据集运动预测挑战赛中获得第二名，并根据 minADE 排名第一。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Golfer的轨迹预测模型，通过改进Transformer架构解决自动驾驶车辆轨迹预测中的交互建模难题。
AI.motivation: 标准注意力机制难以高效建模自动驾驶场景中本车与周围动态物体的交互关系，现有方法存在性能瓶颈。
AI.method: 设计MnM网络架构并引入掩码目标条件训练机制，通过新型模块化结构增强对多智能体交互关系的建模能力。
AI.result: 在Waymo Open Dataset运动预测挑战赛中获得亚军，并在minADE指标中排名第一，达到当时最优性能。
AI.conclusion: 提出的掩码目标条件化方法有效提升了轨迹预测精度，验证了新型网络架构在自动驾驶场景中的优越性。

authors_text: Shaoshan Liu,Jianda Wang,Zhendong Wang,Bo Yu,Wei Hu,Yahui Liu,Jie Tang,Shuaiwen Leon Song,Cong Liu,Yang Hu
title: Brief Industry Paper: The Necessity of Adaptive Data Fusion in Infrastructure-Augmented Autonomous Driving System
title_zh: 简短的行业论文：基础设施增强自动驾驶系统中自适应数据融合的必要性
comment: ef:28th IEEE Real-Time and Embedded Technology and Applications Symposium, 2022
comments: ef:28th IEEE Real-Time and Embedded Technology and Applications Symposium, 2022
abstract: This paper is the first to provide a thorough system design overview along with the fusion methods selection criteria of a real-world cooperative autonomous driving system, named Infrastructure-Augmented Autonomous Driving or IAAD. We present an in-depth introduction of the IAAD hardware and software on both road-side and vehicle-side computing and communication platforms. We extensively characterize the IAAD system in the context of real-world deployment scenarios and observe that the network condition that fluctuates along the road is currently the main technical roadblock for cooperative autonomous driving. To address this challenge, we propose new fusion methods, dubbed "inter-frame fusion" and "planning fusion" to complement the current state-of-the-art "intra-frame fusion". We demonstrate that each fusion method has its own benefit and constraint.
summary: This paper is the first to provide a thorough system design overview along with the fusion methods selection criteria of a real-world cooperative autonomous driving system, named Infrastructure-Augmented Autonomous Driving or IAAD. We present an in-depth introduction of the IAAD hardware and software on both road-side and vehicle-side computing and communication platforms. We extensively characterize the IAAD system in the context of real-world deployment scenarios and observe that the network condition that fluctuates along the road is currently the main technical roadblock for cooperative autonomous driving. To address this challenge, we propose new fusion methods, dubbed "inter-frame fusion" and "planning fusion" to complement the current state-of-the-art "intra-frame fusion". We demonstrate that each fusion method has its own benefit and constraint.
abstract_zh: 本文首次提供了全面的系统设计概述以及现实世界协作自动驾驶系统（称为基础设施增强自动驾驶或 IAAD）的融合方法选择标准。我们深入介绍了 IAAD 路侧和车辆侧计算和通信平台的硬件和软件。我们在实际部署场景中广泛描述了 IAAD 系统，并观察到沿路波动的网络状况是目前协同自动驾驶的主要技术障碍。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了新的融合方法，称为“帧间融合”和“规划融合”，以补充当前最先进的“帧内融合”。我们证明每种融合方法都有其自身的优点和限制。

AI.tldr: 设计基础设施增强的自动驾驶系统（IAAD），并提出自适应数据融合方法以解决网络波动问题
AI.motivation: 现有协作自动驾驶系统在实际部署中面临网络条件波动导致的数据融合效率低下问题
AI.method: 提出inter-frame fusion和planning fusion两种自适应数据融合方法，补充现有intra-frame fusion
AI.result: 验证了不同融合方法在不同场景下的有效性及各自限制
AI.conclusion: 证明自适应数据融合对提升基础设施增强型自动驾驶系统可靠性至关重要

authors_text: Jingbang Chen,Li Chen,Yang P. Liu,Richard Peng,Arvind Ramaswami
title: Exponential Convergence of Sinkhorn Under Regularization Scheduling
title_zh: 正则化调度下Sinkhorn的指数收敛
abstract: In 2013, Cuturi [Cut13] introduced the Sinkhorn algorithm for matrix scaling as a method to compute solutions to regularized optimal transport problems. In this paper, aiming at a better convergence rate for a high accuracy solution, we work on understanding the Sinkhorn algorithm under regularization scheduling, and thus modify it with a mechanism that adaptively doubles the regularization parameter $η$ periodically. We prove that such modified version of Sinkhorn has an exponential convergence rate as iteration complexity depending on $\log(1/\varepsilon)$ instead of $\varepsilon^{-O(1)}$ from previous analyses [Cut13][ANWR17] in the optimal transport problems with integral supply and demand. Furthermore, with cost and capacity scaling procedures, the general optimal transport problem can be solved with a logarithmic dependence on $1/\varepsilon$ as well.
summary: In 2013, Cuturi [Cut13] introduced the Sinkhorn algorithm for matrix scaling as a method to compute solutions to regularized optimal transport problems. In this paper, aiming at a better convergence rate for a high accuracy solution, we work on understanding the Sinkhorn algorithm under regularization scheduling, and thus modify it with a mechanism that adaptively doubles the regularization parameter $η$ periodically. We prove that such modified version of Sinkhorn has an exponential convergence rate as iteration complexity depending on $\log(1/\varepsilon)$ instead of $\varepsilon^{-O(1)}$ from previous analyses [Cut13][ANWR17] in the optimal transport problems with integral supply and demand. Furthermore, with cost and capacity scaling procedures, the general optimal transport problem can be solved with a logarithmic dependence on $1/\varepsilon$ as well.
abstract_zh: 2013 年，Cuturi [Cut13] 引入了用于矩阵缩放的 Sinkhorn 算法，作为计算正则化最优传输问题的解决方案的方法。在本文中，为了获得高精度解的更好的收敛速度，我们致力于理解正则化调度下的Sinkhorn算法，并通过自适应地周期性地将正则化参数$η$加倍的机制对其进行修改。我们证明，Sinkhorn 的这种修改版本具有指数收敛速度，因为迭代复杂度取决于 $\log(1/\varepsilon)$，而不是之前分析 [Cut13][ANWR17] 中具有整体供需的最优运输问题的 $\varepsilon^{-O(1)}$。此外，通过成本和容量缩放程序，一般最优传输问题也可以通过对 $1/\varepsilon$ 的对数依赖性来解决。

AI.tldr: 本文研究正则化调度下的Sinkhorn算法，旨在实现指数收敛速度以高效求解最优传输问题。
AI.motivation: 现有Sinkhorn算法收敛速度慢（依赖ε^{-O(1)}），难以高效获得高精度解，因此需要改进算法以加速收敛。
AI.method: 提出自适应加倍正则化参数η的调度机制，修改Sinkhorn算法；并结合成本缩放和容量缩放过程处理一般最优传输问题。
AI.result: 证明改进后的Sinkhorn算法具有指数收敛率，迭代复杂度仅为O(log(1/ε))，相比此前分析的ε^{-O(1)}有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过正则化调度，Sinkhorn算法可在积分供需最优传输问题中实现对数级别迭代依赖，且结合缩放过程可推广至一般情形。

search_text: Exponential Convergence of Sinkhorn Under Regularization Scheduling 正则化调度下Sinkhorn的指数收敛 In 2013, Cuturi [Cut13] introduced the Sinkhorn algorithm for matrix scaling as a method to compute solutions to regularized optimal transport problems. In this paper, aiming at a better convergence rate for a high accuracy solution, we work on understanding the Sinkhorn algorithm under regularization scheduling, and thus modify it with a mechanism that adaptively doubles the regularization parameter $η$ periodically. We prove that such modified version of Sinkhorn has an exponential convergence rate as iteration complexity depending on $\log(1/\varepsilon)$ instead of $\varepsilon^{-O(1)}$ from previous analyses [Cut13][ANWR17] in the optimal transport problems with integral supply and demand. Furthermore, with cost and capacity scaling procedures, the general optimal transport problem can be solved with a logarithmic dependence on $1/\varepsilon$ as well. 2013 年，Cuturi [Cut13] 引入了用于矩阵缩放的 Sinkhorn 算法，作为计算正则化最优传输问题的解决方案的方法。在本文中，为了获得高精度解的更好的收敛速度，我们致力于理解正则化调度下的Sinkhorn算法，并通过自适应地周期性地将正则化参数$η$加倍的机制对其进行修改。我们证明，Sinkhorn 的这种修改版本具有指数收敛速度，因为迭代复杂度取决于 $\log(1/\varepsilon)$，而不是之前分析 [Cut13][ANWR17] 中具有整体供需的最优运输问题的 $\varepsilon^{-O(1)}$。此外，通过成本和容量缩放程序，一般最优传输问题也可以通过对 $1/\varepsilon$ 的对数依赖性来解决。 本文研究正则化调度下的Sinkhorn算法，旨在实现指数收敛速度以高效求解最优传输问题。 Jingbang Chen,Li Chen,Yang P. Liu,Richard Peng,Arvind Ramaswami cs.DS

authors_text: Keyu Wen,Zhenshan Tan,Qingrong Cheng,Cheng Chen,Xiaodong Gu
title: Contrastive Cross-Modal Knowledge Sharing Pre-training for Vision-Language Representation Learning and Retrieval
title_zh: 视觉语言表示学习和检索的对比跨模态知识共享预训练
abstract: Recently, the cross-modal pre-training task has been a hotspot because of its wide application in various down-streaming researches including retrieval, captioning, question answering and so on. However, exiting methods adopt a one-stream pre-training model to explore the united vision-language representation for conducting cross-modal retrieval, which easily suffer from the calculation explosion. Moreover, although the conventional double-stream structures are quite efficient, they still lack the vital cross-modal interactions, resulting in low performances. Motivated by these challenges, we put forward a Contrastive Cross-Modal Knowledge Sharing Pre-training (COOKIE) to grasp the joint text-image representations. Structurally, COOKIE adopts the traditional double-stream structure because of the acceptable time consumption. To overcome the inherent defects of double-stream structure as mentioned above, we elaborately design two effective modules. Concretely, the first module is a weight-sharing transformer that builds on the head of the visual and textual encoders, aiming to semantically align text and image. This design enables visual and textual paths focus on the same semantics. The other one is three specially designed contrastive learning, aiming to share knowledge between different models. The shared cross-modal knowledge develops the study of unimodal representation greatly, promoting the single-modal retrieval tasks. Extensive experimental results on multi-modal matching researches that includes cross-modal retrieval, text matching, and image retrieval reveal the superiors in calculation efficiency and statistical indicators of our pre-training model.
summary: Recently, the cross-modal pre-training task has been a hotspot because of its wide application in various down-streaming researches including retrieval, captioning, question answering and so on. However, exiting methods adopt a one-stream pre-training model to explore the united vision-language representation for conducting cross-modal retrieval, which easily suffer from the calculation explosion. Moreover, although the conventional double-stream structures are quite efficient, they still lack the vital cross-modal interactions, resulting in low performances. Motivated by these challenges, we put forward a Contrastive Cross-Modal Knowledge Sharing Pre-training (COOKIE) to grasp the joint text-image representations. Structurally, COOKIE adopts the traditional double-stream structure because of the acceptable time consumption. To overcome the inherent defects of double-stream structure as mentioned above, we elaborately design two effective modules. Concretely, the first module is a weight-sharing transformer that builds on the head of the visual and textual encoders, aiming to semantically align text and image. This design enables visual and textual paths focus on the same semantics. The other one is three specially designed contrastive learning, aiming to share knowledge between different models. The shared cross-modal knowledge develops the study of unimodal representation greatly, promoting the single-modal retrieval tasks. Extensive experimental results on multi-modal matching researches that includes cross-modal retrieval, text matching, and image retrieval reveal the superiors in calculation efficiency and statistical indicators of our pre-training model.
abstract_zh: 近年来，跨模态预训练任务因其在检索、字幕、问答等各种下游研究中的广泛应用而成为热点。然而，现有方法采用单流预训练模型来探索统一的视觉语言表示以进行跨模态检索，这很容易遭受计算爆炸的影响。此外，尽管传统的双流结构非常高效，但它们仍然缺乏重要的跨模态交互，导致性能较低。受这些挑战的激励，我们提出了对比跨模态知识共享预训练（COOKIE）来掌握联合文本图像表示。从结构上来说，COOKIE由于时间消耗可以接受，采用了传统的双流结构。为了克服上述双流结构的固有缺陷，我们精心设计了两个有效的模块。具体来说，第一个模块是一个权重共享转换器，它构建在视觉和文本编码器的头部，旨在在语义上对齐文本和图像。这种设计使视觉和文本路径集中于相同的语义。另一种是专门设计的三种对比学习，旨在不同模型之间共享知识。共享的跨模态知识极大地发展了单模态表示的研究，促进了单模态检索任务的发展。包括跨模态检索、文本匹配和图像检索在内的多模态匹配研究的大量实验结果表明，我们的预训练模型在计算效率和统计指标方面具有优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为COOKIE的对比跨模态知识共享预训练方法，旨在提升视觉-语言表示学习与检索任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有跨模态预训练方法存在计算爆炸或缺乏模态间交互的问题，导致检索效果不佳，亟需更高效的结构与知识共享机制。
AI.method: 采用双流结构并设计两个模块：1) 头部视觉与文本编码器的权重共享Transformer以对齐语义；2) 三种对比学习策略促进跨模态知识共享。
AI.result: 在跨模态检索、文本匹配和图像检索任务中，COOKIE在计算效率与统计指标上均优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: COOKIE通过知识共享机制显著提升了跨模态及单模态检索性能，为未来研究提供了有效框架。

authors_text: Bharadwaj Manda,Prasad Kendre,Subhrajit Dey,Ramanathan Muthuganapathy
title: SketchCleanNet -- A deep learning approach to the enhancement and correction of query sketches for a 3D CAD model retrieval system
title_zh: SketchCleanNet——一种深度学习方法，用于增强和修正 3D CAD 模型检索系统的查询草图
abstract: Search and retrieval remains a major research topic in several domains, including computer graphics, computer vision, engineering design, etc. A search engine requires primarily an input search query and a database of items to search from. In engineering, which is the primary context of this paper, the database consists of 3D CAD models, such as washers, pistons, connecting rods, etc. A query from a user is typically in the form of a sketch, which attempts to capture the details of a 3D model. However, sketches have certain typical defects such as gaps, over-drawn portions (multi-strokes), etc. Since the retrieved results are only as good as the input query, sketches need cleaning-up and enhancement for better retrieval results. In this paper, a deep learning approach is proposed to improve or clean the query sketches. Initially, sketches from various categories are analysed in order to understand the many possible defects that may occur. A dataset of cleaned-up or enhanced query sketches is then created based on an understanding of these defects. Consequently, an end-to-end training of a deep neural network is carried out in order to provide a mapping between the defective and the clean sketches. This network takes the defective query sketch as the input and generates a clean or an enhanced query sketch. Qualitative and quantitative comparisons of the proposed approach with other state-of-the-art techniques show that the proposed approach is effective. The results of the search engine are reported using both the defective and enhanced query sketches, and it is shown that using the enhanced query sketches from the developed approach yields improved search results.
summary: Search and retrieval remains a major research topic in several domains, including computer graphics, computer vision, engineering design, etc. A search engine requires primarily an input search query and a database of items to search from. In engineering, which is the primary context of this paper, the database consists of 3D CAD models, such as washers, pistons, connecting rods, etc. A query from a user is typically in the form of a sketch, which attempts to capture the details of a 3D model. However, sketches have certain typical defects such as gaps, over-drawn portions (multi-strokes), etc. Since the retrieved results are only as good as the input query, sketches need cleaning-up and enhancement for better retrieval results. In this paper, a deep learning approach is proposed to improve or clean the query sketches. Initially, sketches from various categories are analysed in order to understand the many possible defects that may occur. A dataset of cleaned-up or enhanced query sketches is then created based on an understanding of these defects. Consequently, an end-to-end training of a deep neural network is carried out in order to provide a mapping between the defective and the clean sketches. This network takes the defective query sketch as the input and generates a clean or an enhanced query sketch. Qualitative and quantitative comparisons of the proposed approach with other state-of-the-art techniques show that the proposed approach is effective. The results of the search engine are reported using both the defective and enhanced query sketches, and it is shown that using the enhanced query sketches from the developed approach yields improved search results.
abstract_zh: 搜索和检索仍然是多个领域的主要研究主题，包括计算机图形学、计算机视觉、工程设计等。搜索引擎主要需要输入搜索查询和要搜索的项目数据库。在工程中，这是本文的主要背景，数据库由 3D CAD 模型组成，例如垫圈、活塞、连杆等。用户的查询通常采用草图的形式，它试图捕获 3D 模型的细节。然而，草图具有某些典型缺陷，例如间隙、过度绘制部分（多笔划）等。由于检索结果仅与输入查询一样好，因此草图需要清理和增强以获得更好的检索结果。本文提出了一种深度学习方法来改进或清理查询草图。首先，对不同类别的草图进行分析，以了解可能出现的许多缺陷。然后，基于对这些缺陷的理解，创建清理或增强的查询草图的数据集。因此，进行深度神经网络的端到端训练，以提供有缺陷的草图和干净的草图之间的映射。该网络将有缺陷的查询草图作为输入，并生成干净的或增强的查询草图。所提出的方法与其他最先进技术的定性和定量比较表明所提出的方法是有效的。使用有缺陷的查询草图和增强的查询草图来报告搜索引擎的结果，并且结果表明，使用所开发的方法中的增强的查询草图可以产生改进的搜索结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SketchCleanNet，一种基于深度学习的3D CAD模型检索系统查询草图增强与校正方法。
AI.motivation: 工程领域中用户通过草图检索3D CAD模型时，草图存在间隙、多笔画等缺陷导致检索效果不佳，需对草图进行清理增强。
AI.method: 分析多类别草图缺陷后构建增强数据集，训练端到端深度神经网络实现缺陷草图到清晰草图的映射。
AI.result: 定量化对比实验表明该方法优于现有技术，使用增强草图的检索准确率显著提升。
AI.conclusion: SketchCleanNet能有效提升3D CAD模型检索系统中查询草图的质量与检索性能。

The results of the search engine are reported using both the defective and enhanced query sketches, and it is shown that using the enhanced query sketches from the developed approach yields improved search results. 搜索和检索仍然是多个领域的主要研究主题，包括计算机图形学、计算机视觉、工程设计等。搜索引擎主要需要输入搜索查询和要搜索的项目数据库。在工程中，这是本文的主要背景，数据库由 3D CAD 模型组成，例如垫圈、活塞、连杆等。用户的查询通常采用草图的形式，它试图捕获 3D 模型的细节。然而，草图具有某些典型缺陷，例如间隙、过度绘制部分（多笔划）等。由于检索结果仅与输入查询一样好，因此草图需要清理和增强以获得更好的检索结果。本文提出了一种深度学习方法来改进或清理查询草图。首先，对不同类别的草图进行分析，以了解可能出现的许多缺陷。然后，基于对这些缺陷的理解，创建清理或增强的查询草图的数据集。因此，进行深度神经网络的端到端训练，以提供有缺陷的草图和干净的草图之间的映射。该网络将有缺陷的查询草图作为输入，并生成干净的或增强的查询草图。所提出的方法与其他最先进技术的定性和定量比较表明所提出的方法是有效的。使用有缺陷的查询草图和增强的查询草图来报告搜索引擎的结果，并且结果表明，使用所开发的方法中的增强的查询草图可以产生改进的搜索结果。 本文提出SketchCleanNet，一种基于深度学习的3D CAD模型检索系统查询草图增强与校正方法。 Bharadwaj Manda,Prasad Kendre,Subhrajit Dey,Ramanathan Muthuganapathy cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Lei Cai,Yuli Fu,Wanliang Huo,Youjun Xiang,Tao Zhu,Ying Zhang,Huanqiang Zeng,Delu Zeng
title: Multi-scale Attentive Image De-raining Networks via Neural Architecture Search
title_zh: 通过神经架构搜索的多尺度注意力图像去雨网络
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology, vol.33, no.2, pp.618-633 September 2022
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Circuits and Systems for Video Technology, vol.33, no.2, pp.618-633 September 2022
abstract: Multi-scale architectures and attention modules have shown effectiveness in many deep learning-based image de-raining methods. However, manually designing and integrating these two components into a neural network requires a bulk of labor and extensive expertise. In this article, a high-performance multi-scale attentive neural architecture search (MANAS) framework is technically developed for image deraining. The proposed method formulates a new multi-scale attention search space with multiple flexible modules that are favorite to the image de-raining task. Under the search space, multi-scale attentive cells are built, which are further used to construct a powerful image de-raining network. The internal multiscale attentive architecture of the de-raining network is searched automatically through a gradient-based search algorithm, which avoids the daunting procedure of the manual design to some extent. Moreover, in order to obtain a robust image de-raining model, a practical and effective multi-to-one training strategy is also presented to allow the de-raining network to get sufficient background information from multiple rainy images with the same background scene, and meanwhile, multiple loss functions including external loss, internal loss, architecture regularization loss, and model complexity loss are jointly optimized to achieve robust de-raining performance and controllable model complexity. Extensive experimental results on both synthetic and realistic rainy images, as well as the down-stream vision applications (i.e., objection detection and segmentation) consistently demonstrate the superiority of our proposed method. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/lcai-gz/MANAS.
summary: Multi-scale architectures and attention modules have shown effectiveness in many deep learning-based image de-raining methods. However, manually designing and integrating these two components into a neural network requires a bulk of labor and extensive expertise. In this article, a high-performance multi-scale attentive neural architecture search (MANAS) framework is technically developed for image deraining. The proposed method formulates a new multi-scale attention search space with multiple flexible modules that are favorite to the image de-raining task. Under the search space, multi-scale attentive cells are built, which are further used to construct a powerful image de-raining network. The internal multiscale attentive architecture of the de-raining network is searched automatically through a gradient-based search algorithm, which avoids the daunting procedure of the manual design to some extent. Moreover, in order to obtain a robust image de-raining model, a practical and effective multi-to-one training strategy is also presented to allow the de-raining network to get sufficient background information from multiple rainy images with the same background scene, and meanwhile, multiple loss functions including external loss, internal loss, architecture regularization loss, and model complexity loss are jointly optimized to achieve robust de-raining performance and controllable model complexity. Extensive experimental results on both synthetic and realistic rainy images, as well as the down-stream vision applications (i.e., objection detection and segmentation) consistently demonstrate the superiority of our proposed method. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/lcai-gz/MANAS.
abstract_zh: 多尺度架构和注意力模块在许多基于深度学习的图像去雨方法中表现出了有效性。然而，手动设计这两个组件并将其集成到神经网络中需要大量的劳动力和广泛的专业知识。在本文中，从技术上开发了一种用于图像去雨的高性能多尺度注意力神经架构搜索（MANAS）框架。所提出的方法制定了一个新的多尺度注意力搜索空间，其中包含多个灵活的模块，这些模块最适合图像去雨任务。在搜索空间下，构建了多尺度注意力单元，进一步用于构建强大的图像去雨网络。除雨网络的内部多尺度注意力架构是通过基于梯度的搜索算法自动搜索的，这在一定程度上避免了手动设计的繁琐过程。此外，为了获得鲁棒的图像去雨模型，还提出了一种实用有效的多对一训练策略，使去雨网络能够从具有相同背景场景的多幅下雨图像中获取足够的背景信息，同时联合优化包括外部损失、内部损失、架构正则化损失和模型复杂度损失在内的多个损失函数，以实现鲁棒的去雨性能和可控的模型复杂度。对合成和真实雨天图像以及下游视觉应用（即物体检测和分割）的广泛实验结果一致证明了我们提出的方法的优越性。该代码可在 https://github.com/lcai-gz/MANAS 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于神经架构搜索的多尺度注意力图像去雨网络（MANAS），旨在自动设计高效图像去雨模型。
AI.motivation: 传统手动设计多尺度架构与注意力模块耗时且依赖专家经验，难以兼顾性能与复杂度控制。
AI.method: 构建多尺度注意力搜索空间，通过梯度搜索算法自动优化网络架构，并采用多对一训练策略联合优化多种损失函数以提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在合成与真实雨雾图像及下游视觉任务（目标检测、分割）中均优于现有方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: MANAS框架有效实现了去雨网络的自动化设计，在性能与模型复杂度控制上取得显著优势。

authors_text: Zhiyu Huang,Xiaoyu Mo,Chen Lv
title: ReCoAt: A Deep Learning-based Framework for Multi-Modal Motion Prediction in Autonomous Driving Application
title_zh: ReCoAt：基于深度学习的自动驾驶应用中多模态运动预测框架
abstract: This paper proposes a novel deep learning framework for multi-modal motion prediction. The framework consists of three parts: recurrent neural networks to process the target agent's motion process, convolutional neural networks to process the rasterized environment representation, and a distance-based attention mechanism to process the interactions among different agents. We validate the proposed framework on a large-scale real-world driving dataset, Waymo open motion dataset, and compare its performance against other methods on the standard testing benchmark. The qualitative results manifest that the predicted trajectories given by our model are accurate, diverse, and in accordance with the road structure. The quantitative results on the standard benchmark reveal that our model outperforms other baseline methods in terms of prediction accuracy and other evaluation metrics. The proposed framework is the second-place winner of the 2021 Waymo open dataset motion prediction challenge.
summary: This paper proposes a novel deep learning framework for multi-modal motion prediction. The framework consists of three parts: recurrent neural networks to process the target agent's motion process, convolutional neural networks to process the rasterized environment representation, and a distance-based attention mechanism to process the interactions among different agents. We validate the proposed framework on a large-scale real-world driving dataset, Waymo open motion dataset, and compare its performance against other methods on the standard testing benchmark. The qualitative results manifest that the predicted trajectories given by our model are accurate, diverse, and in accordance with the road structure. The quantitative results on the standard benchmark reveal that our model outperforms other baseline methods in terms of prediction accuracy and other evaluation metrics. The proposed framework is the second-place winner of the 2021 Waymo open dataset motion prediction challenge.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种用于多模态运动预测的新型深度学习框架。该框架由三部分组成：处理目标代理运动过程的循环神经网络、处理栅格化环境表示的卷积神经网络以及处理不同代理之间交互的基于距离的注意机制。我们在大规模现实世界驾驶数据集 Waymo 开放运动数据集上验证了所提出的框架，并在标准测试基准上将其性能与其他方法进行了比较。定性结果表明，我们的模型给出的预测轨迹是准确的、多样化的并且符合道路结构。标准基准的定量结果表明，我们的模型在预测准确性和其他评估指标方面优于其他基线方法。所提出的框架是 2021 年 Waymo 开放数据集运动预测挑战赛的第二名获胜者。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的多模态运动预测框架ReCoAt，用于自动驾驶场景中的目标轨迹预测。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在复杂交通场景下难以同时保证预测轨迹的准确性、多样性和道路结构符合性，需提升多模态数据融合能力。
AI.method: 框架包含三部分：循环神经网络处理目标代理运动序列，卷积神经网络处理栅格化环境，距离注意力机制建模多智能体交互。
AI.result: 在Waymo数据集测试中，定性结果展示轨迹准确且符合道路结构，定量指标优于基线方法，获2021 Waymo挑战赛亚军。
AI.conclusion: ReCoAt通过多模态融合与注意力机制有效提升预测性能，验证了框架在自动驾驶场景中的实用价值。

authors_text: Zhongyuan Zhang,Yi Qian,Yanxiang Zhao,Lin Zhu,Jinjin Wang
title: Noise and Edge Based Dual Branch Image Manipulation Detection
title_zh: 基于噪声和边缘的双分支图像操纵检测
abstract: Unlike ordinary computer vision tasks that focus more on the semantic content of images, the image manipulation detection task pays more attention to the subtle information of image manipulation. In this paper, the noise image extracted by the improved constrained convolution is used as the input of the model instead of the original image to obtain more subtle traces of manipulation. Meanwhile, the dual-branch network, consisting of a high-resolution branch and a context branch, is used to capture the traces of artifacts as much as possible. In general, most manipulation leaves manipulation artifacts on the manipulation edge. A specially designed manipulation edge detection module is constructed based on the dual-branch network to identify these artifacts better. The correlation between pixels in an image is closely related to their distance. The farther the two pixels are, the weaker the correlation. We add a distance factor to the self-attention module to better describe the correlation between pixels. Experimental results on four publicly available image manipulation datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our model.
summary: Unlike ordinary computer vision tasks that focus more on the semantic content of images, the image manipulation detection task pays more attention to the subtle information of image manipulation. In this paper, the noise image extracted by the improved constrained convolution is used as the input of the model instead of the original image to obtain more subtle traces of manipulation. Meanwhile, the dual-branch network, consisting of a high-resolution branch and a context branch, is used to capture the traces of artifacts as much as possible. In general, most manipulation leaves manipulation artifacts on the manipulation edge. A specially designed manipulation edge detection module is constructed based on the dual-branch network to identify these artifacts better. The correlation between pixels in an image is closely related to their distance. The farther the two pixels are, the weaker the correlation. We add a distance factor to the self-attention module to better describe the correlation between pixels. Experimental results on four publicly available image manipulation datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our model.
abstract_zh: 与普通计算机视觉任务更关注图像的语义内容不同，图像操纵检测任务更关注图像操纵的微妙信息。本文采用改进的约束卷积提取的噪声图像代替原始图像作为模型的输入，以获得更细微的操纵痕迹。同时，由高分辨率分支和上下文分支组成的双分支网络用于尽可能多地捕获工件的痕迹。一般来说，大多数操作都会在操作边缘留下操作伪影。基于双分支网络构建了专门设计的操纵边缘检测模块，以更好地识别这些伪影。图像中像素之间的相关性与其距离密切相关。两个像素距离越远，相关性越弱。我们在自注意力模块中添加距离因子，以更好地描述像素之间的相关性。四个公开可用的图像处理数据集的实验结果证明了我们模型的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于噪声和边缘信息的双分支网络模型，用于检测图像篡改痕迹。
AI.motivation: 传统图像篡改检测方法难以捕捉细微的篡改伪影，需更关注噪声特征和边缘区域的异常信息。
AI.method: 改进约束卷积提取噪声图像作为输入，构建高分辨率分支与上下文分支的双分支网络，并设计篡改边缘检测模块，结合距离因子增强的自注意力机制建模像素相关性。
AI.result: 在四个公开数据集上实验验证，模型有效检测图像篡改，优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过噪声特征与边缘分析结合双分支网络，可更精准识别图像篡改痕迹，为检测任务提供新思路。

search_text: Noise and Edge Based Dual Branch Image Manipulation Detection 基于噪声和边缘的双分支图像操纵检测 Unlike ordinary computer vision tasks that focus more on the semantic content of images, the image manipulation detection task pays more attention to the subtle information of image manipulation. In this paper, the noise image extracted by the improved constrained convolution is used as the input of the model instead of the original image to obtain more subtle traces of manipulation. Meanwhile, the dual-branch network, consisting of a high-resolution branch and a context branch, is used to capture the traces of artifacts as much as possible. In general, most manipulation leaves manipulation artifacts on the manipulation edge. A specially designed manipulation edge detection module is constructed based on the dual-branch network to identify these artifacts better. The correlation between pixels in an image is closely related to their distance. The farther the two pixels are, the weaker the correlation. We add a distance factor to the self-attention module to better describe the correlation between pixels. Experimental results on four publicly available image manipulation datasets demonstrate the effectiveness of our model. 与普通计算机视觉任务更关注图像的语义内容不同，图像操纵检测任务更关注图像操纵的微妙信息。本文采用改进的约束卷积提取的噪声图像代替原始图像作为模型的输入，以获得更细微的操纵痕迹。同时，由高分辨率分支和上下文分支组成的双分支网络用于尽可能多地捕获工件的痕迹。一般来说，大多数操作都会在操作边缘留下操作伪影。基于双分支网络构建了专门设计的操纵边缘检测模块，以更好地识别这些伪影。图像中像素之间的相关性与其距离密切相关。两个像素距离越远，相关性越弱。我们在自注意力模块中添加距离因子，以更好地描述像素之间的相关性。四个公开可用的图像处理数据集的实验结果证明了我们模型的有效性。 本文提出一种基于噪声和边缘信息的双分支网络模型，用于检测图像篡改痕迹。 Zhongyuan Zhang,Yi Qian,Yanxiang Zhao,Lin Zhu,Jinjin Wang cs.CV

authors_text: Sarvesh Patil,Samuel C. Alvares,Pragna Mannam,Oliver Kroemer,F. Zeynep Temel
title: DeltaZ: An Accessible Compliant Delta Robot Manipulator for Research and Education
title_zh: DeltaZ：一款用于研究和教育的无障碍兼容 Delta 机器人机械手
comment: IROS 2022, first two authors contributed equally
comments: IROS 2022, first two authors contributed equally
abstract: This paper presents the DeltaZ robot, a centimeter-scale, low-cost, delta-style robot that allows for a broad range of capabilities and robust functionalities. Current technologies allow DeltaZ to be 3D-printed from soft and rigid materials so that it is easy to assemble and maintain, and lowers the barriers to utilize. Functionality of the robot stems from its three translational degrees of freedom and a closed form kinematic solution which makes manipulation problems more intuitive compared to other manipulators. Moreover, the low cost of the robot presents an opportunity to democratize manipulators for a research setting. We also describe how the robot can be used as a reinforcement learning benchmark. Open-source 3D-printable designs and code are available to the public.
summary: This paper presents the DeltaZ robot, a centimeter-scale, low-cost, delta-style robot that allows for a broad range of capabilities and robust functionalities. Current technologies allow DeltaZ to be 3D-printed from soft and rigid materials so that it is easy to assemble and maintain, and lowers the barriers to utilize. Functionality of the robot stems from its three translational degrees of freedom and a closed form kinematic solution which makes manipulation problems more intuitive compared to other manipulators. Moreover, the low cost of the robot presents an opportunity to democratize manipulators for a research setting. We also describe how the robot can be used as a reinforcement learning benchmark. Open-source 3D-printable designs and code are available to the public.
abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 DeltaZ 机器人，这是一种厘米级、低成本、Delta 型机器人，具有广泛的功能和强大的功能。目前的技术允许DeltaZ由软质和硬质材料3D打印而成，因此易于组装和维护，并降低了使用门槛。该机器人的功能源于其三个平移自由度和封闭式运动学解决方案，与其他机械手相比，这使得操作问题更加直观。此外，机器人的低成本为研究环境中的操纵器民主化提供了机会。我们还描述了如何将机器人用作强化学习基准。开源 3D 打印设计和代码可供公众使用。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一款低成本、易制造的DeltaZ机械臂，适用于研究与教育领域。
AI.motivation: 传统Delta机械臂成本高且难以普及，需开发一种低成本、易获取的方案以推动教育和研究应用。
AI.method: 采用3D打印技术结合软硬材料制造厘米级机械臂，利用三自由度平移结构与封闭运动学模型，并开放源代码与设计文件。
AI.result: 成功实现DeltaZ机械臂的原型，验证其功能并作为强化学习基准，开源设计促进技术共享。
AI.conclusion: DeltaZ通过低成本与开源特性，降低了机械臂研究门槛，为教育和科研提供了新工具。

authors_text: Jin Liu,Chongfeng Fan,Fengyu Zhou,Huijuan Xu
title: Syntax Controlled Knowledge Graph-to-Text Generation with Order and Semantic Consistency
title_zh: 具有顺序和语义一致性的语法控制的知识图到文本生成
abstract: The knowledge graph (KG) stores a large amount of structural knowledge, while it is not easy for direct human understanding. Knowledge graph-to-text (KG-to-text) generation aims to generate easy-to-understand sentences from the KG, and at the same time, maintains semantic consistency between generated sentences and the KG. Existing KG-to-text generation methods phrase this task as a sequence-to-sequence generation task with linearized KG as input and consider the consistency issue of the generated texts and KG through a simple selection between decoded sentence word and KG node word at each time step. However, the linearized KG order is commonly obtained through a heuristic search without data-driven optimization. In this paper, we optimize the knowledge description order prediction under the order supervision extracted from the caption and further enhance the consistency of the generated sentences and KG through syntactic and semantic regularization. We incorporate the Part-of-Speech (POS) syntactic tags to constrain the positions to copy words from the KG and employ a semantic context scoring function to evaluate the semantic fitness for each word in its local context when decoding each word in the generated sentence. Extensive experiments are conducted on two datasets, WebNLG and DART, and achieve state-of-the-art performances.
summary: The knowledge graph (KG) stores a large amount of structural knowledge, while it is not easy for direct human understanding. Knowledge graph-to-text (KG-to-text) generation aims to generate easy-to-understand sentences from the KG, and at the same time, maintains semantic consistency between generated sentences and the KG. Existing KG-to-text generation methods phrase this task as a sequence-to-sequence generation task with linearized KG as input and consider the consistency issue of the generated texts and KG through a simple selection between decoded sentence word and KG node word at each time step. However, the linearized KG order is commonly obtained through a heuristic search without data-driven optimization. In this paper, we optimize the knowledge description order prediction under the order supervision extracted from the caption and further enhance the consistency of the generated sentences and KG through syntactic and semantic regularization. We incorporate the Part-of-Speech (POS) syntactic tags to constrain the positions to copy words from the KG and employ a semantic context scoring function to evaluate the semantic fitness for each word in its local context when decoding each word in the generated sentence. Extensive experiments are conducted on two datasets, WebNLG and DART, and achieve state-of-the-art performances.
abstract_zh: 知识图谱（KG）存储了大量的结构性知识，但不易被人类直接理解。知识图到文本（KG-to-text）生成的目的是从知识图谱中生成易于理解的句子，同时保持生成的句子与知识图谱之间的语义一致性。现有的知识图谱到文本生成方法将该任务表述为以线性化知识图谱作为输入的序列到序列生成任务，并通过在每个时间步解码的句子词和知识图谱节点词之间的简单选择来考虑生成文本和知识图谱的一致性问题。然而，线性化的 KG 阶数通常是通过启发式搜索获得的，没有数据驱动的优化。在本文中，我们在从标题中提取的顺序监督下优化知识描述顺序预测，并通过句法和语义正则化进一步增强生成的句子和知识图谱的一致性。我们结合词性（POS）句法标签来限制从 KG 复制单词的位置，并在解码生成的句子中的每个单词时使用语义上下文评分函数来评估每个单词在其本地上下文中的语义适合度。在 WebNLG 和 DART 两个数据集上进行了大量实验，并实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于语法控制的知识图谱到文本生成方法，通过优化知识描述顺序和增强语义一致性来提升生成效果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖启发式搜索确定知识图谱线性化顺序，缺乏数据驱动优化，导致生成文本与知识图谱的语义一致性不足。
AI.method: 在顺序监督下优化知识描述顺序预测，结合词性语法标签约束KG词复制位置，并引入语义上下文评分函数评估局部语义适配性。
AI.result: 在WebNLG和DART数据集上取得最先进性能，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过语法约束和语义正则化联合优化，显著提升了知识图谱到文本生成的顺序与语义一致性。

In this paper, we optimize the knowledge description order prediction under the order supervision extracted from the caption and further enhance the consistency of the generated sentences and KG through syntactic and semantic regularization. We incorporate the Part-of-Speech (POS) syntactic tags to constrain the positions to copy words from the KG and employ a semantic context scoring function to evaluate the semantic fitness for each word in its local context when decoding each word in the generated sentence. Extensive experiments are conducted on two datasets, WebNLG and DART, and achieve state-of-the-art performances. 知识图谱（KG）存储了大量的结构性知识，但不易被人类直接理解。知识图到文本（KG-to-text）生成的目的是从知识图谱中生成易于理解的句子，同时保持生成的句子与知识图谱之间的语义一致性。现有的知识图谱到文本生成方法将该任务表述为以线性化知识图谱作为输入的序列到序列生成任务，并通过在每个时间步解码的句子词和知识图谱节点词之间的简单选择来考虑生成文本和知识图谱的一致性问题。然而，线性化的 KG 阶数通常是通过启发式搜索获得的，没有数据驱动的优化。在本文中，我们在从标题中提取的顺序监督下优化知识描述顺序预测，并通过句法和语义正则化进一步增强生成的句子和知识图谱的一致性。我们结合词性（POS）句法标签来限制从 KG 复制单词的位置，并在解码生成的句子中的每个单词时使用语义上下文评分函数来评估每个单词在其本地上下文中的语义适合度。在 WebNLG 和 DART 两个数据集上进行了大量实验，并实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出一种基于语法控制的知识图谱到文本生成方法，通过优化知识描述顺序和增强语义一致性来提升生成效果。 Jin Liu,Chongfeng Fan,Fengyu Zhou,Huijuan Xu cs.AI

authors_text: Yanwei Jia,Xun Yu Zhou
title: q-Learning in Continuous Time
title_zh: 连续时间的 q-学习
comment: 70 pages, 4 figures, appended with an erratum
comments: 70 pages, 4 figures, appended with an erratum
abstract: We study the continuous-time counterpart of Q-learning for reinforcement learning (RL) under the entropy-regularized, exploratory diffusion process formulation introduced by Wang et al. (2020). As the conventional (big) Q-function collapses in continuous time, we consider its first-order approximation and coin the term ``(little) q-function". This function is related to the instantaneous advantage rate function as well as the Hamiltonian. We develop a ``q-learning" theory around the q-function that is independent of time discretization. Given a stochastic policy, we jointly characterize the associated q-function and value function by martingale conditions of certain stochastic processes, in both on-policy and off-policy settings. We then apply the theory to devise different actor-critic algorithms for solving underlying RL problems, depending on whether or not the density function of the Gibbs measure generated from the q-function can be computed explicitly. One of our algorithms interprets the well-known Q-learning algorithm SARSA, and another recovers a policy gradient (PG) based continuous-time algorithm proposed in Jia and Zhou (2022b). Finally, we conduct simulation experiments to compare the performance of our algorithms with those of PG-based algorithms in Jia and Zhou (2022b) and time-discretized conventional Q-learning algorithms.
summary: We study the continuous-time counterpart of Q-learning for reinforcement learning (RL) under the entropy-regularized, exploratory diffusion process formulation introduced by Wang et al. (2020). As the conventional (big) Q-function collapses in continuous time, we consider its first-order approximation and coin the term ``(little) q-function". This function is related to the instantaneous advantage rate function as well as the Hamiltonian. We develop a ``q-learning" theory around the q-function that is independent of time discretization. Given a stochastic policy, we jointly characterize the associated q-function and value function by martingale conditions of certain stochastic processes, in both on-policy and off-policy settings. We then apply the theory to devise different actor-critic algorithms for solving underlying RL problems, depending on whether or not the density function of the Gibbs measure generated from the q-function can be computed explicitly. One of our algorithms interprets the well-known Q-learning algorithm SARSA, and another recovers a policy gradient (PG) based continuous-time algorithm proposed in Jia and Zhou (2022b). Finally, we conduct simulation experiments to compare the performance of our algorithms with those of PG-based algorithms in Jia and Zhou (2022b) and time-discretized conventional Q-learning algorithms.
abstract_zh: 我们在 Wang 等人引入的熵正则化、探索性扩散过程公式中研究了强化学习 (RL) 的 Q 学习的连续时间对应部分。 （2020）。由于传统的（大）Q 函数在连续时间内崩溃，我们考虑其一阶近似并创造术语“（小）q 函数”。该函数与瞬时优势率函数以及哈密顿量相关。我们围绕 q 函数开发了一种独立于时间离散化的“q 学习”理论。给定随机策略，我们在策略内和策略外环境中通过某些随机过程的鞅条件共同表征相关的 q 函数和价值函数。然后，我们应用该理论来设计不同的 actor-critic 算法来解决潜在的强化学习问题，具体取决于是否可以显式计算从 q 函数生成的吉布斯测度的密度函数。我们的一种算法解释了著名的 Q 学习算法 SARSA，另一种算法恢复了 Jia 和 Zhou (2022b) 中提出的基于策略梯度 (PG) 的连续时间算法。最后，我们进行模拟实验，将我们的算法的性能与 Jia 和 Zhou (2022b) 中基于 PG 的算法以及时间离散的传统 Q 学习算法的性能进行比较。

AI.tldr: 本文研究连续时间下的Q学习算法，提出一种基于熵正则化框架的‘小q函数’理论，并开发相应的策略梯度算法。
AI.motivation: 传统Q学习在连续时间场景下存在Q函数崩溃的问题，需建立新的理论框架以支持连续时间强化学习的算法设计。
AI.method: 通过一阶近似定义‘小q函数’，结合鞅条件建立策略与价值函数关系，设计基于Gibbs测度密度的Actor-Critic算法，并进行仿真实验验证。
AI.result: 提出两种连续时间算法：一种解释SARSA算法，另一种恢复Jia和Zhou的策略梯度算法，实验显示优于离散时间Q学习和现有连续时间方法。
AI.conclusion: 本文为连续时间强化学习提供了独立于时间离散化的理论框架，并验证了新算法的有效性，为后续研究奠定基础。

authors_text: Yang Zhao,Yan Song
title: Turning to a Teacher for Timestamp Supervised Temporal Action Segmentation
title_zh: 向老师寻求时间戳监督时间动作分割
abstract: Temporal action segmentation in videos has drawn much attention recently. Timestamp supervision is a cost-effective way for this task. To obtain more information to optimize the model, the existing method generated pseudo frame-wise labels iteratively based on the output of a segmentation model and the timestamp annotations. However, this practice may introduce noise and oscillation during the training, and lead to performance degeneration. To address this problem, we propose a new framework for timestamp supervised temporal action segmentation by introducing a teacher model parallel to the segmentation model to help stabilize the process of model optimization. The teacher model can be seen as an ensemble of the segmentation model, which helps to suppress the noise and to improve the stability of pseudo labels. We further introduce a segmentally smoothing loss, which is more focused and cohesive, to enforce the smooth transition of the predicted probabilities within action instances. The experiments on three datasets show that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art method and performs comparably against the fully-supervised methods at a much lower annotation cost.
summary: Temporal action segmentation in videos has drawn much attention recently. Timestamp supervision is a cost-effective way for this task. To obtain more information to optimize the model, the existing method generated pseudo frame-wise labels iteratively based on the output of a segmentation model and the timestamp annotations. However, this practice may introduce noise and oscillation during the training, and lead to performance degeneration. To address this problem, we propose a new framework for timestamp supervised temporal action segmentation by introducing a teacher model parallel to the segmentation model to help stabilize the process of model optimization. The teacher model can be seen as an ensemble of the segmentation model, which helps to suppress the noise and to improve the stability of pseudo labels. We further introduce a segmentally smoothing loss, which is more focused and cohesive, to enforce the smooth transition of the predicted probabilities within action instances. The experiments on three datasets show that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art method and performs comparably against the fully-supervised methods at a much lower annotation cost.
abstract_zh: 视频中的时间动作分割最近引起了广泛关注。时间戳监督是完成此任务的一种经济有效的方法。为了获得更多信息来优化模型，现有方法根据分割模型的输出和时间戳注释迭代生成伪逐帧标签。然而，这种做法可能会在训练过程中引入噪声和振荡，并导致性能下降。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的时间戳监督时间动作分割框架，通过引入与分割模型并行的教师模型来帮助稳定模型优化过程。教师模型可以看作是分割模型的集成，有助于抑制噪声并提高伪标签的稳定性。我们进一步引入了分段平滑损失，它更加集中和有凝聚力，以强制动作实例内预测概率的平滑过渡。对三个数据集的实验表明，我们的方法优于最先进的方法，并且以低得多的注释成本与完全监督的方法相媲美。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时间戳监督的时间动作分割框架，通过引入教师模型和分段平滑损失解决伪标签噪声问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过迭代生成伪帧标签优化模型，但易引入噪声和训练震荡，导致性能下降。
AI.method: 设计教师-学生并行框架，教师模型作为分割模型集成以抑制噪声；引入分段平滑损失强化动作实例内预测概率的平滑性。
AI.result: 在三个数据集上优于现有方法，在低标注成本下接近全监督方法性能。
AI.conclusion: 教师模型与分段损失有效提升时间动作分割稳定性，验证了框架的有效性。

authors_text: Ziwen Han,Evgeniya Gorobets,Pan Chen
title: Parameter efficient dendritic-tree neurons outperform perceptrons
title_zh: 参数高效的树突树神经元优于感知器
abstract: Biological neurons are more powerful than artificial perceptrons, in part due to complex dendritic input computations. Inspired to empower the perceptron with biologically inspired features, we explore the effect of adding and tuning input branching factors along with input dropout. This allows for parameter efficient non-linear input architectures to be discovered and benchmarked. Furthermore, we present a PyTorch module to replace multi-layer perceptron layers in existing architectures. Our initial experiments on MNIST classification demonstrate the accuracy and generalization improvement of dendritic neurons compared to existing perceptron architectures.
summary: Biological neurons are more powerful than artificial perceptrons, in part due to complex dendritic input computations. Inspired to empower the perceptron with biologically inspired features, we explore the effect of adding and tuning input branching factors along with input dropout. This allows for parameter efficient non-linear input architectures to be discovered and benchmarked. Furthermore, we present a PyTorch module to replace multi-layer perceptron layers in existing architectures. Our initial experiments on MNIST classification demonstrate the accuracy and generalization improvement of dendritic neurons compared to existing perceptron architectures.
abstract_zh: 生物神经元比人工感知器更强大，部分原因是复杂的树突输入计算。受启发，赋予感知器以生物学启发的特征，我们探索了添加和调整输入分支因子以及输入丢失的效果。这允许发现参数高效的非线性输入架构并对其进行基准测试。此外，我们提出了一个 PyTorch 模块来替换现有架构中的多层感知器层。我们对 MNIST 分类的初步实验证明，与现有感知器架构相比，树突神经元的准确性和泛化能力有所提高。

AI.tldr: 提出一种参数高效的树突树神经元结构，以提升传统感知机的性能
AI.motivation: 生物神经元通过复杂树突计算具有更强的表达能力，而传统感知机缺乏此类结构，需通过引入生物启发特征来提升其性能
AI.method: 通过引入输入分支因子和输入丢弃机制，构建非线性输入架构，并开发PyTorch模块替换多层感知机层
AI.result: 在MNIST分类任务中，树突神经元相比传统感知机结构在准确率和泛化能力上均有提升
AI.conclusion: 树突结构能有效增强感知机性能且保持参数高效，未来可拓展至更多任务和架构中

search_text: Parameter efficient dendritic-tree neurons outperform perceptrons 参数高效的树突树神经元优于感知器 Biological neurons are more powerful than artificial perceptrons, in part due to complex dendritic input computations. Inspired to empower the perceptron with biologically inspired features, we explore the effect of adding and tuning input branching factors along with input dropout. This allows for parameter efficient non-linear input architectures to be discovered and benchmarked. Furthermore, we present a PyTorch module to replace multi-layer perceptron layers in existing architectures. Our initial experiments on MNIST classification demonstrate the accuracy and generalization improvement of dendritic neurons compared to existing perceptron architectures. 生物神经元比人工感知器更强大，部分原因是复杂的树突输入计算。受启发，赋予感知器以生物学启发的特征，我们探索了添加和调整输入分支因子以及输入丢失的效果。这允许发现参数高效的非线性输入架构并对其进行基准测试。此外，我们提出了一个 PyTorch 模块来替换现有架构中的多层感知器层。我们对 MNIST 分类的初步实验证明，与现有感知器架构相比，树突神经元的准确性和泛化能力有所提高。 提出一种参数高效的树突树神经元结构，以提升传统感知机的性能 Ziwen Han,Evgeniya Gorobets,Pan Chen cs.NE,cs.LG

authors_text: Theresa Breiner,Swaroop Ramaswamy,Ehsan Variani,Shefali Garg,Rajiv Mathews,Khe Chai Sim,Kilol Gupta,Mingqing Chen,Lara McConnaughey
title: UserLibri: A Dataset for ASR Personalization Using Only Text
title_zh: UserLibri：仅使用文本进行 ASR 个性化的数据集
comment: Accepted for publication in Interspeech 2022. 9 total pages with appendix, 9 total tables, 5 total figures
comments: Accepted for publication in Interspeech 2022. 9 total pages with appendix, 9 total tables, 5 total figures
abstract: Personalization of speech models on mobile devices (on-device personalization) is an active area of research, but more often than not, mobile devices have more text-only data than paired audio-text data. We explore training a personalized language model on text-only data, used during inference to improve speech recognition performance for that user. We experiment on a user-clustered LibriSpeech corpus, supplemented with personalized text-only data for each user from Project Gutenberg. We release this User-Specific LibriSpeech (UserLibri) dataset to aid future personalization research. LibriSpeech audio-transcript pairs are grouped into 55 users from the test-clean dataset and 52 users from test-other. We are able to lower the average word error rate per user across both sets in streaming and nonstreaming models, including an improvement of 2.5 for the harder set of test-other users when streaming.
summary: Personalization of speech models on mobile devices (on-device personalization) is an active area of research, but more often than not, mobile devices have more text-only data than paired audio-text data. We explore training a personalized language model on text-only data, used during inference to improve speech recognition performance for that user. We experiment on a user-clustered LibriSpeech corpus, supplemented with personalized text-only data for each user from Project Gutenberg. We release this User-Specific LibriSpeech (UserLibri) dataset to aid future personalization research. LibriSpeech audio-transcript pairs are grouped into 55 users from the test-clean dataset and 52 users from test-other. We are able to lower the average word error rate per user across both sets in streaming and nonstreaming models, including an improvement of 2.5 for the harder set of test-other users when streaming.
abstract_zh: 移动设备上语音模型的个性化（设备上个性化）是一个活跃的研究领域，但通常情况下，移动设备拥有的纯文本数据多于配对的音频文本数据。我们探索在纯文本数据上训练个性化语言模型，在推理过程中使用该模型来提高该用户的语音识别性能。我们在用户集群的 LibriSpeech 语料库上进行了实验，并补充了来自古腾堡计划的每个用户的个性化纯文本数据。我们发布了这个用户特定的 LibriSpeech (UserLibri) 数据集以帮助未来的个性化研究。 LibriSpeech 音频转录对分为来自 test-clean 数据集的 55 个用户和来自 test-other 的 52 个用户。我们能够降低流式传输和非流式传输模型中每个用户的平均单词错误率，包括在流式传输时将较难的测试其他用户组提高 2.5。

AI.tldr: 本文提出UserLibri数据集，通过仅使用文本数据训练个性化语言模型以提升用户语音识别性能。
AI.motivation: 移动设备通常拥有大量文本数据但缺乏配对音频文本数据，需探索基于纯文本的个性化语音模型训练方法。
AI.method: 基于用户聚类的LibriSpeech语料库，结合Project Gutenberg的个性化文本数据构建UserLibri数据集，并训练语言模型辅助语音识别。
AI.result: 在流式和非流式模型中，用户平均词错误率均降低，test-other用户集词错误率提升2.5。
AI.conclusion: UserLibri数据集为未来研究提供支持，证明纯文本个性化方法能有效提升语音识别性能。

authors_text: Feng Xue,Weizhong Yan
title: Multivariate Time Series Anomaly Detection with Few Positive Samples
title_zh: 少量正样本的多元时间序列异常检测
comment: Accepted by the 2022 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN 2022). arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2205.02100
comments: Accepted by the 2022 International Joint Conference on Neural Networks (IJCNN 2022). arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2205.02100
abstract: Given the scarcity of anomalies in real-world applications, the majority of literature has been focusing on modeling normality. The learned representations enable anomaly detection as the normality model is trained to capture certain key underlying data regularities under normal circumstances. In practical settings, particularly industrial time series anomaly detection, we often encounter situations where a large amount of normal operation data is available along with a small number of anomaly events collected over time. This practical situation calls for methodologies to leverage these small number of anomaly events to create a better anomaly detector. In this paper, we introduce two methodologies to address the needs of this practical situation and compared them with recently developed state of the art techniques. Our proposed methods anchor on representative learning of normal operation with autoregressive (AR) model along with loss components to encourage representations that separate normal versus few positive examples. We applied the proposed methods to two industrial anomaly detection datasets and demonstrated effective performance in comparison with approaches from literature. Our study also points out additional challenges with adopting such methods in practical applications.
summary: Given the scarcity of anomalies in real-world applications, the majority of literature has been focusing on modeling normality. The learned representations enable anomaly detection as the normality model is trained to capture certain key underlying data regularities under normal circumstances. In practical settings, particularly industrial time series anomaly detection, we often encounter situations where a large amount of normal operation data is available along with a small number of anomaly events collected over time. This practical situation calls for methodologies to leverage these small number of anomaly events to create a better anomaly detector. In this paper, we introduce two methodologies to address the needs of this practical situation and compared them with recently developed state of the art techniques. Our proposed methods anchor on representative learning of normal operation with autoregressive (AR) model along with loss components to encourage representations that separate normal versus few positive examples. We applied the proposed methods to two industrial anomaly detection datasets and demonstrated effective performance in comparison with approaches from literature. Our study also points out additional challenges with adopting such methods in practical applications.
abstract_zh: 鉴于现实世界应用中异常现象的稀缺，大多数文献一直专注于对正态性进行建模。学习到的表示可以实现异常检测，因为正态性模型经过训练可以捕获正常情况下某些关键的基础数据规律。在实际设置中，特别是工业时间序列异常检测，我们经常遇到这样的情况：有大量正常运行数据可用，但随着时间的推移收集到少量异常事件。这种实际情况需要方法来利用这些少量的异常事件来创建更好的异常检测器。在本文中，我们介绍了两种方法来满足这种实际情况的需求，并将它们与最近开发的最先进技术进行比较。我们提出的方法以自回归（AR）模型和损失组件的正常操作的代表性学习为基础，以鼓励将正常示例与少数正例分开的表示。我们将所提出的方法应用于两个工业异常检测数据集，并与文献中的方法相比证明了有效的性能。我们的研究还指出了在实际应用中采用此类方法所面临的额外挑战。

AI.tldr: 本文针对实际工业场景中异常样本稀缺的问题，提出两种基于正常操作表示学习的时序异常检测方法。
AI.motivation: 现实工业时序数据中异常事件罕见，传统方法依赖正常模式建模，但需利用有限异常样本提升检测性能。
AI.method: 结合自回归模型与损失函数设计，通过正常操作的代表性学习区分正常与少量异常样本，提出两种改进方法。
AI.result: 在两个工业数据集上验证了方法有效性，性能优于现有文献中的主流技术。
AI.conclusion: 方法在小样本异常检测中表现良好，但实际应用中仍面临数据分布差异等挑战。

authors_text: Canberk Ekmekci,Mujdat Cetin
title: Uncertainty Quantification for Deep Unrolling-Based Computational Imaging
title_zh: 基于深度展开的计算成像的不确定性量化
comment: 23 pages, revised manuscript, accepted for publication as a regular paper in the IEEE Transactions on Computational Imaging
comments: 23 pages, revised manuscript, accepted for publication as a regular paper in the IEEE Transactions on Computational Imaging
abstract: Deep unrolling is an emerging deep learning-based image reconstruction methodology that bridges the gap between model-based and purely deep learning-based image reconstruction methods. Although deep unrolling methods achieve state-of-the-art performance for imaging problems and allow the incorporation of the observation model into the reconstruction process, they do not provide any uncertainty information about the reconstructed image, which severely limits their use in practice, especially for safety-critical imaging applications. In this paper, we propose a learning-based image reconstruction framework that incorporates the observation model into the reconstruction task and that is capable of quantifying epistemic and aleatoric uncertainties, based on deep unrolling and Bayesian neural networks. We demonstrate the uncertainty characterization capability of the proposed framework on magnetic resonance imaging and computed tomography reconstruction problems. We investigate the characteristics of the epistemic and aleatoric uncertainty information provided by the proposed framework to motivate future research on utilizing uncertainty information to develop more accurate, robust, trustworthy, uncertainty-aware, learning-based image reconstruction and analysis methods for imaging problems. We show that the proposed framework can provide uncertainty information while achieving comparable reconstruction performance to state-of-the-art deep unrolling methods.
summary: Deep unrolling is an emerging deep learning-based image reconstruction methodology that bridges the gap between model-based and purely deep learning-based image reconstruction methods. Although deep unrolling methods achieve state-of-the-art performance for imaging problems and allow the incorporation of the observation model into the reconstruction process, they do not provide any uncertainty information about the reconstructed image, which severely limits their use in practice, especially for safety-critical imaging applications. In this paper, we propose a learning-based image reconstruction framework that incorporates the observation model into the reconstruction task and that is capable of quantifying epistemic and aleatoric uncertainties, based on deep unrolling and Bayesian neural networks. We demonstrate the uncertainty characterization capability of the proposed framework on magnetic resonance imaging and computed tomography reconstruction problems. We investigate the characteristics of the epistemic and aleatoric uncertainty information provided by the proposed framework to motivate future research on utilizing uncertainty information to develop more accurate, robust, trustworthy, uncertainty-aware, learning-based image reconstruction and analysis methods for imaging problems. We show that the proposed framework can provide uncertainty information while achieving comparable reconstruction performance to state-of-the-art deep unrolling methods.
abstract_zh: 深度展开是一种新兴的基于深度学习的图像重建方法，它弥补了基于模型和纯粹基于深度学习的图像重建方法之间的差距。尽管深度展开方法在成像问题上实现了最先进的性能，并允许将观测模型纳入重建过程，但它们不提供有关重建图像的任何不确定性信息，这严重限制了它们在实践中的使用，特别是对于安全关键的成像应用。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于学习的图像重建框架，该框架将观察模型纳入重建任务中，并且能够基于深度展开和贝叶斯神经网络量化认知和任意不确定性。我们证明了所提出的框架在磁共振成像和计算机断层扫描重建问题上的不确定性表征能力。我们研究了所提出的框架提供的认知和任意不确定性信息的特征，以激发未来的研究，利用不确定性信息来开发更准确、鲁棒、值得信赖、不确定性感知、基于学习的图像重建和成像问题分析方法。我们表明，所提出的框架可以提供不确定性信息，同时实现与最先进的深度展开方法相当的重建性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度展开与贝叶斯神经网络的框架，用于计算成像中的不确定性量化问题。
AI.motivation: 深度展开方法虽性能优异，但缺乏对重建图像不确定性的表征，难以满足安全关键型成像应用的需求。
AI.method: 基于深度展开架构整合观测模型，引入贝叶斯神经网络实现认识不确定性与偶然不确定性的联合量化。
AI.result: 在MRI和CT重建任务中验证了框架有效性，可在保持重建精度的同时提供可靠的不确定性估计。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为开发更安全可信的成像重建方法提供了新思路，未来可进一步探索不确定性信息的应用潜力。

search_text: Uncertainty Quantification for Deep Unrolling-Based Computational Imaging 基于深度展开的计算成像的不确定性量化 Deep unrolling is an emerging deep learning-based image reconstruction methodology that bridges the gap between model-based and purely deep learning-based image reconstruction methods. Although deep unrolling methods achieve state-of-the-art performance for imaging problems and allow the incorporation of the observation model into the reconstruction process, they do not provide any uncertainty information about the reconstructed image, which severely limits their use in practice, especially for safety-critical imaging applications. In this paper, we propose a learning-based image reconstruction framework that incorporates the observation model into the reconstruction task and that is capable of quantifying epistemic and aleatoric uncertainties, based on deep unrolling and Bayesian neural networks. We demonstrate the uncertainty characterization capability of the proposed framework on magnetic resonance imaging and computed tomography reconstruction problems. We investigate the characteristics of the epistemic and aleatoric uncertainty information provided by the proposed framework to motivate future research on utilizing uncertainty information to develop more accurate, robust, trustworthy, uncertainty-aware, learning-based image reconstruction and analysis methods for imaging problems. We show that the proposed framework can provide uncertainty information while achieving comparable reconstruction performance to state-of-the-art deep unrolling methods. 深度展开是一种新兴的基于深度学习的图像重建方法，它弥补了基于模型和纯粹基于深度学习的图像重建方法之间的差距。尽管深度展开方法在成像问题上实现了最先进的性能，并允许将观测模型纳入重建过程，但它们不提供有关重建图像的任何不确定性信息，这严重限制了它们在实践中的使用，特别是对于安全关键的成像应用。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于学习的图像重建框架，该框架将观察模型纳入重建任务中，并且能够基于深度展开和贝叶斯神经网络量化认知和任意不确定性。我们证明了所提出的框架在磁共振成像和计算机断层扫描重建问题上的不确定性表征能力。我们研究了所提出的框架提供的认知和任意不确定性信息的特征，以激发未来的研究，利用不确定性信息来开发更准确、鲁棒、值得信赖、不确定性感知、基于学习的图像重建和成像问题分析方法。我们表明，所提出的框架可以提供不确定性信息，同时实现与最先进的深度展开方法相当的重建性能。 本文提出一种结合深度展开与贝叶斯神经网络的框架，用于计算成像中的不确定性量化问题。 Canberk Ekmekci,Mujdat Cetin eess.IV,cs.LG,eess.SP

authors_text: Julen Balzategui,Luka Eciolaza
title: Few-shot incremental learning in the context of solar cell quality inspection
title_zh: 太阳能电池质量检测中的小样本增量学习
abstract: In industry, Deep Neural Networks have shown high defect detection rates surpassing other more traditional manual feature engineering based proposals. This has been achieved mainly through supervised training where a great amount of data is required in order to learn good classification models. However, such amount of data is sometimes hard to obtain in industrial scenarios, as few defective pieces are produced normally. In addition, certain kinds of defects are very rare and usually just appear from time to time, which makes the generation of a proper dataset for training a classification model even harder. Moreover, the lack of available data limits the adaptation of inspection models to new defect types that appear in production as it might require a model retraining in order to incorporate the detects and detect them. In this work, we have explored the technique of weight imprinting in the context of solar cell quality inspection where we have trained a network on three base defect classes, and then we have incorporated new defect classes using few samples. The results have shown that this technique allows the network to extend its knowledge with regard to defect classes with few samples, which can be interesting for industrial practitioners.
summary: In industry, Deep Neural Networks have shown high defect detection rates surpassing other more traditional manual feature engineering based proposals. This has been achieved mainly through supervised training where a great amount of data is required in order to learn good classification models. However, such amount of data is sometimes hard to obtain in industrial scenarios, as few defective pieces are produced normally. In addition, certain kinds of defects are very rare and usually just appear from time to time, which makes the generation of a proper dataset for training a classification model even harder. Moreover, the lack of available data limits the adaptation of inspection models to new defect types that appear in production as it might require a model retraining in order to incorporate the detects and detect them. In this work, we have explored the technique of weight imprinting in the context of solar cell quality inspection where we have trained a network on three base defect classes, and then we have incorporated new defect classes using few samples. The results have shown that this technique allows the network to extend its knowledge with regard to defect classes with few samples, which can be interesting for industrial practitioners.
abstract_zh: 在工业中，深度神经网络表现出比其他更传统的基于手动特征工程的建议更高的缺陷检测率。这主要是通过监督训练来实现的，其中需要大量数据才能学习良好的分类模型。然而，这样的数据量在工业场景中有时很难获得，因为正常生产的缺陷件很少。此外，某些类型的缺陷非常罕见，通常只是偶尔出现，这使得生成用于训练分类模型的适当数据集变得更加困难。此外，缺乏可用数据限制了检测模型对生产中出现的新缺陷类型的适应，因为可能需要重新训练模型才能合并检测并检测它们。在这项工作中，我们在太阳能电池质量检测的背景下探索了重量压印技术，我们在三个基本缺陷类别上训练了一个网络，然后我们使用少量样本合并了新的缺陷类别。结果表明，该技术允许网络通过少量样本扩展其关于缺陷类别的知识，这对于工业从业者来说可能很有趣。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在太阳能电池质量检测中应用少量样本增量学习技术，以解决工业场景中缺陷数据不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 工业质检中传统深度学习方法依赖大量标注数据，但实际生产中缺陷样本稀少且新缺陷类型不断出现，导致模型难以有效扩展和更新。
AI.method: 采用权重印记（weight imprinting）方法，在已训练的三类基础缺陷模型基础上，通过少量新缺陷样本增量更新模型参数。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效扩展模型对新缺陷类型的识别能力，验证了少量样本增量学习在工业质检中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 权重印记技术为工业场景下的增量缺陷检测提供了有效解决方案，降低了新缺陷类型适应所需的数据和计算成本。

authors_text: Charles Khazoom,Daniel Gonzalez-Diaz,Yanran Ding,Sangbae Kim
title: Humanoid Self-Collision Avoidance Using Whole-Body Control with Control Barrier Functions
title_zh: 使用带有控制屏障功能的全身控制的人形机器人自碰撞避免
abstract: This work combines control barrier functions (CBFs) with a whole-body controller to enable self-collision avoidance for the MIT Humanoid. Existing reactive controllers for self-collision avoidance cannot guarantee collision-free trajectories as they do not leverage the robot's full dynamics, thus compromising kinematic feasibility. In comparison, the proposed CBF-WBC controller can reason about the robot's underactuated dynamics in real-time to guarantee collision-free motions. The effectiveness of this approach is validated in simulation. First, a simple hand-reaching experiment shows that the CBF-WBC enables the robot's hand to deviate from an infeasible reference trajectory to avoid self-collisions. Second, the CBF-WBC is combined with a linear model predictive controller (LMPC) designed for dynamic locomotion, and the CBF-WBC is used to track the LMPC predictions. Walking experiments show that adding CBFs avoids leg self-collisions when the footstep location or swing trajectory provided by the high-level planner are infeasible for the real robot, and generates feasible arm motions that improve disturbance recovery.
summary: This work combines control barrier functions (CBFs) with a whole-body controller to enable self-collision avoidance for the MIT Humanoid. Existing reactive controllers for self-collision avoidance cannot guarantee collision-free trajectories as they do not leverage the robot's full dynamics, thus compromising kinematic feasibility. In comparison, the proposed CBF-WBC controller can reason about the robot's underactuated dynamics in real-time to guarantee collision-free motions. The effectiveness of this approach is validated in simulation. First, a simple hand-reaching experiment shows that the CBF-WBC enables the robot's hand to deviate from an infeasible reference trajectory to avoid self-collisions. Second, the CBF-WBC is combined with a linear model predictive controller (LMPC) designed for dynamic locomotion, and the CBF-WBC is used to track the LMPC predictions. Walking experiments show that adding CBFs avoids leg self-collisions when the footstep location or swing trajectory provided by the high-level planner are infeasible for the real robot, and generates feasible arm motions that improve disturbance recovery.
abstract_zh: 这项工作将控制屏障功能 (CBF) 与全身控制器相结合，使 MIT 人形机器人能够避免自碰撞。现有的用于自碰撞避免的反应控制器无法保证无碰撞轨迹，因为它们没有利用机器人的全部动力学，从而损害了运动学可行性。相比之下，所提出的 CBF-WBC 控制器可以实时推理机器人的欠驱动动力学，以保证无碰撞运动。该方法的有效性在仿真中得到验证。首先，一个简单的伸手实验表明，CBF-WBC能够使机器人的手偏离不可行的参考轨迹，以避免自碰撞。其次，CBF-WBC 与专为动态运动设计的线性模型预测控制器（LMPC）相结合，并且 CBF-WBC 用于跟踪 LMPC 预测。行走实验表明，当高级规划器提供的脚步位置或摆动轨迹对于真实机器人不可行时，添加 CBF 可以避免腿部自碰撞，并生成可行的手臂运动，从而改善干扰恢复。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合控制障碍函数（CBF）与全身控制器（WBC）的方法，用于实现人形机器人自碰撞避免。
AI.motivation: 现有自碰撞避免控制器未利用机器人完整动力学，导致轨迹不可行，无法保证无碰撞。
AI.method: 设计CBF-WBC控制器，通过实时考虑欠驱动动力学保证碰撞避免，并与LMPC结合实现动态行走轨迹跟踪。
AI.result: 仿真验证显示：手部实验可规避碰撞，行走实验在步态规划不可行时避免腿部自碰撞并提升扰动恢复能力。
AI.conclusion: CBF-WBC方法有效保证了机器人运动的碰撞安全性与动力学可行性，适用于复杂动态任务。
