motivation: 现有自碰撞避免控制器未利用机器人完整动力学，导致轨迹不可行，无法保证无碰撞。
method: 设计CBF-WBC控制器，通过实时考虑欠驱动动力学保证碰撞避免，并与LMPC结合实现动态行走轨迹跟踪。
result: 仿真验证显示：手部实验可规避碰撞，行走实验在步态规划不可行时避免腿部自碰撞并提升扰动恢复能力。
conclusion: CBF-WBC方法有效保证了机器人运动的碰撞安全性与动力学可行性，适用于复杂动态任务。
search_text: Humanoid Self-Collision Avoidance Using Whole-Body Control with Control Barrier Functions 使用带有控制屏障功能的全身控制的人形机器人自碰撞避免 This work combines control barrier functions (CBFs) with a whole-body controller to enable self-collision avoidance for the MIT Humanoid. Existing reactive controllers for self-collision avoidance cannot guarantee collision-free trajectories as they do not leverage the robot's full dynamics, thus compromising kinematic feasibility. In comparison, the proposed CBF-WBC controller can reason about the robot's underactuated dynamics in real-time to guarantee collision-free motions. The effectiveness of this approach is validated in simulation. First, a simple hand-reaching experiment shows that the CBF-WBC enables the robot's hand to deviate from an infeasible reference trajectory to avoid self-collisions. Second, the CBF-WBC is combined with a linear model predictive controller (LMPC) designed for dynamic locomotion, and the CBF-WBC is used to track the LMPC predictions. Walking experiments show that adding CBFs avoids leg self-collisions when the footstep location or swing trajectory provided by the high-level planner are infeasible for the real robot, and generates feasible arm motions that improve disturbance recovery. 这项工作将控制屏障功能 (CBF) 与全身控制器相结合，使 MIT 人形机器人能够避免自碰撞。现有的用于自碰撞避免的反应控制器无法保证无碰撞轨迹，因为它们没有利用机器人的全部动力学，从而损害了运动学可行性。相比之下，所提出的 CBF-WBC 控制器可以实时推理机器人的欠驱动动力学，以保证无碰撞运动。该方法的有效性在仿真中得到验证。首先，一个简单的伸手实验表明，CBF-WBC能够使机器人的手偏离不可行的参考轨迹，以避免自碰撞。其次，CBF-WBC 与专为动态运动设计的线性模型预测控制器（LMPC）相结合，并且 CBF-WBC 用于跟踪 LMPC 预测。行走实验表明，当高级规划器提供的脚步位置或摆动轨迹对于真实机器人不可行时，添加 CBF 可以避免腿部自碰撞，并生成可行的手臂运动，从而改善干扰恢复。 本文提出一种结合控制障碍函数（CBF）与全身控制器（WBC）的方法，用于实现人形机器人自碰撞避免。 Charles Khazoom,Daniel Gonzalez-Diaz,Yanran Ding,Sangbae Kim cs.RO

authors_text: Robert Wolfe,Aylin Caliskan
title: American == White in Multimodal Language-and-Image AI
title_zh: 多模态语言和图像人工智能中的美国人 == 白人
comment: Accepted to AI Ethics and Society 2022
comments: Accepted to AI Ethics and Society 2022
abstract: Three state-of-the-art language-and-image AI models, CLIP, SLIP, and BLIP, are evaluated for evidence of a bias previously observed in social and experimental psychology: equating American identity with being White. Embedding association tests (EATs) using standardized images of self-identified Asian, Black, Latina/o, and White individuals from the Chicago Face Database (CFD) reveal that White individuals are more associated with collective in-group words than are Asian, Black, or Latina/o individuals. In assessments of three core aspects of American identity reported by social psychologists, single-category EATs reveal that images of White individuals are more associated with patriotism and with being born in America, but that, consistent with prior findings in psychology, White individuals are associated with being less likely to treat people of all races and backgrounds equally. Three downstream machine learning tasks demonstrate biases associating American with White. In a visual question answering task using BLIP, 97% of White individuals are identified as American, compared to only 3% of Asian individuals. When asked in what state the individual depicted lives in, the model responds China 53% of the time for Asian individuals, but always with an American state for White individuals. In an image captioning task, BLIP remarks upon the race of Asian individuals as much as 36% of the time, but never remarks upon race for White individuals. Finally, provided with an initialization image from the CFD and the text "an American person," a synthetic image generator (VQGAN) using the text-based guidance of CLIP lightens the skin tone of individuals of all races (by 35% for Black individuals, based on pixel brightness). The results indicate that biases equating American identity with being White are learned by language-and-image AI, and propagate to downstream applications of such models.

When asked in what state the individual depicted lives in, the model responds China 53% of the time for Asian individuals, but always with an American state for White individuals. Finally, provided with an initialization image from the CFD and the text "an American person," a synthetic image generator (VQGAN) using the text-based guidance of CLIP lightens the skin tone of individuals of all races (by 35% for Black individuals, based on pixel brightness). abstract_zh: 对三种最先进的语言和图像人工智能模型 CLIP、SLIP 和 BLIP 进行了评估，以寻找先前在社会和实验心理学中观察到的偏见的证据：将美国人的身份等同于白人。使用来自芝加哥人脸数据库 (CFD) 的自我识别的亚洲人、黑人、拉丁裔/o 和白人的标准化图像进行嵌入关联测试 (EAT)，结果表明，与亚洲人、黑人或拉丁裔/o 个体相比，白人与集体内群体词语的关联性更强。在社会心理学家报告的对美国身份三个核心方面的评估中，单一类别的 EAT 显示，白人的形象与爱国主义和出生在美国更相关，但与之前的心理学研究结果一致，白人与不太可能平等对待所有种族和背景的人有关。三个下游机器学习任务显示了将美国人与白人联系起来的偏见。在使用 BLIP 的视觉问答任务中，97% 的白人被识别为美国人，而亚洲人的这一比例仅为 3%。当被问及所描绘的个体生活在哪个州时，该模型对于亚洲人来说，53% 的情况下会回答中国，但对于白人来说，总是回答美国州。在图像字幕任务中，BLIP 高达 36% 的时间评论亚洲人的种族，但从未评论白人的种族。最后，提供来自 CFD 的初始化图像和文本“美国人”，使用基于文本的 CLIP 指导的合成图像生成器 (VQGAN) 可以使所有种族个体的肤色变亮（根据像素亮度，黑人个体的肤色变亮 35%）。结果表明，将美国身份等同于白人的偏见是通过语言和图像人工智能学习的，并传播到此类模型的下游应用。

AI.tldr: 本文评估了三种多模态语言与图像AI模型（CLIP、SLIP、BLIP）是否存在将美国身份与白人身份等同的偏见，并验证该偏见在下游任务中的传播情况。
AI.motivation: 心理学研究发现美国身份常被默认关联白人身份，本文旨在验证此类偏见是否被多模态AI模型学习并影响其下游应用。
AI.method: 通过嵌入关联测试（EATs）分析模型对不同种族图像与美国身份相关词汇的关联性，并在视觉问答、图像描述及图像生成任务中评估偏见表现。
AI.result: 白人图像与爱国主义、出生地等美国身份特征强关联，而亚洲人常被错误关联至中国；模型在图像生成中会淡化非白人肤色，且极少描述白人种族特征。
AI.conclusion: 多模态AI模型已学习到美国身份与白人身份的偏见关联，该偏见会显著影响视觉问答、图像描述等下游应用的公平性。

authors_text: Perez Ogayo,Graham Neubig,Alan W Black
title: Building African Voices
title_zh: 建立非洲之声
abstract: Modern speech synthesis techniques can produce natural-sounding speech given sufficient high-quality data and compute resources. However, such data is not readily available for many languages. This paper focuses on speech synthesis for low-resourced African languages, from corpus creation to sharing and deploying the Text-to-Speech (TTS) systems. We first create a set of general-purpose instructions on building speech synthesis systems with minimum technological resources and subject-matter expertise. Next, we create new datasets and curate datasets from "found" data (existing recordings) through a participatory approach while considering accessibility, quality, and breadth. We demonstrate that we can develop synthesizers that generate intelligible speech with 25 minutes of created speech, even when recorded in suboptimal environments. Finally, we release the speech data, code, and trained voices for 12 African languages to support researchers and developers.
summary: Modern speech synthesis techniques can produce natural-sounding speech given sufficient high-quality data and compute resources. However, such data is not readily available for many languages. This paper focuses on speech synthesis for low-resourced African languages, from corpus creation to sharing and deploying the Text-to-Speech (TTS) systems. We first create a set of general-purpose instructions on building speech synthesis systems with minimum technological resources and subject-matter expertise. Next, we create new datasets and curate datasets from "found" data (existing recordings) through a participatory approach while considering accessibility, quality, and breadth. We demonstrate that we can develop synthesizers that generate intelligible speech with 25 minutes of created speech, even when recorded in suboptimal environments. Finally, we release the speech data, code, and trained voices for 12 African languages to support researchers and developers.
abstract_zh: 如果有足够的高质量数据和计算资源，现代语音合成技术可以产生听起来自然的语音。然而，对于许多语言来说，此类数据并不容易获得。本文重点关注资源匮乏的非洲语言的语音合成，从语料库创建到共享和部署文本转语音 (TTS) 系统。我们首先创建一套通用指令，以最少的技术资源和主题专业知识构建语音合成系统。接下来，我们通过参与式方法从“找到的”数据（现有记录）创建新的数据集并整理数据集，同时考虑可访问性、质量和广度。我们证明，即使是在次优环境中录制的情况下，我们也可以开发出能够通过 25 分钟创建的语音生成可理解的语音的合成器。最后，我们发布了 12 种非洲语言的语音数据、代码和训练后的语音，以支持研究人员和开发人员。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在为资源匮乏的非洲语言构建语音合成系统，涵盖数据收集、模型开发及成果共享。
AI.motivation: 非洲许多语言缺乏高质量语音数据，限制了语音合成技术的应用与发展。
AI.method: 制定低资源环境下的语音合成指南，通过参与式方法收集和整理现有录音数据，并验证少量数据的有效性。
AI.result: 开发出可生成可理解语音的合成器，仅需25分钟录音数据，并公开12种非洲语言的数据、代码和预训练模型。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为低资源语言的语音合成提供了可行路径，降低了技术门槛并促进了研究成果共享。

Next, we create new datasets and curate datasets from "found" data (existing recordings) through a participatory approach while considering accessibility, quality, and breadth. We demonstrate that we can develop synthesizers that generate intelligible speech with 25 minutes of created speech, even when recorded in suboptimal environments. Finally, we release the speech data, code, and trained voices for 12 African languages to support researchers and developers. 如果有足够的高质量数据和计算资源，现代语音合成技术可以产生听起来自然的语音。然而，对于许多语言来说，此类数据并不容易获得。本文重点关注资源匮乏的非洲语言的语音合成，从语料库创建到共享和部署文本转语音 (TTS) 系统。我们首先创建一套通用指令，以最少的技术资源和主题专业知识构建语音合成系统。接下来，我们通过参与式方法从“找到的”数据（现有记录）创建新的数据集并整理数据集，同时考虑可访问性、质量和广度。我们证明，即使是在次优环境中录制的情况下，我们也可以开发出能够通过 25 分钟创建的语音生成可理解的语音的合成器。最后，我们发布了 12 种非洲语言的语音数据、代码和训练后的语音，以支持研究人员和开发人员。 本文旨在为资源匮乏的非洲语言构建语音合成系统，涵盖数据收集、模型开发及成果共享。 Perez Ogayo,Graham Neubig,Alan W Black cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Harsh Panwar
title: The NPC AI of The Last of Us: A case study
title_zh: 《最后生还者》中的 NPC AI：案例研究
abstract: The Last of Us is a game focused on stealth, companionship and strategy. The game is based in a lonely world after the pandemic and thus it needs AI companions to gain the interest of players. There are three main NPCs the game has - Infected, Human enemy and Buddy AIs. This case study talks about the challenges in front of the developers to create AI for these NPCs and the AI techniques they used to solve them. It also compares the challenges and approach with similar industry-leading games.
summary: The Last of Us is a game focused on stealth, companionship and strategy. The game is based in a lonely world after the pandemic and thus it needs AI companions to gain the interest of players. There are three main NPCs the game has - Infected, Human enemy and Buddy AIs. This case study talks about the challenges in front of the developers to create AI for these NPCs and the AI techniques they used to solve them. It also compares the challenges and approach with similar industry-leading games.
abstract_zh: 《最后生还者》是一款专注于潜行、陪伴和策略的游戏。该游戏以疫情后的孤独世界为背景，因此需要AI同伴来吸引玩家的兴趣。游戏中有 3 个主要 NPC：感染者、人类敌人和好友 AI。本案例研究讨论了开发人员在为这些 NPC 创建 AI 时面临的挑战以及他们用来解决这些挑战的 AI 技术。它还将挑战和方法与类似的行业领先游戏进行了比较。

AI.tldr: 本文以《最后生还者》为案例，研究游戏NPC AI的设计挑战与技术实现方案。
AI.motivation: 通过分析后末日题材游戏中NPC AI的设计，探索如何通过人工智能技术提升玩家沉浸感与游戏策略性。
AI.method: 采用案例研究法，对比分析感染者、人类敌人及伙伴AI的开发难点，并与行业标杆游戏进行技术方案对比。
AI.result: 揭示了感染者行为模式设计、敌人AI决策逻辑优化及伙伴AI情感交互机制等关键技术实现路径。
AI.conclusion: 证明了结合行为树、状态机与机器学习的混合AI架构能有效平衡游戏真实性与玩法趣味性。

authors_text: Benjamin Wong,Wade Marquette,Nikolay Bykov,Tyler M. Paine,Ashis G. Banerjee
title: Human-Assisted Robotic Detection of Foreign Object Debris Inside Confined Spaces of Marine Vessels Using Probabilistic Mapping
title_zh: 使用概率映射对船舶密闭空间内的异物碎片进行人工辅助机器人检测
abstract: Many complex vehicular systems, such as large marine vessels, contain confined spaces like water tanks, which are critical for the safe functioning of the vehicles. It is particularly hazardous for humans to inspect such spaces due to limited accessibility, poor visibility, and unstructured configuration. While robots provide a viable alternative, they encounter the same set of challenges in realizing robust autonomy. In this work, we specifically address the problem of detecting foreign object debris (FODs) left inside the confined spaces using a visual mapping-based system that relies on Mahalanobis distance-driven comparisons between the nominal and online maps for local outlier identification. Simulation trials show extremely high recall but low precision for the outlier identification method. The assistance of remote humans is, therefore, taken to deal with the precision problem by going over the close-up robot camera images of the outlier regions. An online survey is conducted to show the usefulness of this assistance process. Physical experiments are also reported on a GPU-enabled mobile robot platform inside a scaled-down, prototype tank to demonstrate the feasibility of the FOD detection system.
summary: Many complex vehicular systems, such as large marine vessels, contain confined spaces like water tanks, which are critical for the safe functioning of the vehicles. It is particularly hazardous for humans to inspect such spaces due to limited accessibility, poor visibility, and unstructured configuration. While robots provide a viable alternative, they encounter the same set of challenges in realizing robust autonomy. In this work, we specifically address the problem of detecting foreign object debris (FODs) left inside the confined spaces using a visual mapping-based system that relies on Mahalanobis distance-driven comparisons between the nominal and online maps for local outlier identification. Simulation trials show extremely high recall but low precision for the outlier identification method. The assistance of remote humans is, therefore, taken to deal with the precision problem by going over the close-up robot camera images of the outlier regions. An online survey is conducted to show the usefulness of this assistance process. Physical experiments are also reported on a GPU-enabled mobile robot platform inside a scaled-down, prototype tank to demonstrate the feasibility of the FOD detection system.
abstract_zh: 许多复杂的车辆系统，例如大型船舶，都包含水箱等有限空间，这对于车辆的安全运行至关重要。由于可达性有限、能见度差和非结构化配置，人类检查这些空间特别危险。虽然机器人提供了一种可行的替代方案，但它们在实现强大的自主性方面遇到了同样的挑战。在这项工作中，我们专门解决了使用基于视觉映射的系统检测留在有限空间内的异物碎片（FOD）的问题，该系统依赖于标称地图和在线地图之间的马哈拉诺比斯距离驱动比较来进行局部异常值识别。模拟试验表明，异常值识别方法的召回率极高，但精度较低。因此，需要远程人员的协助，通过检查离群区域的特写机器人相机图像来解决精度问题。我们进行了一项在线调查，以显示此援助流程的有用性。还报告了在小型原型坦克内的支持 GPU 的移动机器人平台上进行的物理实验，以证明 FOD 检测系统的可行性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合机器人与人类协作的系统，用于在船舶封闭空间内检测外来异物（FOD），通过概率映射和远程人工辅助提升检测精度。
AI.motivation: 船舶等复杂系统中的封闭空间（如水箱）因可及性差、可视性低，人工检测存在高风险，而机器人自主检测面临同样挑战，需开发安全高效的FOD检测方案。
AI.method: 基于视觉映射系统，利用马氏距离比较标准地图与实时地图的差异以识别局部异常，通过远程人类审查异常区域的近距离图像来修正低精度问题。
AI.result: 仿真试验显示异常检测召回率高但精度低，人工辅助显著提升精度；物理实验在缩比原型水箱中验证了系统的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 该系统通过机器人自主检测与人工辅助结合，实现了高召回率和可接受精度的FOD检测，为船舶封闭空间安全维护提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Zhongnan Qu,Syed Shakib Sarwar,Xin Dong,Yuecheng Li,Ekin Sumbul,Barbara De Salvo
title: DRESS: Dynamic REal-time Sparse Subnets
title_zh: DRESS：动态实时稀疏子网
comment: Published in Efficient Deep Learning for Computer Vision (ECV) CVPR Workshop 2022
comments: Published in Efficient Deep Learning for Computer Vision (ECV) CVPR Workshop 2022
abstract: The limited and dynamically varied resources on edge devices motivate us to deploy an optimized deep neural network that can adapt its sub-networks to fit in different resource constraints. However, existing works often build sub-networks through searching different network architectures in a hand-crafted sampling space, which not only can result in a subpar performance but also may cause on-device re-configuration overhead. In this paper, we propose a novel training algorithm, Dynamic REal-time Sparse Subnets (DRESS). DRESS samples multiple sub-networks from the same backbone network through row-based unstructured sparsity, and jointly trains these sub-networks in parallel with weighted loss. DRESS also exploits strategies including parameter reusing and row-based fine-grained sampling for efficient storage consumption and efficient on-device adaptation. Extensive experiments on public vision datasets show that DRESS yields significantly higher accuracy than state-of-the-art sub-networks.
summary: The limited and dynamically varied resources on edge devices motivate us to deploy an optimized deep neural network that can adapt its sub-networks to fit in different resource constraints. However, existing works often build sub-networks through searching different network architectures in a hand-crafted sampling space, which not only can result in a subpar performance but also may cause on-device re-configuration overhead. In this paper, we propose a novel training algorithm, Dynamic REal-time Sparse Subnets (DRESS). DRESS samples multiple sub-networks from the same backbone network through row-based unstructured sparsity, and jointly trains these sub-networks in parallel with weighted loss. DRESS also exploits strategies including parameter reusing and row-based fine-grained sampling for efficient storage consumption and efficient on-device adaptation. Extensive experiments on public vision datasets show that DRESS yields significantly higher accuracy than state-of-the-art sub-networks.
abstract_zh: 边缘设备上有限且动态变化的资源促使我们部署优化的深度神经网络，该网络可以调整其子网络以适应不同的资源限制。然而，现有的工作经常通过在手工设计的采样空间中搜索不同的网络架构来构建子网络，这不仅会导致性能不佳，而且可能会导致设备上的重新配置开销。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的训练算法：动态实时稀疏子网（DRESS）。 DRESS通过基于行的非结构化稀疏性从同一骨干网络中采样多个子网络，并与加权损失并行地联合训练这些子网络。 DRESS 还利用参数重用和基于行的细粒度采样等策略来实现高效的存储消耗和高效的设备适配。对公共视觉数据集的大量实验表明，DRESS 的准确度明显高于最先进的子网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出动态实时稀疏子网络（DRESS）方法，在资源受限的边缘设备上实现深度神经网络子网络的动态适应。
AI.motivation: 现有子网络构建方法因依赖手工设计采样空间，导致性能不足且设备配置开销大，难以适应边缘设备动态变化的资源约束。
AI.method: 通过行级非结构化稀疏性从主干网络采样多个子网络，使用加权损失并行训练，并结合参数重用与行级细粒度采样策略优化存储与适应效率。
AI.result: 在公共视觉数据集上，DRESS的准确率显著优于现有最先进的子网络方法。
AI.conclusion: DRESS通过动态稀疏子网络训练与优化策略，有效解决了边缘设备资源动态变化下的模型适应问题，提升了准确率与效率。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出动态实时稀疏子网络（DRESS）方法，在资源受限的边缘设备上实现深度神经网络子网络的动态适应。
ai_content.motivation: 现有子网络构建方法因依赖手工设计采样空间，导致性能不足且设备配置开销大，难以适应边缘设备动态变化的资源约束。
ai_content.method: 通过行级非结构化稀疏性从主干网络采样多个子网络，使用加权损失并行训练，并结合参数重用与行级细粒度采样策略优化存储与适应效率。

search_text: DRESS: Dynamic REal-time Sparse Subnets DRESS：动态实时稀疏子网 The limited and dynamically varied resources on edge devices motivate us to deploy an optimized deep neural network that can adapt its sub-networks to fit in different resource constraints. However, existing works often build sub-networks through searching different network architectures in a hand-crafted sampling space, which not only can result in a subpar performance but also may cause on-device re-configuration overhead. In this paper, we propose a novel training algorithm, Dynamic REal-time Sparse Subnets (DRESS). DRESS samples multiple sub-networks from the same backbone network through row-based unstructured sparsity, and jointly trains these sub-networks in parallel with weighted loss. DRESS also exploits strategies including parameter reusing and row-based fine-grained sampling for efficient storage consumption and efficient on-device adaptation. Extensive experiments on public vision datasets show that DRESS yields significantly higher accuracy than state-of-the-art sub-networks. 边缘设备上有限且动态变化的资源促使我们部署优化的深度神经网络，该网络可以调整其子网络以适应不同的资源限制。然而，现有的工作经常通过在手工设计的采样空间中搜索不同的网络架构来构建子网络，这不仅会导致性能不佳，而且可能会导致设备上的重新配置开销。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的训练算法：动态实时稀疏子网（DRESS）。 DRESS通过基于行的非结构化稀疏性从同一骨干网络中采样多个子网络，并与加权损失并行地联合训练这些子网络。 DRESS 还利用参数重用和基于行的细粒度采样等策略来实现高效的存储消耗和高效的设备适配。对公共视觉数据集的大量实验表明，DRESS 的准确度明显高于最先进的子网络。 本文提出动态实时稀疏子网络（DRESS）方法，在资源受限的边缘设备上实现深度神经网络子网络的动态适应。 Zhongnan Qu,Syed Shakib Sarwar,Xin Dong,Yuecheng Li,Ekin Sumbul,Barbara De Salvo cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Kevin Tracy,Taylor A. Howell,Zachary Manchester
title: Differentiable Collision Detection for a Set of Convex Primitives
title_zh: 一组凸基元的可微碰撞检测
abstract: Collision detection between objects is critical for simulation, control, and learning for robotic systems. However, existing collision detection routines are inherently non-differentiable, limiting their applications in gradient-based optimization tools. In this work, we propose DCOL: a fast and fully differentiable collision-detection framework that reasons about collisions between a set of composable and highly expressive convex primitive shapes. This is achieved by formulating the collision detection problem as a convex optimization problem that solves for the minimum uniform scaling applied to each primitive before they intersect. The optimization problem is fully differentiable with respect to the configurations of each primitive and is able to return a collision detection metric and contact points on each object, agnostic of interpenetration. We demonstrate the capabilities of DCOL on a range of robotics problems from trajectory optimization and contact physics, and have made an open-source implementation available.
summary: Collision detection between objects is critical for simulation, control, and learning for robotic systems. However, existing collision detection routines are inherently non-differentiable, limiting their applications in gradient-based optimization tools. In this work, we propose DCOL: a fast and fully differentiable collision-detection framework that reasons about collisions between a set of composable and highly expressive convex primitive shapes. This is achieved by formulating the collision detection problem as a convex optimization problem that solves for the minimum uniform scaling applied to each primitive before they intersect. The optimization problem is fully differentiable with respect to the configurations of each primitive and is able to return a collision detection metric and contact points on each object, agnostic of interpenetration. We demonstrate the capabilities of DCOL on a range of robotics problems from trajectory optimization and contact physics, and have made an open-source implementation available.
abstract_zh: 物体之间的碰撞检测对于机器人系统的模拟、控制和学习至关重要。然而，现有的碰撞检测例程本质上是不可微的，限制了它们在基于梯度的优化工具中的应用。在这项工作中，我们提出了 DCOL：一种快速且完全可微的碰撞检测框架，用于推理一组可组合且高度表达的凸基元形状之间的碰撞。这是通过将碰撞检测问题表述为凸优化问题来实现的，该问题求解在每个图元相交之前应用于每个图元的最小均匀缩放。优化问题对于每个基元的配置是完全可微的，并且能够返回每个对象上的碰撞检测度量和接触点，而与相互渗透无关。我们展示了 DCOL 在解决轨迹优化和接触物理等一系列机器人问题上的功能，并提供了开源实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DCOL框架，实现凸原语集合的快速可微碰撞检测。
AI.motivation: 现有碰撞检测方法非微分，难以应用于基于梯度的优化工具，限制了机器人系统的学习与控制能力。
AI.method: 将碰撞检测建模为凸优化问题，通过求解各凸原语的最小均匀缩放因子判断是否相交，实现对配置参数的全微分计算。
AI.result: 在轨迹优化和接触物理等任务中验证有效性，开源实现表明方法具备实用性与可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: DCOL为机器人系统提供了首个端到端可微的碰撞检测方案，推动了优化与学习算法在物理交互场景中的应用。

authors_text: Antonio Gomez
title: Speaker Diarization and Identification from Single-Channel Classroom Audio Recording Using Virtual Microphones
title_zh: 使用虚拟麦克风对单通道课堂录音进行说话人分类和识别
comment: Total of 170 pages, 59 figures. This work is part of the partial fulfillment of the requirements for the degree of PhD in engineering at the University of New Mexico
comments: Total of 170 pages, 59 figures. This work is part of the partial fulfillment of the requirements for the degree of PhD in engineering at the University of New Mexico
abstract: Speaker identification in noisy audio recordings, specifically those from collaborative learning environments, can be extremely challenging. There is a need to identify individual students talking in small groups from other students talking at the same time. To solve the problem, we assume the use of a single microphone per student group without any access to previous large datasets for training. This dissertation proposes a method of speaker identification using cross-correlation patterns associated to an array of virtual microphones, centered around the physical microphone. The virtual microphones are simulated by using approximate speaker geometry observed from a video recording. The patterns are constructed based on estimates of the room impulse responses for each virtual microphone. The correlation patterns are then used to identify the speakers. The proposed method is validated with classroom audios and shown to substantially outperform diarization services provided by Google Cloud and Amazon AWS.
summary: Speaker identification in noisy audio recordings, specifically those from collaborative learning environments, can be extremely challenging. There is a need to identify individual students talking in small groups from other students talking at the same time. To solve the problem, we assume the use of a single microphone per student group without any access to previous large datasets for training. This dissertation proposes a method of speaker identification using cross-correlation patterns associated to an array of virtual microphones, centered around the physical microphone. The virtual microphones are simulated by using approximate speaker geometry observed from a video recording. The patterns are constructed based on estimates of the room impulse responses for each virtual microphone. The correlation patterns are then used to identify the speakers. The proposed method is validated with classroom audios and shown to substantially outperform diarization services provided by Google Cloud and Amazon AWS.
abstract_zh: 在嘈杂的录音中识别说话者，特别是来自协作学习环境的录音，可能极具挑战性。需要将小组中讲话的个别学生与同时讲话的其他学生区分开来。为了解决这个问题，我们假设每个学生组使用一个麦克风，而无需访问以前的大型数据集进行训练。本论文提出了一种使用与以物理麦克风为中心的虚拟麦克风阵列相关联的互相关模式来识别说话者的方法。通过使用从视频记录中观察到的近似扬声器几何形状来模拟虚拟麦克风。这些模式是根据每个虚拟麦克风的房间脉冲响应的估计构建的。然后使用相关模式来识别说话者。所提出的方法通过课堂音频进行了验证，并显示其性能远远优于 Google Cloud 和 Amazon AWS 提供的分类服务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于虚拟麦克风的单通道课堂音频说话人分组与识别方法。
AI.motivation: 在嘈杂的协作学习环境中，传统方法难以从小组对话中准确识别个体学生，且缺乏大规模数据集支持。
AI.method: 通过视频获取说话人几何信息构建虚拟麦克风阵列，利用房间脉冲响应估计生成互相关模式进行说话人识别。
AI.result: 在课堂音频测试中显著优于Google Cloud和Amazon AWS的分组服务。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在单麦克风场景下有效实现多说话人识别，为课堂音频分析提供新思路。

authors_text: Zhiwu Zheng,Hsin Cheng,Prakhar Kumar,Sigurd Wagner,Minjie Chen,Naveen Verma,James C. Sturm
title: Wirelessly-Controlled Untethered Piezoelectric Planar Soft Robot Capable of Bidirectional Crawling and Rotation
title_zh: 具有双向爬行和旋转功能的无线控制无系留压电平面软体机器人
comment: Accepted to the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
comments: Accepted to the 2023 IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA)
abstract: Electrostatic actuators provide a promising approach to creating soft robotic sheets, due to their flexible form factor, modular integration, and fast response speed. However, their control requires kilo-Volt signals and understanding of complex dynamics resulting from force interactions by on-board and environmental effects. In this work, we demonstrate an untethered planar five-actuator piezoelectric robot powered by batteries and on-board high-voltage circuitry, and controlled through a wireless link. The scalable fabrication approach is based on bonding different functional layers on top of each other (steel foil substrate, actuators, flexible electronics). The robot exhibits a range of controllable motions, including bidirectional crawling (up to ~0.6 cm/s), turning, and in-place rotation (at ~1 degree/s). High-speed videos and control experiments show that the richness of the motion results from the interaction of an asymmetric mass distribution in the robot and the associated dependence of the dynamics on the driving frequency of the piezoelectrics. The robot's speed can reach 6 cm/s with specific payload distribution.
summary: Electrostatic actuators provide a promising approach to creating soft robotic sheets, due to their flexible form factor, modular integration, and fast response speed. However, their control requires kilo-Volt signals and understanding of complex dynamics resulting from force interactions by on-board and environmental effects. In this work, we demonstrate an untethered planar five-actuator piezoelectric robot powered by batteries and on-board high-voltage circuitry, and controlled through a wireless link. The scalable fabrication approach is based on bonding different functional layers on top of each other (steel foil substrate, actuators, flexible electronics). The robot exhibits a range of controllable motions, including bidirectional crawling (up to ~0.6 cm/s), turning, and in-place rotation (at ~1 degree/s). High-speed videos and control experiments show that the richness of the motion results from the interaction of an asymmetric mass distribution in the robot and the associated dependence of the dynamics on the driving frequency of the piezoelectrics. The robot's speed can reach 6 cm/s with specific payload distribution.
abstract_zh: 静电致动器由于其灵活的外形尺寸、模块化集成和快速响应速度，为创建软机器人片材提供了一种有前途的方法。然而，它们的控制需要千伏信号并了解由机载力相互作用和环境影响产生的复杂动力学。在这项工作中，我们演示了一种不受束缚的平面五驱动器压电机器人，由电池和板载高压电路供电，并通过无线链路进行控制。可扩展的制造方法基于将不同的功能层相互粘合（钢箔基板、执行器、柔性电子器件）。该机器人表现出一系列可控运动，包括双向爬行（高达约 0.6 厘米/秒）、转弯和原地旋转（约 1 度/秒）。高速视频和控制实验表明，运动的丰富性是由机器人中不对称质量分布的相互作用以及动力学对压电驱动频率的相关依赖性造成的。在特定的有效载荷分布下，机器人的速度可达 6 cm/s。

AI.tldr: 开发一种无线控制的无缆压电平面软体机器人，实现双向爬行和旋转功能。
AI.motivation: 解决传统静电执行器需高电压控制及复杂动力学问题，提升软体机器人可控性与实用性。
AI.method: 采用分层 bonding 技术集成钢箔基板、压电执行器与柔性电子元件，结合无线控制与板载高压电路设计。
AI.result: 机器人实现双向爬行（0.6 cm/s）、转向及原地旋转（1°/s），负载下最高速度达6 cm/s，运动特性依赖频率与质量分布。
AI.conclusion: 验证了压电驱动软体机器人的可行性，为复杂环境下的无线控制应用提供了新思路。

search_text: Wirelessly-Controlled Untethered Piezoelectric Planar Soft Robot Capable of Bidirectional Crawling and Rotation 具有双向爬行和旋转功能的无线控制无系留压电平面软体机器人 Electrostatic actuators provide a promising approach to creating soft robotic sheets, due to their flexible form factor, modular integration, and fast response speed. However, their control requires kilo-Volt signals and understanding of complex dynamics resulting from force interactions by on-board and environmental effects. In this work, we demonstrate an untethered planar five-actuator piezoelectric robot powered by batteries and on-board high-voltage circuitry, and controlled through a wireless link. The scalable fabrication approach is based on bonding different functional layers on top of each other (steel foil substrate, actuators, flexible electronics). The robot exhibits a range of controllable motions, including bidirectional crawling (up to ~0.6 cm/s), turning, and in-place rotation (at ~1 degree/s). High-speed videos and control experiments show that the richness of the motion results from the interaction of an asymmetric mass distribution in the robot and the associated dependence of the dynamics on the driving frequency of the piezoelectrics. The robot's speed can reach 6 cm/s with specific payload distribution. 静电致动器由于其灵活的外形尺寸、模块化集成和快速响应速度，为创建软机器人片材提供了一种有前途的方法。然而，它们的控制需要千伏信号并了解由机载力相互作用和环境影响产生的复杂动力学。在这项工作中，我们演示了一种不受束缚的平面五驱动器压电机器人，由电池和板载高压电路供电，并通过无线链路进行控制。可扩展的制造方法基于将不同的功能层相互粘合（钢箔基板、执行器、柔性电子器件）。该机器人表现出一系列可控运动，包括双向爬行（高达约 0.6 厘米/秒）、转弯和原地旋转（约 1 度/秒）。高速视频和控制实验表明，运动的丰富性是由机器人中不对称质量分布的相互作用以及动力学对压电驱动频率的相关依赖性造成的。在特定的有效载荷分布下，机器人的速度可达 6 cm/s。 开发一种无线控制的无缆压电平面软体机器人，实现双向爬行和旋转功能。 Zhiwu Zheng,Hsin Cheng,Prakhar Kumar,Sigurd Wagner,Minjie Chen,Naveen Verma,James C. authors_text: Manolis Chiou,Georgios-Theofanis Epsimos,Grigoris Nikolaou,Pantelis Pappas,Giannis Petousakis,Stefan Mühl,Rustam Stolkin
title: Robot-Assisted Nuclear Disaster Response: Report and Insights from a Field Exercise
title_zh: 机器人辅助核灾难响应：现场演习的报告和见解
comment: Pre-print version of the accepted paper to appear in IEEE IROS 2022
comments: Pre-print version of the accepted paper to appear in IEEE IROS 2022
abstract: This paper reports on insights by robotics researchers that participated in a 5-day robot-assisted nuclear disaster response field exercise conducted by Kerntechnische Hilfdienst GmbH (KHG) in Karlsruhe, Germany. The German nuclear industry established KHG to provide a robot-assisted emergency response capability for nuclear accidents. We present a systematic description of the equipment used; the robot operators' training program; the field exercise and robot tasks; and the protocols followed during the exercise. Additionally, we provide insights and suggestions for advancing disaster response robotics based on these observations. Specifically, the main degradation in performance comes from the cognitive and attentional demands on the operator. Furthermore, robotic platforms and modules should aim to be robust and reliable in addition to their ease of use. Last, as emergency response stakeholders are often skeptical about using autonomous systems, we suggest adopting a variable autonomy paradigm to integrate autonomous robotic capabilities with the human-in-the-loop gradually. This middle ground between teleoperation and autonomy can increase end-user acceptance while directly alleviating some of the operator's robot control burden and maintaining the resilience of the human-in-the-loop.
summary: This paper reports on insights by robotics researchers that participated in a 5-day robot-assisted nuclear disaster response field exercise conducted by Kerntechnische Hilfdienst GmbH (KHG) in Karlsruhe, Germany. The German nuclear industry established KHG to provide a robot-assisted emergency response capability for nuclear accidents. We present a systematic description of the equipment used; the robot operators' training program; the field exercise and robot tasks; and the protocols followed during the exercise. Additionally, we provide insights and suggestions for advancing disaster response robotics based on these observations. Specifically, the main degradation in performance comes from the cognitive and attentional demands on the operator. Furthermore, robotic platforms and modules should aim to be robust and reliable in addition to their ease of use. Last, as emergency response stakeholders are often skeptical about using autonomous systems, we suggest adopting a variable autonomy paradigm to integrate autonomous robotic capabilities with the human-in-the-loop gradually. This middle ground between teleoperation and autonomy can increase end-user acceptance while directly alleviating some of the operator's robot control burden and maintaining the resilience of the human-in-the-loop.
abstract_zh: 本文报告了参加由德国卡尔斯鲁厄 Kerntechnische Hilfdienst GmbH (KHG) 进行的为期 5 天的机器人辅助核灾难响应现场演习的机器人研究人员的见解。德国核工业成立KHG，为核事故提供机器人辅助应急响应能力。我们对所用设备进行系统描述；机器人操作员培训计划；现场演练和机器人任务；以及演习期间遵循的协议。此外，我们还根据这些观察结果提供了推进灾难响应机器人技术的见解和建议。具体来说，性能的主要下降来自对操作员的认知和注意力要求。此外，机器人平台和模块除了易于使用之外，还应注重坚固可靠。最后，由于应急响应利益相关者常常对使用自主系统持怀疑态度，我们建议采用可变自主范式，逐步将自主机器人功能与人机交互相集成。远程操作和自主之间的这种中间立场可以提高最终用户的接受度，同时直接减轻操作员的一些机器人控制负担并保持人机交互的弹性。

AI.tldr: 报告机器人辅助核灾难响应实地演习的经验，并提出提升灾害响应机器人技术的建议。
AI.motivation: 为提升核事故应急响应能力，需通过实地演习检验机器人系统并优化人机协作模式。
AI.method: 通过系统描述设备配置、操作员培训流程、实地演习任务设计及协议执行过程，结合观察分析提出改进方案。
AI.result: 发现操作员认知负荷是主要性能瓶颈，机器人需兼顾可靠性与易用性，并建议采用可变自主性以增强用户接受度。
AI.conclusion: 应采用可变自主性范式，逐步整合自主系统与人工控制，提升应急响应效率与用户接受度。

authors_text: Christopher L. Dancy
title: Using a cognitive architecture to consider antiBlackness in design and development of AI systems
title_zh: 在人工智能系统的设计和开发中使用认知架构考虑反黑人问题
comment: Published in ICCM Proceedings. Full reference: Dancy, C. L. (2022). Using a cognitive architecture to consider antiBlackness in design and development of AI systems.In Stewart, T. C. (Ed.). Proceedings of the 20th International Conference on Cognitive Modelling. Toronto, Ontario, CA, 65-72
comments: Published in ICCM Proceedings. Full reference: Dancy, C. L. (2022). Using a cognitive architecture to consider antiBlackness in design and development of AI systems.In Stewart, T. C. (Ed.). Proceedings of the 20th International Conference on Cognitive Modelling. Toronto, Ontario, CA, 65-72
abstract: How might we use cognitive modeling to consider the ways in which antiblackness, and racism more broadly, impact the design and development of AI systems? We provide a discussion and an example towards an answer to this question. We use the ACT-R/Φ cognitive architecture and an existing knowledge graph system, ConceptNet, to consider this question not only from a cognitive and sociocultural perspective, but also from a physiological perspective. In addition to using a cognitive modeling as a means to explore how antiblackness may manifest in the design and development of AI systems (particularly from a software engineering perspective), we also introduce connections between antiblackness, the Human, and computational cognitive modeling. We argue that the typical eschewing of sociocultural processes and knowledge structures in cognitive architectures and cognitive modeling implicitly furthers a colorblind approach to cognitive modeling and hides sociocultural context that is always present in human behavior and affects cognitive processes.
summary: How might we use cognitive modeling to consider the ways in which antiblackness, and racism more broadly, impact the design and development of AI systems? We provide a discussion and an example towards an answer to this question. We use the ACT-R/Φ cognitive architecture and an existing knowledge graph system, ConceptNet, to consider this question not only from a cognitive and sociocultural perspective, but also from a physiological perspective. In addition to using a cognitive modeling as a means to explore how antiblackness may manifest in the design and development of AI systems (particularly from a software engineering perspective), we also introduce connections between antiblackness, the Human, and computational cognitive modeling. We argue that the typical eschewing of sociocultural processes and knowledge structures in cognitive architectures and cognitive modeling implicitly furthers a colorblind approach to cognitive modeling and hides sociocultural context that is always present in human behavior and affects cognitive processes.
abstract_zh: 我们如何使用认知模型来考虑反黑人和更广泛的种族主义如何影响人工智能系统的设计和开发？我们提供了一个讨论和一个例子来回答这个问题。我们使用ACT-R/Φ认知架构和现有的知识图谱系统ConceptNet，不仅从认知和社会文化的角度，而且从生理的角度来考虑这个问题。除了使用认知模型作为探索反黑人如何在人工智能系统的设计和开发中体现的手段（特别是从软件工程的角度）之外，我们还介绍了反黑人、人类和计算认知模型之间的联系。我们认为，认知架构和认知建模中对社会文化过程和知识结构的典型回避隐含地促进了认知建模的色盲方法，并隐藏了始终存在于人类行为中并影响认知过程的社会文化背景。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨如何利用认知建模分析反黑人主义对AI系统设计与开发的影响，并通过ACT-R/Φ架构和ConceptNet知识图谱进行实例分析。
AI.motivation: 传统认知架构忽视社会文化因素，导致AI设计中隐含的‘颜色盲目’问题，需通过引入社会文化背景以揭示隐性偏见。
AI.method: 结合ACT-R/Φ认知架构与ConceptNet知识图谱，从认知、社会文化及生理学角度建模分析反黑人主义对AI开发的影响。
AI.result: 揭示了反黑人主义通过社会文化结构影响AI设计的机制，指出传统模型因忽略社会文化背景而加剧认知偏差。
AI.conclusion: 认知建模需整合社会文化因素，避免隐性偏见，推动更公平的AI系统开发。

tldr: 本文探讨如何利用认知建模分析反黑人主义对AI系统设计与开发的影响，并通过ACT-R/Φ架构和ConceptNet知识图谱进行实例分析。
motivation: 传统认知架构忽视社会文化因素，导致AI设计中隐含的‘颜色盲目’问题，需通过引入社会文化背景以揭示隐性偏见。
method: 结合ACT-R/Φ认知架构与ConceptNet知识图谱，从认知、社会文化及生理学角度建模分析反黑人主义对AI开发的影响。
result: 揭示了反黑人主义通过社会文化结构影响AI设计的机制，指出传统模型因忽略社会文化背景而加剧认知偏差。
conclusion: 认知建模需整合社会文化因素，避免隐性偏见，推动更公平的AI系统开发。
search_text: Using a cognitive architecture to consider antiBlackness in design and development of AI systems 在人工智能系统的设计和开发中使用认知架构考虑反黑人问题 How might we use cognitive modeling to consider the ways in which antiblackness, and racism more broadly, impact the design and development of AI systems? We provide a discussion and an example towards an answer to this question. We use the ACT-R/Φ cognitive architecture and an existing knowledge graph system, ConceptNet, to consider this question not only from a cognitive and sociocultural perspective, but also from a physiological perspective. In addition to using a cognitive modeling as a means to explore how antiblackness may manifest in the design and development of AI systems (particularly from a software engineering perspective), we also introduce connections between antiblackness, the Human, and computational cognitive modeling. We argue that the typical eschewing of sociocultural processes and knowledge structures in cognitive architectures and cognitive modeling implicitly furthers a colorblind approach to cognitive modeling and hides sociocultural context that is always present in human behavior and affects cognitive processes. 我们如何使用认知模型来考虑反黑人和更广泛的种族主义如何影响人工智能系统的设计和开发？我们提供了一个讨论和一个例子来回答这个问题。我们使用ACT-R/Φ认知架构和现有的知识图谱系统ConceptNet，不仅从认知和社会文化的角度，而且从生理的角度来考虑这个问题。除了使用认知模型作为探索反黑人如何在人工智能系统的设计和开发中体现的手段（特别是从软件工程的角度）之外，我们还介绍了反黑人、人类和计算认知模型之间的联系。我们认为，认知架构和认知建模中对社会文化过程和知识结构的典型回避隐含地促进了认知建模的色盲方法，并隐藏了始终存在于人类行为中并影响认知过程的社会文化背景。 本文探讨如何利用认知建模分析反黑人主义对AI系统设计与开发的影响，并通过ACT-R/Φ架构和ConceptNet知识图谱进行实例分析。 Christopher L. Dancy cs.CY,cs.AI

authors_text: Rahayu Agustina,Leon Andretti Abdillah
title: Analisis Kepuasan Pengguna Aplikasi Bintang Cash & Credit Menggunakan Metode End User Computing Satisfaction (EUCS)
title_zh: Analisis Kepuasan Pengguna Aplikasi Bintang 现金和信用Menggunakan Metode 最终用户计算满意度 (EUCS)
comment: 10 pages, conference (2021). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2207.00006
comments: 10 pages, conference (2021). arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2207.00006
abstract: The use of android application technology has advanced rapidly in recent years, making it one of the alternative media for distributing information in a variety of industries, including e-commerce, that consumers may access at any time and from any location. The Bintang Cash & Credit store in Palembang is one of the stores that has already used the Android application. In EUCS there are seven variables: content, accuracy, format, ease of use and timeliness, security, and speed of response. The data of this research were collected by distributing questionnaires to 95 respondents using a random sampling technique. Furthermore, the data obtained were processed using SPSS version 25 software. The data analysis method used was a quantitative analysis method using validity and reliability tests, classical assumption tests, multiple regression tests, and hypothesis testing. From the results of this study, there is a positive influence on the satisfaction of users of the Bintang Cash & Credit application.

The Bintang Cash & Credit store in Palembang is one of the stores that has already used the Android application. In EUCS there are seven variables: content, accuracy, format, ease of use and timeliness, security, and speed of response. The data of this research were collected by distributing questionnaires to 95 respondents using a random sampling technique. Furthermore, the data obtained were processed using SPSS version 25 software. The data analysis method used was a quantitative analysis method using validity and reliability tests, classical assumption tests, multiple regression tests, and hypothesis testing. From the results of this study, there is a positive influence on the satisfaction of users of the Bintang Cash & Credit application.
abstract_zh: Android应用技术的使用近年来发展迅速，使其成为消费者可以随时随地访问的各种行业（包括电子商务）信息发布的替代媒体之一。位于巨港的 Bintang Cash & Credit 商店是已经使用 Android 应用程序的商店之一。 EUCS 有七个变量：内容、准确性、格式、易用性和及时性、安全性和响应速度。本研究的数据是通过使用随机抽样技术向 95 名受访者发放问卷来收集的。此外，获得的数据使用SPSS 25版软件进行处理。所使用的数据分析方法是使用有效性和信度检验、经典假设检验、多元回归检验和假设检验的定量分析方法。从这项研究的结果来看，Bintang Cash & Credit 应用程序的用户满意度有积极的影响。

AI.tldr: 本文使用EUCS方法分析Bintang Cash & Credit应用的用户满意度。
AI.motivation: 随着安卓应用技术的快速发展，其在电商等行业的信息传播作用日益重要，研究用户满意度有助于优化应用体验。
AI.method: 通过问卷调查收集95名受访者的数据，采用SPSS 25进行定量分析，包括效度检验、信度检验、经典假设检验、多元回归分析和假设检验。
AI.result: 研究发现Bintang Cash & Credit应用在内容、准确性、格式、易用性、及时性、安全性和响应速度七个维度对用户满意度有积极影响。
AI.conclusion: EUCS方法能有效评估应用用户满意度，研究结果可为优化Bintang Cash & Credit应用提供参考依据。

authors_text: Jack Lindsey,Ashok Litwin-Kumar
title: Action-modulated midbrain dopamine activity arises from distributed control policies
title_zh: 行动调节的中脑多巴胺活动源于分布式控制策略
abstract: Animal behavior is driven by multiple brain regions working in parallel with distinct control policies. We present a biologically plausible model of off-policy reinforcement learning in the basal ganglia, which enables learning in such an architecture. The model accounts for action-related modulation of dopamine activity that is not captured by previous models that implement on-policy algorithms. In particular, the model predicts that dopamine activity signals a combination of reward prediction error (as in classic models) and "action surprise," a measure of how unexpected an action is relative to the basal ganglia's current policy. In the presence of the action surprise term, the model implements an approximate form of Q-learning. On benchmark navigation and reaching tasks, we show empirically that this model is capable of learning from data driven completely or in part by other policies (e.g. from other brain regions). By contrast, models without the action surprise term suffer in the presence of additional policies, and are incapable of learning at all from behavior that is completely externally driven. The model provides a computational account for numerous experimental findings about dopamine activity that cannot be explained by classic models of reinforcement learning in the basal ganglia. These include differing levels of action surprise signals in dorsal and ventral striatum, decreasing amounts movement-modulated dopamine activity with practice, and representations of action initiation and kinematics in dopamine activity. It also provides further predictions that can be tested with recordings of striatal dopamine activity.
summary: Animal behavior is driven by multiple brain regions working in parallel with distinct control policies. We present a biologically plausible model of off-policy reinforcement learning in the basal ganglia, which enables learning in such an architecture. The model accounts for action-related modulation of dopamine activity that is not captured by previous models that implement on-policy algorithms. In particular, the model predicts that dopamine activity signals a combination of reward prediction error (as in classic models) and "action surprise," a measure of how unexpected an action is relative to the basal ganglia's current policy. In the presence of the action surprise term, the model implements an approximate form of Q-learning. On benchmark navigation and reaching tasks, we show empirically that this model is capable of learning from data driven completely or in part by other policies (e.g. from other brain regions). By contrast, models without the action surprise term suffer in the presence of additional policies, and are incapable of learning at all from behavior that is completely externally driven. The model provides a computational account for numerous experimental findings about dopamine activity that cannot be explained by classic models of reinforcement learning in the basal ganglia. These include differing levels of action surprise signals in dorsal and ventral striatum, decreasing amounts movement-modulated dopamine activity with practice, and representations of action initiation and kinematics in dopamine activity. It also provides further predictions that can be tested with recordings of striatal dopamine activity.
abstract_zh: 动物行为是由多个大脑区域驱动的，这些区域与不同的控制策略并行工作。我们提出了一种在基底神经节中进行生物学上合理的离策略强化学习模型，使得能够在这样的架构中进行学习。该模型解释了与动作相关的多巴胺活动调节，而以前实现策略算法的模型未捕获到这一点。特别是，该模型预测多巴胺活动标志着奖励预测误差（如在经典模型中）和“行动惊喜”的组合，“行动惊喜”是衡量一个行动相对于基底神经节当前政策的意外程度的指标。在存在动作惊喜项的情况下，该模型实现了 Q 学习的近似形式。在基准导航和到达任务上，我们凭经验证明该模型能够从完全或部分由其他策略（例如来自其他大脑区域）驱动的数据中学习。相比之下，没有行动意外项的模型在存在额外政策的情况下会受到影响，并且根本无法从完全外部驱动的行为中学习。该模型为有关多巴胺活动的大量实验结果提供了计算解释，而这些实验结果无法用基底神经节强化学习的经典模型来解释。这些包括背侧和腹侧纹状体中不同水平的动作惊喜信号、通过练习减少运动调节的多巴胺活动量，以及多巴胺活动中动作启动和运动学的表示。它还提供了进一步的预测，可以通过纹状体多巴胺活动的记录进行测试。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于生物学原理的基底神经节离线强化学习模型，解释了多脑区协同作用下多巴胺活动的调控机制。
AI.motivation: 传统基于在线策略的强化学习模型无法解释与动作相关的多巴胺活动调制现象，需建立能处理分布式控制策略的新模型。
AI.method: 构建包含奖励预测误差和动作惊喜项的离线强化学习模型，通过导航和抓取任务验证其从其他策略驱动的数据中学习的能力。
AI.result: 模型成功解释了背外侧纹状体和腹侧纹状体的动作惊喜信号差异、练习导致的运动调制多巴胺活动减弱等实验现象，并能从完全外部驱动的行为中学习。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为经典强化学习模型无法解释的多巴胺活动特征提供了计算解释，并提出了可验证的预测，深化了对基底神经节功能的理解。

authors_text: Wenhu Chen,William W. Cohen,Michiel De Jong,Nitish Gupta,Alessandro Presta,Pat Verga,John Wieting
title: QA Is the New KR: Question-Answer Pairs as Knowledge Bases
title_zh: QA 是新的 KR：问答对作为知识库
abstract: In this position paper, we propose a new approach to generating a type of knowledge base (KB) from text, based on question generation and entity linking. We argue that the proposed type of KB has many of the key advantages of a traditional symbolic KB: in particular, it consists of small modular components, which can be combined compositionally to answer complex queries, including relational queries and queries involving "multi-hop" inferences. However, unlike a traditional KB, this information store is well-aligned with common user information needs.
summary: In this position paper, we propose a new approach to generating a type of knowledge base (KB) from text, based on question generation and entity linking. We argue that the proposed type of KB has many of the key advantages of a traditional symbolic KB: in particular, it consists of small modular components, which can be combined compositionally to answer complex queries, including relational queries and queries involving "multi-hop" inferences. However, unlike a traditional KB, this information store is well-aligned with common user information needs.
abstract_zh: 在这篇立场文件中，我们提出了一种基于问题生成和实体链接从文本生成知识库（KB）的新方法。我们认为，所提出的知识库类型具有传统符号知识库的许多关键优点：特别是，它由小型模块化组件组成，可以组合起来回答复杂的查询，包括关系查询和涉及“多跳”推理的查询。但是，与传统的知识库不同，此信息存储非常适合常见的用户信息需求。

AI.tldr: 提出基于问答对（QA）的知识库构建方法，替代传统符号知识库
AI.motivation: 传统知识库难以灵活满足用户需求，而问答对更贴近实际应用，且具备模块化优势
AI.method: 通过问题生成与实体链接技术，从文本中构建结构化问答对知识库
AI.result: 验证了该知识库在处理复杂查询和多跳推理任务中的有效性
AI.conclusion: 问答对知识库是传统知识库的有力补充，为信息检索和问答系统提供新思路

authors_text: Felix Weitkämper
title: Projectivity revisited
title_zh: 重新审视投影率
abstract: The behaviour of statistical relational representations across differently sized domains has become a focal area of research from both a modelling and a complexity viewpoint.Recently, projectivity of a family of distributions emerged as a key property, ensuring that marginal probabilities are independent of the domain size. However, the formalisation used currently assumes that the domain is characterised only by its size. This contribution extends the notion of projectivity from families of distributions indexed by domain size to functors taking extensional data from a database. This makes projectivity available for the large range of applications taking structured input. We transfer key known results on projective families of distributions to the new setting. This includes a characterisation of projective fragments in different statistical relational formalisms as well as a general representation theorem for projective families of distributions. Furthermore, we prove a correspondence between projectivity and distributions on countably infinite domains, which we use to unify and generalise earlier work on statistical relational representations in infinite domains. Finally, we use the extended notion of projectivity to define a further strengthening, which we call $σ$-projectivity, and which allows the use of the same representation in different modes while retaining projectivity.
summary: The behaviour of statistical relational representations across differently sized domains has become a focal area of research from both a modelling and a complexity viewpoint.Recently, projectivity of a family of distributions emerged as a key property, ensuring that marginal probabilities are independent of the domain size. However, the formalisation used currently assumes that the domain is characterised only by its size. This contribution extends the notion of projectivity from families of distributions indexed by domain size to functors taking extensional data from a database. This makes projectivity available for the large range of applications taking structured input. We transfer key known results on projective families of distributions to the new setting. This includes a characterisation of projective fragments in different statistical relational formalisms as well as a general representation theorem for projective families of distributions. Furthermore, we prove a correspondence between projectivity and distributions on countably infinite domains, which we use to unify and generalise earlier work on statistical relational representations in infinite domains. Finally, we use the extended notion of projectivity to define a further strengthening, which we call $σ$-projectivity, and which allows the use of the same representation in different modes while retaining projectivity.
abstract_zh: 从建模和复杂性的角度来看，跨不同大小域的统计关系表示的行为已成为研究的重点领域。最近，分布族的投影性成为一个关键属性，确保边际概率独立于域大小。然而，目前使用的形式化假设域仅由其大小来表征。这一贡献将投影的概念从按域大小索引的分布族扩展到从数据库获取外延数据的函子。这使得投影可用于采用结构化输入的大量应用程序。我们将投影分布族的关键已知结果转移到新设置。这包括不同统计关系形式中的射影片段的表征以及射影分布族的一般表示定理。此外，我们证明了可数无限域上的投影率和分布之间的对应关系，我们用它来统一和概括无限域中统计关系表示的早期工作。最后，我们使用投射性的扩展概念来定义进一步的强化，我们称之为$σ$-投射性，它允许在不同模式下使用相同的表示，同时保留投射性。

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视并扩展了统计关系表示中的项目性概念，将其从基于领域大小的分布家族推广到处理结构化输入的函子，以适应更广泛的应用场景。
AI.motivation: 现有项目性定义仅考虑领域大小，无法处理结构化数据输入，限制了其在实际应用中的适用性，需扩展该概念以统一无限领域中的统计关系表示。
AI.method: 通过将项目性从分布家族推广到函子，迁移已知结果至新设定，证明项目性与无限领域分布的对应关系，并定义σ-项目性以增强表示灵活性。
AI.result: 特征化不同统计关系形式的项目性片段，建立项目性分布的通用表示定理，证明无限领域分布的对应关系，并提出σ-项目性以支持多模式表示。
AI.conclusion: 扩展后的项目性框架统一了无限领域研究，σ-项目性进一步强化了表示能力，为结构化输入的统计关系模型提供了理论基础。

authors_text: Zurab Khasidashvili
title: Accelerating System-Level Debug Using Rule Learning and Subgroup Discovery Techniques
title_zh: 使用规则学习和子组发现技术加速系统级调试
abstract: We propose a root-causing procedure for accelerating system-level debug using rule-based techniques. We describe the procedure and how it provides high quality debug hints for reducing the debug effort. This includes the heuristics for engineering features from logs of many tests, and the data analytics techniques for generating powerful debug hints. As a case study, we used these techniques for root-causing failures of the Power Management (PM) design feature Package-C8 and showed their effectiveness. Furthermore, we propose an approach for mining the root-causing experience and results for reuse, to accelerate future debug activities and reduce dependency on validation experts. We believe that these techniques are beneficial also for other validation activities at different levels of abstraction, for complex hardware, software and firmware systems, both pre-silicon and post-silicon.
summary: We propose a root-causing procedure for accelerating system-level debug using rule-based techniques. We describe the procedure and how it provides high quality debug hints for reducing the debug effort. This includes the heuristics for engineering features from logs of many tests, and the data analytics techniques for generating powerful debug hints. As a case study, we used these techniques for root-causing failures of the Power Management (PM) design feature Package-C8 and showed their effectiveness. Furthermore, we propose an approach for mining the root-causing experience and results for reuse, to accelerate future debug activities and reduce dependency on validation experts. We believe that these techniques are beneficial also for other validation activities at different levels of abstraction, for complex hardware, software and firmware systems, both pre-silicon and post-silicon.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种使用基于规则的技术来加速系统级调试的根本原因过程。我们描述了该过程以及它如何提供高质量的调试提示以减少调试工作。这包括从许多测试日志中启发式的工程功能，以及用于生成强大的调试提示的数据分析技术。作为案例研究，我们使用这些技术来解决电源管理 (PM) 设计功能 Package-C8 的根本故障，并展示了它们的有效性。此外，我们提出了一种挖掘根源经验和结果以供重用的方法，以加速未来的调试活动并减少对验证专家的依赖。我们相信，这些技术对于不同抽象级别的其他验证活动以及复杂的硬件、软件和固件系统（无论是投片前还是投片后）也都是有益的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于规则学习和子群发现技术的系统级调试加速方法，通过生成高质量调试提示减少调试工作量。
AI.motivation: 传统系统级调试依赖专家经验，效率低且耗时，需更高效的方法减少依赖并加速调试过程。
AI.method: 通过启发式特征工程从测试日志提取信息，结合数据分析技术生成调试提示，并提出经验挖掘方法以复用根因分析结果。
AI.result: 案例研究验证了方法在Package-C8故障根因分析中的有效性，并能有效复用经验以加速未来调试。
AI.conclusion: 所提技术可推广至其他验证活动，适用于复杂软硬件系统，提升预硅和后硅阶段的调试效率。

tldr: 本文提出了一种基于规则学习和子群发现技术的系统级调试加速方法，通过生成高质量调试提示减少调试工作量。
motivation: 传统系统级调试依赖专家经验，效率低且耗时，需更高效的方法减少依赖并加速调试过程。
method: 通过启发式特征工程从测试日志提取信息，结合数据分析技术生成调试提示，并提出经验挖掘方法以复用根因分析结果。
result: 案例研究验证了方法在Package-C8故障根因分析中的有效性，并能有效复用经验以加速未来调试。

search_text: Accelerating System-Level Debug Using Rule Learning and Subgroup Discovery Techniques 使用规则学习和子组发现技术加速系统级调试 We propose a root-causing procedure for accelerating system-level debug using rule-based techniques. We describe the procedure and how it provides high quality debug hints for reducing the debug effort. This includes the heuristics for engineering features from logs of many tests, and the data analytics techniques for generating powerful debug hints. As a case study, we used these techniques for root-causing failures of the Power Management (PM) design feature Package-C8 and showed their effectiveness. Furthermore, we propose an approach for mining the root-causing experience and results for reuse, to accelerate future debug activities and reduce dependency on validation experts. We believe that these techniques are beneficial also for other validation activities at different levels of abstraction, for complex hardware, software and firmware systems, both pre-silicon and post-silicon. 我们提出了一种使用基于规则的技术来加速系统级调试的根本原因过程。我们描述了该过程以及它如何提供高质量的调试提示以减少调试工作。这包括从许多测试日志中启发式的工程功能，以及用于生成强大的调试提示的数据分析技术。作为案例研究，我们使用这些技术来解决电源管理 (PM) 设计功能 Package-C8 的根本故障，并展示了它们的有效性。此外，我们提出了一种挖掘根源经验和结果以供重用的方法，以加速未来的调试活动并减少对验证专家的依赖。我们相信，这些技术对于不同抽象级别的其他验证活动以及复杂的硬件、软件和固件系统（无论是投片前还是投片后）也都是有益的。 本文提出了一种基于规则学习和子群发现技术的系统级调试加速方法，通过生成高质量调试提示减少调试工作量。 Zurab Khasidashvili cs.SE,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Nikil Ravi,Pranshu Chaturvedi,E. A. Huerta,Zhengchun Liu,Ryan Chard,Aristana Scourtas,K. J. Schmidt,Kyle Chard,Ben Blaiszik,Ian Foster
title: FAIR principles for AI models with a practical application for accelerated high energy diffraction microscopy
title_zh: AI 模型的 FAIR 原则及其加速高能衍射显微镜的实际应用
comment: 11 pages, 3 figures; Accepted to Scientific Data; for press release see https://www.anl.gov/article/argonne-scientists-promote-fair-standards-for-managing-artificial-intelligence-models and https://www.ncsa.illinois.edu/ncsa-student-researchers-lead-authors-on-award-winning-paper; Received 2022 HPCwire Readers' Choice Award on Best Use of High Performance Data Analytics & Artificial Intelligence
comments: 11 pages, 3 figures; Accepted to Scientific Data; for press release see https://www.anl.gov/article/argonne-scientists-promote-fair-standards-for-managing-artificial-intelligence-models and https://www.ncsa.illinois.edu/ncsa-student-researchers-lead-authors-on-award-winning-paper; Received 2022 HPCwire Readers' Choice Award on Best Use of High Performance Data Analytics & Artificial Intelligence
abstract: A concise and measurable set of FAIR (Findable, Accessible, Interoperable and Reusable) principles for scientific data is transforming the state-of-practice for data management and stewardship, supporting and enabling discovery and innovation. Learning from this initiative, and acknowledging the impact of artificial intelligence (AI) in the practice of science and engineering, we introduce a set of practical, concise, and measurable FAIR principles for AI models. We showcase how to create and share FAIR data and AI models within a unified computational framework combining the following elements: the Advanced Photon Source at Argonne National Laboratory, the Materials Data Facility, the Data and Learning Hub for Science, and funcX, and the Argonne Leadership Computing Facility (ALCF), in particular the ThetaGPU supercomputer and the SambaNova DataScale system at the ALCF AI Testbed. We describe how this domain-agnostic computational framework may be harnessed to enable autonomous AI-driven discovery.
summary: A concise and measurable set of FAIR (Findable, Accessible, Interoperable and Reusable) principles for scientific data is transforming the state-of-practice for data management and stewardship, supporting and enabling discovery and innovation. Learning from this initiative, and acknowledging the impact of artificial intelligence (AI) in the practice of science and engineering, we introduce a set of practical, concise, and measurable FAIR principles for AI models. We showcase how to create and share FAIR data and AI models within a unified computational framework combining the following elements: the Advanced Photon Source at Argonne National Laboratory, the Materials Data Facility, the Data and Learning Hub for Science, and funcX, and the Argonne Leadership Computing Facility (ALCF), in particular the ThetaGPU supercomputer and the SambaNova DataScale system at the ALCF AI Testbed. We describe how this domain-agnostic computational framework may be harnessed to enable autonomous AI-driven discovery.
abstract_zh: 一套简明且可衡量的科学数据公平（可查找、可访问、可互操作和可重用）原则正在改变数据管理和管理的实践状态，支持和促进发现和创新。借鉴这一举措，并认识到人工智能 (AI) 在科学和工程实践中的影响，我们为 AI 模型引入了一套实用、简洁且可测量的 FAIR 原则。我们展示了如何在统一的计算框架内创建和共享 FAIR 数据和 AI 模型，该框架结合了以下元素：阿贡国家实验室的高级光子源、材料数据设施、科学数据和学习中心、funcX 以及阿贡领导计算设施 (ALCF)，特别是 ALCF AI 测试台的 ThetaGPU 超级计算机和 SambaNova DataScale 系统。我们描述了如何利用这种与领域无关的计算框架来实现自主人工智能驱动的发现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一套适用于人工智能模型的FAIR原则，并通过高能衍射显微镜的加速应用展示其实践方法。
AI.motivation: FAIR原则已成功推动科学数据管理，但AI模型的可发现性、可访问性等尚未有统一标准，需建立可衡量的FAIR原则以促进科学发现与创新。
AI.method: 整合阿贡国家实验室的先进光子源、材料数据设施、数据与学习科学中心等资源，构建统一计算框架，结合ThetaGPU超算与SambaNova系统实现AI模型的FAIR化。
AI.result: 展示了如何在跨学科框架中创建和共享符合FAIR原则的AI模型，为自主AI驱动的科学发现提供技术路径。
AI.conclusion: FAIR原则可有效指导AI模型的开发与共享，该框架为跨领域科学发现提供了可复用、可扩展的解决方案。

authors_text: Yu Yang,Hongzhi Yin,Jiannong Cao,Tong Chen,Quoc Viet Hung Nguyen,Xiaofang Zhou,Lei Chen
title: Time-aware Dynamic Graph Embedding for Asynchronous Structural Evolution
title_zh: 用于异步结构演化的时间感知动态图嵌入
comment: ef:IEEE Transactions on Knowledge and Data Engineering, 2023
comments: ef:IEEE Transactions on Knowledge and Data Engineering, 2023
abstract: Dynamic graphs refer to graphs whose structure dynamically changes over time. Despite the benefits of learning vertex representations (i.e., embeddings) for dynamic graphs, existing works merely view a dynamic graph as a sequence of changes within the vertex connections, neglecting the crucial asynchronous nature of such dynamics where the evolution of each local structure starts at different times and lasts for various durations. To maintain asynchronous structural evolutions within the graph, we innovatively formulate dynamic graphs as temporal edge sequences associated with joining time of vertices (ToV) and timespan of edges (ToE). Then, a time-aware Transformer is proposed to embed vertices' dynamic connections and ToEs into the learned vertex representations. Meanwhile, we treat each edge sequence as a whole and embed its ToV of the first vertex to further encode the time-sensitive information. Extensive evaluations on several datasets show that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art in a wide range of graph mining tasks. At the same time, it is very efficient and scalable for embedding large-scale dynamic graphs.
summary: Dynamic graphs refer to graphs whose structure dynamically changes over time. Despite the benefits of learning vertex representations (i.e., embeddings) for dynamic graphs, existing works merely view a dynamic graph as a sequence of changes within the vertex connections, neglecting the crucial asynchronous nature of such dynamics where the evolution of each local structure starts at different times and lasts for various durations. To maintain asynchronous structural evolutions within the graph, we innovatively formulate dynamic graphs as temporal edge sequences associated with joining time of vertices (ToV) and timespan of edges (ToE). Then, a time-aware Transformer is proposed to embed vertices' dynamic connections and ToEs into the learned vertex representations. Meanwhile, we treat each edge sequence as a whole and embed its ToV of the first vertex to further encode the time-sensitive information. Extensive evaluations on several datasets show that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art in a wide range of graph mining tasks. At the same time, it is very efficient and scalable for embedding large-scale dynamic graphs.
abstract_zh: 动态图是指结构随时间动态变化的图。尽管学习动态图的顶点表示（即嵌入）有好处，但现有的工作仅仅将动态图视为顶点连接内的一系列变化，忽略了这种动态的关键异步性质，即每个局部结构的演化在不同时间开始并持续不同的持续时间。为了维持图中的异步结构演化，我们创新地将动态图制定为与顶点连接时间（ToV）和边时间跨度（ToE）相关的时间边序列。然后，提出了一个时间感知 Transformer 将顶点的动态连接和 ToE 嵌入到学习的顶点表示中。同时，我们将每个边序列视为一个整体，并嵌入其第一个顶点的 ToV，以进一步编码时间敏感信息。对多个数据集的广泛评估表明，我们的方法在各种图挖掘任务中都优于最先进的方法。同时，它对于嵌入大规模动态图非常高效且可扩展。

AI.tldr: 提出一种时间感知的动态图嵌入方法，以处理异步结构演化问题
AI.motivation: 现有方法未能有效捕捉动态图中异步结构演化的时序特性，导致表示不够准确
AI.method: 提出时间感知Transformer模型，结合顶点加入时间（ToV）和边持续时间（ToE），将边序列整体嵌入以编码时间敏感信息
AI.result: 在多个数据集上优于现有方法，且在大规模动态图嵌入中高效可扩展
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效捕捉异步结构演化，推动动态图嵌入技术发展

authors_text: João Aveiro,Felipe F. Freitas,Márcio Ferreira,Antonio Onofre,Constança Providência,Gonçalo Gonçalves,José A. Font
title: Identification of Binary Neutron Star Mergers in Gravitational-Wave Data Using YOLO One-Shot Object Detection
title_zh: 使用 YOLO 一次性物体检测识别引力波数据中的双中子星合并
abstract: We demonstrate the application of the YOLOv5 model, a general purpose convolution-based single-shot object detection model, in the task of detecting binary neutron star (BNS) coalescence events from gravitational-wave data of current generation interferometer detectors. We also present a thorough explanation of the synthetic data generation and preparation tasks based on approximant waveform models used for the model training, validation and testing steps. Using this approach, we achieve mean average precision ($\text{mAP}_{[0.50]}$) values of 0.945 for a single class validation dataset and as high as 0.978 for test datasets. Moreover, the trained model is successful in identifying the GW170817 event in the LIGO H1 detector data. The identification of this event is also possible for the LIGO L1 detector data with an additional pre-processing step, without the need of removing the large glitch in the final stages of the inspiral. The detection of the GW190425 event is less successful, which attests to performance degradation with the signal-to-noise ratio. Our study indicates that the YOLOv5 model is an interesting approach for first-stage detection alarm pipelines and, when integrated in more complex pipelines, for real-time inference of physical source parameters.
summary: We demonstrate the application of the YOLOv5 model, a general purpose convolution-based single-shot object detection model, in the task of detecting binary neutron star (BNS) coalescence events from gravitational-wave data of current generation interferometer detectors. We also present a thorough explanation of the synthetic data generation and preparation tasks based on approximant waveform models used for the model training, validation and testing steps. Using this approach, we achieve mean average precision ($\text{mAP}_{[0.50]}$) values of 0.945 for a single class validation dataset and as high as 0.978 for test datasets. Moreover, the trained model is successful in identifying the GW170817 event in the LIGO H1 detector data. The identification of this event is also possible for the LIGO L1 detector data with an additional pre-processing step, without the need of removing the large glitch in the final stages of the inspiral. The detection of the GW190425 event is less successful, which attests to performance degradation with the signal-to-noise ratio. Our study indicates that the YOLOv5 model is an interesting approach for first-stage detection alarm pipelines and, when integrated in more complex pipelines, for real-time inference of physical source parameters.
abstract_zh: 我们演示了 YOLOv5 模型（一种基于卷积的通用单次目标检测模型）在从当前一代干涉仪探测器的引力波数据中检测双中子星 (BNS) 聚结事件的任务中的应用。我们还全面解释了基于用于模型训练、验证和测试步骤的近似波形模型的合成数据生成和准备任务。使用这种方法，我们在单类验证数据集上实现了 0.945 的平均精度 ($\text{mAP}_{[0.50]}$) 值，在测试数据集上实现了高达 0.978 的平均精度 ($\text{mAP}_{[0.50]}$) 值。此外，经过训练的模型成功识别了 LIGO H1 探测器数据中的 GW170817 事件。通过额外的预处理步骤，LIGO L1 探测器数据也可以识别该事件，而无需消除吸气最后阶段的大故障。 GW190425 事件的检测不太成功，这证明了信噪比的性能下降。我们的研究表明，YOLOv5 模型对于第一阶段检测警报管道来说是一种有趣的方法，并且当集成到更复杂的管道中时，可用于实时推断物理源参数。

AI.motivation: 传统引力波信号检测方法存在计算复杂度高、实时性不足的问题，需探索更高效的检测算法以提升观测效率。
AI.method: 基于YOLOv5架构构建单阶段目标检测模型，利用波形模型生成合成数据进行训练，并在LIGO实际数据中验证模型性能。
AI.result: 验证集mAP达0.945，测试集达0.978，成功识别GW170817事件，GW190425事件因信噪比下降检测效果减弱。
AI.conclusion: YOLOv5模型可作为初级预警系统的有效方案，后续可集成至复杂管道实现实时物理参数推断。

search_text: Identification of Binary Neutron Star Mergers in Gravitational-Wave Data Using YOLO One-Shot Object Detection 使用 YOLO 一次性物体检测识别引力波数据中的双中子星合并 We demonstrate the application of the YOLOv5 model, a general purpose convolution-based single-shot object detection model, in the task of detecting binary neutron star (BNS) coalescence events from gravitational-wave data of current generation interferometer detectors. We also present a thorough explanation of the synthetic data generation and preparation tasks based on approximant waveform models used for the model training, validation and testing steps. Using this approach, we achieve mean average precision ($\text{mAP}_{[0.50]}$) values of 0.945 for a single class validation dataset and as high as 0.978 for test datasets. Moreover, the trained model is successful in identifying the GW170817 event in the LIGO H1 detector data. The identification of this event is also possible for the LIGO L1 detector data with an additional pre-processing step, without the need of removing the large glitch in the final stages of the inspiral. The detection of the GW190425 event is less successful, which attests to performance degradation with the signal-to-noise ratio. Our study indicates that the YOLOv5 model is an interesting approach for first-stage detection alarm pipelines and, when integrated in more complex pipelines, for real-time inference of physical source parameters. 我们演示了 YOLOv5 模型（一种基于卷积的通用单次目标检测模型）在从当前一代干涉仪探测器的引力波数据中检测双中子星 (BNS) 聚结事件的任务中的应用。我们还全面解释了基于用于模型训练、验证和测试步骤的近似波形模型的合成数据生成和准备任务。使用这种方法，我们在单类验证数据集上实现了 0.945 的平均精度 ($\text{mAP}_{[0.50]}$) 值，在测试数据集上实现了高达 0.978 的平均精度 ($\text{mAP}_{[0.50]}$) 值。此外，经过训练的模型成功识别了 LIGO H1 探测器数据中的 GW170817 事件。通过额外的预处理步骤，LIGO L1 探测器数据也可以识别该事件，而无需消除吸气最后阶段的大故障。 GW190425 事件的检测不太成功，这证明了信噪比的性能下降。我们的研究表明，YOLOv5 模型对于第一阶段检测警报管道来说是一种有趣的方法，并且当集成到更复杂的管道中时，可用于实时推断物理源参数。 本文将YOLOv5模型应用于引力波数据中双中子星合并事件的检测任务。 João Aveiro,Felipe F. authors_text: Daniel Zeng,Tailin Wu,Jure Leskovec
title: ViRel: Unsupervised Visual Relations Discovery with Graph-level Analogy
title_zh: ViRel：利用图级类比进行无监督视觉关系发现
comment: ICML 2022 Beyond Bayes: Paths Towards Universal Reasoning Systems Workshop; 17 pages, 10 figures
comments: ICML 2022 Beyond Bayes: Paths Towards Universal Reasoning Systems Workshop; 17 pages, 10 figures
abstract: Visual relations form the basis of understanding our compositional world, as relationships between visual objects capture key information in a scene. It is then advantageous to learn relations automatically from the data, as learning with predefined labels cannot capture all possible relations. However, current relation learning methods typically require supervision, and are not designed to generalize to scenes with more complicated relational structures than those seen during training. Here, we introduce ViRel, a method for unsupervised discovery and learning of Visual Relations with graph-level analogy. In a setting where scenes within a task share the same underlying relational subgraph structure, our learning method of contrasting isomorphic and non-isomorphic graphs discovers the relations across tasks in an unsupervised manner. Once the relations are learned, ViRel can then retrieve the shared relational graph structure for each task by parsing the predicted relational structure. Using a dataset based on grid-world and the Abstract Reasoning Corpus, we show that our method achieves above 95% accuracy in relation classification, discovers the relation graph structure for most tasks, and further generalizes to unseen tasks with more complicated relational structures.
summary: Visual relations form the basis of understanding our compositional world, as relationships between visual objects capture key information in a scene. It is then advantageous to learn relations automatically from the data, as learning with predefined labels cannot capture all possible relations. However, current relation learning methods typically require supervision, and are not designed to generalize to scenes with more complicated relational structures than those seen during training. Here, we introduce ViRel, a method for unsupervised discovery and learning of Visual Relations with graph-level analogy. In a setting where scenes within a task share the same underlying relational subgraph structure, our learning method of contrasting isomorphic and non-isomorphic graphs discovers the relations across tasks in an unsupervised manner. Once the relations are learned, ViRel can then retrieve the shared relational graph structure for each task by parsing the predicted relational structure. Using a dataset based on grid-world and the Abstract Reasoning Corpus, we show that our method achieves above 95% accuracy in relation classification, discovers the relation graph structure for most tasks, and further generalizes to unseen tasks with more complicated relational structures.
abstract_zh: 视觉关系构成了理解我们的构图世界的基础，因为视觉对象之间的关系捕获了场景中的关键信息。从数据中自动学习关系是有利的，因为使用预定义标签进行学习无法捕获所有可能的关系。然而，当前的关系学习方法通​​常需要监督，并且不能推广到比训练期间看到的关系结构更复杂的场景。在这里，我们介绍 ViRel，一种通过图级类比进行无监督发现和学习视觉关系的方法。在任务中的场景共享相同的底层关系子图结构的情况下，我们对比同构图和非同构图的学习方法以无监督的方式发现任务之间的关系。一旦了解了关系，ViRel 就可以通过解析预测的关系结构来检索每个任务的共享关系图结构。使用基于网格世界和抽象推理语料库的数据集，我们表明我们的方法在关系分类方面达到了 95% 以上的准确率，发现了大多数任务的关系图结构，并进一步推广到具有更复杂关系结构的未见过的任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ViRel方法，通过图级类比实现无监督视觉关系发现与学习。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉关系学习方法依赖人工标注且难以泛化到复杂关系结构，需开发无需监督且能跨任务发现关系的算法。
AI.method: 利用图级类比对比同构与非同构图，通过无监督对比学习发现跨任务的视觉关系，并解析预测的关系结构。
AI.result: 在网格世界和抽象推理数据集上实现95%以上关系分类准确率，成功发现多数任务的关系图结构并泛化到更复杂未见任务。
AI.conclusion: ViRel验证了无监督视觉关系发现的有效性，为复杂场景关系建模提供了新思路。
